claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: Belgiumtɔwo ƒe aɖaŋuɖola mebia be Belgiumtɔwo nadzo le Belgium alo Europa o
evidence: Aɖaŋuɖola aɖe bia be ame siwo Islamtɔwo ƒe awudodo do dziku na le Brussels ƒe gbɔtodu aɖe me la nanɔ Belgium ƒe fiadu ƒe akpa bubu, ke menye be Belgium dukɔmeviwo nadzo le dukɔa me alo Europa o, si to vovo na nyatakaka siwo woma le Internet dzi le afisiafi.A 25-second video clip of Saliha Raiss speaking at a council meeting in Molenbeek-Saint-Jean on August 27 was shared on Instagram with the claim she’d called for a "Europe without Europeans”.The September 1, opens new tab post falsely quoted Raiss as saying: “Amesiwo mate ŋu axɔ nyɔnu siwo wotsɔ nutsyɔnu tsyɔ nu wo dzi alo Islam le Belgium o la nase le wo ɖokui me faa be yewoadzo!”Reuters ImageElon Musk shared, opens new tab an identical post on X with the caption: “Ele be Belgiumtɔwo nadzo le Belgium!? Esia nye tagbɔsesẽ.” Wokpɔe wu miliɔn 42. Gake video klipi la ɖee fia be Raiss do susua ɖa be nyɔnu siwo tsyɔ nu nu le Molenbeek, si nye Moslemtɔ gbogbo aɖewo ƒe aƒe, do dziku na wo be woadzo aɖanɔ Brussels ƒe nuto 19-awo dometɔ bubu me la, opens new tab. Meɖee fia be ele yɔyɔm be Belgiumtɔwo nadzo le Belgium alo Europatɔwo be woadzo le Europa o.Raiss, si do taɖa, ʋu tab yeye, ƒo nu le Fransegbe me gake eƒe nya siwo gɔme woɖe ɖe Eŋlisigbe me xlẽ be: “Eye ne ame siawo siwo doa xɔmetsovɔwo [si le nu ƒom tso Islamtɔwo ƒe taɖa ŋu] - mate ŋu ana nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe ne èdi elabena edze abe enyɔa ɖetsɔleme geɖe - ne míeɖe fu ma gbegbe, . ne womegadi be yewoagakpɔ mí gɔ̃ hã o la, mebe dudzikpɔƒe 19 ye le nutoa me, ne edze abe le Molenbeek la, womate ŋu anɔ afima o ene la, trɔ akpa, yi teƒe bubu Do go!”The full video of the meeting, opens new tab gives more context to Raiss’ comments. Do ŋgɔ teti na eƒe nyawo le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe videoa me la, egblɔ be wogblɔ ameƒomevinyenye ƒe nyawo le Belgium dunyaheha si nye Mouvement Reformateur (Reformist Movement) ƒe Facebook-dzesi dzi eye be womele ewɔm si sɔ gbɔ be woaɖe wo ɖa o.Belgian media reported, opens new tab one of the comments had said Raiss was wearing a curtain on her head, hence her reference to it in her council speech.A spokesperson for Mouvement Reformateur le Molenbeek gblɔ le e-mail aɖe me le September 3 lia dzi be woɖe nya siwo Raiss ƒo nu tsoe la ɖa elabena ƒuƒoƒoa mexɔa “amedzrowo ƒe fuléle, Islamtɔwo ƒe fuléle alo ameƒomevinyenye ƒe fuléle” nyawo o.Raiss meɖo nya ŋu na biabia be woagblɔ nya aɖeke o. Egblɔ be, opens new tab Brussels media outlet BX1 la social media clip la tso eƒe nyawo eye wòtro nyateƒea. Egblɔ be yebia tso amedzrowo kple ameƒomevinyenye ƒe futɔwo si be woadzo le Molenbeek, ke menye be Belgiumtɔwo katã nadzo le nutoa me o. ƲƆNUDƆDƆMissing context. Raiss, esi wònɔ nu ƒom le nyatoƒoetoto aɖe si wogblɔ be woto nyatoƒoe le eƒe taɖa ŋu me la, egblɔ be amesiwo Islamtɔwo ƒe aɖabɛwuwo do dziku na le yewoƒe nuto si nye Molenbeek me ate ŋu ayi aɖanɔ Brussels ƒe nuto 19 la dometɔ bubu me.Reuters Fact Check ƒe ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia. Xlẽ nu geɖe tso míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzrodɔa ŋu.Míaƒe Dzidzenuwo: Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., ʋu tab yeye Nyati siwo wodo ɖa:Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzroAmegbetɔ ƒe GomenɔamesiwoMamãXFacebookLinkedinEmailLink

claim: Tso ƒe 2020 ƒe amexexlẽ me la, Florida "tso Democrattɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ gbɔ va ɖo Republicantɔwo ƒe viɖe miliɔn 1.5 gbɔ."
evidence: Gbesigbe do ŋgɔ na dukɔa ƒe sewɔlawo kpe ta hena kpekpe tɔxɛ aɖe si ku ɖe nutome yeyewo gbugbɔgaɖoɖo ŋu la, Florida Republicantɔwo ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã Ron DeSantis ɖe eƒe dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe anyigbatata si wòdo ɖa, si ate ŋu aɖo Republicantɔwo be woatrɔ zikpui ene siwo dzi Democrattɔwo le la ɖe go. DeSantis ma anyigbatataa le April 27 dzi kple Fox News hafi ɖoe ɖe dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea. Egblɔ be anyigbatata yeyea — si woɖena zi geɖe le ƒe 10 ɖesiaɖe megbe le amexexlẽa megbe — atsi tre ɖi na Florida ƒe ametialawo le dzɔdzɔenyenye me wu. "Florida xɔ kpuie le ƒe 2020 ƒe amexexlẽ me, eye míele avu wɔm ɖe teƒenɔla dzɔdzɔe ta tso ɣemaɣi," DeSantis gblɔ na Fox News, heƒo nu tso amexexlẽ ƒe xexlẽme si mede ame dzi le nutoa me le ƒe ma me ŋu. "Míaƒe amewo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi ŋutɔ tso ɣemaɣi, eye míeʋu tso Democrattɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ gbɔ va ɖo Republicantɔwo ƒe viɖe miliɔn 1.5 gbɔ." Republicantɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ le Florida la sɔ gbɔ abe miliɔn 1.5 ene le Florida wu Democrattɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ fifia. Gake egblɔa Democrattɔwo ƒe akpa aɖe ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me ƒe ŋgɔyiyi tsã la wògbɔa eme. Demokrasitɔwo ƒe ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe akɔdada me la sɔ gbɔ abe 100,000 ene wu Republicantɔwo le ƒe 2020 me, si nye ƒe si me woxlẽ amewo ƒe ewo sɔŋ. Demokrasitɔwo ƒe xexlẽme sɔ gbɔ, ke menye ame akpa gãtɔ o, le atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ me, ne wobu amesiwo medo ƒome kple akpa aɖeke alo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe ame etɔ̃lia o ŋu. Agbɔsɔsɔme fia be enye esi kɔkɔ wu le hatsotso ɖeka ɖesiaɖe me, gake menye 50% kpe ɖe ɖeka ŋu o. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, ne wodzidzee to akɔdada me — si ɖea amesi asubɔ le zi dzi, to vovo na atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ŋuti nyatakakawo — Republicantɔwo wɔ dɔ nyuie le Florida ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2020, wokpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe nutodziɖuɖu, Sewɔtakpekpea kple sewɔtakpekpea ƒe amedɔdɔwo dzi ƒe bla nanewo eye woɖu dzi le dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada me si dze egɔme tso ƒe 2016. "Dɔwɔwɔ le tiatia ŋutɔŋutɔwo me, ke menye akpaɖekedzimademade me o, nye metrik si wozãna ɣesiaɣi tsɔ drɔ̃a ʋɔnu nutome ƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye anyigbatatawo," Barry Burden, si nye Wisconsin Yunivɛsiti ƒe dunyaheheŋutinunyala gblɔ. DeSantis ƒe dɔwɔƒea meɖo PolitiFact ƒe kpeɖodzibiabia ŋu o. Le ƒe 2020 me la, Florida Democratstɔwo xɔ ŋgɔ na Republicantɔwo le ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe akɔdada me, miliɔn 5.3 va ɖo miliɔn 5.2. Vovototo ma nɔ ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ ƒe geɖe. GOP xɔ ŋgɔ le ƒe 2021 me eye womeɖe asi le eŋu tso ɣemaɣi o.Egbea la, Republicantɔwo ƒe ŋgɔdonya na amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikemawɔmawɔ me nye miliɔn 5.5 va ɖo miliɔn 4.1, si gogo nusi DeSantis gblɔ. DeSantis ƒe akpa eve ƒe susu ŋe aɖaba ƒu edzi be Florida ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe 28% woŋlɔ ŋkɔ be No Party Affiliation — Florida ƒe nya si wozãna na ame siwo le wo ɖokui si — alo wonye ame etɔ̃lia me tɔwo, abe Libertarian ene. Ame mawo dede akɔntabubua me fia be Republicantɔwo ƒe xexlẽme ade 41% le dukɔa ƒe atikemawɔla siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na me, si nye agbɔsɔsɔ. Democrats ƒe viɖe le ƒe 2020 me hã menye ame akpa gãtɔ o. Zi mamlɛtɔ si Democrattɔwo xɔ Florida ƒe atikemawɔla siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na ƒe akpa gãtɔ vavãtɔ le ƒe 1992. Republicantɔwo mexɔ atikemawɔla siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na ƒe akpa gãtɔ le nutoa me kpɔ o. Ametialawo ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me nye xexlẽdzesi vovovo siwo wozãna tsɔ dzidzea akpahawo ƒe ŋusẽ si wotsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo la dometɔ ɖeka. Dunyaheŋutinunyalawo yɔa akpaɖekedzimademade be enye "nusi tsi megbe" elabena elɔ̃na be yeatrɔ blewu wu akɔdada ƒe nuwɔna. Esia nye vevietɔ elabena exɔa ɣeyiɣi geɖe na atikemawɔlawo be woatrɔ woƒe akpaa ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ, gake ne wonya ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ko la, woate ŋu ada akɔ na amesiame kokoko le dutoƒotiatiawɔɣia. Le Florida la, Democrattɔ geɖe siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na la nɔ akɔ dam ɖe Republicantɔwo dzi le ɔfis veviwo me do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2020. Nɔnɔme sia ke dzɔ le South kple Appalachia ƒe akpa bubuwo, afisi Democrattɔwo ɖu dzi le tsã gake tso ɣemaɣi la, womegakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Republicantɔwo dzi o. Ame siwo tiaa amewo ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me ƒe xexlẽme nɔ blewu tsɔ ɖe tɔtrɔ sia fia. Le kadodo si me mekɔ o si le akpahawo ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me kple akɔdada ƒe nuwɔna dome ta la, zi geɖe la, dunyahehe me numekulawo ƒe susu nɔa tiatiawɔblɔɖe me tsonu ŋu ne wole ŋusẽ si nutome ƒe anyigbatata kpɔna ɖe amewo dzi dzidzem. Aubrey Jewett, si nye Central Florida Yunivɛsiti ƒe dunyaheheŋutinunyala gblɔ be akɔdada ƒe ɖoɖowo dzidzedze le vevie ŋutɔ le nuto siwo me No Party Affiliation le nɔƒe gbãtɔ le be enye “ha” gãtɔ evelia. Le Florida la, esiawo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Osceola kple Orange nuto siwo me amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo si te ɖe Orlando ŋu, Broward County (Fort Lauderdale), Lee County (Fort Myers) kple Pasco (si le Tampa ƒe dziehe gome). Democrattɔwo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ le ƒe 2020 me meɖe egɔme be Florida nye Democrattɔwo ƒe dukɔ si tsia tre ɖe eŋu o. Zi mamlɛtɔ si Democrattɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala aɖe ɖu dzi le dukɔa me enye le ƒe 2012 me, esime Barack Obama xɔ 49.9% le amewo ƒe akɔntabubu me. Le Democrattɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ene siwo woɖo be woaɖu dzi le dukɔa me tso ƒe 1976 me dome la, ame eve koe — Jimmy Carter le ƒe 1976 me kple Obama le ƒe 2008 me — ye wɔe to ame akpa gãtɔ ƒe akɔdada me tsɔ wu be woawɔe to amehawo ƒe akɔdada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ me. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, Republicantɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametialawo ɖu dzi le Florida zi enyi tso ƒe 1976 va ɖo ƒe 2024. Le dukɔa ƒe xɔ me

claim: "Le Division of Revenue Act 2025 te la, míeɖo KSh415 biliɔn si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o na nutoawo, si ade KSh30 biliɔn si sɔ gbɔ wu ƒe si va yi ƒe ga si míema."
evidence: Ruto tɔ dzɔ be nutoawo axɔ KSh415 biliɔn le ƒe 2025/26 ƒe ga ƒea me, si nye KSh30 biliɔn kloe wu ƒe si do ŋgɔ. Eƒe xexlẽme si nye KSh4 triliɔn si wotsɔ yi nutowo me tso esime wodze dziɖuɖua nana gɔme hã lé ɖe te. Gake dukplɔla la gblɔ ame agbɔsɔsɔme si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le eCitizen, si nye dziɖuɖua ƒe dijitaal dɔwɔƒewo ƒe mɔnu dzi wògbɔ eme, eye womete ŋu ɖo kpe nya si wògblɔ tso ga biliɔn geɖe siwo woƒo ƒu to edzi ŋu dzi o. Dudzikpɔlawo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla Ahmed Abdullahi gblɔe nyateƒe be nutome ƒe ga si wodzɔ la le dukɔa ƒe gazazã ƒe 10 va ɖo 13% dome. Le August 2025 me la, dukplɔla William Ruto va kpe ɖe Kenya ƒe nutodziɖula 47 ŋu le Homa Bay nuto , si didi tso Nairobi gbɔ abe kilometa 400 ene le dzigbeɣetoɖoƒe gome, hena ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe takpekpea . Fifia le eƒe ƒe 12 lia me la, ame aɖewo ɖe ɖeklemi kpekpea be enye " ɣeyiɣi kple nunɔamesiwo gbegblẽ " gake zi geɖe la, wobunɛ be enye ɣeyiɣi vevi aɖe na dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖo si wotsɔ de asi na amewo, si woɖo le ƒe 2010 me, be woada eƒe ŋgɔyiyi kple gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo kpɔ. Ruto yɔ shilling triliɔn geɖe siwo woɖo ɖe nutoawo kple ga biliɔn geɖe siwo wotsɔ to eCitizen , si nye dziɖuɖua ƒe dijitaal agbo dzi, be enye kpeɖodzi be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua léa ŋku ɖe eŋu zi geɖe be edoa alɔ dziɖuɖua nana amewo. Dudzikpɔlawo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla Ahmed Abdullahi gahe susu yi dzidzedze siwo wokpɔ le nutoawo me dzi, eye wòyɔ lãmesẽdɔwɔƒe geɖe wu kple ɖɔkta kple dɔnɔdzikpɔla bubuwo xɔxɔ. Gake ɖe kplɔla eveawo ƒe nyawo va ƒo ƒua? Míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu. Dukplɔla William Ruto Ruto gblɔ be akɔntabubuawo ɖe eƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna be yeatsɔ ŋusẽ kple nunɔamesiwo ade asi na Kenya ƒe nuto 47 la fia. Dukplɔsea ka ɖe edzi na nutoawo be woakpɔ dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ siwo ŋu wodzro nyitsɔ laa ƒe 15% ya teti, si woyɔna be gomekpɔkpɔ si sɔ . Nutoawo hã xɔa gakpekpeɖeŋu tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ. Le dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖoa te la, sewɔtakpekpe , si me dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe kple sewɔtakpekpe le lae maa ga la. Dukɔa ƒe gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ɖea asi le ga la ŋu, eye gaŋutiɖoɖodzikpɔla ɖea mɔ ɖe ga ɖesiaɖe si woatsɔ anae ŋu. Woɖoa ga si woatsɔ ana nutoawo ƒe sia ƒe le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe mama ƒe sea me. Nyitsɔ laa, na ƒe 2025, ɖee fia be nutoawo xɔ KSh415 biliɔn (si ade Amerika dɔlar biliɔn 3.2). Le ƒe 2024 me la, xexlẽmea nye KSh400 biliɔn , gake woɖe edzi le ƒea ƒe domedome va ɖo KSh387.43 biliɔn le sɔhɛwo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu megbe . Ga home ma si bɔbɔ wu la, gaŋutiɖoɖodzikpɔla kple gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe July 2025 ƒe nyatakaka si ku ɖe ga ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo wokpɔ kple ga si woɖe ɖe go ŋu siaa ɖo kpe edzi. Ruto se esia gɔme nyuie. Nutoawo ƒe akpa si sɔ le ƒe 2025 me nye KSh415 biliɔn. Le ƒe 2024 me la, eɖo KSh387.43 biliɔn. Ema nye KSh27.57 biliɔn bubu – KSh30 biliɔn bubu kloe. Africa Check hã ƒo ŋutinya me nyatakakawo nu ƒu, si ɖee fia be ƒe 2025 ƒe ga si woma lae nye esi lolo wu vaseɖe fifia si nutoawo xɔ.  Ruto gblɔ be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua tsɔ KSh4 triliɔn (si ade dɔlar biliɔn 30.74) de asi na nutowo le woƒe agbenɔɣi. Gadzɔdzɔ ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be tso esime nutomedziɖuɖuwo wɔ dɔ le March 2013 ƒe dutoƒotiatiawɔɣia megbe vaseɖe June 2024 me la, nutoawo xɔ KSh3.6 triliɔn. Le July 2024 kple June 2025 dome la, woxɔ KSh418.3 biliɔn bubu , eye KSh229.2 biliɔn kplɔe ɖo le July 2025. Kaka dukplɔla la nagblɔ eƒe nya la, ga si wotsɔ yi na wo katã la ɖo KSh4.24 triliɔn. Ruto ƒe nya sɔ. Ruto te gbe ɖe eCitizen , si nye Kenya ƒe dijitaal mɔnu si dzi woato akpɔ dziɖuɖudɔwo ahaxe fe ɖe wo ta, agbalẽwo biabia kple dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo me toto ƒe dzidziɖedzi dzi. Egblɔ be yewɔ dziɖuɖudɔ siwo wu 22,000, si nye dzidziɖedzi tso 300 le eƒe gɔmedzedze. Nyatakakaawo ɖo kpe dzidziɖedzi gã aɖe dzi: Le June 2023 me la, Ruto dze dɔwɔƒe yeye 5,084 ƒe ʋuɖoɖo gɔme, si dzi woɖo kpee le gaxɔa ƒe November 2023 ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka me. Kaka October 2024 naɖo la, gaxɔa gblɔ be wowɔ dɔ 16,000. Le December me la, eCitizen ƒe dɔdzikpɔƒea gblɔ be xexlẽmea nye 22,515 . March 2025 ƒe agbalẽdzikpɔlagã ƒe nyatakaka aɖe de dzesii be dɔwɔƒe 222 kple dɔwɔƒe siwo wu 22,000 ye nɔ nuƒolanɔƒea. In his June 2025 budget speech , ganyawo gbɔkpɔla John Mbadi gblɔ na sewɔtakpekpea be dijitaal dɔwɔnawo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi "tso 350 le ƒe 2022 me va ɖo 20,985 le ƒe 2025 me". Le ɣleti ma ke me la, eCitizen ƒe dɔdzikpɔƒea ta nyatakaka aɖe si ƒo nu tso dɔwɔƒe 21,000 siwo wotsɔ de ʋua me bliboe ŋu, eye wogale bubuwo wɔm ɖekae. The official eCitizen homepage banner at time of publication reads : "Dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔwɔna siwo wu 22,000 siwo li fifia tso 100+ Subɔsubɔhawo, Nutowo, Dɔwɔƒewo kple Dɔwɔƒewo gbɔ." Kpeɖodziawo ɖee fia be wole kekem ɖe enu madzudzɔmadzudzɔe, eye subɔsubɔdɔwo ƒe xexlẽme to vovo vie le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo le dutoƒo ɖo kpe Ruto ƒe xexlẽme si nye 22,000 dzi nyateƒe, togbɔ be xexlẽme ɖeka pɛ hã meli si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o hã. Ruto ƒe ŋkɔ

Nusi míenya tso Bovaer kple Denmark nyiwo ƒe agblewo ŋu

Denmark agbledelawo tsi dzi ɖe woƒe lãhawo ƒe lãmesẽ ŋu le sedede aɖe si wode be woaɖe methane ƒe dodo dzi akpɔtɔ to nuɖuɖu ƒe tɔtrɔ me megbe eye video dzi ɖaseɖiɖiwo le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me be wogblɔ be nuɖuɖu kpeɖeŋutɔ si nye Bovaer le nyiwo wum. Denmark ƒe sedzikpɔdɔwɔƒewo ʋu numekuku aɖe nu, gake fifia la, kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be atikekui sia -- si wozãna le lɔlɔ̃nu faa me le dukɔ 70 me -- nana nyiwo kuna o.



"VEVIETƆ: Denmark zi agbledelawo dzi be woana atike nyiwo be woaxe mɔ na wo be woagaɖe aɖuɖɔ o, le yame ƒe nɔnɔme ta! Fifia nyi siwo le Denmark le mumum hele kukum le Bovaer ƒe aɖi ta," November 4, 2025 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi gblɔ.AFP te ŋu de dzesi video geɖe, siwo dze abe ɖe wonye nyateƒe ene tso Denmark agbledelawo gbɔ siwo ɖee fia be nya aɖewo le woƒe lãhawo ƒe lãmesẽ ŋu si wogblɔ be atike si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la he vɛ (archived here, here and here).Gake nyatakaka siwo yɔ fũ kple vɔvɔ̃ tso akɔntabubu siwo meku ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu o me gbugbɔ ma agbledelawo ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖewo le nutoawo kple gbegbɔgblɔwo me le mɔ̃ geɖewo dzi, elabena yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti ɖikelawo ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo hã do ŋusẽ nya siwo wogblɔ.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


X nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe le December 1, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot
					
Videoawo ƒo nu tso Denmarktɔwo ƒe sedede aɖe si wowɔ le ƒe 2025 me si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be woatsɔ axe mɔ ɖe lã kple nyinotsi dɔwɔƒewo ƒe ya si dona le yame nu. Ebia tso agbledelawo si be woatsɔ ami geɖe ade nyiwo ƒe nuɖuɖu me alo woatsɔ atike si nye Bovaer (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) ana. Switzerland-Netherlands dɔwɔƒe si nye DSM-Firmenich ye wɔ Bovaer, eye wòzãa atike si nye 3-nitrooxypropanol (3NOP) tsɔ trɔa nyi ƒe nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ ƒe afɔɖeɖe mamlɛtɔ, eye le nyateƒe me la, etrɔa eƒe ʋuʋudediwo wòzua haidrodzin tsɔ wu be woatrɔ asi le eŋu wòazu methane (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).Methane nye ya si gblẽa nu le anyigba ŋu si ŋu ŋusẽ le etɔxɛe eye wònɔa agbe kpuie si zi geɖe la, alé dzoxɔxɔ ne wowɔe to nyiwo, si wɔe be Anyigba ƒe dzoxɔxɔ kabakaba.Togbɔ be Denmark agbledelawo he susu yi lãmesẽkuxi siwo le nyiwo me dzi le Bovaer dede nyiwo ƒe nuɖuɖu me vɔ megbe hã la, dziɖuɖu kple dɔwɔƒewo ƒe eŋutinunyalawo gale numekuku wɔm be yewoanya nenye be nuwɔnaawo do ƒome kple atike si wotsɔ wɔa dɔe.Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, dukɔ aɖeke metsɔ Bovaer zazã nye sedziwɔwɔ fifia o.Denmarktɔwo ƒe sededeDenmark agbledelawo ate ŋu atiae be yewoana Bovaer alo adzii ɖe edzi ami le nyiwo ƒe nuɖuɖu me, "gake Bovaer dzi wɔwɔ le bɔbɔe wu sã," Ermias Kebreab, si nye xexeame katã ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le Agbledede Kple Nutomeŋutinunya ƒe Kɔledzi le California Yunivɛsiti, Davis (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) ƒe tatɔ kpeɖeŋutɔ gblɔ.Egblɔ na AFP le November 21 dzi be Bovaer nye kpeɖeŋutɔ si "wosrɔ̃ nu tsoe le afisiafi kple agbalẽ siwo wu 100 siwo wota" eye be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi geɖe le ɖee fia be mekpɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ gã aɖeke ɖe nyiwo ƒe lãmesẽ dzi tso 3NOP tsɔtsɔ de nuɖuɖu me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) me o.Denmark Lãwo ƒe Dɔléle Kple Nuɖuɖu Dɔwɔƒe gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le November 22 dzi me be yewole ŋku lém ɖe nɔnɔmea ŋu kple yewoƒe dɔwɔƒea ƒe hadɔwɔlawo eye yewoate ŋu atrɔ asi le nuɖuɖu ƒe kpɔɖeŋu siwo wodo ɖa na ƒe 2026 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) ŋu (wole dzi dem ƒo na agbledelawo be woagblɔ lãmesẽnya ɖesiaɖe na dziɖuɖua (wodzrae ɖo afisia).SEGES Innovation, si nye Denmarktɔwo ƒe numekuku kple ŋgɔyiyidɔwɔƒe si kpɔa nyatoƒoetotoawo me dzodzro dzi, ka nya ta be le lãha 644 siwo naa notsi siwo noa atike si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la dome la, 419 ɖee fia be woƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ

claim: Aleema Khanum, si nye Pakistan PM tsãtɔ Imran Khan si wode gaxɔ me nɔvinyɔnu yɔ Pakistan Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ Asim Munir be enye “Islamtɔ si tsi tre ɖe eŋu” si di vevie be yeawɔ aʋa kple India le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le Sky News me.
evidence: Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe kple nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖewo le video aɖe mam si gblɔ be Aleema Khanum, si nye Pakistan ƒe PM tsãtɔ Imran Khan si wode gaxɔ me nɔvinyɔnu, ɖe ɖeklemi Pakistan Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ Asim Munir vevie le gbebiame aɖe si wogblɔ be wowɔ kple Sky News me, eye wòyɔe be "Islamtɔ si ƒe nuwɔna to vovo" si di be yeawɔ aʋa kple India.  Video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la didi miniti 1 kple sɛkɛnd 13, si me gbebiamela kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Yalda Hakim bia Imran Khan nɔvinyɔnu, Alema Khanum be, "Nukatae nèsusu be Pakistan yi aʋa le May me? Nye ŋutɔ menɔ nudzɔdzɔ siwo dzɔ le aʋawɔɣia dometɔ aɖewo teƒe kpɔm. Mɔnukpɔkpɔ hã su asinye mebia gbe Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla, gake medi be mase nusita nèsusu be aʋa si dzɔ le Pakistan kple India dome la dzɔ gɔme. Abe alesi mese, miaƒe nyawo ene." he zitɔtɔ aɖewo vɛ."  Le eŋuɖoɖo me la, wose Aleema Khanum gblɔ le video si kaka ɖe amewo me be, "Yalda, Asim Munir sia nye "Islamtɔ si ƒe nuwɔna to vovo" ŋutɔ ... eye wònye ame si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe asi le mawusubɔsubɔ me. Esia tae wòdi be yeawɔ aʋa kple India, elabena eƒe mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe zazɛ̃nyahehe kple blemakɔnuléleɖeasi ʋãnɛ be wòawɔ avu kple amesiwo mexɔ Islam dzi se o. Esiae de vovototo eyama kple Imran Khan, amesi nye ablɔɖeme blibo. Eyata, ɣesiaɣi si Imran Khan va xɔ dziɖuɖua, àkpɔe be edzea agbagba ɣesiaɣi be yeadze xɔlɔ̃ India kple BJP gɔ̃ hã Gake ne Islamtɔ zazɛ̃nyahela sia si ŋkɔe nye Asim Munir, le afima la, ekema àkpɔe be aʋa aɖe adzɔ kple India, eye menye India ɖeɖekoe wòagblẽ nu le o ke boŋ India ƒe hadɔwɔlawo hã ŋue wòakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo, eye ele be Ɣetoɖoƒedukɔwo nadze agbagba be woaɖe asi le Imran Khan ŋu.  Woma videoa ɖe Facebook dzi eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "#BREAKING: Le Sky News ƒe gbebiame aɖe me la, Aleema Khanum, si nye PM tsãtɔ Imran Khan nɔvinyɔnu, gblɔ be Asrafowo ƒe amegã Asim Munir ye trɔ asi le May ƒe aʋawɔwɔ kple India ŋu be yeado ŋusẽ yeƒe Islamtɔwo ƒe dzedzeme, eye wògblɔ be Hindutɔwo ƒe taɖodzinu tiatia le Pahalgam nye yeƒe ɖoɖoa ƒe akpa aɖe". (Archive Link) Tsɔ kpe ɖe esia ŋu la, Telegraph, NDTV, India Today, Hindustan Times, kple Wion News hã ta nyatakakawo tso nya sia ŋu be Imran Khan, de gaxɔ me le Rawalpindi ƒe Adiala Gaxɔ me ƒe eve kple edzivɔ le esi ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖe tso afia nɛ le nufitifitiwɔwɔ ƒe nya aɖe me vɔ megbe. Nyitsɔ laa la, Khan ƒe ƒomea gblɔ be womeɖe mɔ na yewo be yewoado go ye le gaxɔ me o. Le esia megbe la, esi nɔvianyɔnu etɔ̃, Aleema Khanum, Naureen Niazi, kple Uzma Khan, ɖo Adiala Gaxɔ me be yewoado goe la, kpovitɔ siwo nɔ afima tɔ wo le mɔa dzi. Gake le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la, gaxɔdzikpɔlawo ɖe mɔ na Imran Khan nɔvinyɔnuwo dometɔ ɖeka, Uzma Khan, be wòado go.  Kpeɖodzi 1. Sky News ƒe Gbebiame Gbãtɔ Meɖe Nya Ma tɔgbe aɖeke Fia Be míaku nya si Imran Khan nɔvinyɔnu Aleema Khan gblɔ si kaka ɖe amewo dome la me la, míewɔ nya veviwo didi eye míekpɔ video aɖe si woda ɖe Sky News ƒe YouTube akɔnta dzi le December 3. 2. Full Episode Review Confirms Misrepresentation Le video sia si xɔ abe miniti 3 ene me la, Aleema Khanum ƒo nu tso Imran Khan ƒe lãmesẽ ŋu, eye wòdze Asim dzi Munir. Gake le video sia me la, Sky News ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Yalda Hakim mebia nya aɖeke tso India kple Pakistan ŋu o eye metsɔ ŋuɖoɖo si sɔ kple esi le video si kaka ɖe amewo me la hã na o. Emegbe míekpɔ wɔna bliboa ƒe video, si woda ɖe Sky News ƒe YouTube nyatakakadzraɖoƒe le December 3, 2025. Le miniti 13 ƒe dzesi kple miniti 18 ƒe dzesi si nye "Xexeame kple Yalda Hakim" dome la, míekpɔ gbebiame si wowɔ kple Alema Khanum.  Esi míese akpa bliboa vɔ la, míekpɔe be Aleema gblɔ Imran Khan ƒe lãmesẽ ŋuti nyatakakawo gbã eye emegbe wògblɔ Imran Khan ƒe susuwo tso Asim Munir ŋu, si wògblɔ na nɔvianyɔnu Uzma Khan. Emegbe edze Asim Munir dzi, eye wòyɔe be ŋutasẽdziɖula. Egblɔ hã be Pakistantɔwo do dziku ɖe ye ŋu. Emegbe ena nyatakaka tso nya siwo le edzi yim ɖe Imran Khan ŋu la ŋu eye wògblɔ be Imran Khan le Pakistan dukɔmevi 90 le alafa me teƒe, eyata wodi be yewoaɖee ɖe aga.  3. Yalda Hakim Issues Public Rebuttal  During our investigation, we also found that Yalda Hakim also posted a rebuttal to the claim from her X account, writing, "This is extremely scary. A deepfake video of my interview with Imran Khan's sister, Aleema Khan, is going viral. It falsely claims that we discussed this year's Pakistan-India war. We did not do that at all. This clip nye alakpa keŋkeŋ."  Menye esia ɖeɖeko o, le December 4, 2025 dzi la, Yalda Hakim hã ƒo nu tso video sia ŋu le eƒe wɔnaa me eye wògblɔ alesi wotrɔ asi le eƒe gbebiame ŋu heɖee fia, evɔ naneke si le abe esia ene menɔ anyi le gbebiame ŋutɔŋutɔ me o eye nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖewo hã ta aʋatso gbebiame sia, c

claim: Kuɖiɖi aɖe si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Spain na wokpɔ ŋkuɖodzikpe gã aɖe si xɔ ƒe 7,000, si do xoxo wu Egipte ƒe piramidwo.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Enye nyateƒe be ŋkuɖodzikpe gã aɖe si xɔ ƒe akpe adre la dzena ne kuɖiɖiwo na Valdecañas tsita si le Spain ƒe nuto si le eɖokui si si nye Extremadura me ƒe kɔkɔme ɖiɖi. Le ƒe ʋee siwo va yi me la, ŋkuɖodzikpea do bliboe le ƒe 2019 kple 2022 me ... ... ke hã, tsita la yɔ fũ le ƒe 2025 me — esime wogama nya siwo woŋlɔ tso ŋkuɖodzikpea ŋu ake — eye ŋkuɖodzikpea medo go o. Ŋkuɖodzikpe gã aɖe si do xoxo wu Egipte ƒe piramidwo kple England ƒe Stonehenge do tso tsia me nyitsɔ laa le Spain esime kuɖiɖi aɖe xɔ dukɔa me, le nya aɖe si kaka le July 2025 me nu kpe siwo le gotagome si te ɖe tsia ƒe go ŋu. Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be: Kuɖiɖi aɖe si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Spain ƒe dzigbe na be kpe gã aɖe si xɔ ƒe 7,000 la gafɔ ɖedzesi aɖe si te ɖe Huelva nutoa ŋu. Tomenukuƒe sia si tsi kple anyigbaʋuʋu ɣla ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe la va kekeli fifia to nutome ƒe nɔnɔme siwo le tɔtrɔm me. Woxɔe se be nuto siwo nɔ anyi do ŋgɔ na ŋutinya me siwo nɔ ŋgɔ yim le Iberia Ƒukpo Afã dzi tsã lae tu xɔa, si ɖe woƒe gɔmesese deŋgɔ le xɔtuɖaŋu, ɖoɖowɔwɔ, kple nutoa me ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ ŋu fia ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe hafi blema dekɔnu geɖe siwo wonya la do. Nusi na nusi ŋu woke ɖo sia ɖe dzesi ŋutɔe nye ƒe si wobu be exɔ abe ƒe 7,000 ene si na wòdae abe ƒe 2,000 ene do ŋgɔ na Egiptetɔwo ƒe Piramidwo kple Stonehenge tutu. Esia doa kplamatse ŋutinya me ɣeyiɣiɖoɖo siwo bɔ eye wòhea susu yi Iberiatɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ gbãtɔwo ƒe ŋutete deŋgɔwo dzi. Blemaxɔtula siawo zã kpe gãwo tsɔ wɔ nusiwo anya nye kɔnu alo ɣletiviŋutinunya ƒe xɔtunuwo, eye wotsɔ wo sɔ kple dzɔdzɔmenu alo dziƒonudzɔdzɔwo, abe alesi wo hati siwo va emegbe le xexeame ƒe akpa bubuwo ene. Ame 191,000 ye ƒo nu tso nya sia ŋu eye ame 19,000 ye woamae vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm. Nya sia ƒe tɔtrɔwo dze le Facebook kple X, kple foto vovovowo. Ŋkuɖodzikpea nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ, eye wòdo le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me le kuɖiɖiɣiwo. Gake nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ la mesɔ o le nya aɖewo ŋu tsitotsito. Woyɔa ŋkuɖodzikpe si ŋu nya ku ɖo be Dolmen alo "Kesinɔnu" si le Guadalperal. Enɔ Cáceres nutoa me — ke menye Huelva o, abe alesi posudɔwɔƒeawo gblɔe ene o — le Extremadura ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ ƒe nuto me. Zi geɖe la, enyrɔna ɖe Valdecañas ƒe tsita me, eye wòdona bliboe alo eƒe akpa aɖe, le kuɖiɖiɣiwo. Le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me la, esia dzɔ le ƒe 2019 kple 2022. Ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia si teƒe sia nye nusi ŋu blematomenukulawo ƒe numekuku le, abe alesi numekuku le Google Scholar dzi ɖee fia ene. Germanytɔ blematomenukulawo Hugo Obermaier ye ku Dolmen si le Guadalperal le ƒe 1925 kple 1927 dome, eye wokpɔe be wotu Dolmen le ƒe 5000 kple 3000 D.M.Ŋ. Wonyrɔ teƒea tso ƒe 1963 me, elabena esusɔ vie woawu Valdecañas tɔdzisasrãa nu. Tsi si do tso eme le Tagus Tɔsisia to la nyrɔ blematomenukuƒe bubuwo, siwo dometɔ geɖe nɔ anyi tso Roma Fiaɖuƒea me. Esi yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ na kuɖiɖi va nɔ dzidzim ɖe edzi la, Spain dziɖuɖua di be yeaxe mɔ ɖe blematomenukulawo ƒe adzodada le teƒe siwo do la nu, evɔ numekulawo ya ƒu du be yewoaŋlɔ wo ɖe agbalẽ me. Gake ŋkuɖodzikpea medo le ƒe 2025 me o elabena tsi yɔ tsita la me fũ, le e-mail aɖe si tso Valdecañas Multiaventura, si nye dɔwɔƒe si naa gota gome nuwɔnawo kple nuteƒekpɔkpɔwo le tsita la kple eƒe golɔgoewo kpakple Tiétar Tɔsisi, si nye Tagus Tɔsisi ƒe alɔdze aɖe, ƒe nyanuɖela gbɔ nu.

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump yɔ California Dziɖuɖumegã Gavin Newsom be "U.S. Dukplɔla, Gavin Newscum."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la White House ɖo kpe edzi be Trump yɔ Newsom be "Newscum" gake maɖo kpe edzi nenye be Trump yɔ Newsom vodadatɔe, fewuɖuɖu alo nususugblɔ be enye dukplɔla o. Le March 16, 2026 dzi la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump wɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe si me wòdo vlo California Dziɖuɖumegã Gavin Newsom, amesi ɖea ɖeklemi dukplɔla la vevie ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia. Le video klipi gbogbo aɖewo kple nya siwo wogblɔ be woɖe tso Trump ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpea me nu la, wogblɔ be eyɔ Newsom be "United States ƒe dukplɔla, Gavin Newscum." X zãla aɖe ŋlɔ tso Trump ƒe vodada si wogblɔ be ewɔ ŋu be: "Ele ŋu kpem! Ele ebum kabakaba wu alesi mía dometɔ aɖeke susui be yeabu." Substack ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be: Kpɔ United States ƒe dukplɔla si li fifia si bɔbɔ nɔ Resolute Desk megbe, nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒo xlãe, eye eƒe dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le eƒe axawo dzi—kpɔ ŋgɔ tẽ eye nàyɔ California ƒe nutodziɖula be United States ƒe dukplɔla. Trump yɔ Newsom be "United States ƒe dukplɔla, Gavin Newscum" nyateƒe le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me. Eyata wogblɔ be eya gbɔe nya si woyɔ la wòsɔ. Gake nenye be esia nye ɣeyiɣi si me woɖe asi le ame ŋu alo vlododo fewuɖutɔe la, woate ŋu aɖe egɔme. Ðewohĩ Trump hã nɔ nu ƒom tso nususugblɔ ƒe nɔnɔme aɖe si me Newsom ava zu dukplɔla le etsɔme ŋu, elabena nutodziɖula la tsɔ ƒe 2028 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔa ƒo nu tso eŋu. Ke hã, tameɖoɖo si le megbe na Trump ƒe nyawo me mekɔ o eye White House mena eme kɔ o. Esi woɖo White House ƒe nyanuɖela Davis Ingle gbɔ be wòagblɔ eƒe susu la, egblɔ na Snopes be, "Dukplɔla Trump ƒe nya sɔ. Gavin Newscum nye nutodziɖula vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake le Amerika, eye ate ŋu anye hã be eyae nye mumutɔ kekeake." White House maɖo kpe Trump ƒe tameɖoɖo be yeayɔ Newsom be "dukplɔla" dzi o. Trump nɔ nu ƒom tso akɔtagbalẽvi siwo woɖona ɖe amewo to posu dzi ŋu eye emegbe wòdze ɖeklemiɖeɖe se siwo ku ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe dzesidede ame ŋu gɔme. Míegbugbɔ Trump ƒe nya bliboa ta le ete (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Ènya le California, ne èbia tso ame aɖe si be wòaɖe eƒe dzesideŋkɔ afia la, gome le esi be wòade wò gaxɔ me, nenye be ènye amegã. Eye nègblɔ be, "Taflatse ɖe mate ŋu akpɔ wò dzesidegbalẽvia?" èle gaxɔ me yiyi te. Aleae wòzu tagbɔsesẽe. Le ame si ƒe IQ mede o gome la, ènya, elabena Gavin Newscum lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxiwo le ye ŋu. Le nyateƒe me la, nye katã menye amesiwo ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ me gblẽ, gake menye nye dukplɔla tɔ o. Nyemedi o — mesusu be mele be nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxiwo nanɔ dukplɔla ŋu o. Eye menya be nyaʋiʋli le eŋu ŋutɔ be woagblɔ nya dziŋɔ sia tɔgbe. "United States ƒe dukplɔla, Gavin Newscum, lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxi, si nye nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxi le ye ŋu." Nusianu si ku ɖe eŋu la nye mumu. Gake emegbe ekpɔ nyaselawo hegblɔ be, "Gake nye ya medze aɖaŋu wu wò," alo nane si le abe ema ene. Eyata fifia le nu bubu ɖesiaɖe dzi la meyɔe be ameƒomevinyenye ƒe futɔ elabena edzɔ be Ameyibɔ nyaselawoe. Magblɔ nya sia na mi, mesusu be enye gbebiame vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake si mekpɔ le amegbetɔ ɖesiaɖe ŋu le nye agbe me. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe bliboa ƒe video la nye esi MS NOW ɖe go le agbe. Trump gblɔ nya siawo le aɖabaƒoƒo 45 ƒe dzesia me: Trump nɔ nu ƒom tso Newsom ƒe agbalẽ me wɔna si wòwɔ nyitsɔ laa le Atlanta, afisi nutodziɖula la gblɔ na nyasela siwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye Ameyibɔ be yele abe woawo ene. Newsom ɖɔ eɖokui be yenye 960 SAT ŋutsu si "mete ŋu xlẽa nuƒo aɖeke o." Ame geɖe tso enu be eƒoa nu tsɛ na Ameyibɔwo. Newsom ƒo nu tso eƒe nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxi — nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxi si naa nuxexlẽ kple nuŋɔŋlɔ sesẽna — ŋu gaglãa ƒe bla nanewoe nye sia. Le Trump ƒe nyawo ŋuɖoɖo me la, Newsom ŋlɔ ɖe X ŋu be: "Na ɖevi ɖesiaɖe si si nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxi le: mègana ame aɖeke — United States ƒe Dukplɔla gɔ̃ hã — nawɔ anyra le ŋuwò o. Nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxi menye gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ o. Wò ŋusẽe." Newsom ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe hã da ŋuɖoɖo aɖe ɖe Trump dzi tsɔ yɔe be dukplɔla be: "Ele be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo nadze nyatakaka nana gɔme tso Donald Trump ƒe susu ƒe gbegblẽ ŋu. Esia nye nu sesẽ ŋutɔ." Dɔwɔƒea hã ɖu fewu le Trump ƒe nyawo ŋu eye wòŋlɔ ɖe edzi be: "FIFIA BE NYEE, GAVIN C. NEWSOM, MENYE UNITED STATES ƑE DUKPƆLA LE SE ME (AKPE NA WÒ DONALD!), GBLƆGBLƆ GÃ GEÐEWO LI MELE BE MAWƆ!" Snopes ka nya ta enuenu tso nya siwo Trump gblɔ tso nya vovovowo ŋu, kpakple ƒomedodo si me nyaʋiʋli le kple Newsom ŋu.

claim: Le December 2025 me la, U.S. kple Palau de asi dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 ƒe nubabla te si ana U.S. naɖo ame 75 siwo menye nuvlowɔlawo o siwo woɖe aboyoe ɖe ƒukpoa dzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be ƒukpodzidukɔ si nye Palau de asi nubabla aɖe te kple U.S. dziɖuɖua si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 be woaxɔ ame siwo ade 75 siwo menye nuvlowɔlawo o siwo woɖe aboyoe. Zãlawo ma nya sia le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo), eye nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe ka nya ta tso eŋu. Nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe — le U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe agbagbadzedze vevie be woaɖe amewo le dukɔa me dome la, U.S. kple Palau de asi nubabla aɖe te le dutoƒo si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 si ana U.S. naɖo ame siwo womeɖe aboyoe o siwo ade 75 ɖe Pacific ƒukpo siwo didi tso Philippines ƒe ɣedzeƒe gome abe kilometa 500 ene, si ame geɖe de dzesii nyuie le Internet dzi be enye teƒe 2004 si woaɖe sinima le hena nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ƒe hoʋiʋli ƒe fefea "Agbetsilawo." Palau ƒe Dukplɔla Surangel S. Whipps Jr. ƒe Facebook-dzesi si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la ɖe gbeƒã nubabla sia le Dec. 23, 2025 dzi, le nya aɖe si wòŋlɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be: "Dukɔ etɔ̃lia" alo "dukɔ bubuwo" fia dukɔ bubu siwo menye U.S. alo dukɔ siwo woɖe aboyoe o. Palau ƒe dudɔnunɔla, Gustav Aitaro, kple U.S. dudɔnunɔla si le Palau, Joel Ehrendreich, de asi nubabla la te le dutoƒo wɔna aɖe me le Dec. 24, 2025 dzi, togbɔ be Palau ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe kple dukɔa ƒe Tatɔwo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha siaa tsi tre ɖe eŋu hã — amegã siwo tso Palau ƒe nuto 16-awo katã me tso blema ke. Le July 2025 me la, Palau ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe aƒe eveawo siaa de asi lɛta aɖe te (si wogblɔ be Reuters kple nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe bubuwo kpɔe) na Whipps tsɔ ɖo kpe edzi be yewole megbe na Palau-U.S. ƒomedodowo, gake wogblɔ be wogblɔ be "yewomate ŋu axɔ aɖaŋuɖoɖo sia koŋ o." Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Marianas Variety gblɔ be: "Míele aɖaŋu ɖom vevie be míagayi ŋgɔ le nya sia ŋu o ... míate ŋu ado ŋugbe wòagbɔ eme alo atsɔ mía ɖokui ana na nane si míate ŋu awɔ o." Wogblɔ be Amegãwo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha gblɔ le eƒe ŋuɖoɖo le se nu me be: Míaƒe ɖoƒea gbɔ ɖoɖo menɔ bɔbɔe o elabena biabia la tso míaƒe hadɔwɔla gbãtɔ, U.S. [...] gbɔ na mí [...] Gake míeka ɖe edzi be mía xɔlɔ̃ vevitɔ se míaƒe nɔnɔme si me kakaɖedzi mele o eye wòle gbagbãm la gɔme abe ƒukpodukɔ sue aɖe si le didim be yeanɔ xexe sia si me nu sesẽwo le me ene. Nubabla sia nye nu yeyetɔ kekeake le U.S. kple Palau dome kadodowo ƒe ŋutinya didi aɖe me. Palau va xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ le ƒe 1994 me le U.S. ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe ŋusẽkpɔkpɔ ɖe ƒukpoawo dzi ƒe bla nanewo le Xexemeʋa II megbe megbe. Le Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Joe Biden ƒe dziɖuɣi la, dukɔa trɔ asi le Ablɔɖe Habɔbɔ ƒe Nubabla si naa U.S. asrafowo ƒe mɔɖeɖe kpakple "ŋusẽ kple agbanɔamedzi blibo le aʋawɔnyawo kple dedienɔnɔnyawo ŋu" le Palau kple esiwo ku ɖe eŋu, le Palau ƒe U.S. Dudɔnunɔla ƒe nya nu. Le esia teƒe la, Palau dukɔmeviwo ate ŋu azɔ mɔ ayi U.S. visa manɔmee be woanɔ agbe, awɔ dɔ ahasrɔ̃ nu. Palautɔ geɖe subɔna abe lɔlɔ̃nu faa dɔwɔlawo ene le U.S. aʋawɔhawo me le ame ɖeka ɖesiaɖe me wu U.S. dukɔ ɖesiaɖe me nɔlawo. Dɔlar miliɔn 7.5 ƒe nubabla la hã sɔ ɖe ɖoɖo si keke ta wu si me Trump dziɖuɖua ɖoa ame siwo woɖe aboyoe ɖe dukɔ etɔ̃lia me la nu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe Kpeɖeŋutɔ Tricia McLaughlin ŋlɔ ɖe edzi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le July 2025 me be: "YEYE: dukɔ etɔ̃lia ƒe yameʋu si le dedie si woatsɔ akplɔ amewo ayi Eswatini le Anyiehe Afrika la ɖi go— Yameʋu sia xɔ ame ɖekaɖeka siwo nye ame manyanu tɔxɛ aɖe ale gbegbe be wo dedukɔwo gbe be yewomagbugbɔ wo axɔ o." Togbɔ be U.S. kple Palau ƒe nubabla ƒe sewo gblɔ be amesiwo woɖe aboyoe la "menye nuvlowɔlawo o" eye ŋutete le ƒukpodukɔa si be wòagbe amesiwo wodo ɖa be woaɖe aboyoe hã la, dukɔ bubuwo abe South Sudan kple Eswatini ene xɔ nuvlowɔla siwo wogblɔ be wo dedukɔwo gbe wo xɔxɔ.

claim: Akɔɖu ƒuƒu ate ŋu ada nu me abi
evidence: Ðe woate ŋu atsɔ akɔɖu ƒuƒu akpɔ nu me abiwo gbɔ nyuiea?  Ðe koklozi ƒuƒu nye atike nyui aɖe na nu me dɔdzẽa?  Ao, togbɔ be nu me abi akpa gãtɔ hayana le wo ɖokui si hã la, zi geɖe la, woɖoa aɖaŋu be woazã atike siwo wozãna ɖaa atsɔ aɖe dzesiawo dzi akpɔtɔ. Abi siwo lolo wu, siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa, kple esiwo gbugbɔna la hiã atikewɔwɔ tɔxɛ ŋutɔ kple taɖodzinu be woaɖe dzesiawo dzi akpɔtɔ, aɖe abi ƒe ɣeyiɣi didi dzi akpɔtɔ, eye woana dɔnɔa ƒe nyonyo bliboa nanyo ɖe edzi. Eyata mele be woabu akɔɖu ƒuƒu be enye tiatia si ŋu kakaɖedzi le le nu me ƒe abiwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me o.  Quick Take Instagram nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be koklozi ƒuƒu ɖuɖu ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu wòada nu me abi. Esi míedzro nya si wogblɔ la me vɔ la, míekpɔe be alakpae.  Nya si wogblɔ Le style_tuber Instagram reel aɖe ƒe nya nu la, koklozi ƒuƒu ɖuɖu wɔa dɔ nyuie na nu me abi. Nya si woŋlɔ si ƒe tanyae nye "बको स्थाण चाहसैले."  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Nuka tututue nye nu me abi?  Nu me ƒoƒo nye abi siwo mefa o siwo dzena le nu me. Zi geɖe la, wodzɔna tso lãkusi falɛfalɛ siwo le aɖe, nuyi ƒe lãkusi, gingiva, nuyiwo, kple nu tame.  Zi geɖe la, kansa ƒe abiwoe nyea nu me abi ƒomevi si bɔ wu. Zi geɖe la, abi siawo medzea ame ŋu o, ate ŋu ana wòasesẽ be woaɖu nu, ano nu, alo aɖo dze gɔ̃ hã. Togbɔ be womenya afisi tututu woƒe tsitsi dzɔ tso o hã la, wokpɔe be nu vevitɔ si gbɔ woƒe tsitsi tsoe nye domenyiŋusẽfianu ƒe domenyinyi.  Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, nu ʋɛ aɖewo ate ŋu anye nusiwo ana woƒe tsitsi kabakaba. These include orthodontic braces, irritating dentures, incomplete dental fillings, chronic stress, anxiety, hormonal fluctuations, certain allergens, lack of sleep, excessive consumption of citrus fruits or spices, and specific medications.  Nu me ƒe abi siawo siwo bɔ la dzena le hatsotso siwo gbɔna dometɔ ɖeka me: Zi geɖe la, ne woƒe didime mede milimeta atɔ̃ o la, abi suesuesuewo ate ŋu aɖiɖi le wo ɖokui si (le kwasiɖa 1-2 me).  Abi gãwo mebɔ o, nu me ƒe abi lolo wu siwo ƒe didime nye milimeta ewo ya teti, wogblẽa abi ɖi, eye wonɔa anyi kwasiɖa atɔ̃ va ɖo ewo.  Herpetiform ulcers ye mebɔ boo o; zi geɖe la, wova zua ƒuƒoƒo suesuesue siwo me vevesese le siwo ate ŋu aƒo ƒu mlɔeba azu abi gãwo. Ŋkɔ ka kee woɖayɔ o, menye herpes dɔlékuiae hea abi siwo le abe herpetiform vɛ ene o. Abi siawo mexɔa ame me o eye zi geɖe la, wohana le kwasiɖa ɖeka alo eve me.  Ðe koklozi ƒuƒu ɖuɖu ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu wòaɖe nu me abi ɖaa?  Ao, menye nenema kura o. Togbɔ be wobunɛ be enye tiatia si le dedie hã la, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi siwo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu li ku ɖe alesi woate ŋu azãe atsɔ ada nu me abiwoe ŋu.  Medium-chain fatty acids (MCFAs) le koklozimi me, vevietɔ lauric acid, si wobuna zi geɖe be eɖea vi. Dɔlékuiwutike, dɔlékuiwutike, kple abidada ƒe nɔnɔmewo le monolaurin, si nye nusi woɖe tso lauric acid me. Lauric acid ɖe dɔlékuiwutike sesẽ hã fia ɖe nu me dɔlékui vovovowo ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Streptococcus mutans, Staphylococcus aureus, Lactobacillus ƒomeviwo, kple Candida gɔ̃ hã. Vevietɔ wu la, ɖetugbui leaƒe ƒe akɔɖumi zazã kpe ɖe amlexanox 5% ŋu ɖe abi ƒe lolome dzi kpɔtɔ ŋutɔ le ŋkeke atɔ̃lia dzi. Gake viɖe siawo siwo do ƒome kple koklozi la sɔ na numekuku gbãtɔwo ko.  Ðɔkta Pooja Siwach, si nye Nu me kple Mo ƒe dɔléle ŋuti nunyala ɖo aɖaŋu be togbɔ be nu me abi le sue hã la, ate ŋu ana ame nase veve ŋutɔ. Atike fafɛwo—tsi si wotsɔ klɔa nu la kɔa ame ŋu, anyitsi naa ame ƒe dzi dzea eme, aloe vera daa gbe le ame ŋu, eye tsikpe ate ŋu aɖe vevesesea dzi akpɔtɔ. Ƒo asa na nusiwo doa dziku na ame kple nu me dzadzɛnyenye me léle ɖe asi ate ŋu axe mɔ ɖe dɔlélea gbugbɔgadzɔ nu. Zi geɖe la, atikewɔwɔ bɔbɔe siawo siwo le dzɔdzɔme nu wɔa nukunuwo, eye wodoa alɔ ŋutilãa ƒe dɔyɔyɔ. Gake abi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa alo esiwo nu sẽ ate ŋu afia be lãmesẽkuxi siwo de to wu le ame ŋu eye wòdze be eŋutinunyalawo nalé ŋku ɖe eŋu.  Ðɔkta Surya Kiran Mudigonda, si nye Aɖaŋuɖola si nye Nu me kple Mo ƒe Amekola, Renova Kɔdziwo, Hyderabad, tsɔ kakaɖedzi kpe ɖe esia ŋu esi wòte gbe ɖe edzi be zi geɖe la, tsikpe, bɔta, alo ghee sisi ɖe nu me ƒe abiwo dzi naa dzesiwo gbɔdzɔe be wòaɖe vevesese dzi akpɔtɔ eye wòalé tsi ta hena abi ƒe dɔyɔyɔ. Ke hã, menye woawoe nye atikewɔmɔnu siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le na nu me abi o. Mègatsɔ turmeric-mi, clove-mi, alo nusiwo doa dziku na ame mawo tɔgbe aɖeke asisi nu me ƒe abi gbeɖe o. Woana nɔnɔmea nagagblẽ ɖe edzi.  Ele vevie ŋutɔ be míana eme nakɔ be dɔdamɔnu ŋuti nyatakaka aɖeke meli si ɖo kpe akɔɖu ƒuƒu dzi be enye atike nyui aɖe na nu me abi o. Togbɔ be nu me abi akpa gãtɔ ate ŋu ada le wo ɖokui si hã la, zi geɖe la, wokafua atike siwo wozãna ɖaa siwo wozãna ɖe nu me

claim: Nigeria ƒe dugã me nɔlawo le ɖokuisinɔnɔ me anɔ abe miliɔn 7 ene.
evidence: Eɖe dzesi ŋutɔ be nutomedziɖuɖuwo kpɔa dukɔa ƒe gazazã siwo wokpɔna tso ga si wokpɔna le nuto ɖesiaɖe me dzi. Le ƒe 1960 me la, wona Nigeria dunyahehe ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ abe dukɔ si le eɖokui si ene le ƒe 1960 ƒe Dukplɔse si gblɔ be woawɔ sewɔtakpekpe ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖo, nuto 3 (Anyiehe, Ɣedzeƒe kple Ɣetoɖoƒe Nutowo), sewɔtakpekpe eve ƒe sewɔtakpekpe le dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu (Sewɔtakpekpe kple Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒe) kple nutome ƒe ɖoɖowo (Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Aƒe kple Amegãwo ƒe Aƒe) kple dziɖuɖu ƒe sewɔŋusẽ siwo woma ɖe etɔ̃ me hatsotsowo alo xexlẽdzesiwo – esiwo woɖe ɖe vovo, esiwo le ɣeyiɣi ɖeka me kple esiwo susɔ. Woɖo Ðɔkta Nnamdi Azikiwe be wòanye dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔlagã eye Tafawa Balewa yi edzi nye dziɖuɖu si woti le demokrasimɔ nu, gake fifia la, eƒe dziɖuɖu le eɖokui si keŋkeŋ la ƒe tatɔ. Tso ƒe 1960 me la, Nigeria nye dukɔ si le eɖokui si eye wòna hati Nigeriatɔwo ɖua dukɔa dzi. Fifia la, Muhammadu Buhari nye dukɔa ƒe tatɔ eye wònye Republic la ƒe dukplɔla wuiatɔ̃lia.

claim: Walgreens dze Hallmark Mahogany gbalẽviwo dzadzra gɔme, si nye gbedonamegbalẽvi siwo wozãna na Ameyibɔwo ɖeɖeko le August 2025 me alo le ema lɔƒo.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Walgreens dzra nusiwo tso Hallmark Mahogany ƒe ŋkɔ me ɖo ɖe eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe, kple tiatia siwo li be woatsɔ adzɔnuwo le fiase me, le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi. Hallmark gblɔ le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe be Mahogany ƒe ŋkɔe nye "agbalẽvi siwo wotsɔna naa Afrika-Amerikatɔ nuƒlelawo si keke ta wu." Togbɔ be Hallmark trɔ asi le eƒe Mahogany ƒe dzesidegbalẽviwo ŋu na Afrika-Amerikatɔ nuƒlelawo hã la, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be dɔwɔƒea xe mɔ na nuƒlela bubu aɖeke be wòagaƒle wo o. Mekɔ le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi esime Walgreens dze Mahogany ƒe ŋkɔ ƒe agbalẽviwo dzraɖo gɔme o. Nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi le August 2025 me gblɔ be Walgreens "dze" agbalẽviawo dzadzra gɔme. Hallmark ɖo adzɔnu sia anyi le ƒe 1991 me, le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe nya nu. Le August 2025 me la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo) kaka ɖe internet dzi be nudzrala Walgreens dze gbedonamegbalẽviwo dzadzra gɔme na Ameyibɔwo ɖeɖeko si woyɔna be Hallmark Mahogany. X nyatakaka xɔŋkɔ aɖe gblɔ be Walgreens dze ŋgɔ "tsitretsitsi" le nyametsotso si wowɔ be yewoadzra Hallmark Mahogany-gbalẽviwo ɖo ta. Zãla la ŋlɔ ɖe woƒe nyatakakaa te be, "Walgreens le megbedede te le esi nuƒlelawo de dzesii be yewodze kaɖiwo dzadzra gɔme na Ameyibɔwo ɖeɖeko ta." (X zãla @dom_lucre) Nya sia kpe ɖe video si me nuƒlela aɖe si wogblɔ be eke ɖe agbalẽviawo ŋu le Walgreens fiase aɖe me ŋu la kaka (wodzra wo ɖo) le X (wodzra wo ɖo) kple Instagram (wodzra wo ɖo), eye ame akpe alafa geɖe kpɔe. TikTok zãla si da video si kaka ɖe nya la xa gbã la ɖee ɖa le mɔ̃a dzi emegbe. Gake togbɔ be Walgreens dzra Hallmark Mahogany ƒe adzɔnu ƒe adzɔnuwo ɖo ɖe eƒe Internet dzi fiase me le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi le August 2025 me hã la, womenya nenye be esia nye ŋgɔyiyi yeye o, abe alesi nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi gblɔe ene. Hallmark to Mahogany ŋkɔa vɛ le kaɖi 16 ƒe dodoɖeŋgɔ me le ƒe 1987 me eye wòɖoe anyi abe ƒe bliboa ƒe adzɔnu ene le ƒe 1991. Le kaɖiwɔƒea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe nya nu la, eƒe Mahogany ŋkɔe nye "kaɖi siwo wotsɔna naa Afrika-Amerikatɔ nuƒlelawo si keke ta wu." Togbɔ be wotrɔ asi le agbalẽviawo ŋu na Ameyibɔ alo Afrika Amerikatɔ nuƒlelawo hã la, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be Hallmark xe mɔ na nuƒlela bubuwo be woagaƒle wo o. Ne míebu nya siwo le etame ŋu la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe, alakpa kple nusiwo womeɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Snopes do asi ɖa na Walgreens be yeabia ɣekaɣie nudzrala la dze Hallmark Mahogany ƒe ŋkɔa dzadzra gɔme zi gbãtɔ eye yealala ŋuɖoɖo. Hallmark ŋlɔ ɖe eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe be: Mahogany nye ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ ƒe dzesi si naa nuteƒekpɔkpɔ vavãtɔ eye wòdoa dzidzɔ na Afrika Amerikatɔwo kple amesiwo Afrika Amerikatɔwo ƒe dekɔnuwo ʋã. Kpekpeɖeŋugbalẽvia li be wòana seselelãme ƒe kadodowo nanyo ɖe edzi le ƒometɔwo, xɔlɔ̃wo kple nutoa me tɔwo dome to nusiwo wolɔ̃na wu eye wodea asixɔxɔe wu le Afrika Amerikatɔwo ƒe dekɔnuwo ŋu la léle me. Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be yewoƒe asi gãtɔwo na Mahogany ƒe atike lae nye Washington, D.C., New York City, Chicago, Philadelphia kple Atlanta. Menye esiae nye zi gbãtɔ si Snopes lé ŋku ɖe nya aɖe si wogblɔ tso gbedonamegbalẽviwo ŋu ŋu o. Do ŋgɔ la, míeku nu me be gbedonamegbalẽvi dɔwɔƒewoe to Valentine ƒe Ŋkeke vɛ nyateƒe hã.

claim: Aʋatso: Ukraine Dze agbagba Be Yeana Zãnu Aʋawɔwɔ Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe
evidence: Wozã nunya wɔwɔe si wotu ɖe video ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe si tso Aʋawɔwɔ Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe (ISW), si nye nyatakakatsoƒe xɔŋkɔ aɖe si ku ɖe alesi asrafodɔa yi edzi le Ukraine kple xexeame godoo ŋu tsɔ wɔ video si le kakam le Internet dzi. Nyatakakatsoƒe gbogbo aɖewo siwo da megbe na Russia kaka video aɖe si wogblɔ be Aʋawɔwɔ Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe wɔ tso «zãnunana ƒe agbagbadzedze si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o» si wogblɔ be dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔwɔlawo do goe ŋu. Wogblɔ be Ukrainetɔ siwo ƒe ŋkɔ womeyɔ o la do ka kple agbalẽa ɖe dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo teƒe eye wodo zãnu si nye dɔlar 100,000 va ɖo dɔlar 500,000 ɖe alakpanyatakaka siwo wota tso Pokrovsk ŋu ta. Screenshot — Telegram Gake nyadzɔdzɔ sia nye alakpa, eye wotsɔ ahɔhɔ̃mekawo ƒe mɔ̃ aɖe wɔ videoa. Be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo nate ŋu awɔ videoa la, wozã mɔnu nyanyɛ aɖe. Wodo foto ʋɛ aɖewo tso video ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe si tso ISW gbɔ, wotrɔ asi le susɔeawo ŋu tso stock footage me eye wotsɔ nunya wɔwɔe gblɔe, eye wosrɔ̃ numekulaa ƒe gbe le videoa dzi. Do ŋgɔ le mɔ ma ke nu la, Russiatɔwo to ŋutinyawo vɛ tso Human Rights Watch — ku ɖe Ukraine nyɔnu siwo wogblɔ be wowɔa gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe dzodzro ƒe 94% le streamers me, kple Voice of America . Le video gbãtɔ , si wota le keke April 2025 me ke me la, anyigbaŋutinunyala Harrison Hurwitz ɖe eme be Russiatɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Pokrovsk ŋu ƒe taɖodzinue nye be woalé nuzazãwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe vevi aɖe si le vevie ŋutɔ. Esi wònye be Pokrovsk nye ʋuɖoɖo ƒe teƒe vevi aɖe ta la, edzi ɖuɖu ana Russia ƒe nuzazãwo kple kpekpeɖeŋu nana le mɔ sia nu nanɔ bɔbɔe ŋutɔ. Togbɔ be ele alea hã la, Hurwitz te gbe ɖe edzi be aʋawɔɖaŋu ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedziwo le tɔtrɔm vivivi le Ukraine-srafowo ƒe nyonyo me. Russia ƒe ŋgɔyiyi le nutoa me dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ŋutɔ: amedzidzedzea ƒe ablaɖeɖe megale abe alesi wònɔ tsã ene o, eye esia ɖee fia be ɖoɖowɔwɔ ƒe kuxi sesẽwo le Russia-srafowo si alo Ukraine ƒe ametakpɔkpɔ nyuie si yia edzi ɖaa. Le goawo katã me la, Hurwitz te gbe ɖe edzi be nɔnɔme si le aʋagbedzi ɖee fia be afɔɖeɖe si wowɔ le aʋawɔɖaŋu ƒe ɖoɖo nu la le yiyim ɖe Ukrainetɔwo ƒe aʋawɔlawo si geɖe wu. Videoa meyɔ naneke tso «zãnu si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o» si wogblɔ be Ukraine tsɔ na dɔwɔƒea ŋu o. Original video — Youtube Míeɖo asi Aʋawɔwɔ Ŋuti Nusrɔ̃ƒe hã gbɔ be míagblɔ míaƒe susu, gake míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo aɖeke le etaɣi o. Nyitsɔ laa la, míegbe nyatakaka totro mawo tɔgbe siwo wogblɔ be wole Europa nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo dzi zim be woada alakpa le Ukraine ƒe Asrafowo ƒe nɔnɔme si le Pokrovsk ŋu.

claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: Nya vevi siwo bu le nya si wogblɔ be wole LGBTQ+ azãɖuɖu le Britain me la le ga xɔm le wo si
evidence: Key context is missing from online posts claiming an LGBTQ+ celebration in Britain is being defunded after the new council leader.Ian Cooper, si le ŋgɔ na Staffordshire County Council le esi Reform UK ɖu dzi le aɖaŋuɖoha la dzi le May ƒe tiatiawɔɣiwo megbe la, ʋu tab yeye, gblɔ be yetsi tre ɖe dukɔa ƒe ga zazã atsɔ akpe asi ɖe gadodo na Pride ƒe wɔnawo ŋu ŋu.“We’re not against Pride,” Cooper said in a June 3 interview, opens new tab with ITV Central ƒe Dɔwɔƒegã. "Mikpɔ dzidzɔ, se vivi na mia ɖokui, mikpɔ ɣeyiɣi nyui aɖe. Ke hã, míele adzɔxelawo ƒe ga zãm tsɔ do ga na ema o. Ne èdi be yeawɔ ema la, gã, yi dɔwɔƒe siwo menye dziɖuɖu tɔ o, bia dɔmenyohabɔbɔwo, tsɔ wò asi de wò ŋutɔ wò kotoku me."Reuters ImageA Facebook post, opens new tab days later, referring to Cooper’s comments, shared a graphic that said: “Pride event defunded.”Ke hã, ɖoɖowɔlawo na Stafford Pride, si wowɔ zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 2024 me, gblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe me, ʋu tab yeye be Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha mekpɔ ga na wɔnaa tẽ kpɔ o, si dzi dziɖuɖua ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi.Dziɖuɖua na pound 2,500 ($3,383) adzɔxelawo ƒe ga le ƒe 2024 me na aɖaŋuɖola ɖesiaɖe abe nutoa me ga si woɖo be woawɔ ƒe akpa aɖe ene at supporting grassroots projects, said a Staffordshire County Council spokesperson.Staffordshire County Council, si ƒe gazazã wu pounde 35,000 le ƒe 2024 me, xɔ pound 1,700 katã tso aɖaŋuɖola ene gbɔ, ʋu tab yeye to ga sia dzi, ɖoɖowɔlawo gblɔ kpee.Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha awɔ nutoa me ga ma tɔgbe tso July 2025, a dziɖuɖua ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ le e-mail aɖe me. Esia fia be Stafford Pride 2025, si woɖo be woawɔ le August 9 dzi la ateŋu axɔ ga tso nutome aɖaŋuɖolawo gbɔ abe alesi wòxɔ ga le ƒe 2024 me ene, nenye be eɖo dzedze ƒe dzidzenuwo gbɔ, opens new tab. Stafford Pride ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ be yewomete ɖe Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha ŋu be woana gae tẽ le ƒe sia me o.Will Conaghan, si nye Stafford Borough Council, si xɔ nuto sue aɖe si ƒo xlã Stafford dugã la ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe me be: “Stafford Borough Council mena gakpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke tẽ Stafford Pride 2024 o gake ena kpekpeɖeŋu ‘le dɔmenyotɔ me’ be woakpɔ egbɔ be wɔna gbãtɔ sia le ƒea me dua titina kpɔ dzidzedze si me ʋutɔɖoƒe femaxee, dɔwɔƒewo zazã, kple aflagawo dada kple bunting tsɔ do wɔnaa ɖe ŋgɔ hã le.”ITV Central gblɔ le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔ me be Cooper ƒe nyawo tsi tre ɖi na ŋɔdzidoname be woahe Pride ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋua ƒe plug. Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ be wobia Cooper koŋ tso gadodo na Stafford Pride ŋu eye be yegblɔ be yemesusu be ele be woazã aɖaŋuɖoha la ƒe gazazã ɖe eŋu o. ITV Central ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ be yewoƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka ɖe Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha ƒe ŋgɔnɔla kple Stafford Pride ƒe ŋuɖoɖo ƒe nyawo fia pɛpɛpɛ.VERDICTMissing context. Staffordshire Nutome Aɖaŋudeha medzɔ ga na Stafford Pride tẽ kpɔ o. Aɖaŋuɖola ɖekaɖeka ene tiae be yewoazã adzɔxelawo ƒe ga ɖe Stafford Pride ŋu le ƒe 2024 me.Reuters Fact Check ƒe ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia. Xlẽ nu geɖe tso míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzrodɔa ŋu.Míaƒe Dzidzenuwo: Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., ʋu tab yeyeTanya siwo wodo ɖa:Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzroShareXFacebookLinkedinEmailLink

claim: Mɔzɔla aɖe, togbɔ be wona nyanyae be ɖoƒe ƒuƒlu aɖeke megali o esime wònɔ agbagba dzem be yeawɔ aba ƒe agbalẽ to Internet dzi le dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔmexɔ si le Guruvayur ketekedzeƒe le Kerala hã la, ekpɔe be xɔdɔmea tsi ƒuƒlu keŋkeŋ esi wòyi afima.
evidence: Video aɖe le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, si gblɔ be womewɔ nu madzɔmadzɔwo le dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme xɔ siwo me ya fafɛ le ƒe agbalẽŋɔŋlɔ to Internet dzi le Guruvayur ketekedzeƒea, si le mɔzɔdu si le Kerala ƒe Thrissur nutoa me la ŋu. Le ezãlawo ƒe nya nu la, mɔzɔla aɖe, togbɔ be wona nyanyae be ɖoƒe ƒuƒlu aɖeke megali o esime wònɔ agbagba dzem be yeawɔ aba ƒe agbalẽ to Internet dzi hã la, ekpɔe be xɔdɔmea tsi ƒuƒlu keŋkeŋ esi wòyi afima, si na ɖikeke va nɔ ametafatafa aɖe ŋu.  X Post @ByRakeshSimha Woateŋu akpɔ nya la ƒe kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã:Dɔwɔwɔ Sindoor: Yameʋu ƒe Tatɔ Consoles Ƒomea Ƒe 'Bu' IAF Yameʋukula Shivangi Singh? Ao, Video Viral With False Claim Fact Check / Verification Míewɔ nya vevi didi aɖe na "Guruvayur retiring room scam", si na míeyi Facebook nyatakaka aɖe gbɔ, si woŋlɔ le August 17, 2025, si PIB Fact Check ŋlɔ, si na eme kɔ be Guruvayur ketekedzeƒea mekpɔ xɔ aɖeke si me woaxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le fifia o le gbugbɔgatudɔ si le edzi yim ta. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be, "Woaʋu dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔmexɔwo ƒe agbalẽŋɔŋlɔ le Internet dzi ne wonya wu xɔtutua nu ko."  Facebook Post by PIB Fact Check Further, Southern Railway ƒe Thiruvananthapuram Division ɖo kpe edzi le August 16, 2025 dzi to eƒe X handle si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye alakpa. Egagblɔ ake be Guruvayur ketekedzeƒea mewɔa xɔ siwo me woaxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le fifia o.  X Post by DRM Thiruvananthapuram Esi míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu la, míeva nya be woma video sia do ŋgɔ le October 15, 2024 dzi, si ƒe tanyae nye,"Dɔwɔƒewo katã le [Guruvayur] City Livelihood Centre, si wodze egɔme le West Nada le Central Government ƒe Prasad ɖoɖoa te. Video sia hã gblɔ be yewodze agbagba be yewoawɔ agbalẽ ɖe amedzrodzeƒea ŋu to internet dzi gake wogblɔ na wo be "no availability", gake esi wova srã teƒea kpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ la, wokpɔe be xɔa le ƒuƒlu keŋkeŋ Jaya JM ƒe Reels video si le mamam. Edze abe ɖe wònye agbagbadzedze be woagblɔ nya siwo mesɔ o ahagblẽ míaƒe ɖoɖoa me ene. Xɔdɔmewo le gbedoxɔa ƒe mɔnu eneawo katã dzi, eye amewo nɔa wo me ɣesiaɣi. Zi geɖe la, amedzrowo ŋlɔa woƒe xɔwo eye woyia darshan dzi, si ate ŋu ana wòadze abe xɔawo le ƒuƒlu ene. Ke hã, womele nenema o," Dua ƒe Agbenɔnɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe teƒenɔla aɖe gblɔ, si gaɖo kpe nya si kaka ɖe amewo dzi be alakpae. Xlẽ Azɔ hã: AI-Generated Image Of 'Vanara Sadya' At Kerala Temple Goes Viral Conclusion Wokpɔe be video aɖe si kaka, si gblɔ be eɖe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔmexɔ ƒuƒlu aɖe fia le Guruvayur ketekedzeƒea togbɔ be dɔ ƒuƒlu aɖeke mele Internet dzi o hã la, enye dɔwɔƒe bubu. Azɔ hã, ketekedzeƒea mekpɔ xɔ aɖeke si me woxɔa dzudzɔ le dɔme le fifia o le nuwo gbugbɔgatudɔ si le edzi yim ta

claim: Wonya Jermaine Thomas, si nye U.S. Asrafomegã xoxo aɖe ƒe viŋutsu si wodzi le asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe aɖe le Germany la yi Jamaica.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Amedzrowo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha gblɔ be amedzrowo ƒe nyawo gbɔ kpɔla aɖe de se be woaɖe Jermaine Thomas le U.S. le December 2013 me. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe hã gblɔ na Snopes be Thomas "ɖe gbe mamlɛawo be woaɖee ɖa." Woɖe Thomas ɖa eye woɖoe ɖe Jamaica le May 2025. Le June 2025 ƒe nuwuwu, le Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe ʋiʋli be woaɖe amedzro siwo le U.S. le mɔ si mele se nu o nu le agbɔsɔsɔ gã me dome la, nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be wonya U.S. asrafo aɖe ƒe viŋutsu yi Jamaica, togbɔ be meyi dukɔa me kpɔ o hã. Wodzi ŋutsua, si ŋkɔe nye Jermaine Thomas, le U.S. Asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe aɖe le Germany, le nyatakaka siwo woɖo ɖe amewo nu. Wonya Jermaine Thomas, si nye U.S. asrafo aɖe ƒe viŋutsu, yi Jamaica — dukɔ si me meyi gɔ̃ hã kpɔ o 😳Wodzii le U.S. Asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe le Germany le ƒe 1986 me, fofoa subɔ ƒe 18 eye wòzu U.S. dukɔmevi. Fifia, wonya viaŋutsua le dukɔ si wòyɔ be aƒe la me. pic.twitter.com/z6aynjfi9v — Daily Loud (@DailyLoud) June 27, 2025 Multiple Snopes xlẽlawo hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakakawo ku ɖe nenye be nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe. Wonya Thomas yi Jamaica vavã le May 2025. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Nya si wogblɔ tso Thomas ƒe ameɖeɖe le dukɔa me ŋu la tso nyati aɖe si The Austin Chronicle ta le June 4, 2025. The Chronicle bia gbe Thomas, amesi nɔ "nya aɖe si wotsɔ yi U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ŋkume ƒe titina" esi wònɔ eŋu bum nenye be ɖevi si vifofo si nye U.S. dukɔmevi si woɖo ɖe U.S. Asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔƒe aɖe le Germany dzi la naxɔ U.S. dukɔmevinyenye. Chronicle gblɔ be "wokplɔe yi yameʋu me eye wotsɔ kɔsɔkɔsɔ bla eƒe asibidɛwo kple afɔkpodziwo" kwasiɖa si do ŋgɔ na nyatia tata. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ka nya ta be: “Eva ɖo Jamaica, dukɔ si me mede kpɔ o, dukɔ si me dukɔ mele o.” Snopes ɖo kpe edzi to dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo dzi be Thomas fofo nye U.S. Asrafomegã veviedonula eye be wodzi Thomas le asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe aɖe le Germany. U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe kple U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha siaa lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be woɖe Thomas le dukɔa me le nya siwo wogblɔ na Snopes me. ICE gblɔ ƒe akpa aɖe be dɔwɔƒea "ɖe Jermaine Amani Thomas, si nye Jamaica dukɔmevi si xɔ ƒe 38 eye wònye amedzro si nye nuvlowɔla ŋutasẽnuwɔla, le U.S. le May 28, 2025. DHS ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe yɔ Thomas be enye "amedzro si mewɔa se o si nye nuvlowɔla ŋutasẽnuwɔla si tso Jamaica si si sedede mamlɛtɔ le be woaɖee ɖa" eye wògblɔ be "woɖee le dukɔ bubu me." Míegbã The Austin Chronicle ƒe nyatakakaa kple nusiwo míenya tso senya siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu hafi woɖe Thomas le dukɔa me la me. Chronicle ƒe nyatakakaa gblɔ be wokplɔ Thomas yi yameʋu aɖe si ɖo ta Kingston, Jamaica, me le May 2025 ƒe nuwuwu. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ka nya ta be menye Germany (afisi wodzii le), United States alo fofoa dzidzidukɔ si nye Jamaica dukɔmevie wònye o. Chronicle gblɔ be Thomas "zã eƒe agbe ƒe akpa gãtɔ le Texas, eƒe akpa gãtɔ nye aƒemanɔsitɔwo eye wòge ɖe gaxɔ me hedo le eme." Thomas gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea be fofoa, si xɔ dzudzɔ le ƒe 18 ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le U.S. asrafodɔ me la ku le ƒe 2010 me le ayiku ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie ta. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple Chronicle le telefon dzi tso amedzrodzeƒe aɖe le Kingston me la, woyɔ Thomas ƒe nyawo be: Ne èle U.S. Asrafoha me, eye Asrafowo ɖo wò ɖe teƒe aɖe, eye ele be viwò nanɔ afima, eye viwòa wɔ vodada le wò ku megbe, eye nètsɔ wò agbe ɖo afɔku me na dukɔ sia la, ɖe nànɔ nyuie be woanya viwòa le dukɔa me ko? Ŋkuɖodziŋkekea koe wònye. Y'all le bubumademade eƒe subɔsubɔdɔ kple eƒe domenyinu ŋu. Thomas gblɔ na Chronicle be nusianu dze egɔme esime wonya ye le yeƒe xɔ si le Killeen, Texas, me. Esi Thomas nɔ eƒe nuwo nu ƒom ƒu ɖe eƒe akpata me la, ebla eƒe Rottweiler ƒe ka ɖe ati ŋu. Wogblɔ be kpovitɔwo va ɖo eye wogblɔ na Thomas be yewoxɔ kaƒoƒo tso avu aɖe si wobla ŋu, abe alesi Chronicle gblɔe ene. Thomas gblɔ be wolé ye mlɔeba le esi wosusu be ege ɖe anyigba dzi, si nye nuvlowɔwɔ ta. Thomas yi Bell County Gaxɔ me, afisi wògblɔ le be "senyala aɖe si ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea tia gblɔ nɛ be ateŋu anɔ gaxɔ me ɣleti enyi ne edi be yeatsɔ nyaa ayi ʋɔnui," Chronicle ka nya ta. Esi Thomas nɔ gaxɔ me abe ŋkeke 30 ene vɔ la, egblɔ be yede asi agbalẽ te be woaɖe asi le ye ŋu le nɔnɔme aɖewo nu. Gake le esi teƒe be woaɖe asi le Thomas ŋu la, wotsɔe yi ICE ƒe gaxɔ me — gbã la, woɖee yi gaxɔ aɖe me le Waco, Texas, eye emegbe wotsɔe yi gaxɔ aɖe me le Conroe, Texas, le Chronicle ƒe nya nu. Thomas gblɔ be yede gaxɔ me ɣleti eve kple afã le Conroe dɔwɔƒea. Wogblɔ be ame aɖe si ɖea amewo le dukɔa me gblɔ nɛ repea

claim: Le August 2025 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump de asi dziɖuɖua ƒe sedede aɖe te si na be woate ŋu adee gaxɔ me ƒe ɖeka ne wotɔ dzo Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu Le Aug. 25, 2025 dzi la, Trump de asi sedede aɖe te si ƒe tanyae nye "Amerikatɔwo ƒe Aflaga Dzobibi ƒe Nyaʋiʋli." Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sedede ma ƒe taɖodzinue nye be woatsɔ nya ɖe amesiame si wolé wòle Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga fiãm ŋu, ne anya wɔ, si me woadzudzɔ mɔɖegbalẽ nana amesiwo menye Amerikatɔwo o kple wo ɖeɖeɖa hã le. Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea tsi tre ɖe ƒe 1989 me Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nya aɖe si me ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea tso nya me le be Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔ kpɔa aflaga fifi ta. Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea meɖo tohehe aɖeke ɖi ne wotɔ dzo Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga o. Edze abe nya aɖe si wògblɔ esime wònɔ asi dem sededea te la gbɔe nya si wogblɔ be Trump di be amesiame si le Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga fiãm la nanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe ɖeka. Le ƒe 1989 me la, U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ gblɔ le nya si nye Texas v. Johnson me be Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga dzodzo nye nuƒoƒo faa ƒomevi aɖe si ŋu Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔa kpɔ ta na. Le Aug. 25, 2025 dzi la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump de asi dziɖuɖu ƒe sedede aɖe te si ƒe tanyae nye "Amerikatɔwo ƒe Aflaga ƒe Dzobibi ƒe Nyaʋiʋli," si ŋu nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔ geɖewo ka nya ta tsoe. Alesi wòdze abe Trump tsi tre ɖe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nyametsotsoa ŋu ene la he dziku vɛ le Internet dzi. Esi Trump de asi dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea te la, eɖɔe ale: "Ne ètɔ dzo aflaga la, àde gaxɔ me ƒe ɖeka, màdo le eme kaba o, naneke meli o." Margo Martin, si nye dukplɔla la ƒe kadodo ŋuti aɖaŋuɖola hã zã nya ma tsɔ ɖɔ dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea le nya aɖe si wòŋlɔ ɖe X. Nya si wogblɔ be ne wotɔ dzo aflaga la, woatsɔ ƒe ɖeka ade gaxɔ me hã kaka ɖe Internet dzi kabakaba, eye Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hebia nu tso eŋu. NBC News ka nya ta be wolé ŋutsu aɖe si nɔ aflaga fiãm le White House ŋgɔ tsɔ nɔ tsitre tsim ɖe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea ŋu gbemagbe ke; wotso enu be eda se aɖe si wode se be woatɔ dzo dzo le dutoƒo tsaɖibɔ me dzi. Míekpɔe be togbɔ be dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeahe to na aflagatɔtɔ hã la, meɖo tohehe aɖeke koŋ ɖe esia wɔwɔ ta o. Esi wòle alea ta la, nya si wogblɔ la nye nyatakaka siwo nye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Nenye be Trump ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea le se nu la nye nya bubu kura. Le ƒe 1968 me, le Vietnam-ʋaa wɔɣi (kple tsitretsiɖeŋu gã siwo kpe ɖe eŋu) la, Sewɔtakpekpea de Aflaga Takpɔkpɔ Se, si xe mɔ ɖe aflagawo ƒe ɖiƒoƒo nu, le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe si mekpɔa akpa aɖeke o ƒe nya nu. Le ƒe 1984 me la, Gregory Lee Johnson tɔ dzo Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga le Dallas Dugã ƒe Takpexɔ ŋgɔ tsɔ tsi tre ɖe Dukplɔla Ronald Reagan si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu. Wolée ɖe Texas ƒe se aɖe si gblɔ be enye nuvlowɔwɔ le nusi ŋu wodea bubui ŋu la nu eye wotso afia nɛ mlɔeba be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe ɖeka eye wodo fe nɛ dɔlar 2,000. Johnson tsɔ nyaa yi Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ mlɔeba. Le nyametsotso si wowɔ kple 5-4 me la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kɔkɔtɔ tso nya me tsɔ da asi ɖe Johnson dzi, eye wògblɔ be Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔa kpɔ aflaga ƒe dzobibi ta. Le eƒe ame akpa gãtɔ ƒe nukpɔsusu me la, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la William Brennan ŋlɔ bena woɖe mɔ ɖe Johnson ƒe nuwɔna ŋu, elabena "nuwɔna la ƒe nuwɔna si ɖea nu me, si dze gaglãa la nye esi woɖoe koŋ wɔ eye wòdze le akpa gãtɔ me," eye Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔa kpɔa nuwɔna mawo ta, ne "hadomegbenɔnɔ kpɔe be susua do dziku na ame alo melɔ̃ ɖe edzi o" gɔ̃ hã. Nyametsotsoa te fli ɖe dukɔa ƒe sewo kple dukɔa ƒe se siwo xe mɔ ɖe nuwɔna sia nu. Le nyametsotsoa ŋuɖoɖo me la, Sewɔtakpekpea da asi ɖe Aflaga Takpɔkpɔ Se si wowɔ le ƒe 1989 me dzi, si bu “amesiame si ‘tso nyanya me lã ŋutilã, gblẽ nu le eŋu, ƒo ɖii le ŋutilã me, tɔ dzoe, lée ɖe te le anyigba alo anyigba, alo tu afɔ edzi’ United States ƒe aflaga aɖe ƒe nuwɔna be enye nuvlowɔwɔ, negbe nuwɔna si ku ɖe aflaga si ‘vuvu alo ƒo ɖi’ tsɔtsɔ ƒu gbe ŋu ko,” le Cornell Yunivɛsiti ƒe Senyawo Ŋuti Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nya nu. Wolé Johnson (kple ame bubuwo) le esi wotɔ dzo aflagawo gbesigbe sea dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la atɔ̃ mawo ke kpɔe be Aflaga Takpɔkpɔ Sea mesɔ ɖe dukplɔsea nu le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nya aɖe si to vovo, si nye United States v. Eichman, le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me. Tso ɣemaɣi la, Sewɔtakpekpea dze agbagba be yeada dukplɔse me tɔtrɔ aɖe si ana aflagawo ƒe ɖiƒoƒo nye sedzidada zi geɖe. Ðeke mekpɔ dzidzedze o — agbagbadzedze si te ɖe eŋu wue nye le ƒe 2006 me, esime Aƒea da asi ɖe ɖɔɖɔɖoa dzi, esime Sewɔtakpekpea ya va da asi ɖe edzi zi ɖeka pɛ ko, le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nya nu. Trump ƒo nu tso aflaga ƒe ɖiƒoƒo nana be wòanye sedzidada ŋu tso November 2016 ya teti me, esime wònye dukplɔla tiatia. "Mele be woaɖe mɔ na ame aɖeke be wòatɔ dzo Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga o - ne wotɔ dzoe la, ele be emetsonuwo nanɔ anyi - ɖewohĩ dukɔmevinyenye ƒe bu alo ƒe ɖeka ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ," eŋlɔ ɖe Twitter dzi. Togbɔ be dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea taʋiʋli asesẽ kokoko, togbɔ be wobu Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ fifia be eléa blemakɔnuléleɖeasi me ɖe asi wu alesi wònɔ le ƒe 1980-awo me hã. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sededea gblɔ be aflagaa tɔtɔ "ate ŋu ade ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ kple ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ me."

claim: Aƒewo xɔ asi “elabena míetsɔ ame miliɔn 30 siwo ʋu va dukɔa me le se nu la yɔ dukɔa me fũ” eye le aƒewo ƒe veve ta.
evidence: Ga home gãwo na aƒewo ƒe asiwo le nutoa me le United States katã, eye Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance bu fɔ nɔnɔmea ɖe ʋuʋulawo kple aƒewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta."Sɔhɛ geɖe le gbɔgblɔm be, xɔwo xɔ asi akpa. Nukatae wòle nenema? Elabena míeyɔ dukɔa me fũ kple amedzro miliɔn 30 siwo ʋu va le se nu siwo nɔ aƒe siwo wòle be woayi na Amerika dukɔmeviwo le dzɔdzɔenyenye me," Vance gblɔ na Fox News’ Sean Hannity le Nov. 13. "Eye le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, míenɔ aƒe yeye siwo sɔ gbɔ tum be míadze egɔme tsoe na ameha si nɔ mía si gɔ̃ hã o." Ame siwo ʋu va U.S. le se nu ƒe xexlẽme mede ema ƒe afã o — akɔntabubuwo tso ame miliɔn 12 va ɖo miliɔn 14 va ɖo ƒe 2023 me, nyatakaka yeyetɔ kekeake si li. Eye togbɔ be eŋutinunyalawo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be ʋuʋu yi dukɔ bubuwo me ƒe dzidziɖedzi hea aƒewo didi vɛ hã la, kpeɖodziwo meɖo kpe susu si nye be ʋuʋulawoe nye susu vevitɔ si ta aƒewo ƒe asi le dzidzim ɖe edzi ɖo dzi o. Vance ƒe nya sɔ pɛpɛpɛ wu ne eyɔ aƒewo ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ; eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be emae nye nu vevitɔ si na gazazã ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ, eye deme si dzi ɖe edzi na nɔnɔmea gagblẽ ɖe edzi. Aƒe yeye siwo wotu ƒe xexlẽme ɖiɖi tso esime ganyawo ƒe sesẽ va le ƒe 2008 me, si wɔe be aƒe siwo ade miliɔn 4.7 mehiã o.Chloe East, si nye Colorado Boulder Yunivɛsiti ƒe gaŋutinunyafialagã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ gblɔ be xɔtutua ƒe ɖiɖi megatrɔ yi alesi wònɔ do ŋgɔ na ganyawo ƒe sesẽ o. "Le dɔvɔ̃a me la, míekpɔ nuzazãwo ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe hiahiã (kple) deme gã si na amewo medzra woƒe aƒewo o, si na asi la tɔ te, esime aƒewo didi dzi ɖe edzi le adzɔge dɔwɔwɔ ta, egblɔ. Abe kpeɖodzi na Vance ƒe nya la, White House ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe fia asi PolitiFact ɖe numekuku geɖewo dzi. Numekukua dometɔ aɖewo do xoxo eye numekukua ŋlɔlawo dometɔ aɖewo gblɔ na The New York Times be woƒe numekukua da wo kpɔ immigration ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi ɖe aƒewo tutu dzi le nuto aɖe me, nuxlɔ̃ame be woagazã nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo atsɔ aɖe dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔmewo me o la sɔ kple alesi Trump dziɖuɖua ɖoe ɖe amedzrowo ŋu; na be amewo di teƒe geɖe wu esime amewo nɔ dɔ wɔm tso aƒeme Esia do ŋgɔ na amedzrowo ƒe dzidziɖedzi le ƒe 2022 kple 2023 me, eye ga ƒe asixɔxɔ dzi ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me lɔƒo, si na deme kple gadodo ƒe gazazãwo dzi ɖe edzi na amesiwo di be yewoaƒle aƒe.Pew Research Center kpɔe be ame siwo ʋu va U.S. le se nu la ade 800,000 le ƒe 2022 me ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 2019. Center for Immigration Studies, si nye ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si doa ʋuʋu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi ɖe ŋgɔ, bu akɔnta be ame miliɔn 2.5 sɔ gbɔ wu le ƒe 2023 me wu ƒe 2020.Dean Baker, si nye Ganyawo Kple Ðoɖowo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe si me woɖea mɔ ɖe nu ŋu le ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila kple gaŋutinunyala gãtɔ gblɔ be zi geɖe la, aƒe didi menɔa amedzro siwo va yeyee la si o. Zi geɖe la, woama aƒewo kple amedzro bubuwo alo xɔlɔ̃wo kple ƒometɔwo, egblɔ be, si wɔnɛ be woƒe aƒewo zazã le mama dedie nu le sue ŋutɔ wu alesi wònɔna.Numekukua ŋlɔla Albert Saiz, si nye Massachusetts Mɔ̃ɖaŋununyasrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nufialagã le dugãwo me ganyawo kple aƒewo kple anyigbawo ŋu gblɔ na The New York Times le ƒe 2024 me be nusiwo wògblẽna le ame ŋu la nye nutoa me tɔ eye makpɔ ŋusẽ ma ke ɖe nuwo ƒe asiwo dzi le dukɔa me o.Jacob Vigdor, si nye Washington Yunivɛsiti ƒe dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋuti nufialagã kple ƒe 2017 ƒe numekuku aɖe si White House yɔ la ŋlɔla gblɔ na PolitiFact be yeƒe numekukua ɖee fia be ʋuʋula siwo le U.S. tsɔ "nusi mede 1% ƒe afã vie o kpe ɖe aƒe ƒe asi ŋu le se nu." Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple esia la, egblɔ be aƒe ƒe fexexe ƒe dzidziɖedzi na aƒewo ƒe fexexe ƒe tatɔ kple deme dzi ɖe edzi 46%.Vigdor gblɔ be: "Ne ame geɖe le nuto aɖe me la, aƒewo didi wu." "Nu vevi si ŋu woabu enye alesi gbegbe wògblẽa nu le ame ŋui, eye akpa si ʋuʋu si ŋu womeɖe mɔ ɖo o wɔna le aƒewo ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe kuxiwo me la ade 1/100 le ŋusẽ si deme si lolo wu kpɔna ɖe ame dzi ƒe lolome nu."Vance ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ŋe aɖaba ƒu akpa bubu si amedzrowo ƒe ʋuʋu wɔna le aƒewo ƒe asitsatsa me hã dzi: Dɔwɔla siwo wodzi le duta la ade U.S. xɔtudɔwɔlawo ƒe 30%. Numekuku siwo wowɔ nyitsɔ laa ɖee fia be dziɖuɖua ƒe amedzrowo ƒe amedzidzedze ate ŋu ana xɔtudɔwɔlawo nabu, si ate ŋu ana xɔ yeyewo tutu nagbɔdzɔ, si ana xɔwo ƒe asi nayi dzi. "Ʋuʋulawo naa dɔwɔlawo ƒe akpa si mesɔ o le xɔtudɔa me," eye wo dometɔ geɖe bi ɖe asitsatsa abe stucco masonry kple drywall instal ene me

claim: Woxe mɔ ɖe hadzidzi sɔsrɔ̃ nu le Hamburg Germany elabena Moslemtɔwo gblɔ be wonye haram.
evidence: Wogblɔ nya siwo mesɔ o Ðe dukɔa ƒe sukuɖoɖo si le Hamburg, Germany, xe mɔ ɖe hadzidzi sɔsrɔ̃ nu be woagado dziku na Moslemtɔ siwo bua wo be woxe mɔ ɖe wo nu alo ‘haram’ oa? Ao, menye nyateƒee o: Hamburg dukɔa ƒe sukuwo mewɔ nu ma tɔgbe aɖeke o. Woƒo nu tso Germanygbe me nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe ŋu le nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me. Nyatakakaa kplɔ mawusubɔsubɔ teƒenɔlawo kple sukudzikpɔlawo ƒe asidede nya aɖe si wowɔ ɖekae ɖe mɔmaɖemaɖeɖenuŋu kple amewo ɖeɖeɖa ŋu ɖo -- afɔɖeɖe si tso anyrawɔwɔ le ame ŋu le mawusubɔsubɔ ta ƒe nudzɔdzɔ aɖewo gbɔ.  Video klipi si xɔ sɛkɛnd 33 la dze le nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) si @realMaalouf ta ɖe X dzi le Sept. 29, 2025. Woŋlɔ nya sia ƒe ŋkɔ be: GERMANY: Le Hamburg la, womegaɖe mɔ ɖe hadzidzi sɔsrɔ̃ (hadzidzi, piano, gita) ŋu le dukɔa ƒe sukuwo me o elabena hadzidzi nye ‘haram’ le Islam me, eye woabui be enye Islam-vɔvɔ̃ be woazi wo ɖe Moslem sukuviwo dzi. Tamesusuwo?!  Esia nye videoa ƒe screenshot le post: (Nɔnɔmetata Dzɔtsoƒe: Lead Stories screenshot tso x.com/realMaalouf/status/1972734678659658010.) Nuŋɔŋlɔ si le chyron (si gɔme Google ɖe) la xlẽ be: Moslemtɔwo Do ŋɔdzi na Sukuhatiwo Hamburg tsɔ fli si me kɔ nyuie tsi tre ɖe vovototodedeameme ŋu Nyadzɔdzɔ sia si welt.de (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) ye ta le June 25, 2025. Screenshot si le ete la ɖe Germanygbe me nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si gɔme woɖe ɖe Eŋlisigbe me fia. Tanya lae nye "Anyrawɔwɔ le Hamburg ƒe sukuwo me". Tanya la, le gɔmedzedzea me be, ""Musikunterricht kann nicht stattfinden, weil man im Islam nicht singt"" xlẽ be: "Hadzidzi ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ mate ŋu adzɔ o elabena womeɖe mɔ ɖe hadzidzi ŋu le Islam me o."  (Nɔnɔmetata Dzɔtsoƒe: Lead Stories ƒe screenshot tso welt.de/politik/deutschland/video256303878/mobbing-in-hamburgs-schulen-musikunterricht-kann-nicht-stattfinden-weil-man-im-islam-nicht-singt.html.) Le video sia ƒe sɛkɛnd 33 gbãtɔwo me (si gɔme Google ɖe) la, anchor la gblɔ be: Esiawoe nye nya siwo sa ɖe aga, gake edze abe wosɔ gbɔ ale gbegbe be Hamburg Sukudede Ŋuti Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ la le nu wɔm ɖekae kple Kristotɔwo, Yudatɔwo, kple Moslemtɔwo ƒe subɔsubɔhawo fifia. Nya lae nye amedzidzedze kple vovototodedeameme, si ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye Moslem sukuviwo. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, wodzea Germany nyɔnuvi siwo sa ɖe aga dzi - womenye afisia tɔ o - esime woxea mɔ na ame bubuwo be woagade hadzidzi sɔsrɔ̃ o elabena haram ye. Womaɖe mɔ ɖe amedzidzedze siawo ŋu o, womaɖe mɔ ɖe amedzidzedze ɖeka pɛ hã ŋu o, le Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Bekeris ƒe nya nu.  Hamburg Katoliko Sukuwo ƒe Facebook axa ta nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) ku ɖe asidede agbalẽ si wowɔ ɖekae ŋu le June 18, 2025. Foto ɖeka si le nyatakakaa me (si ƒe nɔnɔmetata le ete) la ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ (Google ye ɖe egɔme) si xlẽ be: Subɔsubɔhawo tsi tre ɖe mɔmaɖemaɖeɖenuŋu kple amewo ɖeɖeɖa ŋu (Image Source: Lead Stories screenshot from facebook.com/share/p/17Rro45Ui9.) Facebook nyatakakaa tsɔ nya si wogblɔ ɖekae (si gɔme Facebook ɖe gɔme) ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔwo le eme:

claim: Le December 2025 ƒe domedome la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒã Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Kamedefefewo, si nye ŋkeke ene ƒe kamedefefe hoʋiʋli si ɖekakpui kple nyɔnu siwo tso U.S. nutowo kple anyigbamamawo katã me awɔ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le December 2025 ƒe domedome la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kaka ɖe internet dzi be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒã "Dukɔmevi Kamedefefewo," si nye ŋkeke ene ƒe kamedefefe hoʋiʋli si le ɖekakpui kple nyɔnu siwo tso U.S. nutowo kple anyigbamamawo katã me dome. X zãla ɖeka, si ƒe nyatakakaa ƒo ame miliɔn 30 kloe ƒe kpɔkpɔ nu ƒu vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm la, ma nya sia eye wòŋlɔ bena: "Trump ɖe gbeƒã 'ŋkeke ene ƒe kamedefefewɔna si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o' kple 'ɖekakpui ɖeka kple ɖetugbui ɖeka tso nuto kple anyigbamama ɖesiaɖe me.'" Nya sia kaka ɖe Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe), Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit hã (wodzrae ɖo), esime Snopes xlẽlawo do ka kpli mí be yewoabia be ɖe gbeƒãɖeɖea nye nyateƒe eye nenye be wɔnaa ayi edzi ŋutɔŋutɔ abe alesi wodo bobloe ene hã. Trump ɖe gbeƒãe nyateƒe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Fefewo abe Freedom 250 ƒe dodoɖeŋgɔ ƒe akpa aɖe ene, si ɖɔ eɖokui be enye "habɔbɔ si mekpɔa akpa aɖeke o si le ŋgɔ na Amerika ƒe dzigbezã 250 lia ɖuɖu" le ƒe 2026 me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Le nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la, Freedom 250 ɖe gbeƒã "Signature Moments and National Events" si me Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Fefewo hã le, si wòle be woawɔ le ƒe 2026 ƒe adame —dɔwɔwɔ nyuie, ƒuƒoƒo me dɔwɔwɔ, kple Amerikatɔwo ƒe dada ƒe azãɖuɖu." Le nya siwo míegblɔ va yi ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Trump gblɔ le video ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe me le Freedom 250 ƒe YouTube television dzi be: Le adame la, míawɔ Patriot Games gbãtɔ si wowɔ kpɔ, si nye ŋkeke ene ƒe kamedefefewɔna si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o si me sekɛndrisuku ƒe kamedefefewɔla gãtɔwo, ɖekakpui ɖeka kple ɖetugbui ɖeka tso nuto kple anyigbamama ɖesiaɖe me anɔ. Gake medo ŋugbe be ŋutsu aɖeke manɔ nyɔnuwo ƒe kamedefefewo me o. Mèle esia kpɔm o. Àkpɔ nusianu negbe ema ko. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua do boblo Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Fefeawo zi gbãtɔ le July 2025 me, esime dziɖuɖua ɖe gbeƒãe be Lãmesẽ Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Robert F. Kennedy Jr. axɔ ŋgɔ le hoʋiʋlia me. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla siwo nɔ nu wɔm ɖe Trump ƒe December 2025 ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖea ŋu (wodzrae ɖo, wodzrae ɖo, wodzrae ɖo) la sɔ kple "The Hunger Games," si nye Amerikatɔ agbalẽŋlɔla Suzanne Collins ƒe agbalẽ siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo wogbugbɔ trɔ asi le wòzu sinima si xɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ. Le nudzɔdzɔ siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo me la, ele be sɔhɛ "akpekpeɖeŋu" eve siwo tso Panem dukɔ si nye nyakpakpa ƒe nuto 12 dometɔ ɖesiaɖe me naʋli ho le ƒe sia ƒe ƒe amewuwu fefe aɖe me, eye woana aʋadziɖula la naxɔ ŋkɔ kple nunɔamesiwo na woƒe dedukɔ siwo me woda ahe zi geɖe. Naneke meɖee fia be Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Kamedefefeawo atsɔ hoʋlilawo awɔ avu kple wo nɔewo le avuwɔwɔ vaseɖe ku me o, vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm. Gake womenya alesi hoʋiʋlia ƒe ɖoɖo anye, alesi hoʋlilawo adze kple fetu siwo woatsɔ ana, ne woli o.

claim: Le White House ƒe Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le December 2025 me la, woŋlɔ U.S. Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth ƒe ŋkɔ ɖe eƒe agbalẽvia dzi vodadatɔe be "Aʋawɔwɔ ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le Dec. 2, 2025 dzi, le White House Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe mamlɛtɔ si wowɔ le ƒea me me la, nukpɔla siwo ƒe ŋkuwo le abe hɔ̃ ene de dzesi nusi dze abe ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo ƒe vodada wɔnuku aɖe ene le nuŋlɔɖigbalẽviawo dometɔ ɖeka dzi. Le nɔnɔmetata kple screenshots siwo woma le kpekpea me nu la, woŋlɔ U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth ƒe tanya ɖe eƒe placard dzi vodadatɔe, eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be "Ssecretary of War." Snopes xlẽlawo ma Hegseth ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe si bɔbɔ nɔ agbalẽvi si dze abe ɖe woŋlɔe nyuie ene la megbe eye wobia tso mía si be míakpɔe ɖa be vodadaa nye nyateƒe hã. Nuxlẽla aɖewo do susua ɖa gɔ̃ hã be "SS" la le "Nazitɔwo nam." California Democratic Gov. Gavin Newsom ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ma nusi dze abe screenshot tso video aɖe si me Hegseth le nu ƒom kple eƒe ŋkɔgbalẽvi le eŋgɔ si ɖe ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo ƒe vodada si dze abe ɖe wòdzɔ ene la fia. Dɔwɔƒea da nɔnɔmetata la ɖe edzi eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be: "Nukae 'SS' tsi tre ɖi na? Edoa dzidzɔ na ame!" Ŋɔŋlɔ si mesɔ o la nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ vavã. Míekpɔ vodadaa le kpekpea ƒe video siwo White House da ɖe edzi, kpakple foto siwo fotoɖela vovovo siwo ƒo nu tso wɔnaa ŋu ta ɖe Getty Images dzi. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe. "SS" si nyɔ Nazi Schutzstaffel asrafohabɔbɔ si nɔ Germany le Xexemeʋa II me la anya nye esi womeɖoe o. Nuka kee ɖanye susu si ta woŋlɔ vodadaa ɖo o, Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔa me tɔ bubuwo meŋlɔ ŋɔŋlɔdzesi siwo mesɔ o mawo tɔgbe ɖe woƒe agbalẽviwo dzi o. Míedo asi ɖe White House gbɔ be míasrɔ̃ nu geɖe eye míawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Míelé ŋku ɖe White House ƒe YouTube video si ku ɖe Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe bliboa ŋu le Dec. 2. Hegseth ƒe agbalẽvi la dzena le teƒe vovovowo le eƒe nyawo gbɔgblɔ me, eye woate ŋu akpɔe le 33:24 ƒe dzesia dzi kple le 35:00 ƒe dzesia megbe ne fotoɖemɔ̃a dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ. Foto siwo Agence France-Presse ƒe fotoɖela Andrew Caballero-Reynolds kple Getty Images ƒe fotoɖela Chip Somodevilla ɖe le kpuie la ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ si mesɔ o fia nyuie wu. AFP ƒe fotoa ƒe nyawo gblɔ be: Woŋlɔ nya si nye Agbalẽŋlɔla vodadatɔe ɖe United States ƒe Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth ƒe ŋkɔgbalẽvi dzi le Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe Kpekpe aɖe si Dukplɔla Donald Trump wɔ le White House ƒe Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe Xɔ me le Washington, DC le December 2, 2025. (Andrew Caballero-Reynolds/AFP/Getty Images) (Chip Somodevilla/Getty Images) Hegseth nɔ tu siwo U.S. tsɔ kplɔe ɖo le September 2025 me la ta ʋlim le tɔdziʋu aɖe si wogblɔ be enye atike vɔ̃ɖiwo zazã le Caribbean Ƒua dzi, si wogblɔ be ame siwo tsi agbe le meli si gbã me la ta. Le Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpea me la, Hegseth gblɔ be yemekpɔ dɔwɔwɔ bliboa alo "ye ŋutɔ yekpɔ agbetsilawo o" gake egblɔ be amedzidzedze evelia si nyrɔ tɔdziʋua nye "yɔyɔ nyuitɔ" eye wònye "aʋa ƒe afu" ƒe akpa aɖe. Trump de se si dziɖuɖumegãwo de se le September 2025 me be woatrɔ ŋkɔ na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea be Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe, togbɔ be ŋkɔ tɔtrɔ le se nu bia be Sewɔtakpekpea nawɔ se hã. Míeka nya ta tso nya geɖe siwo wogblɔ tso Hegseth ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya si wogblɔ be eŋlɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si te fli ɖe asrafowo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana Scouting America me le esi Scouttɔwo megadoa "ŋutsu ƒe dzidzenuwo" ɖe ŋgɔ o kple fewuɖunya si wogblɔ be etsɔ mascara brɔs ƒo eya ŋutɔ ƒe ŋku.

claim: NIA dze kpekpeɖeŋunaƒe aɖe gɔme na amewo be woagblɔ nuwɔna siwo ‘tsi tre ɖe dukɔa ŋu’ abe lɔlɔ̃ jihad kple ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ le India ene.
evidence: Wole nyatakaka aɖe si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be Dukɔa ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe (NIA) dze kpekpeɖeŋunamɔ̃ aɖe gɔme hena nyatakaka nana Moslemtɔ siwo wogblɔ be wokpɔ gome le dɔwɔna siwo "tsi tre ɖe dukɔa ƒe didiwo ŋu," siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nusi woyɔna be lɔlɔ̃ jihad, ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe nugbeɖoɖowo, kple gbedoxɔwo tutu me.  Woŋlɔ xexlẽdzesiwo kple e-mail adrɛs na amewo be woatsɔ ato nyatoƒoe mawo tɔgbe ɖe nyatakakaa me.

claim: "Nigeria ƒe asitsatsa ƒe dzidziɖedzi dzi ɖe edzi 44.3% le Q2 2025 me va ɖo N7.46 triliɔn ($4.74 biliɔn) ..."
evidence: Dukplɔla la nɔ ga la dzi kple eƒe akɔntabubu geɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye be ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ɖo ƒe etɔ̃ ƒe anyigbamama le August 2025 me, gotagome ga si wodzra ɖo la nɔ woƒe kɔkɔƒe kekeake tso ƒe 2019 me eye be wodo N330 biliɔn na aƒe miliɔn 8 le Dukɔa ƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe Gadede Dɔwɔɖoɖoa te. Gake nya aɖewo flua ame, abe GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi le ɣleti etɔ̃ ɖesiaɖe me tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple ƒe sia ƒe ƒe akɔntabubuwo kple nusiwo wometsɔna ɖoa duta o tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple nusiwo katã womeɖona o siwo menye ami ʋeʋĩ o. Tinubu ƒe nya vevitɔ si mesɔ o enye be yeƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe Nigeria ƒe gakpɔkpɔ kple fenyinyi ƒe xexlẽme dzi kpɔtɔ tso 97% va ɖo 50% te. Míete ŋu kpɔ kpeɖodzi hã na eƒe nya si wògblɔ be dɔwɔla 153,000 kpɔ viɖe tso gadodo ƒe ɖoɖo si nye N30 biliɔn me o. Nigeria ɖu ƒe 65 ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ tso dutanyigbadziɖuɖu me le October 1, 2025. Le dukɔa ƒe nuƒo aɖe me , dukplɔla Bola Tinubu de ŋugble le ŋgɔyiyi siwo wowɔ le dukɔa me ŋu. Egblɔ be: "Le míaƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe ƒe eve mamlɛawo me la, míewɔ ganyawo ŋuti nu ɖedzesi 12 le míaƒe ganyawo kple ganyawo ŋuti ɖoɖo nyuiwo dzi wɔwɔ ta ." Eyi edzi tsɔ nya siwo wogblɔ kple akɔntabubu siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo ɖe alesi eƒe dziɖuɖua na Nigeria ƒe ganyawo nyo ɖe edzi tso esime wòka atam le May 2023. Míeto ganyawo ŋuti nya siwo Tinubu gblɔ me gake míeɖe esiwo ŋu womate ŋu aɖo kpee le wo ɖokui si o la ɖa. Nya 18 siwo míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu lae nye esi. Dukɔ aɖe ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa, alo GDP , nye adzɔnuwo kple dɔwɔna siwo katã wòwɔ le ƒe ɖeka me ƒe asixɔxɔ bliboa. GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi ɖea alesi gbegbe nusi wowɔ ma dzina ɖe edzii fiana, zi geɖe le ƒe alo ƒe etɔ̃ me. Dukɔa ƒe Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒe (NBS) ɖe nyatakaka aɖe ɖe go do ŋgɔ teti na Ðokuisinɔɣi, si ɖee fia be Nigeria ƒe GDP ŋutɔŋutɔ, si gbɔ ga ƒe asixɔxɔ tso la, dzi ɖe edzi 4.23% le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ene evelia me . Tinubu ƒe nya sɔ esi wògblɔ be esiae nye dzidziɖedzi kabakabatɔ kekeake le ƒe ene me. Zi mamlɛtɔ si wòkɔ wue nye le ƒe 2021 me, esime GDP dzi ɖe edzi 5.01% le ƒe etɔ̃lia ƒe ɣleti evelia me . GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi ŋutɔŋutɔ megadzi ɖe edzi wu 4% ake o vaseɖe ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti enelia evelia me.– Allwell Okpi Dukɔwo Dome Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔha (IMF) bu Nigeria ƒe GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi ŋutɔŋutɔ be anye 3.4% le ƒe bliboa me le ƒe 2025. Ƒe sia ƒe ƒe GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi tsɔa dukɔ aɖe ƒe nusiwo wowɔ katã le ƒea me sɔ kple ƒe si va yi tɔ. Eto vovo tso ƒe etɔ̃ ƒe dzidziɖedzi gbɔ, si tsɔa nusiwo wowɔ le ƒe enelia me sɔna kple ƒe si do ŋgɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi ma ke. Eyata eflua ame be woatsɔ GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme si wokpɔna le ƒe etɔ̃ ɖesiaɖe me asɔ kple ƒe sia ƒe ƒe akɔntabubu. – Allwell Okpi Ga ƒe asixɔxɔ fia alesi gbegbe adzɔnuwo kple dɔwɔnawo ƒe asiwo dzi ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe, zi geɖe la, ƒe sia ƒe. Wozãa nuƒlelawo ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe dzesi alo CPI, si léa ŋku ɖe tɔtrɔ siwo va le aƒemenuzazãwo ƒe asi me ŋu tsɔ dzidzenɛ. CPI ƒe nyatakaka yeyetɔ si tso NBS gbɔ ɖee fia be tanyawo ƒe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ nye 20.12% le August 2025. NBS ɖea nyatakaka sia ɖe go ɣleti sia ɣleti. Zi mamlɛtɔ si ga ƒe asixɔxɔ nɔ anyi wu 20% enye le July 2022 me (19.64%), hafi wòdzi ɖe edzi va ɖo 20.52% le ɣleti si kplɔe ɖo me. Emegbe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ dzi ɖe edzi vivivi va ɖo 34.8% le December 2024 me , hafi wòɖiɖi ŋutɔ va ɖo 24.48% le January 2025 me le esi NBS gbugbɔ ɖo CPI anyi vɔ megbe, trɔ gɔmeɖoanyi ƒe ƒea tso ƒe 2009 va ɖo ƒe 2024, eye wòtrɔ asi le eƒe mɔnu ŋu . Eyata ga ƒe asixɔxɔ si nye 20.12% le August 2025 me la nye esi bɔbɔ wu le ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ me, abe alesi Tinubu gblɔe ene. – Allwell Okpi Tinubu gblɔ be yeƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe Nigeria ƒe gakpɔkpɔ kple fenyinyi ƒe xexlẽme dzi kpɔtɔ tso 97% va ɖo 50% te, togbɔ be megblɔ ɣeyiɣi si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe o hã. Ke hã, ne míebu eŋu kpɔ be eƒe ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔ nɔ dɔme ŋue wònɔ nu ƒom tsoe la, míewɔ dɔ kple ɣeyiɣi si tso May 2023 va ɖo September 2025.
