Le Budget Office of the Federation ƒe nya nu la, dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ le ƒe 2023 ƒe ɣleti enelia ƒe ɣleti evelia me nye N2.5 triliɔn , esime wozã N1.6 triliɔn ɖe fenyinyi ŋu, si nye xexlẽme si nye 64.4%. Le ƒe 2023 ƒe afã gbãtɔ me la, gakpɔkpɔ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo nye N4.12 triliɔn eye fenyinyi ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nye N3.58 triliɔn , si na xexlẽme si nye 86.9%. Xexlẽme eveawo siaa le 97% teƒe kura, eyata xexlẽmea mate ŋu asɔ gbɔ nenema gbegbe esime Tinubu va xɔ ɖoƒea o. – Allwell Okpi Esi dukplɔla la ƒo eƒe nuƒo le October 1, 2025 dzi la, gazazã ŋuti dɔwɔƒea tsi megbe abe ƒe ɖeka ene le eƒe gazazã ŋuti dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti nyatakakawo ɖeɖe ɖe go me. Nyatakaka yeyetɔ si li la ku ɖe ƒe 2024 ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃lia ŋu, eye nyatakaka siwo tso January vaseɖe September me le. Ƒe ɖeka ƒe heheɖemegbe da le Nigeria ƒe gazazã ƒe se si ku ɖe gazazã ŋu le gaglãgbe dzi Gazazã ŋuti dɔwɔƒea ƒe kpododonu le gazazã ŋuti dɔwɔƒea ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃ ɖesiaɖe ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti nyatakaka tata me ƒe ɖeka kloe nye dada le ƒe 2007 ƒe Ganyawo ƒe Agbanɔamedzi Se dzi . Le sea ƒe Akpa 30 lia nu la, ele be dukɔa ƒe ganyawo gbɔkpɔha, to gazazã ŋuti dɔwɔƒea dzi, alé ŋku ɖe alesi wowɔa dukɔa ƒe gazazã ŋudɔe ŋu eye wòata nyatakaka aɖe ɖe eme

claim: Amerikatɔ siwo ade 3% koe lɔ̃a agbledede
evidence: Nyagbɔgblɔ: Amerikatɔ siwo ade 3% pɛ koe lɔ̃a agbledede Dzɔtsoƒe: Eric Edem Agbana, MP Ketu North Nyametsotso: Wogblɔe wògbɔ eme Numekuku si Gifty Danso wɔ Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ si le Ketu North, Eric Edem Agbana, si nɔ nu ƒom le Metro TV ƒe Good Morning Ghana wɔna me le July 3, 2025 dzi la, gblɔ be Amerikatɔwo ƒe 3% lɔƒo tsɔ ɖe le agbledede me.  Nya sia nye nyaŋuɖoɖo na numedzodzro aɖe tso gaƒoƒo 24 ƒe Plus ɖoɖo si wodze egɔme nyitsɔ laa, si Ghana dziɖuɖua ɖee fia be atrɔ agbledede kple nusiwo wodɔna ɖa ŋu.  "Ne èyi ganya deŋgɔwo abe USA ene la, woƒe amewo ƒe 3% koe le agbledede me. Gake wowɔa nuku wòsɔ gbɔ, eye woƒe agbɔsɔsɔme to vovo. "Gake ne èva míaƒe akpa si le dukɔa me la, ame geɖewo le asiwò le agbledede me eye ke hã nusi míewɔna la menye ... elabena agbledelawo gakpɔtɔ nɔ te ɖe tsidzadza dzi o, ƒe bliboa ƒe agbledede aɖeke meli o eye mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke meli na agbledede o. Eye ale le ƒe si va yi me (agbledelawo) kpe fu elabena woƒe agblewo tsrɔ̃ le kuɖiɖia ta," egblɔ. (le 1:57:27 – 1:58:11 dome). Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe nyatakaka sia aɖo kpe nya la dzi. Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro Be woaɖo kpe nya la dzi la, GhanaFact ɖo ŋu ɖe nyatakaka siwo tso United States Dukɔa ƒe Agbledede Ŋuti Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒe (NASS), si nye dɔwɔƒe aɖe si le United States ƒe Agbledenyawo Gbɔkpɔha te gbɔ (USDA). agbledede gakpɔtɔ nye nuɖuɖutsoƒe vevi aɖe na eƒe dukɔmevi miliɔn 340 alo ame miliɔn 333 vaseɖe ƒe 2022. Nyatakakaawo ɖee fia be le ƒe 2022 me la, agbledela miliɔn 3.4 wɔ agble miliɔn 1.9 siwo ƒe lolome nye acre miliɔn 880.1, si naa nuɖuɖu, ami, kple ka na Amerikatɔwo kple amewo le xexeame godoo Ne míebu akɔnta le agbledela miliɔn 3.4 ƒe alafa memamã tso ameha ɖeka me ƒe ame miliɔn 340 nye 1% le amewo katã dome (find here). Nye nya si megblɔ tso 3% ƒe xexlẽmea ŋu la nɔ te ɖe nyatakaka xoxowo kple akɔntabubu blibo aɖe dzi le numedzodzroa me. Melɔ̃ ɖe wò nusi nèkpɔ dzi be fifia ƒe alafa memamã la gogo 1%, eye mekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe ɖɔɖɔɖoa ŋu," egblɔ to WhatsApp messenger dzi.

claim: “Míetsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 60 na kwasiɖa eve enye sia” be woatsɔ ana nuɖuɖu Gaza.
evidence: Esi wobia nya tso dɔwuame si bɔ ɖe Gaza ŋu la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be U.S. ɖo kpekpeɖeŋu miliɔn geɖe ɖa nyitsɔ laa. "Mienya, míetsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 60 na kwasiɖa eve enye sia eye ame aɖeke melɔ̃ ɖe edzi gɔ̃ hã o, ɖe nuɖuɖu ta," egblɔ le July 27 dzi le Turnberry, Scotland. Trump gbugbɔ gblɔ nya sia le July 29 dzi, hegblɔ be "Míeɖo dɔlar miliɔn 60 ɖa. Ema nye ga gbogbo aɖe ɖe nuɖuɖu ta, ga gbogbo aɖe. Ema ateŋu akpɔ amewo dzi ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe, eye míedi be míakpɔ egbɔ be anye — wole ezãm nyuie." U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me le July 2 lia dzi be yeda asi ɖe gakpekpeɖeŋu si nye dɔlar miliɔn 30 dzi le June me hena kpekpeɖeŋunana Gaza ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe si U.S. kple Israel da megbe na; dɔwɔƒea gblɔ emegbe be va ɖo July 26 lia dzi la, womeɖe ga la ɖa o. Me me kɔ nenye be ga si dzi woda asi ɖo alo gaze bubu ŋue Trump nɔ nu ƒom tsoe o. U.S. ate ŋu ada asi ɖe gakpekpeɖeŋu bubu siwo nye dɔlar miliɔn 30 ɣleti sia ɣleti dzi, le June 24 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si Reuters yɔ si yɔ agbalẽ aɖe si me wòdzro tso U.S. Dukɔwo Dome Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe gbɔ nu. NBC News ka nya ta le July 28 dzi be White House ƒe amegãwo gblɔ na network si Trump "da asi ɖe dɔlar miliɔn 60 dzi va yi hena kpekpeɖeŋunana Gaza" si mexɔ "dutoƒonya sue aɖe ko." Ŋutinya la megblɔ nya aɖeke tsitotsito o. White House alo Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒea meɖo PolitiFact ƒe nyabiase siwo ku ɖe dɔwɔƒe alo ƒuƒoƒo si xɔ dɔlar miliɔn 60 tso U.S. gbɔ, kple nenye be kpekpeɖeŋuawo dometɔ aɖe ɖo Gazatɔwo gbɔ o. PolitiFact do ka kple kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔ geɖewo eye wogblɔ be yewomenya nu tso U.S. kpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke si wona nyitsɔ laa ŋu o. Womeŋlɔ dɔlar miliɔn 60 la ɖe USASpending.gov, si nye dziɖuɖu ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si léa ŋku ɖe dukɔa ƒe gazazã ŋu o. Kuxi siwo le ɖoɖowɔwɔ kple dɔwɔƒewo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Israel ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔa nu, tsɔ kpe ɖe afɔku siwo le Gaza-nutome la me, na wòsesẽna be woakpɔ egbɔ be wotsɔ nunɔamesiwo yi na amewo. Le June ƒe nuwuwu la, U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe da asi ɖe U.S. Dukɔwo Dome Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe si nye dɔlar miliɔn 30 ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana Gaza Amegbetɔ ƒe Habɔbɔ, si nye ɖoɖo si U.S. kple Israel da megbe na si dze egɔme le May me esi Israel tɔ te kpekpeɖeŋunana le March me vɔ megbe. (Woɖe asi le USAID ŋu tso July 1 dzi gake etsɔ eƒe dɔwɔƒe susɔeawo ƒo ƒu kple Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe.) Gaza Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔha zãa U.S. dedienɔnɔ kple nuzazãwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo siwo menye ame ŋutɔ tɔ o tsɔ tsɔa nuɖuɖu kple nu bubuwo yia teƒe bubuwo hemaa wo le "mama teƒe siwo le dedie" le Gaza. Gake sewɔlawo, U.N. ƒe amegãwo kple amegbetɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔwo ɖe ɖeklemi dɔa, eye woyɔ nuɖuɖu mama teƒe ʋɛ siwo wowu kple Palestinatɔwo wuwu le kpekpeɖeŋunana me. Demokrasitɔwo ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ 21 ƒe habɔbɔ aɖe ɖo lɛta aɖe ɖe U.S. Dudɔnunɔla Marco Rubio le July 27 dzi be wobia be woƒo asa na dzikpɔkpɔ na Gaza Amegbetɔ ƒe Habɔbɔa hã. Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo yɔ Reuters ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si gblɔ be Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe mɔ ɖe kpekpeɖeŋu si nye dɔlar miliɔn 30 la ŋu le "mɔfiame si woatsɔ aɖo nɔƒe gbãtɔ" te, si fia be ga la ƒo asa na agbalẽdzikpɔkpɔ si nye nusi bɔ na ƒuƒoƒo siwo xɔa USAID ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana zi gbãtɔ. Reuters ka nya ta be Gaza Amegbetɔ ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaha megblɔ eƒe ganyawo le dutoƒo o eye woɖe asi le eŋu be woagawɔ numekuku bubuwo o.PolitiFact do ka kple Gaza Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔha be yewoabia be yewoxɔ U.S. ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu le kwasiɖa siwo va yi nyitsɔ laa me hã, gake womeɖo eŋu o. Palestinatɔwo tsɔ wɔ kotoku siwo woɖe tso kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔ aɖe si tso Gaza ƒe dziehe va ɖo Gaza City le July 26. (AP) Esi nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe dɔwuame kple nuɖuɖu ƒe veve vevie ŋu va le nyadzɔdzɔwo me tom la, Trump do ŋugbe be yeaʋu "nuɖuɖudzraƒewo" le Gaza. "Enye tagbɔsesẽ nusi le edzi yim le afima," Trump gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo le Scotland le July 28. "Míateŋu axɔ na ame geɖe. Mebe ɖevi mawo dometɔ aɖewo ... dɔwuame ŋutɔŋutɔe nye ema. Mekpɔe, eye miateŋu awɔ aʋatso ema o. Eyata, míagakpɔ gome le eme geɖe wu." Dziɖuɖumegãwo gblɔ be kpekpeɖeŋunana Gaza sesẽ le dɔwɔƒewo, dedienɔnɔ kple ɖoɖowɔwɔ ƒe mɔxenuwo ta. Israel xe mɔ ɖe U.N. ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunadɔwo nu elabena egblɔ be Hamas xea mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunana eye wòfinɛ. USAID ƒe numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le ememe, si ŋu Reuters ka nya ta le zi gbãtɔ, dzro nudzɔdzɔ 156 siwo me wogblɔ be wofi nuzazã siwo USAID na gae alo bu wo me. Mekpɔ naneke si fia be ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe nubuname le Hamas ƒe nudede nyawo me alo fififi ta o eye wògblɔ be kpekpeɖeŋu siwo mede 1% o lae fififi, mɔɖeɖe ɖe nu ŋu alo ametafatafa gblẽ nu le. Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒea tsi tre ɖe Reuters ƒe numetotoa ŋu, eye wògblɔ be video aɖewo li siwo me Hamas da adzo kpekpeɖeŋunaƒewo gake wometsɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke na be video mawo tɔgbe le wo si o. Israel gblɔ be yeɖe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunaʋu siwo ade 4,500 tso esime yeɖe mɔxenu bliboa ɖa le May me, alo abe agbatsɔʋu siwo ade 70 gbesiagbe. U.N. gblɔ be agbatsɔʋu alafa geɖe hiã gbesiagbe be woatsɔ ana nuɖuɖu

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump da Dada ƒe Ŋkeke ƒe gbedasi aɖe ɖe edzi ɣeaɖeɣi si dze egɔme be, "Dada ƒe Ŋkeke nyui na AME KAtã, vevietɔ Miame Fasitɔwo, Marxtɔwo, kple Kɔmiunisttɔ Zazɛ̃nyahelawo ƒe Vidadawo, Srɔ̃nyɔnuwo kple Lɔlɔ̃lawo siwo le nusianu si woate ŋui wɔm be yewoatsrɔ̃ míaƒe Dukɔ gã tsãtɔ la ahatutu wo ɖa."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Trump da Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe gbedasi ɖe edzi le May 14, 2023. Le May 2026. Le May 2026 me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ma nɔnɔmetata aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ma ɣeaɖeɣi tso Vidadawo ƒe Ŋkeke ŋu la fia. Snopes xlẽla aɖe ɖo nɔnɔmetata la ɖe mí hebia be, "Ðe esia nye nyateƒea?" . Taflatse na Lunatics kple Maniacs blibo siawo nanye Kinder, Gentler, Softer eye, vevietɔ wu la, Smarter, ale be míate ŋu, kaba, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! Le kpɔɖeŋu me, ezãlawo ma screenshot si wogblɔ be Trump ŋlɔ le May me le Facebook (wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (wodzrae ɖo) kple X (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Kpuie ko la, Trump da gbedasi la ɖe afima (archived) le May 14, 2023. (@realDonaldTrump/Truth Social) Le eɖoɖoɣia — hafi atikemawɔlawo natiae be wòaxɔ dukplɔla ƒe zimenɔɣi evelia — edze ŋgɔ numekuku geɖe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya siwo ku ɖe nuŋlɔɖi ɣaɣla siwo dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔwɔlawo xɔ le eƒe Mar-a-Lago Club le Florida kple 2020 ƒe nudede tiatiawɔblɔɖe me, kpakple bubuwo ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒenyawo le Georgia, New York nutome kple New York City. Snopes ku nu me le nya sia ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 2023. Esi wònye be ƒe 2023 ƒe nyatakakaa ƒe screenshots ƒe akpa gãtɔ metsɔ ŋkeke aɖeke kpe ɖe eŋu o ta la, ezãla aɖewo siwo bia wo ɖokui be ɖe wònye nyateƒe hã la ate ŋu atɔtɔ le akpa aɖe me elabena Trump ƒe Truth Social account ma (archived) Vidadawo ƒe Ŋkeke ƒe gbedasi bubu aɖe do ŋgɔ teti na ŋkekenyuia le ƒe 2026. Le nyatakaka ma me la, egblɔ dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti nyatakaka yeye aɖe eye wotsɔ nya ɖe "Bloomberg gaŋutinunyala" akpa gãtɔ ŋu be "TRUMP DERANGEMENT SYNDROME ƒe 'Terminal' nya aɖe le yewo ŋu!" Eƒe ƒe 2026 ƒe nyatakaka hã yɔ Federal Reserve ƒe zimenɔla be "Jerome 'Tsi megbe akpa eye Madzo' Powell" eye wòɖe nyagbɔgblɔ "Amerika Fuléle Democrat Party" fia. Ewu gbedasi la nu kple, "Dada ƒe Ŋkeke nyui na mi eye, nyae be, míele AMERIKA GANYA KESI KPLE DEDIENƆNƆ AGA! Dukplɔla DONALD J. TRUMP." Be míagaxlẽ nu geɖe la, míeku nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Trump gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi le nuƒo aɖe me be "mègawɔ nuvevi dawò gbeɖe o" eye "mègade bubu eŋu gbeɖe o" la me va yi. Snopes ƒe nudzraɖoƒewoe kpe asi ɖe nyatakaka sia ŋu.

claim: Frontline Magazine ƒe akpa dzi gblɔe ɖi be Vijay Wave le Tamil Nadu do ŋgɔ na akɔdada
evidence: Frontline ƒe akpa aɖe si wogblɔ be egblɔe ɖi be "Vijay ƒutsotsoe" aɖe ava le Tamil Nadu do ŋgɔ na akɔdada le nutoa me la nye alakpa. Wole fefewɔla si trɔ zu dunyahela C. Joseph Vijay, si ɖo Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) ɖola la ɖem fia le nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo me me be enye hoʋlila vevi aɖe le sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia si le edzi yim me.  Tsɔ kpe ɖe dziɖula Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) kple tsitretsiɖeŋuha vevitɔ si nye All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (AIADMK) ŋu la, TVK nye ame yeye si ge ɖe aʋawɔwɔa me le tiatia sia me. Woɖoe be woada akɔ le April 23 lia dzi, eye woɖoe be woaxlẽe le May 4. Nya la: Wole nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la mam le X kple Facebook dzi be "Vijay ƒutsotsoe" aɖe axɔ Tamil Nadu ƒe tiatiawɔƒea.  Ƒutsotsoea nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ. Enɔ anyi vaseɖe tiatiawɔɣi. Nye hã menɔ amesiwo xɔe se be aɖiɖi va ɖo 15% teti esime tiatiawɔblɔɖe gogo la dometɔ ɖeka, gake le nyateƒe me la, egakpɔtɔ le agbɔsɔsɔ gã la me. Nu ɖeka si susɔ be woakpɔe nye nenye be tsunamie.  Vijay aɖu zikpui geɖe dzi, eye... pic.twitter.com/RvJKtvZMzb — Dr. Ravishankar sadasivam (@Ravisha90280288) April 22, 2026 Zi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ nudzraɖoƒe aɖe Nusi Míekpɔ: 1) No Such Cover By Frontline Míelé ŋku ɖe magazine ƒe akpa siwo Frontline ta nyitsɔ laa ŋu eye míekpɔ tata aɖeke si me Vijay alo ŋutinya aɖeke gblɔ ɖi o a "Vijay wave" abe alesi wokpɔe le nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo me me ene.      Zi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ 2) Frontline gbe Viral Cover Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Frontline hã ŋlɔ nya ɖe X dzi tsɔ kɔ nu me be yewometa cover ma tɔgbe aɖeke o, eye woyɔ viral image la be alakpa.  De dzesii na dukɔa! ⚠️ Akpa sia nye alakpa eye menye @frontline_india magazine ye tae o. Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam ƒe akpadzinɔlawo le emam alakpatɔe le Internet dzi. Taflatse mikpɔ nyatakakatsoƒewo ɖa hafi miagblɔ nyatakaka totrowo.    Xlẽ: https://t.co/E7kFyGxfwB pic.twitter.com/GFowHICxZz — Ŋgɔgbe (@ŋgɔgbe_india) April 22, 2026

claim: Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal ƒe Dukplɔlagã Mamata Banerjee mede bubu dukɔa ƒe hadzidzi ŋu o eye wòdzo le fefewɔƒea hafi dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia wu enu.
evidence: Wole West Bengal ƒe Dukplɔlagã Mamata Banerjee ƒe video aɖe mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe vovovowo. Wogblɔ be le eme la, woate ŋu akpɔe wòadzo le fefewɔƒea le dukɔa ƒe hadzidzi dzi. X asiléƒe aɖe "@pmreddy21" ma videoa le November 7, 2025 dzi, eye wòŋlɔ bena, "Klip aɖee nye esi wow @MamataOfficial mede bubu míaƒe dukɔa ƒe hadzidzi ŋu o". Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa ƒe kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Kpeɖodzi Nudzɔdzɔa ŋuti nyatakaka siwo dzena le videoa me Ne míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu nyuie la, video si kaka ɖe amewo dome ƒe nɔnɔmetata ɖeka ɖe megbenya aɖe si dzi Bengaligbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ le fia be: "Bubutɔ Dudɔnunɔlagã Mamata Banerjee adze ahosiwo ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔmega mama gɔme na ame yeye siwo di be yewoaxɔ dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme tso Netaji Indoor Stadium. Ɣletiŋkeke: March 23, 2022. Ɣeyiɣi: 1 PM." Getty Images ƒe tsidzesi aɖe hã dze le videoa dzi.  2. Video gbãtɔ tso Getty Images Zã nya veviwo abe "Getty Images, Mamata Banerjee, ahosi ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu", wokpɔ video gbãtɔa tso Getty Images gbɔ, si woda ɖe March 23, 2022. Klip si wometrɔ asi le o la ɖe Mamata Banerjee fia kɔte be wòtsi tre esime dukɔa ƒe hadzidzi le ɖiɖim eye wòdzo le fefewɔƒea ne ewu enu ko.  3. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka tso wɔnaa ŋu Ðoɖo ma ke si wowɔ le Netaji Indoor Stadium le Kolkata abe ahosiwo ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme ƒe ɖoɖoa ƒe akpa aɖe ene la, Dristhi Bhongi kple ETV Bharat West Bengal ye ɖee fia le agbe. Video eveawo siaa ɖo kpe edzi be Banerjee medzo le hadzidzia titina o.  Nyametsotso Eyata eme kɔ ƒã be nya si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye alakpa eye wotrɔ asi le videoa ŋu.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe Mamata Banerjee do le fefewɔƒea hafi dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia wu enua?  Ao, etsi tre ɖe fefewɔƒea vaseɖe esime hadzidzia wu enu eye emegbe hafi wòdzo.  Q2. Afikae wowɔ wɔnaa le eye ɣekaɣie wowɔe?  Nuwɔna sia dzɔ le March 23, 2022 dzi le Netaji Indoor Stadium, Kolkata, le ahosiwo ƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔmega mama ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe me.  Q3. Aleke wotrɔ video si kaka ɖe amewo dome?  Wotrɔ asi le eƒe akpa si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu be wòatso nuwuwu la, si na wòsusu be alakpatɔe wònye be edzo le hadzidzia titina.  Q4. Nukatae nyatakaka totro sia gblẽa nu le ame ŋu?  Video siwo ŋu wotrɔ asi le alea ate ŋu akaka alakpanyawo eye wòagblẽ nu le dukɔa ƒe kakaɖeamedzi ɖe kplɔlawo alo dɔwɔƒewo ŋu.  Dzɔtsoƒewo Video si Getty Images wɔ Video si Dristhi Bhongi wɔ Video si ETV Bharath West Bengal wɔ

claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: Nya vevi siwo ƒo xlãe bu le nya si wogblɔ me Eŋlisiawo ƒe 1% da asi ɖe fuɖeɖe le se nu vaseɖe vidzidzi dzi
evidence: Britaintɔwo ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo da asi ɖe edzi be woaɖe fuɖeɖe na nyɔnuwo be menye nuvlowɔwɔ o, ke menye be woawɔe le se nu o, si to vovo na nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔna ɖe Internet dzi siwo gblɔna be yewoda asi ɖe edzi be woawɔe le se nu vaseɖe vidzidzi dzi, togbɔ be Britaintɔwo ƒe dukɔmeviwo ƒe 1% koe da asi ɖe ɖoɖo sia tɔgbe dzi hã.Wota nya siawo esi Britaintɔwo ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ (MPs) da asi ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋuti se me ɖɔɖɔɖowo dzi le June 17 lia dzi vɔ megbe.“YouGov ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be Britaintɔwo ƒe 1% koe susui ele be fuɖeɖe nanɔ se nu vaseɖe edziɣi gake MP’s da asi ɖe edzi to ame akpa gãtɔ dzi be woawɔ nu ma tututu,” June 18 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ, opens new tab on Facebook. A similar post, opens new tab, si metso nya la tso akɔdadadɔwɔƒe aɖeke gbɔ o, xɔ nukpɔkpɔ siwo wu 120,000 le X.Reuters ImageKe hã, togbɔ be numekuku li si ɖee fia be UK amesiwo wobia gbee ƒe 1% susu be ele be fuɖeɖe nanɔ se nu vaseɖe vidzidzi dzi hã la, menye emae sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo da asi ɖo o. Woda asi ɖe edzi be woaɖe fuɖeɖe na nyɔnuwo be menye nuvlowɔwɔ o, ke menye be woawɔe le se nu vaseɖe wo dzidzi dzi o.Woate ŋu atsɔ nya ɖe atikewɔlawo ŋu kokoko ne woɖe fu ne meɖo dzidzenu siwo wogblɔ le Fuɖeɖe Se 1967 me gbɔ o.NUSI SE GBLƆFɔɖeɖe nye sedzidada le England kple Wales le Victoriatɔwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia me Sedzidada siwo Tsi Tre Ðe Ame Ŋu ƒe Se 1861 nu.Ke hã, fuɖeɖea meɖo dzidzenu siwo wogblɔ le Fuɖeɖe Se 1967 me gbɔ o Fuɖeɖe Se 1967 ɖe mɔ ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋu le kwasiɖa 28 gbãtɔwo me - woɖe edzi va ɖo kwasiɖa 24 le ƒe 1990 me - ne ɖɔkta eve lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be fufɔfɔa dzi yiyi dea afɔku gã aɖe me na nyɔnua ƒe ŋutilã kple susu ƒe lãmesẽ wu eɖeɖe. Sea ɖe mɔ ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋu le kwasiɖa 24 megbe ko, eʋua tab yeye le nɔnɔme siwo me nyɔnua ƒe agbe ɖo afɔku me, afɔku li be abi gã aɖe axɔ nyɔnua ƒe ŋutilã alo susu ƒe lãmesẽ tegbee alo fugboe ƒe nɔnɔme si mesɔ o vevie.Fifia la, woate ŋu atsɔ nya ɖe amesiame - si me atikewɔla hã le - si kpena ɖe nyɔnu ŋu be wòaɖe fu le se godo la ŋu. Woate ŋu ati nyɔnu si le fu ɖem hã yome.NUSI WOÐO BE WOATƆTƆDɔɖɔɖo si dzi woda asi ɖo la medo susua ɖa be woatrɔ Fuɖeɖe ƒe Se 1967 o, eʋu tab yeye, si gblɔ nɔnɔme siwo me woaɖe fu le vaseɖe kwasiɖa 24 kple edzivɔ siaa.Aɖe nyɔnuwo ɖa le nuvlowɔha ƒe sea me boŋ,, eʋu tab yeye be woadzudzɔ wo be woagawɔ nuvlo o investigated by police and prosecuted for ending their pregnancies in all circumstances.The amendment,, opens new tab approved by 379 votes to 137, says, opens new tab: “Nya yeye sia mawɔ dɔ ɖe nuvlowɔha ƒe se si li xoxo si ku ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋu tso nyɔnu siwo wɔa nu le eya ŋutɔ ƒe fufɔfɔ ŋu le fufɔfɔ ɖesiaɖe me ŋu o, si aɖe ŋɔdzidoname si nye be woawɔ numekuku, ameléle, . nyadɔdrɔ̃, alo gaxɔmenɔnɔ.“Matrɔ se aɖeke ku ɖe fuɖeɖe ƒe dɔwɔnawo nana le lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe nɔnɔme me o, si me ɣeyiɣi si woɖo ɖi, atikewɔwɔ to didiƒe, nusiwo dzi woanɔ te ɖo aɖe fu, alo nudidi si nye be ɖɔkta eve nada asi ɖe edzi.”SURVEY SOURCEA ƒe nyanuɖela na YouGov gblɔ be 1% ƒe nya la metso wo gbɔ o. Another polling company, ComRes, published this result following a 2017 survey.Ebia ame tsitsiwo le Great Britain be nukae wòle be fuɖeɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe seɖoƒe nanye le Britain Numekukua me tsonu, le axa 17, ʋu tab yeye, ɖee fia be ame 1% gblɔ be ele be woakekee ɖe enu vaseɖe vidzidzi.YouGov wɔ numekuku aɖe le April 2025 me, ʋu tab yeye si me amesiwo wobia gbee ƒe 7% gblɔ be yewolɔ̃ ɖe fuɖeɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe seɖoƒe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ wu 24 kwasiɖawo.Ewɔ numekuku hã, ʋu tab yeyewo amewo le June 15 kple June 16, 2025, ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe hafi sewɔlawo da megbe na sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Tonia Antoniazzi ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖoa to comment.VERDICTMissing context.Togbɔ be ame 1% siwo wobia gbee le ƒe 2017 ƒe numekuku aɖe me gblɔ be yewoda asi ɖe fuɖeɖe le se nu vaseɖe vidzidzi dzi hã la, menye nusi Britaintɔwo ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me nɔlawo da asi ɖe edzi le June 17, 2025. Woda asi ɖe edzi be woaɖe fuɖeɖe ɖa le se nu na nyɔnuwo, ke menye be woaɖee le se nu o.Reuters Fact Check ƒe ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia.Xlẽ nu geɖe tso míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe dɔa ŋu Dzidzenuwo: Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., ʋu tab yeye Nyati siwo wodo ɖa:Nyateƒenyawo DzroMamãXFacebookLinkedinEmailLink

claim: Le Minnesota la, woɖe mɔ na tutɔ siwo si mɔɖegbalẽ le be woatsɔ tu si me wode agbae le tsitretsiɖeŋu aɖe me.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Esi woda tu Alex Pretti si xɔ ƒe 37 wòku le U.S. Liƒodzikpɔlawo ƒe dɔwɔlawo si me le Jan. 24, 2026 dzi le Minneapolis megbe la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua me tɔ aɖewo ta Pretti be enye ŋutasẽnuwɔla si dea dzo amewo me elabena etsɔ tu si me agba le ɖe asi esime wònɔ tsitre tsim ɖe eŋu. Le Jan. 25 Fox News ƒe dzedzeme me, le nuƒoƒo tso Pretti ƒe ku ŋu me la, FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kash Patel gblɔ (le ga 5:10 me be), "Màte ŋu atsɔ tu, si me magazine geɖe le, ava tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒomevi ɖesiaɖe si nèdi me o. Ele bɔbɔe nenema. Gome mele asiwò be nàda se dzi ahade ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ƒe dzi ƒo o." Le esia ta la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla geɖe ke ɖi Patel ƒe nyawo alo ʋli nya le wo ŋu —siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus, si nye tu ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋliha, si yɔ Patel be “mesɔ kura le Minnesota ƒe se nu o.” Patel ƒe nyawo va le esi Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kristi Noem — le amegã bubuwo kple Trump ƒe hadɔwɔlawo dome — hã fia be tu tsɔtsɔ na kpovitɔwo kpɔ susu aɖe si ta woada tu Pretti atsɔ aʋli wo ɖokui ta. Noem gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le Jan. 24 dzi be: "Nyemenya ŋutifafa me tsitretsiɖeŋula aɖeke si tsɔ tu kple tu ɖe asi tsɔ wu dzesi o." Le nyateƒe me la, Minneapolis ƒe sewo, Minnesota dukɔa ƒe sewo kple dukɔa ƒe sewo katã ɖe mɔ na tutɔ siwo si mɔɖegbalẽ le be woatsɔ tu, ne wotsɔ wo de wo me gɔ̃ hã, le dutoƒo teƒewo katã kloe, le tsitretsiɖeŋu hã me. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya si wogblɔ be tutɔ siwo si mɔɖegbalẽ le ate ŋu atsɔ tu le se nu le Minnesota le tsitretsiɖeŋu aɖe me be enye nyateƒe, si fia be Patel ƒe nyawo mesɔ o. Minneapolis kpovitɔwo ƒe amegã Brian O’Hara gblɔ le Jan. 26 dzi be le “nusianu si míekpɔ” nu la, Pretti, si nye dɔnɔdzikpɔla le dɔnɔdzikpɔƒe si wokpɔa dɔnɔwo gbɔ vevie le Veterans Affairs kɔdzi, “ɖe mɔ le se nu be wòatsɔ aʋawɔnuwo le dutoƒo teƒe.” Minnesota Bureau of Criminal Apprehension gblɔ be, vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm la, Minnesota ƒe se ene nɔ anyi siwo ƒo nu tso afisiwo wode se na tudada ƒe mɔɖegbalẽxɔlawo be woagatsɔ tu o: section 243.55, 609.66, 624.714 kple 641.165. (Kpɔ ŋuɖoɖo si le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia be "Afikae woxe mɔ nam be nyematsɔ nye tu o?") Snopes ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe se ene siawo ŋu mekpɔ ɖoɖo aɖeke si xe mɔ na tutɔ siwo si mɔɖegbalẽ le be woagatsɔ tu si me wode agbae ayi tsitretsiɖeŋu aɖe o. Minnesota ƒe se ƒe Akpa 243.55 xe mɔ na amewo be woagatsɔ tu ayi dukɔa ƒe ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒe alo dukɔa ƒe kɔdzi o; 609.66 xe mɔ ɖe tu ƒe amesinɔnɔ le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo, dukɔa ƒe xɔ aɖewo kple suku ƒe anyigba dzi nu; eye 641.165 xe mɔ ɖe tu tsɔtsɔ yi gaxɔwo, gaxɔwo kple ameɖɔɖɔɖoƒewo nu. Se mamlɛtɔ, si nye Section 624.714, ku ɖe tohehe siwo woaxe na ame ne wotsɔ tu ɖe asi mɔɖegbalẽ manɔmee ŋu koŋ. Sea gblɔ ko be mɔɖegbalẽ tsɔtsɔ ɖe dutoƒo teƒe bia mɔɖegbalẽ (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Ame aɖe, si menye ŋutifafadɔwɔla o, abe alesi woɖe eme le section 626.84, subdivision 1 me ene, si tsɔa tu, léa, alo le esi le ʋu, snodzizɔʋu, alo tɔdziʋu me, alo le amea ƒe awu alo amea dzi alo le eŋu, alo le mɔ bubu nu si le esi alo le edzi kpɔm le dutoƒo teƒe, abe alesi si woɖe fia le section 624.7181, subdivision 1, paragraph (c) me, esi mexɔ mɔɖegbalẽ gbã be wòatsɔ tu la o la, eɖi fɔ le nuvlowɔwɔ gã aɖe ta. Ame si wobu fɔe zi evelia alo esi kplɔe ɖo la ɖi fɔ le nuvlowɔwɔ gã aɖe me. Dɔwɔla aɖe si le Minnesota Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe, Betsy Haugen, hã to e-mail dzi tsɔ ƒe 2022 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si tso Minnesota ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Senyala, Numekuku, Kple Ganyawo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe si mekpɔa gome le eme o gbɔ, si gblɔ be le Minnesota tu ƒe mɔɖegbalẽwo ƒe sewo nu la, mɔɖegbalẽxɔla ate ŋu atsɔe ayi "teƒe akpa gãtɔ le nutoa me," le gaglãgbe alo le ɣaɣlaƒe. Teƒe siwo ŋu wode se ɖo ƒe ŋkɔ siwo woŋlɔ ɖe nyatakakaa me la melɔ tsitretsiɖeŋunyawo alo dutoƒo teƒewo ɖe eme le goawo katã me o (kpɔ Axa 2): Gake zi geɖe la, se meɖe mɔ be woatsɔ (negbe ɖewo koe mele eme o) ɖe dukɔa/ame ŋutɔ ƒe gɔmedzesuku, titina, alo sekɛndrisuku ƒe anyigba akpa gãtɔ dzi, sukuxɔwo ƒe bɔswo, ɖeviwo dzikpɔƒe siwo ŋu mɔɖegbalẽ le, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe gãwo, dukɔa ƒe xɔwo, ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒewo, kple dukɔa ƒe kɔdziwo dzi. Ebia tso ame ŋutɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe akpa gãtɔ (si gɔme woɖe le mɔ gbadza nu) si be woada dzesi ɖe dɔwɔƒea wòadze ƒã alo woana ame ŋutɔ nana tutsɔla la nanya be wode se ɖe tudada nu le dɔwɔƒea be woaxe mɔ ɖe etsɔtsɔ nu. Sɔlemexɔwo/tadeaguƒewo kple aƒetɔwo/ame ŋutɔ ƒe aƒewo tɔ le se nu ate ŋu axe mɔ ɖe etsɔtsɔ nu to mɔ ɖesiaɖe si le se nu dzi. Gawu la, Minneapolis dugã ƒe sedede eveawo siaa ku ɖe tu léle ɖe asi le dutoƒo ŋu — 393.90 kple 393.95 — gblɔ be seawo ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔa meku ɖe mɔɖegbalẽxɔla siwo sɔ ŋu o. Hennepin Nutome Senyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe, si tsɔa nya ɖe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu le Mi

claim: Fox News ka nya ta be Florida ŋutsu gbe adzɔxexe elabena eya ŋutɔ meda asi ɖe gazazãawo dometɔ aɖeke dzi o.
evidence: Enye Nukokoedoname Ðe Fox News da ŋutinya aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "FLORIDA ŊUTSU GBE BE yeMAXƆ Adzɔ O ELABENA YE ŋutɔ MEDA DA ÐE GAZAZRAÐOƑE AÐEKAKE O"? Ao, menye nyateƒee o: Akɔntabubu si da ŋutinyaa ɖe afima gbã la nye fewuɖunyawo ƒe axa eye wògblɔ be enye "modzakaɖeɖe si wowɔ keŋkeŋ," afisi "ŋutinyaawo nye gbemelãwo ko ale gbegbe be wonye nu ŋutɔŋutɔwo kloe."  Nya sia dze le April 6, 2026, ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me le X akɔnta @DoniTheMisfit (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia). Eʋu: FLORIDA ŊUTSU GBE BE YEMAXE Adzɔ ELABENA YE ŋutɔ MEDA DA ÐE GAZADZRAÐOƑE AÐEKAKE O Aleae nya si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi le ɣeyiɣi si me woŋlɔ nya sia: (Nɔnɔmetata dzɔtsoƒe: nyatakaka si @DoniTheMisfit ŋlɔ ɖe X.) Nɔnɔmetata si woda ɖe X dzi la na nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe dzesi la tso, gake nɔnɔmetata si wodi ɖe megbe la kplɔ nɔnɔmetata la ɖo ɖe nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi Facebook akɔnta @TheDudeHumorReport (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) kple Fox News ƒe dzesi le miame ƒe dzogoe si le etame, abe alesi screenshot sia ɖee fia ene: (Nɔnɔmetata tsoƒe: nyatakaka tso @TheDudeHumorReport gbɔ le Facebook.) Akɔnta @TheDudeHumorReport (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) nye axa si dzi "The Dude" ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ tso "The Big Lebowski" sinima ƒe dzesi (wodzrae ɖo le afisia) si gblɔ be eɖe "satire kple parody ŋutinya siwo wogbɔ eme, wole nyakpakpawo tum ɖo -- wowɔe na modzakaɖeɖe ɖeɖeko," abe alesi screenshot sia ɖee fia ene: (Nɔnɔmetata tsoƒe: @DudeHumor ye ŋlɔ ɖe Facebook dzi.) Bio la gblɔ be: Dude Humor -- afisi nyadzɔdzɔ yeyewo doa go modzakaɖeɖe dzadzɛ le.  for wild headlines and viral stories Disclaimer: Axa sia ɖe fewuɖunya kple fefenya ŋutinya siwo gbɔ eme, siwo le ŋgɔ yim nye nyakpakpa -- siwo wowɔ hena modzakaɖeɖe ɖeɖeko.  Lead Stories de dzesi The Dude Humor Report va yi be enye fewuɖunya ƒe axa le nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ɖe vovo me.  Ne ɖe Fox News da ŋutinya sia tɔgbe ɖe afima la, anye ne woate ŋu akpɔe bɔbɔe le nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe alo internet dzi. Lead Stories di Fox News (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) be yeakpɔ ŋutinyaa eye womekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si sɔ kplii o. Google (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) kple Yahoo! Nyadzɔdzɔwo (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) kpɔ fewuɖunya si woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook dzi eye nyati aɖeke meli si ƒe tanya le o.

claim: Le June 5, 2025 dzi la, “se si ku ɖe asikaka ame ŋu” si xe mɔ ɖe asitelefon zazã ne wole ʋu kum nu la dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le U.S. nuto 31 me.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, Pennsylvania ƒe "kakaka se" — si woyɔna le se nu be "Paul Miller ƒe Se" — dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso June 5, 2025. Dukɔ bubu siwo woyɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyatakakawo me la, se mawo tɔgbe nɔ anyi xoxo do ŋgɔ na ŋkeke sia, wo dometɔ aɖewo le keke ƒe 2008 me ke a vehicle — was going into effect across 31 U.S. states as of June 5, 2025. Woma nya sia le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeFacebook (archived) andespeciallyTikTok (archived,archived), eye ezãlawo ɖo aɖaŋu na wo yomedzelawo tso dedienɔnɔ kple ŋudzɔnɔnɔ ne wole ʋu kum ŋu. Alesi nyaʋiʋlia kakae na Snopes xlẽla aɖewo to e-mail dzi tsɔ nya ɖe eƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu. Gake nya si wogblɔ be "kakaka ame ŋu ƒe se" dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le U.S. dukɔ 31 me le June 5, 2025 dzi la, ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye alakpa. Togbɔ be le nyateƒe me la, se mawo le nuto 31 siwo woɖe fia le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me hã la, Pennsylvania tɔ koe dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso ŋkeke ma dzi. Wotsɔ ŋkɔ na Pennsylvania sea be "Paul Miller ƒe Se," si wotsɔ ŋkɔ na ŋutsu aɖe "si ku nublanuitɔe le afɔku aɖe si dzɔ kple traktɔtɔ ƒe ʋu si wotsɔna ʋua ʋu le ƒe 2010 me le Monroe County, le ʋukula aɖe si ƒe susu dzo le ʋukula aɖe si do asi ɖa xɔ woƒe telefon esime wònɔ ʋu kum ta," le nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si Pennsylvania Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ɖe ɖe go nu. Nyati aɖe si le internet dzi tabloid nyatakakadzraɖoƒeThe U.S. Sun si yɔ "nutome 31 siwo me ʋukulawo dze ŋgɔ 'kakaka se'" la wota le May 2025 ƒe nuwuwu. Dukɔ bubuawo ƒe "ka asi ame ŋu ƒe sewo," si woyɔna zi geɖe be "ʋukuku si ƒe susu ɖa le ame ŋu" alo "asimaɖemaɖe" sewo, le dɔ wɔm ɣeyiɣi didi vovovowo tso keke ƒe 2008. Dukɔ 30 bubu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe The U.S. Sun nyati me kple kadodo siwo yi dukɔ ɖesiaɖe ƒe se alo dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe axa siwo ku ɖe woƒe sea ƒe tɔtrɔ ŋu la le ete. Alabama Arizona California Colorado Connecticut Delaware Georgia Hawaii Idaho Illinois Indiana Iowa Maine Maryland Massachusetts Michigan Minnesota Missouri Nevada New Hampshire New Jersey New York Ohio Oregon Rhode Island Tennessee Vermont Virginia Washington West Virginia Ʋukuku ƒe se siwo hea susu ɖa ƒe wɔwɔfia le theGovernors Highway Safety Association ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe, si nye habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si le didim be yeana ʋuwo ƒe dedienɔnɔ nanyo ɖe edzi eye yeakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi, ɖo kpe edzi be nuto 31 siawo, kpe ɖe Sewo le dɔ wɔm le D.C., Puerto Rico, Guam, Dziehe Mariana Ƒukpowo kple U.S. Virgin Ƒukpowo dzi siwo “xe mɔ na ʋukulawo katã be woagazã asitelefon siwo wotsɔ asi wɔe ne wole ʋu kum o.” Habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o la ɖee fia hã be "wo katã negbe Alabama kple Missouri koe nye se gbãtɔ siwo wowɔna," si fia be sedzikpɔla ateŋu ayɔ ʋukula aɖe ɖe sedzidada ta evɔ mahiã be wòawɔ nuvlo bubu aɖeke be wòatɔ ʋu o. Eyata togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be sewo le dukɔ 31 siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo me si xe mɔ ɖe asitelefon zazã ne wole ʋu kum nu hã la, alakpae wònye be woagblɔ be woƒe sewo katã dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso June 5, 2025 dzi.

claim: Le ƒe 2000 me la, wotso afia na Missouri ŋutsu aɖe be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 13 gake menɔ gaxɔ me ɣeyiɣi aɖeke o vaseɖe ƒe 13 megbe le agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe vodada aɖe ta.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Cornealious "Mike" Anderson nɔ eƒe tohehea ƒe ɖeka kple edzivɔ vie le ƒe 2013 kple 2014 dome esime dziɖuɖumegãwo ke ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe vodadaa ŋu. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe ɖe asi le Anderson ŋu le May 5, 2014 dzi, eye wògblɔ be ne woyi edzi le gaxɔ me la, "tameɖoɖo aɖeke mawɔ dɔ o, anye adzɔxelawo ƒe dɔlarwo gbegblẽ eye woahe to na ame nyui." Le ƒe 2025 ƒe adame la, nya aɖe si xɔ ƒe ewo (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Missouri ŋutsu aɖe ƒo asa na ƒe 13 ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ le ƒe 2000 me le agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe vodada aɖe ta. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X zãla ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be Cornealious "Mike" Anderson "wobu fɔe ɖe adzodada kple tu ta" gake, le dziɖuɖu ƒe vodada ta la, dziɖuɖumegãwo "susui vodadatɔe be ele gaxɔ megbe xoxo, eyata womelée de gaxɔ me gbeɖe o." X zãla la gblɔ kpee be Anderson "nɔ agbe si me sedziwɔwɔ le," etsɔ eɖokui na eye wòdze ƒome kple dɔwɔƒe gɔme le ƒe 13 siwo woɖo be wòanɔ gaxɔ me, gake dziɖuɖumegãwo lée le ƒe 2013 me esime ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔlawo va ke ɖe vodadaa ŋu. Zãla la gblɔ be ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la ɖe asi le ye ŋu le ƒe 2014 me, eye wòkpɔe dze sii be Anderson "nɔ agbe abe ɖɔɖɔɖowɔla ene" eye "le nyateƒe me la, ewɔ eƒe tohehea to amesi gaxɔa ɖoe be yeawɔ me." Nya sia kaka ɖe Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe), TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), afisi ezãlawo gblɔ be Anderson tso Missouri. Kpuie ko la, ŋutinyaa, si me nuŋlɔɖi siwo gblɔ be Anderson zã ƒe 13 siwo wòle be wòanɔ gaxɔ me hafi tu asitsaƒe kple agbe si me sea megade nu eme le o la nye nyateƒe. Le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo kple nutoa me Missouri ƒe asitsaƒe aɖe nu la, le March 2000 me la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe tso afia na Anderson be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 13 le esi wòkpɔ gome le adzodada aɖe me le Burger King nuɖuɖudzraƒe aɖe le St. Charles, Missouri, le Aug. 15, 1999. Anderson tsɔ nya ɖe nutome nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ƒewo kple dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kɔkɔwo ŋu vaseɖe ƒe 2002 me, esime Missouri Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ da asi ɖe eƒe gbãtɔ dzi kakaɖedzi na ame. Emegbe Anderson nɔ mɔ kpɔm be woaɖe asi le yeƒe gaxɔgbalẽvia ŋu alo be ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ana mɔɖeɖe be woalé ye. Wo dometɔ aɖeke medzɔ o. Togbɔ be Anderson do kpo eƒe tohehea nyuie hã la, dziɖuɖumegãwo va die mlɔeba le July 25, 2013 dzi, esime ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea va kpɔe mlɔeba be womede ye gaxɔ me kpɔ o. Enɔ gaxɔ me ƒe ɖeka kloe esime ɖoɖoa nɔ nya me tsom nenye be eganyi fe le ɣeyiɣi ŋu. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe tso nya me mlɔeba be yeaɖe asi le Anderson ŋu, eye fotoɖela aɖe si tso The Associated Press lée esime wònɔ dodom le Mississippi Nutome Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si le Charleston, Missouri, le May 5, 2014 dzi, eye mlɔeba wòzu ablɔɖeme, eye srɔ̃a kple vianyɔnu nɔ egbɔ. Jessica Lussenhop, si nye nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla si dzroa nu me eye wòƒoa nu tso titinaɣetoɖoƒe nuto gã la ŋu ɣemaɣi la ka nya ta geɖe tso Anderson ƒe ŋutinya ŋu le September 2013 me esime wònɔ gaxɔ me. Le eƒe nyatakaka nana St. Louis Riverfront Times me la, Lussenhop ƒo nu tso nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ aɖe si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu le fɔbubua megbe le ƒe 2004 me si ate ŋu anye agbalẽŋlɔlawo ƒe vodada si na Anderson nye ablɔɖeme hafi. Le Lussenhop ƒe nyatakaka nu la, eƒe nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ le ƒe 2004 me le fɔbubua megbe, si eƒe senyala Michael Gross tsɔ yi ʋɔnui la ƒe fli gbãtɔ xlẽ be: “Movant mele gaxɔ me fifia o.” Ɣemaɣi la, ema nye nyateƒe — Anderson bla nu le June 2000 me eye wònɔ ablɔɖe me esime eƒe nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃wo nɔ dɔ wɔm to ɖoɖoa me. Togbɔ be ele alea hã la, esi ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la he nya sia vɛ le Anderson ƒe nyaa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me la, senyala, si wogblɔ be James Gregory, "ti kpo" eye wògblɔ be yewoƒe ƒuƒoƒoa lé ŋku ɖe eŋu ŋdi ma eye wokpɔe be Anderson le gaxɔ me. Wogblɔ be Gross gblɔ na Lussenhop le ƒe 2013 me be yebu Gregory ƒe susua be enye nyateƒe elabena yemeƒo nu kple Anderson ŋkeke ʋee aɖewo le nyadɔdrɔ̃a wɔɣi o eye le esi Anderson menɔ afima o ta. "Amerikatɔwo ƒe Agbe sia," si nye radio dzi wɔna kple podcast si me ŋutinya vavãwo ƒoa xlã tanya aɖe si woɖo kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa, ƒo nu tso Anderson ƒe ŋutinya ŋu le Feb. 14, 2014, le akpa aɖe me, si ƒe tanyae nye: "Negbe Nu Ðeka Ma ko." Le nudzɔdzɔa me la, Anderson gblɔ na Lussenhop be yeƒo ka na Gross le nyadɔdrɔ̃a megbe ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo. Anderson gblɔ (ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi 11:01): Eƒe mo wɔ yaa ŋutɔ. Egblɔ be, "Mèle gaxɔ me oa?" Megblɔ be, "Ao, menye nenemae o." Eye ale menɔ abe, "Nukae wòle be míawɔ? Ðe wòle be matsɔ ɖokuinye ade emea?" Eye ɖeko wònɔ abe, nyuie, le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, vodadae wònye. Woakpɔ woƒe vodadaa ɖa. Egblɔ be, "Ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe — kpɔ mɔ be woaxɔ wò. Wole wò xɔ ge." Anderson gblɔ na Lussenhop be togbɔ be yemebu eŋu kpɔ be yeatsɔ ye ɖokui ade asi ne ame aɖeke meva ɖe ye ta o hã la, mewɔe hã be esesẽ ŋutɔ be woakpɔ ye ɖokui o (ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi 12:09): Mede nye dɔwɔƒea agbalẽ me to dukɔa ƒe nunya dzi

claim: Ʋukula aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Ronald McDonald wu ɖevi 12 le nutome nudzraƒewo le U.S. Titinaɣetoɖoƒe godoo le ƒe 1892 me eye wòʋã egbegbe McDonald ƒe nuɖuɖu kabakaba ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖonu si xɔ ŋkɔ ma ke.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le August 2025 me gblɔ be video aɖe gblɔ ŋutinya vavã aɖe tso adzodala aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Ronald McDonald si wu ɖevi 12 le nutome ƒe nudzraƒewo le U.S. Midwest godoo le ƒe 1892 me eye wòʋã egbegbe McDonald ƒe nuɖuɖu kabakaba ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe aɖaʋawɔla mascot si xɔ ŋkɔ ma ke. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Klip la gaɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi la fia be, "Ronald McDonald ŋutɔŋutɔ menɔ burger dzram o. Enɔ ɖeviwo dim. Esiae nye nuvlowɔwɔ vavã vivivi si dzɔ tso nuɖuɖu kabakaba ƒe mascot megbe — ɖevi wuieve bu hafi ƒe 1892 ƒe dzomeŋɔli wu enu." Inspector Crimes Facebook-dzesi si do ƒome kplii hã xɔ (dzrae ɖo) video si dzi woŋlɔ nya ma ke ɖo, eye ame siwo ade miliɔn 6 ye kpɔe. Nya aɖe si Inspector Story (@inspectorstory) ma, Zãla bubuwo ma nya sia le Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Threads (nudzraɖoƒe). Videoa ɖe ŋutinyagblɔla aɖe fia eye wògblɔ ŋutinyaa ale: Esiae nye Ronald McDonald ŋutɔŋutɔ. Menye esi dzi nèɖoa ŋkui tso boblododowo me o. Amadede dzĩ ƒe ʋeʋẽ. Ðevi 12 siwo bu ƒe ɖoɖoezizi. Le ƒe 1892 me la, ƒudzidela aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Ronald McDonald tsa le nutome ƒe nudzraƒewo le Titinaɣetoɖoƒe gome. Awu dzĩ si le keklẽm. Akɔtawu ɣi. Asigɛ ɣiwo va ɖo abɔta. Alɔgbɔnukoko si wota wòkeke ale gbegbe be wòtso eƒe ŋgonu. Eyɔ eƒe agbadɔa be, "Dzidzɔɖuɖua." Ðeviwo ƒe gege ɖe eme femaxee. Le eme la, kekelia me mekɔ tututu o. Ya la ʋẽna lilili abe abolo vivi kple varnish ene. Ðevi ɖesiaɖe xɔ pepaɖaka sue aɖe, si ƒe amadede nye dzĩ, eye wotsɔ dzesi ɣi aɖe ƒo ɖe axadzi. Le eme la, bun falɛfalɛ aɖe, lã fafɛ kakɛ aɖe, ati fefenu si wotsɔ asi kpa kple agbalẽvi. "Miɖu nu. Trɔ va etsɔ." Dzilawo mekpɔ naneke si gblẽ o gake ɖeviwo do go le eme ɣie eye wozi ɖoɖoe. Ame aɖewo maɖu nu o ŋkeke geɖe. Ame aɖewo maƒo nu kura o. Kaka dzomeŋɔli nawu enu la, ɖevi 12 bu le du siwo me eƒe agbadɔ dze le la me. Esi se la dzro eƒe tasiaɖam la me la, wokpɔe be etsi ƒuƒlu. Negbe aɖaka si me wotsɔ amadede dzĩ, avɔ ɣi kple pepaɖaka gbogbo aɖewo siwo wometsɔ wɔ dɔe o koe susɔ la, le ƒe blaeve megbe la, boblodododɔwɔƒe aɖe si le Chicago ƒle nudzraɖoƒe ƒe nɔnɔmetata xoxo aɖe be woatsɔ ade dzo atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo yeye aɖe me na nuɖuɖudzraƒewo ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi. Wolé ŋkɔa me ɖe asi. Wolé amadedeawo me ɖe asi. Wolé alɔgbɔnukokoa ɖe te. Eye ɣesiaɣi si nèkpɔe tso ɣemaɣi la, èle amewula aɖe ƒe mo kpɔm. Ke hã, alakpae ŋutinyaa nye. Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ƒe didiwo mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si ka nya ta tso ƒe alafa 19 lia me amewula aɖe si kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo si ŋkɔe nye Ronald McDonald ŋu kpɔ o. Ŋutinya me nudzraɖoƒewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye agbalẽ siwo le Google Books kple nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ xoxo siwo le Newspapers.com hã mekpɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke tso nya sia ŋu o. Gake Bing ƒe didia ɖe ŋutinyaa ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi si woŋlɔ kple AI fia, si koŋ nye nya si me AI kpe asi ɖe eŋu vodadatɔe be woado ŋutinya aɖe si AI wɔ ɖe ŋgɔ be enye nyateƒe. Bing ƒe numeɖeɖe si woŋlɔ kple AI yɔ Inspector Story ƒe podcast be eyae nye eƒe dzɔtsoƒe, si me nuŋɔŋlɔ si AI wɔ kple aʋatso ame geɖe ƒe gbe siwo le nya la me dzrom la le. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, ame aɖe tsɔ nunya wɔwɔe ƒe dɔwɔnu aɖe wɔ videoa. Nɔnɔmetata siwo katã le videoa ƒe akpa dzi la nye alakpa. Azɔ hã, nuŋlɔla la ƒe gbe ɖi gbe si ƒomevi AI wɔ si wokpɔna le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo woŋlɔa nyatakakawo ɖe nuƒoƒo me, abe ElevenLabs.io ene, dzi. Snopes do ka kple Inspector Crime kple Inspector Story ƒe akɔntabubuwo dzikpɔla, kpakple amesi le BURIED TRUTHS — TikTok akɔnta si ŋu míeƒo nu tsoe emegbe le nyati sia me — dzi be yeabia nya tso ŋutinya kple videoa ƒe gɔmedzedze ŋu. Míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míesrɔ̃ nyatakaka bubuwo. Le Fandom.com ƒe nya nu la, Willard Scott si megali o —amesi wɔ Bozo the Clown ƒe akpa eye emegbe wòwɔ dɔ abe "Today" show TV yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nunyala ene — ɖe Ronald McDonald, si nye McDonald ƒe mascot, ƒe nɔnɔmetata zi gbãtɔ le TV dzi boblododowo me le ƒe 1963. Chicago Tribune ka nya ta le ƒe 1972 me be menye ɖeko Scott do clown mascot ƒe awu ko o, ke ewɔ amea hã. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo Fandom.com zãlawo ƒo ƒu gblɔ kpee be ame aɖewo ʋli nya le Scott ƒe dzɔtsoƒe ŋutinya ŋu. Togbɔ be ele alea hã la, wiki nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe akpa aɖeke meyɔ nya aɖeke tso McDonald dɔwɔƒea ƒe atsyɔ̃ɖonu la wɔwɔ ŋu le ŋutsu aɖe si wu ɖevi wuieve ƒe gbɔgbɔmeʋaʋã ta o. BURIED TRUTHS (@buried__truths) TikTok akɔnta lae nye videoa ƒe nyatakaka xoxotɔ kple gbãtɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) tso Aug. 9 dzi, eye ame miliɔn 2.3 kple edzivɔ kpɔe. Nu bubu siwo dze emegbe le Inspector Crimes and Inspector Story ƒe nyatakaka siwo woda ɖe video klipi la me, siwo me McDonald dɔwɔƒea ƒe Ronald McDonald mo ƒe foto si wotsɔ tsyɔ edzi le openi la me o

claim: Dziɖuɖua dze nudzɔdzɔ ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe gɔme be yeatsɔ akpɔ ga home si nye Rs 8 crore atsɔ akpe ɖe Nimisha Priya ŋu
evidence: India Dziɖuɖua meɖe kuku be woadzɔ nu aɖeke atsɔ akpe ɖe Nimsha Priya ŋu o, eye megblɔ gadzraɖoƒe ŋuti nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu woɖe mɔ ɖo na esia hã o. Nyatakaka si kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple nya sia nye alakpa.  New Delhi (Vishvas Nyadzɔdzɔwo). Esi wohe India dɔnɔdzikpɔla Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso ɖe megbe le Yemen dukɔmevi Talal Abdo wuwu ƒe nya la me vɔ la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe mam eye wole nudzɔdzɔ biam le ‘Save Nimisha Priya’ dɔa te. Wole gbɔgblɔm be be woaɖe Nimisha Priya ta la, woate ŋu atsɔ nudzɔdzɔa ƒe ga home ade India Dziɖuɖua ƒe gakɔnta si ŋu woɖe mɔ ɖo la me tẽ. Wole kuku ɖem be woakpɔ ga home si nye Rs 8.3 crore to dɔ sia si wogblɔ be wowɔ la dzi.  Vishvas News, le eƒe numekukua me la, kpɔe be nya sia nye alakpa. India Dziɖuɖua meɖe kuku be woadzɔ nu aɖeke atsɔ akpe ɖe Nimsha Priya ŋu o, eye megblɔ gadzraɖoƒe ƒe gakɔnta aɖeke si ŋu woɖe mɔ ɖo ƒe nyatakakawo hã o. India Dziɖuɖua ƒe Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha hã yɔ nudzɔdzɔ sia be enye alakpa.  Nukae nye dɔlékuiwutike?  X zãla 'Dr KA Paul' ma nya la tso eƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe asiléƒe eye wòŋlɔ bena, "Midzɔ nu tẽ na Save Nimisha ɖe India Dziɖuɖua ƒe akɔnta si woɖo. Míehiã 8.3 crore rupees."  Midzɔ nu tẽ na Save Nimisha na India Dziɖuɖua ƒe akɔntabubu si woɖo . Míehiã rupee crore 8.3 . pic.twitter.com/6tKTr7n3HH — Dr KA Paul (@KAPaulOfficial) August 19, 2025 Numekuku Wohe India dɔnɔdzikpɔla Nimisha Priya, amesi woawu le July 16, 2025 dzi le Yemen dukɔmevi Talal Abdo Mahdi wuwu ta la wuwu ɖe megbe le aɖabaƒoƒo mamlɛtɔ dzi eye womeɖe gbeƒã ŋkeke yeye aɖeke haɖe o, ka nya ta bbc.com dzi.  Le August 2025 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si dze le The Hindu me nu la, "Dukɔa ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha, togbɔ be eɖo kpe edzi be wohe India dukɔmevi Nimisha Priya wuwu ɖe megbe le Yemen hã la, eɖe kuku na dukɔa kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo be woagagblɔ nyatakaka siwo ŋu womeɖo kpee o kple nyatakaka totrowo tso nya sia ŋu o."  Esi míebu akpa si India Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha wɔ le nya sia me ŋu la, míelé ŋku ɖe Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe asiléƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ŋu eye míekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo ku ɖe kukuɖeɖe aɖeke be woadzɔ nu ŋu o.  Le míaƒe didi me la, míekpɔ nya aɖe si Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le se nu ma, si me wogblɔ le be nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ be woadzɔ nu na Nimisha Priya be enye alakpa.  Míekpɔ nya siwo wogblɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo be wole ga dim ɖe gadzraɖoƒe si GoI tia le Nimisha Priya nya la me. Esia nye alakpanya.https://t.co/stxeFevl64 pic.twitter.com/4gQGIO4gvP — MEA FactCheck (@MEAFactCheck) August 19, 2025 Esi '@MEAFactCheck' yɔ 'Ðɔkta KA Paul' ƒe nyawo be enye alakpa la, eŋlɔ bena, "Míekpɔ nya aɖe le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ku ɖe didi be woade ga India Dziɖuɖua ƒe gadzraɖoƒe ƒe akɔntabubu si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo me ŋu." le Nimisha Priya nya la me. Esia nye alakpanya aɖe."  Vishvas News do ka kple Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyanuɖela Randhir Jaiswal hã ku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome ŋu. Eɖo kpe edzi be, "Nya sia nye alakpa keŋkeŋ."  Woŋlɔ gadzraɖoƒe ƒe akɔntabubu ŋuti nyatakaka siwo wona le nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo me me ɖe "PR CCA, Ministry of External Affairs" ƒe ŋkɔ me.  Le nyatakaka siwo le Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha kple Aƒemenyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo nu la, PR CCA fia Akɔntabubu Dzikpɔlagã, amesi kpɔa ganyawo kple akɔntabubu dzi le dɔwɔƒe ɖesiaɖe.  Madhurendra Kumar, si nye TV dzi nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla gã aɖe si ƒoa nu tso Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ŋu gblɔ be, "Amesiame ate ŋu ana eƒe gakɔntawo nadze le dutoƒo le mɔ sia nu eye wòaɖe kuku be woadzɔ nu." Egblɔ be "dziɖuɖua mele nudzɔdzɔ ma tɔgbe aɖeke wɔm o, eye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha hã gbee to eƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe asiléƒea dzi."  Nya mawo tɔgbe siwo wogblɔ tso Nimisha Priya ŋu kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo zi geɖe. Nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ le July 30, 2025 dzi gblɔ be, " Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyatakakatsoƒewo gblɔ be nya siwo wogblɔ be woɖe asi le Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso ŋu la nye alakpa. " Tsɔ kpe ɖe esia ŋu la, subɔsubɔha la "ƒoe ɖe amewo nu be woaƒo asa na nyatakaka totrowo kple nususugblɔ tso nya vevi sia ŋu."  BBC ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be, "Save Nimisha Priya International Action Council ƒo ga nu ƒu to nudzɔdzɔwo me be woatsɔ axɔ na Nimisha." To habɔbɔ sia ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me la, Nimisha dada, Prema Kumari xɔ mɔɖeɖe tɔxɛ tso India Dziɖuɖu gbɔ eye wòyi Yemen le April 2024 me eye le ƒe ma ke me la, habɔbɔa xe dɔlar akpe blaene le akpa eve me ɖe Yemen senyala si India ƒe Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha tia la ƒe gakɔnta me

claim: Sunil Gavaskar gblɔ be "Virat Kohli xɔ hehe ɖe Anushka [Sharma] ƒe bɔlwo ŋu le mɔxexeɖedɔa me ko".
evidence: Mɔnukpɔkpɔ mesu eya [Kohli] si be wòawɔ nuwɔna si hiã o. Enya be zi alesi yewɔa kamededee la, yeawɔ ŋgɔyiyi. Esi lockdown la dzɔ la, ɖeko wòwɔ hehexɔxɔ ɖe Anuskha ƒe bowling ŋu, míekpɔ video la, gake naneke mele dodo ge tso ema me o

claim: Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala kple nufiala Carl Sagan gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be, “Atike si woatsɔ ada nyaʋiʋli si me susu mele o nye nyaʋiʋli si nyo wu, ke menye nukpɔsusuwo tete ɖe anyi o.”
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nyayɔyɔa tso nuŋɔŋlɔ aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Dulɔlɔ̃ Nyateƒetɔwo Biaa Nyawo," si Sagan kple Ann Druyan, eƒe ahosi kple eƒe dɔwɔhati enuenu ŋlɔ ɖekae. Le nuwɔwɔ aduadu ƒe ɖoɖo si dzi Sagan kple Druyan to ŋlɔ nuŋɔŋlɔa ɖekae ƒe nɔnɔme ta la, manya wɔ be woade dzesi nyayɔyɔa ŋlɔla ɖeka pɛ hã o. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, internet zãlawo ma nya aɖe si wogblɔ tso alesi woawɔ avu kple nyaʋiʋli gbegblẽwo ŋu, eye wogblɔ be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala kple nufiala Carl Sagan, si ku le ƒe 1996 me ye gblɔe. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le September 2024 me la, X zãla aɖe da meme (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si me nyayɔyɔa le la da ɖe Sagan ƒe foto aɖe xa. Nuƒolanɔƒea tɔ, Elon Musk, ma nyatakakaa, si kpe ɖe eŋu be ame miliɔn 35 kpɔ nyatakakaa. 🎯 pic.twitter.com/VnnMfISk2z — Rothmus 🏴 (@Rothmus) September 26, 2024 Kpɔɖeŋu bubu siwo nye nyayɔyɔ si wogblɔ be Sagan gbɔe wòtso la dze le Instagram le ƒe 2020 me (wodzrae ɖo), egadze le X emegbe le ƒe 2024 me (wodzrae ɖo) kple le Reddit le ƒe 2025 me (wodzrae ɖo). Fli la nye nya vavã aɖe si wogblɔ tso nuŋɔŋlɔ aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Dulɔlɔ̃ Nyateƒetɔwo Biaa Nyawo," si dze zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1991 me le Parade magazine, si nye kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa ƒe magazine si woma ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo me le United States godoo me. Nuŋɔŋlɔa dze hã abe Ta 25 ene le Sagan ƒe agbalẽ si wòta le ƒe 1995 me, "Xexeme si me Gbɔgbɔ Vɔ̃wo Le: Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya abe Bosomikaɖi le Viviti me ene." Agbalẽ ma, abe Sagan ƒe agbalẽ akpa gãtɔ ene la, de dzi ƒo na nuxlẽlawo be woabu tame nyuie ahade vovototo dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple alakpa dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya dome. Parade magazine kple "The Demon-Haunted World" kafu Sagan kple Ann Druyan, Sagan srɔ̃ kple eƒe dɔwɔhati enuenu, siaa be woawoe ŋlɔ nuŋɔŋlɔa. Esi Snopes do asi ɖa na Druyan la, egblɔ to e-mail dzi be, le yeƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo nu la, yewoŋlɔ nya sia elabena wobia tso Sagan si be wòaxɔ ŋgɔ na Ðokuisinɔɣi ƒe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe wɔna aɖe. Druyan gblɔ be ame eveawo ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa nye nuwɔwɔ aduadu ale gbegbe be, mlɔeba la, manya wɔ be woade dzesi wo dometɔ si ŋlɔ nya si ŋu nya ku ɖo o. Esia wɔe be míebu nya si wogblɔ be Sagan ye nye nyayɔyɔa ŋlɔla ƒe akpa gãtɔ be enye nyateƒe. Druyan gblɔ be: Mía dometɔ ɖesiaɖe tsɔ nya vovovo siwo míedi be míagblɔ la na. Míema wo ɖe akpa vovovowo me. Meŋlɔa tɔnye ɖe mɔ̃ dzi alo ŋlɔa nu ɖe ​​edzi. Carl ye gblɔa etɔ. Emegbe egblɔa asrafodɔ si me míaƒe dɔ evea siaa le. Woaŋlɔe ɖe agbalẽ me. Mía dometɔ ɖesiaɖe xɔa eƒe ɖeka eye emegbe míedoa go dzroa asitɔtrɔ kple ŋgɔyiyi siwo wowɔ me. Ema ana woawɔ asrafodɔ yeye kple bubuawo vaseɖe esime mía dometɔ aɖeke maka ɖe amesi ŋlɔ nusi ŋlɔ dzi o. Míedoa dzidzɔ na ame kemɛa ɖe nyagbɔgblɔ aɖe koŋ ta eye ame kemɛa aka ɖe edzi enuenu be kafukafua nye kafukafula la tɔ. Míaƒe nuwɔwɔ aduaduwo se le wo ɖokui me be womewɔ naneke le wo ŋu o eye ema nye dziƒo.Esia nye nyateƒe le nusianu si wòŋlɔ me negbe eƒe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyagbalẽwo koe mele eme o. Druyan kple Sagan ŋlɔ agbalẽ geɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Comet," "Pale Blue Dot" kple "Shadows of Forgotten Ancestors." "Dulɔlɔ̃ Nyateƒetɔwo Biaa Nyawo" ʋli nya be ɖikeke, nuƒoƒo faa kple Gomenɔamesiwo ƒe Sedede bliboa le vevie na Amerikatɔwo ƒe demokrasi me léle ɖe asi. Le nuŋɔŋlɔa me, le Axa 429 le "Xexeme si Gbɔgbɔ Vɔ̃wo Le" me la, Sagan kple Druyan yɔ kpɔɖeŋu geɖe tsɔ ɖee fia be woɖe mɔ ɖe "ablɔɖe gãwo" ŋu le Amerika le seɖoƒe aɖewo siwo woɖo kpuie me. Nyayɔyɔ si ŋu nya ku ɖo la dze le nya siwo ƒo xlãe me le ete (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Tu nudzɔlawo ate ŋu azã Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã, Aƒea ƒe Nuƒolaa, alo FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo faa hena taɖodzinu ƒe dɔwɔwɔ; dukɔmevi siwo ƒe susu le dukɔmevinyenye ŋu siwo do dziku la ate ŋu atɔ dzo United States Dukplɔla ƒe nɔnɔmetata faa. Ne woɖu fewu le Yudatɔwo-Kristotɔwo-Islamtɔwo ƒe dzidzenuwo ŋu hã la, ne woɖu fewu le nusianu si mía dometɔ akpa gãtɔ dea asixɔxɔe ŋu gɔ̃ hã la, abosam subɔlawo (ne woli) kpɔ mɔ awɔ woƒe subɔsubɔha, nenye be womeda se aɖeke si le dukplɔsea nu dzi o. Ðewohĩ dziɖuɖua maɖe mɔ ɖe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me nyati si wogblɔ be enye nyati alo agbalẽ xɔŋkɔ aɖe si gblɔ be ameƒomevi aɖe "de ŋgɔ" wu bubu dzi o, aleke kee wògblẽ nu le eŋu o; nyaʋiʋli si me susu mele o ƒe atike nye nyaʋiʋli si nyo wu, ke menye nukpɔsusuwo tete ɖe anyi o. Ame ɖekaɖekawo alo ƒuƒoƒowo ate ŋu aʋli nya faa be Yudatɔwo alo Masonictɔwo ƒe nugbeɖoɖo aɖe le xexeame xɔm, alo be Dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua le ɖeka wɔm kple Abosam. Ame ɖekaɖekawo ate ŋu akafu ame gbogbo siwo ŋu womate ŋu aʋli nya le o abe Adolf Hitler, Josef Stalin, kple Mao Zedong ene ƒe agbenɔnɔ kple dunyahehe ne wodi. Gome le nukpɔsusu nyɔŋuwo gɔ̃ hã si be woase wo. Snopes ƒo nu tso nya bubu siwo wogblɔ tso Sagan ŋu ŋu va yi, eye nya bubu si wogblɔ be etso "The Demon-Haunted World" me hã le eme.

claim: Nukpɔkpɔ siwo tso Israel ɖee fia be Mossad HQ le dzo dam le Iran ƒe amedzidzedze nyitsɔ laa megbe.
evidence: Video aɖe, si ɖe xɔ gã aɖe si me dzo xɔ eye dzudzɔ yibɔ ɣiwo le ɖiɖim ɖe yame esime eteƒekpɔlawo le ekpɔm la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Ame geɖe siwo ma videoa tsɔe do ƒome kple asrafowo ƒe dzidziɖedzi si le edzi yim fifia le Titina Ɣedzeƒe, eye wogblɔ be eɖe nusiwo dona tso Iran ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã si le Israel dzi megbe fia.    Wole foto sia si didi sɛkɛnd 16 la kakam le Internet dzi nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋutɔ be woatsɔ aɖe Mossad ƒe Dɔwɔƒegã si le dzo dam le Iran ƒe amedzidzedzea megbe la afia.  Screengrab from X post by @MansoorAdayfi Woateŋu akpɔ nya siawo tɔgbe le afisia, afisia, afisia kple afisia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be yewoɖe Israel-srafo si le kuku ɖem na Iran be wòakpɔ nublanui na ye nye nusi me goglo Iran ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata Dzɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ be yewodze Mossad, si nye Israel ƒe nyatakakaxɔƒe, ƒe dɔwɔƒegã dzi dzidzedzetɔe le Tel Aviv, eye wogblɔ kpee be dzo le bibim. Wogblɔ be le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, Israel ɖe dɔmedzoedonameawo nu tsɛe esi wòhe susu yi nusiwo gblẽ le bɔswo ƒe ʋutɔɖoƒe aɖe si te ɖe afima ŋu dzi.  Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro/Kpɔɖeŋu Míekpɔ nya vevi siwo le viral clip la le Google Lens si kplɔ mí yi X nyatakaka aɖe si @HITNEWSWORLD ŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ le June 11, 2025. Esi wòtsɔ clip ma ke ɖe asi la, egblɔ be, "Dzo gã aɖe bi le Chongqing, China, si elektrik-ʋu si wotsɔ ʋua ʋu ƒe batri si le wóm gbɔe. Dzobibi kaka kabakaba ɖe keke siwo te ɖe afima ŋu le ʋutɔɖoƒea."  Eɖe dzesi be, nya sia do ŋgɔ na Israel kple Iran ƒe dzre si li fifia si dze egɔme le June 13, 2025. Screengrab from X post by @HITNEWSWORLD Esi míetsɔ kpeɖodzi aɖe di nya vevi siwo nye "Chongqing," "China," "ʋutɔɖoƒe" kple "dzo" le Google dzi si na míeyi Facebook nyatakaka aɖe si Reuters ŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ le June 12, 2025. It featuredage similar to the viral clip, eye wògblɔ be, "Dzo gã aɖe bi eye dzudzɔ yibɔ ɣi aɖe do tso dzokekewo ƒe ʋutɔɖoƒe aɖe le China ƒe Chongqing."  Screengrab from Facebook post by Reuters Ne míetsɔ nya vevi siwo le video si kaka ɖe amewo me la sɔ kple nukpɔkpɔ siwo woɖe fia le Facebook nyatakaka si Reuters ŋlɔ me la, míate ŋu aƒo nya ta be wo ame evea siaa ɖe nudzɔdzɔ ɖeka fia.  (L-R) Screengrabs from viral clip and screengrabs from Facebook post by Reuters Also Read: 2022 Video Of Anti-Hijab Protests In Iran Viral As Stir Against Govt Amid Conflict With Israel Nyatakaka aɖe si Shanghai Eye ŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ le June 12, 2025 dzi, hã ɖe nukpɔkpɔ mawo tɔgbe fia tsɔ ɖe "dzo gã aɖe si bi le dzokeke ƒe ʋutɔɖoƒe aɖe le China ƒe Chongqing" fia.  "Dukɔa ka nya ta zi gbãtɔ le dzoa ŋu le ŋdɔ ga 1:12 me le nutoa me ƒe ɣeyiɣi dzi eye xɔnamehawo tsie le miniti 21 megbe. Nutoa me dzotsidɔwɔƒewo gblɔ be womegblɔ ame aɖeke si ku le nusi gbɔ dzoa tso si ŋu wole numekuku wɔm le o," CGTN Europe gblɔ.  Nyitsɔ laa la, Newschecker ɖe video gbogbo aɖewo siwo AI wɔ siwo wonɔ mam hegblɔ be woɖe amedzidzedze ŋutɔŋutɔ ɖe Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã si le Tel Aviv fia la ɖa. Woate ŋu akpɔ nu ma ke le afisia. South Korea kpovitɔwo gblɔ be womegblɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso Chinatɔwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔla aɖe si le dɔ wɔm le Seoul ŋu o



							Wotae le November 28, 2025 le 06:25




							
							2 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Hailey J. O., .
											
AFP Anyiehe Korea





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


Esi tsitretsitsi ɖe China ŋu ƒe seselelãmewo nu sẽ ɖe edzi le South Korea la, woma video aɖe ɖe nyatakaka siwo wogblɔ alakpatɔe be eɖe Chinatɔwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔla aɖe fia wònɔ mɔ fiam ʋuwo kple afɔzɔlawo le Seoul. Gake amesi wogblɔ be enye kpovitɔa ƒe videowo kaka le ŋkeke siwo kplɔ Halloween ɖuɖu ɖo me le nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ tsɔ yɔe be cosplayer me. South Korea kpovitɔwo gblɔ na AFP be yewomexɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso China kpovitɔ aɖeke si le dɔ wɔm le nutoa me ŋu o, eye ŋutsua ƒe awu ŋuti nyatakakawo ɖee fia be menye nyateƒee o.



"Chinatɔwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔla le ʋuwo ƒe zɔzɔ dzi kpɔm le Hongdae," Koreagbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotsɔ ɖo Facebook ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe si woma le November 24, 2025 dzi, si ƒo nu tso modzakaɖenutome aɖe si le Seoul ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe si wonya ɖe eƒe ahadzraƒewo, klabowo kple zãmodzakaɖeƒewo ta ŋu.Edze abe sɛkɛnd 12 ƒe video klipi si wokpɔ zi akpe ewo sɔŋ la ɖee fia be kpovitɔ aɖe le mɔ fiam ʋuwo ƒe zɔzɔ kple... afɔzɔlawo le mɔdodo si dzi amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo dzi.Aka dzĩ kple blɔ si wotsɔ bla eƒe alɔnu si le etame la ɖe China ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dzesi kple Chinatɔwo ƒe nyagbe siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye "Dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ si le South Korea" (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ƒe ŋkɔ fia.Sɔhɛwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si nye "Ablɔɖe ƒe Aʋala", si le megbe na dukplɔla Yoon Suk Yeol si woɖe le zi dzi eye wòdoa nya siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o siwo ku ɖe ametafatafa le tiatiawɔblɔɖe ŋu ɖe ŋgɔ la fia le videoa tame kpe ɖe... Trump-esque nyagbɔgblɔ "Na Korea Gã Agate" (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso Facebook nyatakaka si wolé le November 26, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Woma video mawo tɔgbe le Instagram, eye videoa ƒe screenshots hã kaka ɖe afima kpakple Nate Pann hã."Chinese cops, get lost and go back to your country!" xlẽ nya aɖe le nyatakakaawo dometɔ ɖeka ŋu.Ame bubu bia be: "Nukatae Koreatɔwo megblɔ nya aɖeke gɔ̃ hã le nane si le abe esia ene kpɔkpɔ vɔ megbe o?"Nyatakakaawo do esime tsitretsitsi ɖe Chinatɔwo ŋu ƒe seselelãmewo nu sẽ ɖe edzi le South Korea, kple ablɔdzi wɔwɔfia, asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu ƒe aʋawɔnyawo kple nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi siwo me vovototo gã aɖe le si na Beijing ƒe dudɔnunɔla ƒe dɔwɔƒea xlɔ̃ nu eƒe dukɔmeviwo be "woanɔ ŋudzɔ" esime wole dukɔa srãm kpɔ (archived link). Gake Seoul Dugã me Kpovitɔwo kple Mapo Nutome Kpovitɔwo -- siwo ƒe dɔe nye be woakpɔ kpovitɔwo dzi le Hongdae nutoa me -- gblɔ na AFP le November 26 lia dzi be yewomexɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso Chinatɔwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔla aɖe si le dɔ wɔm le nutoa me ŋu o.'Halloween cosplayer'A reverse image search on Google using keyframes from the falsely shared video caused to similar clips circulating on China video-sharing platforms Douyin and Bilibili (archived here kple afisia).Le nya siawo ƒe nya nu la, video klipiawo ɖe "Halloween cosplayer" aɖe fia le South Korea.Nya veviwo didi le YouTube dzi kpɔ video didi aɖe si me wogblɔ be Chinatɔwo ƒe dutoƒodedienɔnɔdzikpɔla le le video didi aɖe si me woŋlɔ Halloween le Hongdae le October 31 ƒe zã me (archived link).Amesi le videoa ɖem de dzesii be ŋutsua nɔ cosplaying wɔm eye wògblɔ be ewɔ mo yaa alesi wòtsɔ eɖokui na nuwɔna la, fia mɔ afɔzɔlawo abe nenye be asrafomegã ŋutɔŋutɔe wònye. Le videoa me la, amewo yɔ ablɔwo dzi fũ le co vovovowo me

claim: Hadzila kple hadziŋlɔla Josh Groban dze ŋgɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le esi wòbia tso haƒoha aɖe si be woaƒo ha xɔŋkɔ si nye "You Raise Me Up" ta.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe internet dzi le November 2025 me gblɔ be hadzila kple hadziŋlɔla Josh Groban dze ŋgɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le esi wòbia tso haƒoha aɖe si be woaƒo ha xɔŋkɔ si nye "You Raise Me Up" ta. Groban xɔ ŋkɔ le hadzidzia ƒe akpa dzi le ƒe 2003. Ireland-Norwaytɔwo ƒe haƒoha si nye Secret Garden ye ŋlɔ "You Raise Me Up" gbã eye woƒoe le ƒe 2001. Abe nyaʋiʋlia ƒe kpɔɖeŋu ene la, le Nov. 1 dzi la, zãla aɖe si le Facebook ƒe axa Graceful Melodies dzi kpɔm la da nɔnɔmetata aɖe si ɖe Groban ƒe foto fia le Trump ƒe foto aɖe xa la da ɖe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi la dze egɔme be, "Ɣeyiɣi si Donald Tr.υ.mp fia asi haƒoha la eye wògblɔ be, 'Play You Raise Me Up,' — etsi megbe akpa xoxo. Le afi aɖe la, Josh Groban nɔ ekpɔm le agbe, eye fifia ya, mezi ɖoɖoe o." Nyatakakaa ɖe kadodo aɖe si kplɔa ame yia WordPress blog nyati si me boblododowo yɔ fũu si woda ɖe sportnewss.livextop.com nyatakakadzraɖoƒea la fia. (Graceful Melodies/Facebook) Snopes xlẽlawo hã di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena ŋuɖoɖowo tso nya sia ŋu. Kpuie ko la, nya si Groban dze ŋgɔ Trump — alo be Trump bia le TV dzi be haƒoha aɖe naƒo "You Raise Me Up" — la nye alakpa. Facebook zãla siwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ le U.S. godo lae to nya sia vɛ keŋkeŋ, eye dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ nunya wɔwɔ (AI) zazã hã le eme. Graceful Melodies Facebook axa ƒe "page transparency" tab ɖee fia be woƒe dɔdzikpɔla eve ya teti nɔ Vietnam. Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo didiwo mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si gblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe aɖeke tso Groban kple Trump ŋu o. Anye ne asitsaƒe xɔŋkɔwo ka nya ta le nya sia ŋu le afisiafi, nenye be enye nyateƒe. Snopes do ka kple Groban teƒenɔla aɖe be yeabia nya tso alakpanya sia ŋu eye yeawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Boblododo siwo dze kple WordPress blog nyatia —siwo me nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo ɖi ŋutinya siwo wowɔ kple AI dɔwɔnuwo le — ɖee fia be viɖekpɔkpɔ ƒe susu si dze ƒã. Nyatia wu enu kple nyagbɔgblɔ geɖe siwo me wobu nu yi ŋgɔe, siwo wowɔ le drama me le mɔ ma ke nu si AI dɔwɔnuwo ƒoa nya ta le ŋutinya siwo woto vɛ mawo tɔgbe nu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyagbe mamlɛawo xlẽ ale: Menye kɔnsɛte wònye o. Menye tsitretsiɖeŋunyae wònye o. Enye ŋkuɖodzinya aɖe. Be le ahom sesẽtɔ kekeake gɔ̃ hã me la, nyateƒe si me ɖoɖoezizi le la gakpɔtɔ le ha dzim. Eye le zã ma me, le Washington ƒe dziŋgɔli si fa miamiamia te la, menye ɖeko Josh Groban do gbe ɖe dzi ko o —ekɔ ʋuƒoa ɖe dzi. Facebook zãla bubuwo ma ŋutinya ma ke ƒe tɔtrɔwo tso Trump ƒe dzedze le TV dzi eye wòbia tso haƒoha aɖe si be woaƒo ha aɖe koŋ, le kpɔɖeŋu me, nya aɖe si woŋlɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ƒo nu tso dukɔa ƒe ɣletivi Dolly Parton kple eƒe hadzidzi si xɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ "Jolene" ŋu. Le ƒe 2018 me la, Big Issue —nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe si le U.K. si ƒe axa si nye About Us (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be yeƒe dɔwɔlawo "le dɔ wɔm be yewoaɖe ahedada ɖa le U.K." — ta (nudzraɖoƒe) "lɛta si woŋlɔ na nye ɖekakpui" si Groban ŋlɔ. Groban wu lɛtaa nu kple Trump yɔyɔ be: Ne mate ŋu atrɔ ayi megbemegbe yi nye ƒe 16 vi la, maxlɔ̃ nu ŋutsu, nyɔnu kple ɖevi ɖesiaɖe le ƒe 1998 me tso Donald Trump ŋu. Makpɔ egbɔ be Donald Trump ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋuti dzadzraɖo ƒe dɔwɔnu le amesiame si. Matsɔ akplo ɖe asi ne mexɔ ƒe 16, anɔ ɖokuinye dzram ɖo ɖe ƒe 2017 ŋu, be mayi ave me ƒe ʋɛ aɖewo ko. Le nya ma tɔgbe si wogblɔ tso Parton ŋu gome la, Snopes ta nyati aɖe va yi si gblɔ nya 15 siwo ŋu míeƒo nu tsoe tso eŋu le ƒeawo me.

claim: Yameʋu ƒe amegã A. P. Singh ƒo nu tso nuxlɔ̃ame nana titinadziɖuɖua tso Tejas yameʋua ŋu eye wògblɔ be woaɖo IAF yameʋukulawo ɖe Pakistan hena hehexɔxɔ.
evidence: Video si me goglo aɖe si me Yame ƒe Aʋafiagã A. P. Singh le si me wòdze abe egblɔ be yexlɔ̃ nu India dziɖuɖua tso Tejas aʋawɔyameʋua matsɔmatsɔ ade India Yamesrafowo (IAF) me ŋu le kakam abe nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ene.  Le videoa me la, edze abe Singh hã tsɔ Tejas yameʋu, si nye Indiatɔwo ƒe Aʋawɔyameʋu si Me Aʋawɔwɔ Le (LCA) si nye Indiatɔwo tɔ, sɔ kple Indiatɔwo ƒe numeɖenu ‘samosa’ le eƒe nɔnɔme ta. BOOM kpɔe be wozã AI mɔ̃ɖaŋununya tsɔ trɔ asi le videoa ŋu.  Videoa kple Singh ƒe alakpanya aɖe si me wòkafu Pakistan Yamesrafowo (PAF) le la do le esi Tejas aʋawɔyameʋu aɖe ge dze Dubai Yameʋuɖoɖo ƒe ɖeɖefia me le November 21, 2025. Aʋaladzikpɔla Namansh Syal ku le yameʋua ƒe gbagbã me.  Nya 1: Video ɖe IAF ƒe amegã fia wòtsɔ Tejas ƒe nɔnɔme sɔ kple 'samosa' Wole videoa mam kple Urdugbe me nya aɖe si gɔme woɖe be, "India Yameʋudzikpɔla ŋutɔ lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be Tejas nye samosa".  Zi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ nyatakakaa eye nàzi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ nudzraɖoƒe.  Nya 2: Singh gblɔ be woaɖo IAF yameʋukulawo ɖe Pakistan hena hehexɔxɔ elabena PAF 'le ŋgɔ ŋutɔ' Zãla aɖe si le X ma Singh ƒe foto eye wòŋlɔ bena, "Yameʋu ƒe Tatɔ AMAR PREET SINGH le Tejas ƒe gbagbã ŋu: "Míebu yameʋu siwo sɔ gbɔ le ɣeyiɣi siwo va yi nyitsɔ laa me. Pakistan Yamesrafowo le ŋgɔ na mí ŋutɔ eye maɖe fu nam be magblɔ be, ne ƒomedodo si le Pakistan kple India dome nyo ɖe edzi ko la, míaɖo míaƒe yameʋukulawo ɖe Pakistan hena hehexɔxɔ o".  Zi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ nyatakakaa eye nàzi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ nudzraɖoƒe.  Nusi Míekpɔ: Nya Siwo Katã Le IAF ƒe Tatɔ Ŋu Nye Aʋatso 1. Video Nye Deepfake: Míewɔ nɔnɔmetata didi le megbe le keyframe siwo tso Singh ƒe nuƒoa me dometɔ ɖeka dzi. Didi la kplɔ mí yi Hindustan Times ƒe nyati aɖe si tso October 3, 2025 dzi afisi wogblɔ be nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Press Trust of India ye na nɔnɔmetata la le.  Nyatia gblɔ be Singh nɔ nu ƒom na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe ɣemaɣi. Esi míetsɔe abe dzesi ene la, míedi nya vevi siwo sɔ le YouTube dzi eye míekpɔ IAF ƒe amegã ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe si wowɔ le October 3, 2025 dzi le ANI ƒe YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo.  Nukpɔkpɔ siwo le television dzi wɔnawo me la sɔ kple nukpɔkpɔ siwo wokpɔ le video si kaka ɖe amewo me. Gake míekpɔ ɣeyiɣi aɖeke si me woate ŋu ase Singh wòanɔ nu xlɔ̃m India dziɖuɖua tso Tejas ŋu alo aɖo aɖaŋu ɖe eŋu be wòagawɔe o. Takpekpea hã do ŋgɔ na Tejas ƒe gbagbã.  Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, míedo videoa kpɔ le AI video detector tool Hive Moderation dzi, eye míeƒo eta kple kakaɖedzi 96.5 le alafa me be videoa me nyawo le AI generated alo deepfake me.      2. Nya Siwo Wogblɔ Le Dɔlékuiwo Ŋu Nye Aʋatso: . Dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka totrowo ɖeɖeɖa ƒe dɔwɔƒe si nye PIB Fact Check gbe nya sia eye wòɖo kpe edzi be IAF ƒe amegã megblɔ nya aɖeke abe alesi wogblɔe le nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo me ene o.

claim: Kpovitɔwo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖena kpɔtɔna esime Dukɔa ƒe Dunyaheha ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Judith Collins’ nye kpovitɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖumegã.
evidence: NZ Kpovitɔwo ƒe akɔntabubuwo ɖee fia be emegbe kpovitɔwo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi va ɖo 8,643 le June 2009 me eye 8,707 le June 2010 me, hafi wòɖiɖi va ɖo 8,638 le June 2011. Aƒenɔ Collins va zu kpovitɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖumegã zi gbãtɔ le November 2008. Aƒenɔ Collins ƒe dɔwo trɔ le December 2011 me.

claim: Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Bengal Akpɔkplɔ le zɔzɔm le Mankar ave si le East Burdwan me
evidence: Video aɖe si gblɔ be yeɖe Royal Bengal Tiger fia wòle zɔzɔm le Mankar ave si le East Burdwan me la le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Wole video klipi la mam abe nusi wokpɔ nyitsɔ laa tso West Bengal ene. Wokpɔe be videoa xɔ ƒe geɖe eye Andhra Pradesh ye wolée gbã.  Facebook zãla aɖe tsɔ nya si kaka ɖe amewo me la da ɖe edzi kple nuŋɔŋlɔ si gbɔna: মানকর জংগালে বা গ্লি মেধা ENGLISH: Wokpɔ amegãxi le Mankar ave me Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa le afisia.  NM VERIFIED NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Wozã Google Lens tsɔ di screenshot aɖe tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me la me. Didi la na wokpɔ video klipi ma ke si woda ɖe Facebook ƒe axa Kurnool Diaries dzi le November 8, 2020. Esia ɖo kpe edzi be videoawo xɔ ƒe atɔ̃ ya teti eye wometso Mankar ave me o.  Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe ƒe 2020 ƒe nyatakakaa me gblɔ be wokpɔ amegãxi sia le mɔ si yi Ahobilam le Alagadda mandal, si le Kurnool nuto me, Andhra Pradesh. Gbemagbe ke la, Facebook-dzesi bubu, Nandyal Times, ma videoa kple numeɖeɖe ma tɔgbe, si ɖo kpe teƒe si Andhra Pradesh le dzi.  Nya veviwo didi na wokpɔ nyatakaka aɖe si wota ɖe ETV News Telugu dzi le November 7, 2020. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be vɔvɔ̃ ɖo dua me tɔwo esi wolé amegãxi sia le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi wònɔ zɔzɔm le Nallamala ave nuto si te ɖe Ahobilam ŋu le Kurnool nutoa me megbe.  Woka nya ta tso nudzɔdzɔ ma ke ŋu le video me nyatakaka aɖe si Maha News ŋlɔ le November 8, 2020 dzi, eye wògade dzesi teƒea be enye Kurnool nutome.    Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kakaɖedzitɔe be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖe Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Bengal Akpɔkplɔ aɖe si le zɔzɔm le Mankar ave si le East Burdwan me fia la nye alakpa. claim: Le August 2025 me la, eŋutinunyalawo xlɔ̃ nu be "Frankenstein avugbɔ̃e" siwo ŋu dɔlélea le siwo ƒe mo ƒe asikewo alo dzowo le siwo wokpɔ le Fort Collins, Colorado, "dze" United States dzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Dɔlékui ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe li si ŋu woke ɖo le U.S. ƒe alafa ɖeka kloe enye sia si woyɔna be Shope papilloma dɔlékui si xɔa avugbɔ̃e gbemelãwo eye wònana woƒe ŋutigbalẽ tsina abe asike alo dzo ene. To vovo na nyatakaka siwo doa vɔvɔ̃ na amewo le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo la, dɔlékuia ƒe kaka menye nu yeye o eye avugbɔ̃e siwo ŋu dɔlélea le la mele "dzi dzem" le United States o. Dɔlékuia meɖoa afɔku aɖeke na lã ƒomevi bubuwo, siwo dome amegbetɔwo hã le o. Le August 2025 me la, amewo te nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si ɖi abe sinima dziŋɔ aɖe si trɔ zu nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ene la ɖɔɖɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. "Eŋutinunyalawo Xlɔ̃ nu tso 'Frankenstein' Akpɔkplɔ Siwo Ŋu Dɔlékui Le Siwo ƒe Asikewo Le Dzedzem le U.S. "NU VEVIWO... Avugbɔ̃ewo kpɔ United States ƒe akpa aɖewo siwo dze wo dzi kple asike wɔnuku siwo do tso woƒe ta me le dɔlékui ta... Colorado dziɖuɖumegãwo le nu xlɔ̃m be: 'MÈGAKA asi eŋu o,'" X post bubu (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si wokpɔ zi miliɔn 8 kloe gblɔ. Nya bubu si woŋlɔ ɖe X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si wokpɔ zi gbɔ zi miliɔn 24 kple edzivɔ la ƒo nu tso "tsitsi siwo le abe tentacle ene" ŋu le avugbɔ̃ewo ŋu le Colorado. Tsikpe gã si nɔ nya ƒaƒãwo kakam la ƒe nugbɔ koe nya mawo nye. Le X godo la, amewo ƒe nu lé dzi na Instagram nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe avugbɔ̃e "siwo dze wo dzi" ŋu zi gbɔ zi 100,000 kloe (wodzra wo ɖo), zi gbɔ zi 45,000 (wodzra wo ɖo) kple zi 25,000 kple edzivɔ (wodzra wo ɖo). Wowɔ nu ɖe ​​Facebook nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ku ɖe nuxlɔ̃ame si wogblɔ be eŋutinunyalawo ŋu la ŋu zi gbɔ zi 10,000 kple edzivɔ. (X zãla @DailyLoud) Colorado Parks & Wildlife ka nya ta be dɔlékui ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe li si xɔa avugbɔ̃ewo kple dɔléle aɖe si ƒe dzesiwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye ameyibɔwo ƒe tsitsi le woƒe ŋutigbalẽ dzi (zi geɖe la, le ta dzi) si le abe asike alo dzo ene. Dɔlékuia tsɔ ŋkɔ vovovo ʋɛ aɖewo, abe Shope papilloma dɔlékui (SPV) kple cottontail cutaneous papilloma dɔlékui ene, le PetMD ƒe nya nu. Gake alesi nyatakakaawo doa vɔvɔ̃ na ame la mesɔ kura o. Dɔlékuia le U.S. ƒe bla nanewoe nye sia eye womate ŋu akakae na amegbetɔwo o. Zi geɖe la, tsitsiawo mekpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe avugbɔ̃e gbemelãwo dzi vevie o negbe ɖe woxe mɔ na wo be woagaɖu nu ahano nu o. Smithsonian gblɔ be esia ate ŋu adzɔ ne tsitsi siwo lolo ale gbegbe va do le avugbɔ̃e ƒe nu gbɔ. Gake tsitsiawo nu yina ne avugbɔ̃e si ŋu dɔlélea le ɖu dɔlékuia dzi vɔ. Dɔlélea nu sẽna ɖe avugbɔ̃e siwo wodzina le aƒeme dzi wu avugbɔ̃e gbemelãwo. Esia le alea elabena ScienceDirect gblɔ be tsitsiawo ate ŋu azu dɔdzẽ vɔ̃ɖi, si nye kansadɔlékui, si dzɔna zi gbɔ zi etɔ̃ le avugbɔ̃e siwo wokplɔ le aƒeme me wu avugbɔ̃e gbemelãwo. PetMD gblɔ be lãmesẽdɔwɔla ate ŋu awɔ dɔ na tsitsi siwo dɔlékuia hena vɛ la ɖa hafi woazu dɔléle vɔ̃ɖi. Wokpɔa SPV zi geɖe le avugbɔ̃e siwo ƒe asike nye gbemelãwo me, gake ate ŋu axɔ avugbɔ̃e ƒomevi bubuwo, siwo dome avugbɔ̃e siwo nye aƒemelãwo hã le. Dɔlékuia nye avugbɔ̃ewo koŋ eye mehea dɔléle vɛ na lã ƒomevi bubuwo o. Zi geɖe la, nudzodzoe siwo ɖua ame abe ʋetsuviwo kple nudzodzoewo ene ye kakanɛ. Dɔlélea ƒe kaka bɔ wu le dzomeŋɔli kple adame, esime nudzodzoe siwo tsɔa dɔlélea ƒe xexlẽme sɔ gbɔ wu. Richard Shope ye ƒo nu tso dɔlékuia ŋu zi gbãtɔ le avugbɔ̃e siwo tso Kansas kple Iowa ŋu, eye aleae wòxɔ ŋkɔ ɖeka le ƒe 1933 me, alesi numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le ƒe 2015 me si wota ɖe magazine si me hatiwo to me le si nye PLoS One me gblɔ. Le numekukua nu la, wonya be wokpɔa dɔlékuia "ko kloe" le U.S. Midwest. U.S. Agbledenyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe (USDA) ƒe nyatakaka aɖe tso ƒe 2013 me te gbe ɖe dzogbe kotoku me avugbɔ̃e aɖe si ŋu dɔlékuia le le Larimer County, Colorado, le August 2011. Fort Collins, afisi wokpɔ avugbɔ̃e siwo wogblɔ be "wodzea wo dzi" le lae nye du gãtɔ kekeake le Larimer County. Dɔlékui ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe li si xɔa avugbɔ̃ewo eye wònana wotsina abe asike alo dzo ene le woƒe mo. Avugbɔ̃ewo koe dɔlélea le, eyata mehiã be woaxlɔ̃ nu wo o negbe avugbɔ̃ewo tɔ ko, amesiwo wòle be woana woƒe avugbɔ̃ewo nanɔ eme eye woaɖe wo ɖa tso nudzodzoe siwo ɖua wo gbɔ le ɣeyiɣi kple afisi dɔlékuia bɔ ɖo wu gbɔ. Menye "amedzidzedze" le United States hãe wònye o; wokpɔe zi gbãtɔ le U.S. eye wògabɔ wu le U.S. Le nya si wogblɔ ƒe akpa si nye "Frankenstein" gome la? Smithsonian gblɔ be ate ŋu anye be avugbɔ̃e siwo ŋu dɔlélea le la kpɔkpɔ na wogblɔ Jackalope si ƒe asike le abe avugbɔ̃e si ƒe asike le ene, si wogblɔ be "wogayɔna zi geɖe be avugbɔ̃e si nye 'Frankenstein'."

claim: Yemen dziɖuɖumegãwo te fli ɖe Kerala dɔnɔdzikpɔla Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso me.
evidence: Video aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Kuɖagbe, si me nyanyuigblɔla kple Global Peace Initiative ɖola Ðɔkta K. A. Paul le, afisi woate ŋu ase eƒe nya le be Yemen dziɖuɖumegãwo te fli ɖe Kerala dɔnɔdzikpɔla Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso me la le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.  "Medi be mada akpe na kplɔla siwo katã kpɔ gome le esia wɔwɔ me be wòakpɔ dzidzedze gã aɖe. Wote fli ɖe Nimisha Priya ƒe ku me. Le Mawu ƒe amenuveve me la, woaɖe asi le eŋu eye woakplɔe ayi India. Medi be mada akpe na Prime Minister Modi ji be edzra ɖo be yeaɖo miaƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ɖa ... eye yeaxɔ Nimisha le dɔnyala me, dedie," wose Dr Paul gblɔ le videoa me.  Video sia si le Eŋlisigbe me la, Ðɔkta Paul ye da ɖe eƒe X asiléƒe.  Gake ele vevie be míade dzesii be le videoa ƒe akpa aɖeke metsɔ Yemen ƒe senyawo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke si dziɖuɖua ɖo si ɖo kpe kufiatsotsoa ƒe tetre dzi o.  Woate ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa ƒe akpa si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Nimisha Priya, si nye Kollengode, Palakkad vidzidzi, le gaxɔ me tso ƒe 2017 me le Yemen dukɔmevi Talal Abdul Mahdi wuwu ta. Nyatakakawo nɔ anyi be woawu Nimisha Priya le July 16. Gake woɖe gbe be woahe amewuwua ɖe megbe.  Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea gbe nyabiase siwo katã wotsɔ bia be woaɖe asi le Nimishapriya ƒe kufiatsotso ŋu la katã. Eyata tiatia ɖeka kolia si susɔe nye be woakpɔ gbɔdzɔe to ʋuga nana Yemen dukɔmevi si wowu la ƒe ƒomea me.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe Mamata Banerjee Bia tso Bengalitɔwo si be ‘Woanɔ Dahe’? 2024 Video Viral With Misleading Claim Fact Check/Verification Be míanya nyateƒe si le megbe na nya si kaka la, míelé ŋku ɖe Fattah Abdul Mahdi, si nye Nimisha Priya ƒe fukpela Talal nɔviŋutsu, kple Samuel Jerome, amesi le aʋa wɔm be woaɖe asi le Nimisha Priya ŋu le Yemen ƒe Facebook nyatakakawo me.  Le Facebook nyatakaka aɖe si Fattah Abdul Mahdi ŋlɔ le July 23, 2025 dzi me la, egbe nya si wogblɔ be woɖe asi le Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso ŋu. Womaɖe asi le eŋu o eye woawɔ ewuwu kpuie, nyatakakaa gblɔ kpee.  Samuel Jerome, si nye Indiatɔ hadomekpekpeɖeŋudɔwɔla si le Yemen, si nye Nimisha Priya Dukɔwo Dome Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe kadododzikpɔla vevitɔ ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia le eƒe nyaa taʋiʋli me hã gbe nya sia si kaka ɖe amewo me.  Esi Jerome nɔ Fattah ƒe Facebook Post ƒe screenshot mam la, eŋlɔ bena, "Eɖe dzi le ame ƒo ŋutɔ be India nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe akpa aɖewo yi edzi le vlo dom Nɔviŋutsu Talal ƒe ʋu kɔkɔe si wokɔ ɖi, kpakple bubu si le eƒe ƒome si le nu xam la ŋu hele bubu dem eŋu."  "Tso ƒe 2020 me la, megblɔna ɣesiaɣi be nya sia menye nya si woatsɔ awɔ dɔ ɖe ame dzi alo azãe na dutoƒonuɖuɖu o. Le nye nya siwo megblɔ va yi me la, mexlɔ̃ nu kɔte be amesiwo kakaa alakpa alo ameflunya ŋutinyawo meɖea bubu aɖeke ɖe agbe si bu — Nɔviŋutsu Talal tɔ — alo Nɔviŋutsu Abdul Fattah, eƒe ƒomea, alo Aƒenɔ Nimisha ƒe agbe gɔ̃ hã ŋu o." Priya," nyatakakaa gblɔ kpee.  "Meɖe kuku na India nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo vevie be: Taflatse mide bubu si sɔ ŋu na ʋu si wokɔ ɖi madzemadzee. Mide bubu Nɔviŋutsu Abdul Fattah ƒe ƒomea ƒe vevesese kple bubu ŋu. Mina wo adzame, ɣeyiɣi, kple teƒe si wohiã vevie be woada gbe le wo ŋu," nyatakakaa gblɔ yi ŋgɔe.  Esi míewɔ nya veviwo didi la, míekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha (MEA) gbɔ si ɖo kpe edzi be woɖe asi le Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso ŋu alo te fli ɖe eme o.    Le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ le July 17, 2025 dzi me la, MEA ƒe Nyanuɖela Randhir Jaiswal gblɔ be India Dziɖuɖua le dɔnɔdzikpɔla si tso Kerala si xaxa le Yemen ƒe nya si me nyawo sesẽ ŋutɔ la yome tim nyuie, eye wòle kpekpeɖeŋu ɖesiaɖe si woate ŋui nam le ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃a ƒe ɣeyiɣi ɖesiaɖe me, si ɖee fia be nyametsotso mamlɛtɔ si woawɔ le Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu gakpɔtɔ le lalam.  Nyataƒoƒo Eyata míekpɔe be nya siwo woŋlɔna ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo gblɔna be woɖe Nimisha Priya ƒe kufiatsotso dzi kpɔtɔ, nye alakpa. Dzɔtsoƒewo Facebook Nyatakaka si Abdul Fattah Mahdi ŋlɔ le July 23,2025 Facebook Nyatakaka si Baskaran Samuel Jerome ŋlɔ le July 24,2025 X Nya si PTI ŋlɔ le July 17,2025 dzi

claim: West Bengal kpovitɔwo le kpe dam esi womete ŋu tɔ te agbatsɔʋu aɖe si me ke kple kpewo le o.
evidence: Video aɖe si me kpovitɔwo le kpe dam agbatsɔʋu siwo le ʋuʋum la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo nyitsɔ laa. Le videoa me la, wokpɔe wole kpe dam ɖe agbatsɔʋu siwo yi edzi le ŋgɔ yim evɔ wometɔ o la ƒe xɔwo me. Wole videoa mam kple nya siwo wogblɔ be eɖe Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal kpovitɔwo le kpe dam le esi womete ŋu tɔ te agbatsɔʋu si me ke kple kpewo le o ta.  Facebook zãla aɖe ŋlɔ nya si kaka ɖe amewo me kple nya si gbɔna la: # খাদ্যবঙ -পুলিশলিলি পাথৰেৰ টকাক আটতে বা ৰুপে পাথর ৰ থিতাছে... #WestBengal -kpovitɔwo mete ŋu tɔ te sandstone agbatsɔʋuwo le kpewo yome tim o ... Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa le afisia.  FACT CHECK NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Esi NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa lé ŋku ɖe video ƒe safui geɖewo ŋu to Reverse Image Search dzi la, wode dzesi nyatakaka aɖe si me video ma ke le le X asiléƒe, si woŋlɔ le September 13, 2025. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be videoa ɖe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si tso Sonbhadra nuto me, Uttar Pradesh, fia.  Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, nyatakaka aɖe si The Free Press Journal ta, si woŋlɔ le September 14, 2025 dzi la, tsɔ nudzɔdzɔa ŋuti nyatakakawo kpe ɖe video si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu ƒe screenshot ŋu. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be le September 12 ƒe zã me la, kpovitɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe, siwo dome Yogesh Shukla — si nye ŋkuléla tso tomenukuƒea hã nɔ, dze agbagba be yewoatɔ te agbatsɔʋu siwo wosusu be wotsɔ tomenu siwo mele se nu o tso Lodhi tomenukuƒea le Robertsganj kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe liƒowo te le Sonbhadra. Esi agbatsɔʋukulawo di be yewoasi la, kpovitɔ siwo nɔ afima la to kpewo dada ɖe ʋuawo dzi.  Le September 13 lia dzi la, Sonbhadra Kpovitɔwo ƒe X handle si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe ɖe go tsɔ ɖo kpe nudzɔdzɔa dzi. Abe alesi wogblɔe le nyatakakaa me ene la, le 11:40 p.m. le September 12 lia dzi la, tomenukulawo ƒe amegã Yogesh Shukla nɔ agbatsɔʋuawo me dzrom le Lodhi mɔxeƒea. Eye le esi teƒe be ʋukulawo nawɔ ɖe edzi la, wogblɔ be wodze agbagba be yewoaƒu du adze edzi le duƒuƒu sesẽ me "kple susu be yewoawui". Emegbe kpovitɔwo dze agbagba be yewoatɔ te ʋuawo. Ke hã, mɔnu si kpovitɔwo zã la "mesɔ o" eye woɖe gbe be woawɔ numekuku tso wo ŋu le dɔwɔƒea.  Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kakaɖedzitɔe be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖe Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal kpovitɔwo fia be wole kpe dam le esi womete ŋu tɔ te agbatsɔʋu si me ke kple kpewo le o megbe la nye alakpa. Nyatakaka siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele o siwo ku ɖe tɔmelã siwo tsi ƒumelãwo ŋu si nye ‘nuxlɔ̃ame tso Russia anyigbaʋuʋu ŋu’ ŋu kaka ɖe Internet dzi

AFP India ƒe agbalẽ





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


				Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ma video xoxo aɖe si me beluga siwo le ƒuta gblɔ alakpatɔe be yewonye anyigbaʋuʋu gã si ʋuʋu Russia ƒe Ɣedzeƒe Ʋĩ si me amewo mesɔ gbɔ ɖo o le July 30 dzi la ƒe vɔvɔli. 
			


"Lãawo xlɔ̃ nu mí -- gake míete ŋu se egɔme o," Hindigbe me nyatakaka si woma ɖe X dzi le ŋkekea dzi ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ. Egblɔ kpee be: "Etsɔ la, beluga tɔmelã atɔ̃ klɔ ƒuta le Russia ƒe Kamchatka, si nye anyigbaʋuʋu si ƒe sesẽme nye 8.8 si nye egbegbe ƒe teƒe vevitɔ. Dzɔdzɔme ye nya gbã ɣesiaɣi."  

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Alakpanya si woɖe le July 31, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ dzesi dzĩ si nye X kpe ɖe eŋu
					
Posu la do esime anyigbaʋuʋu si ƒe sesẽme nye 8.8 dzɔ le Russia ƒe ɣedzeƒe ʋĩ ƒe Kamchatka nutoa ƒe ƒuta (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Wogblɔe ɖi be ahom ƒe ƒutsotsoe siwo ade meta ene (afɔ 12) adza le Pasifik-ƒua ƒe akpa aɖewo eye dukɔ siwo wu wuieve -- tso Japan va ɖo United States va ɖo Ecuador -- aɖe dumeviwo ɖa le ƒuta nutoawo me. Emegbe woɖe nuxlɔ̃ameawo ɖa, si na be ame miliɔn geɖe siwo woɖe le teƒea hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe la trɔ yi aƒe, siwo dome Kamchatka hã le.Nu ɖeka kolia si wogblɔ be ewu enye nyɔnu aɖe si ku esime eƒe ʋu ge tso agakpe aɖe dzi le Japan nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ka nya ta be edze agbagba be yeasi. Woma videoa kple nya mawo tɔgbe le X kple Facebook dzi.  Google ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di to keyframes zazã me na wowɔ video si woda ɖe YouTube dzi le August 13, 2023 dzi la ƒe akpa si didi wu, si wogbugbɔ trɔ ɖe tsia dzi, eye tanya aɖe gblɔ be eɖe Kamchatka nɔlawo fia wole belugas ƒome aɖe xɔm (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). 

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple alakpa nyatakaka (L) kple ƒe 2023 video le YouTube
					
Nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo wotsɔ ɖo videoa dzi si ku ɖe Russiatɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Kamchatka Inform ŋu, si ka nya ta le August 13, 2023 dzi be beluga tɔmelãwo ƒe ƒome aɖe -- ame tsitsi ene kple nyivi ɖeka -- tsi Tigil Tɔsisia ƒe nu me le ƒutsotsoe sesẽ aɖe si nɔ ɖiɖim (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Nyatakakaawo gblɔ be wo katã tsi agbe eye wote ŋu trɔ yi atsiaƒua me le wo ɖokui si le ƒutsotsoewo ƒe sesẽɣi. Togbɔ be lãwo ƒe nuwɔna wɔnukuwo ŋuti ŋutinyawo li do ŋgɔ na anyigbaʋuʋu ƒe dɔwɔnawo hã la, mɔ̃ aɖeke meli si ate ŋu aɖe kadodoa me le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me o, le United States ƒe Anyigbaŋutinunyalawo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) ƒe nya nu.AFP hã ɖe alakpanya bubu siwo ku ɖe Russia anyigbaʋuʋua ŋu le afisia la ɖa.
