claim: Woate ŋu atsɔ peroxide awu tetanus eye lãwo koe wòaxɔ
evidence: Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woma le July 30, 2025 dzi le Instagram me gblɔ be: "Anɔ eme be tetanus nye atikewɔmɔnu siwo nye fewuɖunu wu ɖesiaɖe dometɔ ɖeka." "Mɔnukpɔkpɔ si li be nàxɔ Tetanus la sɔ kple azɔlizɔzɔ tso afisia eye yamenutomeyimɔ̃ aƒo wò."  Nya sia si kaka ɖe Facebook kple X hã dzi la yi edzi gblɔ be peroxide sisi ɖe abi ŋu aɖe dɔlékuiwo xɔxɔ ƒe afɔkua ɖa nyuie eye be tetanus "tso lãwo ƒe dɔgbo me."  Nuŋlɔɖia gblɔ kpee be: “Zi alesi alẽ alo nyi mele wò aƒeme o ko la, nyemesusu be afɔku aɖeke mele ŋuwò o,” eye wogblɔ be ahɔhɔ̃mekaŋutinunyala Russell Blaylock, amesi do lãmesẽnya siwo flua ame ɖe ŋgɔ va yi, gbɔe nya sia tso.  Image Screenshot of an Instagram post taken August 14, 2025 Nya siawo va esime eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be atikewɔmɔnu ŋuti nyatakaka totrowo bɔ ɖe Internet dzi eye ate ŋu anɔ kpekpem ɖe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le ɖiɖim le United States kple Canada katã (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).  Le video aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le June 2025 me si ɖe gbeƒãe be woaɖe ga si wozãna na xexeame katã ƒe atikewɔha aɖe ɖa la, United States ƒe Lãmesẽnyawo Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. ɖe ɖeklemi "lãmenugbagbevi blibo" DTP tu siwo kpɔa ame ta tso tetanus, diptheria kple pertussis me.  AFP tsɔa alakpanya siwo wogblɔna be wozã atikewɔmɔnu kple nyateƒenya siwo woŋlɔ nyitsɔ laa siwo flu amewo tso Vaxelis 6-in-1 ƒe atike si kpɔa ame ta tso dɔléle geɖe siwo dome tetanus hã le me la ɖa edziedzi.  Nya si wogblɔ be afɔku si le tetanus dɔlékui xɔxɔ me megali kloe o, si wɔe be atikewɔmɔnuawo mehiã o hã nye ameflunya ma ke.  Abi goglowo Tetanus nye dɔléle sesẽ aɖe si xɔa ame, si tso Clostridium tetani dɔlékui ƒe ƒuƒuwo gbɔ, le Xexeame ƒe Lãmesẽ Habɔbɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) ƒe nya nu.  Dɔlékuiawo mexɔa ya o, si fia be ne edɔ alɔ̃ vɔ la, ate ŋu adzi ɖe edzi le nuto siwo me oxygen mele o me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia). Nɔnɔme sia nana abi goglowo nyea teƒe nyuitɔ si lãviawo miena le.  Barry Pakes, si nye dukɔa ƒe lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nunyala le Toronto Yunivɛsiti gblɔ be enye nyateƒe be ne wotsɔ peroxide alo dɔlékuiwutike bubu kɔ teƒe si wotso si me goglo o la, ate ŋu awu dɔlékui siwo hea tetanus vɛ le gotagome (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Egblɔ le August 7 dzi be: "Gake menye afimae kuxia le o. Kuxiae nye ne wodoe ɖe wò lãkusi me kloe."  Egblɔ be wonya tetanus ƒe afɔku "klasik" si nye afɔɖeɖe ɖe ɖa si xɔ dzo ŋu nyuie ale gbegbe elabena abi siawo ƒomevi tua spores ɖe ŋutilãa me goglo, afisi atike siwo wotsɔna ƒoa ɖae mate ŋu aɖo wo gbɔ o.  Ne oxygen megale dɔlékuiawo si o ko la, wodzea aɖi aɖe si hea tetanus ƒe dzesiwo abe taɖuame, dzoxɔxɔ kple alɔ̃madɔmadɔ ene (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) la dodo gɔme.  Pakes gblɔ be: "Ekema èdzea dɔ ŋutɔ, ŋutɔ eye àte ŋu aku le eŋu." "Abe nu bubu ɖesiaɖe kloe ene la, míekpɔnɛ zi geɖe o le atikewɔmɔnu ta."  Abe alesi wòle le atike akpa gãtɔ gome ene la, tetanus-tikewo naa hea lãmenugbagbevi siwo le ŋutilãa me be woado ŋusẽ dɔlélenutsiŋutete ƒe ŋuɖoɖo ɖe dɔlékui aɖe koŋ ŋu, si xea mɔ na emetsonu sesẽwo (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Pakes gblɔ be tetanus dɔlékuiwutike wɔa dɔ nyuie le ɖekawɔwɔ me kple atike bubuwo, si tae atike siwo wotsɔ ƒo ƒu abe Vaxelis 6-in-1 ene li ɖo.  Afɔku siwo ate ŋu ado tso eme Earl Rubin, si nye ɖeviwo ƒe dɔléle siwo xɔa ame me ŋuti nunyala bibi le Montreal Ðeviwo ƒe Kɔdzi (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia), lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be egahiã be woado atike na ame eye wògblɔ be wokafu atike siwo doa ŋusẽ ame ƒe ewo ɖesiaɖe kloe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).  Woate ŋu ado wo hã ne dɔnɔ aɖe va kple abi goglo eye wòate ŋu akpɔ dɔlékui siwo hea tetanus vɛ (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Rubin gbe nya si wogblɔ be agbledelãwo ƒe gododo koe nye mɔ ɖeka kolia si dzi amewo ate ŋu ato axɔ tetanus hã.  Egblɔ be: "Enye dɔlékui si le nutoa me, eyata mehiã be nànɔ lã aɖe gbɔ le afi aɖeke o."  Togbɔ be dɔlékuia le lãwo ƒe aɖuɖɔ me hã la, edɔa alɔ̃ le anyigba, ke kple nusiwo le abe ɖa siwo xɔ dzo ene hã me, Rubin ɖe eme.  AFP lé ŋku ɖe lãmesẽnyatakaka totro bubuwo ŋu le afisia.

claim: Shah Rukh Khan gblɔ be Mustafizur Rahman aƒo bɔl na KKR togbɔ be tsitretsiɖeŋu le eŋu hã eye wòhe ɖeklemi dɔwɔƒedzikpɔla Gautam Adani.
evidence: Video aɖe si le tsatsam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖee fia be Bollywood fefewɔla kple Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) ƒe hadɔwɔla Shah Rukh Khan le Bangladesh kriket ƒola Mustafizur Rahman ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le KKR me ta ʋlim, esime wònɔ ɖeklemi ɖem adzɔnuwɔla Gautam Adani kple "Hindu-Moslem dunyahehe" vevie.  Le video klipi la me la, wogblɔ be wose Shah Rukh Khan gblɔ be ele be ɖeklemiɖela siwo tsi tre ɖe Mustafizur Rahman ŋu "nadzudzɔ ɣlidodo," esime wòtso Adani nu be ede India asi to elektrikŋusẽ nana Bangladesh me, eye wòte tɔ ɖe edzi be Mustafizur "aƒo bɔl na KKR godoo."  Wole videoa mam le afisiafi eye woŋlɔ nyawo ɖe edzi be enye nya aɖe si Shah Rukh Khan gblɔ nyitsɔ laa le nyaʋiʋli siwo ku ɖe Mustafizur Rahman ɖeɖe le KKR me ŋu.  Screengrab from Facebook post by Great Alexander Evidence Original Video From 2014 Be woaɖo kpe video klipi la ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi la, Newschecker wɔ nɔnɔmetata didi aɖe le megbenyawo me le keyframes siwo tso video si kaka la me to Google Lens zazã me. Esia na woda video aɖe ɖe October 2, 2014 dzi, le YouTube-dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo si nye Talks at Google. Videoa ɖee fia be Shah Rukh Khan le gome kpɔm le dzodoƒe dzeɖoɖo aɖe me kple Google ƒe amegã Sundar Pichai le Googleplex le California. Abe alesi videoa ɖɔe ene la, kadodoa nye Shah Rukh Khan ƒe sinima si nye Happy New Year ƒe boblododo wɔna aɖe ƒe akpa aɖe.  Womeyɔ Mustafizur Rahman, Adani alo Dunyahenyawo O Video bliboa me toto ɖo kpe edzi be Shah Rukh Khan do awu ma ke si wokpɔ le video si kaka ɖe amewo me me eye Happy New Year ƒe fefewɔlawo kpe ɖe eŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Deepika Padukone, Abhishek Bachchan, Boman Irani, kple Farah Khan. Le dzeɖoɖoa me la, Shah Rukh Khan ƒo nu tso eƒe dɔwɔɖui, sinima, kple nutovɛ ŋu. Womeƒo nu tso Mustafizur Rahman, KKR, Gautam Adani, alo dunyahehe alo hadomenya aɖeke ŋu le videoa ƒe akpa aɖeke o.  Lip-Sync Mismatch Points to Audio Manipulation Ne míelé ŋku ɖe video si kaka ɖe amewo me ŋu nyuie la, míakpɔ masɔmasɔ siwo woate ŋu akpɔ le Shah Rukh Khan ƒe nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu kple odio si wogblɔna dome. Ɣeyiɣi si me eƒe nu ʋuʋu kple mo ƒe dzedzeme mewɔ ɖeka kple nya siwo wose o. Zi geɖe la, masɔmasɔ mawo dzɔna ne wotrɔ video gbãtɔ to odio yeye alo esi ŋu wotrɔ asi le la tsyɔtsyɔ me.  AI Dɔwɔnuwo Ðo kpe edzi be Odio Nye Nuwɔwɔ Be míagaku nu me le odio la ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu la, Míetsɔ AI detekp dɔwɔnuwo ku nu me tso klipi la ŋu. Aurigin dɔwɔnua de dzesi odio la be 99% AI-si wowɔ.  Aurigin AI dɔwɔnu ƒe numekuku si ɖee fia be odio si le video si me dɔlékuiwo le me nye 99% AI-si wowɔ.  Kukuɖenuŋu si wowɔ le wo ɖokui si to Resemble AI zazã hã ɖee fia be gbea nye gbe si wotsɔ lãgbalẽ wɔe eye mesɔ kple Shah Rukh Khan ƒe gbe ŋutɔŋutɔ o. Nusiwo do tso eme siawo ɖo kpe edzi be wotsɔ ame ŋutɔ wɔ odio la eye wotsɔe kpe ɖe videoa ŋu.  Resemble AI dɔwɔnu dea dzesi video si me dɔlékuiwo le ƒe odio be enye nuwɔwɔ.  Nya Ma tɔgbe aɖeke Mele Shah Rukh Khan ƒe Dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo O Míelé ŋku ɖe Shah Rukh Khan ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo ŋu woɖo kpee hã ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye X, Instagram kple Facebook. Womeke ɖe nyatakaka alo nya aɖeke si ku ɖe Mustafizur Rahman, Gautam Adani, alo KKR ƒe nyaʋiʋlia ŋu o, si gade dzesi nya sia be enye nyateƒe.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Video Xoxo Si Woma Alakpatɔe Abe Azãɖuɖuwo Le Venezuela Le Dukplɔla Nicolas Maduro ƒe Ameléle Ŋuti Nyametsotso Vɔ Megbe Video si kaka si gblɔ be Shah Rukh Khan ʋli Mustafizur Rahman ta eye wòɖe ɖeklemi Gautam Adani la nye esi wotsɔ dijitaal wɔe. Videoawo tso Google ƒe wɔna aɖe me le ƒe 2014 me, eye AI ye wɔ odioa. Shah Rukh Khan megblɔ nya ma tɔgbe aɖeke o.  FAQs 1- Ðe Shah Rukh Khan ƒo nu tso Mustafizur Rahman ƒe ɖeɖe le KKR ŋua?  Ao, Shah Rukh Khan megblɔ nya aɖeke le dutoƒo ku ɖe Mustafizur Rahman ɖeɖe le KKR me ŋu o.    2- Ðe Shah Rukh Khan ƒe video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye nyitsɔ laa?  Ao, videoa dze egɔme tso October 2014 me eye wolée le Talks at Google wɔna aɖe me.    3- Ðe gbe si le video si kaka ɖe amewo me la nye nyateƒea?  Ao, dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI ɖo kpe edzi be wowɔ odio la le mɔ si wowɔ kple asi nu.    4- Ðe Shah Rukh Khan ɖe ɖeklemi Gautam Adani le videoa mea?  Ao, wozã odio si ŋu wotrɔ asi le tsɔ tsɔ nya siwo wogblɔ be eya gbɔe wògblɔ la kpee. claim: Wowu Amerikatɔ geɖe le Chicago le kwasiɖa ene ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe me le March 2026 me wu esiwo wowu le aʋawɔwɔ me tso esime U.S. kple Israel ƒe aʋawɔwɔ ɖe Iran ŋu dze egɔme.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nyatakaka siwo woyɔ lae nye nyuitɔ kekeake siwo li vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm eye ɖewohĩ womaɖe ku siwo ŋu womegblɔ nya le o alo esiwo womenya fifia o la afia o. Le March 2026 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be wowu Amerikatɔ geɖe le Chicago dugã me le kwasiɖa ene siwo katã do ŋgɔ na nya la kaka gɔme wu esiwo wowu vaseɖe fifia le aʋawɔwɔ me le U.S. kple Israel ƒe aʋa si wowɔ kple Iran me. Aʋa la dze egɔme le February ƒe nuwuwu eye wole aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi nu, vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo da nya sia ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), togbɔ be edze abe etso Erick Erickson si yɔ eɖokui be "nyateƒegblɔla si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe asi" gbɔ hã. "Kristotɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla" la da video aɖe ɖeInstagram (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le March 25 lia dzi, eye le ɣeyiɣi si me wòʋli nya be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo gblɔ afɔku si dze ŋgɔ U.S. asrafowo ku ɖe aʋawɔwɔa ŋu la wògbɔ eme. Le videoa ƒe nuwuwu la, egblɔ be: Wowu ame geɖe le Chicago, Illinois, le kwasiɖa ene siwo va yi me wu amesiwo wowu le aʋa si wowɔ kple Iran me. Menye akɔntabubu mae nèle sesem o. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo di be nàsusu be míele nu bumee, be afɔkue wònye. Wodi be woɖi gbɔ Donald Trump, eye ne efia be míado dzidzɔ na míaƒe asrafowo ƒe ku la, nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo lɔ̃na faa be yewoawɔe elabena wolé fu Donald Trump ale gbegbe. Nya sia kaka esi Iran gbe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe nubabla gbãtɔ si U.S. do ɖa le March ƒe nuwuwu. A post shared by Erick Erickson (@ewerickson) Kpuie ko la, nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe, le U.S. Department of Defense kple Chicago Police Department ƒe nyatakakawo nu. Ele be míade dzesii be nyatakaka siwo woyɔ lae nye nyuitɔ kekeake si li vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm eye ɖewohĩ womaɖe ku siwo ŋu womegblɔ nya le o alo esiwo womenya fifia o la afia o. Le April 8 lia dzi la, Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Pete Hegseth kple Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Tatɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Zimenɔla Aʋafia Dan Caine wɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe, si woate ŋu akpɔ leYouTube. Le nyatakaka kpuia me la, wodzro kwasiɖa eve ƒe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi kple Iran si ŋu wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖo le esi Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋlɔ ŋɔdzidonamewo ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le April 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe la me be nàgblɔ nya aɖe. Xexlẽme ma sɔ kple xexlẽme si nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo abeNPR kpleAl Jazeera ka nya ta va yi, kpakple nyatakaka mawo siwo woɖe ɖe go siwo woate ŋu axlẽ le U.S. Central Command kple DOD ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le March 28 lia dzi la, The Associated Press ka nya ta be U.S. subɔsubɔha me tɔ siwo xɔ abi le Iran ƒe dɔwɔwɔ me vaseɖe ŋkeke ma dzi ƒe xexlẽme wu 300. Le theDOD ƒe nya nu la, subɔsubɔha me tɔ 14 lia ku le atikewɔwɔ ƒe nɔnɔme aɖe si meku ɖe aʋawɔwɔ ŋu o ta "esi wònɔ dɔ wɔm le Kuwait." Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple esia la, Chicago Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Nyatakakawo ƒe nyatakaka siwo tso Feb. 23, 2026, vaseɖe March 22, 2026 (ŋkeke etɔ̃ hafi Erickson nada eƒe video ɖe edzi), ŋlɔ amewuwu 34 le kwasiɖa ene ma me. Nyatakaka siwo tso March 2, 2026, va se ɖe March 29, 2026 (ŋkeke ene le Erickson ƒe eƒe videoa da ɖe Internet dzi megbe) hã ɖe amewuwu 34 fia le kwasiɖa ene ma me. Woateŋu akpɔ kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa ƒe nyatakakawo ƒe nyatakakawo, le ɖoɖo nu, le afisia, afisia, afisia, afisia kple afisia. Snopes te ɖe Chicago Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ŋu be woaɖo kpe xexlẽme siawo dzi gake womeɖo eŋu enumake o. Ele vevie be míade dzesii be Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Nyatakakawo ɖe adzɔgbeɖeɖe ƒe nyatakaka aɖe fia si yɔ wo be "gbãtɔ eye woate ŋu adzro wo me ake ahagbugbɔ wo atrɔ asi le wo ŋu."

claim: Wowɔ sno ƒe anyigba gbãtɔ le vo me esime ame aɖe nɔ agbagba dzem be yeatu kekeli si klẽna wu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Erwin Perzy I, si nye amekokodɔwɔnuwo ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla le Vienna, nɔ ahuhɔ̃e ƒe anyigba si me tsi yɔ fũu dom kpɔ le ƒe 1900 lɔƒo be wòado kekeli ɖe ŋgɔ esime nu suesuesue siwo wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la nɔ ɖiɖim abe sno ene. Edze abe "sno ƒe dzadza" ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzia dzɔ le vo me ene, eye emegbe etrɔ susua wòzu ŋkuɖodzinu ƒe atsyã ƒe xexeame katã. Perzy ƒe afɔkua menye nukpɔsusua ƒe kpɔɖeŋu gbãtɔ si wonya o. U.S. dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si ku ɖe ƒe 1878 ƒe Paris Xexeame Katã ƒe Nuɖeɖefia ŋu ƒo nu tso pepadzidzenu siwo wotsɔ ahuhɔ̃e ƒe bɔl siwo me do le siwo me tsi yɔ fũu wɔ, siwo wɔa dɔ abe sno ƒe ahom ene ne wotrɔ wo ŋu. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, nya aɖe le kakam le Internet dzi be le vo mee woto snodziʋu gbãtɔ vɛ. Le ŋutinyaa nu la, wogblɔ be Viennatɔ mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla aɖe dze agbagba be yeawɔ akaɖi si klẽna wu eye wòde dzesii be nusue siwo le tsatsam le ahuhɔ̃e ƒe gogloƒe si tsi yɔ fũu me la le abe sno si le gegem ene. OneReddit post (archived) on the topic read: "snow globes nye esiwo atikewɔnuwo dzraɖola aɖe to vɛ le vo me. Enɔ agbagba dzem be yeawɔ akaɖi si klẽna wu na amekokoxɔwo, eyata edze agbagba be yeazã glass si me tsi yɔ fũ kple nusiwo klẽna tsɔ wɔa esia. Dɔwɔwɔa dze abe sno ene nɛ si nye alesi wòkpɔ susua na sno globes." TIL be atikewɔnuwo dzraɖola aɖee to snodzizɔnuwo vɛ le vo me. Enɔ agbagba dzem be yeawɔ akaɖi si klẽna wu na amekokoxɔwo, eyata edze agbagba be yeazã ahuhɔ̃e si me tsi yɔ fũ kple nusiwo klẽna tsɔ wɔa esia. Dɔwɔwɔa dze abe sno ene nɛ si nye alesi wòxɔ susua na sno globes.by intodayilearned Wogbugbɔ gblɔ ŋutinyaa ƒe gɔmeɖeɖewo le ŋutinya me nyati xɔŋkɔwo kple mɔzɔzɔ ŋuti nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me, eye wòkaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abe Instagram, Facebook, Reddit kple X hã dzi. Togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be Erwin Perzy, si nye Austriatɔ amekokodɔwɔnuwo ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla, wɔ sno ƒe ƒuƒoƒo gbãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le vo me le ƒe 1900 lɔƒo hã la, sno ƒe anyigba ƒe nɔnɔmetata gbãtɔ si woŋlɔ ɖi la dze egɔme tso ƒe 1878 ƒe Paris Xexeame Katã ƒe Nukpɔkpɔ me. Nudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo dzie wotu ŋutinyaa ɖo. Erwin Perzy III, si nye ƒomea ƒe snodziʋu ƒe asitsaha si me dzidzime geɖe le ƒe nyanuɖela, ƒo nu tso alesi Erwin Perzy I, tɔgbuia, te ahuhɔ̃e ƒe anyigba si me tsi yɔ fũu kpɔ be yeatsɔ adzi akaɖi si le akaɖi me ɖe edzi la ŋu. Etsɔ nusiwo woɖo be woaɖe kekeli afia kpee, eye wo dometɔ ɖeka (si ƒomea ɖɔ be enye semolina) nyrɔ blewuu eye wòɖo ŋku sno ƒe dzadza dzi nɛ. Le ema megbe la, etsɔ sɔlemexɔ sue aɖe si nye kpɔɖeŋu de xexeame katã, eye wòwɔ "sno globe" ƒe nɔnɔme gbãtɔ si woate ŋu ade dzesii. Nenema ke Erwin Perzy III gblɔ na Smithsonian Magazine alesi tɔgbuia "to esia vɛ vodadatɔe, elabena edi be yeawɔ nane si to vovo" eye be "elektrik-kaɖi ƒe nyonyo" nye yeƒe tameɖoɖo. Anne Hilker, si nye aɖaŋudɔwo ŋuti se kple atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo ŋuti nunyala le Mount Mary Yunivɛsiti ƒe dɔdasi aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Amerikatɔwo ƒe sno ƒe xexeame ƒe agbemeŋutinya: tso ŋkuɖodzinyawo dzi va ɖo ewɔwɔ le agbɔsɔsɔ gã me dzi, tso ŋkuɖodzinu dzi va ɖo dzesi dzi," te gbe ɖe edzi be wotsɔ sno ƒe anyigba ƒe gomenɔamesi gbãtɔ na Erwin Perzy I. Gake "sno ƒe anyigba ƒe nɔnɔmetata gbãtɔ" ƒe nɔnɔmetata la gblẽ ŋutinya me nya vevi aɖe ɖi. Ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe do ŋgɔ na Perzy ƒe dodokpɔwo la, U.S. dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ku ɖe nusiwo woɖe fia le Paris Xexeame Katã ƒe Nukpɔƒe le ƒe 1878 me ŋu ƒo nu tso pepadzidzenu yeye siwo wotsɔ "bɔl siwo me do le siwo me tsi yɔ fũu" siwo me ame sue aɖe le le eme ŋu: ŋutsu aɖe si lé akɔtakpoxɔnu ɖe ​​asi. Ede dzesii hã be aŋɔ ɣi aɖe nɔ bɔlawo me si ne wotrɔ nusi wotsɔ wɔe la, edzena be yeasrɔ̃ sno ƒe ahom. (HathiTrust) Hilker yɔe be "sno ƒe anyigba ƒe nɔnɔme gbãtɔ si woŋlɔ ɖi." To vovo na ƒe 1878 ƒe numeɖeɖe ma si woŋlɔ ɖi la, kpɔɖeŋu ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe hã li si do ŋgɔ na Perzy: Eiffel Xɔ Kɔkɔ ƒe "sno ƒe kpekpeme" si do ƒome kple ƒe 1889 ƒe Paris Nukpɔkpɔ, si wowɔ le Bergstrom-Mahler Museum of Glass nudzraɖoƒe eye woateŋu akpɔe to Google Arts & Culture dzi. (Google Arts & Culture) Eyata ne Perzy ƒe "snodzadza" si ŋu wòke ɖo la nye le vo me eye wòkpe ɖe wo ŋu wodze snodzinuwɔla xɔŋkɔ aɖe gɔme hã la, ahuhɔ̃e ƒe gogloƒe si yɔ fũ kple tsi si naa ʋuʋudedi si le abe sno ene ƒe susu dze le ŋutinya me nuŋlɔɖiwo me do ŋgɔ na eƒe dɔa. Le wo katã me la, kpeɖodzi sẽŋu aɖe li na nya si wogblɔ be Perzy ƒe sno ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa tsi tso dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ be woatsɔ ana amekoko ƒe akaɖi nanyo ɖe edzi me eye be le eƒe ƒomea ƒe nya nu la, woke ɖe "sno" ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzia ŋu le vo me. Gake mesɔ be míaɖɔ ɣeyiɣi ma be enye snodzizɔzɔ gbãtɔ si woto vɛ o. Woƒo nu tso ahuhɔ̃e me pepadzidzenu mawo tɔgbe siwo me tsi yɔ fũu siwo me aŋɔ ɣi le siwo nɔa tsatsam ne wotrɔ wo ŋu le conne me

claim: Le December 2025 me la, U.S. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ame Suesuewo ƒe Kplɔla Chuck Schumer gblɔ be, "Go Bills," heƒo nu tso Buffalo, New York, NFL ƒuƒoƒoa ŋu, hafi ƒo nu tso tudada si wu ame le Sydney, Australia, kple Brown Yunivɛsiti ŋu.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Togbɔ be Snopes mete ŋu ke ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe bliboa ƒe videowo ŋu o hã la, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be wotrɔ asi le Schumer ƒe nyawo ƒe video klipi aɖe ŋu o. Le wɔna ma ke me la, Schumer ƒo nu tsitotsito tso tudada le Australia kple Brown Yunivɛsiti ŋu. Le December 2025 me la, video klipi aɖe kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia, afisia kple afisia) si fia be U.S. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ame Suesuewo ƒe Kplɔla Chuck Schumer gblɔ be, "Go Bills," si ƒo nu tso Buffalo, New York, NFL ƒuƒoƒoa ŋu, hafi ƒo nu tso tudada si wu ame le Sydney, Australia, kple Brown Yunivɛsiti ŋu. Tudadaa dzɔ le kwasiɖanuwuwu ma ke. Tudala aɖe wu ame eve eye wòde abi ame enyi bubuwo ŋu le Brown le Dec. 13. Tudada ame gbogbo aɖewo le Dec. 14 dzi le Hanukkah ƒe azãɖuɖu aɖe me le Sydney ƒe Bondi Ƒuta na ame 15 ku. Edze abe video klipi si le tsatsam le internet dzi la ɖe Schumer fia wògblɔ be: "Nyateƒee, magblɔ nya ʋee aɖewo tso tudada dziŋɔ si dzɔ le Sydney, Australia ŋu. Eyata eye gbã la, nyateƒee, abe alesi megblɔna ɣesiaɣi ene la, nuka kee ɖadzɔ o, yi Bills! Woɖu Patriots dzi egbea. Enye nya gã aɖe." Chuck Schumer: "Nyateƒee, magblɔ nya ʋee aɖewo tso tudada dziŋɔ si dzɔ le Australia ŋu, enyo? Eyata, eye gbã, nyateƒe, abe alesi megblɔna ɣesiaɣi ene la, nuka kee ɖadzɔ o, yi Bills! Woɖu Patriots dzi egbea. Enye nya gã aɖe." 😐pic.twitter.com/1gaV35HCjD — Wall Street Mav (@WallStreetMav) December 15, 2025 Conservative podcaster Alec Lace ɖɔ nya sia be enye "gbeɖiɖi tokunɔ" le nya aɖe si wòŋlɔ ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe), esime Republican U.S. Rep Mike Lawler si tso New York bia be Schumer "nadzudzɔ enumake" le video klipi la ŋuɖoɖo me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Snopes xlẽla geɖe hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoakpɔe ɖa be Schumer ye gblɔ nya sia ŋutɔŋutɔ hã. Edze abe video klipi la dzɔ tso YouTube video aɖe si LiveNOW ma tso Fox (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) me ene. Le eme la, Schumer dze nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe gɔme le Dec. 14 dzi esi wògblɔ be yeaƒo nu tso nusi wòɖɔ be "Instacart ripping off the consumer" ŋu eye emegbe yeaƒo nu tso "tudada dziŋɔ si dzɔ le Sydney, Australia" ŋu. Le ema megbe la, etsɔ "go Bills" nya la kpe ɖe eŋu: Eyata gbã la, maƒo nu tso Instacart kple woƒe ripping off the consumer ŋu ​​godoo. Eye emegbe le nyateƒe me la, magblɔ nya ʋɛ aɖewo tso tudada dziŋɔ si dzɔ le Sydney, Australia, ŋu. ENYO? Eyata eye gbã la, nyateƒee, abe alesi megblɔna ɣesiaɣi ene la, nuka kee ɖadzɔ o, yi Bills. Woɖu Dukɔlɔ̃lawo dzi egbea. Enye nya gã aɖe ŋutɔ. Emegbe Schumer yi edzi ƒo nu tso alesi wogblɔ be Instacart zã nunya wɔwɔe tsɔ bia ga vovovowo tso nuƒlela vovovowo si ɖe nuɖuɖudzraƒe ɖeka mawo ke ta ŋu. Togbɔ be Snopes mete ŋu ke ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe bliboa ƒe videowo ŋu o hã la, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be wotrɔ asi le videoa ƒe akpa aɖe ŋu o. Eyata míebu nya la be esɔ be Schumer ye gblɔe. Míebia tso Fox ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe si be wòaɖo kpe edzi be wometrɔ asi le YouTube videoa ŋu o eye wòabia be woaɖe wɔnaa bliboa ƒe videowo. Woawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo. Míeɖo Schumer ƒe dɔwɔƒea hã be míaɖo kpe nya sia dzi eye míabia be míagblɔ nya aɖe tso ɖeklemiɖeɖe le eƒe ɣeyiɣi si wògblɔ ŋu gake míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo aɖeke hafi wotae o. Le LiveNOW ƒe video si to vovo tso Fox gbɔ (si wodzra ɖo) tso wɔna ma ke me la, Schumer ƒo nu tso tudada le Australia kple Brown Yunivɛsiti ŋu tsitotsito, eye wòhe susu yi afɔku siwo le tsitretsitsi ɖe Yudatɔwo ŋu me kple alesi wòhiã be woawɔ ɖɔɖɔɖo le tudada ŋu dzi. Egblɔ le eƒe akpa aɖe me be: Abe alesi mexlɔ̃ nu enuenu ene la, Yudatɔwo ƒe tsitretsitsi nye dɔvɔ̃ le xexeame godoo. Ele afisiafi eye ele be woabu fɔe sesĩe eye woawɔ avu sesĩe le tɔtrɔ ɖesiaɖe me. Wotsɔ gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo ƒo Yudatɔwo ƒe dukɔa katã nu ƒu, eye nublanuinya sia si dzɔ le Sydney la ɖe afɔku gã si le eme be woaɖe mɔ woaxe mɔ ɖe Yudatɔwo ƒe nyatakaka, nyagbɔgblɔ kple nuwɔna siwo tsi tre ɖe Yudatɔwo ŋu nu la fia. Schumer lɔ̃ ɖe edzi hã be Australia ƒe tudadaa va le amedzidzedze si dzɔ ɖe Brown dzi megbe, eye wògblɔ kpee be "míaƒe dziwo le kpekpem ŋutɔŋutɔ ŋdi sia." Eyɔ nudzɔdzɔawo be "dɔléle" eye wògblɔ be "wova zu nusi sɔ akpa le míaƒe xexeame," eye wòƒoe ɖe enu be "ele be míawɔ geɖe wu atsɔ atɔ te tudada ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ, si me sewɔtakpekpea ƒe afɔɖeɖe le tu ƒe dedienɔnɔ kple ɖɔɖɔɖo ŋu hã le." U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ le Brown Yunivɛsiti ƒe tudada megbe hã he ɖeklemiɖeɖe vɛ le Internet dzi. Le Kristmas ƒe amedzroxɔƒe aɖe le White House le Dec. 14 dzi la, egblɔ be "nuwo ateŋu adzɔ" le nublanuinya la ŋu. Eƒe nyawoe nye esiawo (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Eye Brown Yunivɛsiti — suku gã aɖe. Gã s- — gã, le nyateƒe me la, enye suku gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka le xexeame ƒe teƒe ɖesiaɖe. Nuwo ate ŋu adzɔ. Eyata le ame enyi siwo xɔ abi gome la, haya kaba. Eye na ame eve mawo ƒe ƒome siwo megale mía gbɔ o la, mexea nye de

claim: Wona McDonald ƒe nuɖuɖu kabakaba U.S. Olympic ŋutsuwo ƒe hockey ƒomea me tɔwo le woƒe White House sasrãkpɔ me le February 2026 me.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le Feb. 24, 2026 dzi la, U.S. Olympic ŋutsuwo ƒe ice hockey ƒuƒoƒoa yi White House, afisi wodo go Dukplɔla Donald Trump le tsɔ ɖu sika medaasi xɔxɔ ɖe Canada ŋu ƒe azã.Foto (nudzraɖoƒe) si woma le internet dzi si wogblɔ be eɖe ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔwo fia wonɔ McDonald ƒe nuɖuɖu kabakaba ɖum le White House. Videoa ɖe ƒuƒoƒoa fia wonɔ anyi ɖe kplɔ̃ aɖe ŋu, wodo woƒe sika medalẽwo esime wonɔ burger ɖum. Ame aɖewo tsɔ video ma sɔ kple U.S. Olympic nyɔnuwo ƒe hockey ƒomea dometɔ ɖeka, amesi wogblɔ be woɖu nu "vivi" kple fefewɔla Stanley Tucci ɖe eteƒe. Video siwo le etame la nye nyateƒe eye Scarlett Johnson, podcast host si ƒe X account bio ɖɔe be enye "White House nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ yeye ƒe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla" ye dae ɖe afima gbã. Míedo asi ɖe Johnson gbɔ be míasrɔ̃ nu geɖe eye míawɔ nya sia yeyee ɖe edzi. Nyatakaka siwo le videoa me tsitotsito ɖo kpe edzi be esia nye Olympic-ha la ƒe White House sasrãkpɔ ƒe akpa aɖe. Eyata míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Davis Ingle, si nye White House ƒe nyanuɖela meɖo kpe nuɖuɖua me nyawo dzi na Snopes o, egblɔ boŋ be: "Dukplɔla Trump nye dada na Team USA ƒe ŋutinya me aʋadziɖuɖu eye dzi dzɔ White House be yeawɔ nu na sika medalawo ƒe ʋiʋlilawo kple Amerikatɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖu vivi aɖe." Ele be míade dzesii be nyɔnuwo ƒe hockey ƒomea ɖu nu kple Tucci le Milan le February 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze nyateƒe, hafi woxɔ sika medalẽ, le woƒe Instagram nyatakaka si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo nu. Nuɖuɖua menye aʋadziɖuɖu ƒe azã o, to vovo na ŋutsuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe sasrãkpɔ le White House le February ƒe nuwuwu. Nyɔnuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa gbe Trump ƒe amekpekpe be wòava eƒe State of the Union ƒe nuƒo (si ŋutsuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔwo de), eye wogblɔ le nya aɖe me be: Míeda akpe vevie ɖe amekpekpe si wona míaƒe sika medalẽ–dziɖula U.S. Nyɔnuwo ƒe Hockey Ƒuƒoƒoa ta eye míekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe woƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ tɔxɛa ŋu vevie. Le ɣeyiɣi si woɖo ɖi kple sukudede kple dɔwɔwɔ ƒe ŋugbedodo siwo ŋu wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖo va yi le Kamedefefeawo megbe ta la, kamedefefewɔlawo mete ŋu kpɔa gome le eme o. Le Feb. 24, 2026 dzi la, Johnson da video (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si me Olympic ŋutsuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa le burger kple nuɖuɖu bubu siwo woɖuna kabakaba ɖum le X dzi eye wòŋlɔ ɖe X dzi be: "Wotsɔe vɛ na mi le Red, White, kple Blue ƒe mɔɖeɖe te." Johnsonfollowed up with another post on Feb. 26: "Egawɔ nuku nam kokoko be nye video sue si me Ŋutsuwo ƒe United States Hockey Ƒuƒoƒo le McDonald ɖum le White House la kaka akɔɖu." Edze abe Johnson nɔ White House gbesigbe wova srãe kpɔ ene eye wòda foto siwo me ƒuƒoƒoa do go Trump le la da ɖe afima. Tso ƒe 2025 me la, Trump dziɖuɖua xɔ "nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ yeyewo" ɖe eƒe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me. Zi geɖe wu la, le ƒe siwo va yi me la, nyadzɔdzɔhabɔbɔ gã siwo woɖo anyi abe The Associated Press kple Fox News ene ye le ta la me. Le aPoynter nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe numekuku nu la, "nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ yeyewo" ƒe ta la lɔ "blogŋlɔlawo, podcasters kple ame bubu siwo womateŋu aɖe gɔme ŋutɔŋutɔ o ƒe ƒuƒoƒo elabena woƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple woƒe habɔbɔwo mesɔ ɖe nɔnɔmetata aɖeke nu o. Wonye agbalẽnyala ƒe akpa aɖe, nyameɖela ƒe akpa aɖe kple dzidzɔdonamelawo ƒe akpa gã aɖe na Trump, MAGA habɔbɔa kple blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo." Johnson nye podcaster mawo dometɔ ɖeka si daa White House ƒe videowo kple fotowo ɖe eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo enuenu. White House ƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe fotowo kple video siwo sasrãkpɔa ƒe dɔwɔlawo da ɖe edzi la meɖe hockey-ha la me tɔwo fia wonɔ McDonald’s ɖum o. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be wotrɔ asi le videoawo ŋu alo wotsɔ AI wɔe o. Ŋutsu siwo le Johnson ƒe videowo me la nye hockey ƒola mawo ke siwo do go Trump, wodo awu mawo ke eye wotsɔ sika medalẽwo bla kɔ. Kplɔ̃ si dzi wobɔbɔ nɔ, kpakple Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Theodore Roosevelt ƒe nɔnɔmetata si le sɔ dzi le megbe,ɖee fia be wonɔ nu ɖum le Roosevelt Xɔ me le White House. Woateŋu akpɔ Roosevelt Xɔa ƒe foto si wotsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo le Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Joe Biden ƒe dziɖuɣi le White House Ŋutinya Habɔbɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe. Trump White House hã na nuɖuɖu siwo woɖana kabakaba amedzrowo le Trump ƒe dziɖuɣi gbãtɔ me. Snopes haspreviously covered authentic footages of Trump tolling the U.S. men's Olympic hockey team that "ele be" yeakpe nyɔnuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa hã va White House hena aʋadziɖuɖu ƒe azã alo "ɖewohĩ woaɖee le zi dzi."

Standford Yunivɛsiti ƒe numekula Solomon Hsiang gblɔ na AFP (AFP / GIANLUIGI GUERCIA) be dukɔ siwo te ɖe teƒe xɔdzowo ŋu kpɔnɛ be dzoxɔxɔ kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe yewoƒe ganyawo dzi wu bubuwo gɔ̃ hã.

AFP USA ƒe agbalẽ





				Numekuku aɖe si xɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔ si wota ɖe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe magazine xɔŋkɔ si nye Nature me le April 2024 me xlɔ̃ nu be yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ si dzi womeɖu o ate ŋu aɖe xexeame katã ƒe GDP dzi akpɔtɔ alafa memama 62 le mɔ wɔnuku aɖe nu le ƒe alafa sia ƒe nuwuwu, si ana gadzikpɔƒewo naƒo ɖi le xexeame katã.
			


Gake Stanford Yunivɛsiti numekulawo ƒe numekuku si wogbugbɔ wɔ le California, si woɖe ɖe go le August 6, 2025 dzi, tsɔ nya ɖe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti agbalẽa ƒe nyataƒoƒo ŋu (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).Ekpɔe be amesiwo wobu be woadze edzi la le sue abe zi gbɔ zi etɔ̃ ene eye le mɔ gbadza nu la, ewɔ ɖeka kple akɔntabubu siwo wowɔ do ŋgɔ, le esi wòɖe emetsonu si mesɔ o si bla ɖe Uzbekistan ŋu (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) ɖa vɔ megbe.The saga may culminate in a rare retraction, with Dzɔdzɔme gblɔ na AFP le August 6 dzi be "nyatakaka bubuwo anɔ ye si yeama kpuie" -- afɔɖeɖe si yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ ŋuti ɖikelawo xɔ le agbalẽa me dzodzro ake kple eɖɔɖɔɖo do ŋgɔ na agbalẽa tata megbe.Agbalẽŋlɔla gbãtɔ eveawo siaa -- amesiwo lɔ̃ ɖe vodadawo dzi le woƒe mɔnu kple nyatakakawo ŋudɔwɔwɔ me -- kple Stanford ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa nɔ mɔ kpɔm be ŋkuléleɖenuŋu ƒe ɖoɖoa ƒe nuwɔwɔ le gaglãgbe ado ŋusẽ, tsɔ wu be wòagblẽ dukɔa ƒe kakaɖedzi me le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me.Yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala Maximilian Kotz kple eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ siwo le Potsdam Institute for Climate Impact Research (PIK) xɔŋkɔa ta numekuku gbãtɔa le April 2024 me, wozã nyatakaka siwo tso dukɔ 83 me tsɔ da alesi dzoxɔxɔ kple tsidzadza ƒe tɔtrɔ kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe ganyawo ƒe ŋgɔyiyi dzii kpɔ (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Ŋusẽgbalẽ si kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dziEzu yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti agbalẽ evelia si woyɔ wu le ƒea me, le UK-dukɔa ƒe nya nu Carbon Brief ƒe asitsaƒe, kple ɖoɖo si ŋu wonya nu tsoe le Xexeame ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã, Dukɔwo Dome Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔha, United States ƒe dziɖuɖua kple bubuawo (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).AFP nɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gbogbo aɖewo dome siwo ka nya ta tso eŋu.Ke hã eteƒe medidi o nya si wogblɔna be xexeame katã ƒe GDP dzi aɖe akpɔtɔ alafa memama 62 le ƒe 2100 me le nɔnɔme si me ya si dona le yame fũ numekula siwo le megbe na numekuku si wogbugbɔ wɔ, si hã wota ɖe Nature me la dometɔ ɖeka, gblɔ na AFP le August 5, 2025 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Esi wodze agbagba be yewoagbugbɔ emetsonuwo awɔ la, Hsiang kple eƒe dɔwɔhati siwo le Stanford kpɔ nusiwo to vovo vevie le nyatakakaawo me surrounding Uzbekistan.Etɔxɛe la, masɔmasɔ si dze ƒã nɔ nutome ƒe dzidziɖedzi ƒe akɔntabubu siwo woyɔ le Potsdam claim: Instagram zãla ‘bjeshruchi’ .
evidence: Le tsidzadza gã aɖe si dza le Ajmer megbe la, gbedoxɔ si le Malusar Mɔ dzi ƒe akpa aɖe mu. Be woaxe mɔ ɖe nu gbegblẽ aɖeke nu la, dziɖuɖua gbã gbedoxɔa le nutoa me tɔwo ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu nu. Gake fifia wole nudzɔdzɔ sia ƒe videoa mam kple alakpanya aɖe si wogblɔ le habɔbɔa me.  New Delhi (Vishvas Nyadzɔdzɔwo). Wole video aɖe si tso Ajmer, Rajasthan, si ɖe gbedoxɔ aɖe gbãm kple JCB fia la le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple alakpanya kple hadomenya aɖe. Nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la gblɔ be wogbã gbedoxɔa elabena enɔ mɔ xem na mɔ si yi Ajmer gbedoxɔa me.  Vishvas News ku nu me tso nya si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wokpɔe be gbedoxɔa ƒe akpa aɖe mu le tsidzadza ta. Wogbã gbedoxɔa esi amesiame lɔ̃ be yeaƒo asa na afɔku aɖeke vɔ megbe. Woatu gbedoxɔ yeye ɖe teƒe ma ke.  Viral post Instagram zãla 'bjeshruchi' ma videoa le August 26, 2025 (archive link) kple nya si wogblɔ be "Wogbã gbedoxɔ si va le mɔ dzi na Ajmer mosque."  Numekuku Esi míetsɔ Google Lens di video si kaka la ƒe key frame la, míekpɔ video nyatakaka aɖe si woda ɖe July 26, 2025 dzi, le YouTube channel si nye News 18, Rajasthan. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be, "Gbedoxɔ aɖe si xɔ ƒe 50 le Ajmer ƒe akpa aɖe mu le tsidzadza gã aɖe ta, le ema megbe la, wovɔ̃ be afɔku aɖe adzɔ. Le esia ta la, dziɖuɖua gbã gbedoxɔ bliboa kple akpa eveawo katã ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu. Hafi woagbã gbedoxɔa la, woɖe legbaawo katã ɖa le afima. Eteƒe madidi o woatu gbedoxɔ yeye ɖe gbedoxɔ xoxoa teƒe. Le woate ŋu akpɔ video me nyadzɔdzɔwo, gbedoxɔa ƒe akpa aɖe si mu le tsidzadza ta ƒe videowo, kple video klipi si kaka ɖe amewo me hã."  Rajasthan ƒe nutoa me YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si nye MTTV INDIA hã ka nya ta tso nudzɔdzɔ sia ŋu. Abe alesi nyatakakaa gblɔe ene la, "Shiva gbedoxɔa ƒe megbekpa si le Malusar Mɔ dzi le Ajmer la mu le tsidzadza ta. Le esia megbe, le vɔvɔ̃ be afɔku aɖe adzɔ ta la, dziɖuɖua ɖe legbaawo ɖa le gbedoxɔa me eye wogbã xɔa ƒe akpa mamlɛa. Woda video nyadzɔdzɔ sia ɖe Internet dzi le July 26, 2025 dzi."  Woate ŋu akpɔ video klipi si kaka ɖe amewo me hã le eme.  Le nyadzɔdzɔ ƒe nyatakaka si wota ɖe Dainik Bhaskar ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe le July 26, 2025 dzi nu la, "Tsi dza le dua ƒe akpa aɖewo tsɔ kpe ɖe ya sesẽwo ŋu le Ajmer. Le tsidzadza ta la, Krishna Kanhaiya gbedoxɔ si le KK Colony, si le Malusar Mɔ dzi la ƒe megbekpa ge dze afɔtoƒea. Le esia megbe la, dziɖuɖua dzro nu me kple nutoa me tɔwo eye wogbã gbedoxɔa." xɔtutu."  Woda video nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si ku ɖe esia ŋu hã ɖe Rajasthan Patrika ƒe Facebook axa dzi le July 26. Be míaɖo kpe nya sia dzi la, míeƒo ka na Manish Singh, si nye nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla tso Ajmer, amesi na eme kɔ be gbedoxɔa ƒe megbekpa mu le tsidzadza ta. Le afɔku si ate ŋu adzɔ ta la, dziɖuɖua gbã akpa si susɔ la. Mɔ siwo dzi woato ayi Ajmer Dargah kple Malusar Mɔ dzi la to vovo, si wɔe be nya si wogblɔ tso gbedoxɔa gbãgbã ŋu la nye alakpa.  Nukpɔsusu aɖe kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe ezãla siwo tsɔ video si me wogbã gbedoxɔa le Ajmer le Ajmer kple alakpanya la dzi eye woma nyatakaka bubu siwo doa dziku na ame kple esiwo ku ɖe amewo ŋu alea hã.  Nyataƒoƒo: Le tsidzadza gã aɖe si dza le Ajmer megbe la, gbedoxɔ si le Malusar Mɔ dzi ƒe akpa aɖe mu. Be woaxe mɔ ɖe nu gbegblẽ aɖeke nu la, dziɖuɖua gbã gbedoxɔa le nutoa me tɔwo ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu nu. claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: ‘Amegbetɔ ƒe ŋutigbalẽ ƒe fefenu’ si wokpɔna le California la nye esi wotsɔ latex wɔe, ke menye lãe o
evidence: Teddy bear aɖe si wogblẽ ɖe California ƒe mɔ̃memidzraƒe aɖe si wogblɔ na dziɖuɖumegãwo be wotsɔ amegbetɔ ƒe kukua tsyɔ edzi la nye latex-nu, nutoa me sheriff’s department kple nutala la gblɔ, togbɔ be alakpanya si wogblɔ tso eƒe nyawo ŋu yi edzi le kakam ɖe internet dzi hã.Local media reported on July 14, opens new tab that law enforcement in San Bernardino County had responded to a report of a teddy bear left in public that appeared to be covered in human remains.The same media clarified in an update, opens new tab later that day that the bear was made with latex, not human flesh.Ke hã, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyatakakawo, ʋu tab yeyea yi edzi ma nyatakaka gbãtɔa ŋuti nyatakakawo – nya yeye aɖeke manɔmee – ŋkeke aɖewo megbe.Reuters Image“What kind of twisted person would do this,” said one person sharing the news on July 16.The San Bernardino County Sheriff's Department said in a press release, opens new tab that deputies from Victorville’s Police Department had responded to calls about the bear on July 13, eye numekula aɖe si le nutoa ƒe amekukudzraɖoƒea ƒoe nu ƒu be woadoe kpɔ.The coroner’s office said in a press release, opens new tab on July 14 that it had determined the doll was made with fabricated material and did not contain any human tissue.The teddy bear is available for purchase, opens new tab on Etsy from a shop called Dark Seed Creations.A Dark Seen Creations ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ le nya aɖe si wòɖo ɖe e-mail me be dzata la nye “dziŋɔ ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ” si wodzrana.“Menye ŋɔdzinu fx nutala si le eɖokui si eye mele esia wɔm ƒe 20 kloe enye sia. Wonya mí ɖe míaƒe amegbetɔ ƒe ŋutigbalẽ ƒe nuzazã ŋutɔŋutɔwo kple awuwo ta.Dzata si ŋu nya ku ɖo la tso latex agbe ƒe castings kple asi me sewn and assembled before being painted and detailed to resemble a realistic human skin appearance,” the statement said.Asitsaha la gblɔ hã le July 14 ƒe Facebook nyatakaka aɖe me, opens new tab be yemenya nu tso nuƒlela ƒe tameɖoɖowo ŋu o eye yemekpɔ gome le California nudzɔdzɔa me o.The sheriff’s department gblɔ be yeke ɖe amesi yexɔ se be edzo le dzata la ŋu, emegbe yelé wo hewɔ agbalẽ ɖe wo ŋu le ɖikeke me be eyae na nyatakaka si ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔ kpata aɖe ŋu esime wònya be alakpae, eye wòɖoe koŋ do kpeɖodziwo madzemadzee be woatsɔ alakpatɔe afia abe nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ene.The San Bernardino County Sheriff’s Department did not respond to a request for comment.VERDICTMissing context. Nutala si wɔe kple nutoa me sedzikpɔlawo gblɔ be “amegbetɔ ƒe ŋutigbalẽ ƒe fefenu” si wokpɔ le mɔ̃memidzraƒe aɖe le Victorville, California, nye latex-nuwɔnu eye amegbetɔ ƒe lãkusi mele eme o.Reuters Fact Check ƒe ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia. Xlẽ nu geɖe tso míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzrodɔa ŋu.Míaƒe Dzidzenuwo: Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., ʋu tab yeyeTanya siwo wodo ɖa:Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzroShareXFacebookLinkedinEmailLink

claim: Tso September 2025 me la, Texas adze sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o la nu tsotso gɔme.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la Texas sewɔlawo te fli ɖe se aɖe si xe mɔ ɖe sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o kple sukuvi siwo le klass siwo bɔbɔ ɖe anyi wu me ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nutsitsi nu, negbe le nɔnɔme sesẽ siwo ate ŋu alɔ atike vɔ̃ɖiwo, aʋawɔnuwo alo ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ɖe eme ... ... Ke hã, esia mefia be woadzudzɔ sukuviwo ƒe sukudede le esi wonye aƒemanɔsitɔwo ta o. Ke boŋ se yeyea ana wòanɔ bɔbɔe na sukuwo be woaxe mɔ na sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o kple sukuvi siwo metsi o le sukudede godo le agɔdzedze siwo mesẽ boo o wu esiwo míegblɔ ɖe etame nu ta. Gawu la, wogblɔ be suku siwo wotsɔ de "ɖɔɖɔɖo ƒe ɖoɖowo" te hena sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le ƒe 2023-24 ƒe sukuƒea me la anɔ ɖoɖo mawo te. Le August 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka be Texas adze sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o ƒe sukuwo nu tsotso gɔme tso September 2025. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be Texas sukuwo ate ŋu adzudzɔ ɖeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ azɔ "le woƒe aƒemanɔsitɔwo ta": Nya ma ke dze zi geɖe le X. Le Facebook dzi la, nɔnɔmetata aɖe si dzi woŋlɔ ɖo be "TEXAS WILL START SUSPENDING STUDENTS WHO AƑE MELE ALOO WOTSƆ TSƆ AƑE SIWO MELI KPEKPE O ME LE SEPTEMBER" kaka ɖe afisiafi. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea eye woɖo e-mail ɖe wo esime wonɔ didim be yewoaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ la ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi. Snopes kpɔe be, Texas sewɔtakpekpea da asi ɖe se aɖe dzi vavã si na wònɔ bɔbɔe na sukuwo be woadzudzɔ sukuvi siwo si aƒe mele o kple sukuvi siwo mexɔ klass etɔ̃lia haɖe o. Se sia si wode asi ete wòzu se la te fli ɖe se si nɔ anyi va yi si ɖe mɔ be woadzudzɔ sukudede alea le nuvlowɔwɔ gãwo ta ko. Gake se yeyea meɖe mɔ na sukuwo be woadzudzɔ ɖevi siwo si aƒe mele o le esi wonye aƒemanɔsitɔwo ta ko o. Texas Aƒe ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe 6 lia "Ku ɖe amehehe dzikpɔkpɔ kple susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ to telefon dzi ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔwo xɔxɔ le dukɔa ƒe sukuwo me" na mɔnukpɔkpɔ geɖe wu sukuwo be woadzudzɔ aƒemanɔsitɔwo kple sukuvi siwo metsi o. Do ŋgɔ na esia la, se si le Texas ɖe mɔ be woadzudzɔ ɖevi siwo si aƒe mele o kple ɖevi suewo ƒe sukudede le nuvlowɔwɔ siwo ku ɖe aʋawɔnuwo, aha sesẽ, atikevɔ̃ɖizazã alo ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ŋu ko ta. Esia nye be woawɔ ɖe dukɔa ƒe McKinney-Vento Se si wowɔ le ƒe 1987 me, si na takpɔkpɔ bubuwo ɖevi siwo ŋu nu gblẽ le, abe amesiwo le aƒemanɔamesi ƒe nɔnɔme me tom ene, dzi. Le se yeyea nu la, woate ŋu adzudzɔ sukuvi mawo ƒe sukudede le nuvlowɔwɔ siwo mesẽ boo o ta, abe "nuwɔna si doa ŋɔdzi na sukuvi bubu siwo le sukuxɔa me ƒe lãmesẽ kple dedienɔnɔ enumake" kple "nuwɔna si woŋlɔ ɖi si hea tɔtɔ le sukuxɔa me enuenu alo vevie." Gake wogblɔ be suku siwo le San Antonio, siwo Houston Landing kple San Antonio Nyatakaka ƒe numekuku ŋuti nyatakaka aɖe ɖee fia be woda se xoxoa dzi la, akpɔtɔ anɔ Texas Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo ƒe ɖoɖowo te le esi wodzudzɔ sukuvi siwo ŋu nu gblẽ le le nuvlowɔwɔ suewo ta, le San Antonio ƒe Nyatakakaa ƒe nya nu.

claim: Woɖe Apple ƒe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ, Jon Yongfook, le dɔ me le ‘Liquid Glass’ ƒe aɖaŋu yeye si wowɔ na iOS 26 ƒe ɖeɖefia megbe.
evidence: Le 09 June 2025 dzi la, Apple ɖe zãla ƒe mɔnu yeye aɖe ɖe go na iOS si woyɔna be Liquid Glass le Xexeame Katã ƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Takpekpe (WWDC) 2025. Woɖe gbeƒã tɔtrɔ yeyea le June 2025 me le Apple ƒe ƒe sia ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe takpekpe me. Eɖea nusiwo le keklẽm, siwo klẽna, kple esiwo me kɔ siwo naa iOS ƒe dzedzeme "glassy" wu eye wòle ƒuƒoƒo me. Apple to aɖaŋu sia vɛ be wòana nukpɔkpɔ ƒe goglome nanyo ɖe edzi eye wòana ezãlawo ƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ bliboa nanyo ɖe edzi. Woaɖe ŋgɔdonya yeyea ɖe go kple iOS ƒe tɔtrɔ gã si gbɔna le ƒe sia ƒe nuwuwu.  Le ŋgɔyiyi sia dome la, nya aɖe (le afisia, afisia) le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, si gblɔ be Apple ƒe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ Jon Yongfook, ye dɔwɔƒea ɖe le dɔ me kpe ɖe eƒe aɖaŋuwɔha ŋu, amesiwo nɔ dɔ wɔm tso nukpɔkpɔ ƒe akpa siwo ku ɖe blur kple interface design ŋu. Nya si woŋlɔ la ɖee fia hã be Yongfook ɖe gbeƒãe be yeage ɖe Samsung me. Nyadzɔdzɔ sia dze ɖiɖi gɔme le esi Jon Yongfook (@yongfook) ŋlɔ ɖe X dzi vɔ megbe be: "Apple ye ɖem le dɔ me egbea. Nye kple nye aɖaŋuwɔha míezã ɣleti 18 mamlɛawo tsɔ do Gaussian blur ƒe seƒe vovovowo kpɔ ɖeɖimateameŋutɔe le megbenyawo dzi ne ŋgɔgbenuwo le ŋku lém ɖe nu ŋu. Ne èle eŋutinunyalawo dim le blur, glass, liquid, grass, alo fur UI space, lmk". Tsɔ kpe ɖe esia ŋu la, ema "dɔwɔwɔ" siwo wògblɔ be yewɔ dɔ le le Apple ƒe screenshots.  Le nya sia megbe la, nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Republic TV, NDTV Profit, kple News 24, ta nyatakaka siwo ɖee fia be Apple ɖe aɖaŋuwɔla kple ƒuƒoƒo si le megbe na iOS 26 Liquid Glass ƒe ŋgɔdonya yeyea le dɔ me. Mina míaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ le nyatakakaa me dzi to nyati sia dzi.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Nya si wogblɔ: Woɖe Apple ƒe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ, Jon Yongfook, le dɔ me le esi woɖe ‘Liquid Glass’ ƒe aɖaŋu yeye si wowɔ na iOS 26. Nyateƒenya: Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si ɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ be Apple ɖe eƒe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ le dɔ me le ‘Liquid Glass’ ƒe aɖaŋu yeye si wowɔ na iOS 26 ƒe dodo megbe dzi o. eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖee fia be eyae ɖo Bannerbear, eye womeƒo nu tso akpa aɖeke si wòwɔ le Apple ŋu o. Apple meɖe nya aɖeke ɖe go le se nu tso aɖaŋuwɔla aɖe ɖeɖe le dɔ me si ku ɖe tɔtrɔ sia ŋu o. Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔwɔha si le Apple ƒe ŋgɔnɔlae nye Alan Dye, amesi to ‘Liquid Glass’ ƒe ŋgɔdonya vɛ le WWDC 2025. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, le 11 June 2025 dzi la, Jon Yongfook na eme kɔ le X be yeƒe nya si wòŋlɔ do ŋgɔ la nye fewuɖunya. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le nyatakakaa me la nye ALAKPA.  Be míaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ dzi la, míelé ŋku ɖe Jon Yongfook ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu eye míekpɔe be eƒe X kple LinkedIn akɔntabubuwo meyɔ hadede aɖeke kple Apple alo ɖee fia be ekplɔ aɖaŋuwɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe le afima o. Eƒe bio gblɔ be eyae nye Bannerbear, SaaS mɔnu si wozãna tsɔ wɔa nɔnɔmetatawo le wo ɖokui si, eye wònye Aviva ƒe dɔwɔla tsã. Míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be ewɔ dɔ le Apple kpɔ o, eye nyatakaka siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le alo dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe nya aɖeke meli tso Apple gbɔ si ɖo kpe edzi be eɖe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ aɖe le dɔ me o.  Míekpɔe be Apple ƒe Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoɖo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa nye Alan Dye, si nye dɔwɔƒea ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le Aɖaŋuwɔwɔ me, amesi to Liquid Glass ƒe nɔnɔmetata vɛ le WWDC 2025. Esi Jony Ive dzo le Apple le ƒe 2019 me vɔ la, woma aɖaŋuwɔwɔ ƒe kplɔlawo ɖe akpa eve me: Kɔmpiutadziɖoɖo (Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Aɖaŋuwɔwɔ) kple Hardware (Adzɔnuwo ƒe Aɖaŋuwɔwɔ). Alan Dye, si va ge ɖe Apple me le ƒe 2006 me, nye tatɔ na kɔmpiuta dɔwɔɖoɖowo kple UI ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ tso ƒe 2019. Evans Hankey ye nɔ ŋgɔ na xɔtunuwɔwɔ ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa do ŋgɔ, amesi xɔ dɔa le Ive megbe gake edzo le ƒe 2023 ƒe gɔmedzedze.  Le míaƒe numekukua me la, míekpɔ X-post aɖe si Jon Yongfook (@yongfook) ma le June 11, 2025 dzi, afisi wòna eme kɔ be eƒe nya si wòŋlɔ do ŋgɔ la nye fewuɖunya. Eŋlɔ bena: "Yayra mi katã amesiwo de dzesi esia be enye fewuɖunya. Mele vivi sem na nyakpakpawo. Menye Apple zãla ƒe 20+ enye sia, eye esiae nye UI vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake si mekpɔ. Mele mɔ kpɔm be woatrɔ asi le eŋu. Be wòanye nusi me kɔ bliboe la, esia le nye nyatakakawo xɔm fifia, eyata mele ka la dam ɖe mute dzi."  Kpuie ko la, wole fewuɖunya aɖe mam abe nyadzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ene be Apple ɖe eƒe aɖaŋuwɔla vevitɔ le dɔ me le esi wòɖe ‘Liquid Glass’ UI ɖe go vɔ megbe.

claim: Numekuku siwo wowɔ le HAARP yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒea gbɔe ahom sesẽ si woyɔna be Erin tso
evidence: "ÐEKO WOYƆ HAARP LE AHOMƆ LA ME. Ŋkeke etɔ̃ tẽe ƒe 'yame ƒe dodokpɔwo'... eye fifia ahom sesẽ Erin wó tso afi aɖeke o," August 20, 2025 ƒe Facebook nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ.  X nyatakaka aɖe si ɖi wo nɔewo kloe tso gbemagbe ke gblɔ be: “Woyɔe be ‘numekuku.’ Enye YAMEƲUƲU ƑE ƲUƲU."  Image Screenshot of a post from Facebook taken August 21, 2025, with a red X added by AFP Image Screenshot of a post from X taken August 21, 2025, with a red X added by AFP Nya mawo tɔgbe yi edzi kaka ɖe X kple Threads me esime ahom sesẽ si woyɔna be Erin gbɔdzɔ va zu ahom si ƒe hatsotso 2 lia, si na tsiɖɔɖɔ va ƒuta va ɖo United States ƒe nuto aɖewo ƒe akpa aɖewo ƒe Dziehe Carolina kple Virginia.  Gake ahom lae nye yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nudzɔdzɔ siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo wobu alakpatɔe ɖe numekukudɔwɔƒea dzi la ƒe yeyetɔ.  HAARP zãa xexeame ƒe gbeɖiɖimɔ̃ sesẽtɔ kekeake tsɔ srɔ̃a nu le yamenutome ƒe akpa siwo kɔkɔ wu. Alaska Yunivɛsiti Fairbanks ye wɔa ɖoɖoa tso ƒe 2015 me, esime woɖee tso United States Yamesrafowo gbɔ (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Nya siwo woŋlɔ la dometɔ aɖewoe nye August 8 ƒe "nyatakaka si ku ɖe nyatakakawo kaka ŋu" vavãtɔ ƒe screenshot tso ɖoɖowɔɖi si ɖe gbeƒã gbeƒãɖeɖe siwo ŋu wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖo tso August 12 vaseɖe 15. Egblɔ be numekukua ƒe taɖodzinuwo dometɔ ɖekae nye be woasrɔ̃ nu tso "nu siwo ionospheric nɔnɔmewo kpɔna ɖe GPS satellite dzesiwo dzi" (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  gblɔ be numekukua mate ŋu atrɔ asi le .  "Radio ƒe ƒutsotsoe siwo le frequency ranges siwo HAARP ɖona ɖa me mexɔa troposphere alo stratosphere o -- yamenutome ƒe dzidzenu eve siwo naa Anyigba ƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme," afɔɖeɖea gblɔ le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  "Esi kadodo aɖeke meli o ta la, mɔ aɖeke meli si dzi woato akpɔ yame ƒe nɔnɔme dzi o."  Matthew Zettergren, si nye mɔ̃ɖaŋuŋutinunyafialagã le Embry-Riddle Yameʋuɖoɖo Yunivɛsiti (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) lɔ̃ ɖe edzi.  Egblɔ le August 22 ƒe e-mail me be: "Be radio ƒe ƒutsotsoe siwo woɖena ɖe go nakpɔ ŋusẽ aɖeke ɖe yamenutome ƒe ƒuƒoƒo siwo me míaƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme dzɔna le dzi la, ele be woatsɔ ŋusẽ kple ŋusẽ ade ƒuƒoƒo mawo me, gake ɖeko womexɔa yame le ɣeyiɣi mawo me o."  Etsɔe sɔ kple akaɖi si wotsɔna klẽna to fesre nu. "Kekeli la katã toa eme eye glass la meʋãna alo doa dzo le mɔ aɖeke nu o."  David Hysell, si nye mɔ̃ɖaŋuŋutinunyafialagã le Cornell Yunivɛsiti ƒe Anyigba Kple Yameŋutinunya Dɔwɔƒe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) gblɔ na AFP nenema ke be: "Radio ƒe ƒutsotsoewo mate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe yame ƒe nɔnɔme dzi o. Menye nu sue aɖe gɔ̃ hã o."  HAARP dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔlékuiwo kaka kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe ionosphere dzi "le mɔ siwo menya kpɔna dzea sii bɔbɔe o gake wodoa dzidzɔ na ame nu," egblɔ le August 20 ƒe e-mail me, eye wòɖe eme be wotsɔa dɔwɔnu siwo sea veve kple esiwo le etɔxɛe léa ŋku ɖe emetsonuwo ŋu.  Hysell gbe afɔku ɖesiaɖe si le numekukua me, eye wògblɔ be: “Amegbetɔwo zãa radio dzi dzesi sesẽwo hena kadodowo ƒe 100 kple edzivɔe nye sia, eye mí katã míenya nu tso wo ŋu ŋutɔ.”  Ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣi Atlantik-ƒua ƒe ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣi, si dzea egɔme tso June 1 vaseɖe November 30, ɖoa eƒe kɔkɔƒe le ŋutinya me le August me.  Xexeame ƒe yame ƒe nɔnɔme gbɔe ahom gãwo abe ahom sesẽwo ene, siwo bia be yame ƒe nɔnɔme tɔxɛ aɖewo nadzɔ hafi dzɔna.  Image Graphic explaining the formation of ahorricanes (AFP / Cléa PÉCULIER, Sophie RAMIS) Togbɔ be wodze egɔme le ɖoɖoezizi me vie hã la, Dukɔa ƒe Atsiaƒu Kple Yame Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe (NOAA) yi edzi le gbɔgblɔm ɖi be ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣeyiɣi si sɔ gbɔ wu alesi wòle dzɔdzɔmee (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  NOAA hã ɖe nya siwo wogblɔ tso yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ ŋu la ɖa le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, eye wògblɔ be: "Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya aɖeke meli si ate ŋu awɔ ahomya, agblẽ, atrɔ asi le wo ŋu, ado ŋusẽ wo alo akplɔ wo le mɔ aɖeke nu, woƒe nɔnɔme alo nɔnɔme aɖeke nu o" (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo gblɔ nyateƒe be yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ le ahom sesẽwo xɔm le teƒe xɔdzowo, elabena atsiaƒu siwo me dzoxɔxɔ le wu doa dzo na ya sesẽwo, yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ nana tsidzadza nu sẽna ɖe edzi eye atsiaƒu ƒe kɔkɔme na ahom ƒe ʋuʋu dzina ɖe edzi.  (AFP VIDEOGRAPHICS / Emmanuelle BAILLON, Stephane KOGUC) AFP ƒe nyatakaka geɖe tso nyatakaka totro siwo ku ɖe ahomya ŋu la le afisia.

claim: Turning Point USA ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã kple eɖola ɖeka, Charlie Kirk gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be: “Ðɔɖɔɖo 2 lia menye adedada tae o, menye ameɖokui takpɔkpɔ tae o. Ele afima be woakpɔ egbɔ be ablɔɖemewo ate ŋu aʋli wo ɖokui ta ne mawu negbe dziɖuɖua va zu ŋutasẽla eye wòtrɔ ɖe eƒe dumeviwo ŋu.”
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le January 2026 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be Turning Point USA ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã kple eƒe gɔmeɖoanyila Charlie Kirk gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be U.S. Dukplɔsea ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia "menye adedada alo "ɖokui takpɔkpɔ tae o," ke boŋ "be woakpɔ egbɔ be ablɔɖeviwo ateŋu aʋli wo ɖokui ta" tso dziɖuɖu ŋutasẽla aɖe si me. Nya sia kaka le esi wowu ƒe 37 viAlex Pretti le dukɔa ƒe amedzrowo ƒe nyawo gbɔ kpɔlawo si me le Minneapolis le Jan. 24, 2026 dzi megbe, kwasiɖa eve pɛ ko le esime Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha (ICE) ƒe amegã Jonathan Ross da tu Renee Good wòku le nɔnɔme ma tɔgbe me le Minnesota dugã me megbe. Social media zãlawo leThreads (archived),Instagram (archived) kpleFacebook (archived) ma screenshot aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe Kirk ƒe nyayɔyɔa fia, si wogblɔ be xlẽ be: Ðɔɖɔɖo 2 lia menye adedada tae o, menye ɖokui takpɔkpɔ tae Eli be woakpɔ egbɔ be ablɔɖeviwo ateŋu aʋli wo ɖokui ta ne mawu negbe dziɖuɖua zu ŋutasẽla eye wòtrɔ ɖe eƒe dukɔmeviwo ŋu A post shared by Noelia Izarza (@noeliaizarza) Kpuie ko la, wogblɔ nyaawo wòsɔ be Kirk, amesi da nyaawo ɖe X (si nye Twitter ɣemaɣi) le March 3, 2018 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi kple eƒe nyatakakaa me nyawo sɔ kple screenshot si zãlawo ma le ƒe 2026. Edze abe Kirk ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔ siwo dzɔ ɣemaɣi ŋu ene. Le Feb. 14, 2018 dzi, ɣleti ɖeka do ŋgɔ na Kirk ƒe dɔa la, tudada le suku gbogbo aɖewo me le Marjory Stoneman Douglas Sekɛndrisuku le Parkland, Florida, si na wogatsɔ susu ɖo tu ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia ŋu le United States ake. Le ŋkeke si dzi Kirk ŋlɔ dɔa dzi la, Florida wɔ "Memleɖagbe ƒe kpekpe aɖe si mebɔ o" le dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpea me be woabu "tu kple sukuwo ƒe dedienɔnɔ ƒe ɖoɖo geɖe" ŋu le Parkland ƒe tudadaa megbe, le NPR ƒe nyatakaka aɖe nu.Gbemagbe ke la, Reuters ka nya ta tso ŋutsu aɖe si wosusu be eda tu edzilawo wòku la léle ŋu, si ate ŋu ana nuƒoƒo si ƒo xlã tu ƒe asixɔxɔ le ŋkeke ma koŋ dzi la nadzi ɖe edzi hafi. Nya si ŋu nya ku ɖo lae nye nya yeyetɔ kekeake si Kirk gblɔ ake si kaka ɖe Internet dzi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me gomenɔamesi bubu siwo Mawu na." Le nyatakaka ma me la, Snopes ɖe gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le April 5, 2023 dzi si me Kirk nɔ le Salt Lake City sukuxɔ me le Awaken Church si ɖo kpe nyayɔyɔa dzi gake nya aɖe hã le eme si ɖe eƒe March 2018 X nyatakaka si ku ɖe Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia ŋu me nyawo fia. Le ƒe 2023 ƒe gbebiame me, si woateŋu ase le Awaken Church ƒe PodBean podcast feed dzi la, Kirk gblɔ (edze egɔme tso 39:28): "Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia meku ɖe adedada ŋu o. Melɔ̃ adedada. Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia meku ɖe ame ŋutɔ ƒe ametakpɔkpɔ gɔ̃ hã ŋu o. Ema le vevie. Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia le afima, Mawu negbe, ale be nàte ŋu aʋli ɖokuiwò ta tso dziɖuɖu ŋutasẽla aɖe si me." Eyata menye ɖeko wogblɔ be Kirk ye gblɔ nya si woyɔ la wòsɔ o, ke boŋ nudzɔdzɔ bubuwo hã li siwo me wògbugbɔ nya mawo tɔgbe gblɔ, si na eƒe nukpɔsusuwo me kɔ le Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia ŋu.

claim: Woazã "Karte seksalice" le lãmesẽnyawo ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃wo me le Zagreb gɔmedzesukuwo me
evidence: "Kpɔ 'Gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋugbalẽvi' siwo Možemo kple Nɔnɔme M ŋlɔ na sukuviwo ɖa: Nukae trɔa wo? Ðe lolome le veviea..." xlẽ nyati aɖe si Narod.hr ta le September 13, 2025 dzi ƒe tanya. Nyatia ƒo nu tso takpekpe aɖe si Croatiatɔwo ƒe NGO siwo menye dziɖuɖua tɔ o CESI kple Status M wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe eŋu le September 9 dzi, le tanya si nye "Gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti hehenana bliboe le nutoa me ƒe nɔnɔme me" ŋu. Nyatia gblɔ alakpatɔe be "gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbalẽvi" siwo woɖe fia le takpekpea me "tsɔ ɖe le ɖeviwo ƒe 'gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbenɔnɔ' me".  "'Agbalẽvi' mawo nye nyabiase siwo wobia ɖevia eye ɖevia ɖoa eŋu," nya ɖe nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi si woma zi alafa ɖeka kple edzivɔ tso September 14 dzi. kple "Aleke gbegbe gbɔdɔdɔ le vevie na wò le ƒomedodo kplikplikpliwo me eye aleke wòkpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe wò kadodo kple wò zɔhɛ dzii?"  Nikola Grmoja, si nye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ si tso akpa si nye Most si léa blemakɔnuléleɖeasi me ɖe asi vevie me, ma agbalẽvi siwo le X dzi dometɔ aɖewo ƒe screenshots, eye wògblɔ vodadatɔe be woɖoe na Zagreb ƒe gɔmedzesukuwo kple sekɛndrisukuwo. Tomislav Sokol, si nye MEP si tso dziɖuha si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe habɔbɔ si nye HDZ hã da agbalẽviawo dometɔ ɖeka ƒe foto ɖe X dzi si xlẽ be "Ðe vevesese naa dzidzɔ wò gbeɖea? Ðe nèsena le ɖokuiwò me be yekpɔa dzidzɔ le ɖokuibɔbɔ alo dziɖuɖu mea?", tsɔ kpe ɖe nya si wogblɔ be miameha dama si nye Možemo si ɖua dzi le Zagreb "di be yeatsɔ esia ade sukuwo me to megbeʋɔtru nu abe nuwɔna si to vovo na sukunusɔsrɔ̃ ene."  X zãla aɖewo hã bia gbe Grok tso nya siwo wogblɔ ŋu eye woxɔ ŋuɖoɖo si mesɔ o.  Mɔfiame siwo ku ɖe agbalẽviawo ƒe hatsotso ŋu, siwo woate ŋu akpɔ le agbalẽviawo ƒe kadodo si le Status M ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia) te tẽ, gblɔe kɔte be ame ɖekaɖeka siwo xɔ wu ƒe 18 ye woɖoe na. Womeɖe wo fia le nuŋlɔɖia ƒe akpa aɖeke be wonye nufiame na sukuwo alo ɖeviwo o. Gomenɔla siwo kpɔ gome le takpekpea me hã ɖo kpe edzi na AFP be tɔtɔ aɖeke menɔ wo zazã ŋu o.  Nɔnɔmetata Screenshots na nya siwo mesɔ o le X kple Instagram. Taken on September 18, 2025. Red crosses added by AFP Zagreb dugã la ɖe gbeƒãe le September 4 lia dzi be yewodze ɖoɖo si wowɔ be woatsɔ ato lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nusɔsrɔ̃ si wowɔna le sukudede megbe vɛ na sukuvi siwo tso klass 5 va ɖo 8, eye woɖo kɔmiti si nye eŋutinunyalawo. Woɖoe be woadze dɔa gɔme le September 2026 me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Croatia nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ka nya ta be Luka Juroš, si kpɔa sukudede, kamedefefe kple sɔhɛwo dzi na Zagreb dugã la ƒo nu tso ɖoɖoa ŋu le September 9 ƒe takpekpea me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia). Nu ene anɔ nyati yeyea me: agbenɔnɔ le lãmesẽ me, ŋutilã kple susu ƒe lãmesẽ, mɔxexe ɖe numame nu kple gbɔdɔdɔ kple vidzidzi ƒe lãmesẽ.  Gake menye nusɔsrɔ̃ si woawɔ le etsɔme ɖeɖeko ŋue takpekpea ku ɖo o. Ede nyati bubuwo abe nuƒoƒo tso lãmesẽ kple gbɔdɔdɔ ŋuti hehenana ƒe emetsonuwo ŋu le Italy, Sweden kple Croatia duwo me, kple nuƒola kple vavalawo tso dɔwɔƒe vovovowo, lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ kple dukɔmeviwo ƒe habɔbɔwo me (wodzra wo ɖo ɖe afisia, afisia kple afisia).  Kpekpeɖeŋugbalẽvi siwo wowɔ na ame tsitsiwo Abe alesi woɖe eme le ezãla ƒe mɔfiamegbalẽa me ene la, "woɖo deck la na sɔhɛ siwo xɔ wu ƒe 18". Womegblɔ le afi aɖeke be wonye nufiamenuwo na suku o. Ke boŋ woɖoe be woazã agbalẽviawo le xɔlɔ̃ siwo dzi woka ɖo dome be "woadze dzeɖoɖo gɔme tso nyati siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋu eye woade dzi ƒo na sɔhɛwo be woade ŋugble ahagblɔ woƒe susuwo na ame bubuwo."  Image Screenshot of page 4 of the user's guide for the "sexuality cards", taken on September 18, 2025 "Menye ɖevi siwo xɔ ƒe siwo de suku ƒe ƒewoe woɖoe na kaɖiawo o. Womeku ɖe lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti hehenana ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔ ɖe Zagreb sukuwo me ŋu o," Anamarija Sočo, si nye Status M ƒe zimenɔla, si ta deck la eye wòwɔ ɖoɖo ɖe takpekpea ŋu, gblɔ le e-mail aɖe si wòɖo ɖe AFP le September 17, 2025 dzi. 2025. "Míaƒe lɔlɔ̃nu faa dɔwɔlawo, sɔhɛwo - ŋutsu kple nyɔnu sukuviwo - ɖe woƒe didi ɖe nu sia ƒomevi ŋu gblɔ. Wonya be nyati geɖe siwo ƒo xlã gbɔdɔdɔ gakpɔtɔ nye nusiwo ŋu wode se ɖo eye wodi be yewoaʋu teƒe na yewo kple yewo hatiwo be yewoaƒo nu tso eŋu bɔbɔe wu, aɖɔli nuteƒekpɔkpɔwo, asrɔ̃ nu ahado alɔ wo nɔewo," egblɔ kpee.  Eɖo kpe edzi hã be habɔbɔa mele dua ƒe eŋutinunyalawo ƒe kɔmiti si kpɔa etsɔme nusɔsrɔ̃ɖoɖoa toto vɛ dzi o. Dua ta eŋutinunyalawo ƒe ŋkɔwo le September 3 lia dzi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  AFP do asi ɖe takpekpea me tɔ geɖe gbɔ, amesiwo ɖo kpe edzi be "gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbalẽvi" ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa koe wotsɔ ɖo ŋkume abe dɔ si wowɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu ɖeka ene

claim: Ohio nutome de se aɖe si bu atsyɔ̃ɖomi, awudodo alo ŋutilã ƒe akpa siwo wotsɔ ametia wɔe dodo be enye nuvlowɔwɔ si do susu ɖa be "ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye si to vovo na fefewɔla alo modzakaɖela ƒe vidzinu ŋutɔŋutɔ," si koŋ xe mɔ ɖe dutoƒo drag-fefewo nu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Ohio ƒe Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea da asi ɖe se ma tɔgbe dzi to akɔdada 63–32 me. Gbe si wozã le sea me abe alesi woŋlɔe ene xe mɔ ɖe drag shows le dutoƒo teƒewo nu negbe ɖe ame tsitsiwo ɖeɖeko tɔ koŋ, abe strip clubs ene. Ke hã ... Ohio Sewɔtakpekpea meda asi ɖe sea dzi alo Republican Dziɖuɖumegã Mike DeWine de asi ete wòzu se o, vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm. Nya siwo wogblɔ be Ohio nutome de se aɖe si bu atsyɔ̃ɖomi, awudodo, alo ŋutilã ƒe akpa siwo wotsɔ ame wɔe zazã be enye nuvlowɔwɔ be woatsɔ ado susu ɖa be "ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye si to vovo na fefewɔla alo modzakaɖela ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ" kaka ɖe internet dzi le April 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze. si axe mɔ ɖe drag-haƒoƒo le dutoƒo teƒewo nu nyuie la, wode asi ete wòzu se. Nya sia kaka le nyaʋiʋli si le dzidzim ɖe edzi tso sewɔlawo gbɔ le LGBTQ+ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋu, abe U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ si trɔ asi le Colorado ƒe mɔxexe ɖe "dzimetɔtrɔ ƒe atikewɔwɔ" si woɖo ɖe LGBTQ+ ɖeviwo ŋu ene. Nya si wogblɔna nye nyateƒe kple alakpanyawo ƒe tsakatsaka. Enye nyateƒe be se sia si woyɔna be HB249 alo "Indecent Exposure Modernization Act" la nye nyateƒe eye Ohio Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea da asi ɖe edzi le March 25, 2026. Ke hã, alakpae wònye be sea nye se xoxo. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, wotsɔ sea va Ohio Sewɔtakpekpea me gake womeva da asi ɖe edzi haɖe o. Ne Sewɔtakpekpea da asi ɖe sea dzi la, ekema wosusui be Ohio ƒe Republicantɔwo ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã Mike DeWine ade asi ete wòazu se. Sea ƒe akpa si sɔ, si wotsɔ de PDF si le ete la, dze le axa 6 kple 7. Exlẽ (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): (4)(a) "Ame tsitsiwo ƒe cabaret wɔwɔ" fia fefewɔwɔ le teƒe bubu si menye ame tsitsiwo ƒe cabaret o, si me ɖevi suewo ate ŋu anɔ, si agblẽ nu le ɖevi suewo ŋu alo anye nu nyɔŋuwo, eɖanye nenye be fefea nye nusi ŋu woabu alo menyee o, eye wòɖe nusiwo gbɔna dometɔ aɖe fia: (i) Topless ɣeɖulawo; (ii) Go-go ɣeɖulawo; (iii) Ɣeɖula siwo mebɔ o; (iv) Ame siwo ɖea awu le wo ŋu; (v) Nuwɔlawo alo modzakaɖela siwo ɖea ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye si to vovo tso fefewɔla alo modzakaɖela ƒe vidzinu ŋutɔŋutɔ gbɔ fiana to awudodo, atsyɔ̃ɖomi, vidzinu alo no siwo wotsɔ ametia wɔ alo esiwo wosrɔ̃, alo ŋutilã me dzesi bubuwo zazã me; (vi) Nuwɔla alo modzakaɖela bubu siwo sɔ kplii siwo naa modzakaɖeɖe siwo doa dzidzɔ na ame aɖe si tsɔ ɖe le eme na ame. Togbɔ be womeƒo nu tso "he" alo "he fianyɔnu" ŋu le sea me o hã la, gbegbɔgblɔ si woɖe fia le etame la xe mɔ ɖe drag ɖeɖefia nu nyuie le dutoƒo teƒe siwo womeɖo koŋ na ame tsitsiwo ƒe zazã o, abe strip clubs ene. Wotu sea tsɔ do alɔ blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe nukpɔsusu xɔŋkɔ si nye be woyɔa nudzɔdzɔwo abedrag queen story time be enye afɔku na ɖevi siwo metsi o eye wòkplɔa se mawo tɔgbe siwo woto vɛ le nuto bubuwo abeMontana kpleTennessee ene ƒe afɔtoƒewo yome. Mɔkpɔkpɔ si le sea taʋlilawo si enye be woaxe mɔ na ɖevi suewo be woagakpɔ fefe mawo tɔgbe o, esime drag taʋlilawo le vɔvɔ̃m be woazã sea atsɔ axe mɔ ɖe drag nu le mɔ si keke ta wu nu abe aɖaŋudɔ ene.ACLU of Ohio bu fɔ sea, eye wòyɔ nya tso sea me le anews release me be drag performance nye esi wokpɔ ta na le Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔ me eye be sea "nye agbagbadzedze bubu be woazi ɖoɖoe ahaɖe mɔ na LGBTQ nutoa me tɔwo to gbegbe be woagbe drag dɔwɔlawo woƒe gomenɔamesi si le dukplɔsea me be woagblɔ woƒe susu faa." To vovo na esia la, Republican dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔla Angie King, si nye sea ƒe akpa vevitɔwo dometɔ ɖeka, gblɔ le eƒe astatement me be sea ku ɖe ɖeviwo takpɔkpɔ kple susu nyui ƒe ametakpɔnuwo gbugbɔgaɖo anyi ŋu be woatsɔ akpɔ woƒe fɔmaɖimaɖi ta" eye wògblɔ be eƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeaxe mɔ siwo le se si li fifia me eye wòakpɔ egbɔ be ame ŋutɔ ƒe teƒewo gakpɔtɔ le nenema. Snopes alé ŋku ɖe sea ƒe ŋgɔyiyi ŋu eye wòawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne eva zu se.

claim: Union Minister Amit Shah da dukɔa ƒe aflaga esime wònɔ ekɔm le Ðokuisinɔɣi le ƒe 2025 me.
evidence: Nya si wogblɔ: Dukɔa ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã Amit Shah da dukɔa ƒe aflaga esime wònɔ ekɔm le Ðokuisinɔɣi le ƒe 2025. Nyateƒenya: Nya si wogblɔ la flua ame. Video si me wogblɔ be Amit Shah le fumbling le Amadede Etɔ̃awo ʋuʋu me la dzɔ le ƒe 2018. Hyderabad: India ɖu eƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ Ŋkeke 79 lia le Dzoɖagbe kple dulɔlɔ̃ ƒe dzonɔameme, si nye ƒe 78 tso esime wòxɔ ablɔɖe tso Britaintɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖu me le ƒe 1947. Dukplɔlagã Narendra Modi kɔ dukɔa ƒe aflaga ɖe dzi le Mɔ̃ sesẽ Dzĩa me eye wòƒo nu na dukɔa le tanya si nye ‘Naya’ te Bharat,’ si te gbe ɖe India si aɖo eɖokui dzi eye nu dze edzi na amewo ƒe ŋutega dzi. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, video aɖe si wogblɔ be Union Home Minister Amit Shah le dukɔa ƒe aflaga dam esime wònɔ ekɔm la le kakam le hadome nyadzɔdzɔwo me, eye nya si wogblɔ la ɖee fia be woɖe videoa le Independence Day 2025. X zãla aɖe ma videoa kple nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Amit Shah da dukɔa ƒe aflaga. Pura Aura minus me chala gaya. Shame shame!!! #IndependenceDay #IndependenceDayIndia #Ðokuisinɔɣi2025." (Archive) Àte ŋu akpɔ nya ma tɔgbe le afisia. Fact Check NewsMeter kpɔe be nya la flua ame, elabena videoa tso ƒe 2018. Nɔnɔmetata si wogbugbɔ di le videoa ƒe keyframes me na míekpɔ video ma ke si Congress party ƒe official X handle da ɖe August 15, 2018. The post took a jibe at Shah, stating that those who cannot properly unfurl the national flag, how can they take care of the country?  50 साल से 50 साल से 50 साल से 50 साल से 1000 000 000 000 000 000 000। pic.twitter.com/FmiEI5B7D7 — Congress (@INCIndia) August 15, 2018 Míekpɔ aflaga kɔkɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa hã woɖee fia le BJP ƒe X asiléƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo le August 15, 2018 dzi, eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be: "Amit Shah ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Aflaga ɖe go le BJP ƒe Dɔwɔƒegã, New Delhi." claim: Le December 2025 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒãe be Magnetic Resonance Imaging scan aɖe si wowɔ le eƒe ahɔhɔ̃ ŋu "mekpɔ naneke o."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, wowɔ MRI scan na Trump le October 2025 me nyateƒe, gake wogblɔ be eƒe dzitodzitowo kple ƒodo ƒe akpa dzie wònɔ, ke menye eƒe ahɔhɔ̃e o. Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒãe be yewɔ yeƒe ahɔhɔ̃ ƒe MRI-dɔdasi "mekpɔ naneke o" kaka ɖe Internet dzi (wodzrae ɖo): WASHINGTON—Eƒo adegbe le eƒe susu ƒe lãmesẽ ŋu la, le Memleɖagbe la, Donald J. Trump te tɔ ɖe edzi be MRI si wowɔ ɖe eƒe ahɔhɔ̃ ŋu la mekpɔ naneke o. Egblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo be: “Mewɔ MRI deblibo.” "Ðɔkta gãtɔ kekeake siwo le dukɔa me lé ŋku ɖe nye ahɔhɔ̃ ŋu eye wova do ƒuƒlu." Trump gblɔ be viɖe aɖeke mele eƒe MRI ɖeɖe ɖe go me o elabena "naneke meli woakpɔ o," eye wògblɔ kpee be, "Ele abe Ɣedzeƒe Aʋala ene." Nya sia dze le yɔyɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi be Trump naɖe MRI si wowɔ nɛ le October 2025. White House ɖe nuŋlɔɖi aɖe ɖe go le Dec. 1 dzi si gblɔ be Trump ƒe dzitodzito kple ƒodo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo ɖeɖe "sɔ bliboe," le eƒe ɖɔkta, Sean Barbabella ƒe nya nu. Esi nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe bia Trump le Dec. 1 dzi be ŋutilã ƒe akpa kae MRI la le ŋku lém ɖe eŋu la, egblɔ be, "Nyemenya naneke o ... menye ahɔhɔ̃ae o elabena mewɔ susu ƒe dodokpɔ eye mewɔ aced nɛ." Nya si wogblɔ be Trump gblɔ be MRI scan si wowɔ le yeƒe ahɔhɔ̃ me "mekpɔ naneke o" ƒe tɔtrɔwo kaka ɖe Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe), Facebook kple TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe), eye Snopes nuxlẽlawo bia nya tso nya sia ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu. Edze abe nuxlẽla aɖewo ɖe nyaʋiʋlia gɔme be enye agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo gbɔgblɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ene. Gake kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be Trump ɖe gbeƒãe be MRI-dɔdamɔnu aɖe si wowɔ le eƒe ahɔhɔ̃ ŋu "mekpɔ naneke o." Ke boŋ, nyaʋiʋlia dzɔ tso The Borowitz Report (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) — nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si ɖɔ eƒe emetsonuwo be enye fewuɖunya le dzɔdzɔme nu. Eŋlɔla, Andy Borowitz, ŋlɔ ɖe eƒe About ƒe axa dzi be: "Meŋlɔa fewuɖunyawo tso esime mexɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃. Esia tsi tre ɖi na ɖokuitsɔtsɔna ɖe haƒoƒo ƒomevi aɖe ŋu alo ŋgɔyiyi si wolé." The New Yorker ŋlɔ The Borowitz Report abe nyati ene ƒe 25 sɔŋ. Borowitz ɖe gbeƒãe le ƒe 2023 me be magazinea ɖe asi le yeƒe nyati ŋu le ganyawo ta. Emegbe egatrɔ yi eƒe fewuɖunyawo tata ɖe eya ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi. Ne ɖe U.S. dukplɔla aɖe gblɔ nya sia le dutoƒo ŋutɔŋutɔ tso MRI ŋu la, anye ne nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe gãwo agblɔe. Ke hã, Google didi le nya vevi siwo nye "Trump Claims MRI on His Brain Found Nothing" ŋu la, wokpɔ nusiwo do ƒome kple fewuɖunya si ŋu nya ku ɖo la ko. . Le ŋutinya me la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

claim: “America kpɔ ice cream ƒe asitsatsa ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si sɔ gbɔ le ƒe 2020 me le Dukplɔla Trump ƒe kpɔkplɔ te, gake ga si susɔ ma trɔ zu asitsatsa ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ si nye dɔlar miliɔn 40.6 le Dukplɔla Biden ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe eŋu me.”
evidence: Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua tsɔ dzobibi fafɛ aɖe na amesi do ŋgɔ na Trump si lɔ̃a ice-cream, Joe Biden, eye wògblɔ be ekplɔ U.S. ice cream dɔwɔƒea to ganyawo ƒe agakpemɔ dzi. "America kpɔ ice cream ƒe asitsatsa ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si sɔ gbɔ le ƒe 2020 me le Dukplɔla Trump ƒe kpɔkplɔ te, gake ga si susɔ ma trɔ zu asitsatsa ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ si nye dɔlar miliɔn 40.6 le Dukplɔla Biden ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe eŋu me," U.S. Asitsa Teƒenɔla ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ŋlɔ le July 20 dzi le X. The post included a chart that shows the U.S. ice cream trade deficit with Japan, South Africa, the European Union, Brazil, Canada kple Turkey. U.S. ice cream ƒe asitsatsa ƒe dadasɔ trɔ ŋutɔ le ƒe 2021 me, si nye ƒe si me Biden xɔ zi dzi. Asitsatsa ƒe dadasɔ trɔ le se nu be enye nu gbegblẽ — si fia be nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ sɔ gbɔ wu esiwo wotsɔ yi duta — le ƒe 2022 me eye wògakpɔtɔ le nenema tso ɣemaɣi. Gake dɔwɔƒea ŋuti nunyalawo xlɔ̃ nu be U.S. ice cream siwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ nye U.S. ice cream siwo katã woɖuna le U.S. ƒe akpa sue aɖe ko, eye esiwo wotsɔ yi duta nye U.S. ice cream siwo katã wowɔna ƒe akpa sue aɖe ko. Asitsatsa ƒe tɔtrɔa ƒe akpa gãtɔ tso nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ ƒe dzidziɖedzi gbɔ. Nusiwo wotsɔ ɖoa ​​duta ƒe akpa gãtɔ metrɔ tso ƒe 2020. Eye cherry si le etamea? Eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be masɔmasɔ le atike siwo woatsɔ ade hatsotso me be wonye "ice cream" ŋu hã kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe nyatakakawo dzi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyatakaka siwo ŋu U.S. Asitsatsa Teƒenɔla ƒe dɔwɔƒea ƒo nu tsoe la hã lɔ "tsikpe si woate ŋu aɖu," si eŋutinunyala aɖewo (kple nyinotsi-taʋlilawo) gblɔ be medze anye ice cream o. Tsikpe si woate ŋu aɖu ɖeɖe ɖa ɖee fia be "U.S. nye dukɔ si tsɔa nu yina duta to vovototo gã aɖe si nye ($193 miliɔn) alo +85% si lolo wu le asixɔxɔ nu," Dukɔwo Dome Notsi Nuɖuɖu Habɔbɔ ƒe Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã Matt Herrick gblɔ na PolitiFact to e-mail dzi. Tso ƒe 1995 va ɖo ƒe 2020 me la, ice cream ƒe asitsatsa ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si sɔ gbɔ wu le U.S., si tso abe dɔlar miliɔn 20 va ɖo abe dɔlar miliɔn 160 ene, abe alesi Observatory of Economic Complexity, si nye ganyawo ŋuti nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si le Internet dzi gblɔe ene. Amesiwo ƒlea nu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye Mexico eye Saudi Arabia kple Canada kplɔe ɖo. Le ƒe 2021 me la, ga si susɔ ma bu kloe, eye le ƒe 2022 kple 2023 me la, U.S. tsɔ ice cream ƒe asitsatsa ƒe ga si nye dɔlar miliɔn 92 kple dɔlar miliɔn 33. Ne èkpɔe gbã la, edze abe nuɖuɖu siwo wofa tsikpe me tsɔtsɔ tso duta meɖea vi o ene. Notsiŋutinunyala Betty Berningat si le HighGround Dairy gblɔ be: “Nu siwo wotsɔ fridzi kple esiwo wofa tsikpe me ɖoɖo ɖe duta xɔ asi ŋutɔ.” "Mexico ye nye teƒe vevitɔ kekeake si U.S. nyinotsiwo ɖoa duta." Gake U.S. kple Europa dɔwɔƒe geɖe ƒo nu tso xexeame katã ƒe asiwo ŋu. Herrick gblɔ be: "Nuƒlelawo ate ŋu adi hã be yewoaɖu nuɖuɖu tɔxɛ aɖe si wowɔ ɖe dukɔ bubu ƒe atsyã nu alo wonya be etso dukɔ bubu me." Italy, si nye afisi wodzi gelato le, ye nye United States ƒe ice cream si wotsɔ tso duta vɛ ƒe dzɔtsoƒe ɖeka kolia si lolo wu fifia. Italytɔwo ƒe ice cream siwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ dzi ɖe edzi wu zi gbɔ zi atɔ̃ tso abe dɔlar miliɔn 12 ene va ɖo dɔlar miliɔn 65 kloe le ƒe 2020 kple 2021 ɖeɖe dzaa dome, hafi wòɖiɖi vie le ƒe 2023 me, si nye ƒe mamlɛtɔ si ŋuti nyatakakawo li. Esia ƒe ɖewo tso nuƒlelawo ƒe didi be yewoaƒle pint tɔxɛwo ƒe dzidziɖedzi gbɔ. Mordor Intelligence, si nye xexeame katã ƒe asitsatsa ŋuti numekuku dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be "adzɔnuwo ƒe nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ kple woƒe asixɔxɔ dede wo ŋu" va zu nu vevi aɖe le U.S. ice cream dɔwɔƒea. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be: “Nɔnɔme sia dzena vevietɔ le pint ƒe nunana siwo ƒe asi bɔbɔ kple nu yeye siwo woxatsa ɖekaɖeka siwo kpɔa nuɖuɖu viviwo kple woƒe akpa aɖewo dzi ɖuɖu ƒe didiwo siaa gbɔ ƒe dzidziɖedzi me.” Be woaɖo pint la gbɔ: Afisiae wowɔa ice cream si woɖuna le United States ƒe akpa gãtɔ, ke menye le duta o. Trump dziɖuɖua le akɔntabubuwo xɔm tso U.S. ice cream dɔwɔƒea ƒe akpa sue aɖe ko me. U.S. Agbledenyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be U.S. ice cream wɔlawo ƒo ice cream galɔn biliɔn 1.31 le ƒe 2024. Esia lɔ ice cream si wozãna edziedzi, ice cream si me ami mesɔ gbɔ ɖo o kple esi me ami mele o, sherbet kple yogurt si wofa tsikpe me ɖe eme. Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple esia la, U.S. tsɔ ice cream deŋgɔ galɔn miliɔn 2.35 tso duta vɛ le ƒe 2024 me — that’s 0.18% of the amount produced domesticed, Herrick said. U.S. ɖo ice cream galɔn miliɔn 16.4 ɖe duta le dukɔa me, si hã nye ice cream galɔn biliɔn 1.31 ƒe akpa sue aɖe — si wu 1% vie. Herrick si le Dukɔwo Dome Notsi Nuɖuɖu Habɔbɔ me gblɔ be factoring in ice cream mixes, excluding "edible ice" products Nuxlɔ̃ame bubu si ku ɖe dukɔwo dome asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu: Metsɔ "mixes," si trɔa xexlẽme bliboa ɖe eme o. Wozãa ice cream siwo wotsaka tsɔ wɔa ice cream shakes kple nusiwo wotsɔa nuɖuɖu fafɛ wɔe, eye woawoe nye U.S. ice cream siwo wotsɔna ɖoa duta ƒe akpa gã aɖe. Herrick gblɔ be: “Nyatakaka teƒe mawo dede eme atrɔ nɔnɔmetata la ŋutɔ.” "Togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be ice cream si wozãna tsã kple ice si woate ŋu aɖuna ɖe duta dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ e."

claim: Vance Boelter, si wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu be eda tu Democratic Minnesota nutome sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ eve kple wo srɔ̃wo le June 2025 me (atsu kple asi ɖeka ku), la, Democratic Minnesota Dziɖuɖumegã Tim Walz tia aɖaŋuɖoha aɖe ɣeaɖeɣi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Esi wònye be Democrattɔwo ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã tsãtɔ Mark Dayton ye tia Boelter ɖe dɔdzikpɔha la me gbã le ƒe 2016 me ta la, le nyateƒe me la, Walz gaɖoe le ƒe 2019 me hena zimenɔɣi evelia, si wu enu le January 2023. Wogblɔ be Boelter ŋutɔ menye Democrattɔ o, eye Walz ƒe dɔwɔƒea ɖo kpe edzi be nutodziɖula la medoa go kple amesiwo di be yewoaɖoe hafi tia wo o. Le June 2025 ƒe domedome la, nya aɖe te kaka be Vance Boelter, amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo be eda tu Minnesota Democratic dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ eve kple wo srɔ̃wo le June 14 lia dzi la, Democratic Dukplɔla Tim Walz tiae ɣeaɖeɣi be wòanye Dukplɔla ƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Srɔ̃tɔ siwo ŋu woɖo taɖodzinu ɖo la dometɔ ɖeka ku. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Ðe esia nye dukɔa ƒe nutsyɔtsyɔ deto be woatsɔ akpɔ woawo ŋutɔ tɔ taa? Míebia be woawɔ nu le gaglãgbe—ÐE MANIFESTO LA ÐE FIFIA! Ame 4,600 ye wɔ nu ɖe ​​nyatakaka sia ŋu eye ame 1,300 gbugbɔ mae le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. Nyaŋuɖola geɖe bui be efia be Walz nye amewuwuawo ƒe akpa aɖe. Ame ɖeka gblɔ be: "Ga atɔ̃ gblɔ be Walz hã le nyaa me tẽ." Nya sia dze le Facebook nyatakaka bubuwo me. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ didim be yewoaɖo kpe nyatakaka siawo dzi. Nyateƒee, Boelter, si xɔ ƒe 57, nɔ anyi abe Dudzikpɔla ƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔha me tɔ ene. Nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Dec. 9, 2019 dzi (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) tso Walz ƒe dɔwɔƒea ɖe gbeƒã amesiwo woɖo ɖe habɔbɔa me ƒe ŋkɔwo, eye Boelter hã nye wo dometɔ ɖeka. Woɖoe be eƒe ɖoɖoa awu enu le Jan. 2, 2023. Dɔdzikpɔha ƒe kpekpe ƒe nuŋlɔɖi yeyetɔ kekeake siwo Snopes ate ŋu akpɔ si me eƒe ŋkɔ hã le la tso Oct. 26, 2022. Walz tsɔ ame bubu ɖo eteƒe le board la me le March 2023. Gake wogblɔ be Boelter ƒe 2019 ƒe ɖoɖo si Walz ɖo la nye ame gbugbɔɖoɖo. The Minnesota Star Tribune gblɔ be, Dziɖuɖumegã tsãtɔ Mark Dayton (abe Walz, si nye Democrattɔ ene) ye tia Boelter zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 2016 me. Woti Dayton le ƒe 2011 me eye wòdzo le zi dzi le ƒe 2019 me, esime Walz xɔ dɔa. Daily Beast ma ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe lɛta aɖe si Walz de asi si wodzra ɖo ɖe Minnesota nutome ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe. Snopes do ka kple Dudzikpɔla ƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔha ƒe dɔwɔlawo, eye wogbe be yewomagblɔ nya aɖeke o. Walz ƒe dɔwɔƒea ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo eŋu, eye wògblɔ nya siwo ƒo xlãe geɖe ku ɖe dɔdzikpɔhaa ƒe ameɖoɖowo ŋu (woaƒo nu tso esia ŋu emegbe). Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Habɔbɔwo li le nuto vovovowo me le U.S. Woƒe dɔe nye be woatu ŋutetewo ɖo, atsɔe asɔ kple ganyawo ƒe ŋgɔyiyi, eye woawɔ ɖoɖo siwo woawɔ atsɔ aɖo gadodo ƒe nu vevitɔwo. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, woate ŋu aɖo aɖaŋu le hehenana dɔwɔla aɖe si le nutoa me ŋu be woakpɔ dɔwɔƒe siwo dea ga le nutoa me ƒe nuhiahiãwo gbɔ. Star Tribune gaka nya ta, eye wòyɔ habɔbɔa me tɔ aɖe si ŋkɔ womeyɔ o, be togbɔ be Boelter nye Democrattɔwo ƒe nutodziɖula eve siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo ƒe ametia hã la, habɔbɔa nye akpa eve me tɔ. Minnesota Star Tribune ka nya ta le nyati bubu me be Boelter ŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yeada akɔ abe Republicantɔ ene eye esi wòyɔ eƒe xɔmehati David Carlson ƒe nyawo be yeda akɔ zi mamlɛtɔ na U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump, si nye Republicantɔ. Nyatakaka vovovowo gblɔ be edze hã be Boelter nye nyanyuigblɔla Kristotɔ eye wòtsi tre ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋu vevie. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, le Star Tribune ƒe nya nu la, togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be Walz gaɖo Boelter ɖe dɔdzikpɔha la me hã la, eya ŋutɔ menyae o, le nyatakakatsoƒe aɖe si ŋkɔ womeyɔ o si le Walz ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nya nu (nyatakaka aɖe si Snopes meɖo kpe edzi le eɖokui si o). Dudzikpɔla ƒe dɔwɔƒeae kpɔa ame alafa geɖe ɖoɖo ɖe aɖaŋuɖoha kple dɔdzikpɔha vovovowo me. Snopes kpɔe be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Habɔbɔa me tɔwo nye ame 58 le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. Ŋusẽ mele habɔbɔ vovovo siawo si be woawɔ se o. "Esiawo nye gotagome habɔbɔ siwo womexea fe na o, siwo mekpɔa gome le eme o, siwo sewɔtakpekpea ɖona eye Dudzikpɔla mebiaa gbe ame siwo di be yewoaxɔ dɔa o," Walz ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe si woɖo ɖe e-mail me. "Menye ame siwo woɖo ɖe ɖoƒe aɖe le Dukplɔla ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo me o. Ŋusẽ aɖeke hã mele wo si be woawɔ nyametsotsowo, atrɔ sewo, alo awɔ ɖoɖowo o."
