Aʋatsonya si wogblɔ be France ƒe La Jument akaɖiti si xea fe na dɔwɔlawo miliɔn geɖe gakpɔtɔ li le Internet dzi



							Wotae le July 23, 2025 le 17:37




							
							4 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Caleigh KEATING, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP USA ƒe agbalẽ





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


				Nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi be France dziɖuɖua gblɔ be yeaxe dɔlar miliɔn 1.2 ƒe sia ƒe ɖe ame aɖe si awɔ dɔ le La Jument akaɖiti xɔŋkɔ si le Brittany ƒuta la kaka ɖe internet dzi. Gake wowɔ akaɖiti sia le wo ɖokui si tso ƒe 1991 me -- eye Franseawo ƒe ƒudzidɔwɔƒe aɖe kple tsaɖilawo ƒe habɔbɔ si kpɔa Ouessant ƒukpo dzi, afisi akaɖia le la siaa gblɔ na AFP be alakpa nya si wogblɔ la nye.
			


"Dɔ sia xea dɔlar miliɔn 1.2 ƒe sia ƒe gake ame aɖeke melɔ̃na be yeawɔe o," nuŋɔŋlɔ si woŋlɔ ɖe nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woma le Instagram dzi gblɔ.July 6, 2025 ƒe nyatakaka si xɔ ame 24,000 kple edzivɔ siwo lɔ̃e la, ƒe nɔnɔmetata wɔdɔɖeamedzi geɖe siwo ɖe ƒutsotsoe aɖe si le gegem ɖe akaɖitia ŋu fia."Franse Ƒudzinyawo Gbɔkpɔha la ʋli ƒe geɖe be yeatsɔ dɔwɔlawo awɔ dɔ le nyatakakaa me, togbɔ be ɣletiviŋutinunya ƒe fetu le eŋu hã," the post ƒe nyawo xlẽ. "Nyatakaka aɖe si tso Le Monde gblɔ alesi woɖea ame ɖokui ɖe aga vevie, afɔku si tso atsiaƒua gbɔ ɣesiaɣi, kple susu me nusiwo ame ɖeɖe nɔnɔ le nɔnɔme siwo me afɔku le ŋutɔ me gblẽna le ame ŋu tsitotsito.""Ɣeaɖewoɣi la, susu ƒe akɔdzeanyi xɔ asi wu fetu xɔxɔ," nyatakakaa gblɔ kpee, eye wòyɔ La Jument ƒe akaɖiti la be "afɔku le xexeame dometɔ ɖeka."

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe Instagram dzi ƒe screenshot si woɖe le July 18, 2025 dzi
					
Nya mawo tɔgbe siwo gbugbɔ gblɔ nya ma ke na ame akpe geɖe siwo lɔ̃e le mɔ̃wo abe TikTok, X, Facebook kple YouTube ene dzi. Nyaʋiʋlia he nyati siwo wogblɔ be wogblɔ ɖoƒea kple fetu la tsitotsito hã vɛ, siwo wota ɖe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dzi boblododowo yɔ fũu siwo ɖi axa siwo dzi AFP lé ŋku ɖe nyateƒenyawo ŋu va yi le esi wòtutu nyatakaka totro siwo tso clickbait dzi be woakpɔ ga tso boblododowo me ta.Kaɖiti sia si wotu tso ƒe 1904 va ɖo ƒe 1911 me la xɔ ŋkɔ le ƒe 1989 me esi Franse fotoɖela Jean Guichard ɖe foto wɔnuku aɖe tso dzɔla Théodore Malgorn si le tsitre ɖe akaɖitia ƒe ʋɔtru nu esime ƒutsotsoe aɖe ƒo xlã xɔa. Fotoa xɔ fetu evelia le "Dzɔdzɔme" ƒe hatsotso me le ƒe 1991 Xexeame Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Foto hoʋiʋli me -- eye wozãe tsɔ wɔ alakpa Instagram nyatakaka la ƒe kpɔɖeŋu.Gake nya siwo wogblɔ be woaxɔ dɔlar miliɔn 1.2 ƒe fetu na amesiwo le dzɔla la dzi la nye alakpa.The official history of the lighthouse on the Interregional Directorate of the North Atlantic Sea Western Channel (DIRM NAMO) website says La Jument has been automated since 1991 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia). DIRM NAMO gblɔ na AFP le July 21 ƒe e-mail me be: "Dzɔla aɖeke mele La Jument ƒe akaɖiti la gbɔ alo le Franseawo ƒe akaɖiti aɖeke me o." "Fransetɔwo ƒe akaɖitiwo katã nye esiwo wowɔna le wo ɖokui si ƒe geɖe. Dɔwɔla siwo tso 'akaɖitiwo kple akaɖiwo' ƒe dɔwɔƒea va srãa wo kpɔna edziedzi be yewoalé be na wo ahawɔ wo woazu egbegbe tɔ."Nya sia gagblɔ nya aɖe si dziɖuɖumegã la gbe le Internet dzi esime nya ma tɔgbe kaka ɖe TikTok dzi le ƒe 2024 me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).A search for open positions within DIRM NAMO yielded no results for prospective employment at the lighthouse (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).Tsaɖiɖi Dɔwɔƒe si le Ouessant Ƒukpo dzi -- si nye teƒe si le ɣetoɖoƒe wu le France dugã me afisi akaɖitia le -- hã gblɔ be nya si wogblɔ la nye "aʋatso." "Ame aɖeke meli si wɔ dɔ le La Jument ƒe akaɖiti me tso ƒe 1991 me kple fetu si woxɔna ɣemaɣi o."

claim: White House ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Karoline Leavitt ɖe "nyateƒea" ɖe go tso WNBA fefewɔla Brittney Griner ƒe ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye ŋu, eye WNBA ɖe gbeƒãe be "woadoe kpɔ be woadoe kpɔ le gbɔdɔdɔ me."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe internet dzi le August 2025 me gblɔ be White House ƒe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Karoline Leavitt ɖe "nyateƒea" ɖe go tso WNBA fefewɔla Brittney Griner, si ƒoa bɔl na Atlanta Dream ƒe ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye ŋu. Zãla siwo ma nya la hã gblɔ be WNBA ɖe gbeƒã "gbɔdɔdɔ dodokpɔ" si nye sedziwɔwɔ na ligi la ƒe basketball ƒe ɣeyiɣi si gbɔna. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Nyati aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe blog aɖe dzi si wotsɔ kadodo ɖo le nyaŋuɖoɖoawo me, abe alesi nyati bubu siwo gblɔ nya ma ke le Facebook kple Threads (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) hã nɔ ene. (Egbea le Amerika/Facebook) Nya ma xlẽ be: ÐEKO ESIA dzɔ: Karoline Leavitt yɔ Brittney Griner be 's**' esi wòke ɖe nyateƒe si ku ɖe eƒe ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye ŋu vɔ megbe. Le afɔɖeɖe wɔnuku aɖe si ŋu nyaʋiʋli le me la, Nyɔnuwo ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Basketball Αssociation (WNBΑ) ɖe gbeƒãe be yewoawɔ S3X dodokpɔ si wòle be woawɔ na fefewɔlawo katã tso ƒe si gbɔna me. Nyametsotso sia va le numedzodzro siwo ƒo xlã ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye kple amewo katã ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le nyɔnuwo me... Ke hã, Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ƒe didiwo mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si ka nya ta tso Leavitt ŋu si ɖe nusi ŋu woke ɖo tso Griner ƒe ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye alo gbɔdɔdɔ ŋu, alo tso WNBA ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe "gbɔdɔdɔ dodokpɔ si wòle be woawɔ" ŋu o. Anye ne nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔwo agblɔ nyaʋiʋli si wogblɔ be wole edzi yim la ŋu nya geɖe hafi, nenye be enye nyateƒe. Ke boŋ amesiame si ŋlɔ ŋutinyaa la to ŋutinya bliboa vɛ be enye ŋutinya alafa geɖe ya teti siwo ku ɖe nya siwo me dzo le le U.S. dunyahehe ƒe xexeame la dometɔ ɖeka. Ame mawo —siwo dome ezãla aɖewo ya teti siwo le Vietnam hã le, le Facebook ƒe "axadzidzedze" ƒe tab nu—ɖoe be yewoakpɔ boblododo ƒe ga le nyati siwo woda ɖe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo do ƒome tso nyatakaka siwo míeyɔ va yi me la dzi. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, nyatakaka aɖewo, siwo dome video aɖe hã le, ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo menye nyateƒe o siwo ezãlawo tsɔ dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ nunya wɔwɔe wɔe la fia. White House gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be, "Edze ƒã be alakpae esia nye." Míeɖo e-mail ɖe WNBA hã be míabia nenye be edi be yeama nya aɖe si ku ɖe nya sia ŋu, kpakple kadodo to Messenger dzi kple ezãla siwo le Today in America ƒe axa dzi kpɔm, eye míawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo míeyɔ va yi ƒe didiwo kpɔe be ezãlawo do nya si menye nyateƒe o la ɖe ŋgɔ tso June 2025 ya teti. "Esi menɔ sue la, woxɔm godoo le nye lolome kple nye gbe si me goglo ɣesiaɣi ta." Griner, si ƒe kɔkɔme nye afɔ 6, sentimeta 9 fifia hã gblɔ be amewo bu vodadatɔe be enye ŋutsu le nyɔnuwo ƒe nugododeƒewo. Le February 2022 me la, Russia dziɖuɖumegãwo lé Griner le esi wòtsɔ gbekui ƒe vape-tuwo yi dukɔa me ta. Russia ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖe tso afia nɛ be wòanɔ dɔsesẽwɔsaɖa me ƒe enyi. Le ɣleti 10 megbe la, Russia lɔ̃ be yeaɖe asi le eŋu ɖe U.S. ƒe asiɖeɖe le Russiatɔ aʋawɔnudzrala Viktor Bout ŋu ta. Be Snopes naxlẽ nu geɖe la, egblɔ nya bubu si menye nyateƒe o tso Griner ŋu ​​va yi, eye wògblɔ be yexɔ dɔlar 62,000 le sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ƒe tsɔtsɔke me togbɔ be yeƒe kesinɔnuwo nye dɔlar miliɔn 140 hã.

claim: Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua “meɖe ga le Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒea ɖeɖeko o, ke eɖe ga le nusi woyɔna be NOAA hã me.”
evidence: Tsiɖɔɖɔ si dzɔ le Texas si wu ame 100 kple edzivɔ siwo dome nyɔnuviwo hã nɔ le dzomeŋɔli ƒe asaɖa aɖe me la he amewo ƒe susu ake ɖe dɔwɔwɔ dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ le dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒe si me Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe hã le ŋu. TikTok nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ le July 6 dzi gblɔ be Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe ga si Dukɔa ƒe Atsiaƒu Kple Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒea ɖa. Woɖe TikTok la ɖa le esi míedze míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro gɔme vɔ megbe, gake míekpɔe be woama videoa hã le X — eye nya si wogblɔ be woɖe ga le NOAA kple yame ƒe nɔnɔme dɔwɔƒea ɖa la, womae geɖe le mɔ̃ bubuwo dzi. "Nusita Texastɔwo menya be tsiɖɔɖɔ gã aɖe si wu ame 20 kple edzivɔ la ava yewo gbɔ o enye be menye Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Dɔwɔƒe ɖeɖekoe Trump dziɖuɖua ɖe ga le o ke boŋ nusi woyɔna be NOAA hã ... nu mawo evea siaa nye alesi míegblɔa yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe nudzɔdzɔwo abe esiawo ene ɖi," videoa ƒe nuŋlɔla gblɔ. Yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒe si naa yame ƒe nɔnɔme kple yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nyatakakawo, nyagblɔɖiwo kple nuxlɔ̃amewo la nye NOAA ƒe dɔwɔƒe adeawo dometɔ ɖeka. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe NOAA ƒe dɔwɔlawo dzi kpɔtɔ le nyaƒoɖeamenu si tso Dziɖuɖua ƒe Dɔwɔwɔ Nyuie Dɔwɔƒe gbɔ ta, gake womeɖe ga le NOAA me keŋkeŋ o. Eye togbɔ be Trump do susua ɖa be woaɖe gazazã dzi akpɔtɔ wòakeke ta — anye 28% ƒe gazazã dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ le NOAA ƒe dɔwɔƒewo katã hã la — Congress meda akɔ ɖe gazazã dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ mawo dzi o. Eye Trump ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖoa na Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Dɔwɔƒea ƒe gazazã dzi ɖe edzi 6.7%. Matt Lanza, si nye yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nunyala si le Houston kple The Eyewall, si nye ahomya kple yame ƒe nɔnɔme sesẽwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe nuŋlɔla gblɔ na PolitiFact be: "Togbɔ be dziɖuɖua meɖe ga le NWS alo NOAA me o hã la, ele edom ɖa le ƒe 2026 me be woaɖe dɔwɔƒea ƒe numekuku ƒe alɔdze veviwo dzi akpɔtɔ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Yame Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe, si nye numekuku ƒe aba vevi aɖe." "Nudokpɔƒe geɖe siwo wɔa nyagblɔɖi dɔwɔnuwo kple numekuku siwo wozãna tsɔ naa nyagblɔɖi nanyo ɖe edzi hã akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe edzi. Ðoɖo yeye si wodo ɖa la agblẽ NOAA ƒe numekuku ŋutete me." TikTok ƒe nyatakakaa wɔla gblɔ na PolitiFact le gbedasi aɖe me be nya "defunded" tɔtɔ gake efia asi nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe gazazã dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu. Wode dɔ asi na Trump’s Department of Government Efficiency be woaɖe dɔwo dzi akpɔtɔ le dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu bliboa me. The New York Times kpɔe be tso May ƒe domedome la, NOAA ƒe dɔwɔlawo dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ 11%, eye wodzudzɔ dɔa wɔwɔ abe 800 ene eye woƒle 500 hã le eme. Dɔwɔla mawo siwo dzi woɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe afã kloe tso yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒea gbɔ. Subɔsubɔdɔa ɖe dodokpɔdɔwɔla 100 dzi kpɔtɔ, eye 500 xɔ nuƒleƒewo, Tom Fahy, Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Dɔwɔƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe dɔdzikpɔla gblɔ le July 7. Ema nye dɔwɔla siwo dzi woɖe kpɔtɔ abe 17% ene na yame ƒe nɔnɔme dɔwɔƒea, Fahy gblɔ. Texas Tribune ka nya ta be le dɔwɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔa ƒe nyatakakawo nu la, Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Texas dɔwɔƒe siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe nuto siwo me tsi ɖɔ tso July 3-4 dzi la, xɔ dɔ ƒuƒlu esime tsidzadza dze dzadza le titina Texas: San Antonio ƒe nyagblɔɖidɔwɔƒea xɔ dɔ ƒuƒlu ade le ɖoƒe 26 katã dome eye San Angelo dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔwɔƒe ene nɔ ƒuƒlu le ɖoƒe 23 dome. Fahy gblɔ na The New York Times be San Antonio dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔ ƒuƒluwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nunyala si kpɔa nuxlɔ̃amenyawo gbɔ, si nye dɔwɔla si wotsɔ dɔ de asi na be wòawɔ ɖoɖo kple nutoa me dɔwɔƒe siwo kpɔa nudzɔdzɔ kpatawo gbɔ do ŋgɔ na tsiɖɔɖɔwo. Togbɔ be dɔwɔlawo menɔ ɔfisawo me bliboe o hã la, Lanza gblɔ na PolitiFact be "woƒe dɔ ƒuƒlu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme mele nusi sɔ gbɔ o." Trump xe mɔ ɖe dukɔa ƒe dumevi dzrowo xɔxɔ ɖe dɔ me katã nu esime wòxɔ dɔa — eye tso ɣemaɣi la, ekeke mɔxexeɖedɔ ma ɖe enu — gake White House ɖe asi le Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Dɔwɔƒea ŋu, si ɖe mɔ nɛ be wòaxɔ amewo ɖe dɔ me na ɖoƒe 126 le DOGE ƒe dɔa dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ megbe. "Dɔwɔla siwo sɔ nɔ mía si. Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya si sɔ nɔ mía si," Greg Waller, si nye subɔsubɔ ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ ƒe tsiŋutinunyala le yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒea ƒe West Gulf River Forecast Center le Fort Worth gblɔ na Texas Tribune. "Esiae nye be míenɔ míaƒe dɔa wɔm le míaƒe ŋutete ɖesiaɖe nu." Le nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe July 6 ƒe nyabiase siwo ku ɖe dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔwɔlawo ŋu ŋuɖoɖo me la, Trump gblɔ be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu mele dɔwɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe ƒomedodo kple tsiɖɔɖɔa ƒe afɔkuwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ dome me kum o. Eye Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Howard Lutnick, amesi kpɔa NOAA dzi gblɔ be gazazã dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ "megblẽ" yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒe vevi siwo le ƒuƒlu ɖi si gblẽ nu le ɖoɖowɔwɔ kpata ŋu o. Ŋkeke ɖeka megbe la, Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo ƒe Kplɔla Chuck Schumer si tso New York bia be Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe inspector general naku nu me "nenye be dɔwɔlawo ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ le nutoa me Dukɔa ƒe Yame ƒe Nɔnɔme Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe (NWS) ƒe dɔwɔƒe veviwoe na amewo kple nunɔamesiwo bu afɔku gã aɖe le tsiɖɔɖɔ si wu ame la me hã." Dukplɔla ƒe gazazã ŋuti ɖoɖo nye didiwo ƒe xexlẽdzesi — mehiã be Sewɔtakpekpea nawɔ ɖe edzi o. Eyata, togbɔ be Trump ƒe gaŋutiɖoɖo ƒe 2026 bu

claim: U.S. yameʋuwo ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Iran ƒe Fordow nuklia dɔwɔƒea ŋu
evidence: Le Iran kple Israel ƒe dzrewɔwɔa dome la, video aɖe si gblɔ be eɖe U.S. yameʋu si dze Iran ƒe Fordow nuklia dɔwɔƒe dzi fia la le kakam ŋutɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Video la ɖe wowó gã aɖe fia, eye wogblɔ be U.S. Yamesrafowo dze nuklia teƒe etɔ̃ dzi le Iran — Fordow, Natanz, kple Isfahan le kwasiɖa si va yi me.  Facebook zãla aɖe ŋlɔ nya si kaka ɖe amewo me kple nya si gbɔna la ɖe edzi be: ভাল লালি থাক, আমৰে বিশদ, আমলা পক্ষ, ইৰানের গৰ্ভৰুণ পূর্ণ পূর্ণ পূর্ণমণ গর্ভত..!!  (Eŋlisigbe me tɔ: Etsɔ zã, le Amerikatɔwo ƒe yameʋuʋu megbe la, nukpɔkpɔ si le Iran ƒe nuklia dɔwɔƒe vevi, Fordow..!!) Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si woŋlɔ ɖe afisia.  FACT CHECK NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Esi NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa nɔ videoa ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo didi le megbe la, wode dzesi nyatakaka aɖe si Britaintɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Metro, si woŋlɔ le September 18, 2024 dzi, si me woɖe video ma ke le. Abe alesi nyatakakaa gblɔe ene la, videoa ɖe Ukrainetɔwo ƒe yameʋu si me ame aɖeke mele o ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Russiatɔwo ƒe tu kple tudzraɖoƒe aɖe le Toropets, Russia, fia.  Esi míegadi nya vevi siwo sɔ la, míekpɔ nyatakaka geɖe siwo The New York Times kple Arab News ŋlɔ le ŋkeke ɖeka dzi. Nyatakaka siawo hã tsɔ videoa ƒe screenshot aɖe hã kpe ɖe eŋu eye woɖo kpe edzi be videoa ɖe Ukrainetɔwo ƒe yameʋu si me ame aɖeke mele o ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe aʋawɔnuwodzraɖoƒe aɖe si le Russia ƒe Toropets dzi fia, ke menye Iran o.  Toropets le Moscow ƒe dzieheɣetoɖoƒe gome abe kilometa 380 ene eye wòdidi tso Ukraine ƒe liƒo gbɔ abe kilometa 500 ene. Wogblɔ be Ukraine ƒe nyatakakaxɔlawo kple dɔwɔƒe tɔxɛ siwo wɔa dɔ tɔxɛwoe wɔ dɔa. Ukraine dziɖuɖumegã aɖe gblɔ be Iskander-tuwo, Tochka-U-tuwo, bɔmb siwo wotsɔna ƒua du, kple tu siwo wotsɔna ƒua gbe le nudzraɖoƒea.  Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kakaɖedzitɔe be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖe U.S. yameʋuɖoɖo ɖe Iran ƒe Fordow nuklia dɔwɔƒe ŋu fia la nye alakpa. claim: Russia Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Dmitry Medvedev gblɔ le June 2025 me be "dukɔ geɖe le klalo be yewoana yewo ŋutɔ yewoƒe nukliaʋawɔʋuwo Iran tẽ."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le June 22, 2025 dzi la, U.S. dze nuklia dɔwɔƒe etɔ̃ dzi le Iran. Gbemagbe ke la, nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖewo dzi — siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Reddit (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) — gblɔ be Russia Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Dmitry Medvedev ŋlɔ ɖe dutoƒo be, "Dukɔ geɖe le klalo be yewoana yewo ŋutɔ yewoƒe nukliaʋawɔʋuwo Iran tẽ." Nyatakaka geɖewo ƒo ƒu (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo) xɔ ame miliɔn geɖe ƒe ŋkuléleɖenuŋu. Nya siwo wogblɔ le etame ɖee fia be ezãla aɖewo xɔe se be aʋatso nya la nye alo be nya tɔxɛa medze le Medvedev ƒe nyatakaka gbãtɔa me o. Togbɔ be ezãla siawo ke ɖi hã la, Medvedev — si nye Russia ƒe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla teƒenɔla — gblɔ le dutoƒo nyateƒe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) be "dukɔ geɖe le klalo be yewoana yewo ŋutɔ yewoƒe nukliaʋawɔʋuwo Iran tẽ." Le nyatakaka siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo le X-kɔnta si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo me la, dukplɔla tsãtɔ ŋlɔ le June 22 dzi be: Emegbe ezãla geɖe siwo le nyaawo me bia tso Medvedev si be wòana eme nakɔ nenye be ema fia be Russia atsɔ nukliaʋawɔtuwo ana Iran, eye le nya aɖe si wògblɔ tsɔ kplɔe ɖo (si wodzra ɖo) le gaƒoƒo 24 kple edzivɔ megbe la, Medvedev gblɔ be esime "yebu fɔ" U.S. ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Iran ŋu la, Russia "meɖoe be yeana wo o nukliaʋawɔnuwo na Iran" ne míebu eŋu be Russia le Nukliaʋawɔnuwo Makaka Nubabla si me China kple Dziehe Korea hã kpɔ gome le la me. Le nya sia si woŋlɔ kplɔe ɖo me le June 23 lia dzi la, Medvedev he susu yi New START Nubabla hã dzi — nubabla si tso ƒe 2011 me le U.S. kple Russia dome si ɖo seɖoƒe na aʋawɔnu siwo woatsɔ adze ame dzi le aɖaŋu me eye wòlé wo me ɖe asi — be enye susu si lolo wu be "mele be míaʋli nya le amesi si nukliaʋawɔnuwo le wu ŋu godoo o." Le June 23 lia dzi la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖo nya ŋu le eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye Truth Social (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) dzi ɖe Medvedev ƒe nya si wògblɔ be dukɔ gbogbo aɖewo le klalo be yewoana nukliaʋawɔnuwo Iran ŋu. Eŋlɔ bena: “Mele be woawɔ nu ɖe ​​‘N nya’ [nuklia] ŋu le vome nenema gbegbe o,” hafi yi edzi kafu U.S. asrafowo le June 22 ƒe aʋawɔwɔ ɖe Iran ƒe nuklia teƒewo ŋu me. (Truth Social user @realDonaldTrump) U.S. Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance hã ɖo eŋu le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple ABC News le June 23 lia dzi me, hegblɔ be Medvedev ƒe nya la nye "nu wɔnuku" gake yemenya nenye be Medvedev ƒo nu ɖe ​​Putin ta loo alo ɖe Russia dziɖuɖua ta o (le ga 4:15 me).

claim: Nyatakakawo ɖe lɛta aɖe si U.S. Senyala Gã Pam Bondi ɖo ɖe FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kash Patel tso Epstein ƒe agbalẽwo ŋu le February 2025 me fia nyateƒe.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le July 2025 ƒe nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si tso U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe (DOJ) kple FBI gbɔ si gblɔ be gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe Jeffrey Epstein melé "asitsala ƒe ŋkɔwo" ɖe asi o — si to vovo na nya si wogblɔna ɖaa — hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla aɖewo ma lɛta aɖe si wogblɔ be egblɔ be etsi tre ɖe nusi dziɖuɖua ke ɖo la ƒe screenshot. U.S. Senyala Gãtɔ Pam Bondi ɖo lɛta si wogblɔ be woŋlɔ le Feb. 27, 2025 dzi la ɖe FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kash Patel, le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nya nu. Le lɛtaa me la, Bondi "lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yexɔ Epstein ƒe agbalẽ siwo me" gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe la ƒe "ame siwo wodo ka kplii ƒe ŋkɔwo kple amesiwo ŋu wowɔ nuvevii ƒe ŋkɔwo ƒe xexlẽdzesi le," Facebook zãla aɖe si ma lɛta si wogblɔ be ewɔ la gblɔ. Snopes xlẽlawo ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoabia be lɛta si tso Bondi gbɔ na Patel la nye nyateƒe hã. Bondi ɖo lɛta sia si ku ɖe Epstein ƒe faɛlwo ŋu ɖe Patel nyateƒe, DOJ ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖee fia. Eyata míebu nya si wogblɔ be enye nyateƒe. Wotsɔ lɛtaa ƒe kɔpi kpe ɖe DOJ ƒe nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Feb. 27, 2025 dzi, si me dɔwɔƒea ɖe gbeƒãe le be Bondi, le ɖekawɔwɔ me kple FBI, ɖe nya ɣaɣlawo ɖa eye wòɖe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Epstein ŋu ɖe go. Snopes tsɔ lɛta si woma le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe tɔtrɔ sɔ kple lɛta si woma le DOJ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, eye wòkpɔe be nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo le gɔmeɖeɖe eveawo siaa me la sɔ. Fail siwo woɖe ɖe go le February 2025 me la meɖe nu yeye aɖeke ɖe go tso Epstein nyaa ŋu o elabena wodze le dutoƒo ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe to ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakakawo dzi. DOJ lɔ̃ ɖe esia dzi le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ me, eye wògblɔ be nuŋlɔɖi siwo "do go do ŋgɔ gake womeɖe ɖe go le ɖoƒe si woɖo ɖi gbeɖe o" le Epstein ƒe agbalẽ siwo woɖe ɖe go la me le dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ. Wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye kpeɖodziwo ƒe xexlẽdzesi, yameʋuɖoɖo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo, kadodogbalẽ si wogbugbɔ trɔ asi le kple amesiwo tsɔa asi ƒoa ame ƒe ŋkɔ siwo wogbugbɔ trɔ. Bondi xɔ nuŋlɔɖi siwo ade axa 200 le biabia aɖe si wòbia be woana faɛl siwo katã ku ɖe Epstein ŋu la ŋuɖoɖo me, le nyatakaka si woɖe ɖe go nu. Ke hã, "wona nyanyae emegbe tso nuŋlɔɖi siwo ku ɖe numekukua kple nyatsotso ŋu ƒe axa akpe geɖe siwo womeɖe ɖe go va yi o ŋu," nyatakaka si woɖe ɖe go la gblɔ. Le eƒe lɛta si Bondi ŋlɔ na Patel me la, eƒo nu tso nuŋlɔɖi siwo wogblɔ be bu la ŋu eye wòbia tso FBI si be woatsɔ "Epstein ƒe agbalẽ bliboa kple bliboe" ayi yeƒe dɔwɔƒe hafi ŋdi ga 8 naɖo le Feb. 28, 2025. Bondi de dɔ asi na Patel hã be wòaku nu me le nusita FBI mewɔ ɖe eƒe sedede si bia be woatsɔ Epstein ƒe agbalẽ bliboa dzi o. Bondi ŋlɔ ɖe lɛtaa me be: "Miatsɔ nyatakaka si me kɔ tso miaƒe nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo kple dɔwɔlawo ƒe afɔɖeɖe si wodo ɖa ŋu la vɛ nam le ŋkeke 14 me." Lɛta si tso Bondi gbɔ na Patel meƒo nu tso Epstein ƒe "asisiwo ƒe ŋkɔwo" ŋu tẽ gbeɖe o, togbɔ be egblɔ be exɔ "Epstein ƒe kadodowo ƒe ŋkɔwo" le eƒe biabia be woana Epstein ƒe faɛlwo ta hã. Le eƒe lɛtaa ƒe memama gbãtɔ me la, Bondi ŋlɔ (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi be): Hafi nàva ɖo zi dzi la, mebia be woana nyatakaka blibo kple blibo siwo ku ɖe Jeffrey Epstein ŋu. Le biabia sia ŋuɖoɖo me la, mexɔ nuŋlɔɖi siwo ade axa 200, siwo koŋ nye yameʋuɖoɖo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo, Epstein ƒe ame siwo wòƒo ka na ƒe ŋkɔwo, kple amesiwo ŋu wowɔ nuvevii ƒe ŋkɔwo kple telefon xexlẽdzesiwo. Woma kadodogbalẽ aɖe si ŋu wotrɔ asi le le DOJ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, le eƒe biabia be FBI natsɔ "Epstein ƒe faɛl blibo kple blibo" ayi yeƒe dɔwɔƒea me la, Bondi gblɔ be tsɔtsɔ yi na amewo alea alɔ "nuŋlɔɖiwo katã, nuŋlɔɖiwo, odio kple video siwo wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi, kple nusiwo ku ɖe Jeffrey Epstein kple eƒe asisiwo ŋu, eɖanye aleke wowɔ xɔ nyatakaka mawo o" (mía tɔ te gbe ɖe edzi). Lɛta bliboa si tso Bondi gbɔ na Patel la le ale: Dɔdzikpɔla lɔlɔ̃tɔ Patel, Hafi nàva ɖo dɔa me la, mebia be nàna nyatakaka blibo kple blibo siwo ku ɖe Jeffrey Epstein ŋu. Le biabia sia ŋuɖoɖo me la, mexɔ nuŋlɔɖi siwo ade axa 200, siwo koŋ nye yameʋuɖoɖo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo, Epstein ƒe ame siwo wòƒo ka na ƒe ŋkɔwo, kple amesiwo ŋu wowɔ nuvevii ƒe ŋkɔwo kple telefon xexlẽdzesiwo. Mebia nya enuenu be esiae nye nuŋlɔɖi bliboa si ɖo nye biabiaa ŋu eye FBI ka ɖe edzi nam enuenu be míexɔ nuŋlɔɖi bliboa. Etsɔ ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, mese tso teƒe aɖe be nuŋlɔɖi siwo ku ɖe Epstein ŋuti numekuku kple nyatsotso ŋu ƒe axa akpe geɖe le FBI ƒe Field Office si le New York si. Togbɔ be mebiaa nya enuenu hã la, FBI megblɔ be agbalẽ siawo li gbeɖe o. Esi mía kpli wò míeƒo nu etsɔ la, ewɔ nuku na wò abe alesi wòwɔ nuku nam ene be mese nyatakaka yeye sia. Kaka etsɔ, February 28, ŋdi ga 8:00 naƒo la, FBI atsɔ Epstein ƒe faɛl bliboa kple bliboe ayi nye ɔfis, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nuŋlɔɖiwo, nuŋlɔɖiwo, odio kple video siwo wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi, .

claim: Elon Musk da gbedasi aɖe ɖe X dzi si xlẽ be, "Ne menye nyee o la, anye ne Trump aɖu dzi le tiatia la me, Dems akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Aƒea dzi eye Republicantɔwo axɔ 51-49 le Sewɔtakpekpea me."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le masɔmasɔ siwo le dzidzim ɖe edzi le U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump kple mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla biliɔnla Elon Musk, si nye dziɖuɖudɔwɔla tɔxɛ tsã dome dome la, eŋlɔ ɖe X dzi le June 5, 2025 dzi la, gblɔ be yeɖe screenshot aɖe si tso Musk ƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe akɔntabubu si me wòxɔ kafukafu le le ƒe 2024 me gbugbɔgatia ta la fia. "Nye manɔmee la, anye ne Trump aɖu dzi le tiatia la me, Demtɔwo akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Aƒea dzi eye Republicantɔwo axɔ 51-49 le Sewɔtakpekpea me," wogblɔ be Musk ŋlɔ ɖe nyatakakaa me. Nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa ɖeka si @PopBase (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ma la xɔ ame miliɔn 2.1 kple edzivɔ ƒe kpɔkpɔ kabakaba eye ame 5,000 kpɔ gome le eme. Elon Musk gblɔ be Trump aɖu tiatia la me eya manɔmee:"Nye manɔmee la, Trump aɖu tiatia la dzi, Dems akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Aƒea dzi eye Republicantɔwo aɖu 51-49 le Sewɔtakpekpea me. [...] Akpedada ma tɔgbe" pic.twitter.com/Gw6FVqm7YM — Pop Base (@PopBase) June 5, 2025 Snopes searched Musk's verified X account and ke ɖe nya si gbɔna ŋu (wodzrae ɖo): (X zãla @elonmusk) Ekplɔe ɖo kple ŋuɖoɖo (si wodzra ɖo) si xlẽ be, "Akpedadamakpɔmakpɔ alea." Esi Musk da nya siwo le screenshot la me ta la, wogblɔ be nya si wogblɔ la sɔ. Musk nɔ ŋuɖoɖo nam nya aɖe si X zãla aɖe ŋlɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), amesi ma video aɖe si me Trump nɔ nu ƒom tso Musk ƒe tsitretsitsi ɖe GOP ƒe "Big Beautiful Bill" ŋu nyitsɔ laa ŋu. 🚨 YEYE: Trump ƒo nu tso Elon ƒe dodo ɖe BBB ŋu"Anye ne maɖu Pennsylvania dzi metsɔ le eme Elon o...Mete ɖe dzinye ŋutɔ le Elon ŋu. Enya se sia nyuie wu ame sia ame eye ɖeko wòto kuxi aɖe vɛ esi wòkpɔe be matso EV ƒe sededea me...Esi wòdzo la egblɔ be... pic.twitter.com/O0OfkqmOUd — Autism Capital 🧩 . Enya nusianu tso eŋu, kuxi aɖeke menɔ eŋu o. Kasia kuxi aɖe va do mo ɖa le eŋu eye esi wòva to kuxia vɛ esi wòkpɔe be ele be míaɖe EV ƒe sededea dzi akpɔtɔ elabena ema nye dɔlar biliɔn kple biliɔn geɖe," Trump gblɔ le videoa me. Musk ƒe ŋuɖoɖo na nyatakakaa gade dzo nya siwo wogblɔ be Musk kpe ɖe Trump ŋu "rig" le ƒe 2024 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatiawɔɣia me Wozã Starlink satellite network tsɔ xlẽ swing-state votes le ƒe 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔɣi, si na wòte ŋu "rig" alo "hack"e tsɔ da asi ɖe Trump dzi, eye wòbu nya mawo be gɔmeɖokpe aɖeke mele Musk ƒe nyatakakaa ŋu o la, White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi nya aɖe dzi be: "Esia nye nudzɔdzɔ wɔnublanui aɖe tso Elon gbɔ, amesi mekpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe One Big Beautiful ŋu o elabena ewɔe nenema metsɔ ɖoɖo siwo wòdi la de eme o. Dukplɔla la ƒe susu le se sia si nye ŋutinya me tɔ la dzi wɔwɔ kple míaƒe dukɔa gbugbɔgawɔ gã ŋu." Azɔ hã le June 5 lia dzi la, Musk da numekuku aɖe ɖe X dzi be ele be dunyaheha yeye aɖe nanɔ U.S. be wòanɔ "80% le titina" teƒe hã. Gatɔ gã la gblɔ hã le ŋkeke ma ke dzi be Trump dze le dziɖuɖu ƒe agbalẽ siwo womeɖe ɖe go o siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si wobu fɔe si ku ŋu."

claim: India-srafowo ƒe amegã Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yameʋu ade bu, eye asrafo 250 ku xɔsetaku le aʋa si wowɔ kple Pakistan nyitsɔ laa me.
evidence: Video aɖe si gblɔ be yeɖe Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ (COAS) ƒe Aʋafiagã Upendra Dwivedi fia wòɖo kpe edzi be Indiatɔwo ƒe yameʋu ade bu, eye asrafo 250 ku xɔsetaku le May 2025 ƒe asrafowo ƒe avuwɔwɔ kple Pakistan me la kaka ɖe Internet dzi.  Le videoa me la, wogblɔ be wose Aʋafia Dwivedi gblɔ be "...aʋa si kplɔe ɖo si ŋu míele ŋku lém ɖo la, ateŋu adzɔ kpuie eye ele be míadzra ɖo ɖe eŋu...Ele be woawɔ avu kple non-kinetic sia ɖekae. Míebu jet ade kple asrafo 250 xoxo gake míana ta gbeɖe o. Míasrɔ̃e. Míeɖe asi aɖewo le eme. Eyata nukae nye nusiwo woɖe le eme?..." Newschecker fact checked the video and found it to be wowɔ asitɔtrɔ le eŋu.  X asiléƒe geɖe siwo le Pakistan, siwo dome nɔnɔmetata siwo ŋu woɖo kpee hã le, ma dɔlékui la kple nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "India Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yebu yameʋu 6 kple asrafo 250 le aʋa si wowɔ kple Pakistan me, egblɔ be yele dzadzram ɖo ɖe aʋa si kplɔe ɖo si woawɔ kple Pakistan ŋu kpuie."  Screengrab from X post by @Jan_Achakzai Woateŋu akpɔ nya siawo tɔgbe le afisia, afisia kple afisia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Aʋatso Amul Ad Mocking Trump Tariffs Shared As Real Fact Check/Verification Nya vevi aɖe didi na "Army Chief" kple "six jets lost" le Google dzi mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo/ dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe asiɖeɖe le eŋu si tsɔ nya si wogblɔ be Aʋafiagã Upendra Dwivedi gblɔ o.    Emegbe míedi nya vevi siwo le nyatakaka klipi si kaka ɖe amewo dome la le Google Lens si fia mɔ mí yi nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe India Asrafowo ƒe YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi, si woŋlɔ le August 9, 2025. Eɖe Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ ƒe adrɛs le IIT Madras fia, si ɖee fia le nɔnɔme ƒe megbenya ma ke me abe alesi wòdze le nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo me ene.  Anɔ abe miniti 11 ene le videoa me la, míese COAS gblɔ be, "...non-kinetic quadrant nye nane si nàte ŋu adze egɔme egbea kple aʋa si gbɔna si míele ŋku lém ɖe eŋu la, ateŋu adzɔ kpuie eye ele be míadzra ɖo ɖe eŋu, abe alesi dɔdzikpɔla tsɔe do goe xoxo ene be le esia me la, ele be míawɔ aʋa sia ɖekae. Ele be míawɔ aʋa sia si menye kinetic o ɖekae. Eyata nukae nye nusiwo woɖe le eme. Be le dukɔ bliboa ƒe mɔnu anɔ afima na." the next war it is not the next military which will be fighting..." Screengrab from YouTube video by @ADGPIINDIANARMY Akpa la meƒo nu tso naneke si wogblɔ be India bu le aʋawɔwɔ kple Pakistan me ŋu o, si tsi tre ɖe video si kaka ɖe amewo dome ŋu.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Trump Tariff – India Ðe Atike Siwo Mebɔ O Siwo Woɖona Ðe United States Dzi Ðe Edzi Afã? Here's The Truth Behind 'News Report By Rajat Sharma' Eƒe nuƒoa ƒe akpa aɖee ANI News, si ƒe tsidzesi nye viral clip, ma le YouTube le August 11, 2025 dzi, hegblɔ be, "Le nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo le IIT Madras me la, Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ (COAS) Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi le gbedasi ɣaɣla aɖe me ɖee fia be India le dzadzram ɖo ɖe 'aʋa si kplɔe ɖo' kple esia ŋu." ate ŋu ‘adzɔ kpuie’."  Le miniti 1:28 ƒe dzesia me la, míese Asrafomegã la nɔ nya siwo míeyɔ ɖe etame la gblɔm. Klip sia hã, megblɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso alesi wogblɔ be ŋutsuwo kple mɔ̃wo bu le dzre siwo wowɔ kple Pakistan nyitsɔ laa me o, si ɖo kpe edzi be aʋatso odio aɖe tsɔ ɖe le COAS ƒe nuƒoa me be woatsɔ akaka alakpanya aɖe.  Wokpɔ AI ƒe Tɔtrɔwo Esi míedzro dɔlékui ƒe klipi la me nyuie la, míekpɔ tɔtrɔ le odio me le sɛkɛnd 18-24 dome le klipi la me, si sɔ kple nya si wogblɔ be wogblɔ. Aʋafia Dwivedi ƒe aɖu ƒe ʋuʋu hã dze abe ɖe mele dzɔdzɔme nu o ene, si fia be AI ƒe asitɔtrɔ le eŋu. Emegbe míedi akpa si le AI detection website Hive Moderation si ƒo nya ta be 99.9% ƒe kakaɖedzi blibo le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo me AI generated alo deepfake content le. Screengrab tso Hive Moderation nyatakakadzraɖoƒe AI ƒe nyatakakawo didi ƒe dɔwɔnu bubu Deepware hã ke ɖe "deepfake" ŋu le dɔlékui ƒe klipi la me. Newschecker ƒu du to odio si le Hiya Deepfake Voice Detector hã ŋu, si kpɔe be "anɔ eme be enye deepfake." (L-R) Screengrabs tso Deepware nyatakakadzraɖoƒe kple Hiya Deepfake Voice Detector dɔwɔnu No Such Remarks By Army Chief, Clarifies PIB Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le dziɖuɖua ƒe PIB hã de aflaga ɖe viral clip la dzi, hegblɔ be eɖe Aʋafia Dwivedi fia be elɔ̃ ɖe edzi be India bu jets 6 kple asrafo 250 le aʋa si wowɔ kple Pakistan me, abe "AI generated/deepfake," eye wòɖo kpe edzi be COAS megblɔ nya aɖeke ma tɔgbe o. Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe India Yamesrafowo ƒe Tatɔ Lɔ̃ Ðe Edzi Be Yebu Yameʋu 6 Le Aʋawɔwɔ Kple Pakistan Mea? Ao, Viral Clip Is Manipulated Conclusion Eyata wokpɔe be wotrɔ video si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si wogblɔ be India Asrafomegã la lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yebu yameʋuwo kple dɔwɔlawo le aʋawɔwɔ kple Pakistan me.  Dzɔtsoƒewo YouTube Video Tso @ADGPIINDIANARMY, Ɣletiŋkeke 9, 2025 YouTube Video Tso ANI News, Ɣletiŋkeke 11, 2025 Hive Moderation Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe Deepware Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe Hiya Deepfake Gbe Detect

claim: Conservative nyameɖela Charlie Kirk gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be ne vinyɔnuvi si xɔ ƒe 10 si fɔ fu le esi wodɔ egbɔ sesẽe megbe la, yeadi be wòadzi vidzĩa.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Biabia la nye nususugblɔ, togbɔ be vinyɔnuvi vidzĩ nɔ Kirk si ɣemaɣi hã. Esi woda tu agbalẽnyala Charlie Kirk si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe asi wòku le Sept. 10, 2025 dzi le wɔna aɖe me le Utah Valley Yunivɛsiti vɔ la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo nɔ nya gbogbo aɖewo siwo me nya siwo wogblɔ be Kirk gblɔ le la mam. Nya mawo dometɔ ɖeka si wogblɔ le nuƒolanɔƒe vovovowoe nye be Kirk gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be ne ye vinyɔnuvi si xɔ ƒe 10 si fɔ fu le esi wodɔ egbɔ sesẽe vɔ megbe la, yeadi be wòadzi vidzĩa. Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ nyatakaka bubuwo dim tso nya si wogblɔ be wogblɔ ŋu. Nya aɖe si Feminist News (@feminist_news_now) ma la Míekpɔe be nya la nye nyateƒe. Etso ƒe 2024 ƒe YouTube video aɖe si Jubilee ta si ƒe tanyae nye "Can 25 Liberal College Students Outsmart 1 Conservative?" Videoa nye gbãtɔ le nusiwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo woyɔna be "Surrounded" me, afisi wòle be ame ɖeka naʋli woƒe dzixɔsewo ta ahaʋli nya le wo ŋu na ame 20 kple edzivɔ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si lé dzixɔse siwo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu ɖe asi. (Ðeklemiɖelawo gblɔ be ɖoɖoa tsɔa gbeɖiɖi ƒe ɖuɖu ɖoa nɔƒe gbãtɔ wu nyaʋiʋli siwo me susu le eye be enaa mɔnukpɔkpɔ zazɛ̃nyahelawo). Kirk ʋli nya ene siwo wogblɔ le videoa me ta, eye wo dometɔ gbãtɔe nye "Fɔɖeɖe nye amewuwu eye ele be wòanye sedzidada." Wona miniti 20 ƒuƒoƒo si ƒo xlã Kirk be woaʋli nya le eŋu le nyatia ŋu. Esi wòsusɔ aɖabaƒoƒo etɔ̃ la, nyɔnu aɖe si woɖe be enye Maren la ɖɔ li nya si gbɔna kple Kirk. Wotrɔ asi le nuŋlɔɖia ŋu be eme nakɔ elabena Kirk kple Maren siaa ƒo nu tso wo nɔewo ŋu le teƒe aɖewo: MAREN: Eyata biabia ɖeka koe le asinye, ele — le go sia go me la, mèsusu be nya aɖeke li si me wòle be fuɖeɖe nanɔ se nu o? KIRK: Srɔ̃tɔ aɖewo ƒe nya siwo mebɔ kura o li — MAREN: OK, eyata èsusu be srɔ̃tɔ aɖewo ƒe nyawo li be ele se nu? KIRK: Ne vidzidɔ maɖe vidadaa ƒe agbe o, eye vidadaa ƒe agbe le afɔku me ŋutɔŋutɔ, si ŋu woʋlia nya le le OB-GYN-dɔdalawo ƒe xexlẽme si le dzidzim ɖe edzi dome la, ke ema koe nye nɔnɔme si me wòle be woaɖe mɔ ɖe fuɖeɖe ŋu le. Gake, enye nusi dzi woda asi ɖo le xexe si da megbe na agbe me be fuɖeɖe mehiã gbeɖe le atikewɔwɔ me o. MAREN: Enyo. Eyata ne vinyɔnuvi le asiwò eye wòxɔ ƒe 10 eye wodɔ egbɔ sesẽe, eye — KIRK: Enyo, vinyɔnuvi le asinye nyateƒe. MAREN: Lala, eye wòle vi dzi ge eye wòanɔ agbe, àdi be wòato ema me eye wòatsɔ eƒe amegbɔdɔla ƒe vidzĩa? KIRK: Enyo, esia nye nusi me kɔ ŋutɔ. MAREN: Ao, gake enye agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ si dzɔna ɖe ame geɖe dzi. KIRK: Ðe dzi ɖi, ŋuɖoɖoae nye ẽ, woadzi vidzĩa. MAREN: Oo, OK gã, esia nye tagbɔsesẽ. KIRK: Gake na magblɔ nusitae na wò. Ao, lée ɖe asi, na mabia nya aɖe wò. Ultrasound eve li — ɖeka nye vidzĩ si wofɔ le gbɔdɔdɔ sesẽe me, ɖeka nye vidzĩ si srɔ̃tɔ lɔ̃amewo fɔ fu. Wo dometɔ kae nye esi? [fia asi xɔa me godoo] MAREN: Míele mɔ kpɔm be atsu kple asi aɖe si lɔ̃ viwò vie ye fɔ fu viwònyɔnua. KIRK: Ame kae fɔ fu le afisia to gbɔdɔdɔ sesẽe me? Gblɔe nam be wo dometɔ kae fɔ fu to gbɔdɔdɔ sesẽe me? MAREN: Mènya o. KIRK: Nenema, amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo katãe eye amegbetɔwo katãe. MAREN: Gake ema mehiã o, gake ekuna ɖe viwònyɔnuvi si wòle be wòadzii eye ema awɔ funyafunyae le eƒe agbemeŋkekewo katã me ŋu. Ema axɔ ablɔɖe ɖesiaɖe si anɔ esi la le esi, ema agblẽ eƒe agbe me, atsi eye wòaku ɖe nu bubu ŋu. KIRK: Fuɖeɖe menye nuvlowɔwɔ si me fuɖeɖe mele o. Nya lae nye be, alesi wofɔ wòe meku ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi siwo nàkpɔ ŋu o. Ne ame aɖe si wofɔ fu le gbɔdɔdɔ sesẽe me zɔ mɔa ƒe axadzi la, menye abe ɖe womekpɔ Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo alo Ðɔɖɔɖo Evelia ƒe gomenɔamesiwo o ene. MAREN: Menye ame ma ŋue wòku ɖo o — KIRK: Nu vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake si woawɔ ɖe vinyɔnuvi ma ŋue nye be emegbe nàgblɔ be, "Hey, míayi aɖawu ame si le mewò la." MAREN: Womanya gɔ̃ hã o — abe, se. KIRK: Womanya oa? MAREN: Se, ɖo to, ɖo to. KIRK: Gake ɖe manye ŋutinya nyuitɔ be míagblɔ be nu gbegblẽ aɖe dzɔ eye míewɔ nu nyui aɖe le vɔ̃ɖinyenye ŋkume tsɔ wu be míagblɔ be míawɔ vɔ̃ eye emegbe míawu nuwɔwɔ la elabena míele pander na vɔ̃ɖinyenyea oa? Ao, nusi na Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo loloe nye be míewɔa nyui le vɔ̃ megbe, ke menye vɔ̃ ɖe vɔ̃ megbe o.

claim: Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro: WHO meda asi ɖe aƒeme atike na COVID-19 dzi o, don’t fall for misinformation
evidence: Togbɔ be míadi be míaxɔe ase be nane si le abe esia ene nye nyateƒe hã la, vaseɖe fifia la, womekpɔ atike alo atike aɖeke o, vevietɔ aƒeme atike si wɔa dɔ nyuie le dɔlékuia ɖeɖeɖa me o. WHO alo lãmesẽhabɔbɔ ma tɔgbe aɖeke hã meda asi ɖe wo dzi o. Nya la ƒo nu tso atike si wotsɔ nuɖanu bɔbɔewo abe turmeric, ginger kple anyitsi ene wɔ si ne wonoe ŋkeke atɔ̃ la, ate ŋu agbã dɔlékui ƒe kaka. Togbɔ be amesiawo katã ate ŋu awɔ dɔ abe dɔlékuiwutike nyuiwo ene (eye woakpe ɖe wo ŋu woawɔ avu kple vuvɔ gbegblẽ hã la), nyateƒe aɖeke mele nya si wogblɔ be aƒeme atike sia ate ŋu ada COVID-19 la me o.

claim: Govt of India le ga nam ƒome siwo ku COVID-19 - Woateŋu abia nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe viɖewo na Covid-19 ku le PMJJBY kple PMSBY ƒe ɖoɖowo te.
evidence: Wole gbedasi aɖe mam le hadome nyadzɔdzɔwo me le afisiafi kple nya si wogblɔ be woateŋu abia viɖe siwo le Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) kple Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) te na ku siwo do ƒome kple COVID-19. Nubiabia: Woateŋu abia viɖe siwo le PMJJBY kple PMSBY ɖoɖowo te na ku siwo do ƒome kple COVID-19. Nyateƒenya: Togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be PMJJBY ɖoɖoa ku ɖe COVID-19 ƒe ku ŋu hã la, nɔnɔme aɖewo li ku ɖe dzedze kple nubiabia ƒe ɖoɖoa ŋu. PMSBY ɖoɖoa kpɔa afɔkuwo ko gbɔ eye vaseɖe egbe la, nya yeye aɖeke meli ku ɖe COVID-19 ƒe dɔlélewo dede PMSBY me ŋu o.

claim: Le November 2025 me la, du aɖe si le Montana si da asi ɖe U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump dzi akpa gãtɔ la wɔ "ɖevigbɔdɔlawo ƒe dzo" be woatsɔ atɔ dzo MAGA ƒe adzɔnuwo.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Esi U.S. Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea nɔ dzadzram ɖo be yewoada akɔ atsɔ aɖe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe Jeffrey Epstein ŋu le November 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be Montana du aɖe si da asi ɖe Dukplɔla Donald Trump dzi akpa gãtɔ la le "ɖevigbɔdɔlawo ƒe dzobibi" wɔm be woatsɔ atɔ dzo Trump ƒe aflagawo kple kposɔwo siwo gblɔ be "Na Amerika Gã Again," nyagbɔgblɔ si dze MAGA gɔme ʋuʋu. Nya sia kaka esi Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dziɖuɖua Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ ɖe nuŋlɔɖi siwo wu 20,000 siwo ku ɖe Epstein nyaa ŋu ƒe hatsotso aɖe ɖe go, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye e-mail geɖe siwo woɖo ɖe Epstein kple esiwo tso Epstein gbɔ siwo ƒo nu tso Trump ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Facebook-dzesi aɖe da nya sia ɖe edzi le Nov. 14 dzi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), eye wokpɔ gome le eme wu 23,000 le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. The post read: BREAKING: Montana du aɖe si da asi ɖe Donald Trump dzi 89% ƒe ɖeka enye sia la le "Pedohile Bonfire" wɔna wɔm le woƒe dutoƒo tsaɖibɔ me le zã sia me na amesiame si di be yeava atɔ dzo yewoƒe Trump ƒe aflagawo kple MAGA-wuwo. Nyaʋiʋlia ƒe vovototowo kaka ɖe teƒe bubuwo le Facebook (si me Spaingbe hã le) kple le X kple Instagram dzi. Kpɔɖeŋu siwo woŋlɔ ɖi la dometɔ aɖeke megblɔ du si me wòle be dzoa nadzɔ le o. Edze abe ame aɖewo xɔe se be wɔnaa nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ ene, eye Snopes xlẽla geɖe ɖo e-mail ɖe mí be yewoabia be nyateƒee hã. Internet dzi didiwo mekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be woɖoe be nudzɔdzɔ sia tɔgbe nadzɔ, alo edzɔ, le Montana le November 2025. Ke boŋ, nya si wogblɔ tso MAGA merch dzodoƒe ŋu la dzɔ tso The Halfway Post (nudzraɖoƒe, nudzraɖoƒe) — nyatakakadzraɖoƒe kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo siwo ɖɔ eƒe emetsonuwo be enye fewuɖunya. Eƒe Nyawo ƒe axa si woxlẽ (wodzrae ɖo): Nyee nye Dash MacIntyre, nukokoedonamela, fewuɖula, kple hakpanyaŋlɔla tso St. Louis. Meɖo The Halfway Post be matsɔ aɖu fewu le Donald Trump ŋu. Nyemegblɔa nyateƒenyawo o, menaa wo nyona ɖe edzi elabena nukokoedoname nye cathartic le fasitɔwo ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo me. Eƒe nyati si ku ɖe dzo si wowɔ le Montana du aɖe me ŋu hã ƒo nu tso fewuɖunya siwo me kɔ ŋu. Halfway Post ƒe ŋutinya le fewuɖunyawo ŋɔŋlɔ kple wo toto me. Le nya sia me la, edze abe exɔ gbɔgbɔ tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖewo siwo wogblɔ be wodzɔ le July 2025 me, siwo me wogblɔ be Trump ƒe akpadzinɔlawo tɔ dzo MAGA ƒe asitsanuwo tsɔ ɖe woƒe dziku ɖe alesi Trump nɔ Epstein ƒe nya la gbɔ kpɔm ŋu gblɔ ene. Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, nya bubuwo kaka be amewo le woƒe MAGA-wuwo fiãm le November 2025 ƒe Epstein ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ƒe dodo megbe. Snopes meɖo kpe edzi be nya siawo nye nyateƒe alo afisi wogblɔ be wodzɔ le o. Snopes ƒo nu tso fewuɖunya mawo tɔgbe siwo tso The Halfway Post gbɔ ŋu va yi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya si wogblɔ be Republican sewɔlawo ƒe kasɛt siwo me Trump nɔ kuku ɖem, nɔ zãnu nam, nɔ ŋɔdzi dom nɛ eye wònɔ avi fam le esi woda akɔ be woaɖe Epstein ƒe agbalẽawo ɖe go ta. Le ŋutinya me la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

claim: Le September 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, U.S. Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance gblɔ be ele be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "nyɔnu siwo to vidzidɔ me" ƒe azã.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le September 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo be U.S. Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance do susua ɖa be ele be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "nyɔnu siwo to vidzidzi me" ƒe azãɖuɖu. Nya ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Threads kaka nyaʋiʋlia kple nɔnɔmetata aɖe si xlẽ be: WASHINGTON-J. D. Vance he nyaʋiʋli vɛ le Memleɖagbe esi wòdo susu ɖa be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "nyɔnu siwo to vidzidzi me" ƒe azãɖuɖu. Vance gblɔ na Fox News be: "Nuvlowɔha si nyɔ la trɔ gbo gɔmesese vavãtɔ si le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ŋu," "Bubudede dɔwɔlawo ŋu ate ŋu ado dzidzɔ na ame siwo wɔa dɔ hena woƒe agbemenuhiahiãwo, gake medzɔa dzi na mía kple Donald Trump o." Vance ƒoe ɖe enu be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "ɣeyiɣi si woatsɔ ade bubu nu ɖeka si naa gɔmesese nɔa nyɔnuwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ ŋu: vidzidzi." Eɖe gbeƒãe be: "Nyɔnu siwo dzi vi koe wòle be woaɖe mɔ na le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ƒe piknikwo me." "Vidzĩ aɖeke meli o, hot dog aɖeke meli o." (Threads user @the_bad_girl_from_the_tree) Zãla la tsɔ nya si nye, "Vidzĩ aɖeke meli o, hot dog aɖeke meli o," kpe ɖe eŋu, si fia nuŋɔŋlɔa ƒe akpa mamlɛtɔ. Nya sia kaka ɖe Facebook, Threads, X kple Instagram hã dzi. Edze abe nuxlẽla aɖewo ɖe nya la gɔme be enye nyateƒenya si wogblɔ tso agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo ŋu ene eye wotrɔ ɖe Snopes ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoakpɔe ɖa be nyateƒee hã. Gake kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si aɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ be Vance hã ƒe seselelãme sia tɔgbe dzi o. Google dzi didi aɖe mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso nyadzɔdzɔhabɔbɔ xɔŋkɔwo gbɔ tso nya si wogblɔ be wogblɔ la ŋu o. Ne míebu U.S. dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ ŋu la, nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe gãwo agblɔ nya sia le afisiafi hafi. Ke boŋ Andy Borowitz, si nye nukokoedonamela kple fewuɖula si wonya be ewɔ fewuɖugbalẽ si nye The Borowitz Report, si wòta le Internet dzi tso ƒe 2001. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe axa si ku ɖe eŋu la xlẽ, le eƒe akpa aɖe me be: Meŋlɔ fewuɖunyawo tso esime mexɔ ƒe wuiatɔ̃. Esia tsi tre ɖi na ɖokuitsɔtsɔna ɖe haƒoƒo ƒomevi aɖe ŋu alo ŋgɔyiyi si wolé. Esi menɔ sekɛndrisuku la, esi wòɖea April Fool ƒe tata ƒe sia ƒe ta koe meva zu nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽa ƒe nuŋlɔla. Emegbe esi menye The Harvard Lampoon ƒe zimenɔla ta la, meta kɔledzi nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽa ƒe fefenyawo, si na wohem yi Dean Archie C. Epps III, si nye eƒe ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ, ƒe dɔwɔƒe. Le ƒe blaeve siwo kplɔe ɖo me la, megbɔ ɖe eme tso nyadzɔdzɔwo me fewuɖunyawo gbɔ esime menɔ lalam be woato Internet vɛ. Emegbe le ƒe 2001 me la, medze nyadzɔdzɔ siwo wowɔ to e-mail dzi ɖoɖo ɖe xɔ̃nyewo gɔme. Ame ɖeka do susua ɖa be "nyatakakadzraɖoƒe" wɔwɔ ana wòanɔ bɔbɔe be "magbã" nye "nyatakakawo." Eteƒe medidi o, The Borowitz Report va nɔ BorowitzReport.com, eye nye nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si meŋlɔna femaxee la nɔ ame gbogbo aɖewo gbɔ ɖom. Le Sept. 1, 2025, Facebook nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si gbɔ nya sia dzɔ tso me la, Borowitz ŋlɔ bena: WASHINGTON—J. D. Vance he nyaʋiʋli vɛ le Memleɖagbe esi wòdo susu ɖa be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "nyɔnu siwo to dɔwɔwɔ me" ƒe azãɖuɖu. Vance gblɔ na Fox News be: "Nuvlowɔha si nyɔ la trɔ gbo gɔmesese vavãtɔ si le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ŋu," "Bubudede dɔwɔlawo ŋu ate ŋu ado dzidzɔ na ame siwo wɔa dɔ hena woƒe agbemenuhiahiãwo, gake medzɔa dzi na mía kple Donald Trump o." Vance ƒoe ɖe enu be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye "ɣeyiɣi si woatsɔ ade bubu nu ɖeka si naa gɔmesese nɔa nyɔnuwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ ŋu: vidzidzi." Eɖe gbeƒãe be: "Nyɔnu siwo dzi vi koe wòle be woaɖe mɔ na le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ƒe piknikwo me." "Vidzĩ aɖeke meli o, hot dog aɖeke meli o." Nɔnɔmetata si woɖe fia le nyatakakaa me la tso January 2025 ƒe gbebiame aɖe si Fox News wɔ kple Vance me. Vance meƒo nu tso Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ŋu le gbebiame ma ƒe akpa aɖeke o. Borowitz Nyatakaka la ta ŋutinya si sɔ kloe si ƒe tanyae nye "J. D. Vance Gblɔ be Ele be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke Naɖu Nyɔnu Si To Dɔwɔwɔ Me" le September 2024 me, si anya nye gɔmeɖoanyi na ƒe 2025 tɔ. Edze egɔme: LANSING (The Borowitz Report)—J. D. Vance he nyaʋiʋli vɛ le Memleɖagbe esi wòdo susu ɖa be Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke nanye “nyɔnu siwo to vidzidzi me” ƒe azãɖuɖu. Vance gblɔ na eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔwo le Michigan be: “Nuvlowɔha si nyɔ la trɔ gbo gɔmesese vavãtɔ si le Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Ŋkeke ŋu.” "Bubudede dɔwɔlawo ŋu ate ŋu ado dzidzɔ na ame siwo wɔa dɔ hena woƒe agbemenuhiahiãwo, gake medzɔa dzi nam o [...] Nyati ma ƒe akpa bliboa nɔ anyi na amesiwo woxea fe na ko. Míeku nya mawo tɔgbe siwo ku ɖe Vance ŋu va yi me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya aɖe si wògblɔ be mele be nyɔnu siwo le srɔ̃ɖeɖe siwo me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le me nagbe wo nɔewo o kple nya aɖe si wògblɔ be yelɔ̃ ɖe edzi ɣeaɖeɣi kple podcast dzikpɔla aɖe si gblɔ be tɔgbuiwo nana woakpe asi ɖe viwo nyinyi ŋue nye "the whole purpose of the postmenopausal female." Snopes hã ƒo nu tso fewuɖunya geɖe siwo wogblɔ tso The Borowitz Report me ŋu va yi. Ne èdi nusiwo dzɔ va yi la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

claim: Trump Dziɖuɖua gblɔ be hadziŋlɔla Billie Eilish Le Míaƒe Dukɔa Tsrɔ̃m Le Nuŋlɔɖi Siwo Do Go Me
evidence: Washington Post ƒe ŋutinya aɖe gblɔ vodadatɔe be Trump dziɖuɖua tso Billie Eilish nu be “egblẽ míaƒe dukɔa” — emegbe wòkaka abe dzobibi ene le modzakaɖedɔwɔƒewo dome. Nyati si wota le Yawoɖagbe — si ƒe akpa aɖe ku ɖe ame xɔŋkɔ alafa geɖe siwo ŋu wole dodokpɔ wɔm le hena Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe coronavirus ƒe boblododo aɖe ŋu — la lɔ nya aɖe si wogblɔ le White House si womegblɔ vodadatɔe o tso Eilish ŋu ɖe eme. Hadzila si xɔ Grammy-nunana la gblɔ le Democratic Dukɔa ƒe Takpekpe me le August me be: “Donald Trump le míaƒe dukɔa kple nusianu si ŋu míetsi dzi ɖo la tsrɔ̃m.” Esi Washington Post yɔ nuŋlɔɖi siwo do go siwo Democratic House sewɔlawo xɔ la, eŋlɔ vodadatɔe be Trump ƒe amegãwo ɖɔ Eilish be “menye Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla o,” eye wogblɔ be “ele míaƒe dukɔa kple nusianu si ŋu míetsi dzi ɖo la dome gblẽm.”

claim: Le ƒe 2013 me la, asitsala kple nyateƒe TV dzi wɔnawo dzikpɔla ɣemaɣi Donald Trump gblɔ be: "Dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso dzea dukplɔla ƒe kplɔlanyenye ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ dzi. Mebe, kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒo eye ele be woakpɔ wo gbɔ tso dziƒo. Nutsitsi fia be dukplɔla la gbɔdzɔ."
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, Trump gblɔ nya siwo tututu le nyayɔyɔa ƒe nyagbe evelia me ɣeaɖeɣi vavã. Nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke menɔ anyi si fia be Trump gblɔ nya siwo tututu le nyagbe gbãtɔ alo etɔ̃lia me o. Ke hã, nya bubu siwo wògblɔ tso ɣeyiɣi ma me la sɔ kple susu mawo ke. Le U.S. dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso si dze egɔme le Oct. 1, 2025 dzi dome la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be, le ƒe 2013 me la, asitsala kple reality TV dzikpɔla ɣemaɣi Donald Trump gblɔ be: "Dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso dze dukplɔla ƒe kplɔlanyenye ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ dzi. Mebe, kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒo eye ele be woakpɔ wo gbɔ tso dziƒo. Nutsitsi fia be dukplɔla la gbɔdzɔ." Le meme kple nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe nyayɔyɔa nu nu la, Trump — amesi nye dukplɔla le ƒe 2025 ƒe nutsotso me — ɖe nya siawo ɖe go ŋkeke aɖewo do ŋgɔ na dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso le Dukplɔla Barack Obama si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi ƒe zimenɔɣi evelia me le October 2013. Le Sept. 30 dzi la, Occupy Democrats ƒe Facebook axa si tsi tre ɖe Trump ŋu (si wodzra ɖo ɖi) la da meme (si wodzra ɖo) si me nyayɔyɔa le. Ƒuƒoƒoa ma meme la ɖe teƒe bubu le X kple Instagram, eye woŋlɔ nyawo ɖe edzi be: "Trump ƒe nya sia tsi nyuie... eye zi ɖeka la, míelɔ̃ ɖe edzi!" Snopes xlẽlawo hã di nya si wogblɔ la le míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. (Occupy Democrats/Facebook) Zãla bubu geɖewo ma meme mawo ke alo esiwo sɔ kplii, alo ɖeko wogbugbɔ nyayɔyɔa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔa da ɖe Bluesky, Facebook, Instagram (wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple X (wodzra wo ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ƒe didiwo mekpɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke si ɖee fia be Trump ŋlɔ nya si wògblɔ nya ɖe nya nu tso dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotsowo ŋu o. Nyagbe evelia koe ɖe nya aɖe si wogblɔ pɛpɛpɛ fia. Ke hã, ne míelé ŋku ɖe Trump ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ le ƒe 2013 me —siwo wògblɔ le TV kple X (si nye Twitter ɣemaɣi) dzi — ŋu la, míakpɔe be nya si wogblɔ be woyɔ la ƒe akpa susɔea nye eƒe susu siwo wògblɔ le dutoƒo la ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ si sɔ. Eyata nya si woyɔ le memeawo me nye nyatakaka vavã kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Internet dzi didi mawo ke ke ɖe nyatakaka gbãtɔ siwo wonya (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) siwo me nya si wogblɔ be woyɔ tso Jan. 20, 2018 dzi ƒe nyagbe gbãtɔ kple etɔ̃lia le la dometɔ ɖeka ŋu, le dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso bubu si dzɔ le Trump ƒe dziɖuɣi gbãtɔ me —si fia be nya mawo dzɔ tso ɣeyiɣi ma ke me lɔƒo. White House ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe ɖo míaƒe e-mail ŋu tso nya si míeyɔ ŋu gake meɖo míaƒe biabiawo ŋu o. Míeƒo ka na Occupy Democrats hã to email dzi be míabia nya tso woƒe nyatakaka kple woƒe nya si wogblɔ be woyɔ tututu ŋu eye míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Le Sept. 30, 2013 dzi la, Trump dze le Fox News ƒe ŋdi television dzi wɔna si nye "Fox & Friends" me. Ɣemaɣi la, Obama nɔ dɔ wɔm abe dukplɔla ene, Republicantɔwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Aƒea dzi eye Democrattɔwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ nɔ Sewɔtakpekpea me. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, sɛkɛnd 29 ƒe video klipi aɖe tso gbebiamea me kaka ɖe internet dzi: Le numedzodzroa me la, "Fox & Friends" ƒe hadɔwɔla Elisabeth Hasselbeck bia Trump be, "Amekae woɖe le dɔ me, amekae atsɔ agbanɔamedzia ƒe agba nenye be míaƒe dziɖuɖua nu tso vavã?" Eɖo eŋu to kplɔlanyenye kple "ŋusẽ" ɖeɖefia ƒe vevienyenye yɔyɔ me — nusi to vovo na gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ (nyayɔyɔ si le nyabiasea me la ɖe nya "gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ" fia): Ele be wòanɔ etame ɣesiaɣi. Mebe, kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒo eye ele be woakpɔ wo gbɔ tso dziƒo. Eye dukplɔla la nye kplɔla eye wòle be wòana amesiame nade xɔ aɖe me eye wòle be wòaxɔ ŋgɔ. Eye mewɔa esia o. Melɔ̃a esia wɔwɔ o. Menye eƒe ŋusẽe nye ema o. Abe alesi woɖee fia ene la, ewɔ nya siwo tututu wogblɔ tso nya si woyɔ le nyabiasea me ƒe nyagbe evelia hã me be: "Mebe, kuxiwo dzea egɔme tso dziƒo eye ele be woakpɔ wo gbɔ tso dziƒo." Videoa ƒe akpa bubu dze le Internet Archive ƒe TV News Archive ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe. Le gbebiamea ƒe video diditɔ me la, Trump gblɔ be nugblẽfexexe be woaƒo asa na nutsotso le ƒe 2013 me "adze abe kpododonu ene na Democratstɔwo," amesiwo, le afisia hã, kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe White House kple Sewɔtakpekpea dzi ɣemaɣi. Le October 2025 ƒe nutsitsidɔa me la, Republicantɔwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe White House, Senate kple House dzi. Trump kple White House bu fɔ ƒe 2025 ƒe nutsitsidɔa enuenu ɖe ​​Democrattɔwo dzi (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo). Trump gblɔ hã le ƒe 2013 ƒe gbebiame me be yexɔe se be ame siwo le ƒe bla nanewo kple ƒe alafa siwo gbɔna me, le woƒe numedzodzrowo me tso dziɖuɖu ƒe nutsotso siwo va yi ŋu me la, woaɖo ŋku dukplɔla ƒe dziɖuɖu si nɔ dzi ɖum ɣemaɣi ko dzi eye womaɖo ŋku kplɔla siwo le Sewɔtakpekpea me dzi o: Mienya, nusi doa dzidzɔ na ame enye be, le ƒe 25 me, le ƒe 50 kple ƒe 100 me tso fifia, esime dziɖuɖua le, mienya ne wole nu ƒom tso dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso ŋu la, wole yiyim be ele nu ƒom tso United States ƒe dukplɔla ŋu be, "Amekae nye dukplɔla ɣemaɣi?" claim: "Le ƒe 12 pɛ ko me tso esime wodzi devolution la, míetsɔ KSh4 triliɔn ƒe ƒuƒoƒo yi nutowo me."
evidence: Ruto tɔ dzɔ be nutoawo axɔ KSh415 biliɔn le ƒe 2025/26 ƒe ga ƒea me, si nye KSh30 biliɔn kloe wu ƒe si do ŋgɔ. Eƒe xexlẽme si nye KSh4 triliɔn si wotsɔ yi nutowo me tso esime wodze dziɖuɖua nana gɔme hã lé ɖe te. Gake dukplɔla la gblɔ ame agbɔsɔsɔme si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le eCitizen, si nye dziɖuɖua ƒe dijitaal dɔwɔƒewo ƒe mɔnu dzi wògbɔ eme, eye womete ŋu ɖo kpe nya si wògblɔ tso ga biliɔn geɖe siwo woƒo ƒu to edzi ŋu dzi o. Dudzikpɔlawo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla Ahmed Abdullahi gblɔe nyateƒe be nutome ƒe ga si wodzɔ la le dukɔa ƒe gazazã ƒe 10 va ɖo 13% dome. Le August 2025 me la, dukplɔla William Ruto va kpe ɖe Kenya ƒe nutodziɖula 47 ŋu le Homa Bay nuto , si didi tso Nairobi gbɔ abe kilometa 400 ene le dzigbeɣetoɖoƒe gome, hena ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe takpekpea . Fifia le eƒe ƒe 12 lia me la, ame aɖewo ɖe ɖeklemi kpekpea be enye " ɣeyiɣi kple nunɔamesiwo gbegblẽ " gake zi geɖe la, wobunɛ be enye ɣeyiɣi vevi aɖe na dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖo si wotsɔ de asi na amewo, si woɖo le ƒe 2010 me, be woada eƒe ŋgɔyiyi kple gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo kpɔ. Ruto yɔ shilling triliɔn geɖe siwo woɖo ɖe nutoawo kple ga biliɔn geɖe siwo wotsɔ to eCitizen , si nye dziɖuɖua ƒe dijitaal agbo dzi, be enye kpeɖodzi be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua léa ŋku ɖe eŋu zi geɖe be edoa alɔ dziɖuɖua nana amewo. Dudzikpɔlawo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha ƒe zimenɔla Ahmed Abdullahi gahe susu yi dzidzedze siwo wokpɔ le nutoawo me dzi, eye wòyɔ lãmesẽdɔwɔƒe geɖe wu kple ɖɔkta kple dɔnɔdzikpɔla bubuwo xɔxɔ. Gake ɖe kplɔla eveawo ƒe nyawo va ƒo ƒua? Míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu. Dukplɔla William Ruto Ruto gblɔ be akɔntabubuawo ɖe eƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna be yeatsɔ ŋusẽ kple nunɔamesiwo ade asi na Kenya ƒe nuto 47 la fia. Dukplɔsea ka ɖe edzi na nutoawo be woakpɔ dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ siwo ŋu wodzro nyitsɔ laa ƒe 15% ya teti, si woyɔna be gomekpɔkpɔ si sɔ . Nutoawo hã xɔa gakpekpeɖeŋu tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ. Le dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖoa te la, sewɔtakpekpe , si me dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe kple sewɔtakpekpe le lae maa ga la. Dukɔa ƒe gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ɖea asi le ga la ŋu, eye gaŋutiɖoɖodzikpɔla ɖea mɔ ɖe ga ɖesiaɖe si woatsɔ anae ŋu. Woɖoa ga si woatsɔ ana nutoawo ƒe sia ƒe le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe mama ƒe sea me. Nyitsɔ laa, na ƒe 2025, ɖee fia be nutoawo xɔ KSh415 biliɔn (si ade Amerika dɔlar biliɔn 3.2). Le ƒe 2024 me la, xexlẽmea nye KSh400 biliɔn , gake woɖe edzi le ƒea ƒe domedome va ɖo KSh387.43 biliɔn le sɔhɛwo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu megbe . Ga home ma si bɔbɔ wu la, gaŋutiɖoɖodzikpɔla kple gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe July 2025 ƒe nyatakaka si ku ɖe ga ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo wokpɔ kple ga si woɖe ɖe go ŋu siaa ɖo kpe edzi. Ruto se esia gɔme nyuie. Nutoawo ƒe akpa si sɔ le ƒe 2025 me nye KSh415 biliɔn. Le ƒe 2024 me la, eɖo KSh387.43 biliɔn. Ema nye KSh27.57 biliɔn bubu – KSh30 biliɔn bubu kloe. Africa Check hã ƒo ŋutinya me nyatakakawo nu ƒu, si ɖee fia be ƒe 2025 ƒe ga si woma lae nye esi lolo wu vaseɖe fifia si nutoawo xɔ.  Ruto gblɔ be dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua tsɔ KSh4 triliɔn (si ade dɔlar biliɔn 30.74) de asi na nutowo le woƒe agbenɔɣi. Gadzɔdzɔ ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be tso esime nutomedziɖuɖuwo wɔ dɔ le March 2013 ƒe dutoƒotiatiawɔɣia megbe vaseɖe June 2024 me la, nutoawo xɔ KSh3.6 triliɔn. Le July 2024 kple June 2025 dome la, woxɔ KSh418.3 biliɔn bubu , eye KSh229.2 biliɔn kplɔe ɖo le July 2025. Kaka dukplɔla la nagblɔ eƒe nya la, ga si wotsɔ yi na wo katã la ɖo KSh4.24 triliɔn. Ruto ƒe nya sɔ. Ruto te gbe ɖe eCitizen , si nye Kenya ƒe dijitaal mɔnu si dzi woato akpɔ dziɖuɖudɔwo ahaxe fe ɖe wo ta, agbalẽwo biabia kple dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo me toto ƒe dzidziɖedzi dzi. Egblɔ be yewɔ dziɖuɖudɔ siwo wu 22,000, si nye dzidziɖedzi tso 300 le eƒe gɔmedzedze. Nyatakakaawo ɖo kpe dzidziɖedzi gã aɖe dzi: Le June 2023 me la, Ruto dze dɔwɔƒe yeye 5,084 ƒe ʋuɖoɖo gɔme, si dzi woɖo kpee le gaxɔa ƒe November 2023 ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka me. Kaka October 2024 naɖo la, gaxɔa gblɔ be wowɔ dɔ 16,000. Le December me la, eCitizen ƒe dɔdzikpɔƒea gblɔ be xexlẽmea nye 22,515 . March 2025 ƒe agbalẽdzikpɔlagã ƒe nyatakaka aɖe de dzesii be dɔwɔƒe 222 kple dɔwɔƒe siwo wu 22,000 ye nɔ nuƒolanɔƒea. In his June 2025 budget speech , ganyawo gbɔkpɔla John Mbadi gblɔ na sewɔtakpekpea be dijitaal dɔwɔnawo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi "tso 350 le ƒe 2022 me va ɖo 20,985 le ƒe 2025 me". Le ɣleti ma ke me la, eCitizen ƒe dɔdzikpɔƒea ta nyatakaka aɖe si ƒo nu tso dɔwɔƒe 21,000 siwo wotsɔ de ʋua me bliboe ŋu, eye wogale bubuwo wɔm ɖekae. The official eCitizen homepage banner at time of publication reads : "Dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔwɔna siwo wu 22,000 siwo li fifia tso 100+ Subɔsubɔhawo, Nutowo, Dɔwɔƒewo kple Dɔwɔƒewo gbɔ." Kpeɖodziawo ɖee fia be wole kekem ɖe enu madzudzɔmadzudzɔe, eye subɔsubɔdɔwo ƒe xexlẽme to vovo vie le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo le dutoƒo ɖo kpe Ruto ƒe xexlẽme si nye 22,000 dzi nyateƒe, togbɔ be xexlẽme ɖeka pɛ hã meli si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o hã. Ruto ƒe ŋkɔ

claim: Wokpɔ mɔ be woaʋu ʋuʋulawo ƒe gaxɔ aɖe si woyɔna be "Alligator Alcatraz" le Florida le ƒe 2025 me.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le amedzrowo ƒe amedzidzedze si U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua kplɔ dome la, nyatakaka siwo na amewo va ƒo xlã wo le Internet dzi le June 2025 ƒe nuwuwu gblɔ be eteƒe madidi o woaʋu ʋuʋulawo ƒe gaxɔ aɖe si woyɔna be "Alligator Alcatraz" le Florida. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. pic.twitter.com/SbLcRQH5aT — Eric Daugherty (@EricLDaugh) June 29, 2025 Nya mawo tɔgbe kaka ɖe Facebook dzi. Akɔntabubu aɖe si woyɔna be "Donald Trump for President" ma gbedasi sia le June 29, 2025 dzi: Snopes xlẽlawo hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoabia be "Alligator Alcatraz" nye ame ŋutɔŋutɔ hã. Woʋu ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe gaxɔ yeye aɖe si woyɔna be "Alligator Alcatraz" le se nu le Florida le July 1, 2025 dzi, le dukɔa ƒe amegãwo kple Florida Senyala Gã James Uthmeier ƒe nya nu. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Abe alesi Snopes ka nya ta va yi ene la, Uthmeier do susua ɖa be woaɖo ʋuʋulawo ƒe gaxɔ si woyɔna be "Alligator Alcatraz." Eda video aɖe si gblɔ ɖoɖo siwo wowɔ ɖe dɔwɔƒe sia tɔgbe ŋu tsitotsito ɖe eƒe X kple Facebook akɔntabubu siwo ŋu woɖo kpee dzi le June 19, 2025 dzi, eye wòdzro aɖaŋuɖoɖoa me va yi le akpa aɖe si wòwɔ kple "Fox Business" me. Ɣemaɣi la, Uthmeier ɖɔ "Alligator Alcatraz" be enye "teƒe ɖeka si woawɔ Dukplɔla Trump ƒe ame gbogbowo ɖeɖe le dukɔa me ƒe ɖoɖoa dzi." Le eƒe video si wòma le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me la, egblɔ be, le eƒe akpa aɖe me be: Florida xɔ ŋgɔ le amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ me, eye wòdo alɔ Trump dziɖuɖua kple ICE ƒe agbagbadzedze be woalé amedzro nuvlowɔlawo ade gaxɔ me ahanya wo le wo me. Dudzikpɔla la de dɔ asi na dukɔa ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo be woade dzesi teƒe siwo woawɔ ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe gaxɔ yeyewo. Mesusu be esiae nye nyuitɔ kekeake, abe alesi meyɔnɛ ene, Alligator Alcatraz. Everglades ƒo xlã nuto sia si ƒe lolome nye kilometa 30 sq keŋkeŋ [eye] wònye mɔnukpɔkpɔ nyui aɖe si mexɔ asi boo o be nàtu ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe ameléƒe elabena mehiã be nàde ga geɖe ɖe nuto si ƒo xlãe me nenema o. Amewo dona, nu geɖe mele wo lalam o negbe akpɔkplɔwo kple pythonwo ko. Afi aɖeke meli woayi o, afi aɖeke meli woaɣla wo ɖokui ɖo o. Dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu ɖo kpe edzi le ŋkeke geɖe megbe be yewole hadomedɔ wɔm kple Florida le "Alligator Alcatraz" ŋu. Le X nyatakaka aɖe si woma le June 23, 2025 dzi la, Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe (DHS) ŋlɔ bena: Míele dɔ wɔm tso mɔnu siwo me ga mele o eye woto nu yeyewo vɛ ŋu be míatsɔ awɔ Amerika dukɔa ƒe sedede be woaɖe ame gbogbo aɖewo le dukɔa me. Alligator Alcatraz akeke dɔwɔƒewo kple abadzivɔwo ɖe enu le ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo ko me, le míaƒe hadomeɖoɖowɔwɔ kple Florida ta. Le ŋkeke siwo do ŋgɔ na "Alligator Alcatraz" ƒe ʋuʋu me la, Florida GOP hã do boblo dziɖuɖua ƒe adzɔnu siwo woate ŋu aƒle le Internet dzi. White House ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Karoline Leavitt ɖe gbeƒãe be Trump kple DHS ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Kristi Noem azɔ mɔ ayi Florida le July 1, 2025 dzi, hena ʋuʋulawo ƒe gaxɔ yeye aɖe ʋuʋu le Dade-Collier Hehenaƒe kple Tɔtrɔ Yameʋudzeƒe. Leavitt gblɔ be dɔwɔƒe si le "Everglades ƒe dzime" la "ayɔe le vome be Alligator Alcatraz." Uthmeier hã ɖe gbeƒãe be yeaʋu "Alligator Alcatraz" le nyatakaka aɖe me le July 1, 2025. "Wokpɔ mɔ be aba siwo ade 3,000 anɔ "dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua kpɔna" si le Ochopee, Florida la, U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) gblɔ le X post me. Florida le ɖoɖo wɔm be yealé ame 2,000 bubuwo ɖe gaxɔ bubu me le Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔlawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe aɖe si woyɔna be Camp Blanding, dukɔa ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã Ron DeSantis gblɔ le "Alligator Alcatraz" sasrãkpɔa me. Florida Division of Emergency Management ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã Kevin Guthrie gblɔ be wole mɔ kpɔm be woadze dɔwɔƒe ma tutu gɔme "le Ðokuisinɔɣi megbe teti." Le sasrãkpɔa me la, Noem de dzi ƒo na dukɔ bubuwo be woaku tiatia mawo tɔgbe me. Egblɔ, le eƒe akpa aɖe me be: Florida le etɔxɛ le nusiwo wotsɔ ɖo ŋkume na mí me eye mabia tso nutodziɖula bubu ɖesiaɖe si be wòawɔ nu ma tututu. Esia le etɔxɛ elabena míate ŋu alé ame ɖekaɖekawo ɖe afisia. Woate ŋu awɔ woƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃wo be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnu wo le mɔ nyuitɔ nu eye woaɖo wo ɖe yameʋu me atrɔ ayi wo dedukɔwo me enumake. Hafi woaʋu "Alligator Alcatraz" la, Noem gblɔ na CBS News hã be woakpɔ ga na gaxɔ siwo le Florida la "le akpa gãtɔ me" tso Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Nudzɔdzɔ Kpatawo Gbɔ ƒe Sitsoƒe kple Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Ðoɖowɔha gbɔ, si nye ɖoɖo si Sewɔtakpekpea wɔ si "naa gakpekpeɖeŋu dɔwɔƒe siwo menye dukɔa tɔ o" be woatsɔ ana bebeƒe kple dɔwɔna siwo do ƒome kplii na ʋuʋulawo ƒe kadodo

																																																Chayanit ITTHIPONGMAETEE, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Thailand ƒe agbalẽ





				Bangkok ƒoe ɖe Phnom Penh nu be wòaxɔ eƒe asrafo siwo wowu le ŋkeke atɔ̃ ƒe dzrewɔwɔ le Anyieheɣedzeƒe Asia ƒe aƒelikawo dome ƒe kukuawo, gake nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woda ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo meɖee fia be Cambodiatɔwo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋulawo le didi ma ke tso woƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo si o. Nɔnɔmetata la do ŋgɔ na aʋawɔwɔa kwasiɖa eve eye wòɖe asitsala siwo le tsitre tsim ɖe nutomedziɖuɖua ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe woƒe nudzraƒewo ŋu la fia.
			


"Khmertɔwo dze aglã!! Tsitretsiɖeŋunyawo yi edzi," Thailandgbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ le nɔnɔmetata aɖe si wokpɔ wu zi 40,000 le TikTok dzi tso esime wodae ɖe TikTok dzi tso esime wodae ɖe August 3, 2025 dzi."Cambodiatɔwo ƒoe ɖe Hun Sen nu be wòadi aʋawɔla siwo le ŋgɔgbe siwo womate ŋu aƒo ka na o. Wowu xɔsetaku ɖe dukɔa ta gake wogblẽe ɖi abe ame kuku ene ƒome manɔmee."Hun Sen nye Cambodia tɔ kplɔla tsã, si gakpɔtɔ le akpa vevi aɖe wɔm le dziɖuɖu me. Viaŋutsu, Hun Manet kplɔ Cambodia tso ƒe 2023. Nɔnɔmetata la ɖe amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si lé fotowo kple dzesiwo ɖe dzi fia.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


TikTok ƒe alakpa nyatakaka si wolé le August 4, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Nɔnɔmetata ma ke kaka ɖe TikTok nyatakaka mawo tɔgbe hã me.Edo mo ɖa esi Thailand kple Cambodia lɔ̃ ɖe aʋadziɖuɖu dzi le July 29 lia dzi, le ŋkeke atɔ̃ ƒe dzrewɔwɔ si me ame 43 ya teti ku le akpa evea siaa megbe -- liƒo ŋuti nyaʋiʋli si nɔ anyi ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) ƒe ʋuʋu mamlɛtɔ esi Thailand kple Cambodia ƒe akpaɖekedzimademadelawo siaa di be yewoado ŋutinya si nye be ame kemɛae nye fɔbubua ɖe ŋgɔ (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖi).Bangkok Post ka nya ta be Thailand ƒe Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Nattapon Narkphanit bia tso Cambodia si be wòaxɔ eƒe asrafo siwo dze anyi siwo wogblẽ ɖe liƒoa dzi ƒe kukuawo -- eye wògblɔ kpee be heheɖemegbe ɖesiaɖe "aɖe woƒe bubu kple bubu dzi akpɔtɔ" eye wòade lãmesẽ afɔku me hã kɔƒe siwo te ɖe afima ŋu (archived link).Gake nɔnɔmetata si le tsatsam la meɖe Cambodiatɔwo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋulawo hã fia be wole biabiam tso woƒe dziɖuɖua si be wòaxɔ ame kukuawo o.Asidzralawo ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋuNɔnɔmetata didi si wogbugbɔ di le Google na woɖe video siwo woda ɖe YouTube dzi le July 11 dzi -- kwasiɖa eve do ŋgɔ na liƒo dzi dzre yeyetɔ kekeake (archived link).The falsely shared image appears to be a still from this footage.Its Thai-language caption reads: "Livestream tso Cambodia asi aɖe me. Asitsalawo tsi tre ɖe eŋu vevie, wobia tso Hun Sen si be wòakpe asi ɖe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ le Chhnuk Trou Asi me ... Kampong Chhnang le July 11, 2025 dzi."

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Nɔnɔmetata si woma alakpatɔe (miame) kple YouTube video si woma le July 11 (ɖusime) ƒe screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo
					
Nya veviwo didi bubu na wokpɔ video klipi ma tɔgbe si woma ɖe Cambodia nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe CJ News ƒe Facebook axa dzi le July 11 dzi (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖi)."Dukɔmevi Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Nyatakaka: Nudzrala siwo le Chhnuk Trou Asi me bia kpekpeɖeŋu tso Hun Manet si esime Kampong Chhnang dziɖuɖumegãwo gbã woƒe nudzraƒewo sesẽe," Khmergbe me nyatakakaa xlẽ.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Nɔnɔmetata si woama alakpatɔe (miame) kple CJ News ƒe nyatakaka (ɖusime) ƒe screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo, kple nusiwo sɔ ɖe enu siwo dzi AFP te gbe ɖo
					
AFP hã ɖe nya totro bubu siwo ku ɖe dzre si le Cambodia kple Thailand dome ŋu la ɖa.August 6, 2025Woɖɔ tanya ɖo be woagblɔ be "nɔnɔmetata" ɖe "klip" teƒe.

Afɔfiɛ 6, 2025

claim: Republicantɔwo ƒe Aƒenɔ tsãtɔ Newt Gingrich ma nyatakaka aɖe si ʋli nukliaʋawɔnuwo zazã atsɔ awɔ tɔdzisasrã si anye melimɔ bubu si dzi woato ayi Hormuz-ƒuta.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Aɖaŋuɖoɖo si Gingrich ma le eƒe nyatakaka me la tso fewuɖunya aɖe me. Míate ŋu aɖo kpe edzi nenye be Gingrich nɔ nyatia bum nu vevii esime wòmae o. Le March 2026 me la, edze abe Republicantɔwo ƒe Aƒenɔ tsãtɔ Newt Gingrich ʋli nukliaʋawɔnuwo zazã atsɔ awɔ tɔdzisasrã yeye aɖe be wòanye mɔnu bubu si woate ŋu azã ɖe Hormuz-ƒuta si dzi Iran kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo teƒe ene.Screenshots of a purported X post sharing this sentiment spread online. Nya si le etame tso Gingrich ƒe X-kɔnta si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo me la nye nyateƒe; esi wòle alea ta la, míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Gake nyati si wòma la nye fewuɖunya, eye womenya nenye be Gingrich nɔ nyatia bum nu vevii o. Míeɖo Gingrich gbɔ be míasrɔ̃ nu geɖe eye míawɔ nya sia yeyee ɖe edzi. Le March 15 lia dzi la, Gingrich ƒe X akɔnta si ŋu woɖo kpee la da nya si gbɔna tso Substack ƒe nyati aɖe me ɖe(nudzraɖoƒe): "Le esi teƒe be míawɔ avu le aŋetu si keke kilometa 21 ta tegbee la, míetso mɔ yeye aɖe to anyigba si me xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ le me. Dzoxɔxɔnuklia ƒe wowó wuieve eye nèkpɔ tsimɔ si keke wu Panama Tɔdzisasrã, si goglo wu Suez, eye wòle dedie tso Irantɔwo ƒe amedzidzedzewo me." (X zãla @NewtGingrich) Nya gbãtɔ si woŋlɔ, "Ɣeyiɣia De," dze le Substack ƒe axa aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye ChinaTalk. Substack la ɖɔ eɖokui be yenye "nuŋububu ƒe habɔbɔ kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si me ameŋkumemakpɔmakpɔ le si si nunya deto le China kple mɔ̃ɖaŋununya yeye siwo le dodom ŋu." Blog la ƒe nuwuwu gblɔ be: "Nukpɔsusu siwo míegblɔ le etame la metsi tre ɖi na ame aɖeke si si ahɔhɔ̃menugbagbeviwo le la tɔ kokoko o." Esia fia be woŋlɔ nyatakakaa abe fefenya ene. Nya si woŋlɔ na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth la dze egɔme kple nyaʋiʋli si nye "Míetsɔ nukliaʋawɔʋu ƒo tɔdzisasrã aɖe na mí." Nyatakakaa wu enu kple: Wò dɔtɔ nye xɔtula. Trump medi be yeafe nyuie kple dukɔ siwo wòlé fui be yewoanɔ tsatsam le Hormuz-ƒuta o. Edi be yeatso lãgbalẽ aɖe akpɔ chyron si le Fox dzi. "TRUMP CANAL ƲU — GÃTƆ WU LE AMEGBETƆWO ƑE ŊUTINYA ME." Aƒetɔ Agbalẽŋlɔla, tsɔ chyron ma nɛ eye nàɖu aʋa la dzi eye nàlé wò dɔa me ɖe asi. Míate ŋu axe adzɔ ɖe ʋu siwo tsɔa amiwoe gɔ̃ hã dzi. Nye DM-wo le ʋuʋu ɖi. Nya yeye aɖe si le nya la te hã ma Gingrich ƒe X nyatakaka ƒe screenshot kple thecaption: "Newt approved." Edze abe nya sia nɔ Hegseth ƒe nya si wògblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me be Hormuz-ƒuta ʋu ɖi ene, si me wògblɔ le be "nu ɖeka kolia si xe mɔ ɖe mɔzɔzɔ nu le ƒutsotsoeawo me fifia enye Iran ƒe tudada ɖe meliwo ŋu." Iran ye na wotu melimɔ vevi si le Persia-ƒuta kple Oman-ƒuta dome la nyuie, si na ami ƒe asi yi dzi le xexeame godoo. Trump bia tso dukɔ bubuwo si be woaɖo meliwo ɖa be woakpe asi ɖe ƒutsotsoea ƒe ʋuʋu ŋu. Gake dukɔ geɖe gbe biabia sia eye womedi be woahe yewo ade aʋa kple Iran me o. Snopes ƒo nu tso nya gbogbo aɖewo siwo wogblɔ tso ami ƒe asi si le dzi yim le Iran-ʋaa ta ŋu.
