claim: Georgia ƒe tiatiawɔlawo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewotsɔ tabulator tapes ɖo kpe akɔtagbalẽviwo dzi le ƒe 2020 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatiawɔƒea — si sɔ kple gaxɔgbalẽviwo — siwo dzi akɔdadadɔwɔlawo mede asi ete o le Georgia dukɔa ƒe tiatiawɔsewo dzi dada me.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Georgia ƒe Dudɔnunɔla Brad Raffensperger ɖe gbeƒãe be nudzɔdzɔa mekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe tiatia la me tsonu dzi o. Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be tiatiawɔha ƒe amegã siwo le Georgia ƒe Fulton County nutome lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewoɖo kpe akɔdada siwo wowɔ do ŋgɔ siwo mewɔ ɖe ɖoɖo nyui siwo dzi woato akplɔ ame ɖo dzi le ƒe 2020 U.S. dukplɔla ƒe tiatia si me Democrat Joe Biden tsɔ ɖe Republican Donald Trump ŋu la dzi. Zãla siwo le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeX (archived) kpleFacebook (archived,archived) dzi ma nya sia, ame aɖewo gblɔ be vodada si le ɖoɖowɔɖi me na akɔdadaawo nye "ametafatafa" eye le esia ta ekpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe emetsonu siwo ŋu woka nya ta le dzi. Le Fulton County ƒe Tiatiawɔgbe ƒe nyatakakawo nu la, Biden xɔ ame 381,144, alo 72% le nutoa me, ne wotsɔe sɔ kple Trump ƒe ame 137,240 tso akɔdada 524,659 ƒe xexlẽme bliboa me. Woda akɔ 6,275 susɔeawo tso Fulton County na Libertariantɔwo ƒe ametiakɔdala Jo Jorgensen. Biden ɖu dukɔa dzi le gɔmedzedzea me kple akɔdada 11,779, si nye ŋgɔyiyi si dzi ɖe edzi le akɔntabubu ake megbe (míegatrɔ va esia gbɔ emegbe). Ðaseɖigbalẽa ƒe kaka le internet dzi na Snopes xlẽla geɖewo ɖo e-mail ɖa be woana numekɔkɔ le nya la ŋu: Enyo nyuie...Here's the latest from STOLEN Georgia.Biden: 2,473,633Trump: 2,461,854Biden "ɖu dzi" to 11,779 votes.Fulton County admits certifying 315,000 ametafatafa ƒe akɔdada kaba siwo me atikewɔlawo ƒe asidede agbalẽ te mele o.Crime of the century.Ele be amewo nanɔ gaxɔ me xoxo. — C3 (@C_3C_3) December 19, 2025 Nya si wogblɔ be Georgia ƒe tiatiawɔlawo lɔ̃ ɖe vodada aɖe dzi esime wonɔ akɔdadawo me tom le ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia me la nye nyateƒe. Etɔxɛe la, Fulton County ƒe senyala aɖe gblɔ na Georgia Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha le kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ le Dec. 9, 2025 dzi me be nutoa lɔ̃ ɖe vodada si wowɔ be yewomede asi akɔtagbalẽvi aɖewo dzi o. Tabulator kasɛtwo sɔ kple gaxɔgbalẽvi si kpena ɖe ame ŋu wòsɔna ɖe akɔdada ƒe xexlẽme si woŋlɔ ɖe kplɔ̃ dzi kple ame agbɔsɔsɔme si tiae le akɔdadaa me. Kpekpea ƒe nuŋlɔɖi bliboa li woate ŋu akpɔ le Georgia Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha ƒe YouTube-habɔbɔa dzi. Atlanta News First, si nye nutome nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖe gblɔ be vodadaa ade akɔdada si ade 315,000 — alo "akɔtagbalẽvi ɖesiaɖe kloe si woda do ŋgɔ na Tiatiawɔgbe" — si woɖo kpe edzi togbɔ be womewɔ ɖoɖo nyui aɖeke o hã. Xexlẽme ma sɔ kple Fulton County ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakaka si ku ɖe akɔdada deŋgɔ 314,985 siwo da akɔ ŋu. May 2024 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si tso Nadine Williams, si nye Fulton County Department of Registration & Elections ƒe dɔdzikpɔla gbɔ, ƒo nu tso nyatoƒoetoto vovovo siwo wotsɔ yi George Tiatiawɔha ŋu ku ɖe ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe ŋu. Togbɔ be womeƒo nu tso kasɛt siwo dzi womede asi o ŋu le nyatoƒoetoto gbãtɔa me o hã la, eyɔ "kasɛt siwo bu," nyatoƒoetoto si woyɔ nenema ke le Tiatiawɔha ƒe kpekpea me. Nyatoƒoetoto si ku ɖe kasɛt siwo bu ŋu xlẽ be, "Tabla gbãtɔa lɔ akɔdada do ŋgɔ ƒe tabulators ewo (10) siwo ƒe tabulator kasɛtwo mele Fulton County o la ƒe emetsonuwo ɖe eme." Nyatakakaa ƒo nu tso "missing tapes" nyatoƒoetotoa ŋu eye wògblɔ be: Ðewohĩ wotsɔ tabulator tape siwo bu la de agbalẽ me vodadatɔe. Wotrɔ asi le Dɔwɔwɔ ƒe Ðoɖowɔɖi siwo wozãna tsɔ dea tabulator tapewo me kple wo dede dedie ŋu be woagadzɔ ake o. Be míaƒe Dɔwɔƒea nagbe nya si wogblɔ le nyatoƒoetoto sia me la, eƒo ka na ƒe 2020 ƒe Akɔdada Do Ŋgɔ Dzikpɔla siwo wode dɔ asi na be woakpɔ afisi scanner siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la le. Le atamkakagbalẽ si wode asi nu la, ƒe 2020 ƒe Akɔdada Do Ŋgɔ Dzikpɔla siwo wode dɔ asi na teƒe siwo woawɔ scanner siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la, ɖo kpe edzi be scanner si ŋu nya ku ɖo la li eye wonɔ ŋkekea ƒe atikemawɔlawo zãm tsɔ skan woƒe akɔtagbalẽviwo le Akɔdada Do ŋgɔ na November 3, 2020 ƒe Tiatiawɔɣi. Togbɔ be nutoa me tɔwo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi le ƒe 2024 me hã la, Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla aɖewo yi edzi gblɔ be enye kpeɖodzi be "wofi" ƒe 2020 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia la tsɔ da asi ɖe Biden dzi, si kpe ɖe eŋu mlɔeba be amewo ƒe susu va nɔ nya si wogblɔ be nutoa me dziɖuɖumegãwo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewogawɔ vodada bubu le December 2025 ƒe kpekpea megbe la dzi. Gake nya siwo wogblɔ be wote tɔ ɖe edzi be Biden ɖu dzi le dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea ta le alesi Fulton County ɖo kpe akɔdada gbãtɔ siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo dzi ta la nye ameflunya. Le akɔntabubu si Trump bia le ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatia megbe megbe la, Fulton County gbugbɔ ɖo kpe emetsonuwo dzi kple asitɔtrɔ sue aɖewo siwo metrɔ emetsonua o: "137,247 (26.20%) na Donald J. Trump (viɖekpɔkpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ si nye 7), 380,212 (72.59%) da akɔ na Joseph Biden (akɔdada 932 ƒe bu ŋutɔŋutɔ), kple 6,320 (1.21%) da asi ɖe Jo Jorgensen dzi (viɖekpɔkpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ si nye ame 45)." Gawu la, nutoa me ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be Trump xɔ akɔdada 29,479 koŋ tso Advance Voting, si nye nyatoƒoetotoa ƒe taɖodzinu, gake Biden ya xɔe

claim: Mike Johnson, si nye U.S. Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea ƒe Nuƒolaa, nye sesuku aɖe si wotsɔ ŋkɔ na Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Paul Pressler si wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu emegbe be edɔ egbɔ sesẽe la ƒe tatɔ, gake sukua meʋu le se nu gbeɖe o.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le October 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be U.S. Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea ƒe Dukplɔla, Mike Johnson, nye senyawo ƒe suku aɖe si womeʋu kpɔ o ƒe tatɔ ɣeaɖeɣi. Nya si wogblɔ be Johnson nye tatɔ ƒe eve le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Paul Pressler Sesuku, si wotsɔ ŋkɔ na kplɔla xɔŋkɔ aɖe le Southern Baptist Convention si wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu emegbe be edɔ egbɔ sesẽe. Zãlawo le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeBlueSky (nudzraɖoƒe),X (nudzraɖoƒe) kpleFacebook (nudzraɖoƒe) kaka nya la, ma Johnson ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe kple nuŋɔŋlɔ si xlẽ be, "Sesuku si me Mike Johnson nye Dean hena 2yrs si meʋu kpɔ o eye sukuvi aɖeke menɔ esi o la woyɔna be Judge Paul Pressler School of Law. Paul Pressler ma ke si nɔ ŋgɔ na Southern Baptist Convention & amesi ŋutsu 6 tsɔ nya ɖe eŋu (si me ɖevi hã le) ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbegbegblẽnɔnɔ." Nusi bia biabia sia be: Nukae nye Mike Johnson ƒe Grindr asiléƒea? pic.twitter.com/B0NNujB0kU — Cheri Jacobus (@CheriJacobus) October 8, 2025 Nya si wogblɔ be wotsɔ ŋkɔ na Johnson be wòanye Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Paul Pressler Sesuku ƒe tatɔ la nye nyateƒe, abe alesi nya siwo wogblɔ be sukua meʋu le se nu gbeɖe o eye wotso Pressler nu emegbe be ewɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbegbegblẽnɔnɔ hã ene. Woɖoe be sukua nanye Louisiana Kristotɔwo ƒe Yunivɛsiti (LCU), si woyɔna ɣemaɣi be Louisiana Kɔledzi ƒe akpa aɖe. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Paul Pressler Sesuku ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la li woate ŋu akpɔ le Internet Nudzraɖoƒe ƒe Wayback Machine, si me gbedasi si woŋlɔ tso Dean Mike Johnson gbɔ kpe ɖe eƒe foto ŋu hã le. Le gbedasi la me la, Johnson yɔ senyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ be “yɔyɔ kɔkɔ kple bubume,” eye be Louisiana Kɔledzi ƒe senyawo ƒe suku yeyea ƒe taɖodzinue nye be “yeahe hehe, adzra ɖo ahado ŋusẽ dzidzime ma si nye “senyalawo kple kplɔla siwo si dzitsinya le.” Johnson ƒe gbedasi bliboa xlẽ be: Ðewohĩ mehiã gbeɖe be ŋutsu kple nyɔnu nyuiwo nage ɖe senyawo me o. Se la nye yɔyɔ kɔkɔ kple bubume, eye wona mɔnu tɔxɛ aɖe senyalawo be woati nyateƒe yome, asubɔ hadomegbenɔnɔ, eye woakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe dekɔnuwo dzi.Amerika hiã eƒe dzidzime si gbɔna si nye senyalawo kple kplɔla siwo tsɔa dzitsinya nyuiwo wɔa dɔe be woaxɔ agbanɔamedzi sia, eye woage ɖe dɔa me menye be yewoakpɔ yewoƒe agbemenuhiahiãwo ko o—ke boŋ be yewoawɔ tɔtrɔ. Louisiana Kɔledzi Sesuku ƒe dɔdasi anye be wòana hehe dzidzime si gbɔna ma, adzrae ɖo ahado ŋusẽe. Nufialawo kple dɔdzikpɔla siwo doa vevie nu eye wodea bubu wo ŋu ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkɔwo ƒe xexlẽdzesi, tsɔ kpe ɖe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya kple nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ ƒe mɔnu yeyewo ŋu, ana míate ŋu ana senyawo ŋuti hehenana ƒe ɖoɖo deŋgɔ aɖe si wotu ɖe kɔnyinyi siwo ŋu wodea bubui ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe dzi. Míaƒe senyalawo akpɔ viɖe tso sukuviwo kple nufialawo ƒe xexlẽme si bɔbɔ me, kple ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe nufialawo kple kpeɖeŋutɔ nufialawo ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna kple woƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔ, siwo dome ʋɔnudrɔ̃lawo kple senyala siwo nye kplɔla nyanyɛwo le woƒe dɔwo me hã le.Dɔdaƒe kple dɔsrɔ̃ɖoɖowo ana hehexɔxɔ si me kɔ nyuie nanyo ɖe edzi, eye woatrɔ asi le míaƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ sesẽa ŋu koŋ be wòana hehe sukuvi ɖesiaɖe le aɖaŋu ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo le lawyering.Menye ɖeko sukunuwulawo adzra ɖo be yewoana subɔsubɔdɔ tɔxɛ yewoƒe asisiwo ko o, ke boŋ kplɔla sesẽ na yewoƒe nutoawo. Louisiana College School of Law ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ si nye, "Gɔmeɖoanyi Matrɔmatrɔ," lɔ̃ ɖe nyateƒe si de ŋgɔ wu, míaƒe dukɔa ƒe agbenyuinɔnɔ kple mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe domenyinu si ƒo ke ɖe to ɖe eme vevie, kple sedziɖuɖu ƒe vevienyenye dzi.Ne wodi be woakpɔ ablɔɖe ta la, ele be woagase gɔmeɖoanyi mawo gɔme ake ahaxɔ wo ɖe eme. Míaƒe habɔbɔa kple dɔdzikpɔlawo da akpe ɖe kpekpeɖeŋu si míexɔ dzonɔamemetɔe le agbagbadzedze sia me ta, eye míele mɔ kpɔm vevie esi míele dzadzraɖo dodzidzɔnamewo dzi yina na míaƒe Fall 2012 ƒe gɔmedzedze ƒe klass kple mɔɖeɖedɔa wɔwɔ. Akpe na mi ɖe miaƒe ɖetsɔleme ta, eye míexɔ mi nyuie ɖe Louisiana College School of Law me. AYouTube video si Wildcats Media YouTube channel, si nye axa si woɖo na LCU ƒe Wildcats kple Lady Wildcats kamedefefewɔhawo ta le Sept. 1, 2010 dzi, ɖe Johnson gblɔ nya aɖewo tso eƒe ɖoɖo be wòanye dean ŋu. Le videoa me la, Johnson tsi tre ɖe megbenya aɖe si dzi Louisiana Kɔledzi ƒe dzesi le ŋgɔ eye wòdze eƒe nuƒo si xɔ miniti enyi kloe gɔme be, "Enye bubu gã aɖe nam be maxɔ ɖoƒe sia kple kuxi sia be menye dɔwɔƒe gã sia ƒe tatɔ ɖola." Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo abe The Associated Press (AP),MSNBC kpleBusiness Insider ka nya ta tso Johnson ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔ nye dean ŋu le eƒe tiatia abe Aƒea ƒe Nuƒolaa ene megbe. Míeɖo Johnson ƒe dɔwɔƒe kple LCU be woagblɔ woƒe susu tso Johnson ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wònye Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Paul Pressler Sesuku si megali o ƒe tatɔ ŋu eye míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míese nya sia. Le enu

claim: Le December 2025 me la, hadzila Dolly Parton ɖe gbeƒãe be yeahe yeƒe hadzidziwo katã tso Amazon, eye wòyɔ eɖola Jeff Bezos ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ kple U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu Le December 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka be hadzila Dolly Parton he eƒe hadzidziwo katã tso Amazon ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eye wòyɔ Amazon ɖola Jeff Bezos ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ kple U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump. Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe, nudzraɖoƒe) koŋue nya sia kaka ɖo, afisi wòƒo nu tso eŋu le akpe geɖe me le. Snopes xlẽlawo hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí be yewoabia be nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe hã. Nuxlẽla ɖeka ŋlɔ bena, "Nya sia si woŋlɔ tso Dolly Parton ƒe eƒe hadzidzi ɖeɖeɖa le Amazon ŋu dze abe ɖikeke le eŋu ene. Taflatse mikpɔ nyateƒenyawo ɖa." Facebook zãla @Tennessee Hearts da nɔnɔmetata aɖe si kaka ɖe teƒe geɖe si me Parton kple Trump le. Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi la dze egɔme be: “Nyɔ, Jeff.” — Dolly Parton ɖe gbeƒãe zi ɖeka be yeahe yeƒe hadzidzi kple dɔmenyonunana ƒe nuwɔwɔ aduaduwo katã tso Amazon, eye wòɖe dzitsitsi vevie ɖe Jeff Bezos ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ kpoo kple Dukplɔla tsãtɔ T.r.u.m.p. Nya la trɔ kabakaba zu nya mamlɛtɔ si wogblɔ le dutoƒo si na Bezos kple dukɔa siaa ƒe mo wɔ yaa. Parton ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple nya si wogblɔ tso eƒe haƒoƒo hehe tso Amazon ŋu siaa nye esiwo wowɔ, gake — anɔ eme be ɖe Internet dzi ŋugbedodo ta. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be Parton ɖe gbeƒãe alea o, eye nukpɔkpɔ ƒe dzesiwo ɖee fia be nunya wɔwɔe (AI) ye he ŋutinyaa vɛ. Google didi le nya veviawo ŋu, "Dolly Parton 'nyɔ Jeff,'" koŋ ɖe emetsonu siwo ku ɖe nya si ŋu nya ku ɖo ŋu fia, ke menye nyatakaka siwo tso nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ xɔŋkɔwo gbɔ o: (Google.com) Parton hã meɖe gbeƒã ma tɔgbe aɖeke le eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo o. Ke boŋ ame alo ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋutinyaa lae kpa ŋutinya bliboa. Woƒe taɖodzinue nye be yewoakpɔ ga tso boblododo me le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo do ƒome tso Facebook nyatakaka siwo míeyɔ va yi me. Ŋutinya si ku ɖe Parton ƒe eƒe hadzidzi ɖeɖeɖa le Amazon ŋu la sɔ kple nyakpakpa. Nya si woŋlɔ la do ƒome kple ŋutinya aɖe le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye "hoaus.feji.io," ke menye nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si le se nu o. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, eƒe hadzidzi kple nutala ƒe ŋkɔ gakpɔtɔ le Amazon Music ƒe mɔ̃ dzi. AI-dzidzime ƒe dzesiwo hã nɔ Parton ƒe nɔnɔmetata si le nyatakaka si woma me. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, edze abe Parton ƒe ŋgɔgbe aɖu ɖeka ƒe lolome mesɔ o eye mesɔ o ene. (Facebook zãla @Tennessee Hearts) Snopes do ka kple Facebook ƒe axaa dzikpɔla aɖe be yeabia nya tso nyakpakpa ŋutinya siwo woɖe fia le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ŋu, eye yeawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Be Snopes naxlẽ nu geɖe la, egblɔ ŋutinya bubu si gblɔ be Parton ʋu lãwo takpɔƒe aɖe kple nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Parton Parton va zu vidzĩ si wogblẽ ɖi la dzikpɔla le se nu ŋu va yi.

claim: Soursop sesẽ wu atikewɔmɔnu zi gbɔ zi 10,000
evidence: Ðe soursop ate ŋu axɔ ɖe atikewɔmɔnu teƒe nyateƒea?  Ðe soursop wɔa dɔ nyuie wu atikewɔmɔnua?  Ao, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be soursop sesẽ wu atikewɔmɔnu zi gbɔ zi 10,000 o. Nusɔsrɔ̃ siwo wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me kple lãwo li, gake amegbetɔwo ƒe dodokpɔ aɖeke meɖo kpe nya sia dzi o. Wozãa chemo ƒe akɔntabubu 2.3% si woyɔna zi geɖe la le mɔ gbegblẽ nu eye woɖenɛ le nya siwo ƒo xlãe me. Soursop ateŋu ahe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu abe lãmekawo kple aklã ƒe gbegblẽ ene hã vɛ. Ezazã ɖe atike siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi le teƒe ate ŋu anye afɔku.  Last Updated on July 3, 2025 by Dr Priyamvada Quick Take Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe do susua ɖa be woatsɔ soursop na kansa. Egblɔ be soursop sesẽ wu atikewɔmɔnu zi gbɔ zi 10,000. Esi míedzro nyateƒenyawo me vɔ la, míekpɔe be nya sia nye alakpa.  The Claim Instagram nyatakaka aɖe ʋli soursop ta na kansa. Enye atikutsetse si le teƒe xɔdzowo, eye wònye dzɔdzɔmetike sẽŋu aɖe na kansa, eye wogblɔ be ewɔa dɔ wu atikewɔmɔnu sãsãsã. Egblɔ hã be atikewɔmɔnu kpena ɖe ame tsitsi 2.3% ŋu ko be woatsi agbe ƒe atɔ̃ eye be soursop mekpɔa ŋusẽ aɖeke ɖe edzi o.  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Ðe soursop sesẽ wu atikewɔmɔnu zi gbɔ zi 10,000a?  Ao, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si ɖo kpe soursop zazã na kansa dzi o. Numekuku aɖewo, abe esi tso Journal of Medicinal Chemistry me le ƒe 1997 me ene, ɖee fia be soursop ƒe atikewo ate ŋu awu no me dɔdzẽ lãmenugbagbeviwo le dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me, eye numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le ƒe 2016 me le Scientific Reports me ɖe ŋusẽ ma tɔgbe ɖe prostate kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo dzi le sisiblisiwo me. Gake menye amegbetɔwo ƒe dodokpɔwoe esiawo nye o, eye numekuku aɖeke metsɔ soursop sɔ kple atikewɔmɔnu tẽ o. Nya si wogblɔna be ŋusẽ le ye ŋu zi gbɔ zi 10,000 la nye nyagbɔgblɔ si gbɔ eme si ŋu dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele o.  Be míase egɔme nenye be soursop ate ŋu axɔ ɖe atikewɔmɔnu teƒe la, míeƒo nu kple Ðɔkta Akanksha Chhabra, si nye Atikewɔwɔ me Dɔdzẽŋutinunyala le Max Healthcare, New Delhi. Eɖe eme be, "Woƒoa nu tso Soursop ŋu zi geɖe le internet dzi, gake ele be míaɖɔ ŋu ɖo. Numekuku aɖewo siwo wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔwo me ɖee fia be ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo dzi, gake ema mesɔ gbɔ kura be woagblɔ be ewɔa dɔ le dɔnɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo me o. Gake atikewɔmɔnu ya nye atikewɔwɔ si woɖo anyi nyuie si wodo kpɔ be ele dedie eye wòdo tso eme hã. Míehiã dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi sẽŋuwo hafi abu soursop be enye tiatia si ŋu kakaɖedzi le gɔ̃ hã."  Míedo ka kple Ðɔkta Pooja Khullar, si nye Kekeli ƒe Dɔdzẽŋutinunyala le Dharamshila Narayana Super Specialty Hospital, New Delhi, hã be wòaxɔ eƒe nukpɔsusuwo. Egblɔ be, "Ele bɔbɔe be woahe ame ɖe dzɔdzɔmetikewo abe soursop ene ŋu, gake kpeɖodzi sẽŋu aɖeke meli be ate ŋu ada kansa le amegbetɔwo me o. Nusi wɔa dɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me mefiaa dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ le xexeame ŋutɔŋutɔ ƒe atikewɔwɔ me ɣesiaɣi o. Le atike mawo tɔgbe dzi ko ate ŋu ahe beléle nyuitɔ ɖe megbe eye wòana dɔlélea nayi ŋgɔ. Ele be woatu kansa dada ɖe mɔnu siwo ŋu woɖo kpee le atikewɔnyawo me eye eŋutinunyalawo nafia mɔe dzi ɣesiaɣi."  Ðe atikewɔmɔnu kpena ɖe ame tsitsi 2.3% ŋu ko be woatsi agbe ƒe atɔ̃a?  Ao, esia nye ameflunya. Xexlẽme si nye 2.3% tso ƒe 2004 me numekuku aɖe si Morgan, Ward, kple Barton wɔ le Clinical Oncology me, si bu akɔnta be atikewɔmɔnu kpena ɖe ame tsitsiwo ƒe kansadɔlélawo katã ƒe 2.3% ŋu le Australia. Esia mefia be atikewɔmɔnu kpena ɖe dɔnɔ siwo xɔe ƒe 2.3% ko ŋu o. Numekukua lé ŋku ɖe kansadɔnɔwo katã ŋu, eye amesiwo mexɔa chemo o hã le eme. Le kansa tɔxɛwo abe no me dɔdzẽ, dɔdzẽ si le dɔgboa me, alo vidzidɔ me dɔdzẽ gome la, atikewɔmɔnu ate ŋu ana agbetsitsi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ nadzi ɖe edzi 5-10% alo esi wu nenema, le afɔɖeɖe kple ƒomevi nu. Akɔntabubu sia gbɔgblɔ le mɔ gbegblẽ nu ate ŋu aɖe akpa si atikewɔmɔnu wɔna le kansa dada nyuie me dzi akpɔtɔ madzemadzee.  Ðe woɖo kpe edzi be soursop tɔa ŋku kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dzidzime geɖea?  Ao, wozã soursop le atikewɔwɔ me le teƒewo abe Caribbean kple South America ene hena lãmesẽnya vovovowo, siwo dome kansa hã le. Gake zazã tso blema ke mefia be woɖo kpe edzi be ewɔa dɔ o. Ŋutinya alo dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke meɖee fia be soursop tɔa ŋku kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo nyuie le mɔ si sɔ kple egbegbe atikewɔwɔwo nu o. Togbɔ be asixɔxɔ le dekɔnu ƒe nuwɔnawo ŋu hã la, ehiã be woada asi ɖe wo dzi le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me be woatsɔ aɖo kpe dedienɔnɔ kple dɔwɔwɔ nyuie dzi le kansa dada me, si mele soursop me o.  Ðe soursop mekpɔa ŋusẽ aɖeke ɖe edzi oa?  Ao, to vovo na nya si post la gblɔ la, soursop ate ŋu agblẽ nu le ame ŋu vevie. Atike aɖe si woyɔna be annonacin le eme, si numekukuwo, abe esi tso Franseawo ƒe Ɣetoɖoƒe Indies ene, do ƒome kple ahɔhɔ̃mekawo ƒe kuxiwo abe ʋuʋu ƒe kuxi siwo ɖi Parkinson ƒe dɔlélea ene. Enono enuenu alo eɖuɖu fũ ate ŋu agblẽ nu le ayiku kple aklã hã ŋu. Togbɔ be zi geɖe la, soursop-kutsetse ɖuɖu le agbɔsɔsɔ si sɔ me mele dedie o hã la, eŋudɔwɔwɔ abe kansa dada ene atikewɔlawo ƒe mɔfiame manɔmee ate ŋu anye afɔku.  Ðe mɔxexe ɖe dɔlélea nu to soursop dzi nyo wu kansadɔdada bɔbɔewoa?  Ao, Dadasɔ

claim: Sɔhɛ siwo le Bihar gblẽ nu le BJP ŋgɔnɔla aɖe ƒe ʋu ŋu do ŋgɔ na dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe akɔdada.
evidence: Nya gbogbo aɖewo siwo wogblɔ be woɖe ɖekakpuiwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si le Bihar fia wodze BJP ŋgɔnɔla aɖe ƒe ʋu dzi le Bihar sewɔtakpekpe ƒe akɔdada me la le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le videoa ƒe video klipi me la, wogblɔ be ame geɖe le kpe dam ʋua hele afɔ ƒom eƒe ʋuƒoa.  An Instagram post by ajay_yadav_ydu1c shows the video with a description: बिहार हैह ओं भाजपां को चलील काली नेली 😂 विदाई योग्यता तैरात आतुर भूल थार A similar post is shared on social media. Àte ŋu akpɔe le afisia kple afisia.  NYATEƑENYAWO ME DZROÐOÐO NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nya si wogblɔ la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be enye Ameflunya.  Esi NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa nɔ nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo me la ƒe Nɔnɔmetata Didi le megbe la, wodi videoawo tso Gen Z ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu siwo wowɔ le Nepal gbɔ. Medo ƒome kple Bihar Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia kura o.  Abe alesi nyadzɔdzɔ geɖewo gblɔe ene la, le nyateƒe me la, video klipi la ɖe ʋunyaʋunyawɔla siwo le Pokhara fia wonɔ Nepal dziɖuɖumegã aɖe ƒe ʋu gbãm.  Esi NewsMobile nɔ nya vevi siwo sɔ dim hena kpeɖodzi bubuwo la, mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ/tsoƒe vavã aɖeke si aɖo kpe nutsotsoa dzi o. Ne ɖe wònye nyateƒe la, anye ne nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gãwo aƒo nu tso eŋu le mɔ si keke ta wu nu.  Eyata míate ŋu aƒo nya ta be wotsɔ alakpanyawo do ƒome kple video klipi si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si tso Nepal ƒe GenZ ƒe zitɔtɔ me gbã la, kple Bihar ƒe tiatia siwo wowɔ nyitsɔ laa. claim: "Womele ɣleti atɔ̃ ƒe hehe si woxɔna tsã la xɔm o. ... Hehe si wona ICE dɔwɔlawo fifia nye ŋkeke 47."
evidence: Amedzrowo kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe amegã aɖe da tu Minneapolis nyɔnu aɖe wòku le eƒe ʋu me le Jan. 7 dzi la na wova lé ŋku ɖe hehexɔxɔ ƒe nudidi siwo nɔ anyi le Trump ƒe ɣeyiɣia me ŋu geɖe wu. Le CNN ƒe "State of the Union" Jan. 11 dzi la, U.S. Sen. Mark Warner, D-Va., gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Jake Tapper be Trump dziɖuɖua ɖe ICE dɔwɔlawo ƒe hehexɔxɔ dzi kpɔtɔ esime wole eƒe amewo xɔxɔ ɖe dɔ me dzim ɖe edzi. Warner gblɔ be: "Miɖo ŋku edzi be míele ŋusẽ dom ICE ƒe dɔwɔla 10,000 bubuwo." "Womele ɣleti atɔ̃ ƒe hehe si wowɔna tsã la xɔm o. Le nyateƒe me la, Jake, hehe si wona ICE dɔwɔlawo fifia nye ŋkeke 47. Nukatae ŋkeke 47? Elabena Donald Trump ye nye dukplɔla 47 lia." Ezã xexlẽme sia hã le Jan. 8 esime wònɔ nu ƒom kple numeɖela si ɖea mɔ ɖe nu ŋu eye le Jan. 12 dzi le CNBC ƒe "Squawk Box." Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ bubuwo, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo gbugbɔ nya ma ke gblɔ le ŋkeke siwo kplɔ ICE ƒe amegã Jonathan Ross da tu Renee Good megbe. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua ɖo kpe edzi na nyadzɔdzɔhabɔbɔ geɖe be yeɖe ɣeyiɣi didi si amedzrowo ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe hehexɔxɔ xɔna la dzi kpɔtɔ, esime wònɔ nya hem ɖe dɔwɔƒe aɖewo ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ ŋu eye yegbe be yemaɖo nyabiase siwo woatsɔ akplɔe ɖo ŋu o. ICE alo DHS meɖo PolitiFact ƒe biabiawo ŋu o. Míete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi nenye be hehexɔxɔ ŋkekeawo ƒe xexlẽme do ƒome kple Trump ƒe ɖoƒe abe dukplɔla 47 lia ene o. The Associated Press ka nya ta be Ross nye ameɖeɖe le dukɔa me ƒe amegã le dɔwɔƒea tso ƒe 2015 me, eyata wowɔ hehexɔxɔ ƒe dzidzenu siwo nɔ anyi do ŋgɔ, siwo didi wu la te. Warner, si meɖo nya ŋu na PolitiFact o la gblɔ le CNN be ehiã be woawu Good’s wuwu ŋuti numekukua nu hafi amewo naƒo nya ta. Esi Tapper ɖee fia Warner be ICE dɔwɔla si da tu Good "ƒe 10 ya teti ƒe nuteƒekpɔkpɔ le esi," Warner gblɔ be, "Nenemae wòanɔ nenema, eye agate ŋu adzɔ be esia tae wòle be numekuku nanɔ anyi ɖo." Amedzrowo kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe hehexɔlawo srɔ̃a tudada le xɔme tudadaƒe le Dukɔa ƒe Sedzikpɔlawo ƒe Hehenaƒe le Brunswick, Ga. le Aug. 21, 2025. (AP) Hehenaƒea ƒe nuƒoƒo tso The Atlantic August ŋutinya si nye "Fast Times at Immigration and Customs Enforcement" me. Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Nick Miroff ŋlɔ bena woɖe hehenana kpovitɔ yeye siwo woɖena le dukɔa me dzi kpɔtɔ tso abe ɣleti atɔ̃ ene va ɖo ŋkeke 47, eye wòyɔ amegã etɔ̃ siwo ƒe ŋkɔ womeyɔ o. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be: “Dɔwɔƒea ƒe amegãwo ɖe ɣeyiɣi ma dzi kpɔtɔ va ɖo afã kloe, eye eƒe akpa aɖe to Spaingbe me nusɔsrɔ̃wo ɖeɖeɖa me.” "Woɖe sukudede ƒe hehexɔxɔ dzi kpɔtɔ va ɖo ŋkeke 47, amegã etɔ̃ gblɔ nam, xexlẽmea tia elabena Trump nye dukplɔla 47 lia. DHS ƒe amegãwo gblɔ be hehexɔxɔa axɔ ŋkeke ade le kwasiɖa me hena kwasiɖa enyi." Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na Washington Examiner be The Atlantic ƒe nyatakakaa nye "aʋatso," elabena hehexɔxɔ xɔa kwasiɖa enyi. Gake Examiner ŋutinyaa yɔ ICE ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla Todd Lyons be eɖo kpe kwasiɖa enyi ƒe hehexɔxɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si nye dɔwɔŋkeke ade kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa dzi. Ema nye hehexɔxɔ ŋkeke 48. Nyabiase siwo wobiaa enuenu ƒe axa si le ICE ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la ɖe hehexɔxɔ ƒe ɖoɖowɔɖi si do xoxo la fia, eye wògblɔ be ame yeye siwo woaɖe le dukɔa me awu hehexɔxɔ nu ɣleti atɔ̃ kloe — kwasiɖa atɔ̃ ƒe gbegbɔgblɔ kple kwasiɖa 16 ƒe sedziwɔwɔ. AP ka nya ta le August me be dɔwɔƒea "ɖe Spaingbe me nudidiwo dzi kpɔtɔ be yeaɖe hehexɔxɔ dzi akpɔtɔ kwasiɖa atɔ̃," eye wòyɔ nya tso Caleb Vitello, amesi kpɔa ICE hehexɔxɔ dzi. Vitello gblɔ na AP be woatsɔ gbegɔmeɖeɖe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe dɔwɔƒewo akpe ɖe Spaingbe me hehe si dzi woɖe la ŋu. Nyadzɔdzɔhabɔbɔwo kple dɔdzikpɔlawo ka nya ta be hehexɔxɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo le kpuie wu ŋkeke 48 le ɣleti siwo va yi nyitsɔ laa me: DHS ƒe amegã aɖe si ŋkɔ womeyɔ o gblɔ na NBC News le October me be le gɔmedzedzea me la, ICE ɖe eƒe hehexɔxɔ dzi kpɔtɔ tso kwasiɖa 13 va ɖo enyi hafi gaɖee kpuie va ɖo kwasiɖa ade. Dziɖuɖu ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã, si nye nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si ƒoa nu tso dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ŋu, ka nya ta le Jan. 5 dzi be DHS ɖe ICE dɔwɔlawo ƒe hehexɔxɔ dzi kpɔtɔ tso ɣleti ade "va ɖo abe kwasiɖa ade ene." DHS megblɔ nya si me kɔ tso kpovitɔ yeyewo ƒe hehexɔxɔ ŋu tso esime woda tu Minneapolis o. DHS ƒe amegã aɖe gblɔ na People magazine le Jan. 8 dzi be, "Hehenana be woazu Sedziwɔwɔ kple Ðeɖeɖa Dɔwɔƒe ƒe amegã xɔ kwasiɖa 8," eye wògbe be yemagblɔ ŋkeke agbɔsɔsɔme o. Ka nya ta be: "Dziɖuɖumegã la meɖo PEOPLE ƒe biabia be woana numekɔkɔ ŋu enumake o, elabena kwasiɖa enyi sɔ kple ɣeyiɣi si The Atlantic ka nya ta va yi." Todd Lyons, si nye U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla le nu ƒom na nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo le ablaɖeɖe ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃a ŋu le Dukɔa ƒe Sedzikpɔlawo ƒe Hehenaƒe le Brunswick, Ga. le Aug. 21, 2025. (AP) Esi Ross wɔ dɔ na ICE ƒe ewo ta la, anye ne ewɔ ɖe previou dzi

claim: Email siwo gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si megali o ŋlɔ gblɔ be ena atike siwo nye Microsoft ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila Bill Gates hena gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe dzodzro sesẽ aɖe be "yeatsɔ akpɔ gbɔdɔdɔ kple Russia nyɔnuviwo me tsonuwo gbɔ."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu E-mail eve siwo dze abe Epstein ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo alo nuŋlɔɖi siwo tso Epstein gbɔ na eya ŋutɔ ene la nɔ nyatakaka siwo U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖe ɖe go le January 2026 ƒe nuwuwu dome. Gates ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye "nyakpakpa kura eye wonye alakpa kura." Nya siwo wogblɔ be woyɔ Microsoft ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila Bill Gates ƒe ŋkɔ le nyatakaka yeye siwo ku ɖe gadzikpɔla Jeffrey Epstein si ŋu ŋukpe le ŋu la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le January ƒe nuwuwu kple February ƒe gɔmedzedze le ƒe 2026. Nya sia kaka esi U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖe nyatakaka miliɔn geɖe bubu ɖe go ku ɖe eƒe numekuku le Epstein ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu. Zãlawo le Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe) kpleInstagram (nudzraɖoƒe) ma nya siwo wogblɔ tso e-mail siwo wogblɔ be Epstein gbɔ le faɛl siwo gblɔ be Gates xɔ STD le "gbɔdɔdɔ kple Russia nyɔnuviwo" me. A post shared by India Today (@indiatoday) Kpuie ko la, nya si wogblɔ tso emailawo ƒe anyinɔnɔ ŋu la nye nyateƒe. Snopes le eɖokui si ɖo kpe edzi be e-mail eve mawo tɔgbe nɔ Epstein ƒe faɛl ƒe hatsotso yeyetɔ si DOJ ɖe ɖe go le Jan. 30, 2026. Edze abe e-mail eveawo siaa nye nuŋɔŋlɔ alo nuŋlɔɖi siwo tso Epstein gbɔ na eɖokui ene, abe alesi eɖola kple amesi xɔe ƒe agblewo ŋlɔ Epstein ƒe e-mail adrɛs,jeevacation@gmail.com ene. Snopes mete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi le eɖokui si nenye be Gates alo ame bubu aɖekee ɖo e-mailawo ɖe Gates alo ame bubu aɖeke tsɔ wu Epstein ŋutɔŋutɔ kpɔ alo xlẽ wo kpɔ o —alo nenye be nya siwo wogblɔ le gbedasiawo me nye nyateƒe —gake gbe si le e-mailawo me la dze nyuie to nusiwo ezãlawo ma le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me. Gates ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na Snopes be nya siwo Epstein gblɔ la menye nyateƒe kura o. Le anemail si woŋlɔ le July 18, 2013 dzi le 11:40 a.m. me la, Epstein ŋlɔ agbalẽ aɖe si dze egɔme be, "dear bill, nyemate ŋu axɔe ase be ètiae be yeaŋe aɖaba aƒu míaƒe xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ si tu le ƒe 6 siwo va yi me dzi o." The New York Times ka nya ta be Epstein ŋlɔ gbedasi sia le agbagbadzedze be yeawɔ ɖoɖo ɖe nubabla aɖe ŋu le Gates ƒe gɔmeɖoanyia kple JPMorgan Chase dome si medze edzi o megbe. Email la yi edzi ƒo nu tso dziɖeleameƒo si dze abe ɖe Epstein kpɔ le dɔwɔƒe sia tɔgbe ƒe gbagbã me kple alesi wòakpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe alesi dukɔa bua” Epstein ƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ dzii ŋu tsitotsito. The line in the email pertaining to the rumor at hand read: what I did receive however was an unfriendly strongly worded email, si gblɔ nam alesi mate ŋu awɔ dɔe eye be mele be makpɔ mɔ na wò hena gakpekpeɖeŋu ɖedzesi aɖeke le etsɔme o, BE matsɔ vlododo akpe ɖe abi si nèxɔ ŋu si nèle kuku ɖem nam be taflatse matutu email siwo ku ɖe wò std ŋu la ɖa, wò biabia be mana dɔlékuiwutike siwo nàte ŋu ana le adzame na Melinda kple la wò vidzinu ŋuti numeɖeɖe. "Melinda" fia Melinda French Gates, si nye Gates Foundation ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila ɖeka, amesi ɖe Bill Gates vaseɖe esime wogbe wo nɔewo le ƒe 2021. Le anemail me tso ŋkeke ma ke dzi kple ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi si nye 12:39 p.m. — mede gaƒoƒo ɖeka le e-mail gbãtɔ megbe o — Epstein ŋlɔ bena "yetso nya me be yeaɖe asi le nye ɖoƒea ŋu enumake," togbɔ be edze abe Epstein mexɔ ɖoƒe aɖeke le se nu le Gates Foundation o hã. Email la yi edzi gblɔ be Epstein "ge ɖe srɔ̃ɖeɖe me nyaʋiʋli sesẽ aɖe me le Melinda kple Bill dome." Email la ƒo nu tso ɖoɖo siwo wogblɔ be Epstein wɔ na Gates ŋu be, "Tso kpekpeɖeŋu nana Bill be wòaxɔ atike vɔ̃ɖiwo, be wòate ŋu akpɔ gbɔdɔdɔ kple russia nyɔnuviwo me tsonuwo gbɔ, va ɖo eƒe trysts manɔsenu, kple nyɔnu srɔ̃tɔwo, dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ dzi va ɖo biabia tso esi be wòana adderall fro bridge tournamnts." Email la ƒo eta be: "Mese le ɖokuinye me be menyi fe le xɔ̃nyewo kple futre dɔwɔhatiwo ŋu be malɔ̃ ɖe agbenyuinɔnɔ ƒe kpododonu aɖe dzi, abia tsɔtsɔke eye mayi nye agbe dzi." Gates ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na Snopes to e-mail dzi be nya siwo wogblɔ le e-mailawo me la nye "nya siwo me susu mele kura o eye wonye alakpa kura," eye wògblɔ kpee be "nu ɖeka kolia si nuŋlɔɖi siawo ɖe fia enye Epstein ƒe dziɖeleameƒo be ƒomedodo aɖeke mele ye kple Gates dome si yi edzi o kple didime siwo wòatsɔ atre mɔ̃ ahagblẽ ŋkɔ le eŋu." Le ƒe 2019 me la,The New York Times ka nya ta be Epstein kple Gates dze kpekpe gɔme le ƒe 2011 me, esi wobu fɔ Epstein be ebia gbolo tso ɖevi sue aɖe gbɔ vɔ megbe. Wogblɔ be Epstein tsɔ eɖokui ɖo domenɔla na nubabla aɖe si ŋu wole nu ƒom tsoe le Gates Foundation kple JPMorgan Chase dome be woawɔ theGlobal Health Investment Fund.Nyatakakaa gblɔ be Epstein do susua ɖa be yeaxɔ 0.3% le ga ɖesiaɖe si yeafɔ na dɔa me. Le Gates ƒomea ƒe srɔ̃gbegbe ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe le ƒe 2021 me megbe la, Times ka nya ta be Melinda French Gates ɖo srɔ̃gbegbe ƒe nyawo ɖe ŋgɔ esime pub

claim: Australia ƒe bɔlƒoha ƒe ŋgɔnɔla tsãtɔ Ricky Ponting yɔ India be ‘ame si bua vevesese tegbee’ le esi medo asi ɖa kple Pakistan le Asia Kplu ƒe hoʋiʋlia megbe o ta.
evidence: Indiatɔwo ƒe ƒudzisrafomegã Surya Kumar Yadav he nyaʋiʋliwo vɛ esi wògbe asiƒoƒo kple ehati Pakistantɔ le se nu le Asia Kplu ƒe hoʋiʋli si wowɔ le Dubai Dukɔwo Dome Bɔlƒoƒe le Kwasiɖagbe si va yi megbe. Fifia, nya aɖe si wogblɔ tsɔ ɖe ɖeklemi Yadav ƒe nuwɔna, si wogblɔ be Australiatɔ kriket-ƒola tsãtɔ Ricky Ponting gbɔe wòtso la le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.  Ponting, si wogblɔ be ele nu ƒom na Sky Sports gblɔ be, "Woaɖo ŋku hoʋiʋli sia dzi tegbee kple India be enye amesi bu gãtɔ. Alesi Pakistan-ha la di be yewoado asi ɖa le nuwuwu na wozu ame makumakuwo abe aƒetɔ ƒe fefea ƒe ʋiʋlilawo ene, eye India nye amesi bu madzudzɔmadzudzɔe."  advertisement India Today Fact Check kpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la nye nya si wogblɔ keŋkeŋ. Ponting ŋutɔ hã na nya ma ke me kɔ.  Míaƒe Numekuku Didi be míaɖo kpe edzi nenye be Ponting gblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe ku ɖe Kwasiɖagbe ƒe bɔlƒoƒoa kple emetsonuwo ŋu la, mekpɔ emetsonu aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o. Le Sky Sports ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la, míekpɔe be wota nyatakaka mamlɛtɔ si ku ɖe Ponting ŋu le July 25. Míekpɔ nya aɖeke hã tso Ponting gbɔ tso Asia Cup si le edzi yim ŋu o.  Gake míekpɔ nyatakaka aɖe si wota ɖe News.com.au le September 16 lia dzi, si gblɔ be nya si wogblɔ be Ponting ye gblɔ la nye alakpa. Ede dzesii be esi Ponting ŋutɔ tɔtɔ le nyatakaka mawo tɔgbe ta la, eƒo nu tso nɔnɔmea ŋu le nya aɖe si wòŋlɔ ɖe X dzi le Kuɖagbe.  Emegbe la, míekpɔe be nya si Ponting ŋlɔ tso September 16 dzi la ɖe nya si wogblɔ la ɖa kɔte. Eŋlɔ bena, "Menya be nya aɖewo gblɔna tso gbɔnye le hadome nyadzɔdzɔwo me. Taflatse minyae be nyemegblɔ nya mawo keŋkeŋ o eye le nyateƒe me la, nyemegblɔ nya aɖeke le dutoƒo tso Asia Cup ŋu kura o."  Eyata eme kɔ ƒã be wogblɔ alakpatɔe be Ricky Ponting ye gblɔ nya aɖe si wowɔ totroe, eye wòku ɖe Indiatɔwo ƒe kriket-ha la ŋu.  - Ewu enu Wotae To: Pathikrit Sanyal Wotae le: Sep 16, 2025 Tune In

claim: Wokpɔ agbatsɔʋukula aɖe wònɔ nu ɖam le eƒe ʋua me ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe do ŋgɔ na afɔku si me ame gbogbo aɖewo ku le le 10 Freeway le Ontario, California.
evidence: Wolé agbatsɔʋukula aɖe si xɔ ƒe 21 si tso India, si ŋkɔe nye Jashanpreet Singh, le kwasiɖa si va yi me le esi wògblɔ be etsɔ eƒe agbatsɔʋu afã la ƒo ʋu geɖe le 10 Freeway le Ontario, California, eye wòwu ame etɔ̃.  Tso ɣemaɣi la, video aɖe kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eye wogblɔ be eɖe Singh fia wònɔ nu ɖam le eƒe ʋua me ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe do ŋgɔ na ʋua ƒe gododo. Zãla siwo ma video klipi la gblɔ be ʋukulaa nɔ curry dzram ɖo esime afɔkua dzɔ.  Screengrab from X post by @TodaysNewsco Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe Amit Shah Yɔ India Asrafowo be ‘Army Of Hindutva’?  Kpeɖodzi Nya veviwo didi le United States nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gãwo me mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ƒo nu tso be agbatsɔʋukulaa nɔ nu ɖam hafi wòdze anyi o. Dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo dometɔ aɖeke metsɔ "nuɖaɖa" ƒe akpa si nɔ kakam le internet dzi o.    Esi wotsɔ dɔlékui ƒe videoa ƒe akpa ɖesiaɖe sɔ kple wo nɔewo la, wokpɔe be masɔmasɔwo le eme. Nukpɔkpɔ, akaɖi, kple ʋua ƒe eme si wokpɔna le "nuɖaɖa" ƒe nukpɔkpɔa me mesɔ kple esiwo le nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo ŋu woɖo kpee le Ontario ƒe afɔkua ŋu o.  (L-R) Screengrab from viral clip and screengrab from crash footage featured in ABC7 report Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, nukpɔkpɔ ƒe masɔmasɔwo dze le videoa me — ŋutsua ƒe asi dze abe ɖe wòtro le xɔtunu aɖewo me, zikpuimeka la mede blibo o, eye megbehuhɔ̃ea dze abe ɖe wòtro ene. Ladle si ŋutsua zãna tsɔ ʋuʋua curry la dzena abe ɖe wòtro ene — wo katã nye dzesi siwo fia be wozãa dijitaal asitɔtrɔ le eŋu.    Screengrabs from viral clip Togbɔ be AI deteksi dɔwɔnuwo metsɔ dzesideŋkɔ na clip la be enye nuwɔwɔ kpata o hã la, wokaka video mawo tɔgbe (siwo wokpɔ le afisia, afisia kple afisia) siwo ƒe tsidzesi le Sora (OpenAI ƒe AI video-wɔna ƒe kpɔɖeŋu), siwo me "lɔri ʋukulawo le curry ɖam" le, le internet dzi geɖe.  Screengrabs from Sora videos Tsidzesi aɖe hã le video klipi si kaka la ŋu, @vox_oculi, si nye hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe si gblɔ be yenye "Satire General in The Great Meme War ✯ AI Wizard." Woda videoa ɖe October 23, 2025 dzi, le asiléƒe sia te.    Esi Newschecker do ka kplii la, California Mɔdododzikpɔha (CHP) ɖo kpe edzi be yewomeɖe video aɖeke si ku ɖe numekuku si le edzi yim le afɔkua ŋu la ɖe go o.  Newschecker do asi ɖe nutome senyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe kple dɔwɔƒe aɖe si woyɔ le nudzɔdzɔa ŋu be woana eme nakɔ wu ku ɖe dashcam ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wogblɔ be woɖe la ŋu eye míawɔ kɔpi sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo ko.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe PM Narendra Modi Ðe Gbeƒã Keke Femaxee ƒe Ðoɖo aɖe Na Chhath Pujaa? Ao, Viral Video Is AI-Manipulated Verdict Video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be Jashanpreet Singh nɔ curry ɖam le eƒe agbatsɔʋua me hafi Ontario ƒe afɔkua dzɔ la nye nukpɔkpɔ siwo wotrɔ le mɔ̃ dzi eye fewuɖunya aɖee mae le gɔmedzedzea me.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Amekae kpɔ gome le afɔku si dzɔ le Ontario, California, me?  Wolé ʋukula aɖe si xɔ ƒe 21 si nye Indiatɔ si ŋkɔe nye Jashanpreet Singh le ʋu geɖe ƒe gododo le 10 Freeway si wu ame etɔ̃ megbe.    Q2. Ðe video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si ɖee fia be ele nu ɖam la nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔa?  Ao, videoa me nyawo mesɔ o kple dijitaal tɔtɔ siwo fia be AI ye wɔe alo trɔ asi le eŋu.    Q3. Nukatae alakpa video mawo kakana?  Zi geɖe la, fewuɖunya alo meme nyatakaka siwo AI wɔ la kaka kabakaba le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, afisi nya siwo ƒo xlãe bu le, si wɔnɛ be ezãlawo bua vodadatɔe be fefenyawo nye nyateƒe.  Sources Report By ABC7, Dated October 24, 2025 Lɛta Siwo Woŋlɔ Kple California Mɔdododzikpɔha (CHP) Le October 30, 2025 Ðokuisi Ŋuti Numekuku

claim: Sukudede dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka tso SPM ƒe emetsonuwo ŋu
evidence: Woma nuŋlɔɖi si wogblɔ be enye Malaygbe me, si ƒe tanyae nye "Media statement: Malaysian Certificate of Education (SPM) results", le Facebook dzi le April 1. Eɖe Malaysiatɔwo ƒe aʋawɔnu ƒe dzesi le eme eye edze abe Sukudede Dɔwɔƒee ɖee ɖe go ene, si ɖe amesiwo xɔ dzesi geɖe wu le dukɔa ƒe SPM dodokpɔa me ƒe mama fia -- dodokpɔ si nye sekɛndrisukuviwo ƒe dzodzo le sukudede me -- le ameƒomevinyenye nu.  Nyatakakaa gblɔ be Malay sukuvi 31.43 le alafa me, China sukuvi 88.21 le alafa me kple India sukuvi 81.48 le alafa me xɔ dzesi kɔkɔtɔwo.  Image Screenshot of the false Facebook post, captured on April 2 with a red X added by AFP Malaysia to eƒe Ganyawo Ŋuti Ðoɖo Yeyea vɛ le ƒe 1970-awo me esi wònɔ didim be yeakpɔ ganyawo ƒe vovototo si le ameƒomevi vovovoawo dome gbɔ eye wòto ameƒomevinyenye ƒe xexlẽme ƒe ɖoɖo si wotu ɖe suku kɔkɔwo dzi si doa dzidzɔ na Malaytɔ akpa gãtɔ, amesiwo ƒe xexlẽme mede le yunivɛsitiwo me le ŋutinya me o la ɖe go (archived link).  Woma nuŋlɔɖi ma ke si ɖe alesi wogblɔ be dodokpɔa me tsonuawo ma le ameƒomevinyenye nu fia le teƒe bubu le Facebook dzi le esi Sukudede ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã Mohd Azam Ahmad ɖe gbeƒã ƒe 2025 SPM dodokpɔ me tsonuawo me dzodzro le March 31 dzi megbe kpuie (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖi).  Ke hã, dziɖuɖua ƒe mama ɖe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe mama fia le ɣeyiɣiwo me, dugãwo kple kɔƒenutowo me sukuviwo kple ame siwo di be yewoaxɔ ɖoƒea ƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ bliboa me, gake menye le ameƒomevinyenye nu o.  Nya veviwo didi le Google na wodzro ƒe siwo va yi me tsonu siwo Malaysia Dodokpɔ Habɔbɔ ta ɖe eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi, si meyɔ amesiwo xɔ dzesi nyuitɔwo ƒe mama le ameƒomevinyenye nu o (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe).  Nya veviwo didi emegbe ɖee fia be Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea gbe gbeƒãɖeɖe si le kakam le eƒe Facebook axa si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo le April 1 dzi, eye wògblɔ be eƒe taɖodzinue nye be "yeatɔtɔ hadomegbenɔnɔ" (archived link).  "Sukunyawo Gbɔkpɔha (MOE) meɖe gbeƒã nya aɖeke kpɔ ku ɖe ƒe 2025 Sijil Pelajaran Malaysia (SPM) ƒe dodokpɔ me tsonu siwo wotu ɖe ameƒomevinyenye dzi ŋu o, abe alesi wokakae le internet dzi ene," Malaygbe me nyatakakaa xlẽ.  Image Screenshot of the Malaysian Education Ministry’s Facebook post captured on April 2 Nuŋlɔɖi si le tsatsam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me dzodzro hã ɖee fia be eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ kple eƒe nɔnɔme to vovo tso nya vavã siwo sukudede dɔwɔƒea ɖe ɖe go gbɔ (archived link).  Ŋɔŋlɔdzesi kple alesi woŋlɔe ɖe ɖoɖo nu le nuŋlɔɖi si woama alakpatɔe ƒe lɛta ƒe ta me la to vovo. Agbalẽŋɔŋlɔ ƒe vodadawo hã le eme eye ŋkeke si dzi woɖe nyatakakaa ɖe go la to eŋu.  Image Screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple nya si wogblɔ (miame) kple MOE ƒe nuŋlɔɖi vavãtɔ AFP ɖe alakpanya bubu siwo le tsatsam le Malaysia siwo zãa nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo ɖɔktawo alo nyadzɔdzɔwo alo nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo dziɖuɖua ŋlɔ la ɖa.

claim: U.S. Dɔlélenutsitsi Kple Mɔxexe Ðe Enu Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla, Jim O’Neill, gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be: “Ayiku siwo le lãmesẽ me, siwo susɔ la sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ siwo zɔna le tsatsam evɔ womewɔa wo ŋudɔ o.”
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, O’Neill gblɔ nya sia le nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo le ƒe 2009 me si me wòʋli nya le be ele be woaxe fe na amewo ɖe ŋutinuwo nana ta be woatsɔ ade dzi ƒo na nuwɔna sia. Le August 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, nyadzɔdzɔgblɔhabɔbɔ gbogbo aɖewo ka nya ta be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua tia Lãmesẽ Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Jim O’Neill be wòanye Dɔlélenutsitsi Kple Mɔxexe Ðe Enu Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla. Ema megbe kpuie la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be O’Neill gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be: “Ayiku siwo le lãmesẽ me, siwo megale dɔ wɔm o la sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ siwo zɔna le tsatsam siwo womezãna o.” Nya sia kaka ɖe X, Facebook, Instagram, Reddit, Bluesky kple Threads dzi. CDC ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Jim O'Neill susu be ele be míate ŋu atso nya me be míadzra mía ŋutɔwo ƒe ŋutinuwo ne míedi elabena "ayiku siwo le lãmesẽ me sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ siwo le zɔzɔm le tsatsam, womewɔa wo ŋudɔ o". Nusi nye kuxi si sɔ, gake lala ko vaseɖe esime *e* tso nya me be ele be yeate ŋu adzra wò ŋutinuwo. — Elizabeth Jacobs, PhD (@elizabethjacobs.bsky.social) August 29, 2025 at 7:48 AM Kpuie ko la, O'Neill, amesi ɖo kpe edzi be yeanye CDC ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla le Aug. 29 X ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me la, gblɔ nya si le etame nyateƒe le ƒe 2009 ƒe nuƒo aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Lãmesẽ Nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ le Liƒo dzi," si me wòʋli nya le be ele be amewo nanɔ nenema woxe fe ɖe ŋutinuwo nana ta be woatsɔ ade dzi ƒo na nuwɔna la (tso 8:33 dzi). Eyata míebu nya sia be O’Neill ye gblɔe wòsɔ. CDC ƒe dɔdzikpɔla si le dɔ wɔm, si The Associated Press ɖɔ be ablɔɖedilawo ƒe habɔbɔ le esi la ƒo nu tso viɖe siwo wòxɔ se be lãmesẽdɔwɔƒe si me wodzraa nu faa le ƒe viɖewo anɔ ŋu, vevietɔ le nuto si me ƒudzidelawo le me. (O’Neill ƒe nuƒoa yi edzi le The Seasteading Institute, si nye habɔbɔ aɖe si tsɔ eɖokui na be yeado dugãwo ƒe ƒutsotsoewo ƒe nukpɔsusu ɖe ŋgɔ, alo "nuto siwo dzea dɔ gɔme siwo nɔa tsia dzi le atsiaƒu dzi kple dunyahehe me ɖokuisinɔnɔ ƒe dzidzenu ɖesiaɖe.") Ne míagblɔe bubui la, O’Neill nɔ nya hem be lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ aɖe vi tso ganyawo ƒe ɖoɖo si me se aɖeke mele o eye dziɖuɖua ƒe ŋusẽ boo aɖeke mele eŋu o me. Le nya siwo O’Neill gblɔ tso ŋutinuwo nana ŋu me la, etsɔ ŋutinuwo dodo na ame ƒe kpɔɖeŋu si woate ŋu awɔ le asi me faa sɔ kple United States ƒe ɖoɖo si li fifia, si me fexexe ɖe ŋutinu aɖe ta nye sedzidada. Eyɔ U.S. ŋutinuwo dodo na ame ƒe ɖoɖo si li fifia be "cartelized," eye wòƒo nu tso dukɔwo dome dunyahehe ŋuti nufiafia aɖe si nye be egbegbe dukɔwo wɔa dɔ abe "ganyawo ƒe habɔbɔ" si me dukɔwo ƒe ŋusẽ ɖeka koe le dziɖuɖu dzi le woƒe dumeviwo ƒe gazazã me (kpɔ Axa 7). Seasteading Institute ta O’Neill ƒe aɖabaƒoƒo 24 ƒe nuƒoa ɖe Vimeo dzi. Eƒe nya siwo wògblɔ tso fexexe ɖe ŋutinuwo nana ta ŋu dze egɔme le ga 8:33 eye woŋlɔ wo ɖe ete (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Nyabiase si kplɔe ɖo — le gonyeme la, esi ŋu ŋusẽ le wu eye wòdze ƒã wu: Ðe wòle be woade ŋutinuwo dodo na ame ƒe dzi ƒo loo alo aɖe dzi le eƒoa? Le asi si me wodzraa ŋutinuwo le faa me la, woaɖe mɔ na amesiwo wodo ŋutinu siwo xɔa ame ɖe agbe—alo woƒe nugblẽfexehawo, alo dɔmenyotɔ bubuwo—be woaxe fe na woƒe nunalaawo, si ana dzi na ame geɖe wu be woaɖe agbe geɖe wu. Le habɔbɔ si me amewo ƒe habɔbɔwo le me la, amewo yia edzi kuna kaba akpa eye mehiã o. Le Amerika ƒe cartelized system me la, ame 11 kuna gbesiagbe esime wole ayiku si ate ŋu axɔ woƒe agbe lalam — eye ayiku siwo le lãmesẽ me, siwo susɔ la sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ siwo zɔna le tsatsam evɔ womewɔa wo ŋudɔ o. Snopes lé ŋku ɖe nyateƒenya bubu siwo wogblɔ tso CDC ŋu le Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu evelia me ŋu va yi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya vavã si wogblɔ be dɔwɔƒea ƒe atikewɔmɔnuwo ƒe amegã, Ðɔkta Demetre Daskalakis, ɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le lɛta aɖe si wòŋlɔ tsɔ bu fɔ Lãmesẽnyawo Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ƒe kplɔlanyenye me esi White House ɖe O’Neill si do ŋgɔ na O’Neill le CDC, Susan Monarez, le zi dzi vɔ megbe.

claim: Le ƒe 2022 me la, zãla aɖe si le X — si woyɔna ɣemaɣi be Twitter — ŋlɔ be: "Ƒe 2023: Corona wu enu ... 2026: Hantavirus."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Kwasiɖa ʋee aɖewo le hantavirus ƒe dɔvɔ̃ aɖe si do mo ɖa le meli si tsɔa amewo yia teƒeteƒewo me le April 2026 me megbe la, nya aɖe do mo ɖa le internet dzi be nyatakaka aɖe si wota ɖe Twitter dzi le ƒe 2022 me gblɔe ɖi pɛpɛpɛ be dɔvɔ̃ sia tɔgbe adzɔ. Hantavirus si Mayo Dɔdaƒe ɖɔ be enye "dɔléle si mebɔ o si xɔa ame me" la, amegbetɔwo koŋue toa lãklewo ƒe gbeɖuɖɔ dzi. Associated Press ka nya ta be lãmesẽdɔwɔla siwo le ŋku lém ɖe meli me dɔvɔ̃a ŋu "ka ɖe edzi" be dɔvɔ̃ ƒe afɔku gã aɖeke mele eme o elabena dɔlélea mekaka tso ame ɖeka me yi ame bubu gbɔ bɔbɔe o. Zãlawo onsocial media dze woƒe nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo le ƒe 2022 ƒe tweet si wogblɔ be wogblɔ la gbɔgblɔ gɔme le May 6, 2026. Nya si wògblɔ koe nye, "2023: Corona wu enu ... 2026: Hantavirus." Ame sia ŋlɔ nya 4 ko...Wo katã le kwasiɖa ɖeka me le ƒe 2022 me...Woƒe bio gblɔ be 'xlẽa etsɔme'...Nya sia gblɔ be:2023: Corona Ended2026: HantavirusEya koe nye nya si woŋlɔ abe esia ene.Grok ɖo kpe edzi be wometrɔ asi le eŋu tso '22.Weird. https://t.co/XdqouXPwum — Jordan Crowder (@digijordan) May 7, 2026 Ne míebu nyadzɔdzɔ siwo le edzi yim tso meli me hantavirus ƒe nudzɔdzɔ kpata si gbɔ ame etɔ̃ ƒe ku tso esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm ŋu la, "nyagblɔɖi" si dze abe ɖe wògblɔe ene la kaka kabakaba. Tweet sia, si @iamasoothsayer da ɖe nusi woyɔna ɣemaɣi be Twitter dzi la, nye nyateƒe, ne míebu kpeɖodzi siwo katã li ŋu, eyata míebu nya si wogblɔ be wodae le ƒe 2022 me be enye nyateƒe. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, wogbugbɔe da ɖe afima wu zi 143,000. Snopes di June 11, 2022,nudzraɖoƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si ku ɖe tweet la ŋu le Internet Archive ƒe Wayback Machine dzi, si ɖo kpe edzi be enye nyateƒe eye wodae ɖe dutoƒo ƒe ene kloe do ŋgɔ na hantavirus ƒe dɔvɔ̃a. Be woagblɔ be post la "gblɔe ɖi" be hantavirus ƒe dɔvɔ̃ aɖe ava le ƒe 2026 me la nye kekeɖenudɔ, ke hã. @iamasoothsayer ƒe akɔntabubua nye dutoƒonya ene ko kple ŋuɖoɖo ɖeka vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm, wo katã woda ɖe June 2022. Akɔntaa ƒe bio ƒe akpaa ɖɔ ezãla be enye "ɣletiviŋutinunyala" si "xlẽa etsɔme," gake womenya ne nuŋlɔɖi sia nɔ anyi hafi hantavirus nyatakaka la va xɔ ŋkɔ o. Ate ŋu adzɔ be zãla si si akɔntabubua le la trɔ asi le bio ƒe akpaa ŋu le nyateƒea megbe be wòadze abe ɖe woɖoe koŋ gblɔ etsɔme ɖi ene, evɔ anɔ eme wu be ɣeyiɣia nye nusi dzɔ le vome. Snopes dze agbagba be yeaƒo ka na akɔnta la tɔ eye míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo. X zãla bubu gblɔ be @iamasoothsayer ƒe akɔntabubua ateŋu aɖo "nyagblɔɖi akpe geɖe siwo wogblɔ le vome" ɖe afima hafi atutu nya siwo mehiã o la ɖa le esi nyagblɔɖi ɖeka dzɔ va eme vɔ megbe, le agbagbadzedze be yeadze abe nyagblɔɖila si le se nu ene. Míete ŋu ɖo kpe nukpɔsusu sia dzi o, gake mɔnu alo tameɖoɖo ka kee ɖale eme o, woda tweet la ɖe Twitter dzi nyateƒe le ƒe 2022 me.

Woate ŋu atrɔ Virginia ƒe posugbalẽvi ana to mɔ geɖe nu be woatsɔ akpɔ ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakakawo ta



							Wotae le October 29, 2025 le ga 22:31 me

																																																Marisha GOLDHAMER, ƒe 1999.
											
AFP USA ƒe agbalẽ





Republicantɔ siwo le United States ƒe Virginia nuto me gblɔ be wotsi dzi be agbalẽkotoku siwo wotsɔ trɔa akɔtagbalẽvi siwo woɖo ɖe amewo to posu dzi le Fairfax County ate ŋu aɖe atikemawɔla aɖe ƒe tiatia le senyalagã ƒe hoʋiʋlia me afia, eye woxlɔ̃ nu be esia ana ametafatafa ate ŋu adze tiatiawɔblɔɖea dzi bɔbɔe. Gake nutoa ɖe akɔtagbalẽviwo ƒoƒo ƒe mɔnuwo fia be woatsɔ aƒo asa na nya sia esime numekukuwo ɖee fia be afɔku si le ametafatafa si keke ta tso akɔdada si me ame aɖeke mele o me la le sue ŋutɔ.



"BOMBSHELL DISCOVERY: Holes In Fairfax County, VA, Absentee Ballot Envelopes Conveniently Reveal Who Voter Chose For AG Candidate," xlẽ October 21, 2025 ƒe nyati aɖe si Gateway Pundit, nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe si AFP lé ŋku ɖe nyateƒenyawo ŋu enuenu be ekaka nyatakaka totrowo tso United States ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe ŋu la ƒe tanya."Ne atikemawɔlawo tsɔ woƒe akɔtagbalẽvi de eme ɖe agbalẽkotokua me la, woƒe dzesi na Republicantɔwo ƒe Senyala Gã ƒe ametiakɔdala Jason Miyares dzena to agbalẽkotokua dzi," nyatia gblɔ. "Esia fia be posudɔwɔlawo, tiatiawɔlawo, kple amesiame si le wò akɔtagbalẽvia dzi kpɔm ate ŋu akpɔe ɖa be èda akɔ ɖe Republicantɔ dzi hã – eye wòate ŋu aɖe wò akɔtagbalẽvia ɖa hafi woaxlẽe!"

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Screenshot of a post on X si woɖe le October 28, 2025 dzi
					
Nyati ma tɔgbe dze le Daily Signal me esime nyatakaka siwo tso ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo gbɔ tsɔ do dzimaɖitsitsi ɖe akɔtagbalẽviwo gbugbɔgaɖoɖo ƒe agbalẽkotokuwo ŋu kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.Virginiatɔwo dze akɔdada gɔme kaba eye ame siwo mele dɔ wɔm o la dze akɔdada gɔme le September me do ŋgɔ na November 4 ƒe tiatia si atso nya me le dɔwɔƒe kɔkɔwo katã ŋu le nutoa me.Akɔdadawo ɖee fia be senyalagã ƒe hoʋiʋli si le Republicantɔ si le zi dzi fifia Jason Miyares kple Democrattɔ Jay Jones si le tsitre tsim ɖe eŋu dome la ku kloe dzoxɔxɔ le ɖeɖefiawo megbe be Jones ɖo nyatakakawo ɖe amewo to asitelefon dzi le ƒe 2022 me tsɔ bia be woawɔ dunyahehe me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ɖe ehati sewɔla aɖe ŋu.Fairfax County ye nye ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si me amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo wu le nutoa me eye Republican-ha ƒe amegã siwo le nutoa me ye fɔ dzitsitsi ɖe posu me akɔtagbalẽvi gbugbɔgaŋlɔ ƒe agbalẽkotokuwo ŋu zi gbãtɔ.Le October 17, 2025 dzi la, Fairfax County Republican Kɔmiti ɖo lɛta aɖe ɖa tsɔ to nyatoƒoe be agbalẽvi si wotsɔ gbugbɔa akɔtagbalẽvi ɖonae na ame si mele o ballots "exposes the voter's mark for only one candidate, the Republican Attorney General Jason Miyares."Akpaha ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo bia tso agbalẽŋlɔla si be wòawɔ afɔɖeɖe, eye wogblɔ be: "Fairfax County ƒe tiatiawɔlawo he afɔku geɖe vɛ kple agbalẽkotoku sia ƒe nɔnɔme, si me afɔku si nye be woate ŋu aɖe akɔtagbalẽvi siwo woɖo ɖe amewo to posu dzi la ɖa tiatia hafi woŋlɔ wo ɖe kplɔ̃ dzi" (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Gake anya wɔ be woaƒo akɔtagbalẽvia nu ƒu kple ame tiatiaawo facing in, so no markings show through the hole, the Fairfax County Office of Elections states on its website (archived here).Nutomedzikpɔlawo hã dze le nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe akpawo, tsɔ ɖe alesi woatsɔ akɔtagbalẽvia ade eme be woaƒo asa na ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe dzitsitsi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) fia.Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, nutoa ƒe Tiatiawɔha ƒe Dɔwɔƒe gblɔ na AFP le October 31 ƒe e-mail me be wometrɔ asi le akɔtagbalẽviawo ŋu koŋ o na tiatia sia, gake be ezã aɖaŋu ma ke "le ƒe ene siwo va yi me."Egblɔ be na etsɔme tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ la, "yeabu akɔtagbalẽvi ƒe ɖoɖo ŋu le rela

claim: Moslem ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Abdul wu eƒe zɔhɛ si nɔ eƒe aƒeme, si nye Hindu nyɔnu aɖe, le Delhi.
evidence: Nɔnɔmetata aɖe si tso Hindi nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe TV9 Bharatvarsh gbɔ, si gblɔ be, "Amewuwu le zɔhɛ si le wo gbɔ le Delhi: Ŋutsu dɔ alɔ̃ esi wògblẽ nyɔnu ƒe kuku ɖe ʋu me vɔ megbe," le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (afisia, afisia, kple afisia). Wole egblɔm be Moslem ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Abdul wu eƒe zɔhɛ si nɔ eƒe aƒeme, Hindu nyɔnu aɖe, le Delhi, eye wònɔ eƒe kukua tsɔm le eƒe ʋu me be yeatsɔe aƒu gbe. Postawo gagblɔ be wotɔ tee esime kpovitɔwo nɔ ŋku lém ɖe eŋu, afisi wokpɔe le be eyae wu nyɔnua. Mina míaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ le nyatakaka si woŋlɔ le nyati sia me dzi.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Nya si wogblɔ: Moslem ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Abdul wu eƒe zɔhɛ, si nye Hindu nyɔnu aɖe, le Delhi. Nyateƒenya: Nudzɔdzɔ si woɖe fia le TV9 Bharatvarsh ƒe nɔnɔmetata me la mekpɔa hamea ƒe dzogoe aɖeke o. Nyɔnua si ŋkɔe nye Radha la, eƒe zɔhɛ si nɔ eƒe aƒeme, Virendra Singh, ye wui le Deenpur, Delhi, ke menye Moslem ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Abdul ye wui o. Nyatakakawo ɖo kpe edzi be Virendra ƒoe le nyaʋiʋli aɖe megbe eye emegbe wòtsɔ ame kukua da ɖe ʋu me kple eƒe hadɔwɔla eve ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu. Wolé srɔ̃a Poonam kple lɔ̃xoyɔvi Chetan hã. Dwarka DCP Ankit Singh ɖo kpe edzi na Factly be amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo kple amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii siaa nye Hindutɔwo. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le nyatakakaa me la nye ALAKPA.  Be míaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ la dzi la, míewɔ Google ƒe nya veviwo didi eye míekpɔ TV9 Bharatvarsh ƒe nɔnɔmetata ma ke si woma le asitsaƒea ƒe X asiléƒe le 27 November 2025. Wode woƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka ƒe kadodo hã ɖe nyatakakaa me.  Esi míeto nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si do ƒome kple TV9 Bharatvarsh X ƒe nyatakakaa me la, míekpɔ nudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔa ŋuti nyatakakawo. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nyɔnu si ŋkɔe nye Radha la, eƒe zɔhɛ si nɔ aƒe me si mu aha la wu le Deenpur, le Chhawla kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nuto si le Dwarka nuto me, Delhi, te. Le November 26, 2025 ƒe ŋdi me la, Deenpur Extension nutoa me tɔwo de dzesi nyɔnu aɖe si wotu ɖe ʋu aɖe me eye woxlɔ̃ nu kpovitɔwo. Esi kpovitɔawo ɖo teƒea la, wokpɔe wòku le megbezikpui dzi. Numekukua ɖee fia be enɔ ƒomedodo me kple Virendra Singh si xɔ ƒe 35, si nye nuto ma ke me tɔ. Virendra ʋu nuvlowɔwɔa me esime wobia gbee, eye kpovitɔwo de amewuwu ƒe nya aɖe agbalẽ me helée. Nyadzɔdzɔa meƒo nu tso nya siwo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu o eye wògblɔe kɔte be amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo lae nye Virendra Singh.  Míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka geɖe hã (afisia, afisia, afisia, afisia, kple afisia) siwo na nyatakaka bubuwo tso nyaa ŋu. Nyatakaka siawo gblɔ be Virendra kple Radha ʋli nya le November 25 lia ƒe zã me, eye le ɣeyiɣi ma me la, Virendra ƒoe. Le amewuwua megbe la, ebia kpekpeɖeŋu tso eƒe zɔhɛ eve gbɔ be woatsɔ ame kukua ade ʋu me. Virendra, si mu aha la ɖoe be yeatsɔ ame kukua aƒu gbe gake egblẽe ɖe ʋua me boŋ eye wògadɔ alɔ̃. Le ŋufɔke la, aƒelika aɖe kpɔ ame kukua eye wòxlɔ̃ nu kpovitɔwo. Nyatakakaawo de dzesii hã be wolé Virendra srɔ̃ Poonam kple lɔ̃xoyɔvi Chetan emegbe le November 30, 2025 dzi le nyaa ta. Numekuku bubuwo ɖee fia be Virendra ɖe srɔ̃ eye viwo le esi, evɔ Radha ya ku srɔ̃a kple fofoa siaa do ŋgɔ.  Emegbe míeƒo ka na Dwarka DCP Ankit Singh hena kpeɖodzi. Egblɔ na Factly be nutoa me ƒe dzogoe aɖeke mele nudzɔdzɔa ŋu o eye be amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo kple amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii siaa nye Hindutɔwo ƒe nutoa me tɔwo.  Kpuie ko la, amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo le Chhawla, Delhi, ƒe zɔhɛwo wuwu ƒe nya si wotsɔ ɖe ame ŋu le November 2025 me me la menye Moslemtɔ o.

Israel kple Palestina dome dzrewɔwɔ



Mamã:























 





Israel ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe klip si xe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunaʋuwo be woagage ɖe Gaza o la tso ƒe 2024 me



							Wotae le August 6, 2025 le ga 10:42 me




							
							2 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																AFP Malaysia ƒe agbalẽ





				Video aɖe si woma le Internet dzi si me Israel-tsitretsiɖeŋulawo xe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunaʋuwo be woagage ɖe Gaza o la xɔ ƒe ɖeka kple afã, si to vovo na nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe afima siwo fia be woxe mɔ ɖe enu yeyee le esi Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo xlɔ̃ nu be Palestina-nyigbaa le gegem ɖe dɔwuame me vɔ megbe. Togbɔ be wogblɔ be Israel-ʋawɔlawo yi edzi le agbagba dzem be yewoaxe mɔ na nuzazãwo be woagage ɖe Gaza o hã la, woma video klipi la kple video mawo tɔgbe le nyadzɔdzɔwo me tso January 2024 me.
			


"Israeltɔwo le mɔ xem na kpekpeɖeŋunaʋuwo esime dɔ le dɔ wum ɖevi siwo le Gaza," Malaygbe me nya si woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook video aɖe si woma le July 27, 2025 dzi la xlẽ.Videoa ɖe amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si tsɔ Israel ƒe aflagawo le ha dzim le agbatsɔʋu ɣiwo ƒe ʋuɖoha aɖe ŋgɔ, si xe mɔ na wo be woagate ŋu ayi ŋgɔ o.Eƒe nuŋɔŋlɔa gblɔ be wogblẽ nuɖuɖu si agbatsɔʋuawo tsɔna la ɖe liƒoa dzi esime vidzĩwo kuna le kilometa ʋee aɖewo ko tso wo gbɔ."Ðewohĩ esiae nye nusi Israel di be yeagblɔ esi wògblɔ be Hamas le nuɖuɖu kple kpekpeɖeŋunanuwo katã fim," egblɔ kpee.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Facebook nyatakaka si flua ame si woɖe le August 5, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X si ƒe amadede nye aŋutiɖiɖi kpee
					
Video klipi sia si woma le Facebook kple X nyatakaka mawo tɔgbe me hã do esime Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo xlɔ̃ nu be Gaza "le dɔwuame blibo aɖe ƒe agbo nu" eye esi lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe si le anyigba si dzi Hamas kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo me gblɔ be Palestinatɔ siwo ku le aʋa si xɔ ɣleti 22 kloe me la wu 60,000 (archived link).Aʋaa tso Hamas ƒe October 2023 ƒe amedzidzedze le Israel, si na ame 1,219 ku, siwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye dumevi dzrowo, si wotu ɖe AFP ƒe akɔntabubu si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi.Israel dze mɔɖeɖe ɖe kpekpeɖeŋu sue aɖe ŋu be wòage ɖe anyigbamama si me amewo sɔ gbɔ ɖo la me le May ƒe nuwuwu -- esi wòxe mɔ ɖe enu bliboe le March me le esi aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ŋuti nuƒoƒo ƒe gbagbã megbe -- eye wòdze “aɖaŋudzedze ƒe ɖiɖiɖeme” siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo gɔme esime wòɖe mɔ ɖe kpekpeɖeŋunana tso kpekpeɖeŋunaʋuwo kple airdrops in Gaza.Gake Integrated Food Security Phase Classification Initiative (IPC) -- si nye ŋkulélawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si ɖoa aɖaŋu na Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo tso xaxa siwo gbɔna ŋu -- gblɔ be agbagbadzedze sia masɔ gbɔ o negbe ɖe woɖe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunahabɔbɔwo be woakpɔ amegbetɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunadɔ “enumake, mɔxeɖenu aɖeke manɔmee” hafi.Israel Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu ƒe dɔwɔƒe, le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me, tso Hamas nu be wole nuɖuɖu siwo woɖo be woaha dumevi dzrowo."Míeɖe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunana gbogbo aɖewo xoxo be woage ɖe Gaza gbesiagbe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nuɖuɖu, tsi kple atike. Nublanuitɔe la, Hamas... le kpekpeɖeŋu fim tso Gaza dukɔmeviwo gbɔ, zi geɖe to tudada Palestinatɔwo me," dɔwɔƒea gblɔ.While The Jerusalem Post reported that Israeli activists are continueing to blocking humanitarian aid convoys to Gaza, the clip circulating online was in fact filmed in January 2024 (archived link).Nɔnɔmetata didi le Google dzi na TikTok video aɖe si nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Al Jazeera ƒe digital-only AJ+ channel da ɖe January 25, 2024 (archived link).Eƒe numeɖeɖe xlẽ be: "Israeltɔ gbogbo aɖewo xe mɔ na kpekpeɖeŋunaʋuwo be woagage ɖe Gaza o esime Palestinatɔwo le dɔwuame ƒe agbo nu."

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple clip si woma le mɔ si flu ame nu (miame) kple TikTok nyatakaka si tso AJ+ (ɖusime)
					
Ne wogadi nya veviwo la, wokpɔ nɔnɔmetata mawo tɔgbe siwo wota ɖe nyatakaka siwo Al Jazeera kple The Washington P ŋlɔ me

claim: Dukɔa me katã ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat si woɖo be woawɔ le December 13, 2025 dzi aɖe asi gãwo dzi akpɔtɔ le ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam dzi.
evidence: Nya geɖewo (afisia, afisia) le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le kakam, hele gbɔgblɔm be Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat si woawɔ le dukɔa me godoo le December 13, 2025 dzi ana mɔnukpɔkpɔ gã ʋukulawo be woakpɔ ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam gbɔ kple asiɖeɖe le wo ŋu tso 50% va ɖo 100%, le dukɔa nu. Dukɔ siwo wogblɔ be wole emee nye Delhi, Haryana, Punjab, Maharashtra, Uttar Pradesh, Gujarat, Tamil Nadu, Telangana, Karnataka, Rajasthan kple West Bengal. Nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe kple nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔ geɖewo hã ka nya ma ke (le afisia, le afisia). To nyati sia dzi la, mina míalé ŋku ɖe nya si wogblɔ le nyatakaka siawo me ŋu.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nya sia ƒe akpa si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Nyabiase: Dukɔa me katã ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat si woɖo be woawɔ le December 13, 2025 dzi aɖe asi gãwo dzi akpɔtɔ le ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam dzi. Nyateƒenya: Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat si woɖo be woawɔ le December 13, 2025 dzi mele asi ɖem le ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam ŋu le dukɔa me godoo o. Wole Lok Adalat wɔm le nuto geɖewo me le dukɔa me godoo le December 13, 2025. Gake le Telangana la, wogbugbɔ ɖo Lok Adalat ɖe December 21, 2025 dzi le Nutoa me Dɔwɔhawo ƒe Tiatia ta. Telangana Dukɔa ƒe Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha (TSLSA) na eme kɔ na mí (Nyateƒee) be womakpɔ ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans gbɔ le Lok Adalat si gbɔna me le Telangana le December 2025. Telangana Kpovitɔwo hã ɖo kpe edzi na mí (Nyateƒee) be yewomele mɔɖeɖe aɖeke nam be woaɖe ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans siwo le lalam le December 2025 Lok Adalats me o. Tsã la, dukɔ geɖe kple ʋuɖonyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe siwo le dukɔa me godoo wɔ Lok Adalats koŋ hena ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans gbɔ kpɔkpɔ eye wona mɔɖeɖewo be woakpe ɖe wo ŋu woaɖe ʋuɖofe siwo wole lalam la ɖa. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le posu me la nye AME BUBU.  Dukɔa ƒe Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha (NALSA), kpakple Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha bubuwo, wɔa Lok Adalats. Lok Adalat nye nyaʋiʋliwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔnu bubu si nyea nyamedzroƒe si wokpɔa nyaʋiʋliwo alo nya siwo le edzi yim le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe, alo le afɔɖeɖe si do ŋgɔ na nyaʋiʋli me gbɔ alo tsɔa wo dea xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ me. Wona se ƒe ɖoƒe Lok Adalats le Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Se, 1987. Le Se sia nu la, wobua nyametsotso (nyametsotso) si Lok Adalats wɔ be enye dukɔmeviwo ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe sedede eye wònye mamlɛtɔ eye wòbla akpa eveawo katã. Nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃ aɖeke si woatsɔ atsi tre ɖe nyametsotso ma tɔgbe ŋu mele ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖeke ŋkume o. Ne akpa eveawo mekpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe Lok Adalat ƒe nyametsotsoa ŋu o, togbɔ be ɖoɖo aɖeke meli be woatsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o hã la, woate ŋu adze nyaʋiʋli gɔme faa to ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si ƒe ŋusẽ sɔ gbɔ yiyi to nya aɖe tsɔtsɔ yi ʋɔnui le se ƒe ɖoɖo si wobia tso wo si dzi, le woƒe gomenɔamesi be woatsɔ nya ɖe ame ŋu la zazã me. Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka bubuwo ku ɖe Lok Adalats ŋu le afisia.  Wole Lok Adalats wɔm le nuto geɖewo me le dukɔa me godoo le December 13, 2025 dzi (afisia, afisia, kple afisia). Lok Adalat siawo naa mɔnukpɔkpɔ be woakpɔ dukɔmeviwo kple nuvlowɔhawo ƒe nya siwo le ŋgɔ yim gbɔ, akpɔ bounce nyawo, ʋufɔku ƒe nyawo, ƒome ƒe nyaʋiʋliwo kple bubuwo, to avuléle me. Ke hã, Telangana Dukɔa ƒe Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha (TSLSA) trɔ asi le Lok Adalat ŋu le Telangana va ɖo December 21, 2025 le Nutoa me Dɔwɔhawo ƒe Tiatiawɔse si le dɔ wɔm fifia le nutoa me ta.  Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat si woɖo be woawɔ le December 13, 2025 dzi mele asi ɖem le ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam ŋu le dukɔa me godoo o.  Esi míeƒo ka na Telangana Dukɔa ƒe Senyawo Gbɔkpɔha (TSLSA) be míakpɔe ɖa be Lok Adalat siwo woɖo le December 2025 me le Telangana la aɖe asi le ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challan siwo le lalam ŋu hã la, TSLSA ƒe amegãwo na míenya (Nyateƒee) be togbɔ be woxɔ ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challanwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ va yi hã la, womakpɔ ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans gbɔ le Lok Adalat si gbɔna le Telangana le December me o 2025. Esi Telangana Kpovitɔwo nɔ nu ƒom na mí hã la, woɖo kpe edzi (na Factly) be yewomele mɔɖeɖe aɖeke nam hena ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans siwo le lalam la ɖeɖeɖa le December 2025 Lok Adalats me o.  Tsã la, dukɔ geɖe (afisia, afisia) kple ʋuɖoɖo kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo le dukɔa me godoo wɔ Lok Adalats koŋ hena ʋuɖoɖo ƒe challans gbɔ kpɔkpɔ eye wona mɔɖeɖewo be woakpe ɖe wo ŋu woaɖe ʋuɖofe siwo wole mɔ kpɔm na la ɖa. Le kpɔɖeŋu me.  Dukɔa ƒe Lok Adalat hena nyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ si le lalam be Compoundable Traffic Challans/Notices be woawɔ ɖe wo dzi

claim: Moslem ŋutsu aɖe le nyɔnu aɖe dzi dzem le nuɖuɖudzraƒe aɖe le India
evidence: Video aɖe si me ŋutsu aɖe le nyɔnu aɖe dzi dzem hafi eteƒekpɔlawo ƒoe le nusi dze abe nuɖuɖudzraƒe ene me la le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Wole video klipi sia mam kple nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Moslem ŋutsu aɖe kplɔ nyɔnu aɖe yi nuɖuɖudzraƒe aɖe, edze edzi esi wògbe be yemakplɔe ɖo ayi amedzrodzeƒe o, eye emegbe wòʋli eta esi kpovitɔwo va ɖo.  Facebook zãla aɖe ŋlɔ nya si nye viral kple nya si gbɔna la ɖe edzi be: घर में ढाबे पर आया पिलाया कि होटल चलेगी ने कहा कि कल फेर जेहाडी कार द।  तेरही बी ब्राह्मण वाश के किरकिरी के अर्थ मे हुंन हुन उन हेली होनी चाहिये।  इसलिए पुलिस मारने वालों को लेने आले विडियो ढाबा हाली वाल करना पड़ा।  उत् पादन के अर्थ  #viralvideos Le zã me la, nuɖuɖu Dhaba eye amedzrodzeƒea aƒu du. Nyɔnuvia gblɔ be etsɔ la, Jihadi gadze edzi ake.  Nyɔnuvia klɔ eƒe ahɔhɔ̃. Nyɔnuvia va be yeaɖe jihadi la eye wòyi kpovitɔwo gbɔ be yeato nyatoƒoe. Mí ame evea siaa míewɔa avu kple mía nɔewo, ele be woawɔ afɔɖeɖe ɖe wo ŋu.  Eyata esi kpovitɔwo va be yewoalé ame siwo wua ame la, eva hiã be Dhaba nana video sia nakaka.  Jehadi yi gaxɔ me le nyɔnuvi ƒe ƒomea ƒe nyatoƒoetoto ta.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si woŋlɔ ɖe afisia.  FACT CHECK NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Nɔnɔmetata siwo míetrɔ ɖe megbe didi le foto vevi siwo woɖe tso videoa me ŋu na míeyi Instagram nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ tso October 13, 2021 dzi, si dzi woŋlɔ Portugalgbe me nya aɖe ɖo si gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le ahadzraƒe aɖe le Santa Helena de Goiás, Brazil.  Míeke ɖe Brazil nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye More Goiás ƒe nyatakaka aɖe hã ŋu, si me woɖe video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ƒe screenshot fia eye wòɖo kpe edzi be nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le October 9, 2021. Brazil nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe bubu si ŋkɔe nye Metrópoles ka nya ta be ŋutsu si wokpɔ wòdze nyɔnua dzi la nye eƒe ahiãvi tsãtɔ. Ame eveawo wu woƒe ƒomedodoa nu ŋkeke ɖeka pɛ do ŋgɔ na amedzidzedzea. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be woƒe ƒomedodoa xɔ ɣleti enyi, eye le ɣeyiɣi ma me la, ŋutsua wɔ ŋlɔmi le eŋu enuenu.  Detective Thiago Latorre, si ku nyaa me gblɔ na Metrópoles be nyɔnua nɔ ahadzraƒea kple exɔlɔ̃wo esime eƒe tsãtɔ te ɖe ye ŋu, dze vlododoe gɔme, eye emegbe wòdze edzi.  Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kakaɖedzitɔe be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖe Moslem ŋutsu aɖe si le nyɔnu aɖe dzi dzem le nuɖuɖudzraƒe aɖe le India la nye alakpa.  Ne èdi be yeakpɔ ŋutinya aɖe ƒe nyateƒenyenye la, WhatsApp eŋu fifia le +91 11 7127 9799 Wò ŋkɔ Wò email Tanya Wò gbedasi (ne èdi) Δ Zi afisia dzi be nàkpɔ Nyateƒenya Yeye Siwo Wokpɔ Le NyadzɔdzɔwoMobile WhatsApp Channel

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be Washington, D.C., kpovitɔwo "le tsitre ɖe afima, eye amewo le ta ƒom ɖe woƒe mo eye womeɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ naneke o. Gake fifia woɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nusianu si wodi le dzomavɔ me."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu Le Aug. 11, 2025 dzi la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒã "nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe nɔnɔme kpata" le Washington, D.C., eye wòɖo Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔlawo ɖe dɔ me. Esi Trump yɔ nɔnɔmea le fiadu me be enye “sedzimawɔmawɔ blibo kple bliboe,” le video aɖewo ƒe nya nu la, wogblɔ be egblɔ be “woaɖe mɔ na kpovitɔwo be woawɔ nusianu si wodi” le nuvlowɔwɔ si dze abe ɖe wowɔe ene ta. Wogblɔ be Trump gblɔ be kpovitɔwo "le tsitre ɖe afima, eye amewo le ta ƒom ɖe woƒe mo eye womeɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ naneke o. Gake fifia woɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nusianu si dzomavɔ si wodi." Trump gblɔ nya si le etame la nyateƒe le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe me esi wòɖe gbeƒã "nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe nɔnɔme kpata" le D.C. Abe alesi wòle ene la, míebu esia be enye nusi sɔ. Esi Trump nɔ gbeƒã ɖem la, ezã District of Columbia Home Rule Act ƒe Section 740, si na ŋusẽ dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe D.C. kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒea dzi. Gake gaƒoƒo 48 koe dukplɔla la ate ŋu axɔ ŋusẽ mawo, negbe ɖe wòna Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe susu aɖe si ta woadidie ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi ma me hafi. Ŋkeke 30 koe ŋusẽ mawo le. Trump gblɔ be kpovitɔwo mate ŋu aɖo eteƒe gbeɖe ne amewo ƒo ta ɖe wo ŋu o. Gake egblɔ be fifia yele mɔ ɖem na kpovitɔwo be woawɔ nusianu si wodi atsɔ aɖo eŋu. Míegbugbɔ nya bliboa ta le ete (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Nuto blibowo le mɔxexeɖedɔa nu kpata fifia. Kwasiɖanuwuwu sia si va yi ko la, tudada to eme eye nèkpɔ ema — Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Xɔxɔnu, mekpɔe ŋdi sia. Wokpɔe be yewowɔ avu ɖe mía ŋu. Wowɔa avu ɖe eta vaseɖe esime nèƒo dzomavɔ la le wo me elabena gbe ɖeka kolia si gɔme wose koe nye ema. Gake wowɔ avu kple sedzikpɔlawo le zã si va yi me eye womawɔ avu ɖe eta ɣeyiɣi didi o elabena mefia mɔ wo, eye megblɔ na wo be, nusianu si adzɔ, mienya, wolɔ̃a taƒoƒo ɖe kpovitɔwo ƒe mo, abe alesi kpovitɔwo le tsitre ɖe afima le awu me ene. Wole tsitre eye wole ɣli dom ɖe wo ta le adzɔge sentimeta ɖeka tso woƒe mo gbɔ. Eye emegbe wodzea ta ƒoƒo gɔme ɖe woƒe mo, eye megblɔ be, "Miegblɔ na wo be: Mieɖe ta eye míeƒo." Eye woƒoa wo sesĩe ŋutɔŋutɔ. Enye nu nyɔŋu aɖe. Mekpɔ ema ƒe geɖe, ƒe 3 alo 4 sɔŋ, mekpɔ wo. Kpovitɔwo — eye wogblɔ na wo be womewɔa naneke le [nɔnɔme] aɖeke me o. Eye àte ŋu akpɔe be wodi be yewoaɖo edzi eye wole tsitre ɖe afima, eye amewo le ta ƒom ɖe woƒe mo eye womeɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ naneke o. Gake fifia woɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔ nusianu si wodi. Dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ ƒe kuxi sesẽ sia tso dua ƒe nutoa me kplɔlawo ƒe kpododonu gãwo gbɔ tẽ. Trump gblɔ nya si le etame le miniti 8 ƒe dzesi me, le Fox ƒe livestream nu: Le Aug. 12 dzi la, Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔlawo dze vava gɔme le D.C. Togbɔ be Trump gblɔ be D.C. ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme megale ŋusẽ kpɔm ɖe edzi o hã la, akɔntabubu le nyatakaka ŋutɔŋutɔwo ŋu sesẽ wu. Snopes zã FBI ƒe nyatakakawo tsɔ kpɔe be ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ le fiadu la me. D.C. Dumegã Muriel Bowser gbe Trump ƒe nyawo, eye wòlɔ̃ ɖe edzi be nuvlowɔwɔ dzi ɖe edzi le ƒe 2023 me gake ete gbe ɖe edzi be nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe ƒutsotsoe aɖeke mele dua me fifia o. Míelé ŋku ɖe Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Joe Biden ƒe nya si wògblɔ le ƒe 2024 me be ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le dukɔa me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si mede nenema o ƒe 50 sɔŋ me hã ŋu va yi. Míekpɔe be anɔ eme be enye nyateƒe be ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ siwo ŋu woka nya ta le na sedzikpɔlawo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si mede ƒe 50 o le ƒe 2023-24 me alo gogoe.

claim: CRPF gasẽ ɖe edzi hafi woawɔ tiatia le Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal.
evidence: Video si le kakam kple nya si wogblɔ be CRPF ƒe nu sesẽ wɔwɔ do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔwɔ le Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal la metso Bengal o, ke boŋ etso tsitretsiɖeŋu si dzɔ le Bangladesh le sukuviwo ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Osman Hadi wuwu megbe.  New Delhi (Vishvas Nyadzɔdzɔwo). West Bengal awɔ akpa eve ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia le April 23 kple 29, 2026 dzi, eye woaɖe gbeƒã emetsonuwo le May 4. Woɖo asrafoha gbogbo aɖewo ɖe nutoa me hena tiatia siawo wɔwɔ. Le nya sia me la, wole gbɔgblɔm be video aɖe si kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo la tso West Bengal, afisi CRPF ƒe dɔwɔwɔ trɔ nɔnɔmea le. Le video si kaka ɖe amewo me me la, woate ŋu akpɔ dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlawo woanɔ nu wɔm kple ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖewo vevie.  Vishvas News ku nu me eye wokpɔe be nya sia flua ame. Woɖo asrafowo ƒe akpa aɖe ɖe Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal hena sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia si gbɔna, gake video si kaka ɖe amewo me la tso Bangladesh, ke menye Ɣetoɖoƒe Bengal ye o.  Nukae nye dɔlékuiwutike?  Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla '@HinduAsociation' ma video si kaka ɖe amewo dome (Archive link) le April 7, 2026 dzi, eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Yame ƒe nɔnɔme trɔ le Bengal esi CRPF ge ɖe eme. Wole goons la ɖem ɖa to anyigba vuvu me. Fifia, nuƒoƒo aɖeke maganɔ anyi o, afɔɖeɖe tẽe adze egɔme. Mian Raj manɔ Bengal o, Hindu Raj koe aɖu dzi."  बंगाल में CRPF की एंट्री से माहौल बदल गया    गुंडो को जमीन फाड़कर निकाला जा रहा है    अब बातचीत नहीं सीधा तगड़ा एक्शन शुरू    बंगाल में मियां राज नहीं सिर्फ हिंदू राज चलेगा 🔥✊ pic.twitter.com/mIzgLZ8Sei — The Hindu Association (@HinduAsociation) April 7, 2026  Many other users have shared it with similar claims on different hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.  numekuku Le video si kaka ɖe amewo me me la, woate ŋu akpɔ dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlawo woanɔ afɔɖeɖe wɔm ɖe ʋunyaʋunyawɔla aɖewo ŋu. Gake dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe awuwo mesɔ kple India ƒe CRPF dɔwɔlawo tɔ o. Eya ta míedi afi si video sia dzɔ tso. Esi wodi nɔnɔmetata vevi siwo woɖe tso videoa me le megbe la, wokpɔ nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ le January 11, 2026 dzi, le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye dailylokaloy.com, si zã video sia me nukpɔkpɔ aɖewo.  Nyatakakaa gblɔ be, "Asrafowo tsɔ lathi-tsɔ nya ɖe sukuviwo ŋu be woaɖu tsitretsiɖeŋu siwo nɔ edzi yim le Bangladesh sukuviwo ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Osman Hadi wuwu megbe dzi. Ame 23 ya teti xɔ abi le nudzɔdzɔa me. Nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le Kwasiɖagbe ŋdɔ (January 11) le Sher-e-Bangla Park ƒe tsatsam le nutome ƒe dɔwɔƒegã. Woka nya ta be le Kwasiɖagbe ƒe ŋdɔ ga 2:15 lɔƒo la, sukuviwo xe mɔ na a mɔ dzi le tsitretsiɖeŋu ƒe azɔlizɔzɔ vɔ megbe.  Facebook zãla bubu si nye 'NEWS NOW Bangla' hã ma nudzɔdzɔa ƒe video le nya ma ke me.  BBC Hindi nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be, "Osman Hadi nye ŋgɔnɔla le tsitretsiɖeŋu siwo wowɔ le Bangladesh le ƒe si va yi me, amesi woda tu wòku."  Míaƒe numekukua ɖee fia be video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la tso Bangladesh. Be míagaɖo kpe edzi geɖe wu la, míeƒo ka na Tausif Akbar, si nye nyateƒenyawo me dzodzrola si le Bangladesh, amesi ɖo kpe edzi be, "Video sia tso Bangladesh."  Nukae nye nya siwo ƒo xlãe?  Woɖoe be woawɔ akpa eve ƒe tiatia le West Bengal le April 23 kple 29, 2026 dzi, eye woaxlẽ akɔdadaawo le May 4, 2026. Wole sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia wɔm le nuto ene kple ɖekawɔwɔ ƒe nuto ɖeka me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye West Bengal, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Assam, kple Puducherry. Woda akɔ na sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatia le Assam, Kerala, kple Puducherry le April 9, 2026. Le Tiatiawɔha ƒe nyatakakawo nu la, ame siwo tiae nye 85.38% le Assam, 78.03% le Kerala, kple 89.83% le Puducherry.  Tiatia Gãwo na Sewɔtakpekpewo kple Tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe 2026 Assam kple Puducherry ŋlɔ gomekpɔkpɔ le numekuku me ƒe xexlẽme si sɔ gbɔ wu ɖesiaɖe ✅ Xlẽ nu geɖe : https://t.co/7olWi3tWav pic.twitter.com/TCFdVVbloW — India ƒe Tiatiawɔha (@ECISVEEP) April 9, 2026 X zãla si ma video si kaka la ƒe eyomedzela siwo wu lakh ɖeka.  Nyataƒoƒo: Video si le kakam kple nya si wogblɔ be CRPF ƒe nu sesẽ wɔwɔ do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔwɔ le West Bengal la metso Bengal o, ke boŋ etso tsitretsiɖeŋu si dzɔ le Bangladesh le sukuviwo ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Osman Hadi wuwu megbe.  Claim Review : CRPF sesẽ eƒe ŋusẽ hafi tiatiawɔwɔ le West Bengal.  Claimed By : X User-@HinduAsociation Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro : Ameflunya Nya nyateƒea! Ne ɖikeke aɖe le ŋuwò le nyatakaka aɖe alo nya aɖe ŋu la, na míanya! Nyateƒea nyanya nye wò gomenɔamesi. Ne èse le ɖokuiwò me be ɖikeke le nyatakaka aɖe ŋu eye ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ dzi

claim: Le June 2025 me la, dziehe lãkle ɣia tsrɔ̃ le gbetedzi mamlɛtɔ ƒe ku megbe.
evidence: About this rating Wonɔ vɔvɔ̃m be Dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔwo tsrɔ̃ le gbe me le ƒe 2008. Le ƒe 2018 me la, dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔ mamlɛtɔ ku le wo takpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔ aɖe me le Kenya. Ame eve siwo susɔ koe nye vidada kple vianyɔnu, Najin kple Fatu, siwo le aʋawɔnuwo takpɔkpɔ te tso adelawo si le lãwo takpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔ ma ke me. Le wo ɖokui si la, womate ŋu akpɔ egbɔ be yewoƒe lã ƒomeviwo anɔ agbe o ... ... Gake agbagbadzedze yeye aɖe si wodze be woadzi dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔwo to vidzidzi le vitro me na mɔkpɔkpɔ li be woagbugbɔ lã ƒomeviawo agbɔ tso ƒuta. Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo te ŋu wɔ dziehe lãkle ɣi 35 ƒe fugboewo hetsɔ wo de tsikpe me, eye wole mɔ kpɔm be yewoade dzigbe ɣi nyɔnu nyɔnuwo, siwo nye tɔɖiayɔvi ƒomevi siwo te ɖe dziehe yevuwo ŋu wu la me. Míegale mɔ kpɔm be dɔ sia akpɔ dzidzedze hã. Le June 2025 me la, nya aɖewo do mo ɖa be dziehe lãkle ɣia tsrɔ̃ fifia. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Ame siwo nɔ nyaŋuɖoɖoawo me ɖe blanuiléle kple dzitsitsi gblɔ. Nya bubu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook dzi gakaka nya la ɖe edzi, ame aɖewo gblɔ be lãa tsrɔ̃ "le se nu" tsɔ wu be wòatsrɔ̃ "le dɔwɔwɔ me". Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ kpeɖodzi dim be nya sia nye nyateƒe. Snopes kpɔe be enye nyateƒe vavã be dziehe lãkle ɣia tsrɔ̃ le gbe me — togbɔ be nyɔnu eve ƒe lãwo tsi agbe le gbemelãwo takpɔƒe aɖe le Kenya hã. Le susu siawo katã ta la, míebu nya si wogblɔ be dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔwo tsrɔ̃ la be enye nyatakaka vavã kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Akpɔkplɔ ɣi ƒomevi eve li: dziehe ɣie kple anyiehe ɣie. Dukɔwo Dome Dzɔdzɔmenuwo Takpɔha, si nye habɔbɔ aɖe si bua lã ƒomeviwo ɖe hatsotsowo me le afɔku ƒe nɔnɔme nu gblɔ be dziehe ɣie ʋetsuvi la nɔ afɔku gã aɖe me eye ɖewohĩ etsrɔ̃ le gbe me. Nu vevi aɖe si gbɔ wòtsoe nye adedada le esi woƒe dzowo di vevie le Asia, vevietɔ China kple Vietnam ta. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, ŋɔdzi nɔ dzigbe gome akpɔkplɔ ɣia ŋu kloe, eye ame ɖekaɖeka 10,080 susɔ. Nyateƒe si wònye be IUCN tia nɔnɔme si nye "afɔku gã aɖe" tsɔ wu be wòanye "atsrɔ̃ le gbe me" ƒe nɔnɔme la ku ɖe nyateƒe si wònye be womekpɔ dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔ le gbe me tso ƒe 2006. Le gbe me la, wovɔ̃na be wo tsrɔ̃ tso ƒe 2008 me, le IUCN ƒe nya nu. Dziehe yevu ʋetsuvi mamlɛtɔ si wonya, si nye atsu si xɔ ƒe 45 si ŋkɔe nye Sudan, ku le Ol Pejeta, si nye lãwo takpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔ aɖe le Kenya, le ƒe 2018. Dziehe yevu ʋetsuvi eve siwo wonya, siwo nye vidada kple vianyɔnu si ŋkɔe nye Najin kple Fatu, le ametakpɔkpɔ si wotsɔ tu wɔe te fifia le Ol Pejeta. Gake dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe agbagbadzedze yeye aɖe na mɔkpɔkpɔ be woagbugbɔ lã ƒomevi sia agbɔ tso tsɔtsrɔ̃ ƒe agbo nu. Dukɔwo dome dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ aɖe si le ŋgɔ na dɔ aɖe si woyɔna be BioRescue le didim be yewoadzi dziehe yevu akpɔkplɔwo. Wozã azi siwo tso Fatu gbɔ kple tsinyenye siwo wofɔ tso dziehe ɣi ʋetsuvi ŋutsuwo me hafi ku la, wowɔ fugboe 35, vaseɖe esime wole nyati sia ŋlɔm, siwo wokpɔ mɔ be yewoade dzigbe akpɔkplɔ ɣi nyɔnuwo me. (Le atikewɔwɔ ta la, Najin alo Fatu mate ŋu atsɔ fu o.) Ƒuƒoƒoa xɔ kafukafu le ƒe 2023 me ɖe dɔ sia ta. Vaseɖe fifia la, ƒuƒoƒoa mede dziehe yevu ƒe fugboe aɖeke o, gake wotsɔ dziehe yevu ƒe fugboewo de dzigbe ɣi ʋetsuvi me dzidzedzetɔe. Esiae nye zi gbãtɔ si wozã mɔnu sia ɖe gbetedzi mawo ŋu, si na BioRescue kpɔ mɔ be yewoate ŋu aɖo esia gbɔ na dziehe lãkle ɣiwo ƒe fugboewo.

claim: Ele be lãwo dzikpɔƒe aɖe si le U.K. nama Afrika-kpɔkplɔ ɣi atɔ̃ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe me elabena xeviawo do ɣli gblɔ nya vlowo ɖe amedzrowo kple dɔwɔlawo ŋu.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le April 2026 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be ele be lãwo dzikpɔƒe aɖe si le U.K. nama Afrika-kpɔkplɔ ɣi atɔ̃ ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe me elabena xeviawo do ɣli gblɔ nya vlowo ɖe amedzrowo kple dɔwɔlawo ŋu. Facebook ƒe axa aɖe da nya sia (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ɖe akpɔkplɔ ɣi atɔ̃ ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotsɔ tsyɔ edzi si xlẽ be, "Woƒo fi de amedzro ɖesiaɖe si va to afima, ko nu le eŋu ɖekae, eye ele be lãwo dzikpɔƒea nagbã gbevuha la hafi akpɔkplɔ 200 bubuwo hã nasrɔ̃e." Nya sia kaka ɖe Instagram (si wodzra ɖo) kple Bluesky (si wodzra ɖo) hã dzi. Nyatakaka mamlɛtɔa gblɔ be lãawo le Lincolnshire Gbemelãwo Takpɔƒe, le Friskney, Lincolnshire. Kpuie ko la, nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe. Lincolnshire Wildlife Park ƒe amegã Steve Nichols gblɔ to email dzi le April 24 lia dzi be xevi atɔ̃awo — amesiwo lãwo dzikpɔƒea xɔ le COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃a me — gakpɔtɔ le fi ƒom, togbɔ be wo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ le dɔwɔlawo dome hã. Togbɔ be egblɔ be esesẽ be woalé nuwɔna la le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi hã la, Nichols ma video klipi aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) tso February 2025 me si ɖe Elsie, si nye akpɔkplɔ atɔ̃ gbãtɔ siwo ƒo fi de la dometɔ ɖeka, gblɔ na Nichols nyuie be "F*** off" (ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi 01:15). Nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe Facebook ƒe nya si wogblɔ le etame la xa la metso Lincolnshire Gbemelãwo Takpɔƒe o. Internet dzi nunya wɔwɔ ƒe mɔ̃ siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi nunya wɔwɔe siwo nye Hive Moderation kple Sightengine kpɔe be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be ame aɖee zã AI tsɔ wɔ nɔnɔmetata lae. (Enyo be míade dzesii be menye ɣesiaɣie woate ŋu aka ɖe AI nɔnɔmetatawo didi ƒe mɔ̃wo dzi o, vevietɔ le nɔnɔmetata siwo wowɔ to AI ƒe nɔnɔmetata yeyetɔwo zazã me gome.) Lãwo dzikpɔƒea ma xeviawo ƒe nɔnɔmetata ŋutɔŋutɔwo le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, si me nyatakaka bubuwo hã nɔ tso xeviawo ŋu, woƒe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe dzedzeme gbogboawo ƒe akpa aɖewo kple akpa aɖe si ku ɖe nusita woma akpɔkplɔwo ƒe ameŋugblẽnya vɔ̃ɖi la ŋu. Nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Lincolnshire Gbemelãwo Takpɔƒe ƒe "atɔ̃ xɔŋkɔawo" ŋu kaka ɖe internet dzi tso ƒe 2020 ya teti me, esime lãwo dzikpɔƒea xɔ xeviawo ɖe eƒe dzikpɔkpɔ te. Nichols gblɔ be tsaɖibɔa xɔ xeviawo tso aƒetɔ vovovo atɔ̃ gbɔ gake eteƒe medidi o wokpɔe be aɖaŋu tɔxɛ aɖe le wo si. Egblɔ kpee be: Togbɔ be mebɔ be aƒetɔwo nana míanya be yewoƒe akpɔkplɔwo fɔ gbe si mesɔ o hã la, kakaɖedzitɔe la, mebɔ be woase nya ma ke tso aƒetɔ vovovo atɔ̃ gbɔ le ɣeyiɣi kpui ma me o. Lãwo dzikpɔƒea na xevi atɔ̃awo — siwo ŋkɔe nye Jade, Billy, Tyson, Eric kple Elsie — nɔ wo nɔewo gbɔ le woƒe vovototodedeameme ƒe ɣeyiɣi gbãtɔ me hafi tsɔ wo va tsaɖibɔa me tɔ geɖe wu me, si fia be mɔnukpɔkpɔ geɖe su wo si be woadzi nuwɔna gbegblẽ geɖe wu. Esi xeviawo yi edzi nɔ ɣli dom gblɔ nya vlowo esime wonɔ ɖeɖefiaa me vɔ la, lãwo dzikpɔƒea ɖe fɔɖilaawo ɖe vovo hafi va ma wo ɖe xevidzraƒe vovovowo me mlɔeba be yewoadze agbagba ade dzi ƒo na wo be woasrɔ̃ gbeɖiɖi bubuwo. Esi wogblɔ be akpɔkplɔ etɔ̃ bubu siwo le lãwo dzikpɔƒea hã srɔ̃ fiƒode vɔ megbe hafi mamaa dzɔ. Kaka ƒe 2026 naɖo la, edze abe lãwo dzikpɔƒea ƒe ɖoɖoa wɔ dɔ ene. Esi Nichols nɔ nu ƒom to e-mail dzi la, egblɔ be: Akpɔkplɔ atɔ̃awo katã gakpɔtɔ le mía si, eye fifia wole agbe le dzidzɔ me le alẽha gã la me. Wogakaa atam kokoko, togbɔ be elɔ̃na be yeabu le xevi bubuawo ƒe toɣliɖeɖewo dome hã. Ne míegblɔe alea la, ne dɔwɔlawo ge ɖe xevidzraƒewo la, mebɔ be woatsɔ "F*** off" si le tẽ ŋutɔ ado gbe na wo o, si, le ƒe geɖe ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple akpɔkplɔwo megbe gɔ̃ hã la, egakpɔtɔ nyea nukokoedonamela ŋutɔ. Womenya nenye be alẽha si ƒe nu ƒo ɖi la adzudzɔ fiƒode keŋkeŋ gbeɖeka o. Gake October 2025 DW News ƒe nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si me wobia gbe amedzro siwo va tsaɖibɔa me la ɖee fia be, dzɔgbenyuietɔe la, amedzrowo medo dziku o. Dukɔa ƒe Audobon Habɔbɔ, si nye U.S. habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si tsɔ eɖokui na be yeakpɔ xewo kple woƒe nɔƒewo ta ahagbugbɔ wo aɖo anyi la gblɔ be akpɔkplɔwo le xevi nyuitɔwo dome le alesi woasrɔ̃ alesi woasrɔ̃ amegbetɔ ƒe nuƒoƒo me. Habɔbɔa ka nya ta be woƒe susu nɔa nyagbe alo gbeɖiɖi siwo do ƒome kple seselelãme alo zitɔtɔ ŋu vevietɔ, si ate ŋu awɔ akpa aɖe le nusita wobi ɖe nya madzetowo sɔsrɔ̃ me alea gbegbe me. Be woagaxlẽ nu geɖe wu la, Snopes ka nya ta tso akpɔkplɔ bubu si nye ame makɔmakɔ kple nenye be wonyae le U.S. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Andrew Jackson ƒe kuteƒe ŋu va yi.
