Nyatakaka siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o siwo gblɔ be Iran ɖe hijab dziɖuɖu ɖa la kaka ɖe Internet dzi



							Wotae le October 23, 2025 le 06:14
Wotrɔ asi le eŋu le October 24, 2025 le 03:20




							
							3 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Anne CHAN, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Hong Kong ƒe agbalẽ





Nyɔnuwo le Iran le dukɔa ƒe Islamtɔwo ƒe awudodo ƒe se sesẽwo ƒe liƒowo dom kpɔ geɖe wu gake se aɖe si bia tso nyɔnuwo si be woado hijab la gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm, le gomenɔamesi taʋlihawo kple dziɖuɖua ƒe nyanuɖela ƒe nya nu. Alakpanya sia do mo ɖa le Chinagbe me hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo me tsɔ yɔ Iran dziɖuɖua ƒe aɖaŋuɖola aɖe si gblɔ le October 2025 me be "se aɖeke meli si wòle be woawɔ ku ɖe hijab ŋu o"; emegbe ezɔ nya mawo gbɔ eye wògblɔ be ele be woado tatsyɔnu.



"Iran ɖe hijab ƒe se si wòle be woawɔ na nyɔnuwo ɖa. 'Hijab (se) megatsɔa sedziwɔwɔ ƒe ŋusẽ o'," Chinatɔwo ƒe nyati bɔbɔe si le Weibo nyatakaka aɖe si woma le October 9, 2025 dzi la xlẽ.Chinagbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotsɔ ɖo video si kpe ɖe eŋu dzi xlẽ be, "Nyitsɔ laa la, Iran nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ka nya ta be Iran ƒe Expediency Discernment Council me tɔ Mohammad-Reza Bahonar gblɔ be hijab se meganye sedziwɔwɔ o. Agbenyuinɔnɔ ƒe kpovitɔwo mekpɔ mɔ ahe to na nyɔnu siwo da se xoxoawo dzi o."Videoa -- si me nyɔnu siwo do hijab kple esiwo metsɔ o ƒe video klipiwo le -- dze egɔme kple nyɔnu aɖe si ɖe eƒe taɖa eye wògblɔ le Mandaringbe me be, "Sese le ɖokuinye me gbãtɔ le dzodzo le Iran megbe enye be mevo!" Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe video klipiawo dzi gblɔ be "Iran nyɔnu geɖewo le woƒe hijabwo ɖem ɖa eye wole woƒe mo ɖem fia le dutoƒo".

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Alakpanya si woɖe le October 22, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Tso esime Iran ƒe Islamtɔwo ƒe tɔtrɔ kpata va le ƒe 1979 me la, wobia tso nyɔnuwo si be woado tatsyɔnu, gake ame geɖe -- vevietɔ le du gãwo abe fiadu Tehran ene me -- tu liƒoawo to mɔɖeɖe be nutsyɔnu la naɖiɖi ɖe megbe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).Le September 2023 me la, sewɔtakpekpea da asi ɖe se aɖe si de tohehe sesẽwo nyɔnu siwo gbe hijab dodo dzi. Ehe nyaʋiʋli sesẽ aɖe vɛ le dukɔa me, wometsɔe yi dziɖuɖua gbɔ be woada asi ɖe edzi mamlɛtɔ o eye tso ɣemaɣi la, wotsɔe de agbalẽdzraɖoƒe.Nya si wogblɔ be woɖe hijab sea ɖa hã dze le Douyin, TikTok, Facebook kple Instagram nyatakaka mawo tɔgbe me.Chinatɔwo zãlawo le Weibo kafu alesi wogblɔ be woɖee ɖa, eye ɖeka gblɔ be, "Yayra na Iran nyɔnuwo". Nya bubu xlẽ be: "Míekpɔa Iran nyɔnu kamedefefewɔlawo zi geɖe wodoa taɖa. Tso fifia dzi la, magahiã be woado wo mlɔeba o."Ke hã, sea gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm, gomenɔamesiwo taʋlihawo gblɔ womeɖe hijab ƒe nudidi si nye sedziwɔwɔ ɖa le se nu o. Ekpɔtɔ nye se si le dukɔa me hijab le dutoƒo, gake ede dzesii be amedzidzedze ate ŋu atrɔ ava ɣesiaɣi (archived link).October 15 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si Amegbetɔ ƒe Gomenɔamesiwo Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe si le Iran ta gblɔ be togbɔ be video siwo ɖe nyɔnuwo le zɔzɔm le ablɔwo dzi fia le zɔzɔm le ablɔwo dzi si woɖe ɖe go hã la, dziɖuɖumegãwo trɔ ɖe ŋkuléleɖenuŋu ƒe mɔnuwo zazã ŋu tsɔ tsɔ nya ɖe amesiwo da hijab se dzi ŋu

claim: New York Dumegã si wotia, Zohran Mamdani gblɔ be yeaɖe gbe be woalé Israel ƒe Dukplɔlagã Benjamin Netanyahu ne eva New York City.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Mamdani gblɔ be yeadze agbagba be yeade bubu Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔha ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe ameléle ƒe sedede si wotsɔ ɖe Netanyahu ŋu le aʋawɔnuvlowɔwɔ ta — gake dukɔa ƒe se geɖe ana agbagbadzedze ɖesiaɖe be woawɔe nasesẽ. Le Zohran Mamdani ƒe ƒe 2025 ƒe aʋawɔwɔ be yeaxɔ ŋgɔ na du gãtɔ kekeake le Amerika dome la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be dudzikpɔla si wotia la do ŋugbe be yeaɖe gbe be woalé Israel ƒe Dukplɔlagã Benjamin Netanyahu ne ezɔ mɔ yi New York City gbeɖeka. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe X, Facebook kple Reddit dzi la kaka nya sia. Mamdani, si nye demokrasi sosialisttɔ eye wònye Palestinatɔwo ƒe akpadzinɔla ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe la gblɔ enuenu le gbebiame siwo wolé ɖe kasɛt dzi me be yeadze agbagba ade bubu Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔha ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe sedede be woalé Netanyahu le aʋawɔwɔ nuvlowɔwɔ ta nenye be dukplɔlagã la va New York City. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Gake enyo be míade dzesii be anɔ eme be manya wɔ be woalé Netanyahu le se nu le Amerika-nyigba dzi o — eye Mamdani gblɔ be "awɔ dɔ le se ƒe seɖoƒe nu." Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, United States menye dukɔ si de asi ICC te o, si fia be ŋusẽ aɖeke mele dziɖuɖuwo dome habɔbɔa si le dukɔa me o. Le July ƒe kpekpe aɖe si Trump kple Netanyahu wɔ le White House me, hafi New Yorktɔwo natia Mamdani be wòanye dudzikpɔla la, Netanyahu gblɔ be "yemetsi dzi ɖe" Mamdani ƒe ŋugbedodoa ŋu o, eye be Trump, si nye ye "nɔviaŋutsu gãtɔ" ava kple dukplɔlagã la le New York City. "Maɖee ado goe," Trump gblɔ kple alɔgbɔnukoko. ICC ƒe ameléle ƒe sedede si woɖe ɖe go le Nov. 21, 2024 dzi la tso enu be "aʋawɔnuvlo siwo nye dɔwuame abe aʋawɔwɔ ƒe mɔnu ene eye wòɖoe koŋ fia mɔ amedzidzedze ɖe dumevi dzrowo ŋu; kple nuvlowɔwɔ ɖe ameƒomea ŋu si nye amewuwu, yometiti kple nuwɔna bubu siwo me amegbetɔ ƒe nɔnɔme mele o tso October 8, 2023 ya teti vaseɖe May 20, 2024 ya teti." Snopes ku nu me le Netanyahu ƒe nya si wògblɔ be nutsotsoawo nye "alakpa" ŋu va yi. Míeka nya ta tso dɔwuame le Israel ƒe aʋawɔwɔ le Gaza dome hã ŋu. Mamdani do ŋugbe zi gbãtɔ be yealé Netanyahu le December 2024 me le gbebiame aɖe si wòwɔ kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla ŋgɔyiyiwɔla Medhi Hasan na Zeteo News. Zeteo tsɔ gbebiame bliboa da ɖe fetu ƒe gli aɖe megbe gake eda nya klipi aɖe ɖe asitɔtrɔ si ku ɖe eŋu la ŋu: Here’s the transcript (emphasis ours): Hasan: Dumegã Mamdani aɖe, ɖe wòaxɔ Prime Minister Netanyahu ɖe New York City hena — na nusianu si wòva, ne míebu eŋu be U.S. menye asidede ICC te o, ale be wòate ŋu azɔ mɔ ayi U.S., to vovo na dukɔ bubu geɖe — anye Dumegã Mamdani xɔ Benjamin Netanyahu ɖe dua mea? Mamdani: Ao, esi New York City nye dudzikpɔla ta la, alé Benjamin Netanyahu. Esia nye du si — míaƒe dzidzenuwo wɔ ɖeka kple dukɔwo dome sewo. Ɣeyiɣia de be míaƒe nuwɔnawo hã nanɔ nenema. Hasan: Togbɔ be U.S. menye dukɔ si de asi ICC te o hã. Mamdani: Ao, ɣeyiɣia de be míaɖe afɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ eye míana nusi míelɔ̃ be míawɔ atsɔ aɖe kplɔlanyenye si bu vevie le dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua me la afia eme nakɔ. Le September ƒe gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple The New York Times me la, wogblɔ be Mamdani gblɔ be yeaɖe gbe na New York Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe be woalé Netanyahu, eye "be ele be dukɔa kple nutoa me Democratstɔwo naɖee afia be yewoawɔ afɔɖeɖe le afisi dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu mawɔe o." Times gblɔ be Mamdani he susu yi Democratic California Dziɖuɖumegã Gavin Newsom ƒe nyametsotso si wòwɔ le ƒe 2004 me, si ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo te fli ɖe eme, be wòada le dukɔa ƒe se dzi eye wòana srɔ̃ɖeɖe ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ srɔ̃tɔ siwo nye vidzinu ɖeka tɔgbe tɔwo le blema esime nutodziɖula la nye San Francisco ƒe dudzikpɔla. Mamdani gaɖo kpe eƒe ŋugbedodo dzi le October 2025 ƒe gbebiame aɖe me kple Zeteo News, si woate ŋu akpɔ bliboe le YouTube (kpɔ 29:07). Nya aɖe si woɖe tso emee nye esi (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Hasan: Ðe ɖoɖoa gakpɔtɔ li be woalé Benjamin Netanyahu ne eva New York City kple Donald Trump abe eƒe amegbetɔ ƒe akpoxɔnu enea? Mamdani: Kpɔ ɖa, mesusu be ɖeko medi be magblɔ nya siwo ƒo xlãe la mí gbã. Zi geɖe la, woɖɔa esia abe ɖe wònye nukpɔsusu ƒe nya, ame ŋutɔ ƒe numekuku ene. Míele nu ƒom tso ame aɖe si dze ŋgɔ mɔɖeɖe tso Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe gbɔ, amesi wɔ Palestinatɔwo tsɔtsrɔ̃ ɖa ƒe eve kloe enye sia. Eye gaƒoƒo ɖesiaɖe le ɣeyiɣi ma me la, Israel-srafowo wu Palestina ɖevi aɖe. Eye esia nye nusi wɔ nuku na ame geɖe ƒe dzitsinya —le dua me godoo, le dukɔ sia me godoo, le xexeame godoo. Eye mesea nu tso eŋu tso New Yorktɔ siwo le afisiafi gbɔ. Mesenɛ ne meɖo keteke. Mesenɛ ne mele zɔzɔm le ablɔdzi. Mesenɛ ne mele nu ƒom tso míaƒe gazazã ƒe ɖoɖoa ŋu. Eye mesenɛ elabena enye vlododo xexeame katã ƒe aʋatsokaka ƒomevi ɖesiaɖe

claim: Ameflunyawo: Czech Dukplɔla Petr Pavel Lɔ̃ Ðe Ukraine ƒe Anyigbamama Siwo Bu «Hena Agbetsitsi»
evidence: Nya si wogblɔ be Czech Dukplɔla Petr Pavel le biabiam tso Ukraine si be wòalɔ̃ ɖe anyigbamama aɖewo xɔxɔ dzi hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe la ɖe eƒe tenɔnɔ fia vodadatɔe. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple BBC me la, Petr Pavel te gbe ɖe edzi be Ɣetoɖoƒedukɔwo melɔ̃ ɖe anyigbamamawo tsɔtsɔ na Russia dzi o eye wòʋlia Ukraine ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ ta kpɔkpɔ ta, ke menye le esi wolɔ̃ ɖe mɔɖeɖewo dzi alo tsɔ anyigbawo nana ta o. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo zã gbebiame aɖe si Czech Dukplɔla Petr Pavel wɔ kple BBC tsɔ tro eƒe nyawo eye wògblɔ be kplɔla sia hã lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be Ukraine mate ŋu ana ablɔɖe eƒe anyigbamama siwo woxɔ o eye ele be woalɔ̃ ɖe woƒe anyigbadzinɔnɔ dzi «le agbetsitsi ta». Screenshot – t.me Le nyateƒe me la, Russiatɔwo ƒe nyatakakagblɔlawo gatro Europa dunyahela aɖe ƒe nyawo ake be woana didiwo nava eme. Czech Dukplɔla Petr Pavel, le gbebiame aɖe me kple BBC , ƒo nu tso ƒomedodo si le woa kple Russia dome kple alesi woate ŋu akpɔ aʋa si le Ukraine gbɔe ŋu. Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla la bia nya tso nya si wògblɔ va yi ku ɖe Ukraine ƒe anyigbamama aɖewo siwo dzi Russia xɔ fifia eye wòle be woanɔ Russia ƒe ŋusẽ te hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe ŋu — nukae wòsusu be «hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe» fia? Le esia ta la, Petr Pavel ɖo eŋu be: «Fifia la, Ukraine, kple Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu katã, mele nɔnɔme me be wòana ablɔɖe anyigbamama siwo woxɔ le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me evɔ womagblẽ nu geɖe le amewo ƒe agbe ŋu o. Eye le nyateƒe me la, anye nu madzɔmadzɔ ŋutɔ be Ɣetoɖoƒedukɔwo naƒoe ɖe Ukraine nu be wòana ablɔɖe anyigbamama siwo katã woxɔ fifia, elabena míedi be míatsrɔ̃ Ukraine dukɔa o. Míedi be woatsi agbe abe dukɔ si le eɖokui si ene. Eye ne ga aɖe li be woawɔ Ukraine yeyee abe dukɔ si le eɖokui si ene la, ne ga si woaxee nye be woalɔ̃ ɖe edzi be woaxɔ anyigbaa ƒe akpa aɖe hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe, evɔ womalɔ̃ ɖe edzi le se nu o la, ekema nenɔ nenema». Czech Dukplɔla la yɔ afɔɖeɖe siwo le eƒe nukpɔsusu nu la, ate ŋu ana Ukraine ƒe anyigbamama siwo woxɔ hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe la atrɔ gbɔ.

claim: iPhone 12 mava kple toɖoɖomɔ̃ kple charging adapter o.
evidence: Esi Apple tsɔ charger kple toɖoɖomɔ̃a ƒu gbe le adzɔnuwo ƒe aɖaka me la, egblɔ be yeaɖe carbon si dona le eme ƒe sia ƒe si wu metrik tɔn miliɔn 2 dzi akpɔtɔ, si sɔ kple ʋu 450,000 kloe ɖeɖe ɖa le mɔa dzi ƒe sia ƒe. Apple le elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃ kple EarPods hã ɖem ɖa le iPhone ƒe agbawo me, si le carbon ƒe dodo dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ geɖe wu eye wòle asa ƒom na tomenukuƒe kple nu xɔasiwo zazã, si wɔnɛ be woate ŋu abla nu suewo kple esiwo le bɔbɔe wu, eye wònana woate ŋu aɖo aɖaka geɖe wu alafa memama 70 ɖe pallet dzi.

claim: Nuvɔ̃ gã si womate ŋu atsɔ ake o si Franseawo ƒe magazine aɖe si nye Charlie Hebdo wɔ le vlododo Nyagblɔɖila la ƒe mo kɔkɔe la me gaɖe fuléle kple fuléle si Ɣetoɖoƒedukɔwo ƒe dunyahehe kple dekɔnu habɔbɔwo le ɖe Islam kple Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔa ŋu la fia ake.
evidence: Nya la dzra nu geɖe le mɔ si mebɔ o nu, gake Moslemtɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo geɖe ɖe ɖeklemie. France ƒe Dukplɔla si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi, Jacques Chirac, ɖe gbeƒã nya aɖe ɣemaɣi gblɔ be, “Ele be woaƒo asa na nusianu si ate ŋu agblẽ nu le ame bubu ƒe dzixɔse ŋu, vevietɔ mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe dzixɔsewo. Ele be woawɔ nyagbɔgblɔ ƒe ablɔɖe ŋudɔ le agbanɔamedzi ƒe gbɔgbɔ me.” Charlie Hebdo ɖo eŋu to lɛta aɖe tata, si dzi agbalẽŋlɔla kple nunyala 12 siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Salman Rushdie kple Ayaan Hirsi Ali de asi, si ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be, “Mí, agbalẽŋlɔlawo, nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo, nunyalawo, míebia be woatsi tre ɖe mawusubɔsubɔ ƒe ŋutasẽdziɖuɖu ŋu eye míado ablɔɖe, mɔnukpɔkpɔ sɔsɔe kple xexemenunya ƒe dzidzenuwo ɖe ŋgɔ na amesiame.” Le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me la, Franseawo ƒe Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ eve, siwo nye Paris ƒe Mosque Gã kple France ƒe Islam Habɔbɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ, tsɔ nya ɖe Charlie Hebdo ŋu le esi wògbugbɔ ta Denmarktɔwo ƒe nutataawo ta.

claim: Beetroot amla karɔt detsi ate ŋu ada kansa ƒe akpa 4 lia le ŋkeke 40 me
evidence: Ðe beetroot, amla, kple karɔt detsiƒonu tsakatsaka ate ŋu ada kansa si de ŋgɔa?  Ðe beetroot, amla, kple karɔt detsi nono daa kansa ƒe afɔɖeɖe 4 lia?  Ao, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be beetroot, amla, kple karɔt detsi ate ŋu ada kansa ƒe akpa 4 lia o. Togbɔ be detsiƒonu siawo naa nunyiame kple nusiwo tsia dzoxɔxɔ nu hã la, numekuku siwo ɖo kpe woƒe ŋusẽ si tsia kansa nu dzi la nye numekuku siwo wowɔna le dodokpɔxɔ alo lãwo me ko. Menye kansadɔdamɔnu siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi le wonye o. Eŋutinunyalawo ɖo aɖaŋu be nàzã atikewɔmɔnu siwo dzi atikewɔlawo da asi ɖo ko eye nàbia ɖɔktawo hafi ate atike bubu ɖesiaɖe kpɔ.  Last Updated on July 3, 2025 by Dr Priyamvada Quick Take Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe gblɔ be beetroot amla karɔt detsi ate ŋu ada kansa ƒe afɔɖeɖe 4 lia le ŋkeke 40 me. Esi míedzro nyateƒenyawo me vɔ la, míekpɔe be nya sia nye alakpa.  Nya la Instagram nyatakaka aɖe ɖee fia be beetroot amla karɔt detsi ate ŋu ada kansa ƒe akpa 4 lia le ŋkeke 40 pɛ ko me. Egblɔ hã be woate ŋu awɔ esia le aƒeme, si fia be mehiã be woawɔ atike si wozãna ɖaa o.  Nyateƒenyawo Kpɔkpɔ Viɖe kawoe le beetroot kple carrot detsi ŋu?  Viɖe siwo le beetroot kple karɔt detsi ŋu dometɔ aɖewoe nye nunyiame, amla tsɔa vitamin C kpena ɖe eŋu hena dɔlélenutsiŋutete kple ŋutigbalẽ ƒe lãmesẽ, karɔt naa beta-carotene na ŋku ƒe lãmesẽ, eye beetroot naa nitrates kple iron hena ʋu ƒe sisi. Nunyiame siawo ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ƒe lãmesẽ bliboa ŋu gake kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si ɖo kpe edzi be woada kansa o. Ƒe 2015 ƒe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe ŋuti numekuku aɖe ƒo nu tso dɔnɔ aɖe si ŋu ʋumenugbagbeviɣidɔ si nɔa anyi didi (CLL) le si zã beetroot-carrot detsi tsɔ kpe ɖe atikewɔwɔ si wozãna ɖaa ŋu, eye wògblɔ be nuɖuɖu ƒe dzodzro nyo ɖe edzi eye yeƒe lãme sẽ le ŋkeke 45 megbe. Gake numekuku sia melɔ amla ɖe eme o, meƒo nu tso kansa ƒe akpa 4 lia ŋu o, eye womegblɔ be edae o. Numekuku aɖeke meɖo kpe beetroot amla karɔt detsi dzi be enye kansa dada o.  Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, wotu nya siwo wogblɔ be beetroot detsi ate ŋu awu kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo le míaƒe ŋutilã me ɖe numekuku gbãtɔ siwo wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me dzi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, numekukuwo ɖee fia be betanin, si nye nusi le beetroot me, ate ŋu ana apoptosis (lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe ku si ŋu wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖo) nayi kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo me eye wòaɖe dɔdzẽ ƒe tsitsi dzi akpɔtɔ le lãwo ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo me. Gake nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo siawo tso dodokpɔmɔ̃wo kple lãwo ŋuti numekukuwo me, ke menye amegbetɔwo ƒe dɔdamɔnu dodokpɔwo me o, eye womeɖo kpe edzi be beetroot amla karɔt detsi ate ŋu ada kansa ƒe akpa 4 lia o.  Ðe kadodo aɖe le beetroot detsiƒonu kple kansa domea?  Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me numekukuwo ku ƒomedodo si le beetroot detsiƒonu kple kansa dome me. Numekukuwo ɖee fia be nusiwo le abe betalains ene le beetroot me, siwo ƒe ŋutete nye antioxidant eye ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu be woaɖe oxidative stress kple DNA ƒe gbegblẽ dzi akpɔtɔ, si ate ŋu aɖe kansa ƒe afɔkua dzi akpɔtɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, numekuku aɖe si wota le ƒe 2013 me ɖee fia be beetroot ƒe aɖi ate ŋu awɔ dɔ aduadu kple doxorubicin le kansa ƒe lãmenugbagbevi aɖewo me, si fia be ate ŋu ana atikewɔmɔnu ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nanyo ɖe edzi. Gake nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo siawo tso in vitro (dodokpɔ-mɔ̃) kple lãwo ŋuti numekukuwo me koŋ, eye kpeɖodzi aɖeke metso amegbetɔwo ƒe dɔdamɔnu dodokpɔwo me be beetroot detsiƒonu ɖeɖe ate ŋu ada kansa, vevietɔ le afɔɖeɖe deŋgɔwo abe afɔɖeɖe 4. Toto ɖe beetroot detsiƒonu ŋu ɖe ɖoɖo nu de dzesi viɖe siwo ate ŋu ado tso eme, abe ʋu ƒe sisi dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ene, gake wote gbe ɖe afɔku siwo do ƒome kple nitrate ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si do ƒome kple kansa hã dzi. Eyata ƒomedodoa sesẽ, eye beetroot detsi menye kansa ƒe atike si ŋu kpeɖodzi le o.  Nya kae kansa ŋuti nunyalawo gblɔ tso kansadɔdada bubuwo ŋu?  Kansahabɔbɔ siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le naa mɔfiame si me kɔ: Kansa Ŋuti Numekuku UK : Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele kansa ƒe nuɖuɖu bubuwo, abe Gerson alo alkaline nuɖuɖuwo ene, si ɖo kpe kansa dada dzi o. Woate ŋu ahe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu abe nunyuimakpɔɖu ene vɛ eye eŋutinunyalawo mekafu wo be woatsɔ aɖɔli atikewɔmɔnu siwo wozãna ɖaa o.  : Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele kansa ƒe nuɖuɖu bubuwo, abe Gerson alo alkaline nuɖuɖu ene, si ɖo kpe kansa dada dzi o. Woate ŋu ahe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu abe nunyuimakpɔɖu ene vɛ eye eŋutinunyalawo mekafu wo be woatsɔ aɖɔli atikewɔmɔnu siwo wozãna ɖaa o. Amerikatɔwo ƒe Kansa Habɔbɔ : Mɔnu siwo kpena ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu, abe nuɖuɖu kpeɖeŋutɔ ene, ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu woakpɔ dzesiawo gbɔ gake menye atike o. Atikewɔmɔnu bubu siwo wozãna ɖe beléle si wozãna ɖaa teƒe ate ŋu ahe atikewɔwɔ nyuie ɖe megbe.  : Mɔnu siwo kpena ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu, abe nuɖuɖu kpeɖeŋutɔ ene, ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu woakpɔ dzesiawo gbɔ gake menye atike o. Atikewɔmɔnu bubu siwo wozãna ɖe beléle si wozãna ɖaa teƒe ate ŋu ahe atikewɔwɔ nyuie ɖe megbe. Amewo Katã ƒe Nubabla: Ele be atikewɔlawo nafia mɔ kansa dada to mɔnu siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi le zazã me. claim: Nukpɔkpɔ etɔ̃ siwo gblɔ be yewoɖe alesi Iran tsɔ tu siwo wogblɔ be woda ɖe Israel ƒe nyatakakaxɔƒe si nye Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã le Tel Aviv la fia.
evidence: Le Iran dukɔa ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka be yewoƒe tuwo ƒo Israel ƒe nyatakakaxɔƒe si nye Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã le Tel Aviv dome la, nukpɔkpɔ aɖewo le kakam siwo gblɔ be woɖe amedzidzedzeawo kple xɔ si gblẽ la fia, togbɔ be wogblɔ be Israel ɖe wo ɖe anyi to nusiwo gblẽ le bɔswo ƒe ʋutɔɖoƒe si te ɖe afima ŋu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ me hã.  Togbɔ be nɔnɔmetata siwo kaka ɖe amewo dome dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ be eɖe Mossad dɔwɔla aɖe si wolé, si wogblɔ be wobla ɖe tu aɖe ŋu eye woɖoe ɖe Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã le esi wolée le Iran vɔ megbe la fia hã la, video kpui aɖe kple foto si wogblɔ be eɖe Irantɔwo ƒe tu si me gbeɖiɖi sesẽwo le si le dɔwɔƒegã la tsrɔ̃m fia hã le kakam le afisiafi. Woateŋu akpɔ nyatakakaawo ƒe akpa siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia, afisia kple afisia.  Fact Check Newschecker de dzesi nukpɔkpɔawo ƒe nɔnɔme si klẽna akpa kple "Mossad" ŋɔŋlɔ vodadatɔe be "Mosad" le xɔ si wogbã ƒe foto si wogblɔ be woɖe la me, dzesiwo katã fia asi nɔnɔmetata siwo AI wɔ.  Video 1 Newschecker tsɔ videoa to Cantilux, si nye AI-nyatakakakpɔmɔ̃, si gblɔ be kakaɖedzi 81% li be videoa nye AI-si wowɔ. Míeƒu du tsɔ screengrab to WasitAI, si nye AI-nɔnɔmetatawo didi ƒe mɔ̃ aɖe ŋu, si gblɔ be kakaɖedzi le ye si be nɔnɔmetata la, alo eƒe akpa vevi aɖe, nye AI ye wɔe.  Didi bubu na míekpɔ video ma ke si xɔ sɛkɛnd enyi si woda ɖe TikTok dzi, si woŋlɔ le May 18, 2025 dzi, si ezãla aɖe, everythingai97, si woŋlɔ be AI-generated, da ɖe TikTok dzi.  Nɔnɔmetata 1 Tsɔ kpe ɖe Mossad ƒe ŋɔŋlɔdzesi si mesɔ o si wòde dzesii le nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo dzi ŋu la, Newschecker tsɔe ƒu du to WasitAI ŋu, si gblɔ be yeka ɖe edzi be nɔnɔmetata la, alo eƒe akpa vevi aɖe, ye AI wɔ.  Míeva ke ɖe June 17, 2025 ƒe LeadStories ƒe nyatakaka sia hã ŋu le nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo me ŋu, si hã gblɔ be anɔ eme be AI ye wɔe.  Nɔnɔmetata 2 Míeƒu du to nɔnɔmetata la ŋu to Hive Moderation, si nye AI-nyatakakakpɔmɔ̃, si gblɔ be anɔ eme be 99.9% be AI-siwo wowɔ alo deepfake nusiwo le eme. Nenema ke SightEngine dɔwɔnua gblɔ be anɔ eme be AI ye wɔe le 99% me.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Video si kaka ɖe Egiptetɔwo ƒe Mummy Fia, Menye Vijay Rupani ƒe kukua o Nyataƒoƒo Wokpɔe be AI ye wɔ nukpɔkpɔ siwo kaka ɖe amewo me siwo gblɔ be wodo ƒome kple tu siwo wogblɔ be Iran tsɔ tu Israel ƒe nyatakakaxɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Mossad ƒe dɔwɔƒegã si le Tel Aviv.  Dzɔtsoƒewo WasitAI dɔwɔnu Hive Moderation dɔwɔnu SightEngine dɔwɔnu Cantilux dɔwɔnu Tiktok post, May 18, 2025

claim: Houston ɖeviwo ƒe dɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔƒe aɖe ɖe Ðɔkta Christina Propst le dɔ me esi wòŋlɔ nya ɖe Internet dzi be amesiwo ŋu tsiɖɔɖɔ gblẽ nu le le Texas le July 2025 me nye Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe akpadzinɔlawo amesiwo xɔ nusi woda asi ɖe edzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Texas Atikewɔha ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi be nya si yewogblɔ le July 6, 2025 dzi ku ɖe atikewɔla aɖe si gblɔ "dunyahehenya siwo ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo le" le July Enelia ƒe kwasiɖanuwuwu ku ɖe tsiɖɔɖɔ si wu ame le Texas ŋu la ku ɖe Ðɔkta Christina Propst, si nye ɖɔkta le Blue Fish Pediatrics ŋu. Blue Fish Pediatrics gblɔ le nya siwo wogblɔ le July 5 kple 6, 2025 dzi me be womegaxɔ atikewɔla aɖe si gblɔ nya aɖe tso Texas tsiɖɔɖɔ si he "nuveviwɔame kple dziku gã aɖe" vɛ ŋu ɖe dɔ me le dɔwɔƒea o. Nya siwo wogblɔ la megblɔ be woɖe asi le ɖɔktaa ŋu o. Le July 2025 me, esi tsiɖɔɖɔ na ame 100 ya teti ku alo bu le Texas vɔ la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖi) kaka ɖe internet dzi be ɖeviwo ƒe dɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔƒe aɖe le Houston ɖe ɖɔkta aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Christina Propst le dɔ me esi wòŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi be Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa me tɔwo nye Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla siwo xɔ nusi woda asi ɖe edzi. X zãla ɖeka si ƒe nyatakaka la kpɔ ame miliɔn 2.5 le ɣeyiɣi si me woŋlɔ nya sia ŋlɔ bena, "ÐEKO LE: Woɖe Houston, Texas ɖeviwo ƒe dɔléleŋutinunyala Ðɔkta Christina Propst le dɔme le esi wòdze ŋgɔ nyahehe gã aɖe le esi wòŋlɔ be Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa me tɔ 80+, siwo dome ɖeviwo hã le, nye Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla siwo 'xɔ nusi woda akɔ na.'" Le screenshots shared across Facebook (archived), X (archived), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe) kple TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe), Propst ŋlɔ bena: Neva eme be amedzrowo, ɖeviwo, amesiwo menye MAGAtɔwo o kple aƒemelãwo katã nanɔ dedie eye woaƒu. Kerr County MAGA da asi ɖe edzi be yewoaɖe gut FEMA. Wogbea yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ. Neva eme be nusi woda akɔ na la nasu wo si. Yra woƒe dziwo. Nya siwo wogblɔ le Internet dzi ɖee fia be agbalẽvi si dzi woŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖo be "Chris Tina" le screenshots siwo woma le internet dzi be enye Ðɔkta Christina Propst, si le dɔ wɔm le Blue Fish Pediatrics le Houston. Blue Fish Pediatrics ŋlɔ nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le July 5 lia dzi tso eƒe atikewɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka ɖoɖo ɖe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔkeke me ŋu le esi amea ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo he "veve kple dziku gã aɖe" vɛ le Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa titina megbe. Emegbe dɔwɔƒea ŋlɔ (nudzraɖoƒe) le July 6 lia dzi be atikewɔla la "megale dɔ wɔm o" gake megblɔe kɔte be woɖe wo le dɔ me o. Aɖaŋuɖoha aɖe si le Blue Fish Pediatrics teƒe ƒe nyanuɖela gbe be yemaƒo nu geɖe wu nya mawo o. Texas Atikewɔha ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi to email dzi be yeƒe July 6 ƒe nya (si wodzra ɖo) si ƒo nu tso "dunyahehe me nya siwo ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo le siwo TMB ƒe atikewɔla ƒe mɔɖegbalẽxɔla aɖe gblɔ" ku ɖe Texas ƒe tsiɖɔɖɔa ŋu la ƒo nu tso Propst. Dɔwɔha ƒe zimenɔla Sherif Zaafran gblɔ le X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) dzi le Propst ƒe nya si wogblɔ be egblɔ be atikewɔla si ŋu nya ku ɖo la nye nyɔnu si wɔa dɔ na Blue Fish Pediatrics ƒe screenshot ŋuɖoɖo me. Ne míebu nya siwo le etame ŋu la, míebua nya si wogblɔ be enye nyateƒe kple nusiwo womeɖo ɖi o ƒe tsakatsaka. Enye nyateƒe be Propst meganɔ dɔ wɔm le Blue Fish Pediatrics o le esi wògblɔ nya aɖe le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa me vɔ megbe. Gake nya siwo tututu wogblɔ tso alesi Propst dzo le eƒe dɔa ŋu me mekɔ o, elabena Blue Fish Pediatrics meɖo kpe edzi be woɖee le dɔ me o. Míedo ka kple Propst to telefon kple e-mail dzi be míaɖo kpe edzi nenye be eyae nye amesi ŋu Blue Fish Pediatrics ƒe nyawo ku ɖo eye míaɖo kpe nya siwo wogblɔ le nya si wogblɔ be eya gbɔe wòtso si le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi eye míalala ŋuɖoɖo. Propst ƒe agbemeŋutinya bu le Blue Fish Pediatrics ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ɣeaɖeɣi le June 8 kple July 8, 2025 dome, tsɔ kpe ɖe dɔwɔla bubu ɖeka ƒe agbemeŋutinya ŋu. Míete ŋu ke ɖe Propst ƒe nya si wogblɔ be egblɔ la ƒe gbãtɔ aɖeke ŋu o, si dze abe ɖe woɖee ɖa le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi ene, eye míete ŋu ke ɖe ameŋunyatakaka si wɔ wo ŋu hã o. Gake screenshot aɖewo (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) la dometɔ aɖewoe nye ŋuɖoɖo aɖe si tso Facebook zãla bubu gbɔ. Google didi (si wodzra ɖo) le ŋuɖoɖo sia ŋu na be Kerr County Sheriff's Office ŋlɔ nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le July 4, 2025 dzi ku ɖe ɖekawɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo le tsiɖɔɖɔa megbe ŋu, si fia be ɖewohĩ "Chris Tina" zãla la gblɔ nya sia le nya sia ŋu gake tso ɣemaɣi la, etutui ɖa. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi la, TMB ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ be yewomateŋu aƒo nu tso "tohehe si ateŋu adzɔ" si TMB awɔ ɖe Propst ŋu o. Dɔwɔha la ŋlɔ le July 6 lia dzi be: "Atikewɔwɔ Ŋuti Sea na ŋusẽ TMB be wòawɔ afɔɖeɖe ne exɔ nyatoƒoetoto ku ɖe dɔnɔa ƒe nuveviwɔame, dɔnɔa ƒe nuveviwɔame, nuwɔametɔ, alo se, agbenyuinɔnɔ, alo dɔnyala ƒe sedzidadawo ŋu esime wòle atike dam na dɔnɔ aɖe alo le agbagba dzem be yeada dɔ nɛ." Togbɔ be eme kɔ tso TMB ƒe ŋuɖoɖo si woɖo ɖe amewo to e-mail dzi me be atikewɔla si "megale dɔ wɔm" le Blue Fish Pediatrics la nye Propst eye be nusita eƒe dɔa wu enu ɖo nye nya aɖe si wògblɔ tso Texas tsiɖɔɖɔa ŋu hã la, míete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi le mía ɖokui si nenye be woɖe asi le eŋu alo nenye be nya si wogblɔ le

claim: Àte ŋu aŋlɔ lɛta na RBG ɖe 50409 atsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te be yeagblɔ na wò sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ be megaxɔ ɖe Ruth Bader Ginsberg teƒe le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kɔkɔtɔ o vaseɖe esime ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatia la nawu enu
evidence: Ðo nya resist ɖe Resistbot le Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, alo to text message dzi ɖe 50409 eye nàɖo biabia siwo woɖo ɖe wo to text message dzi. Le aɖabaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la, àdo ka kple Sewɔtakpekpea alo wò ame tiatia bubu siwo nètia. Na wò lɛtaa naʋu be wòawɔ dɔ nyuie wu. Gbedasiwo kple nyatakakawo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme ate ŋu awɔ dɔ ne èzã SMS. Gbedasiwo ɖoɖo ɖe amewo zi gbɔ zi geɖe la toa vovo. Text stop to 50409 be nàtɔ te gbedasiwo katã. Miŋlɔ kpekpeɖeŋu ɖe 50409 hena kpekpeɖeŋu. Kpɔ míaƒe zazã ƒe ɖoɖowo, ameŋunyatakakawo ŋuti nyatakaka, kple ezãla ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti se.

claim: Le September 2025 me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖe nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si senyala Alan Dershowitz ŋlɔ si ƒo nu tso Vanity Fair ƒe nyatakakawo ŋu le Jeffrey Epstein ƒe dzigbezã 50 lia ƒe haƒogbalẽ me fia vavã.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Gbegbɔgblɔ si le nuŋlɔɖia me kple nyakpakpa aɖe si kpe ɖe eŋu la do susua ɖa be anɔ eme be woɖoe be wòanye fefenya. Dershowitz meɖo nya ŋu na Snopes ƒe biabia be wòagblɔ eƒe susu hafi wotae o. Le September 2025 me la, amewo le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ma nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si senyala Alan Dershowitz ŋlɔ si wogblɔ be ele gbedasiwo ƒe albɔmɔ̃ me na gadzikpɔla Jeffrey Epstein si ŋu ŋukpe le le eƒe dzigbezã 50 lia dzi le ƒe 2003. Epstein, amesi wogblɔ be kadodo nɔ kple ame xɔŋkɔ geɖe dome la ku to eɖokuiwuwu me le gaxɔ me le ƒe 2019 me esime wònɔ lalam be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnui le gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu. Le Sept. 8 lia dzi la, U.S. Aƒea Dzi Kpɔkpɔ Kɔmitia ɖe dzigbezãgbalẽa ɖe go esi woyɔ Epstein ƒe nunɔamesiwo ɖe agbalẽ vovovo siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si megali o ŋu vɔ megbe. Nuŋlɔɖi si wogblɔ be Dershowitz gblɔ be hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ƒo nu tsoe la ku ɖe Epstein ƒe nyatakaka siwo wogblɔ le Vanity Fair me ŋu. Le nuŋlɔɖi si wogblɔ be woŋlɔ me la, Dershowitz yɔ magazinea be "Vanity Unfair." Dershowitz, si nye Harvard Sesuku nufialagã si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme si nɔ Epstein teƒe tsã la hã nye aɖaŋuɖola na aɖaŋuɖola na Harvey Weinstein ƒe ametakpɔha eye wòkpe asi ɖe Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe ametakpɔkpɔ be woaɖee le zi dzi le eƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ me. X zãla ɖeka ŋlɔ ɖe nya aɖe si wòŋlɔ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) me le Sept. 9 dzi be: Alan Dershowitz lɔ̃ ɖe edzi (le nuŋɔŋlɔ me, le Epstein ƒe dzigbezãgbalẽ me) be yena Vanity Fair trɔ nyatakakawo ɖa tso Jeffrey Epstein gbɔ yi Bill Clinton dzi. Eyɔe be ‘dzigbezã nunana’ na Epstein. Nya la kaka ɖe teƒe bubuwo le X (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe). Snopes to axa 238 ƒe nuŋlɔɖi bliboa si me dzigbezã ƒe albɔmɔ̃ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si Aƒea Dzikpɔkɔmitia ɖe ɖe go la me eye wòɖo kpe edzi be nuŋlɔɖi si tso Dershowitz gbɔ la dze le Axa 127, le akpa aɖe si woŋlɔ be "Xɔlɔ̃wo" me. Wota nuŋlɔɖi si woŋlɔ le Dec. 11, 2002 dzi la ɖe Dershowitz ƒe lɛtagbalẽ dzi eye wòxlẽ be: Abe dzigbezã nunana na mi ene la, mete ŋu xɔ Vanity Unfair nyatia ƒe akpa gbãtɔ. Meƒo nu na wo be woatrɔ susu tso mia ŋu ava Bill Clinton dzi, abe alesi miakpɔe le nya si woɖe tso eme si kpe ɖe eŋu me ene. Dzigbezã nyui kple gbedoname nyuiwo. (Aƒedzikpɔlawo ƒe Kɔmiti) Fewuɖunya magazine aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Vanity Unfair" dze le axa si kplɔe ɖo dzi, eye nyakpakpawo ƒe tanyawo le abe, "Amekae nye Jack the Ripper? Jeffrey Epstein yea?" kple "Al-Qaeda le South America si Epstein na gae." (Aƒea Dzi Kpɔkpɔ Kɔmiti) Axa 129 hã tsɔ nyati aɖe si woɖe tso aʋatsonyati la me — si ƒe tanyae nye "Amekae Nye Ŋutsu Ma kple Epstein?" — si Dershowitz ƒo nu tsoe le eƒe nuŋlɔɖia me be: Susu siwo le biabiam le biabiam be, "Amekae nye ŋutsu ma si nɔ Epstein gbɔ?" Jeffrey Epstein nye xexeame ƒe ŋutsu xɔŋkɔwo dometɔ ɖeka ya, si nye ŋkɔ si wonya le aƒeme le ɣletinyigba bliboa dzi. Eƒe nɔnɔmetata dze le magazine ɖesiaɖe si le xexeame ƒe akpa dzi. Amesiame nya eƒe ŋutinya -- tso eƒe ke bɔbɔe siwo le Coney Island dzi va ɖo eƒe dziyiyi abe dutoƒonuwɔla siwo ŋu woʋãa ŋu wu le ɣetoɖoƒe xexeame dometɔ ɖeka ene dzi. Gake nuka wɔm wònɔ esime wònɔ yameʋu me yina Afrika kple dunyahela tsãtɔ aɖe si womenya o tso Hope, Arkansas? Amekae nye dunyahela ma eye nukatae Epstein atiae be wòaxɔ zikpui si wobiãa ŋu na le ame ŋutɔ ƒe yameʋua me hafi. Vanity Unfair ɖoe kplikpaa be yeaɖo ŋutsu ɣaɣla sia ƒe gɔmedzedze eye yeaɖe ŋutinya si le megbe na ŋutinyaa afia. (Aƒea Dzi Kpɔkpɔ Kɔmiti) Gbe si wozã le nyatia me, si me woyɔ Bill Clinton be "dunyahela tsãtɔ si me mekɔ o" eye woyɔ Vanity Fair be Vanity Unfair, na eme kɔ ƒã be anɔ eme be woɖoe be Dershowitz ƒe nuŋlɔɖia nanye fefenya. Gake Dershowitz meɖo nya ŋu na Snopes ƒe biabia be wòagblɔ eƒe susu hafi wotae o. Egblɔ na Harvard Crimson, si nye yunivɛsitia ƒe sukuviwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ do ŋgɔ be "ate ŋu adzɔ ŋutɔ" be yeɖo dzigbezãgbalẽvi ɖe Epstein gake "meɖo ŋku edzi kura o." Egblɔ kpee be yemenya be Epstein wɔ nuvlo aɖeke ɣemaɣi o eye be "yemegawɔ ame ŋutɔ ƒe ƒomedodo yeye aɖeke" kplii gbeɖe o le eƒe senyala subɔsubɔ vɔ megbe. Togbɔ be edze abe Dershowitz ƒe nuŋlɔɖia nye nukokoe ene hã la, nyaʋiʋliwo do mo ɖa le alesi Vanity Fair ƒo nu tso Epstein ŋui ŋu. The New Yorker ka nya ta le February 2022 me be Vicky Ward, si wɔ dɔ abe nuŋlɔla si kpea asi ɖe nu ŋu le Vanity Fair le ƒe 2002 me la gblɔ be yebia gbe nɔvinyɔnu eve siwo tso Epstein kple eƒe zɔhɛ Ghislaine Maxwell nu be wowɔ gbɔdɔnuwo ɖe wo ŋu, gake womete ŋu ta woƒe ŋutinyawo o, le February 2022 me (wodzra wo ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Ward gblɔ be Epstein na magazinea ƒe nuŋlɔla, Graydon Carter, xɔe se be megata nɔvinyɔnuawo ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo o. Gake The New Yorker ƒe nyatakakaa kpɔ masɔmasɔwo le Ward ƒe nuŋlɔɖia me eye wòde dzesii be Carter tsɔ “numeɖeɖe siwo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu na le eƒe magazine ƒe nyametsotso be yematsɔ nɔvinyɔnuawo ƒe nutsotsowo awɔ dɔe o” ŋu. Nyatakakaa

claim: Air India yameʋu si nye AI 315 xɔ dzo esi wòɖi ɖe Delhi, mɔzɔlawo le dedie
evidence: Vishvas News, le eƒe numekuku me, kpɔe be foto si kaka ɖe amewo me la menye nyitsɔ laa o, ke boŋ tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si do ŋgɔ me. Nɔnɔmetata la ɖe dzo si bi le Air India Express yameʋu aɖe si ɖo ta Kochi ƒe mɔ̃ me le Muscat yameʋudzeƒea fia. Gake fifia wole egblɔm alakpatɔe be enye dzo si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Air India yameʋu aɖe me le Delhi yameʋudzeƒea.  New Delhi (Vishvas Nyadzɔdzɔwo). Dzo bi le Air India yameʋu aɖe ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔƒe si kpena ɖe eŋu le Delhi yameʋudzeƒea. Afɔkua dzɔ esime yameʋua nɔ ɖiɖim. Mɔzɔlawo kple ʋua me dɔwɔlawo katã le dedie. Fifia, le esia ta la, foto aɖe le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo si me dzudzɔ le dodom tso yameʋua ƒe ŋgɔgbekpa dzi. Woate ŋu akpɔ ame aɖewo hã woanɔ tsitre ɖe teƒe si te ɖe afima ŋu le fotoa me. Zãlawo le gbɔgblɔm be foto sia nye nyitsɔ laa eye wòɖe dzo si bi le yameʋu si nye AI-315 me le Delhi la fia.  Vishvas News, le eƒe numekukua me la, kpɔe be nya si kaka ɖe amewo dome la flua ame. Nɔnɔmetata la tso ƒe 2022 me, esime Air India Express yameʋu aɖe si nɔ mɔ dzi yina Kochi la xɔ dzo le eƒe mɔ̃ me le Muscat Yameʋudzeƒe. Wole nɔnɔmetata xoxo ma ke mam fifia abe alesi wòtso Delhi Yameʋudzeƒe ene.  Nukae le kakam?  Facebook zãla 'Sahib Sandhu Bhadaur' da nya aɖe si kaka ɖe amewo dome le July 22, 2025 dzi, eye wòŋlɔ bena, "Air India yameʋu AI 315 xɔ dzo esi wòɖi ɖe Delhi, mɔzɔlawo le dedie."  Ame geɖe siwo zãa foto sia le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo tsɔ foto sia ma, eye wogblɔ be nyitsɔ laae. Kpɔ nyatakakaa ƒe kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Numekuku Míezã Google Lens dɔwɔnu tsɔ ku nu me tso dɔlékui ƒe nɔnɔmetata la ŋu eye míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si do ƒome kplii le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye freepressjournal.in, si wota le September 15, 2022. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be, "Yameʋu IX 442, si nɔ dzodzom tso Muscat yina Kochi, nɔ dzodzo ge kple mɔzɔla 141 kple ʋua me dɔwɔla ade siwo nɔ ʋua me esime yameʋukula bubu si nɔ taksimɔa dzi ka nya ta be dzudzɔ do. Ne mede ɖeke o la, ame 14 do dzudzɔ." mɔzɔlawo xɔ ‘abi suewo’ esime woɖe wo tso Boeing 737 me."  Míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ siwo ku ɖe nɔnɔmetata la ŋu le OTV News English ƒe YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la dzi. Abe alesi wogblɔe tsitotsito kple video si woda ɖe September 14, 2022 dzi ene la, "Woɖe Air India yameʋu aɖe ƒe mɔzɔlawo ɖa dedie le mɔ̃a ƒe dzobibi le Muscat Yameʋudzeƒea megbe."  Woƒo nu tso nɔnɔmetata sia ŋu le nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si Dainik Jagran ta, si wota le September 14, 2022. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be, "Woxe mɔ ɖe afɔku gã aɖe nu le Muscat yameʋudzeƒea. Air India Express yameʋua ƒe mɔ̃ xɔ dzo. Wote fli ɖe yameʋua me le dzoa megbe. Yameʋu sia nɔ vava ge ɖe Kochi."  Le didia me la, míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ geɖe siwo ku ɖe nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu.  Míema foto si kaka ɖe amewo dome la kple Manish Mishra, si nye Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Gãtɔ le Dainik Jagran, si ƒo nu tso Delhi Yameʋudzeƒea ŋu. Eɖo kpe edzi be nɔnɔmetata sia menye Air India yameʋuwo ƒe dzobibi si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Delhi o. Dzo si bi nyitsɔ laa le Yameʋua ƒe Elektrikdɔwɔƒe (APU), si te ɖe asike ƒe aʋala ŋu, si to vovo na esi woɖe fia le foto si le afisia me.  Esi míeyi míaƒe numekukua dzi la, míedi afɔku si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Delhi Yameʋudzeƒea eye míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si wota le July 22, 2025. Egblɔ be, "Le July 22, 2025 dzi la, dzo bi le Air India yameʋu AI 315 si tso Hong Kong yina Delhi ƒe Auxiliary Power Unit (APU) si tso Hong Kong yina Delhi le eƒe anyidzedze megbe. Afɔkua dzɔ esime mɔzɔlawo nɔ ɖiɖim. Yameʋua." gblẽ nu sue aɖe le afɔku sia me, gake mɔzɔlawo kple ʋua me dɔwɔlawo katã le dedie."  Mlɔeba la, míewɔ scan ɖe Facebook profile si le user si ma nya la ŋu eye míekpɔe be user la ƒe followers 21000.  Nyataƒoƒo: Vishvas News, le eƒe numekuku me la, kpɔe be foto si kaka ɖe amewo me la menye nyitsɔ laa o, ke boŋ tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si do ŋgɔ me. Nɔnɔmetata la ɖe dzo si bi le Air India Express yameʋu aɖe si ɖo ta Kochi ƒe mɔ̃ me le Muscat yameʋudzeƒea fia. Gake fifia wole egblɔm alakpatɔe be enye dzo si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Air India yameʋu aɖe me le Delhi yameʋudzeƒea.  Claim Review : Air India yameʋu AI 315 xɔ dzo esi wòɖi le Delhi, mɔzɔlawo le dedie Claimed By : Facebook user 'Sahib Sandhu Bhadaur' Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro : Ameflunya Ameflunya Dzesi siwo ɖea alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔme gɔme Nyateƒe Ameflunya Aʋatso Nya nyateƒea! Ne ɖikeke aɖe le ŋuwò le nyatakaka aɖe alo nya aɖe ŋu la, na míanya! Nyateƒea nyanya nye wò gomenɔamesi. Ne èse le ɖokuiwò me be ɖikeke le nyatakaka aɖe ŋu eye ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ alo dukɔa dzi la, ke ɖoe ɖe mí to nyatakakatsoƒe siwo míeyɔ ɖe ete la dometɔ ɖesiaɖe dzi.  Contribute to Vishwas News Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe nyateƒetoto, si léa ahuhɔ̃e ɖe ŋusẽ me esime wòle ablɔɖe me tso dɔwɔƒewo kple dunyahehe ƒe kawo me la, ate ŋu adzɔ ne dukɔmeviwo do alɔe ko. Kpe ɖe mía ŋu le míaƒe avuwɔwɔ kple alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo me.  Tags ƒe nyawo

claim: Le email ɖɔliɖɔli kple eƒe hadɔwɔla Ghislaine Maxwell si Aƒea Dzikpɔkɔmitia ɖe ɖe go le November 2025 me la, gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein yɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be Trump zã gaƒoƒo geɖe kple ame aɖe si wotsɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa wɔe le Epstein ƒe aƒeme.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, nyaʋiʋliwo kaka ɖe internet dzi le November 2025 me be e-mail ƒe asitɔtrɔ si womeɖe ɖe go le gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe Jeffrey Epstein kple eƒe zɔhɛ Ghislaine Maxwell dome ɖee fia be Epstein ɖɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be enye "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be dukplɔla la "zã gaƒoƒo geɖe" le Epstein ƒe aƒeme kple amesi wodzra gbɔdɔdɔ. Nya sia kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le gbeƒãɖeɖe be Epstein ƒe anyigbaa ɖe agbalẽ siwo wu 20,000 ɖe go na Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dziɖuɖua Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ megbe. Zãla siwo le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeFacebook (archived),X (archived) kpleReddit ma nya sia, tsɔ kpe ɖe screenshots siwo wogblɔ be wole email si ŋu nya ku ɖo ŋu. Nya sia kaka na Snopes xlẽla geɖe do asi ɖa be yewoakpɔe ɖa be e-mail la nye nyateƒe hã. EII! Trump ɖi fɔ! Edze dɔ!"Medi be nàde dzesii be avu ma si meƒo ɣli o lae nye Trump. [Victim] zã gaƒoƒo geɖe le nye aƒeme kplii... womeƒo nu tso eŋu zi ɖeka pɛ hã o." - Jeffrey Epstein na Ghislaine Maxwell"Menɔ eŋu bum le ema ŋu ... " Maxwell ɖo eŋu. pic.twitter.com/pqu7NNomkn — Ed Krassenstein (@EdKrassen) November 12, 2025 Email ƒe asitɔtrɔ le Epstein kple Maxwell dome si yɔ Trump be "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be ezã gaƒoƒo geɖe kple amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii la nye nyateƒe. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dziɖuɖua Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ ɖe ɖe go le Nov. 12, 2025 dzi nu la, asitɔtrɔ sia dzɔ le April 2, 2011 dzi. Woateŋu akpɔ email la, kpakple nuŋlɔɖi akpe geɖe bubu siwo tso Epstein ƒe domenyinu la me le Google ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe si kɔmitia na le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe dodo me alo axlẽe le ete. (House Committee on Supersight and Government Reform) The full email exchange read: EPSTEIN: medi be miakpɔe adze sii be avu ma si meƒo ɣli o la nye trump.. virignia zã gaƒoƒo geɖe le nye aƒeme kplii ,, womeyɔe zi ɖeka pɛ hã o. kpovitɔwo ƒe amegã. etc. im 75% there MAXWELL: Me nɔ eŋu bum le ema ŋu... "Virignia" fia Virginia Giuffre, amesi tso Epstein nu be edzrae hena gbɔdɔdɔ kple Britain ƒe Fiavi Andrew kple ŋutsu bubu siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi. Esi woɖe nuŋlɔɖiawo ɖe go zi gbãtɔ la, wotrɔ asi le Giuffre ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu, gake Republicantɔ siwo nɔ kɔmitia me yɔ ŋkɔ nɛ emegbe. Giuffre ku to eɖokuiwuwu me le April 2025. Epstein wu eɖokui le ƒe 2019 me esime wònɔ lalam be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnui le dziɖuɖua ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu ta, esime wotso afia na Maxwell be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 20 le esi wòɖo nugbe kple Epstein ta. Email la nye geɖe siwo le document drop si ƒo nu tso Trump ŋu eye wòdo susu ɖa be dukplɔla la nya nu tso Epstein ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu la dometɔ ɖeka. White House Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Karoline Leavitt gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be Democratstɔwo "tia e-mailwo ɖe go na ablɔɖenyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo be woawɔ aʋatso ŋutinya aɖe atsɔ aƒo ɖi Dukplɔla Trump." Leavitt gagblɔ be Giuffre "gblɔ enuenu be Dukplɔla Trump mekpɔ gome le nu gbegblẽ aɖeke kura me o eye 'mateŋu anye xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔtɔe wu' nɛ le woƒe kadodo siwo seɖoƒe li na me o" eye be "ŋutinyaawo menye naneke wu agbagbadzedze siwo me xɔse gbegblẽ le be woaɖe susu ɖa le Dukplɔla Trump ƒe ŋutinya me nusiwo wòwɔ ŋu o, eye Amerikatɔ ɖesiaɖe si si susu nyui le la kpɔa nusi sɔ to alakpanya sia kple susuhenuwo si me kɔ tso dziɖuɖua ƒe ʋuʋu ake me." Trump ŋutɔ ɖo nya ŋu na nuŋlɔɖi siwo woɖe ɖe go leTruth Social, eye wògbugbɔ gblɔ Leavitt ƒe numekuku be enye susuhenuwo. "Demokrasitɔwo le agbagba dzem be yewoagahe Jeffrey Epstein ƒe Ameflunya la vɛ ake elabena woawɔ nusianu kura be yewoatrɔ ɖe alesi wowɔ nu gbegblẽe le Nutsitsidɔa ŋu, kple nyati bubu geɖewo ŋu. Republicantɔ vɔ̃ɖi ŋutɔ, alo bometsila, koe adze mɔ̃ ma me," eŋlɔ. Dzikpɔkɔmiti gblɔ be Epstein ƒe domenyinu la ɖe agbalẽ 23,000 siwo ŋu wole ŋku lém ɖo fifia la ɖe go. Democratictɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ Robert Garcia gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go me be: Zi alesi Donald Trump le agbagba dzem be yeatsyɔ nu Epstein ƒe nyatakakawo dzi la, zi nenemae míeɖea nu geɖe fianae. Email kple lɛtaŋɔŋlɔ yeye siawo fɔ nyabiase siwo me kɔ nyuie ɖe te ku ɖe nu bubu siwo White House ɣla kple alesi ƒomedodo si le Epstein kple Dukplɔla dome le ŋu. Ele be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea naɖe Epstein ƒe agbalẽawo ɖe go bliboe na dukɔa enumake. Dzikpɔkɔmiti la ayi edzi anɔ nya hem ɖe ŋuɖoɖowo ŋu eye madzudzɔ o vaseɖe esime míakpɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye na amesiwo ŋu wowɔ nuvevii. Edze abe Democrattɔ siwo le kɔmitia me ɖe e-mail etɔ̃ ɖe go siwo ɖee fia be Trump nya nu tso Epstein ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu si wogblɔ be ewɔe ene, eye Republicantɔ siwo le kɔmitia me tɔwo ɖe agbalẽ siwo wu 20,000 la ɖe go enumake.

claim: "Nuɖuɖudzraƒewo ɖiɖi. Ŋusẽ ɖiɖi ŋutɔ. ... Enye dɔlar 4 kple dɔlar 5 ɖe gas galɔn ɖeka ta."
evidence: Nusiwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe wu le Donald Trump ƒe ƒe 2024 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada me dometɔ ɖekae nye be wòatrɔ ga ƒe asixɔxɔ gã si ɖo eƒe kɔkɔƒe le ƒe 2022 me le Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Joe Biden ƒe dziɖuɣi. Trump do ŋugbe be yeaɖe nuɖuɖudzraƒewo, ʋuwo kple nuzazã bubuwo ƒe asi dzi akpɔtɔ. Trump xɔ aʋadziɖuɖu ƒe afɔɖeɖe le nuwo ƒe asiwo ŋu le Aug. 26 ƒe Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me, eye wòyɔ hatsotso ʋee aɖewo. "Nuɖuɖudzraƒewo le ɖiɖim. Ŋusẽ le ɖiɖim ŋutɔ," Trump gblɔ. "Enye dɔlar 4 kple dɔlar 5 ɖe gas galɔn ɖeka ta." Míelé ŋku ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ŋu eye míekpɔe be nuɖuɖudzraƒe kple ŋusẽnu aɖewo ƒe asi ɖiɖi, gake ame geɖe kpɔ dzidziɖedzi. White House meɖo nyabiase aɖe si wobia tso nyati sia ŋu la ŋu o. Le nuɖuɖudzraƒewo gome la, míedzro asixɔxɔ ŋuti nyatakaka siwo wozãna ɖaa me tso Bureau of Labor Statistics’ consumer price index me. Ne míebu eŋu bliboe la, nuɖuɖu ƒe asi dzi ɖe edzi, gake nu ɖekaɖeka aɖewo ƒe asi ɖiɖi esime bubuwo dzi ɖe edzi. Nuɖuɖu ƒe dzidzenu aɖe, si woyɔna be nuɖuɖu le aƒeme, dzi ɖe edzi vie le December 2024 kple July 2025 dome — si mede 1% o. Nuɖuɖu kple nunono ƒe asiwo ƒo ƒu ɖee fia be dzidziɖedzi 1.5% le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me. Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒe hã ma nuɖuɖu ƒomevi veviwo ƒe asi ƒe ɖoɖowo ɖe vovo. Ne míege ɖe nuɖuɖudzraƒea me yi ŋgɔe la, míakpɔe be nu siawo dometɔ aɖewo va xɔ asi wu evɔ bubuwo ya ƒe asi bɔbɔ. Azi ƒe asi, si nye nya si dzi Trump ƒo nu tsoe le ƒea ƒe gɔmedzedze la, ɖiɖi abe 13% ene, le xeviwo ƒe dɔléle ƒe dzidziɖedzi si xeviwo ƒe dɔléle ta. Abolo ɖiɖi 3.2%, eye atikutsetsewo kple amagbewo ɖiɖi 0.7%. Gake nu geɖe wu ƒe asi dzi ɖe edzi. Bacon dzi ɖe edzi 2.9%. Lã, koklolã, tɔmelã kple azi ƒe asi katã dzi ɖe edzi 2.8%. Kɔfi ƒe asi yi dzi 11.3%. Notsi kple nusiwo do ƒome kplii dzi ɖe edzi vie, 0.5%. Sukli kple nu viviwo dzi ɖe edzi 3.7%. Nyilã si wotu ye kpɔ dzidziɖedzi gãtɔ kekeake, eye wòdzi ɖe edzi 11.6%. Kuɖiɖi kple seɖoƒe si woɖo na nyilã ƒe asi yi dzi. Dzidziɖedzi siawo wu ƒe afã. Ne nu siawo ƒe asi yi edzi le dzi yim nenema ke le ƒe blibo ɖeka me la, dzidziɖedzia adzi ɖe edzi le alafa me zi gbɔ zi eve. Ŋusẽ ƒe gazazã bliboa ɖiɖi, abe 2.6% ene le Trump ƒe gaƒoɖokui dzi. Ŋusẽ nye dɔ si keke ta si me ami, propane, kerosene, dzofi, elektrikŋusẽ kple ŋusẽdɔwo le. Nuƒlela geɖewo de dzesii be yewoƒe elektrikŋusẽfewo dzi ɖe edzi ɣleti sia ɣleti, 4.6%. Ŋusẽ Ŋuti Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe gblɔ be mɔ̃memi ƒe asi dzi ɖe edzi cent ʋɛ aɖewo ko tso dɔlar 3.109 le Jan. 20, si nye Trump ƒe zidzinɔɣi, va ɖo dɔlar 3.147 le Aug. 25 dzi, si nye nyatakaka yeyetɔ kekeake si nɔ anyi esime Trump ƒo nu. (Zi geɖe la, gas ƒe asiwo dzina ɖe edzi le dzomeŋɔli.) Trump tsɔ esia sɔ kple dɔlar 4 alo dɔlar 5 le mɔ̃memi galɔn ɖeka me, gake zi mamlɛtɔ si eƒe asiwo dzi ɖe edzi nenemae nye le ƒe 2022. Gas ƒe asi ɖiɖi si kplɔe ɖo ƒe akpa gãtɔ, kple akpa gãtɔ va le Biden ƒe dziɖuɣi. Mɔ̃memi ƒe asi mede dɔlar 4 o le galɔn ɖeka me le Biden ƒe dukplɔlanyenye ƒe ƒe eve kple afã mamlɛawo me. Gary Burtless, si nye Brookings Institution ƒe gaŋutinunyala gblɔ be Trump "ateŋu afia dzidzedze siwo wokpɔ le ga ƒe asixɔxɔ dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ le adzɔnu aɖewo me; gake ‘do kpo nu’ le adzɔnu bubu geɖewo me." "Le nusianu me la, esesẽ be míagblɔ be ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ɖiɖi ŋutɔ alo le titina gɔ̃ hã wu alesi wònɔ le Biden ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe nuwuwu ƒe ɣeyiɣia me." Trump gblɔ be, "Nuɖuɖudzraƒewo ɖiɖi. Ŋusẽ ɖiɖi ŋutɔ. ... Enye dɔlar 4 kple dɔlar 5 ɖe gas galɔn ɖeka ta." Nuɖuɖu aɖewo ƒe asi ɖiɖi le Trump ƒe gaƒoɖokui dzi, eye ŋusẽ ƒe asi bliboa ɖiɖi. Gake nu geɖe ƒe asi dzi ɖe edzi. Nuɖuɖu siwo ƒe asi adzi ɖe edzi le December 2024 kple July 2025 dome dometɔ aɖewoe nye nyilã ƒuƒu, bacon, lã bubuwo, kɔfi, nyinotsibabla kple sukli kple nu viviwo. Le ŋusẽ gome la, elektrikŋusẽ ƒe asi dzi ɖe edzi, eye Trump ƒe tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple mɔ̃memi si ƒe home nye dɔlar 4 kple dɔlar 5 la ŋe aɖaba ƒu edzi be asi ƒe ɖiɖi le pɔmpia ƒe akpa gãtɔ dzɔ le Biden ƒe dziɖuɣi. Míebua nyagbɔgblɔa be Nyateƒe Afã.

Dziɖuɖumegãwo gbe alakpanya si wogblɔ be Sri Lanka ‘dzudzɔ’ afɔkuwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe



							Wotae le December 10, 2025 le ga 10:24 me
Wotrɔ asi le eŋu le December 11, 2025 le 02:56




							
							3 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Harshana SILVA, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Sri Lanka ƒe agbalẽ





Sri Lanka dziɖuɖua tsi tre ɖe alesi wòwɔ nui ŋu esi ahom sesẽ si gblẽ nu wu le ƒe blaeve me la tu le dukɔa me le ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwuwu, gake mehe ƒukpoa ƒe afɔkudɔwɔƒea ƒe ka o, si to vovo na alakpanya siwo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Dukplɔla ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyanuɖela kple Afɔkuwo Dzikpɔƒe (DMC) ƒe tatɔ gblɔ na AFP be ameha la gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm.



"Hafi Anura nazu dukplɔla la, Afɔkuwo Dzikpɔƒe aɖe nɔ Sri Lanka", xlẽ Sinhalagbe me Facebook nyatakaka aɖe si woma le November 28, 2025. "Gake Malima (kɔmpas) dziɖuɖua ɖe DMC ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ɖa le dziɖuɖua xɔxɔ vɔ megbe teti," nyatakakaa yi edzi xlẽ, eye wòƒo nu tso dziɖuɖu ƒe habɔbɔ si nye National People's Power, si ƒe dzesi nye kɔmpasi ŋu. "Malima dziɖuɖua ɖe gbeƒãe be DMC nye sɔ ɣi aɖe, si gblẽa dukɔa ƒe adzɔxexe ƒe dɔlarwo dome."The post also shares a graphic with text that largely repeats the false claim. Nya bubu siwo kaka ɖe Facebook dzi gblɔ alakpatɔe be woɖe afɔkudɔwɔƒea ɖa eye wotsɔ eƒe dɔwo de asi na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso Facebook nyatakaka si woɖe le December 3 lia dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Sri Lanka ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋulawo gblɔ be Dukplɔla Anura Kumara Dissanayake ƒe dziɖuɖua mewɔ afɔɖeɖe siwo sɔ ɖe ɣeyiɣia dzi ɖe ahom sesẽ si nye Ditwah ŋu o togbɔ be yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti dɔwɔƒea xlɔ̃ nu wo hã (archived link).Ame siwo wu miliɔn eve le Sri Lanka -- siwo ade amewo ƒe alafa memama 10 kloe -- gblẽ nu le tsiɖɔɖɔ kple anyigbaʋuʋu siwo ahom sesẽtɔ kekeake si tu la he vɛ la ŋu ƒukpo dzi le ƒe blaeve me. Ne mede ɖeke o la, wowu ame 638 (archived link).Nya siwo wogblɔ ɖee fia be ezãla aɖewo xɔe se be Dissanayake de se ŋutɔŋutɔ be woadzudzɔ DMC la."Ƒe ɖeka ƒe ɣleti 12, eye wowɔa dɔ le ɣleti ɖeka ko me. Eyata wogblɔ be womate ŋu axe fe ɖe ɣleti 11 ko ta dɔ mawɔmawɔe o," ezãla aɖe ŋlɔ le alakpanyawo dometɔ ɖeka te. "Emae nye nya si mese." "Woɖoe koŋ wɔe. Woatsɔ nudzɔdzɔawo ade Pelawette ƒe gakɔnta me kpoo," ezãla bubu ŋlɔ, eye wòƒo nu tso dziɖuɖua ƒe habɔbɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒegã ŋu. 'Ele dɔ wɔm bliboe'Gake DMC ƒe tatɔ, Sampath Kotuwegoda, gblɔ na AFP le December 4 lia dzi be habɔbɔa "le dɔ wɔm bliboe", eye wòƒoe ɖe dukɔmeviwo nu be "woagaflu wo to alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo kple nya siwo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi o".DMC ɖe nyatakakawo kple nuxlɔ̃amewo ɖe go esime ahom sesẽ Ditwah tu -- siwo AFP yɔ le eƒe nyatakakawo me (wodzrae ɖo le afisia kple afisia). Prasanna Perera, si nye Dukplɔla ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã gblɔ nenema ke be DMC gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm. "Nyateƒe aɖeke kura mele nya siwo kaka ɖe hadome nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo kple nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo dzi si gblɔ be Dukplɔla Dissanayake ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Afɔkuwo Dzikpɔkpɔ ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha alo Afɔkuwo Dzikpɔƒe ɖa o," egblɔ na AFP le e-mail me le December 8. Eyi edzi gblɔ be dziɖuɖua megblɔ nya aɖeke tso afɔkudɔwɔƒea be enye "sɔ ɣi" ŋu o.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Nyatakaka si ɖe tsidzadza si ƒo ƒu ɖe Sri Lanka dzi le November 23 kple 29 dome fia
					
Wotsɔ dɔwɔƒea de Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha te abe a

claim: U.S. House Speaker Mike Johnson, R-La., gblɔ be, "Wobia tso Democrattɔwo si be woaʋu dziɖuɖua. Wonɔa gbɔgblɔm be Republicantɔwoe le dziɖuɖua dzi kpɔm. Míele nenema o. Menye Sewɔtakpekpea me o. Ame blaade ye kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea dzi, menye ame akpa gãtɔ dzro aɖe o."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Johnson gblɔ nya sia le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le Oct. 27, 2025 dzi, esime dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe nutsitsidɔa ge ɖe eƒe ŋkeke 27 lia me. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe akɔdada 60 ƒe dzidzenu si hiã be woatsɔ ado se akpa gãtɔ ɖe ŋgɔ ŋue wònɔ nu ƒom tsoe. Esi dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso yi edzi va ɖo eƒe kwasiɖa enelia me le October 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ma video aɖe si dze abe ɖe wòɖe U.S. Aƒenɔ ƒe Dukplɔla Mike Johnson, R-La., fia ene, hegblɔ be Republicantɔwo mele "dziɖuɖua dzi kpɔm o." Be woawu dɔa nutsitsi nu la, ele be Sewɔtakpekpea nada asi ɖe se aɖe si dzi Aƒea da asi ɖo va yi si agbugbɔ aʋu dziɖuɖua nu la dzi. Le video klipi si le kakam le internet dzi me la, wose Johnson gblɔ be, "Wobia tso Democrattɔwo si be woaʋu dziɖuɖua. Wonɔa gbɔgblɔm be Republicantɔwoe le dziɖuɖua dzi kpɔm. Míele nenema o." Gɔmeɖeɖe aɖewo (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia) tsɔ nya aɖe si didi wu si me wògblɔ kpee le be, "Menye le Sewɔtakpekpea me o. Akɔdada blaade kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea dzi, ke menye ame akpa gãtɔ dzro aɖe ko o." Democratic Party hã ma X post (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si te gbe ɖe Johnson ƒe nyawo dzi eye wòtsɔ wo sɔ kple nya aɖe si wògblɔ do ŋgɔ si me wogblɔ be elɔ̃ ɖe edzi le be Republicantɔwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe xɔwo kple White House siaa dzi. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔe wòsɔ be Johnson, amesi gblɔe le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le Oct. 27, 2025 dzi, esime nutsitsidɔa ge ɖe eƒe ŋkeke 27 lia me. Johnson nɔ nu ƒom tso Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe akɔdada 60 ƒe dzidzenu si hiã be woatsɔ ado se akpa gãtɔ ɖe ŋgɔ ŋu. Esi wònye be ame akpa gãtɔ dzro aɖe koe le Republicantɔwo si le Sewɔtakpekpea me ta la, womate ŋu ato se akpa gãtɔ me Demokrasitɔwo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu aɖeke manɔmee o. Le ABC News ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpea ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe go (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) me la, Johnson gblɔ be Republicantɔwo hiã Democrattɔwo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu be woagaʋu dziɖuɖua ake, eye wòyɔ Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe akɔdada 60 ƒe dzidzenu kple GOP ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me zikpui 53. Eyi edzi (ɣeyiɣi ƒe ɖoɖo 1:27, míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Demokrasitɔwoe da asi ɖe edzi enuenu be yewoatɔ te dziɖuɖua. Gake menye ɖe wole eʋum ake o. Wozã woƒe ɣeyiɣi akpa gãtɔ tsɔ nɔ agbagba dzem be yewoahe Amerikatɔwo ƒe susu ɖa le nyateƒe bɔbɔe ŋutɔ la ŋu. Eyata metsɔ nukpɔkpɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunu sue aɖe vɛ na mi le afisia be maɖo ŋku nusiwo nye nyateƒenya bɔbɔeawo dzi na amesiame ko. Nyateƒenya bɔbɔe ene le afisia. Wobia tso Demokrasitɔwo si be woaʋu dziɖuɖua. Wonɔa gbɔgblɔm be Republicantɔwoe le dziɖuɖua dzi kpɔm. Míele nenema o. Menye le Sewɔtakpekpea me o. Ame 60 ye kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea dzi, ke menye ame akpa gãtɔ dzro ko o. Eye eyata nya gbãtɔ, Democrattɔwo ƒe akɔdadawo hiã hafi woate ŋu aʋu dziɖuɖua. Emegbe Johnson gblɔ nya geɖe tso Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo ƒe didi siwo wogblɔ be woagaʋu dziɖuɖua ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye, egblɔ be, “dɔlar biliɔn 200 si woatsɔ ana lãmesẽnyawo na amedzro siwo mele se nu o kple amesiwo menye dukɔmeviwo o siwo U.S. adzɔxelawo xe.” Snopes gbe nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Demokrasitɔwo di be yewoaxe ga na lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ femaxee na amesiwo si dukɔ bubu me nɔnɔ ƒe ɖoƒe le se nu o la ɖa va yi. Demokrasitɔwo le agbagba dzem be yewoakeke adzɔxexe ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu si ana lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo aɖewo nate ŋu axɔ asi wu la ɖe enu, gake amedzro siwo ʋu va dukɔa me le se nu la medze na ɖoɖo siawo o. Johnson lɔ̃ ɖe edzi va yi be Republicantɔwo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe White House kple Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe xɔ eveawo dzi le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Oct. 22 dzi, abe alesi Democratic Party te gbe ɖe edzi le X. Egblɔ be: Le akpa ɖeka la, Republicantɔwo ƒe akpaa, habɔbɔ si kpɔa White House, Sewɔtakpekpea kple Aƒea dzi la le asiwò. Míeyɔa dziɖuɖu ma si wɔ ɖeka. Enye akpa si ɖu dzi le amehawo ƒe akɔdada me le swing nuto ɖesiaɖe me eye wòge ɖe atikemawɔla yeyewo le Republicantɔwo ƒe nɔƒea me vevie. Be míagaxlẽ nu geɖe wu la, míeku nya aɖe si wogblɔ be MSNBC ƒe wɔnawo dzikpɔla Rachel Maddow ɖe kadodo si le Johnson srɔ̃ kple LLC ɣaɣla aɖe dome si do ƒome ɖikeketɔe kple dɔlar miliɔn geɖe ƒe asitsatsa fia la me.

claim: Àte ŋu aŋlɔ lɛta na RBG ɖe 50409 atsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te be yeagblɔ na wò sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ be megaxɔ ɖe Ruth Bader Ginsberg teƒe le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe kɔkɔtɔ o vaseɖe esime ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatia la nawu enu
evidence: Ðo nya resist ɖe Resistbot le Apple Messages, WhatsApp, Messenger, Instagram, Telegram, alo to text message dzi ɖe 50409 eye nàɖo biabia siwo woɖo ɖe wo to text message dzi. Le aɖabaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la, àdo ka kple Sewɔtakpekpea alo wò ame tiatia bubu siwo nètia. Na wò lɛtaa naʋu be wòawɔ dɔ nyuie wu. ... Mehiã be nàdi wò teƒenɔlawo gbã o, Resistbot awɔe na wò. Ate ŋu aŋlɔ wò lɛtaa gɔ̃ hã tso gaxɔgbalẽvi ƒe xexlẽdzesi alo nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe me, alo wò ŋutɔ àte ŋu aŋlɔ lɛta.

claim: Nancy Pelosi gblɔ be China alɔ̃ Joe Biden wu.
evidence: United States ƒe nyatakaka: Russia le dɔ wɔm be yeaɖu Biden dzi; China kple Iran di be Trump naɖu Russia dzi le dɔ wɔm vevie be yeatsɔ "ado vlo" Demokrasitɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala si wosusu be enye Joe Biden, gake China ya bu Dukplɔla Donald Trump be "womate ŋu agblɔe ɖi o" eye wòdi be yeagaɖu dzi le tiatia yeye aɖe me o, le U.S. nyatakakaxɔlawo ƒe numekuku yeye aɖe nu. Kukuɖenuŋu sia si Dukɔa ƒe Nyatakakawo Kple Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe amegã ta le Dzoɖagbe hã ƒo nya ta be Iran le dɔ wɔm be yeahe mama vɛ eye yeagblẽ Trump dome do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatia. "Tehran ƒe didi be yeawɔ dɔwɔna mawo tɔgbe ƒe akpa aɖe tso nukpɔsusu si nye be Dukplɔla Trump ƒe gbugbɔgatia ana U.S. ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu nayi edzi na Iran gbɔ," numekukua ƒo nya ta, eye wògblɔ kpee be Iran hã le vɔvɔ̃m be Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua aƒoe ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe tɔtrɔ nu.

claim: U.S. agbledelawo katã ƒe 40% lɔƒo nye amedzro siwo si agbalẽ mele o.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le akɔntabubu yeyetɔ kekeake si li tso USDA gbɔ nu la, agbledelawo ƒe agbledela siwo ade 40% — amesiwo wɔa dɔ kple atikutsetsewo, amagbewo kple nukuwo, le kpɔɖeŋu me — mexɔ mɔɖeɖe le se nu be woawɔ dɔ le United States le ƒe 2020 kple 2022 dome o. eye lãnyilawo alo nyinotsi agbledelawo hã menɔ eme o. Ƒe 2023 kple emegbe ƒe akɔntabubuwo menɔ anyi le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi o. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo dze nya si wogblɔ be U.S. agbledelawo katã ƒe 40% lɔƒo nye amedzro siwo si agbalẽ mele o la gbɔgblɔ gɔme. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe X, Reddit kple Facebook dzi yɔ akɔntabubu si wogblɔ be wogblɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be "dɔwɔla siwo le Amerika ƒe agblewo dzi ƒe 40% ya teti nye amesiwo si agbalẽ mele o." Nya siawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ sɔ le nyatakaka yeyetɔ siwo li nu, le alesi ame aɖe ɖea "agbledela" gɔmee nu. Le U.S. Agbledenyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ƒe akɔntabubu yeyetɔ kekeake nu tso ƒe 2020 va ɖo ƒe 2022 me la, agbledela siwo wohaya ƒe 42% mexɔ mɔɖeɖe le se nu be woawɔ dɔ le United States o. Seɖoƒe aɖewo le akɔntabubu sia ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, mebua lãnyilawo kple nyinotsi agbledelawo ŋu o. Gake esi wòdze abe esiae nye nyatakaka nyuitɔ kekeake si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ku ɖe agbledela siwo si agbalẽ mele o ƒe xexlẽme si li vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe akpa gãtɔ. Snopes do asi ɖe USDA ƒe Ganyawo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe be yeabia nenye be akɔntabubu bubuwo le dziɖuɖua si ku ɖe agbledela siwo katã si agbalẽ mele o ƒe alafa memamã ŋu eye wòle ŋuɖoɖo lalam hã. USDA ƒe nɔnɔmetata si ɖe agbledela siwo woxɔ ɖe dɔ me ƒe nɔnɔme le se nu ŋue nye esi: (USDA, Ganyawo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe/U.S. Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔ) "Agbledela siwo woxɔ ɖe dɔ me siwo womeɖe mɔ na le se nu be woawɔ dɔ le United States ƒe akpa dzi ɖe edzi tso abe alafa memama 14 ene le ƒe 1989–91 me va ɖo alafa memama 55 kloe le ƒe 1999–2001 me; le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me la, eɖiɖi va ɖo abe alafa memama 40 ene," USDA gblɔ le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe (kpɔ akpa si nye "Se ƒe Nɔnɔme Kple Agbledela Siwo Wohaya ƒe Ʋuʋu ƒe Nuwɔnawo" kple eƒe akpa sue si nye "Agbledelawo ƒe Agbledela Siwo Wohaya ƒe Afã kloe Mekpɔa Ʋuʋu ƒe Nɔnɔme le Se Nu O"). USDA ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe agbledela siwo nye agbledelawo ƒe ʋuʋu yi dukɔ bubuwo me ƒe nɔnɔme ŋu la tso U.S. Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔ ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Agbledelawo Ŋuti Numekuku (NAWS) gbɔ. Agbledede Dɔwɔƒea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe hã de dzesi seɖoƒe si le nyatakakaawo ŋu —vevietɔ, be "eɖe H-2A dɔwɔlawo ƒe xexlẽme si le dzidzim ɖe edzi, kpakple lãnyidɔwɔla siwo katã woxɔ ɖe dɔ me la ɖa." H-2A dɔwɔlawo nye amesiwo tso dukɔa godo siwo wona mɔɖeɖe le se nu be woawɔ agbledededɔ siwo wowɔna le ɣeyiɣi aɖe me alo ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe dɔ. Le Amerika Agbledelawo e Habɔbɔ ƒe nya nu la, H-2A dɔwɔlawo nye agbledelawo katã ƒe 17% le gaŋutiɖoɖo ƒe 2024. Enyo hã be míade dzesii be agbledela siwo woxɔ ɖe dɔ me ƒe nyatakakawo koe USDA na, eye womeɖe mɔ na wo le se nu be woawɔ dɔ le United States o, ke menye amesiwo si mɔɖeɖe mele be woanɔ United States o. Togbɔ be woɖɔa amesiwo le United States alo wɔa dɔ le United States zi geɖe, vovototo aɖeke manɔmee, be wonye "amedzro siwo si agbalẽ mele o" hã la, anya wɔ be woanɔ United States le se nu gake dɔwɔwɔ ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ manɔmee. Edze abe U.S. ƒe akɔntabubu siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo na agbledela siwo katã (notsi kple lãnyilawo hã le) siwo ŋu se meɖe mɔ ɖo be woanɔ dukɔa me o la meli o ene. Ke hã, Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Ʋuʋu ƒe Nusɔsrɔ̃wo Gbɔ bu akɔnta le ƒe 2022 me be U.S. agbledelawo katã ƒe 45% lɔƒo nye esiwo si agbalẽ mele o. Numekuku aɖe si Wisconsin-Madison Yunivɛsiti wɔ ɖee fia be “akɔntabubu aɖeke mele dziɖuɖua si ku ɖe nyinotsidɔwɔla siwo ʋu va dukɔ bubuwo me siwo ŋu womeɖe mɔ ɖo o ƒe xexlẽme ŋu o.” "Akɔntabubuawo tso 46 le alafa me; va ɖo 90 le alafa me, eye akɔntabubu si wozã wue nye 70 le alafa me," nyatakakaa gblɔ le Axa 11. Esia menye nya gbãtɔ si wogblɔ tso agbledela siwo si agbalẽ mele o ŋu si ŋu míeku nu me le o. Do ŋgɔ la, míelé ŋku ɖe nya aɖe si wogblɔ be agbledela 75% le Bakersfield, California, mete ŋu va dɔme le January 2025 ƒe amedzrowo ƒe amedzidzedzewo dome o.
