Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


				Wolé Denmarktɔ numekula Poul Thorsen le esi wogblɔ be efi gakpekpeɖeŋunana le United States ƒe Dɔlélenutsitsi Kple Mɔxexe Ðe Enu Dɔwɔƒe (CDC) ta, gake nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo gblɔ be eƒe nyatsotsoa ɖe agbalẽ aɖe si wòŋlɔ si ɖee fia be kadodo aɖeke mele Measles, Mumps and Rubella (MMR) ƒe atikewɔmɔnu kple autism dome o la mesɔ o. Agbalẽa ŋlɔla vevitɔ gblɔ be Thorsen mekpe ɖe nyatakakaawo me dzodzro ŋu o, magazine aɖe si ta nyatia gblɔ be nusiwo ŋu yewoke ɖo la gakpɔtɔ sɔ, eye numekuku siwo wowɔ emegbe ɖee fia ɣesiaɣi be menye MMR-tu la gbɔe ahɔhɔ̃mekawo kple tsitsimedɔlélea tso o.
			


"Vaccines. Autism FRAUD. 'Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya' si wozã tsɔ zi ɖoɖoe na mí dadawo? Wotue ɖe nuvlowɔla aɖe dzi," September 16, 2025 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ le Instagram.Instagram nyatakaka bubu si ƒo nu tso Thorsen ƒe léle ŋu gblɔ be: "Ẽ, wotsɔ nya ɖe vaccine-autism nyaʋiʋlia nu ŋlɔla veviwo dometɔ ɖeka ŋu be ewɔ ametafatafa gã aɖe. Aleke gbegbee autism ƒe nyaʋiʋlia nu sẽe numekuku ƒo ɖi?" Eƒo eta be: "Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya la MELE gbɔ o!"Nya mawo tɔgbe kaka ɖe Facebook dzi le Fransegbe kple Spaingbe me.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Instagram nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe le September 24, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot
					


Nɔnɔmetata
 


Instagram nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe le September 24, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot
					

Le April 2011 me la, wotsɔ nya ɖe Thorsen ŋu zi gbɔ zi 22 be ewɔ ametafatafa to ka dzi kple gazazã ɖe mɔ gbegblẽ nu. United States ƒe Senyala Sally Quillian Yates gblɔ ɣemaɣi be "wogblɔ be ewɔ ɖoɖo aɖe be yeafi CDC ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu si wu dɔlar miliɔn ɖeka si woɖo ɖi na autism ŋuti numekuku" (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Wolée le June 4, 2025 dzi le Germany, eye United States le didim be woatsɔe ade asi na ye, le gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖe si tso United States ƒe Lãmesẽnyawo Kple Amegbetɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe (HHS) ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔlélewo Gbɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe gbɔ nu (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe susu tsɔtsɔ ɖe Thorsen ŋu nyitsɔ laa va le September 15 ƒe Breitbart nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si gadze eƒe léle ŋuti nyatakaka aɖe megbe. Le eme la, agbalẽa ŋlɔlawo ƒo nya ta be: "Numekuku sia na kpeɖodzi sẽŋu siwo tsi tre ɖe nukpɔsusu si nye be MMR ƒe atikewɔmɔnu hea autism vɛ ŋu."Gake togbɔ be wogblɔ nya sia le Internet dzi hã la, agbalẽŋlɔla vevitɔ, magazine si ta numekukua, kple eŋutinunyala aɖe si le eɖokui si katã gblɔ na AFP be ganyawo ŋuti nuvlowɔwɔ siwo wogblɔ be Thorsen wɔ la megbe nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo le Denmarktɔwo ƒe numekuku gbalẽa me o."Numekukua ƒe susu kple nukpɔsusua nye tɔnye," Kreesten Madsen, si numekukua ŋlɔla vevitɔ, gblɔe na AFP le September 19 ƒe e-mail me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia). "Wowɔ nyatakakaawo xɔxɔ, numekuku gbãtɔ, kple wo gɔmeɖeɖe Poul Thorsen manɔmee."Madsen gblɔ be Thorsen menye nu vevi aɖeke le dɔa me o eye mekpɔ mɔ akpɔ eƒe nyatakakawo gbeɖe o, gake ena kadodo aɖe CDC, si nye gadzɔdzɔ geɖe siwo na dɔa dometɔ ɖeka.Egblɔ be "yeka ɖe nyatia dzi bliboe" abe alesi wònɔ wr

claim: Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe amewo dome ɖee fia be Ajit Doval ƒoe ɖe Indiatɔwo nu be woaɖe Amazon ɖa be woatsɔ aƒoe ɖe U.S. nu le adzɔxexe ƒe aʋawɔwɔa me.
evidence: Nɔnɔmetata aɖe si me nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Ajit Doval, si nye Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Aɖaŋuɖola, gblɔ, si ƒoe ɖe Indiatɔwo nu be woaɖe Amazon ƒe dɔwɔnua ɖa be wòanye mɔ si dzi woato aƒoe ɖe United States nu le ganyawo gome le adzɔxexe ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim me la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Nya sia ɖee fia be ne ame gbogbo aɖewo gbe nuƒolanɔƒea la, akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe Amerikatɔwo ƒe didiwo dzi vevie.  Mina míakpɔe ɖa be Ajit Doval gblɔ nya sia nyateƒe hã.  Woateŋu akpɔ nya si woŋlɔ ɖe etame la le afisia. (Archive) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile ɖo kpe nya sia dzi eye wòkpɔe be nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo me la flua ame.  NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa dze eƒe kpeɖodzinana gɔme to nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome si wogblɔ be Ajit Doval gbɔe wòtso le Amazon kple adzɔxexe ƒe aʋa si wogblɔ be wowɔ la didi me. Gbedasi si kaka ɖe amewo me gblɔ be Indiatɔwo ate ŋu aƒo United States vevie ne woɖe Amazon ɖa le woƒe asitelefonwo me, eye wogblɔ be asitsatsa to kɔmpiuta dzi ƒe mɔnu la kpɔa viɖe gã aɖe tso India gbɔ gbesiagbe kple ƒe sia ƒe eye be ne ame gbogbo aɖewo gbe asitelefonwo la, azi Amerika dzi be wòabɔbɔ.  Gake nya veviwo didi si wozã Ajit Doval ƒe ŋkɔ tsɔ kpe ɖe nyawo abe Amazon, adzɔxexe ƒe aʋawɔwɔ, kple asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu ene me metrɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o. Ne ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Aɖaŋuɖolae gblɔ nya sia tɔgbe ŋutɔŋutɔ la, anye ne ahe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gãwo ƒe susu godoo eye woaka nya ta le eŋu le afisiafi. Womeke ɖe nyatakaka ma tɔgbe aɖeke ŋu o, si ɖee fia be nya si wogblɔ be dɔlékuiwo kaka la nye alakpa eye wòflua ame.  Eyata kpeɖodzi aɖeke mele nya si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu o eye meɖe nya aɖeke si Ajit Doval gblɔ le se nu la fia o.

claim: Le December 2025 me la, U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe dɔwɔla siwo le Minneapolis lé Amerikatɔ aɖe si xɔ ƒe 55 si ŋkɔe nye Sue Tincher si nɔ ŋku lém ɖe woƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Snopes mete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi le eɖokui si be dɔwɔlawo tso Tincher ƒe srɔ̃ɖesigɛa o. Nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖewo ka nya ta tso nya ma ŋu tsitotsito. Le Dec. 9, 2025 ƒe ŋdi me la, U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha wɔ amedzrowo ƒe dɔ aɖe le North 21st kple North Oliver mɔdodo siwo te ɖe afima ŋu le Minneapolis. Le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyatakaka siwo woma le afisiafi nu la, dɔwɔlawo lé Sue Tincher, si xɔ ƒe 55, si nye Amerika dukɔmevi si nɔ ŋku lém ɖe dɔwɔwɔawo ŋu. Esi wonɔ gaxɔ me la, le nyatakaka siwo woɖo ɖe amewo nu la, dɔwɔlawo do ŋɔdzi na Tincher be yewoatsɔ atadi aƒu gbe ɖe Tincher eye wotso eƒe srɔ̃ɖesigɛ. Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea eye woɖo e-mail ɖe mí be wobia be nya siwo woŋlɔ la sɔ hã. Míekpɔe be wole nenema, togbɔ be Snopes mete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi le eɖokui si be dɔwɔlawo tso Tincher ƒe srɔ̃ɖesigɛ esime wònɔ gaxɔ me o hã. Gake nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe siwo ƒo nu kple Tincher tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu la ka nya ta tsitotsito. Snopes do asi ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe kple ICE gbɔ be yeabia nyatakaka bubuwo. Le nya aɖe si woɖo ɖe Snopes to e-mail dzi me la, DHS ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe Kpeɖeŋutɔ Tricia McLaughlin gblɔ be "Wolé Susan Tincher esi wòdze dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔla aɖe dzi, dze agbagba be yeato dedienɔnɔ ƒe nutome si woɖo na dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ me, aŋe aɖaba aƒu sedede siwo le se nu dzi, eye wòva zu ŋutasẽla." McLaughlin gblɔ na Fox News be ICE nɔ teƒe ma be yealé Ecuadortɔ ʋuʋula aɖe gake be "ʋunyaʋunyawɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le ɖo eye wodze sedzikpɔlawo dzi dzedze kple mɔxexe ɖe enu gɔme esime wonɔ nuvlowɔla sia si me afɔku le la lém." Snopes ke ɖe nyati geɖe siwo ƒo nu tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu siwo nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le ta siwo tsi tre ɖe McLaughlin ƒe nyawo ŋu. Minnesota Dutoƒo Radio gblɔ be Tincher nyɔ le ŋdi ga 6:30 me esi wogblɔ le eƒe telefon dzi be ICE ƒe ameléle aɖe le edzi yim le eƒe nutoa me. Edo go yi gota be yealé ŋku ɖe ame siwo wolé la ŋu ahaŋlɔ wo ɖi. Esi Tincher bia kpovitɔ aɖe be ICE ye wonye hã la, egblɔ be wogblɔ na ye be "wòatrɔ," MPR ka nya ta. Egbe. "Eye metsi tre ɖe nye anyigba, ɖeko metsi tre ɖe afima le afɔtoƒea, eye kpovitɔ bubuwo va do eye wotsɔm ƒu gbe ɖe anyigba, wobla asi sesĩe, wotsɔm de agbatsɔʋu si womede dzesii o me," egblɔ na nutoa me television dɔwɔƒe KARE. MPR ka nya ta be Tincher te tɔ ɖe edzi be yetsi tre ɖe nuƒoƒo ƒe didime tso dɔwɔƒea gbɔ eye mexe mɔ na dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe nuwɔnawo o. KARE gblɔ be wolé Tincher kple ame etɔ̃ bubuwo. Eteƒekpɔla bubuwo hã nɔ afima, eye wo dometɔ ɖeka lé nudzɔdzɔa ɖe mɔ̃ dzi. Video siwo MPR kple nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye North News da ɖe afima ɖee fia be kpovitɔ etɔ̃ bla Tincher ɖe anyigba eye wokplɔe yi ʋu si me wodea dzesii o me, eye wo katã wonɔ ɣli dom enuenu be woakpe ɖe ye ŋu. Videoawo meɖe "ʋunyaʋunyawɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le" fia o. Togbɔ be videoawo ƒe nyonyome mede o hã la, womeɖe dzesi aɖeke fia be wotrɔ asi le wo ŋu o. Snopes te ŋu kpɔ videoawo ƒe teƒe si woɖo ɖe North 21st kple North Oliver mɔdodowo ƒe dzogoe dzi, si nye mɔdodowo ƒe tsatsam ma ke si nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Tincher léle ŋu yɔ. Wokplɔ Tincher yi Whipple dukɔa ƒe xɔ si le St. Paul, afisi wògblɔ le be wobla yeƒe afɔwo gaƒoƒo geɖe. Srɔ̃aŋutsu Jim Tincher gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo be yezã ŋdi bliboa tsɔ nɔ agbagba dzem be yeanya afisi wolé ye srɔ̃ ɖo, eye yena Democratic U.S. Rep. Ilhan Omar gɔ̃ hã de eme. Le nya aɖe si Omar gblɔ le X ŋu me la, yɔ amelélea be enye "ŋusẽ ɖeɖefia dzikutɔe," eye wògblɔ be woɖe asi le Tincher ŋu ​​do ŋgɔ teti na ŋdɔ ga wuieve. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be: "Mele be ICE nalé United States dukɔmeviwo gbeɖe o le esi wowɔ woƒe gomenɔamesi si le dukplɔsea me be woalé ŋku ɖe sedziwɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔnawo ŋu ta." Wometsɔ nya ɖe Tincher ŋu ​​esi woɖe asi le eŋu o. North Minneapolis Rotary Club ƒe zimenɔla kpeɖeŋutɔ, le North News ƒe nya nu la, gblɔ be ameléle na ye "tsɔ eɖokui na wu" be yealé ŋku ɖe ICE ƒe nuwɔnawo ŋu. Tincher gblɔ na MPR be: "Ðeko metsi dzi ɖe míaƒe aƒelikawo, míaƒe aƒelika siwo le ŋutifafa me, be woakplɔ wo adzoe, kple dzimaɖitsitsi siwo me tom woƒe ƒomewo le ŋu ale gbegbe." "Ðeko nyemedi be esia nadzɔ le míaƒe dukɔa me o."

claim: Fefewɔla Christian Bale le aƒe 12 tum le kɔƒe aɖe si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 22 me le Palmdale, California, si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeana nɔvi siwo le vixɔnyinyi ƒe ɖoɖoa me nanɔ ɖeka.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le June 2025 me la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Batman fefewɔla Christian Bale nɔ aƒe 12 tum le kɔƒe aɖe si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 22 me le Palmdale, California, si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeana nɔviwo nanɔ vixɔnyinyi ƒe ɖoɖoa me ɖekae. Facebook ƒe nya xɔŋkɔ aɖe xlẽ be: "Christian Bale Le Vixɔnyiƒe 12 Tum Siwo Tae Nye Be Nɔviwo Nanɔ Vixɔnyinyi ƒe Ðoɖoa Me Ðekae Eye Woanɔ Xɔ Ðeka Te." Nya sia kaka ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe), afisi nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ la dometɔ aɖewoe nye ga si wogblɔ be woxɔ dɔlar miliɔn 22 ɖe ŋgɔyiyia ta. Snopes xlẽlawo hã di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakaka bubuwo tso nyaʋiʋlia ŋu. Nya si doa dzidzɔ na ame la nye nyateƒe. Bale kple Together California, si nye dɔmenyohabɔbɔ aɖe si fefewɔla la ɖo; srɔ̃a, Sibi, kple srɔ̃a; kple California Yunivɛsiti, Los Angeles, Ðɔkta Eric Esrailian, dze dɔa gɔme le ƒe 2024. Together California gblɔ be kɔƒe si te ɖe Palmdale ŋu la anye aƒe 12 kple nutoa me dɔwɔƒe. Dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo gblɔ be wobu akɔnta be dɔa axɔ dɔlar miliɔn 22 le ɣeyiɣi si me wodze anyigbaa gɔme. Together California ƒe Facebook axa (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be, xɔtutua gakpɔtɔ le edzi yim le June 2025. Le May 2025 me la, CBS ka nya ta be kɔƒea le mɔ kpɔm be yeaxɔ ye vi gbãtɔwo "le ƒe si gbɔna me." CBS ka nya ta hã be "dzila siwo xɔ hehe" akpɔ ɖevi siwo le kɔƒea me dzi. Le A. C. Martin, xɔtuɖaŋunyala siwo le dɔa wɔm ƒe nya nu la, Together California ƒe "Kɔƒe na Nɔviŋutsuwo kple Nɔvinyɔnuwo" anye dugã me xɔ 12 na ɖevi siwo le vixɔnyinyi me, studio xɔ eve na sɔhɛ tsitsi siwo le tɔtrɔm tso vixɔnyinyi ƒe ɖoɖoa me, nutoa me xɔ si ƒe lolome nye afɔ 7,000 sq kple gota teƒe. CBS gblɔ be Bale ƒo eɖokui ɖe U.S. vidzikpɔƒe ƒe ɖoɖoa me zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 2008 me, esi wòbu nusi adzɔ ɖe eya ŋutɔ vianyɔnu dzi ne wogblẽe ɖi edzilawo manɔmee ŋu vɔ megbe.

claim: Afghanistan dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla Amir Khan Muttaqi ɖe gbeƒã ɖoɖo si wowɔ be woatu Hindutɔwo ƒe gbedoxɔwo le Kabul kple Kandahar kple gakpekpeɖeŋu tso India gbɔ.
evidence: Afghanistan ƒe dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla, Amir Khan Muttaqi, yi India nyitsɔ laa eye wòwɔ kpekpe kple India ƒe Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔla S Jaishankar, eye le ema megbe la, video aɖe si wogblɔ be etso eƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpea me la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le video klipi si kaka ɖe amewo dome me la, wose Muttaqi gblɔ le Hindigbe me be, "Megblɔ na India ƒe Dukplɔlagã Narendra Modi be ne èkpe ɖe mía ŋu kple dɔlar ʋee aɖewo la, míatu Aƒetɔ Shiva kple Vishnu ƒe gbedoxɔwo le Kabul kple Kandahar. Emegbe mawusubɔla siwo tso India ateŋu awɔ mɔzɔzɔ yi Afghanistan. Míekɔ nyagbɔgblɔ si nye 'Jai Shri Ram' ɖe dzi le afisia. Míeda akpe na Modiji be etsi tre ɖe mía ŋu."  Esi wòda video ma ɖe Facebook dzi la, ezãla aɖe ŋlɔ bena, "Breaking: Afghanistan Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔla Mutaqqi ɖe gbeƒãe be Afghanistan lɔ̃ azɔ be yeaʋu trɔ̃subɔsubɔ ƒe gbedoxɔwo le Afghanistan me ɖe Indiatɔwo ƒe ga ta."  Kpeɖodzi Nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke meli si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo o: Nya vevi siwo wodi na "Afghan Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔla", "Shiva gbedoxɔ", "Vishnu gbedoxɔ", "Kabul", "Kandahar" mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso dziɖuɖumegã alo nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo me si ɖo kpe nya si kaka ɖe amewo dzi la dzi o.  ANI video gbãtɔ: ANI News ƒe dzesi dze le video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la me. Le ANI ƒe YouTube-habɔbɔ si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi la, video ma tɔgbe si woda ɖe October 12 lia dzi la ɖe Amir Khan Muttaqi fia wòle eƒe degbe me, ke menye Hindigbe me o. Gbegɔmeɖela aɖe ɖe eƒe nyawo gɔme ɖe Eŋlisigbe me.  Deepfake numekuku: Newschecker bia gbe Deepfakes Analysis Unit (DAU), si zã dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi dɔlékuiwo ƒe klipi la kpɔ. Woƒe nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo ɖe dijitaal masɔmasɔ geɖe fia: Subɔsubɔhakplɔla la ƒe aɖuwo buna eye wogadzena le aɖuwo dzi ake.    le xɔtunuwo ƒe akpa vovovowo. Mo ƒe tɔtɔ kple teƒe siwo le keklẽm le eƒe nu kple ŋgonu ɖee fia be AI ƒe asitɔtrɔ le eŋu.    ƒo xlã eƒe nu kple ŋgonu ɖee fia be AI ƒe asitɔtrɔ le eŋu. Nuyi ƒe sɔsɔ kple odio ƒe gbeɖiɖi mewɔ ɖeka kple eƒe nuƒoƒo ƒe ɖoɖo si le dzɔdzɔme nu o.  Dzesi siawo ɖo kpe edzi be AI ye wɔ clip la (deepfake) be woatsɔ akaka nyatakaka totrowo.  Nyametsotso Wokpɔe be wozã AI dɔwɔnuwo tsɔ trɔ asi le video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be Afghanistan dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla Amir Khan Muttaqi ɖe gbeƒã Hindutɔwo ƒe gbedoxɔwo tutu le Kabul kple Kandahar ŋu.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe Afghanistan dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla ɖe gbeƒã Hindutɔwo ƒe gbedoxɔwo tutu le Afghanistana?  Ao, meɖe gbeƒã nenema o. Video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye nya si wogblɔna le mɔ goglo aɖe nu.  Q2. Nukae nye video si nye deepfake?  Deepfake nye video si wowɔ to AI dzi si trɔa asi le nukpɔkpɔwo alo gbe ŋu be wòana ame aɖe nadze abe ɖe wòle nane gblɔm alo le nane si mewɔ kpɔ o ene.  Q3. Aleke wowɔ de dzesi aʋatso videoa?  Numekula siwo tso Deepfakes Analysis Unit kpɔ nukpɔkpɔ ƒe tɔtɔ — aɖu siwo bu, nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu si mesɔ o, kple dijitaal teƒewo — si ɖo kpe AI ƒe asitɔtrɔ dzi.  Q4. Ðe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖe si ŋu kakaɖedzi le ka nya ta tso nya sia ŋua?  India alo dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si ŋu woɖo kpee megblɔ nya ma tɔgbe tso Afghanistan dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla gbɔ o.  Q5. Nukatae wowɔ videoa?  Edze abe nusi ʋã woe nye nyatakaka totrowo kaka kple mawusubɔsubɔ ŋutinyawo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ to dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe nyatakaka siwo woto vɛ zazã me ene.  Dzɔtsoƒewo Video si ANI wɔ Analysis by DAU

claim: Donald Trump gblɔ be "Le ɣleti si va yi me la, mexɔ Big Pharma. Èsusu be ema le bɔbɔe? Mede asi sedede siwo aɖe wò atike siwo woŋlɔ na wò ƒe asi dzi akpɔtɔ ŋutɔ."
evidence: Dukplɔla la de asi Dɔdzikpɔha ƒe Sedede ene te ku ɖe atikewo ƒe asi ŋu si fia mɔ Lãmesẽ Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla (HHS) be wòaɖe afɔ geɖe atsɔ ana Amerika dɔnɔwo ƒe asi bɔbɔ ɖe atike siwo woŋlɔ na wo, siwo dome insulin kple epinephrine hã le, dzi, eye wòakpɔ egbɔ be Amerikatɔwo le asi bɔbɔetɔ kekeake si woate ŋui xɔm ɖe woƒe atikewo ta.

claim: Kenneth Petty, si nye rap-haƒola Nicki Minaj srɔ̃, nye gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le December 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, ƒuƒoƒo si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si léa blemakɔnuléleɖeasi me ɖe asi si nye Turning Point USA (TPUSA) wɔ eƒe ƒe sia ƒe takpekpe le Phoenix, Arizona. Le wɔnaa me la, TPSUA ƒe amegã Erika Kirk, si nye habɔbɔa ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila si wowu, Charlie Kirk, srɔ̃, kplɔ amedzro tɔxɛ aɖe va fefewɔƒea — rap-haƒola Nicki Minaj. Amewo ƒe dzedzeme si kaka ɖe amewo dome la he numedzodzro vevie vɛ le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abe X ene, eye eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea ƒe amedzro aɖewo ɖe alesi wòwɔ nuku na Minaj ƒe dzedze le dunyahehe ƒe wɔna aɖe si me woɖe mɔ ɖe nu ŋu le la gblɔ. Gake edze abe ɖeklemiɖela aɖewo mewɔ nuku o ene. Wogblɔ be Minaj srɔ̃ nye gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na eye zi geɖe la, wotsɔa nuwɔna mawo sɔna kple nutsotso siwo wotsɔ ɖe U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia be ewɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe agbegbegblẽnɔnɔ. Snopes ku nya si wogblɔ tso Minaj srɔ̃ ŋu me eye wòkpɔe be enye nyateƒe. People magazine gblɔ be Minaj do go Kenneth Petty si nye srɔ̃a fifia esime wo ame evea siaa nɔ LaGuardia Sekɛndrisuku dem le New York City. Wogblɔ be esi wodze ahiã ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe la, wo ame evea dome klã eye womegaɖo kadodo me ake o vaseɖe ƒe 2018. Woɖe wo nɔewo le October 2019 me eye wodzi vi ɖekae le ƒe si kplɔe ɖo me. Snopes lé ŋku ɖe dukɔa ƒe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe agbalẽ me be Petty ƒe ŋkɔ le eŋu hã. Míekpɔ emetsonuwo le California kple New York nutome siaa. New York ƒe agbalẽŋlɔƒe gblɔ be wobu fɔ Petty le nya si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu be ete ame gbɔ dɔdɔ sesẽe le dzidzenu gbãtɔ nu le April 1995 me ta. Ƒe 16 ye wòxɔ le nuvlowɔwɔa wɔɣi, eye ƒe si wòxɔ la sɔ kple esi wòxɔ. New York Times ƒe nyati aɖe si woŋlɔ le ƒe 2021 me gblɔ be amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii la gblɔ be Petty "dɔ ye gbɔ sesẽe esi wòkplɔ ye yi aƒe aɖe me le hɛ me vɔ megbe." Ŋutinya ma gblɔ nya si amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii la tsɔ ɖe Minaj kple Petty ŋu le se nu le esi wogblɔ be woɖe fu nɛ hedze agbagba be yewoado vɔvɔ̃ nɛ kple taɖodzinu be yewoagbe eƒe nutsotsoa tsitotsito ta. Le ƒe 2022 me la, BBC ka nya ta be wotso afia na Petty be wòanɔ aƒeme ƒe ɖeka le esi mena dziɖuɖumegãwo nya esime wòʋu yi California be yeanɔ Minaj gbɔ le ƒe 2019 me o ta, si nye nusi se bia tso esi elabena enye gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na. Esi Petty lɔ̃ ɖe edzi gbã be yemeɖi fɔ le ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe nya si wotsɔ ɖe ye ŋu le ƒe 2020 me o megbe la, etrɔ eƒe nyaa. People magazine gblɔ be Petty hã lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yewu ame le dzidzenu gbãtɔ nu le esi wòwu ŋutsu aɖe le ƒe 2002. Wogblɔ be wotso afia nɛ be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 10, eye mlɔeba enɔ gaxɔ me ƒe adre hafi woɖe asi le eŋu le ƒe 2013 me.

claim: Le gaƒoƒo etɔ̃ ƒe ɣeyiɣi si tso May 11 ƒe nuwuwu vaseɖe May 12, 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋlɔ nu ɖe ​​eƒe Truth Social nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zi 55 sɔŋ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le May 11, 2026 dzi la, ame geɖe de dzesii le Internet dzi be dɔwɔnawo dzi ɖe edzi le U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe Truth Social account dzi. Togbɔ be wonya Trump be edaa nya siwo doa dziku na ame ɖe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hã la, ewɔ nuku na hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le alesi wòŋlɔa nyawo zi gbɔ zi geɖe si dze egɔme tso 10:14 p.m. EDT eye wòyi edzi vaseɖe ŋdi kanya le May 12. Robert Reich, si nye Trump ƒe ɖeklemiɖela kple dɔwɔnyawo ŋuti agbalẽŋlɔla tsã le Dukplɔla Bill Clinton ƒe dziɖuɣi,ma Trump ƒe nya siwo wogblɔ be egblɔ be Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ŋuti nyatakaka didi aɖe, eye wògblɔ be Trump ta nya 55 le gaƒoƒo etɔ̃ me. Snopes xlẽlawo hã kpɔ míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoakpɔe ɖa be Trump ta nya gbogbo siawo hã. Reich gblɔ kpee be: Eƒe nya siwo wòŋlɔ dometɔ aɖewoe nye AI slop si me susu mele o, nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafia siwo metsɔ ɖeke le eme o ku ɖe ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia ŋu, kple nya ƒaƒã siwo wogblɔna be yeƒe dunyahefutɔwo wɔ alakpanuwɔwɔ. Menye be ame aɖeke hiã ŋkuɖodzinya o gake nuklia ƒe sewo le ŋutsu sia si. Trump ƒe lãme mesẽ o, eye wònye afɔku na mí katã. Trump yi ɖe nyatakakawo ɖoɖo ɖe amewo ƒe adzame tso abe ga 10:14 p.m. May 11 vaseɖe May 12 ƒe ŋdi ga 1:12, eyata míebu nya si wogblɔ be enye nyateƒe. Le ete la, míema nya siwo katã wòŋlɔ kpe ɖe woƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesiwo ŋu: Trump gaŋlɔ nya geɖewo le May 12 ƒe ŋdi ga 8 lɔƒo hafi wòɖe gbeƒãe be "yeyina China." Hepostedimages of U.S. drones kple yameʋu siwo tsɔa amewo le Irantɔwo ƒe tɔdziʋuwo kple yameʋuwo dzi dzem kple nyawo abe "Lasers: Bing, Bing, GONE!!!" Eda gagbalẽ si ƒe home nye dɔlar 100 ƒe nɔnɔmetata si dzi woŋlɔ mo ɖo hã ɖe edzi. Snopes hã ƒo nu tso aʋatso Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakaka siwo wogblɔ be Trump ye ŋlɔe, kpakple nyatakaka vavã siwo AI wɔ siwo wòma ŋu.

claim: Le ƒe 2025 me la, wotsɔ nya ɖe Chobani ŋu le ha aɖe me be phthalates, si nye atike siwo wogblɔ be edo ƒome kple lãmetsiŋusẽ ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie le yeƒe yogurtwo me.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, Chobani gblɔ le eƒe nyatakaka aɖe me be “ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖee fia be yeaɖe asi le nyaa ŋu le sedede aɖe nu” le August ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ aɖe me. Sedede sia tɔgbe menɔ dutoƒo le ɣeyiɣi si me wotae o. Le October 2025 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔ be Chobani le nya aɖe si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu le ha aɖe me si gblɔ be atike siwo woyɔna be phthalates siwo wogblɔ be edo ƒome kple lãmetsiŋusẽ ƒe tɔtɔ le eƒe yogurt "siwo katã le dzɔdzɔme nu" dometɔ aɖewo me. Le Facebook nyatakaka aɖe nu (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) la, nyadɔdrɔ̃a gblɔ be Chobani "ƒo eɖokui ɖe boblododo alakpatɔe me to ŋkɔ yɔyɔ na atike aɖewo be ‘dzɔdzɔmenuwo,’ me," togbɔ be dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le wo ɖokui si ɖe phthalates ƒomevi geɖe fia le eƒe Helatɔwo ƒe yogurt siwo me ami mele o kple notsi blibo si me womezãa ami le o me hã. Woka nya ta be phthalates do ƒome kple lãmesẽkuxiwo abe vidzidzi kple tsitsi ƒe nyawo ene, eye wobu wo dometɔ aɖewo be woate ŋu ahe amegbetɔ ƒe kansa vɛ, abe alesi nyatakakaa gblɔe ene. Nya mawo tɔgbe siwo wogblɔ tso Chobanitɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ aɖe ŋu kaka ɖe teƒe bubuwo le Facebook kple Instagram (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia, afisia kple afisia). Snopes xlẽla geɖe hã di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoaɖo kpe edzi be nya si wotsɔ ɖe ye ŋu le se nu la sɔ hã. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖee fia be California nɔla aɖe tsɔ nya ɖe amehawo ƒe nya ŋu be phthalates le Chobani yogurt me le April 2025. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Míete ŋu ɖo kpe nya siwo wogblɔ le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi keŋkeŋ le ɣeyiɣi si me wotae o. Womekpɔe be dɔwɔƒea ƒe agba le se nu ɖe ​​nu gbegblẽ aɖeke si wòwɔ ta o eye ɖoɖowɔha aɖeke meɖo kpe edzi be phthalates le eƒe adzɔnuwo me o. Chobani gblɔ le nya aɖe si wòɖo ɖe Snopes to e-mail dzi me be ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖee fia va yi be yeaɖe asi le nyaa ŋu le sedede si wowɔ le se nu me. Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ hã be dzɔdzɔmenu siwo wotsɔ wɔa yewoƒe adzɔnuwoe, si to vovo na nyatoƒoetoto si le habɔbɔa ƒe nyatoƒoetotoa me. Nya bliboa le ale: Chobani ʋu be yeagbe nya siwo nyadrɔ̃la Wysocki fɔ ɖe te la elabena womesɔ o. Le nyadɔdrɔ̃ aɖe si wowɔ le August me me la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖee fia be yeaɖe asi le nyaa ŋu le sedede aɖe nu. Abe alesi míelé eme ɖe asi ɣesiaɣi ene la, dzɔdzɔmenu siwo wotsɔ wɔa nuɖuɖui koe le míaƒe nutovɛwo me. Míele mɔ kpɔm vevie na ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nyametsotsoa. Wogblɔ be phthalates, si nye atike siwo wozãna le plastiknuwo me la do ƒome kple lãmetsiŋusẽ ƒe tɔtɔ, abe alesi nyadɔdrɔ̃a kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔe ene. Gake ne phthalates le Chobani yogurtwo me nyateƒe la, ɖewohĩ menye woawo ɖeɖe koe o. Consumer Reports gblɔ le ƒe 2024 me be atike sia dze le nuɖuɖu gbogbo siwo wodo kpɔ la dometɔ ɖesiaɖe kloe me, eye zi geɖe la, edzena le agbɔsɔsɔ gã me. Amy Wysocki, amesi tsɔ nya ɖe eŋu le nya si wodo ɖa be woatsɔ aʋli Chobani ŋu le ha me la gblɔ be yeƒle dɔwɔƒea ƒe Helatɔwo ƒe yogurt gbadza si me ami mele o le ƒe 2023 me esi yeɖo ŋu ɖe eƒe ŋkɔ si do boblo “dzɔdzɔmenuwo ɖeɖeko” ŋu vɔ megbe. Egblɔ be susu aɖeke menɔ ye si si ta yeaxɔe ase be ɖewohĩ phthalates ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si mele dedie o le yogurt la me o eye yekpɔ mɔ be “atike siwo me aɖi mele o siwo menye dzɔdzɔmenuwo o” manɔ eme o. Senya la gblɔ be Wysocki maƒle atike la o, alo maƒlee le nya mawo ke nu o, ne ɖe wònya nyateƒea. Le nyatoƒoetoto si wotsɔ yi April 16, 2025 dzi nu la, wogblɔ be dodokpɔ si numekukuhabɔbɔ si le eɖokui si si nye PlasticList wɔ la kpɔ plastic-tike gbogbo aɖewo, siwo dome phthalates ƒomevi ene hã le, le Chobani yogurt-nuwɔnuwo me. Nyadɔdrɔ̃a gblɔ be anɔ eme be atike siawo do tso yogurt-awo ƒe plastik-gowo me. Nyatoƒoetotoa gblɔ be Chobani nya nu tso ɖiƒoƒo si wogblɔ be edzɔ ŋu alo mete ŋu xe mɔ ɖe enu o. Abe alesi míegblɔe le etame ene la, Chobani gbe Wysocki ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ be "womedze o" eye wòyi edzi gblɔ be "dzɔdzɔmenuwo koe le yeƒe nutovɛwo me." Phthalates nye atike siwo wotsɔ dea plastic-nuwo me be woafa eye woate ŋu atrɔ ɖe nɔnɔmewo ŋu. U.S. Nuɖuɖu Kple Atike Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe (FDA) gblɔ be le ŋutinya me la, wozãa phthalate ƒomevi aɖewo le nuɖuɖu bablawo kple nu bubuwo me. Fifia FDA ɖe mɔ be woazã phthalates enyi le nusiwo doa ka kple nuɖuɖu me, togbɔ be womate ŋu atsɔ wo akpe ɖe nuɖuɖu ŋu tẽ o hã. Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be yewoyi edzi le atike siawo ƒe dedienɔnɔ me tom esi numekuku yeyewo le dodom. Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodziwo ɖee fia be phthalates ate ŋu agblẽ ŋutilã ƒe lãmetsiŋusẽ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ me. Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le ƒe 2021 me ƒo nya ta be phthalates zazã enuenu ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ ɖe lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ kple ŋutinu geɖe ƒe dɔwɔwɔ dzi. Endocrine Society hã de dzesii le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe be phthalates ate ŋu aɖe testosterone kple estrogen ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi akpɔtɔ, ado kplamatse thyroid hormone ƒe dɔwɔwɔ eye wòawɔ dɔ abe “vidzidzi ƒe aɖinuwo.” Numekuku aɖewo hã ɖee fia be kadodo ƒe tsatsadada

claim: “Amesiame ate ŋu axɔ” COVID-19 ƒe atike.
evidence: Esi U.S. Lãmesẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔla Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ɖi ɖase le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔkɔmiti ŋkume le Sept. 4 dzi la, sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ geɖewo ɖe ɖeklemie be eɖo seɖoƒe na COVID-19 ƒe atikewɔmɔnu esi wòdo ŋugbe le November me be "maxɔ ame aɖeke ƒe atikewo le esi o." "Èdo dzesi gã aɖe ɖe dzi si gblɔ be alakpa dam nèle esi nègblɔ nya ma?" Sen. Elizabeth Warren, D-Mass., bia Kennedy be. Le Aug. 27 dzi la, U.S. Food and Drug Administration trɔ asi le eƒe COVID-19 ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe mɔfiame yeye ŋu, eye wòɖo seɖoƒe na ame ƒe ƒuƒoƒo siwo dzi woda asi ɖo be woaxɔ atike yeyea na amesiame si xɔ ƒe 65 kple edzivɔ kple ame sia ame si xɔ ɣleti 6 kple edzivɔ si ƒe lãmesẽkuxi ɖeka ya teti si le ete si dzia woƒe COVID-19 dɔlékui sesẽ ƒe afɔku ɖe edzi. Kennedy ƒoe ɖe megbe be, "Amesiame ateŋu axɔ booster la," egblɔ, emegbe egblɔ kpee be "it’s not recommended for healthy people." Warren gblɔ be, "Ne mèkafui o la, ekema ema me tsonu le nuto geɖe me enye be màte ŋu azɔ ayi atikedzraƒe aɖe axɔ ɖeka o. Efia be mehiã be nugblẽfexehawo naxe ga si nye dɔlar 200 alo esi wu nenema o." Warren kple Kennedy yi edzi nɔ nu ƒom tso wo nɔewo ŋu nɔ nya hem le atikewɔmɔnua ƒe anyinɔnɔ ŋu. Kennedy gblɔ be: "Enɔ te ɖe dukɔwo dzi." "Gake woateŋu axɔe kokoko. Ame sia ame ateŋu axɔe. Ame sia ame ateŋu axɔe, sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ." Esi wobia kpeɖodziwo la, Lãmesẽ Kple Amegbetɔ ƒe Dɔwɔƒea fia asi Aug. 27 X ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si Kennedy ŋlɔ si gblɔ be, "Atike siawo li na dɔnɔ siwo katã tia wo le woƒe ɖɔktawo ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖo xɔxɔ vɔ megbe." Kennedy ƒe nya si wògblɔ na sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo la flua ame eye wòdo ŋgɔ na ɣeyiɣi si woɖo nɛ. Le mɔfiame si li fifia nu la, ame siwo le lãmesẽ me siwo mexɔ ƒe 65 haɖe o ate ŋu ahiã ɖɔkta ƒe atikewɔmɔnu hafi woate ŋu ado atikea. Ne woxɔ atike si woŋlɔ na wo dzidzedzetɔe la, ɖewohĩ ahiã be woaxe fe tso kotoku me. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, ne atikewɔmɔnua li le atikedzraƒewo eye nugblẽfexeɖoɖoa xea fe ɖe eta la nɔ te ɖe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si meɖo aɖaŋu aɖeke vaseɖe fifia o dzi koŋ. Nusi nye nɔnɔme si nɔ anyi ƒe geɖe — be Amerikatɔ akpa gãtɔ, eɖanye ƒe ka kee woɖaxɔ o, ate ŋu awɔ ɖoɖo bɔbɔe le woƒe nutoa me atikedzraƒe hena atikewɔmɔnua le ga sue aɖe ko alo esi womexɔ tso kotoku me o — meganye kakaɖedzi le ƒe 2025-26 ƒe ɣeyiɣia me o. Menye FDA ƒe mɔɖeɖe koe nye afɔɖeɖe si woatsɔ ana atikewɔmɔnuwo nasu amewo si o. Aɖaŋuɖoha si Kpɔa Dɔlékuiwutikewo ƒe Dɔwɔnawo Gbɔ, si nye eŋutinunyala siwo le wo ɖokui si ƒe ha aɖe si fiaa mɔ atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ɖoɖowo, meda asi ɖe mɔfiame siwo li fifia dzi alo ɖee ɖe go o. Zi geɖe la, Dɔlélenutsitsi Kple Mɔxexe Ðe Enu Dɔwɔƒe kafua atikewɔmɔnu siwo wotu ɖe habɔbɔa ƒe mɔfiame dzi. Eye mɔfiame ma kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo kple atikewɔmɔnu ƒe amesinɔnɔ dzi. Dukɔa ƒe se bia be lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo akpa gãtɔ naxe atike siwo CDC kafu la bliboe. Dukɔ aɖewo hã bia be woaɖo aɖaŋu siawo hafi woaɖe mɔ be woana atikewɔmɔnu siwo womeƒlena le atikedzraƒewo o. Le June 9 lia dzi la, Kennedy ɖe CDC ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ŋuti aɖaŋuɖoha me tɔ 17 la katã le dɔ me eye wòtsɔ ame yeyewo ɖɔ li wo dometɔ aɖewo, amesiwo dometɔ geɖe ɖe woƒe susuwo gblɔ le atikewɔmɔnu ŋu. Woɖe CDC ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Susan Monarez le dɔ me le Aug. 27 dzi le nusi Monarez ɖɔ be enye nyaʋiʋli le atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu ta. CDC ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gblɔ be woɖoe be aɖaŋuɖoha la nakpe le Sept. 18 vaseɖe 19. Ele be amesiwo le ƒuƒoƒo siwo dzi FDA da asi ɖo me nate ŋu awɔ ɖoɖo ɖe atikewɔmɔnu ŋu ne lãmesẽdɔwɔla siwo ŋu woɖe mɔ ɖo xɔe ko, anɔ eme be le kwasiɖa ʋɛ siwo gbɔna me. Ne èle ƒuƒoƒo siawo siwo dzi woda asi ɖo me hã la, afisi nàte ŋu axɔ COVID-19 ƒe atike le la to vovo le dukɔ ɖesiaɖe me. Le se nu la, atikedzraƒe siwo le nuto aɖewo me mateŋu ana atike sia o alo ɖɔkta ƒe atikewɔmɔnu koe woatsɔe ana vaseɖe esime CDC ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ŋuti aɖaŋuɖoha naɖo eƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖowo. Ema fia be togbɔ be FDA ɖe eƒe mɔɖeɖe ɖe ƒuƒoƒo aɖewo ŋu hã la, le nuto 18 kple Washington D.C. me la, "atikewɔlawo mateŋu adoe o elabena mele CDC ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ɖoɖowɔɖi me haɖe o," Brigid Groves, Amerika Atikewɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si kpɔa dɔnyala ƒe nyawo gbɔ gblɔ na PolitiFact va yi. Tso Sept. 4 dzi la, ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe dɔwɔɖoɖo siwo wowɔ na Walgreens kple CVS na nyanya dɔnɔwo le teƒe aɖewo be yewomateŋu awɔ ɖoɖo ɖe COVID-19 ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ɣeyiɣi ɖoɖo ŋu o le dukɔa ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔléle nu, nudzraɖoƒe alo atikewɔmɔnu ƒe hiahiã ta. Womexe mɔ na ame siwo mele FDA ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si dzi woda asi ɖo me o be woagaxɔ COVID-19 ƒe atike o, le eɖokui si. Gake anɔ eme be atikewɔmɔnua xɔxɔ abia be woato mɔxenu aɖewo dzi. Ðɔktawo ateŋu aŋlɔ COVID-19 ƒe atike na ame siwo dze le FDA ƒe hatsotsowo godo le se nu. Ema nye nyateƒe na ame tsitsiwo kple ɖeviwo — kple atikewo kple atikewɔmɔnuwo ŋɔŋlɔ na "off-label" u ƒe nuwɔna

claim: Motsyɔnu nana be ya si mebɔ o.
evidence: Gake kpeɖodzi aɖewo li be N-95 ƒe ametakpɔnu zazã ɣeyiɣi didi na dɔnɔ siwo ŋu aɖuɖɔtoedɔléle le do ŋgɔ ate ŋu ana ya si woyɔna be carbon dioxide nadzi ɖe edzi vie le ŋutilãa me. Ele be amesiwo ŋu lãkusi me kuxiwo nɔ do ŋgɔ la nadzro ametakpɔnu dodo ƒe dzimaɖitsitsiwo me kple woƒe lãmesẽdɔwɔlawo.

claim: Facebook xe mɔ ɖe nugbeɖoɖo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, Radio Quebec, si Alexis Cossette-Trudel wɔna la me.
evidence: QAnon nye nugbeɖoɖo gã aɖe si me susu mele o eye kpeɖodzi mele eŋu o si gblɔ be asrafowo tia Donald Trump dukplɔlae be wòaɖe dukɔa tso ɖevigbɔdɔlawo ƒe asigɛ aɖe si me. Aʋatsokaka si ƒo xlãe la na amewo de afɔku ŋutɔŋutɔ me nyitsɔ laa. Togbɔ be xɔsetɔ aɖewo ɖe wo ɖokui fia le xexeame ŋutɔŋutɔ hã la, le akpa gãtɔ me la, nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafia si ŋu gɔmeɖoanyi mele o la dzidelawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ nɔ internet ƒe dzogoe siwo dzi dzoxɔxɔ le. Eye emegbe, le Kuɖagbe zã sia me la, edze egɔme ɖe nu veviwo me. Ame aɖe li si lé dzesi aɖe si ku ɖe nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafiaa ŋu ɖe dzi, le Trump ƒe ŋkume kɔte nu, le dukɔa ƒe kabletelevision dzi.

claim: Jackie Mitchell, si nye nyɔnuvi ƒe 17 vi aɖe, ƒo baseball-ƒoƒo ŋuti xotutu siwo nye Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig ɖe wo nɔewo yome le ƒe 1931 ƒe fefe aɖe si Chattanooga Lookouts kple New York Yankees dome.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Box ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo ƒo nu tso fefea ŋu me ŋlɔ Mitchell ƒe strikeouts ɖi. Ame aɖewo ʋli nya be wowɔ strikeouts la, gake nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke meli si fia be Ruth alo Gehrig dometɔ aɖeke gblɔ kpɔ be yewoɖoe koŋ to Mitchell ƒe bɔlƒoƒewo o. Le nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe Internet dzi ƒe geɖe nu la, nyɔnuvi ƒewuivi aɖe ƒo baseball-ƒoƒo ŋuti xotutu siwo nye Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig ɖe wo nɔewo yome ɣeaɖeɣi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Nyatakakaa xlẽ bliboe be: Eƒo Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig—eye emegbe baseball ƒoe. Le ƒe 1931 ƒe ŋkeke sia dzi la, Jackie Mitchell si xɔ ƒe 17 la tsi tre ɖe pitcher ƒe togbɛ dzi na Chattanooga Lookouts eye wòwɔ ŋutinya. Le fefe aɖe si me woɖea aɖuwo fiana le me la, eda bɔlƒoƒe etɔ̃ siwo wɔ nuku na xexeame—baseball ƒola gãtɔ eve, Babe Ruth kple Lou Gehrig, trɔ yi dugout la gbɔ henɔ ta ʋuʋum. Ƒewuivi aɖe. Nyɔnuvi aɖe. Eye wodzi xotutu aɖe. Menye dzɔgbenyui koe Jackie kpɔ o— Hall of Famer Dazzy Vance, si nye eƒe aƒelika esime wònɔ tsitsim, si fia eƒe asidede agbalẽ te ƒe gbeɖiɖi si wòtsɔna ƒua gbe lae na hehee. Ede asi pro baseball ƒe nubabla gbãtɔ siwo wotsɔ na nyɔnu kpɔ la dometɔ ɖeka te eye wòɖo kpe edzi be yenye ye tɔ le bɔlƒoƒea. Gake ŋkeke aɖewo le eƒe ŋgɔdonya si womaŋlɔ be akpɔ o megbe la, baseball ƒe kɔmiunisttɔa te fli ɖe eƒe kontraktɔ me, eye wòyɔ kamedefefea be "esesẽna akpa" na nyɔnuwo. Ke hã, Jackie megbugbɔ ɖe megbe o. Eyi edzi nɔ fefem, nɔ nudzraɖoƒewo nɔ ʋuʋum le dukɔa me godoo, eye wònɔ ŋku lém ɖe ameha siwo va be yewoakpɔ nyɔnuvi si ƒo nɔnɔmetata eve la ŋu. Kaka wòaxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le ƒe 1937 me la, etrɔ fefea xoxo.Menye baseball ɖeɖeko ŋue Jackie Mitchell ƒe ŋutinya ku ɖo o—eku ɖe dzinɔameƒo si le asiwò be nàtsɔ aƒu gbe sesĩe ne xexeame gblɔ na wò be nànɔ anyi ŋu. Do ŋgɔ na nya ma si woŋlɔ la, Mitchell ƒe ŋutinya dze le Instagram (wodzrae ɖo) le October 2025 me, le TikTok (wodzrae ɖo) le November 2025 me, le X (wodzrae ɖo) le December 2025 me kple le Facebook (wodzrae ɖo) le January 2026. Ŋutinya la ƒe akpa vovovoawo tsɔ nyatakaka aɖewo kpe ɖe esi le nyati si le etame la ŋu, eye wo dometɔ ɖekae nye be Mitchell tsɔ nya ɖe New York Yankees ŋu le April 2, 2026 dzi. 1931 me, eye be etsɔ bɔlƒoƒe ene ƒo Ruth eye wòƒo etɔ̃ pɛ ko na Gehrig. Mitchell ƒe ŋutinyaa dzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ, abe alesi woate ŋu aɖo kpe edzi le aɖaka me xexlẽdzesi siwo wota ɖe The New York Times kple Chattanooga Daily Times me le fefea ƒe ŋkeke si kplɔe ɖo dzi ene. Video siwo me woɖe Ruth ƒe at-bat ɖe eŋu hã gakpɔtɔ li. Esia wɔe be míebu nya si wogblɔ be enye nyateƒe. Ame aɖewo ʋli nya be wowɔ strikeouts la eye be Ruth kple Gehrig menɔ agbagba dzem ŋutɔŋutɔ be yewoaxɔ hit ɖe Mitchell ŋu o. Esi Mitchell, Ruth kple Gehrig megale agbe o ta la, manya wɔ be woaɖo kpe woƒe tameɖoɖowo dzi le wo ɖokui si le fefea wɔɣi o. Ne míegblɔe alea la, ame aɖeke si kpɔ gome le Yankees alo Lookouts me ɣemaɣi megblɔ kpɔ be wowɔ strikeouts la le fefewɔƒe o. Togbɔ be nyatakakatsoƒewo lɔ̃ ɖe ŋutinya sia ƒe nyateƒenya veviwo dzi hã la, woto vovo vie le nusiwo dzɔ do ŋgɔ teti na fefea kple emegbe ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu. Esia ƒe akpa aɖe ya teti tso esime nyatakaka siwo wogblɔna tso fefea me nudzɔdzɔwo ŋu ɣemaɣi to vovo tso nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo me yi bubu gbɔ le dukɔa me godoo. Nyati aɖe si dze le MLB.com gblɔ be le March 28, 1931 dzi la, Joe Engle, si nye Chattanooga Lookouts baseball-ha si le bɔlƒoha suewo me tɔ, de asi Jackie Mitchell si xɔ ƒe 17 te be wòaƒo fefe aɖe si woaɖe afia le April 1, 1931 dzi kple New York Yankees. Yame ƒe nɔnɔme gbegblẽ na fefea he gamea ɖe megbe va ɖo April 2. Yankees lɔ̃ be yewoaƒo Lookouts esime wonɔ mɔ dzi trɔ yina New York tso hehexɔxɔ le kele me le Florida, si fia be nusita fefea ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ nye nusi sɔ ko. Nyatakakatsoƒe aɖewo, abe Dukɔa ƒe Nyɔnuwo ƒe Ŋutinya Blemanudzraɖoƒe ene, gblɔ be wode asi Mitchell te le March 25 lia dzi, abe kwasiɖa ɖeka ene do ŋgɔ na eƒe fefe kple Yankees. Togbɔ be MLB.com gblɔ be tsidzadza tae wohe fefea ɖe megbe hã la, Amerikatɔwo ƒe Baseball Ŋuti Numekuku Habɔbɔ gblɔ be vuvɔ tae wohe fefea ɖe megbe. Lookouts tɔwo dze pitcher Clyde Barfoot gɔme gbemagbe, eye woɖee le fefea me le ƒoƒo eve gbãtɔwo megbe elabena eɖe mɔ ɖe eve kple duƒuƒu ɖeka ŋu, abe alesi Amerika Baseball Numekuku Habɔbɔ gblɔe ene. Ɣemaɣie Mitchell ge ɖe fefea me — le ɣeyiɣi nyuitɔ dzi tututu be wòaƒo nu kple Ruth kple Gehrig ƒe ɣletivimefakala eve, amesiwo nyati aɖe le Smithsonian Magazine me ɖee fia be wonye fli aɖe si woyɔna be "Murderer's Row" ƒe dzi. Mitchell dze Ruth ƒe at-bat gɔme to bɔl dada me. Na

claim: Papa Leo XIV tsɔ Vatikan ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe bubu gãtɔ kekeake Iran ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔla Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari le May 2026 me.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari xɔ Pius ƒe Ðoɖo, si nye Vatikan ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe vovototo gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka, le May 12, 2026. Papa Leo XIV — Vatikan ƒe dukɔa ƒe tatɔ — ŋutɔ menɔ wɔnaa teƒe o ke boŋ etsɔ sededea na to eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Bisiɔpgã Paolo Rudelli dzi. Le May 2026 me la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo) kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Papa Leo XIV tsɔ Vatikan ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe bubu gãtɔ kekeake Iran ƒe Dutanyanyuigblɔla Mohammad Hossein Mokhtari. X zãla ɖeka si ma nya sia ŋlɔ bena: YEYE:🇮🇷🇻🇦Papa Leo XIV tsɔ Vatikan ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe bubu gãtɔ kekeake, si nye ‘Pius ƒe Sedede’ na Iran ƒe dudɔnunɔla si le Vatikan, Ayatollah Hossein Mokhtari, si nye ‘Pius ƒe Sedede’ Wotsɔ medalẽa na ɖe Iran ƒe akpa tɔxɛ siwo wòwɔ le ŋutifafa kple xɔsehawo dome nuwɔwɔ aduadu le Kristotɔwo kple Moslemtɔwo. Nya sia kaka ɖe Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Threads (nudzraɖoƒe) hã dzi. Snopes nuxlẽlawo hã do ka kpli mí be yewoabia nu tso bubu si wogblɔ be wona ŋu. Nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye nyateƒe. Mokhtari, si nye Iran ƒe amedɔdɔ le Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la, xɔ Pius ƒe Ðoɖo, si nye sedede si Papa Pius IX ɖo anyi eye papa la nae, le May 12 dzi nyateƒe. Vatican News ka nya ta be dutadɔnunɔla 13 siwo wu ƒe eve ya teti ƒe subɔsubɔ na Fiazikpui Kɔkɔe la nu xɔ sededea le May 12. Mokhtari nye Iran ƒe amedɔdɔ le Vatican tso December 2023 me eye woate ŋu akpɔe wòanɔ evelia tso miame le foto aɖe si Vatican News ta me. Togbɔ be Iran nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo ma nyadzɔdzɔa kpe ɖe Mokhtari kple Papa Leo XIV ƒe fotowo ŋu hã la, Vatikan ƒe foto siwo woɖe tso wɔnaa me meɖee fia be Leo nɔ wɔnaa teƒe o. Ke boŋ Leo to Bisiɔpgã Paolo Rudelli dzi na sededea to Bisiɔpgã Paolo Rudelli dzi, amesi Vatikan ƒe fotowo ɖee fia be etsɔ eƒe sededea na Mokhtari.(Leo tia Rudelli be wòanye ame si axɔ ɖe nya gãwo teƒe le Dukɔa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔƒea, si wobu be enye dɔwɔlawo ƒe amegã aɖe teti.) Snopes te ɖe Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ŋu be wòabia tso esi be wòaɖo kpe ɖaseɖigbalẽ aɖe si kaka le nyadzɔdzɔwo me tso eŋu la ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi Mokhtari ƒe sedede eye nàlala ŋuɖoɖo. Iran nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo ma nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Mokhtari ƒe sededea ŋu kpe ɖe Mokhtari kple Leo ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wosusu be wonye aʋatso alo esiwo do xoxo ŋu. Edze abe nunya wɔwɔe ye wɔ nɔnɔmetata siawo dometɔ ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), si dze abe ɖe Mokhtari kple Leo le asi kpem le Paul VI Nyaselawo ƒe Xɔ si me Papa la léa dutoƒo nyaselawo le heƒoa nuƒo le ene. Edze abe asi eve siwo ƒe amadede to vovo le ame aɖe si lé asitelefon ɖe asi si le tsitre ɖe Mokhtari megbe tẽ ene eye woƒe asibidɛ atɔ̃lia to woƒe ɖusibɔ ŋu. Edze abe abɔta alo asibidɛawo dome mamã mele Mokhtari ƒe asi si Leo lé ɖe asi o ene. Asi siwo womeɖe nyuie o nye dzesi si wonya nyuie be wozãa AI le fotowo me. (IRNA, si wokpɔ to Facebook dzi, Snopes ye wɔ eƒe nɔnɔmetata) IRNA Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe, si nye Iran ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖo, ma Mokhtari kple Leo ƒe nɔnɔmetata si wosusu be AI wɔ la kpe ɖe Mokthari ƒe Order of Pius ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ŋu. Nɔnɔmetata bubu si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le May 2026 me hã ɖe Mokhtari kple Leo fia wonɔ asi kpem. IRNA ka nya ta va yi (wodzrae ɖo) be nɔnɔmetata la ɖe Mokthari kple Leo fia le wɔna aɖe si wowɔ na amedɔdɔ siwo ŋu woda asi ɖo le Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la me le May 17, 2025. Nɔnɔmetata ma ate ŋu anye nyateƒe, elabena foto aɖe si tso fotodɔwɔƒe si dzi woka ɖo si nye Getty Images gbɔ ɖee fia be Mokhtari nɔ wɔnaa teƒe le ŋkeke ma dzi (evelia tso miame le fli atɔ̃lia me le megbe). Fotoa meɖe Mokhtari kple Leo fia le May 2026. Le nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si ku ɖe sɔdolanyenye le Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔea me ŋu si Italy dukplɔla ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Nubablawo Gbɔ ta nu la, Pius IX ɖo Pius ƒe Habɔbɔ le ƒe 1847. Le gɔmedzedzea me la, ha la ɖo sɔdolawo ƒe kɔledzi aɖe si wɔ ɖe Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la ƒe sededewo dzi (Axa 15). Sededea na bubume si woate ŋu ana to dzidzimewo me alo esi woatsɔ ana ame ɖeka ko, le ɖoɖo ƒe hatsotso si me wole nu la na amesi xɔe. Esi Fiaɖuƒe Kɔkɔe la te fli ɖe bubumewo ƒe dzesideŋkɔwo me le ƒe 1939 me ta la, dzesiwo koe woxɔna na amesiwo xɔ Pius ƒe Ðoɖoa. Emegbe Papa Pius XII tsɔ hatsotso aɖe kpe ɖe ɖoɖoa ŋu. Fifia la, Pius ƒe Ha la ƒe hatsotso ene li. Le nɔnɔmetata siwo le Department of Protocol ƒe nuŋlɔɖi me (Axa 18) kple Mokhtari ƒe dzesiwo ƒe foto nu la, Iran dudɔnunɔla la va zu Knight of the Grand Cross of the Order of Pius le May 12, 2026 dzi, si nye hatsotso evelia si kɔ wu le ɖoɖoa me. Kpuie ko la, togbɔ be Mokhtari ya xɔe hã

claim: Le nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe gaggle aɖe me le Yamesrafowo ƒe Ðeka me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be "Zi ɖoɖoe, haƒoƒo!" na nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe si bia nya tso Jeffrey Epstein ƒe faɛlwo ƒe dodo ŋu.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le November 2025 me la, U.S. Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnawo Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ ɖe nuŋlɔɖi siwo wu 20,000 siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si wobu fɔe ŋu ɖe go, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye e-mail siwo woɖo ɖe eƒe akɔnta kple esiwo tso eƒe akɔnta gbɔ tsɔ ƒo nu tso Dukplɔla Donald Trump, amesi nɔ ƒomedodo me ƒe geɖe kple gadzikpɔla si megali o ŋu. Esi ame geɖe nɔ lalam be Aƒea nada akɔ ɖe se aɖe si azi Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea dzi be wòaɖe nusi woyɔna be Epstein ƒe agbalẽwo ɖe go la, wosusu nu tso nusi Epstein nya tso Trump ŋu. Videowo kaka ɖe internet dzi gblɔ be Trump tsɔ nya ɖe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe ŋu esi wòbia nya tso faɛlawo ƒe dodo ŋu, hegblɔ be "Kpɔɖeŋu, piggy!" Video siwo le etame la nye nyateƒe eye woɖee fia be Trump yɔ nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe be "piggy." Snopes to videoa me zi geɖe eye wòlé ŋku ɖe ame siwo kpɔ nudzɔdzɔa teƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ŋu. Esi míele alea ta la, míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe. White House ƒe amegã aɖe gbe na Snopes be Trump gblɔ nya mawo o. Dziɖuɖumegã la gblɔ be: "Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla sia wɔ nu le mɔ si mesɔ o kple esi mesɔ o nu ɖe ​​eƒe dɔwɔhati siwo nɔ yameʋua me ŋu. Ne èdi be yeanae la, ele be nàte ŋu axɔe." Dziɖuɖumegã la metsɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke na be nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla la wɔ nu si mesɔ o. Video bliboa le White House YouTube ƒe axa dzi eye wòɖe kadodo aɖe si dzɔ le Nov. 14, 2025 dzi fia (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): NYATAKAKA GBÃTƆ: Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla, nukae Jeffrey Epstein di be yeagblɔ le eƒe e-mailwo me esi wògblɔ be yenya nu tso nyɔnuviawo ŋu? TRUMP: Nyemenya naneke tso ema ŋu o. Anye ne woɖe gbeƒãe ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia. Enye nusi wòdi ŋutɔŋutɔ esime wòzã ɣeyiɣiawo katã kple Bill Clinton, kple Harvard ƒe dukplɔla, amesi, mienya amesi nye ema. Summers, Larry Summers, ŋkɔ ka kee wòɖanye o. Eye ame bubu siwo katã wòzã ɣeyiɣi kplii la hã. Mía kple Jeffrey Epstein dome gblẽ ŋutɔ ƒe geɖe. Gake ekpɔ ŋusẽ hã elabena nyee nye dukplɔla. Eyata eŋlɔ nuŋlɔɖi eve aɖewo na eɖokui. Na ɖiɖiɖeme nam. Miele nusi wònya le bubudede Bill Clinton ŋu me, le bubudede Harvard ƒe tatɔ ŋu me, le bubudede ame mawo katã siwo wònya ŋu, siwo dome JP Morgan Chase hã le, ŋu. Ẽ, Johnny, yi ŋgɔ. [Crosstalk] NYATAKAKA EVELIA: Aƒetɔ, ne naneke mele fɔbubua me le faɛlawo me o la, nukatae màwɔe o [inaudible]. TRUMP [fia asi]: Ðoɖoezizi, ɖoɖoezizi, haƒoƒo! Emegbe Trump ɖo nyabiase aɖe si ku ɖe Venezuela ŋu la ŋu. CBS News nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Jennifer Jacob ma nuŋlɔɖi siwo tso nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe gaggle me le Air Force One on X dzi, eye wògblɔ be biabia la tso Bloomberg nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe gbɔ: "'Zi ɖoɖoezizi, ɖoɖoezizi, haƒoƒo,' egblɔ na Bloomberg nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe si bia nusitae, ne naneke mele fɔbubua me le agbalẽawo me o la, ele nu wɔm abe alesi wòle ene." The Guardian ka nya ta be Bloomberg nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla si ŋu nya ku ɖoe nye Catherine Lucey. Míedo asi ɖe Lucey gbɔ be wòagblɔ eƒe susu tso Trump ƒe nya sia ŋu eye míawɔ nyatakaka sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo. Trump ƒo nu tso eƒe nya aɖewo ŋu le Yamesrafowo ƒe Ðeka ŋu le Nov. 16 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me le Nyateƒe Hadome (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Abe alesi megblɔe le Dzoɖa zã me le Yameʋuɖoɖo Gbãtɔ me yi Aʋatso Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo gbɔ ene la, ele be Aƒeme Republicantɔwo nada akɔ be woaɖe asi le Epstein ƒe faɛlwo ŋu, elabena naneke mele mía si míaɣla o, eye ɣeyiɣia de be míayi ŋgɔ tso Democrat Hoax sia si Radical Left Lunatics wɔ be míate ŋu adzo le Great Success of the Republican Party, . si me míaƒe Aʋadziɖuɖu si míeɖu nyitsɔ laa le Democrat "Shutdown" dzi hã le. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea trɔ axa akpe ewo na Dukɔa xoxo le "Epstein," wole ŋku lém ɖe Democrat dɔwɔla vovovowo (Bill Clinton, Reid Hoffman, Larry Summers, kple bubuawo) kple woƒe ƒomedodo kple Epstein ŋu, eye Aƒea Dzikpɔkɔmiti ateŋu akpɔ nusianu si wodze le se nu, I DON'T CARE! Míeƒo nu tso nya gbogbo aɖewo siwo wogblɔ tso Trump kple Epstein dome ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye e-mail aɖe si me Epstein yɔ Trump be "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be Trump zã gaƒoƒo geɖe kple ame aɖe si wotsɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa le Epstein ƒe aƒeme.

claim: "Ga ƒe asixɔxɔ, si nɔ 9.6% le ƒe 2022 me la, ɖiɖi vivivi va ɖo 4.6% va ɖo ɣleti si va yi me."
evidence: Ruto gblɔ nyateƒe le ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe ɖiɖi kple nufiala akpe ewo xɔxɔ ŋu. Eƒe nya sɔ akpa gãtɔ hã le sukudede ƒe gazazã ƒe dzidziɖedzi ŋu. Gake eƒe nya si wògblɔ be Kenya nɔ sɔsɔm "le mɔ ɖesiaɖe kloe si woate ŋu adzidze nu" kple Singapore, Malaysia kple Asia dukɔ bubuwo le ƒe 1963 me esime Kenya xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ la melé ɖe te o. Dukplɔla la ƒe akɔntabubu siwo ku ɖe bli ƒe agbledede, sukli ƒe agbledenyigba, sukli wɔwɔ kple nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ, kpakple tii si wokpɔna ŋu hã mesɔ o. Kenya dukplɔla William Ruto , le nyaƒoɖeamenu si le dzidzim ɖe edzi te be wòawɔ ɖe eƒe ŋugbedodo siwo wòdo do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔɣia dzi , va sewɔtakpekpea ŋkume le 20 November 2025 dzi be yeaƒo eƒe dukɔa ƒe nuƒo etɔ̃lia tso esime wòxɔ zi dzi le September 2022. "Ƒe eve enye sia, esi meƒo nye dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe nuƒo gbãtɔ la, ŋutega aɖe nɔ asinye madzra. Egbea, ŋutinya aɖe le asinye magblɔ," Ruto dze egɔme , hegblɔ kpee be wotu ŋutinya sia ɖe nyateƒenya siwo nye be nɔ "siwo li na amesiame be woalé ŋku ɖe wo ŋu, negbe ɖewohĩ na ɖeklemiɖelawo, amesiwo si nyateƒenya aɖeke mele o". Le eƒe nuƒoa me la, dukplɔla la gblɔ be wowɔ ŋgɔyiyi, ɖe ɖeklemi eƒe nyahelawo eye wòƒoe ɖe dukɔa nu be wòada megbe na ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɖoɖo yeye si nye KSh5 triliɔn (si ade Amerika dɔlar biliɔn 38.5 ) si ku ɖe ŋusẽ, ʋuɖoɖo kple mɔzɔzɔ, mɔdodowo, sukudede kple dijitaal kadodowo ŋu. Ruto ɖe gbeƒãe be: “Egbea la, kpeɖodziawo me kɔ, ŋugbedodo siwo wodo kple ŋugbedodo siwo dzi wowɔ ƒe kpeɖodzi .” Ðe wòle alea? Africa Check dzro eƒe nya vevi ewo me. Ganyawo Le eƒe nuƒo me la, Ruto gblɔ na sewɔlawo be wole mɔ kpɔm be Malaysia ƒe dukplɔlagã Anwar Ibrahim ava Kenya le November 22 kple 23, 2025. Kenya kplɔlawo fia asi Singapore, Malaysia kple " Asiatɔwo ƒe Akpɔkplɔ " bubuwo ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia be wonye kpɔɖeŋu na dukɔa ƒe ŋgɔyiyi. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Uhuru Kenyatta wɔe nenema le ƒe 2019 ƒe sasrãkpɔ aɖe me le Singapore . Ruto hã ƒo nu tso nya mawo tɔgbe ŋu zi geɖe , abe alesi dukplɔlagã tsãtɔ Raila Odinga hã gblɔe ene . Duta eteƒekpɔlawo hã gagblɔ nya sia si wotsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo. Be míada nya sia kpɔ la, míedzro Xexeame ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ƒe Xexeame ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi ƒe Dzesiwo me na ƒe 1963, si nye ƒe si me Kenya xɔ ɖokuisinɔnɔ. Míeto xexlẽdzesi vevi siwo gbɔna me: amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ, dukɔa me ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa (GDP) kple GDP si ame ɖeka kpɔna (wotrɔ asi le eŋu ɖe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ kple asitɔtrɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nu), agbenɔƒe si wokpɔ mɔ na le edziɣi kple adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ ƒe akpa si wokpɔna le ganyawo me. Amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ Dukɔ aɖe ƒe amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe eƒe ganyawo kple dɔwɔlawo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi, si hã kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe eƒe dzidziɖedzi ƒe ŋutete kple nunɔamesiwo didi dzi. Le ƒe 1963 me la, amewo ƒe xexlẽme sɔ kple wo nɔewo le Kenya kple Malaysia. South Koreatɔwo ƒe xexlẽme wu Kenya tɔ ƒe teƒe etɔ̃, evɔ Singapore kple Hong Kong dometɔ ɖesiaɖe mede Kenyatɔwo ƒe afã o. Amewo ƒe xexlẽme le Kenya kple Asia dukɔ ene me le ƒe 1963 me (miliɔn) Ganyawo Kenya Malaysia Singapore South Korea Hong Kong Amewo ƒe xexlẽme 8.63 8.6 1.8 27.2 3.42 Dzɔtsoƒe: Xexeame ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi ƒe Dzesiwo Dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa (GDP) Dukɔ aɖe ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa (GDP) dzidzea eƒe ganyawo ƒe lolome. Enye adzɔnuwo kple dɔwɔna siwo katã wòwɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖe me ƒe asixɔxɔ le asi me, zi geɖe la, ƒe ɖeka. Gaŋutinunyalawo gblɔ na Africa Check va yi be GDP tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo de pɛpɛpɛ wu ne wozã akɔntabubu siwo woɖɔli ɖe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ alo "asi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa" ŋu. Woɖe nyatakaka siwo li la fia le ƒe 2015 ƒe Amerika dɔlar me, si fia be wozã ƒe 2015 ƒe dɔlar ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme tsɔ bua ganyawo katã ƒe asixɔxɔ. GDP le ƒe 2015 ƒe asi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa na Kenya kple Asia dukɔ ene ƒe ganyawo le ƒe 1963 me (US$ biliɔn) Ganyawo Kenya Malaysia Singapore South Korea Hong Kong GDP 6.7 12.3 7.6 31.13 16.6 Dzɔtsoƒe: Xexeame ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi ƒe Dzesiwo Esia ɖee fia be le ƒe 1963 me la, Kenya ƒe ganyawo wu Malaysia tɔ ƒe afã vie, enɔ sue vie wu Singapore tɔ, abe Hong Kong tɔ ƒe akpa eve le atɔ̃ me ene eye South Korea tɔ ƒe akpa atɔ̃lia koe lolo. GDP na ame ɖeka GDP na ame ɖeka, si wotrɔ asi le ɖe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ kple asitɔtrɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nu, ɖea ame ɖekaɖekawo ƒe ganyawo ƒe nyonyo le mama dedie nu fiana eye wònye agbenɔnɔ ƒe dzidzenu si wozãna ɖaa. GDP na ame ɖeka le ƒe 2015 ƒe asi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa nu na Kenya kple Asia dukɔ ene ƒe ganyawo le ƒe 1963 me (US$) Ganyawo Kenya Malaysia Singapore South Korea Hong Kong GDP 776.4 1,439.6 4,239.99 1,142 4,847.37 Dzɔtsoƒe: Xexeame ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi ƒe Dzesiwo Ƒe 1963 ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be Kenya ye nye dukɔ si me ame ɖeka ƒe GDP bɔbɔ wu le ƒe 1963 me ganya atɔ̃. Malaysia tɔ nye Kenya tɔ ƒe teƒe eve kloe, South Korea tɔ de abe zi gbɔ zi ɖeka kple afã ene, eye Singapore kple Hong Kong nɔ ŋgɔ sasasã – wu Kenya tɔ ƒe teƒe atɔ̃ kple ade. Agbenɔƒe ƒe didime Agbenɔƒe si wokpɔ mɔ na le edziɣi nye ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme si vidzĩ yeye ate ŋu akpɔ mɔ be yeanɔ le mamã dedie nu ne amesiwo kuna fifia gakpɔtɔ le nenema. Eɖea lãmesẽ bliboa kple amegbetɔ ƒe tsitsi fiana

claim: Agbalẽŋlɔla Ashley St. Clair, si wogblɔ be enye Elon Musk ƒe vi 13 lia dada, ŋlɔ nya aɖe ɖe X dzi tsɔ “aɖaŋuɖoɖo” na U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le June 5, 2025 dzi, esime U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump kple tech mogul kple Trump ƒe aɖaŋuɖola tsãtɔ Elon Musk nɔ dzre aɖe me le internet dzi la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo) kaka ɖe internet dzi si agbalẽŋlɔla Ashley St. Clair, si wogblɔ be enye Elon Musk ƒe vi 13 lia dada, da ɖe X dzi tsɔ "aɖaŋuɖoɖo le srɔ̃gbegbe ŋu" na Trump. Ashley St. Clair, si nye Musk viwo dometɔ ɖeka dada, ɖo aɖaŋu na Trump be wòagblẽ nu le wo nɔewo ŋubyu/Relevant-Peach3997 inFauxmoi Claims hã kaka ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe), Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe), Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe) kple TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe) kpe ɖe screenshot si wogblɔ be X nyatakaka aɖe si St. Clair ŋlɔ. Wogblɔ be nya si wogblɔ la tso nya si wogblɔ la gbɔ wòsɔ. St. Clair ŋlɔ (nudzraɖoƒe) ɖe eƒe X profile dzi le June 5, 2025, ŋlɔ be "hey@realDonaldTrump lmk if u need any breakup advice." Anɔ eme be "gbegblẽ" si le St. Clair ƒe nyatakakaa me la ku ɖe mama kpata si nɔ Trump kple Musk dome ŋu tsɔ wu be wòaƒo nu tso Trump ƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe ŋutɔŋutɔ kple aƒenɔ gbãtɔ Melania Trump ŋu. Trump kple Musk dzra ƒoƒo le woƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le June 5 lia dzi, le esi Trump ŋlɔ be, "Mɔ bɔbɔetɔ kekeake si dzi míato adzra ga ɖo ɖe míaƒe Gazazã, Dɔlar Biliɔn kple Biliɔn, enye be míatso Elon ƒe Dziɖuɖu ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunana kple Nubablawo nu." Musk ŋlɔ nya ɖe X dzi le miniti X megbe, hegblɔ be Trump dze le dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka siwo womeɖe ɖe go o siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si wobu fɔe si ku ŋu. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple New York Post si wota le Feb. 15, 2025 dzi la, St. Clair ƒo nu tso eƒe ƒomedodo kple Musk ŋu, si dze egɔme le X. Le New York Post ƒe nya nu la, St. Clair gbe be yematsɔ "ŋutilãme kpeɖodzi aɖeke" ana be Musk nye ye vi fofo, amesi ƒe dzidzi St. Clair ɖe gbeƒãe (wode nudzraɖoƒe) le X dzi gbemagbe ke, ɣleti atɔ̃ le ɖevia dzidzi megbe. Le Feb. 21, 2025 dzi la, St. Clair tsɔ nya eve ɖe Musk ŋu le New York County Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ. Tso ɣemaɣi la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea tre nyabiaseawo nu, gake User Magazine kple People ka nya ta le February me be St. Clair di be ye ɖeka koe akpɔ srɔ̃tɔawo ƒe vi dzi eye yeaɖo Musk anyi le se nu be eyae nye vifofoa. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea bu nyaawo be "Nyadɔ tɔxɛwo - Bubuwo (Vidzikpɔkpɔ)" kple Nyadɔdrɔ̃ Tɔxɛwo - Bubuwo (Vifofonyenye)."

claim: Nukatae wòle be nàxe adzɔ geɖe wu esi Donald Trump xena? Eye nyateƒenyae nye ema. $750 ƒe home. Ðo ŋku nusi wògblɔ esime wofɔ ema ɖe dzi ɣeyiɣi aɖee nye sia, alesi wòxea fe ko ... Egblɔ be, ‘Elabena medze aɖaŋu. Menya alesi wowɔa fefe le ɖoɖoa ŋu.’
evidence: Trump Xe $750 le Dukɔa ƒe Gakpɔkpɔ ƒe Adzɔwo me le ƒe 2017. Here’s the Math. Akɔntabubu siwo woɖe tso Dukplɔla Trump ƒe adzɔxexe ŋuti nyatakakawo me ɖe alesi wobu xexlẽme mae fia. Dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ ƒe adzɔ sue si Dukplɔla Trump xe le ƒe 2016 kple 2017 siaa me — si nye dɔlar 750 ko ƒe sia ƒe — va zu nusi ŋu amewo ƒe susu nɔna ŋutɔ tso esime woɖee fia le New York Times ƒe numekuku aɖe me. Akɔntabubu siwo le ete, siwo woɖe tso Aƒetɔ Trump ƒe adzɔxexe ŋuti nyatakakawo me le ƒe 2017 me la ɖe alesi eƒe gakɔntabulawo va ɖo xexlẽme ma gbɔ le ƒe mawo dometɔ ɖeka me fia.

claim: Wotsɔ sinapi-ya to atike siwo wozãna tsɔ daa kansa vɛ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Atikewɔmɔnu siwo wozãna tsɔ daa kansa ƒe nuŋlɔɖi gbãtɔ tso Yale Yunivɛsiti le ƒe 1940-awo me. Numekula siwo le afima kpɔe be "leukopenic" nɔnɔme siwo le sinapi gas ŋu — si nye ŋutete si le esi be wòatsrɔ̃ ʋumenugbagbevi ɣi siwo le ʋu me kple ƒumeŋuɖui me, afisi wowɔa wo le — ate ŋu anye atikewɔwɔ ƒe zazã le kansa si do ƒome kple ʋumenugbagbeviɣidɔ, si kpena ɖe ame ŋu be wòawɔ avu kple dɔlékuiwo. Wodoe kpɔ le "lymphosarcoma" (si wonya nyuie wu fifia be non-Hodgkins lymphoma) dɔnɔ aɖe ŋu, eye womeyɔ mustard gas tẽ ale be woaƒo asa na mɔxexeɖedɔléle nu o. Ke hã ... ... Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo nɔ numekuku wɔm tso atikewɔwɔ si wotu ɖe atikewo dzi ŋu ƒe geɖe do ŋgɔ na ɣemaɣi, eye wozãa sisiblisiwo tsɔ doa wo kpɔna. Togbɔ be amegbetɔwo ƒe dodokpɔa me tsonu do ŋugbe hã la, atike si wua ʋumenugbagbevi dzĩwo nye atike vovovo siwo wowɔ siwo ɖe ŋugbedodo fia la dometɔ ɖeka ko. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe dzomeŋɔli la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be atike siwo wozãna tsɔ daa dɔlékuiwoe la tso atikewɔnu si woyɔna zi geɖe be mustard gas gbɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Nya si wogblɔ la nye nyatakaka siwo nye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Wowɔ atikewɔmɔnu dodokpɔ gbãtɔ si woŋlɔ ɖi le amegbetɔ ŋu le ƒe 1942 me (menye ƒe 1946 o) le Yale Yunivɛsiti to sinapi gas si woɖe tso sinapi gas me na kansa ƒomevi aɖe koŋ zazã me. Gake wonɔ numekuku wɔm tso atike siwo wotsɔ wɔa avu kple kansa ŋu ƒe geɖe. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, menye nitrogen mustard koe ɖee fia be ewɔa dɔ o. Le ƒe 2011 ƒe nuƒo aɖe me la, ame aɖe si ava wu Yale Atikewɔwɔ Suku nu kpuie si ŋkɔe nye Panos Christakis ƒo nuƒo aɖe si gblɔ nudzɔdzɔawo, si dzi woɖo kpee nyitsɔ laa esi woke ɖe kansadɔnɔ si le dodokpɔ ma me ƒe nɔnɔmetata ŋu vɔ megbe. Etu eƒe nuƒoa ɖe nyati aɖe si John Fenn kple Robert Udelsman, siwo nye Yaletɔwo, ta le ƒe ma ke me dzi. Christakis gblɔ be le ƒe 1919 me la, Edward Krumbhaar, si nye dɔléleŋutinunyala le Pennsylvania Yunivɛsiti, de dzesii be Xexemeʋa I ƒe asrafo siwo do go sulfur mustard (si woyɔna zi geɖe be mustard gas) la ɖe ʋumenugbagbevi ɣiwo ƒe dzidziɖedzi fia le ʋua me ("leukocytes") gbã, eye ʋumenugbagbevi dzĩwo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ kabakaba le ƒumeŋuɖui ƒe tsɔtsrɔ̃ ta, afisi ʋumenugbagbevi ɣiwo le wowɔ. Nudzɔdzɔ sia he numekulawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si le Yale, amesiwo xɔ nubabla tso U.S. Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe (si do ŋgɔ na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe) ƒe susu be woasrɔ̃ nu tso ya siawo kple atike siwo ate ŋu axe mɔ ɖe wo nu ŋu. Yale ƒe Alfred Gilman, si nye atikeŋutinunyala, kple Ðɔkta Louis Goodman, si nye atikewɔla kple atikeŋutinunyala, de dzesi nɔnɔme siawo eye wozã sulfur mustard si woɖe tso sulfur mustard me, si nye nitrogen mustard (HN-3), ɖe sisiblisi siwo me wodo ʋumenugbagbeviɣidɔ ɖo va yi — ʋumenugbagbevi dzĩwo ƒe kansa dzɔna ne lãmenugbagbevi ɣiwo dzi ɖe edzi le dodokpɔ me. Le ƒe 1942 me la, woda dɔ na ŋutsu aɖe si wonya be JD ko le Yale le lymphosarcoma (si woyɔna nyuie wu fifia be non-Hodgkins lymphoma) ta eye wowɔ dɔ nɛ be woaɖe dɔdzẽwo ɖa eye wozã keklẽŋusẽ be woaɖe wo dzi akpɔtɔ, gake gbeɖegbeɖea koe. Gilman kple Goodman do susua ɖa be yeƒe atikewɔlawo nadze agbagba ado nitrogen mustard nɛ be wòaɖe dɔdzẽawo dzi akpɔtɔ. Atikewɔwɔa wɔ dɔ. Gake aɖi si le atike si wotsɔ wɔe me hã na dɔnɔa ʋu geɖe eye wòku le dodokpɔa gɔmedzedze megbe ɣleti etɔ̃. Le ame kukua me dzodzro me la, ɖɔktawo kpɔe be ƒumeŋuɖui do kpo nu eye ami do ɖe eteƒe. Togbɔ be wobu HN-3 be womate ŋu azãe le atikewɔnyawo me o hã la, nitrogen sinapi bubu si nye HN-2 ɖe ŋugbedodo geɖe fia eye wozãe tsɔ da kansa hafi wova bui mlɔeba be aɖi le eme akpa hã. Gake egbegbe kansaŋutinunya gakpɔtɔ zãa atike siwo tso mustard ƒomea me siwo me aɖi mele boo o tsɔ daa kansae. Nyati aɖe si woŋlɔ le ƒe 2008 me le magazine si nye Cancer Research me ɖee fia be numekuku le atike siwo daa kansa ŋu dze egɔme do ŋgɔ sasasã wu ƒe 1940-awo — tso keke ƒe 1900-awo me ke. Ƒe blaeve siwo kplɔe ɖo me la, dɔa wowó, eye atike yeyewo do tso antifolates, siwo doa kplamatse lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe DNA to folic acid xexe me, va ɖo dɔlékuiwutike siwo tsia dɔdzẽ nu, siwo zãa mɔnu vovovowo tsɔ gblẽa lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe domenyiŋusẽfianu me eye woxea mɔ na wo be woagadzi ɖe edzi o.

claim: Beluga tɔmelã atɔ̃ klɔ ƒuta le Russia ƒe Kamchatka, ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na anyigbaʋuʋu si ƒe sesẽme nye 8.8 si dzɔ le nutoa me.
evidence: Tsunami ƒutsotsoewo tu Japan kple United States ƒe akpa aɖewo esi anyigbaʋuʋu si ƒe sesẽme nye 8.8 ʋuʋu Russia ƒe ɣedzeƒeƒuta le July 30. Anyigbaʋuʋu sesẽtɔ kekeake siwo woŋlɔ ɖi dometɔ ɖekae nye be anyigbaʋuʋu si dzɔ le Russia na amesiame ƒe mo wɔ yaa. Gake ɖe beluga tɔmelãwo ƒe ƒome aɖe xlɔ̃ nu Russiatɔwo ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na afɔku siaa?  Esi ame geɖe nɔ video aɖe mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be le July 29 lia dzi la, ƒumelã atɔ̃ siwo woyɔna be beluga whale klɔ ƒuta le Russia ƒe Kamchatka - afisi anyigbaʋuʋua dzɔ le. Wogblɔ be tɔmelã siwo woyɔna be whale la nɔ nu xlɔ̃m amewo tso anyigbaʋuʋu gã si le dzɔdzɔ ge le nutoa me ŋu.  advertisement Esi ame ɖeka nɔ videoa mam le Facebook dzi la, eŋlɔ bena, "Beluga whale atɔ̃ klɔ ƒuta le Kamchatka ŋkeke ɖeka pɛ do ŋgɔ na anyigbaʋuʋu si ƒe sesẽme nye 8.8. Dzɔdzɔme xlɔ̃ nu mí, gake míedo kpo toɖoɖo."  Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖewo hã zã video sia le woƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe anyigbaʋuʋua ŋu me.  India Today Fact Check kpɔe be video si ŋu nya ku ɖo la tso Russia vavã, gake edze egɔme tso ƒe 2023. Míaƒe Probe Reverse si míetsɔ di keyframes tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me la na míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe tso eŋu, si woŋlɔ le August 15, 2023. Edze ƒã le afisia be videoa xɔ ƒe eve kloe.  Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nutoa me tɔƒodela siwo le Russia ƒe Ɣedzeƒe Ʋĩ la ɖe beluga tɔmelã atɔ̃ siwo tsi anyi. Woke ɖe beluga siwo nye ame tsitsi ene kple nyivi ɖeka ŋu le ƒuta aɖe si te ɖe Tigil Tɔsisia ƒe nugbɔ ŋu.  Emegbe míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ gbogbo aɖewo tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu. Wogblɔ be nutoa me tɔƒodelawo ke ɖe beluga tɔmelãwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe ŋu le ƒuta le Tigilsky, Kamchatka ƒe dziehe, ƒuta.  Tɔƒodela eneawo, siwo nye Andrey Korolev, Vladimir Kochelaevsky, Sergey Umkev, kple Ashot Ustyan, dze agbagba be yewoatsɔ tɔmelãawo atrɔ ayi atsiaƒua me. Gake womete ŋu wɔe o elabena tɔmelã siwo woyɔna be whale la kpekpe akpa. Emegbe wona tɔmelã siwo woyɔna be whale la nɔa agbe to nuɖuɖu nana wo kple atsiaƒumetsi kɔklɔ ɖe wo dzi me. Le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la, ƒutsotsoe aɖe va eye wòkplɔ wo katã trɔ yi Okhotsk Ƒua gbɔ. Russia nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe ma videoa ɣemaɣi.  Woɖe beluga tɔmelã atɔ̃ siwo le ƒuta esi woɖe wo ɖe ƒuta le Tigilsky ƒuta, le Kamchatka ƒukpo afã dzi le Russia ƒe ɣedzeƒe pic.twitter.com/xH6KNEy34O— RT (@RT_com) August 21, 2023 Eyata eme kɔ ƒã be wole video aɖe si woɖe le ƒe 2023 me la mam alakpatɔe esime tɔmelã siwo woyɔna be whale le nu xlɔ̃m amewo tso anyigbaʋuʋu si dzɔ le ƒe Russia ŋkeke ɖeka hafi wòadze dukɔa dzi.  - Ewu enu

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖo Turning Point USA ƒe amegã Erika Kirk ɖe Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Amedzrowo ƒe Habɔbɔ me.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le March 2026 me la, Internet zãlawo gblɔ nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump tia Turning Point USA ƒe amegã Erika Kirk, si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasila si wowu Charlie Kirk ƒe ahosi, be wòanye Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Amedzrowo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X zãla ɖeka da Erika Kirk kple Trump ƒe nɔnɔmetata ɖe (dzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) eye wòŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Woɖo Erika Kirk ɖe Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Dɔwɔha me afisi wòakpe asi ɖe aɖaŋuɖoɖo na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ŋu le nya siwo ku ɖe sukua ŋu. Nukae le dzomavɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ me míele wɔwɔm?" (@ZachCostello_/X) Kpuie ko la, nya sia nye nyateƒe. White House ƒe nyanuɖela Olivia Wales ɖo kpe edzi na Snopes to email dzi be Trump tia Kirk be wòasubɔ le board zikpui ma ke si srɔ̃a nɔ tsã, amesi wowu le Utah Valley Yunivɛsiti ƒe sukuxɔ me le nuƒoƒo ƒe wɔna aɖe me le Sept. 10, 2025 dzi: Dukplɔla Trump wɔ tiatia nyuitɔ kekeake le Erika Kirk ɖoɖo ɖe U.S. Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Amedzrowo ƒe Habɔbɔ me. Charlie Kirk subɔ le Dɔwɔha la me dadatɔe, menye subɔsubɔha me tɔwo ƒe dzidzime si kplɔe ɖo ɖeɖeko o, ke boŋ ame miliɔn geɖe le xexeame godoo kple eƒe Kristotɔwo ƒe xɔse dzinɔameƒotɔe, nyateƒea taʋiʋli, kple dukɔ lɔlɔ̃ deto. Erika Kirk ayi eƒe domenyinu dzi, eye wòanye yameʋuʋu ƒe asrafoha si xɔ ŋkɔ wu le xexeame ƒe ŋutinya me si ƒe aʋawɔlawo nana míaƒe Dukɔa nɔa dedie, ŋusẽ le, eye wònɔa ablɔɖe me la taʋlila vɔvɔ̃manɔmee. Ɣleti aɖewo do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku la, Charlie Kirk da akpe na Trump le X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) be eɖoe ɖe dɔdzikpɔha la me, eye wòɖo eŋu le Trump ƒe Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakaka (si wodzra ɖo) ƒe screenshot tame. Le Kirk ƒe nyatakaka me la, eɖe nu ɖeka si dzi woalé ŋku ɖo na subɔsubɔsukuwo me be: "Aɖaŋusrɔ̃la nyuitɔwo kekeake xɔxɔ kple wo tutuɖo be woatsɔ akpɔ dukɔ sia kple eƒe ablɔɖewo ta." Snopes do ka kple Turning Point USA to email dzi be yeabia be yedi be yeaƒo nu tso Erika Kirk ƒe ɖoɖo ɖe dɔdzikpɔha la me ŋu hã eye yeawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Sewɔtakpekpea ɖo Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Amedzrowo ƒe Habɔbɔ (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le ƒe 1956. Dukplɔla si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi Dwight Eisenhower tia yameʋukula Charles Lindbergh kple ame bubuwo be woasubɔ kple yameʋuɖoɖo ƒe kɔmitia. Dɔwɔha la nye "ame ade siwo Dukplɔla tia," kpakple Aƒea kple Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo, kple ame bubuwo. 10 U.S.C. § 9455 (nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be, "Ame siwo Dukplɔla tia la subɔna ƒe etɔ̃ ɖesiaɖe," eye be ele be hamevi eve ya teti siwo dukplɔla tia nanye sukunuwulawo. Se ma ke gblɔ be ŋusẽ le amesi tia hamevi aɖe si be wòatia ame si axɔ ɖe eteƒe ne hamevi aɖe ku alo woɖe asi le eŋu le habɔbɔa me. Ne míagblɔe bubui la, sea na gome Trump be wòatia ame si axɔ ɖe Charlie Kirk teƒe, si wɔe be wòtia Erika Kirk. Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ƒe Tsaɖilawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe agbalẽ (si wodzra ɖo) ɖe kɔmitia ƒe taɖodzinu kple dɔwɔnawo ƒe lolome gɔme be enye "aɖaŋuɖoɖo kple aɖaŋuɖoɖo siwo le wo ɖokui si le nya siwo ku ɖe U.S. Yamesrafowo ƒe Suku ŋu" nana. Dɔwɔha la ƒe dɔwo ŋuti numeɖeɖe lɔ "[biabia] tso agbenyuinɔnɔ, amehehe, kple hadome nɔnɔme, nusɔsrɔ̃ɖoɖo, nufiafia, ŋutilãmedɔwɔnuwo, ganyawo, sukudede ƒe mɔnuwo, kple nya bubu siwo ku ɖe" suku si me habɔbɔa tso nya me be yeabu la ŋu. Le sededea nu la, habɔbɔa yia sukua ƒe sia ƒe, togbɔ be woate ŋu awɔ sasrãkpɔ bubuwo hã. Dɔwɔha la dzraa ƒe afã ƒe nyatakaka si me eƒe nukpɔsusuwo kple aɖaŋuɖoɖowo le, emegbe wotsɔa nyatakakaa naa aʋawɔnyawo ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla kple amegã bubuwo be woada asi ɖe edzi ahadzro eme. Le March 2026 me la, sukua ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yɔ board me tɔ atɔ̃ siwo dukplɔla tia kple ɖoƒe ƒuƒlu ɖeka, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Sen. Tommy Tuberville, R-Ala., nuƒola si ʋãa ame Dan Clark, si wu suku nu le ƒe 1989 me kple Yamesrafowo ƒe Aʋafiagã Doug Nikolai si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme, Trump ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Aɖaŋuɖola ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si nye zi gbãtɔ Dina Powell kple Erika Kirk. Charlie Kirk do zi gbãtɔ le aɖabaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo ko me le Aug. 7, 2025, dzikpɔha ƒe kpekpe aɖe me —ɣleti ɖeka kple edzivɔ vie do ŋgɔ na eƒe ku. Aɖabaƒoƒoawo na eƒe dɔdzikpɔha ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe nɔnɔmetata kpui aɖe, si me Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖoɖowo taʋiʋli hã le. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le nudzɔdzɔ aɖe me la, Kirk gbugbɔ gblɔ habɔbɔa me tɔ bubu ƒe seselelãme siwo di be yeaɖe mɔ na cadets be woaɖu "yame kple yamenutome susu" to woƒe awuwo dzi. Ɣeaɖeɣi la, Kirk bia nya aɖe koŋ si ku ɖe agbagba siwo Trump dziɖuɖua dze be yeaɖe ameƒomevi vovovowo, dzɔdzɔenyenye, amewo katã ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le eme kple mɔnukpɔkpɔwo ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔwo ɖa: Aƒetɔ Kirk bia tso USAFA dɔwɔlawo si be woaɖe alesi wole Dukplɔla kple SECDEF ƒe mɔfiame siwo ku ɖe ameƒomevinyenye ŋuti nufiafia veviwo kple ameƒomevi vovovowo, sɔsɔ, kple amewo katã ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le eme (DEI) ŋu dzi wɔm ne wowɔ ɖeka

claim: Philippines kple Malaysia ƒudzisrafowo ƒe meliwo tsi tre ɖe Sabah gbɔ le Aug. 11, 2025 dzi.
evidence: Video aɖe si YouTube-dɔwɔƒe aɖe da ɖe edzi gblɔ be Philippines kple Malaysia ƒudzisrafowo ƒe tɔdziʋuwo ge ɖe tsitretsitsi sesẽ aɖe me le Sabah gbɔ nyitsɔ laa. Esia nye alakpa.  Nyatakaka aɖeke meli si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ɖo kpe edzi be nudzɔdzɔ sia tɔgbe dzɔ o. Dukɔ evea siaa gblɔ be nyakpakpae wogblɔ nya sia.  Wota video si xɔ aɖabaƒoƒo 12 kple sɛkɛnd 51 la le Aug. 12 dzi, eye wotsɔ ŋutinya aɖe si ƒo nu tso nudzɔdzɔ si wosusu be edzɔ ŋu la dze egɔme. Egblɔ be Philippines Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe meli si nye BRP Magat Salamat te ɖe tɔƒodeʋuwo ŋu le Sulu Ƒua dzi, si na Malaysiatɔwo ƒe dzɔlawo ƒe meli si nye K. D. Pahang xlɔ̃ nu sesĩe tsɔ de se na Philippines tɔdziʋua be wòadzo.  Videoa gagblɔ be masɔmasɔa nu sẽ esi Filipinotɔwo ƒe melia gbe be yemagbugbɔ ɖe megbe o. Nuƒola aɖe si ƒe ŋkɔ womeyɔ o gblɔ be: "Gaƒoƒo geɖe la, aʋawɔmeli eveawo nɔ tsia dzi meta alafa geɖe ko tso wo nɔewo gbɔ. Woƒe tuwo ʋu eye ʋua me dɔwɔlawo nɔ aʋawɔƒewo, ƒudzidela ɖesiaɖe tsi dzodzodzoe eye wònɔ ŋudzɔ. Ðoɖoezizi la nu sẽ ŋutɔ, atsiaƒu ƒe ɖiɖi kple radio static ƒe ɖiɖi ɣeaɖewoɣi koe gblẽ." "Afɔɖeɖe ɖeka si mesɔ o, dzesi ɖeka si gɔme womese nyuie o ateŋu ahe masɔmasɔ vɛ kple emetsonu siwo gbɔ tsi siawo ŋu sasasã. Esia nye August 11th, 2025."  Nuŋlɔla la gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa wu enu ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ manɔmee le nudzraɖoɖowo kple kadodo siwo wowɔ le megbemɔwo dzi megbe.  Le nyatakaka aɖe si woda ɖe Facebook dzi le Aug.12 si va yi me la, Philippines ƒe Asrafowo ɖe nya sia ɖa eye wogblɔ be enye "aʋatso." Egblɔ be: "Nya sia nye nyakpakpa bliboe—nudzɔdzɔ ma tɔgbe aɖeke medzɔ o. Eɖoe be yeagblẽ míaƒe ƒe 60 ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe kadodo kple Malaysia me, agblẽ kakaɖedzi si le dukɔa me ɖe AFP ŋu, eye yeahe masɔmasɔ siwo mehiã o vɛ."  AFP gblɔ kpee be nyatakaka totro mawo do ŋɔdzi na ŋutifafa kple liƒo le nutoa me eye dunyahehe alo aɖaŋuɖoɖo ƒe ɖoɖowo koe wosubɔna.  Le Aug. 14 dzi la, Fiaɖuƒea ƒe Malaysia Ƒudzisrafowo, si nye Malaysia Asrafowo ƒe ƒudzisrafowo hã gbe nya sia be enye alakpa eye wode dzesii be "nudzɔdzɔ aɖeke medzɔ abe alesi woɖee fia le videoa me ene o."  Nusi gade ɖikeke ɖe edzi la, YouTube videoa hã mezã "standoff" la ƒe nɔnɔmetata ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖeke o eye wòɖe video klipi siwo AI wɔ, stock nɔnɔmetatawo, lãwo ƒe videowo, kple nyadzɔdzɔ siwo meku ɖe kamedefefewo ŋu o ƒe keklẽwo ƒe keklẽwo ɖe go boŋ.  Le numeɖeɖeɖaka me la, televisiondɔwɔƒea ɖee fia be "nya siwo wotrɔ alo esiwo wowɔ" le yewoƒe videoa me eye be "wowɔe kple nunya wɔwɔe si wotsɔ kpe ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe numekuku, numekuku, kple nuŋɔŋlɔmetola ƒe dzikpɔkpɔ ŋu ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu be woakpɔ egbɔ be ede pɛpɛpɛ, goglo, eye eme kɔ."  YouTube television dɔwɔƒe INFO SPARK HUB (si wowɔ le June 13) ye ŋlɔe, alakpa video sia xɔ ame 2,400 siwo kpɔe eye ame 77 gblɔe, eye ame 15 lɔ̃e.

claim: Wokɔ Pakistan ƒe dukɔa ƒe aflagawo ɖe dzi le DMK ƒe kpekpe aɖe me
evidence: Wole M K Stalin ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe si wotsɔ aflaga dama geɖewo ƒo xlãe la mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe kple nya si wogblɔ be wodo Pakistan dukɔa ƒe aflagawo ɖe dzi le Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le Tamil Nadu Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe tiatiawɔɣi.  Facebook zãla aɖe da nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ɖe edzi kple nya si gbɔna: Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa le afisia.  NM VERIFIED NewsMobile ɖo kpe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dzi la dzi eye wokpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Esi míelé ŋku ɖe nɔnɔmetata la ŋu nyuie la, míekpɔe be aflaga dama siwo wokpɔ le nɔnɔmetata la me la menye Pakistan tɔ o. Ke boŋ wole India Union Muslim League (IUML) si zãa aflaga dama si dzi ɣletivimefakaka kple ɣletivi le la teƒe. Togbɔ be le nukpɔkpɔ me ɖi wo nɔewo le ŋkubiãnya me hã la, IUML ƒe aflaga to vovo tso Pakistan dukɔa ƒe aflaga gbɔ le eƒe nɔnɔme kple eƒe lolome gome.  Wogakpɔe be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo abe Frontline kple Deccan Herald ene ta nɔnɔmetata sia. Nyatakaka siawo ɖee fia be nɔnɔmetata la ɖee fia be Stalin le akɔdada wɔm le Chennai esi wòtsɔ eƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ tso Kolathur nutoa me le March 30, 2026. Le Tamil Nadu la, DMK xɔ ŋgɔ na Secular Progressive Alliance, si me dunyaheha geɖewo abe India Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe, Viduthalai Chiruthaigal Katchi, India Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha, India Kɔmiunist Dunyaheha (Marxist), kple IUML le.  Esi wònye be IUML nye DMK ƒe nubabla ƒe hadɔwɔla le se nu ta la, wokpɔa eƒe aflagawo zi geɖe le DMK ƒe kpekpewo me kpe ɖe nubabla ƒe akpa bubuwo tɔ ŋu.  Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kple kakaɖedzi be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖee fia be wodo Pakistan ƒe dukɔa ƒe aflagawo ɖe dzi le DMK ƒe kpekpe aɖe me la nye alakpa.
