Nya siwo wogblɔ be Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo da asi ɖe United States dzi be wòatu ƒutadukɔwo ƒe aʋawɔƒewo nye alakpa



							Wotae le September 24, 2025 le 06:48




							
							3 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Anne CHAN, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Hong Kong ƒe agbalẽ





				Hafi United States Dukplɔla Donald Trump natrɔ ayi Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo me la, nya aɖe si ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o si nye be Sewɔtakpekpe Gã la da asi ɖe edzi be wòaɖe gbe na United States be wòatu eƒe asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe siwo katã le ƒuta la kaka ɖe Chinatɔwo ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Togbɔ be Washington tu teƒe aɖewo alo ɖe woƒe lolome dzi kpɔtɔ le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me hã la, AFP mete ŋu kpɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke tso Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe afɔɖeɖe ma tɔgbe ŋu o, si manye sedziwɔwɔ o.
			


"Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe akɔdada na xexeame ƒe mo wɔ yaa!" reads a simplified Chinese caption on a RedNote post shared September 2, 2025. "Esiae nye zi gbãtɔ tso esime woɖo Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo anyi be woda asi ɖe tameɖoɖo kplikpaa aɖe dzi le agbɔsɔsɔ gã aɖe me si ku ɖe asrafowo ɖoɖo ɖe dukɔ ɖeka ŋu." tu eƒe asrafowo ƒe nɔƒe siwo katã le duta eye wòɖe asrafowo ɖa enumake.Eyi edzi gblɔ be dukɔ 141 da asi ɖe edzi, atɔ̃ da asi ɖe edzi, atɔ̃ da asi ɖe edzi eye 35 meda asi ɖe edzi o.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


RedNote ƒe alakpa nyatakaka si woɖe le September 18, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, kple X dzĩ si AFP tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu
					
Nya sia kaka ɖe teƒe bubuwo le RedNote, Douin kple Facebook dzi le Chinatɔwo ƒe asrafowo ƒe atsyã aɖe ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wowɔ le September 3 lia dzi lɔƒo (archived link). Amehawo ƒe zɔzɔ le Beijing si me asrafoha gbogbo aɖewo kple aʋawɔnu sesẽwo nɔ la na wotsɔ China kple United States asrafowo sɔ kple wo nɔewo le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (nudzraɖoƒe le afisia kple afisia). Chinatɔ Internet dzi dɔwɔla aɖewo ɖee fia be United States ƒe dɔwɔƒe gbogbo aɖewo le duta, gake ɖeka koe le China si (nudzraɖoƒe le afisia, afisia kple afisia). Nyatakakaawo kaka hafi Trump trɔ gbɔ va Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo me le September 23 lia dzi, afisi wòƒo nuƒo aɖe le Sewɔtakpekpe Gã la ŋkume tsɔ tso xexeame ƒe habɔbɔa nu be mete ŋu kpe ɖe ye ŋu wòwɔ ŋutifafa ƒe nubablawo le Gaza kple Ukraine o (archived link).Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Takpekpe Gã la da asi ɖe tameɖoɖo kplikpaa siwo wu 7,000 dzi vaseɖe gbemagbe -- siwo dometɔ aɖeke mebia tẽ be United States naɖe eƒe dutanyigbawo dzi nɔƒewo katã ɖa (wodzrae ɖo o link).White House, United States ƒe dɔdasi si le Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo me kple Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe -- si woyɔna tsã be Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha -- hã megblɔ nya aɖeke le dutoƒo tso tameɖoɖo kplikpaa sia tɔgbe ŋu o, (nudzraɖoƒe le afisia, afisia kple afisia). AFP mete ŋu ke ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le tso Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe nyametsotso aɖe si de se na United States be wòatu eƒe dutanyigbawo dzi dɔwɔƒewo katã ŋu o.Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe tameɖoɖo kplikpaawoLe ƒe 1966 me la, Sewɔtakpekpe Gã la da asi ɖe tameɖoɖo kplikpaa aɖe si ku ɖe duta asrafowo ƒe nɔƒewo ɖeɖeɖa le Asia, Afrika kple Latin Amerika ŋu, gake eƒo nu tso dutanyigbadzinɔlawo ƒe asrafowo ƒe nɔƒewo ŋu (nudzraɖoƒe le afisia kple afisia).Tameɖoɖo kplikpaa la, abe Sewɔtakpekpe Gã ƒe nyametsotsowo katã ene la, nye aɖaŋuɖoɖo si mexe mɔ ɖe enu o (archive link).Nyatakaka siwo dzi Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Aɖaŋudeha si me tɔwo nye ame 15 da asi ɖo koe nye sedziwɔwɔ, si bia be woada akɔ enyi ya teti atsɔ ada asi ɖe edzi eye womaxe mɔ ɖe hamevi aɖeke si anɔ anyi ɖaa nu o (archived link). Ame atɔ̃ siwo le hamea me ɖaae nye China, France, Russia, United Kingdom kple United States, esime Sewɔtakpekpe Gã la tiaa dukɔ 10 bubuawo hena ƒe eve ƒe dɔwɔwɔ (archived link). Dukɔ 193 ye le Sewɔtakpekpea me (archived link).Akɔdada ƒe xexlẽme siwo woyɔ le Internet dzi sɔ kple tameɖoɖo kplikpaa aɖe si Sewɔtakpekpe Gã la da asi ɖo le March 2022 me tsɔ bu fɔ Russia tɔ

claim: New York Mets tsɔ Pride ƒe aflaga ɖɔ li U.S. aflaga esime wonɔ dukɔa ƒe ha dzim le baseball fefe aɖe me le June 13, 2025 dzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le June 2025 ƒe domedome la, video aɖe si xɔ sɛkɛnd atɔ̃ la kaka ɖe Internet dzi si ɖe Pride ƒe aflaga fia le jumbotron dzi le New York Mets ƒe Citi Field bɔlƒoƒe. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔ be aflaga sia va xɔ ɖe U.S. aflaga teƒe esime wonɔ dukɔa ƒe ha dzim. Togbɔ be amewo megblɔ fefe si me esia dzɔ le o hã la, nya la kaka le ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe ƒe sia ƒe ƒe Pride Night, si ɖua LGBTQ+-hadzilawo ƒe azã kple woƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le baseball me ƒe azã enyilia megbe, le June 13 lia dzi, si sɔ kple woƒe fefe si wowɔ kple Tampa Bay Rays. X zãla ɖeka si ma video klipi la (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ŋlɔ bena: "BREAKING - New York Mets tiae be yewoaɖe Pride ƒe aflaga afia ɖe Amerikatɔwo ƒe aflaga teƒe le dukɔa ƒe hadzidziɣi." Ame siwo wu miliɔn 6 ye kpɔ nyatakaka sia le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. Nya sia dze le teƒe bubu hã le X. Gake hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo ɖee fia be U.S. aflaga hã dze le jumbotron la dzi le dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia dzi. Eyata ame siwo gblɔ be Pride ƒe aflaga xɔ ɖe U.S. aflaga teƒe la tsɔ videoa bu vodadatɔe. Togbɔ be U.S. aflaga medze le sɛkɛnd atɔ̃ ƒe video klipi la me o, si ate ŋu ana ame aɖewo xɔe se be wotsɔ Pride ƒe aflaga ɖɔlii hã la, video bubu si woda ɖe Internet dzi ɖee fia be U.S. aflaga hã dze le jumbotron la dzi le dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia dzi. Instagram zãla aɖe da video si didi wu (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ɖe alesi woƒo ƒu ɖe sɛkɛnd atɔ̃ ƒe video klipi la ŋu fia. Le video ma me la, woate ŋu akpɔ U.S. aflaga le screen vovovo dzi le dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia ƒoƒo katã me eye wòdze le jumbotron gã la hã dzi le 00:50 ƒe dzesia nu. Nya aɖe si Chris Stevens ma (@cjstevens421) Instagram videoa kple sɛkɛnd atɔ̃ ƒe video si le tsatsam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo siaa ɖe fefewɔla kple hadzila Alex Newell fia wònɔ dukɔa ƒe hadzidzia ƒom. Getty Images hã ɖe foto aɖe si me Newell nɔ ha dzim le fefea me le June 13. Eyata mesɔ be hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo nagblɔ be Pride ƒe aflaga xɔ ɖe U.S. aflaga teƒe esime wonɔ dukɔa ƒe hadzidzi ƒom le Mets fefea me o. Edze abe sɛkɛnd atɔ̃ ƒe klipi la dzɔ tso hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla aɖe si ƒe asiléƒe @lisco_2000 gbɔ ene, amesi ŋlɔ ɖe X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe be): "Mi ŋutsuwo mele tɔtrɔm ɖe Mets ƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea ŋu bc woɖe dada ƒe aflaga fia ɖe america ƒe aflaga teƒe le hadzidzia wɔɣi." Lisco_2000 gblɔ to email dzi be yewoɖe videoa eye yewosusu be woɖe U.S. aflaga fia le jumbotron la dzi "hena sɛkɛnd ʋee aɖewo do ŋgɔ na Pride ƒe aflaga." Wogblɔ hã be nya siwo le yewoƒe X post me la gɔmeɖeɖe "le mɔ gbegblẽ nu" tso hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla bubuwo gbɔ, hafi wogblɔ kpee be: "Alesi amewo tsɔe heƒu du kplii la wɔ nuku ŋutɔ!" Le teƒe bubu la, TikTok zãla aɖe si de Mets-Rays fefea la da wɔnaa ƒe video (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ɖe afima, si me U.S. aflaga gbogbo aɖewo nɔ dzodzom le Citi Field bɔlƒoƒea tame. Screenshot si le ete la ɖe videoa fia le 00:05 me. (marisaandthebuns/ TikTok) Snopes hã do asi ɖe New York Mets gbɔ be woagblɔ eƒe susu. Míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne woɖo eŋu.

claim: U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kristi Noem da akpe na Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe ƒe 2025 ƒe ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣi si me nudzɔdzɔ aɖeke medzɔ o le U.S. ta, eye wògblɔ be, "Miena ahomawo nɔ adzɔge."
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu Le Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le dutoƒo le Dec. 2, 2025 dzi me la, Noem gblɔ nyateƒe be, "Aƒetɔ, èto ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣi me ahom aɖeke manɔmee. Eye ale, FEMA, FEMA ... wò, wò gɔ̃ hã, èna ahomawo meganɔ adzɔge o, eyata míekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe ema ŋu." Ke hã, nukoko si wose kpakple Noem emegbe eƒe FEMA nyagbɔgblɔa dzi yiyi ɖee fia be xɔa xɔ "èna ahomawo le adzɔge" nyagbɔgblɔ be menye naneke wu fefe si me womeɖea asi le o. Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le December 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze gblɔ be U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Dɔdzikpɔla Kristi Noem da akpe na Dukplɔla Donald Trump be ena ahom sesẽwo nɔ adzɔge tso dukɔa gbɔ vaseɖe ƒe 2025 ƒe ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣia me, le nya aɖe si Noem gblɔ le White House Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe si woɖe gbeƒãe le dutoƒo le Dec. 2. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le Dec. 2 dzi la, Occupy Democrats ƒe Facebook-dzesi si le ŋgɔ yim la da (si woŋlɔ ɖi) nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woɖe fia Noem kple Trump ƒe fotowo. Nya si woŋlɔ la ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be, "Kristi Noem yi Dziehe Korea bliboe eye wòda akpe na Kplɔla Lɔlɔ̃tɔ ɖe...eɖe ahom sesẽwo ɖa ta?" (Occupy Democrats/Facebook) Nya aɖe si axadzikpɔla aɖe gblɔ kple video (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si me Noem gblɔ be egblɔ la ƒe kadodo aɖe le nyatakaka ma me. Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe nya sia dzi yi edzi, le eƒe akpa aɖe, ale: Le egbe ƒe toɖoɖo ɖeɖefia kple ŋukpemanɔmee a**-agbugbɔ nugbugbɔ takpekpe si Trump ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa yɔ be "dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe kpekpe" me la, Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Kristi Noem da akpe na Trump be ena ahomwo meganɔ adzɔge o. Ẽ, ahom sesẽwo ɖeɖeɖa. "Aƒetɔ, èto ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣi me ahom manɔmee. Eye ale FEMA — èna ahom la gɔ̃ hã nɔ adzɔge! — Eye FEMA le nunɔamesiwo kple dɔlarwo zãm kabakaba wu tsã. Eyata nane gblẽ le ame aɖe ŋu si dzɔna ɖe wo dzi, èle afima enumake le kpekpem ɖe wo ŋu eye nèle gbɔgblɔm na wo be nunɔamesiwo le wo si be woagafɔ ɖe woƒe afɔwo dzi." Edze ƒã be ɖeko Trump tsɔ eƒe dzesidenu yibɔ gã la heɖe aŋutrɔ siwo gblɔ na ahomyaawo be woayi teƒe bubu! Aɖaŋutɔe wɔe, Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla! Gbeƒãɖelawo kple ezãlawo hã ma nya sia le Bluesky, Facebook (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), TikTok (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), X (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple YouTube. Kpuie ko la, wogblɔe wòsɔ be Noem ye gblɔ nya sia, eye wògblɔ nya sia be enye fefenya si me womeɖe asi le o. Abe alesi videoa ɖee fia ene la, Noem gblɔ na Trump vavã be, "Aƒetɔ, èto ahomya ƒe ɣeyiɣia me ahom aɖeke manɔmee. Eye ale, FEMA, FEMA ... wò, wò gɔ̃ hã nèɖe ahomyaawo ɖa, eyata míekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖe ema ŋu." Emegbe Noem yi edzi gblɔ nya si wògblɔ tso Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Nudzɔdzɔ Kpatawo Gbɔ, si ŋu wòdze agbagba tsã be yeadze nuƒoƒo tsoe ŋu. Nukoko siwo wose le videowo me tso kpekpea me — kpakple eƒe FEMA nyaŋuɖoɖoa dzi yiyi — ɖee fia be xɔa xɔ Noem ƒe nya si nye "èna ahomawo meganɔ adzɔge o" nya la be menye naneke wu nukokoedoname si wotsɔ boblododowo wɔe o. Snopes do ka kple DHS kple White House to email dzi be yeabia nya tso ezãlawo ƒe nyawo ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nyatakaka gbogbo siwo woŋlɔ siwo meyɔ nukokoawo o kple nyateƒe si wònye be xɔa xɔ nya sia abe fefenya ene. Míawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Ɣeyiɣi si me Noem yɔ ahomya la dzɔ le ga 1:24:00 ƒe dzesi me le White House YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ƒe video si ku ɖe Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpea ŋu me: CNBC YouTube television dɔwɔƒea hã ɖe video aɖe si ɖe alesi Trump wɔ nui ɖe nya mawo ke ŋu fia, si dze egɔme tso 1:24:05 ƒe dzesi dzi: USA Today ka nya ta be ahom aɖeke meva anyigba dzi le U.S. le ƒe 2025 me o. Le yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nudzɔdzɔ ɖedzesi bubu siwo dzɔ le... ƒea me la, Dukɔa ƒe Atsiaƒu Kple Yame Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ka nya ta tso Ahom Dzodzoe Barry ƒe susɔeawo ŋu, tsɔ kpe ɖe nu bubuwo ŋu, ƒo ƒu wɔ tsidzadza si na tsiɖɔɖɔ kpata si dzɔ le July me si wu ame 135 kple edzivɔ le Texas, siwo dome ɖeviwo kple ame tsitsi siwo nɔ dzomeŋɔli asaɖawo me hã nɔ. Le July hã me la, ame ade ya teti ku le Dziehe Caroline le tsiɖɔɖɔ si tso Ahom sesẽ si woyɔna be Chantal ƒe susɔewo me ta. Be míagaxlẽ nu geɖe wu la, míeka nya ta tso nya bubu siwo do tso kpekpe ma ke me ŋu va yi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya siwo wogblɔ le afisiafi be videowo ɖee fia be Trump le alɔ̃ dɔm, eye be ŋkɔgbalẽvi si wotsɔ na Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth la ɖe dzesideŋkɔ si woŋlɔ vodadatɔe be "Aʋawɔwɔ ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla" fia.

claim: Le April 2026 ƒe nuwuwu la, Minnesota Sewɔtakpekpe me Demokrasitɔwo da asi ɖe edzi kple susu ɖeka be yewoatsi tre ɖe ame kukuwo ɖeɖeɖa le dukɔa ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me ŋu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Minnesota Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo da asi ɖe ɖɔɖɔɖo aɖe si abia be woaɖe atikemawɔla siwo ku ɖa le dukɔa ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me la ŋu. Ame siwo ku la mele dukɔa ƒe ŋkɔ siwo woŋlɔ ɖi vevie, siwo dze ada akɔ la dome o. Wode dzesi wo be "ame kuku" le ɖoɖoa me, si ɖea wo ɖa le amesiwo dze ƒe ŋkɔwo me. Nutoa me kple dukɔa ƒe tiatiawɔha ƒe amegãwo zãa atikemawɔla si ku ƒe nuŋlɔɖi le ɖoɖoa me tsɔ léa ame siwo dze agbagba be yewoada akɔ alo aŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ to atikemawɔla kuku ƒe dzesidenu zazã me. Le April 2026 ƒe nuwuwu la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be Minnesota State Democratic sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo "ɖeko" tsi tre ɖe ame kukuwo ɖeɖeɖa le dukɔa ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me ŋu kple susu ɖeka. X zãla ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be nyametsotsoa fia be ehiã be woada asi ɖe SAVE America Act, si nye se si ade atikemawɔlawo ƒe dzesidede nudidi sesẽwo dzi le dukɔa me godoo. Zãla la ŋlɔ bena: "Ðeko MN Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo da asi ɖe edzi kple susu ɖeka be yewoatsi tre ɖe ame kukuwo ɖeɖeɖa le MN ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me ŋu. Ɣeyiɣia de be woada asi ɖe SAVE America Sea dzi." Edze abe aɖaŋuɖoɖo si le nyatakakaa me enye be Democratic-dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ siwo le Minnesota da asi ɖe edzi be yewoana ame kukuwo nanɔ atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me be woate ŋu aɖe mɔ na amewo be woada akɔ ɖe yewo teƒe ene — si le fefem ɖe Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe nukpɔsusu si wòɖe ɖa enuenu be ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖea me tɔwo ƒe ametafatafa si wowɔ le ɖoɖo nu la ɖe fu na wo eye, le esia ta, ehiã be dziɖuɖumegãwo nawɔ se aɖe atsɔ axe mɔ ɖe etsɔme tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe alakpadada nu. Nya la kaka ɖe Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe) hã dzi eye Snopes nuxlẽlawo ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoanya nenye be nyateƒee. Minnesota ƒe dukɔ bliboa me atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖo si nye nuŋlɔɖi yeye si wowɔna edziedzi na amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me le nutoa me kple "atikewɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo," siwo fia zi geɖe la, amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me vevie, siwo dze la ƒe ŋkɔwo. Edze abe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo tɔtɔ ame eveawo ene. Kpuie ko la, Minnesota Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo tsi tre ɖe ame kukuwo ɖeɖeɖa le woƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me ŋu le April 2026 ƒe nuwuwu nyateƒe. Gake ɖoɖo ma mesɔ kple dukɔa ƒe ame siwo dze ƒe ŋkɔwo ƒe ŋkɔwo o. Demokrasitɔwo ƒe dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo medze agbagba be yewoana ame kukuwo nanɔ ame siwo dze ada akɔ la ƒe ŋkɔwo me o; ke boŋ woda akɔ be woana woanɔ atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me be ame bubu aɖeke nagadze agbagba be yeazã dzesidegbalẽvi ma atsɔ aŋlɔ ŋkɔ o. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyatakaka vavã kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Le April 23 lia dzi la, Minnesota Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Demokrasitɔwo da asi ɖe edzi (Axa 28) ɖɔɖɔɖo aɖe si Republicantɔwo ƒe sewɔlawo dze agbagba be yewoatsɔ akpe ɖe sewɔtakpekpea ƒe se SF 4223. Sea ku ɖe akɔdada ƒe gazazã kple se siwo wowɔ na ame siwo di be yewoaxɔ ɖoƒea ŋu akpa gãtɔ gake etsɔ akpa aɖe hã na tiatiawɔblɔɖe dzikpɔkpɔ. Republicantɔwo ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo si wodo ɖa la ana woatsɔ akpa kpui eve ade tiatiawɔnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe akpaa me hafi. Akpa gbãtɔ di be yeaɖe atikemawɔla kukuwo ɖa le atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me: "Wotrɔ asi le Akpa 1. Minnesota Sewo 2024, akpa 201.13, ŋu to mama sue aɖe tsɔtsɔ kpee me be: Subd. 2a. Ame kukuwo ɖeɖeɖa. Ele be nutome ƒe agbalẽdzikpɔla naɖe atikemawɔla aɖe ɖa le atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me le nuto bliboa me le esi wòtrɔ atikemawɔla ƒe nɔnɔme wòzu "deceased." ŊKEKE si woadze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme. Akpa sia adze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le ŋkeke si kplɔ se mamlɛtɔ si wowɔ ɖo dzi." Evelia di be yeakpɔ egbɔ be woɖe atikemawɔla siwo ku la ɖa le atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me hafi June 1, 2027 naɖo: "Sec. 19. AMETIATIA SIWO KU ÐE AME SIWO GBƆNA. Ele be nutome ƒe agbalẽdzikpɔla naɖe atikemawɔla siwo katã si "ku" ƒe ɖoƒe le ɖa le dukɔa me godoo ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me hafi June 1, 2027 naɖo. ŊKEKE SI WOAdze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le ŋkeke mamlɛtɔ si kplɔe ɖo dzi sedede." Ðɔɖɔɖo si wodo ɖa ƒe fli mamlɛtɔ de dzesii be nyametsotsoa "meɖu dzi o" eye, le esia ta, "womeda asi ɖe edzi o." Le Minnesota ƒe se si li fifia nu la, wobia tso nutome ƒe agbalẽdzikpɔlawo si be woatrɔ atikemawɔla kuku ƒe nɔnɔme wòazu "ame kuku" le dukɔa me katã ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me. Sea meƒo nu tso alesi woate ŋu aɖe atikemawɔla si ku la ɖa le ɖoɖoa me ŋu o. Minnesota ƒe se megblɔ nusi wòfia ne wotrɔ atikemawɔla ƒe nɔnɔme wòzu "ame kuku" le ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me, si wotu ɖe dukɔa ƒe se siwo li fifia ƒe dzesi dzi o. Dukɔa ƒe nyatakaka ƒe axa ɖeka gblɔ tɔtɔtɔe be woɖe atikemawɔla siwo ku la ɖa le ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖoa me xoxo (Kpɔ "Kuwo" le akpa si nye "Do ŋgɔ na Tiatiawɔgbe" me). Esia le alea elabena dukɔa hea eƒe ame siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na vevie, siwo dze, siwo woyɔna zi geɖe be atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo ƒe ŋkɔwo, tso dukɔa me katã ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɖoɖo sia me, gake menye nya ɖesiaɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe ɖoɖoa me lae yia ŋkɔ mawo dzi o. Peter Bartz-Gallagher, si nye kadododzikpɔla le Minnesota ƒe dɔwɔƒe si kpɔa...

claim: "South Africatɔ miliɔn 12.4 nye dɔmawɔlawo." – Mmusi Maimane ƒe ŋkɔ
evidence: Míelé ŋku ɖe dukplɔla la ƒe nya atɔ̃ siwo wògblɔ tso ganyawo ŋu la ŋu, eye wo katã sɔ. Ramaphosa nɔ ga la dzi ne wole nu ƒom tso GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi nyui ŋu, dukɔae ƒe ga ƒe asixɔxɔ bɔbɔ wu le ƒe 20 me eye deme kple gadodo ƒe gazazãwo ɖiɖi. Nya atɔ̃ siwo hamevi siwo tso dunyahehe ƒe akpa vovovowo gblɔ tso dɔmakpɔwɔe ŋu la katã sɔ, alo wogogo. Democratic Alliance ƒe amegã John Steenhuisen tɔ dzɔ be dɔmakpɔwɔe le eƒe ɖoƒe si bɔbɔ wu le ƒe atɔ̃ me, gake eƒe dɔwɔhatiwo ɖee fia be esia gakpɔtɔ na South Africatɔ miliɔn 12.4 nye dɔmakpɔwɔe, siwo dome South Africatɔ ameyibɔ 35.8% hã le. uMkhonto weSizwe Dunyaheha me tɔ eve da ƒu le South Africa ƒe amewo ƒe dzidziɖedzi kabakaba wu eƒe ganyawo ŋu eye wotɔtɔ aƒe siwo me nuɖuɖu mele o ƒe xexlẽme kple ame ɖekaɖekawo, si wɔe be womate ŋu aka ɖe woƒe xexlẽme dzi o. Le February 2026 me la, South Africa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo (sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo) ƒo ƒu be yewoase dukplɔla Cyril Ramaphosa ƒe ƒe sia ƒe ƒe dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti nuƒo , alo Sona. Le eme la, egblɔ be dukɔa sẽ ŋu wu ƒe ɖeka si do ŋgɔ, eye wòfia asi dzesi geɖe siwo fia be ganyawo le nyonyom ɖe edzi. Ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo megbe la, sewɔtakpekpe me tɔwo gakpe ta ake be yewoahe nya le dukplɔla la ƒe nuƒoa ŋu. Ame aɖewo da asi ɖe Ramaphosa ƒe ŋgɔyiyi ƒe nyawo dzi, eye wogblɔ be South Africa "trɔ dzogoe aɖe". Gake ame bubuwo ɖee fia be kuxiwo gakpɔtɔ li, vevietɔ dɔmakpɔwɔe kple ahedada . Le nyatakaka sia me la, míelé ŋku ɖe kpeɖodzi siwo sewɔtakpekpe me nɔlawo tsɔ ɖo kpe woƒe nyaʋiʋliwo dzi ŋu nyuie si, le xexeame katã ƒe ganyawo ƒe tɔtɔ si le edzi yim fifia le United States kple Israel ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Iran ŋu ta la, fifia ese le eɖokui me abe ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia ene. South Africa ƒe ganyawo gbɔ kpɔla lɔ̃ ɖe edzi nenema, eye wògblɔ be yeƒe akɔntabubuwo "yi" le nyateƒe me le dzrehehea ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe. Ganyawo Dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa , alo GDP, nye adzɔnuwo kple dɔwɔna siwo wowɔ le dukɔ aɖe me ƒe asixɔxɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖe me, zi geɖe la, ƒe ɖeka. Nyatakaka siwo tso dukɔa ƒe akɔntabubudɔwɔƒe si nye Statistics South Africa , gbɔ ɖo kpe dukplɔla la ƒe nya dzi. Woŋlɔ dzidziɖedzi nyui tso ƒe 2024 ƒe ɣleti enelia me.Tɔtrɔ le alafa me ƒe akpa enelia Q3 2024 -0.3% Q4 2024 0.4% Q1 2025 0.1% Q2 2025 0.9% Q3 2025 0.5% Dzɔtsoƒe: Stats SA, constant 2015 prices, seasonally adjusted. Woɖe ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti enelia ƒe nyatakakawo ɖe go le March 2026 me eye woɖee fia be GDP gadzi ɖe edzi 0.4%. Asitsatsa kple Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Ðoɖowo Ŋuti Numekuku (TIPS), si nye ganyawo ŋuti numekuku dɔwɔƒe si le Pretoria gblɔ be GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi sia tsi tre ɖi na "trɔtrɔ yi ganyawo ƒe ŋgɔyiyi si li ke vie gbɔ", togbɔ be agbɔsɔsɔa gakpɔtɔ le sue le xexeame katã ƒe dzidzenuwo nu hã. Menye sewɔtakpekpe me nɔlawo katãe lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be ganyawo ƒe nɔnɔme nyo o. MP for the uMkhonto weSizwe (MK) Party , Des van Rooyen , amesi hã wɔ dɔ ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe abe ganyawo ƒe dziɖuɖumegã ene le ƒe 2015 me, gblɔ be GDP ƒe dzidziɖedzi nyitsɔ laa nye "sue" eye be "ne dukɔ aɖe ƒe ganyawo tsi blewu wu eƒe amewo la, mele ŋgɔ yim o". Neva Makgetla , si nye gaŋutinunyala gã aɖe le TIPS gblɔ na Africa Check be "ne GDP le dzidzim ɖe edzi blewu wu amewo ƒe dzidziɖedzi la, ekema le gɔmesese nu la, gakpɔkpɔ gbãtɔ le ɖiɖim". Egblɔ be nyatakaka siwo tso South Africa ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ɖee fia be GDP na ame ɖeka ɖiɖi le ƒe 2014 kple 2024. Egblɔ kpee be GDP dzi ɖe edzi 1.9% vaseɖe ƒe etɔ̃lia ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃lia me. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, Stats SA ƒe ƒe domedome ƒe amewo ƒe xexlẽme ƒe akɔntabubu ɖee fia be amewo ƒe dzidziɖedzi 1.2% tso ƒe 2024 va ɖo ƒe 2025 . Makgetla gblɔ be: "Ne míekekee ɖe enu la, GDP si ame ɖeka xɔna la dzi ɖe edzi le ƒea me va ɖo ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃lia me." Nyatakaka siwo woxɔ le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti enelia me ɖo kpe edzi be nenema kee wòle le ɣletigbalẽ ƒe bliboa me. Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ eve gbugbɔ Ramaphosa ƒe nya la gblɔ le nyaʋiʋliawo me: John Steenhuisen si le Democratic Alliance (DA) me kple Khusela Sangoni si le African National Congress (ANC) me. Nu vevitɔ si wotsɔ dzidzea ga ƒe asixɔxɔe nye nuƒlelawo ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe dzesi (CPI), si ɖea alesi adzɔnu siwo woƒlena zi geɖe ƒe asiwo trɔna le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe fiana. CPI ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme trɔna le ƒea me, eyata ɣleti aɖewo nɔ anyi le ƒe 20 siwo va yi me esime ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ɖiɖi wu ɣeyiɣi ɖesiaɖe le ƒe 2025. Mɔ nyuitɔ si dzi woato atsɔ ga ƒe asixɔxɔ asɔ kple wo nɔewoe nye be woazã CPI ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme le mama dedie nu hena ƒe ɖeka. Esia dzidzea nuwo ƒe asi ƒe tɔtrɔ le mama dedie nu le ɣleti 12 me ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ɣleti mawo ke le ƒe si do ŋgɔ me. CPI ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme le mama dedie nu le ƒe 2025 me nye 3.2%. Ƒe mamlɛtɔ si me mamã dedie si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi wu la nye ƒe 2004, le 1.4%, togbɔ be ƒe 2020 gogo hã, le 3.3%. Esia ɖe dzesi wu alesi wòdze le gɔmedzedzea me. Ne míeɖe ƒe 2004 ɖa la, zi mamlɛtɔ si CPI ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme le mama dedie nu ɖiɖi va anyi wu 3.2% enye ƒe 1969 (3.0%). Nu vevi bubu si wotsɔ dzidzea ga ƒe asixɔxɔe nye nusiwo wowɔ ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe dzesi (PPI). Abe CPI ene la, edzidzea adzɔnu babla ɖeka ƒe asi, gake eléa ŋku ɖe ga home si adzɔnuwo wɔlawo xɔna ŋu tsɔ wu be wòalé ŋku ɖe ga home si woaxɔ le nuwuwu ŋu

claim: Lifi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si me afɔku le le Stanley tumblers me si ate ŋu ana aɖi nazu lead ne wozãe le mɔ nyuitɔ nu.
evidence: Stanley tumblers kpɔ dzidziɖedzi gã aɖe le amewo ƒe lɔlɔ̃ me to hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nɔnɔmewo kple asitsatsa ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi. Nyabiasewo do mo ɖa ku ɖe woƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu, vevietɔ ku ɖe lifi si le eme ŋu. Le ƒe 2024 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe numedzodzrowo ku ɖe lifi ƒe anyinɔnɔ le tumblers siawo me ŋu, eye wogblɔ nya vovovowo tso afɔku siwo ate ŋu ado tso lãmesẽ me ŋu. Esia na woƒo nu tso atike la ƒe dedienɔnɔ kple eƒe wɔwɔme ŋu le dutoƒo. Míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ɖee fia be togbɔ be lifi sue aɖe le Stanley tumblers me le woƒe xɔtutu me hã la, dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le wo ɖokui si ɖee fia be afɔku sue aɖe koe le wo zazã me.  Social Media Claim Facebook zãlawo gblɔ be Stanley kpluwo nye afɔku le lifi si le wo tutu me ta, si fia be woate ŋu ahe aɖi si me lifi le vɛ.  Dzɔtsoƒe | Nudzraɖoƒe ƒe Dzɔtsoƒe | Nudzraɖoƒe Nya siawo kaka ɖe amewo dome, eye ezãla geɖe ɖe woƒe dzitsitsi ɖe Stanley tumblers zazã alo nunana nana ŋu gblɔ.  Nyateƒenyawo Kpɔkpɔ Ẽ, Lifi Le Stanley Tumblers me, gake Wotree Ðe Edzi Enye nyateƒe be Stanley zãa lifi sue aɖe le vacuum insulation ƒe dɔwɔwɔ me. Etɔxɛe la, wozãa lifi ƒe ƒuƒoƒo tsɔ xea teƒe si le tumbler la ƒe gakpo si mexɔ dzo o ƒe ememe kple egodo dome. Wozãa adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ ƒe mɔnu sia geɖe le dɔwɔƒea ƒe geɖe elabena lifi ƒe ʋeʋẽ mebɔ o eye wòkekena ɖe enu le mɔ si kpena ɖe ame ŋu be woawɔ dzoxɔxɔ ƒe nutrenu si ŋu kakaɖedzi le Gake lifi la medzena na ezãlawo o. Enɔa tumbler la gɔme, eye wòdidi tso eme si me ahanono le la gbɔ.  Negbe ɖe wogbã nutsyɔnu si le ete alo ɖee ɖa ko hafi afɔku aɖeke mele eme be wòaka lifi si wotsɔ ƒoe la ŋu o.  Dodokpɔwo Ðe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Afɔku Sue Fia Dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le wo ɖokui si siwo ŋu EPA da asi ɖo ɖo kpe edzi be le nɔnɔme sesẽwo gɔ̃ hã me (e.g. acidic environments) la, lifi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si woɖe tso Stanley tumblers me la mede California ƒe Proposition 65 ƒe dedienɔnɔ ƒe seɖoƒewo nu kura o. Le nuwɔna me la, esia fia be gbesiagbe zazã mena ezãlawo nakpɔ lifi alo cadmium ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si me afɔku le o.  Lãmesẽŋutinunyalawo, siwo dome Harvard kple Nebraska Atikewɔwɔ hã le, te gbe ɖe edzi be nuƒlelawo ate ŋu ayi edzi azã woƒe Stanley kpluwo dedie, nenye be gɔmeɖoanyia gakpɔtɔ li ko.  Gake ne gɔmeɖoanyia gblẽ eye kpe gbadzɛa va le dzedzem la, ele be ezãlawo nadzudzɔ kplu la zazã enumake eye woate ɖe dɔwɔƒea ŋu be woaxɔ ɖe eteƒe.  Dodokpɔ si Consumer Reports kple Lead Safe Mama LLC wɔ le wo ɖokui si kpɔ lifi le nutrenu si le Stanley Quencher tumblers ƒe ete ƒe abɔta te. Stanley ɖo kpe esia dzi gake ete gbe ɖe edzi be wotrea lifi la nu be wòagaka ɖe ezãlawo alo ahanono aɖeke dzi le ezãm le mɔ nyuitɔ nu o. Gake ne ete ƒe abɔta do eye wòɖe nusi wotsɔ wɔe la ɖe go la, dzudzɔ tumbler la zazã enumake eye nàte ɖe Stanley ŋu be woaɖɔlii femaxee le woƒe agbenɔɣi katã ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ te. Be nànɔ dedie la, wɔ ɖe atike la ƒe kɔklɔ ŋuti mɔfiamewo dzi, zã nufamɔ̃ ne wò mɔ̃a ɖe mɔ, alo klɔ asi nyuie be màgblẽ nu le eƒe gɔme si wotu nu ɖo ŋu o.  DIY Lead Tests Are Not Reliable Togbɔ be DIY lead test kits li bɔbɔe eye wòdze abe egbɔkpɔnu si sɔ ene hã la, numekukuwo ɖee fia be kakaɖedzi mele wo ŋu boo o. U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) kpɔe be zi geɖe la, dɔwɔnu siawo naa nu siwo mesɔ o dona tso eme, womete ŋu dea dzesi lifi ne ele eme o (aʋatsonya manyomanyowo) alo woɖea lifi fiana ne ɖeke mele eme o (aʋatsonya nyuiwo). Seɖoƒe geɖe le dɔwɔnu siawo ŋu: ɖewohĩ womedea dzesi lifi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si mesɔ gbɔ o si ate ŋu anye afɔku kokoko o, wodoa nusiwo le anyigba dzi ko kpɔ tsɔ wu be woado nusiwo goglo wu kpɔ, eye nu bubuwo ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe woƒe emetsonuwo dzi. Togbɔ be EPA da asi ɖe dɔwɔnuwo dzi gɔ̃ hã, togbɔ be wosɔ pɛpɛpɛ wu hã la, womewɔa bometsinu o eye wòhiã be woazã wo pɛpɛpɛ hafi woakpɔ emetsonu siwo sɔ.  Le gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ siawo ta la, lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nunyalawo kple dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo kafui vevie be woawɔ dodokpɔ le nudokpɔƒe si nye dɔnyala bibiwo be eya koe nye mɔnu ɖeka kolia si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si dzi woato ade dzesi lifi le nuzazãwo me (Source: Airsafe, PubMed).  Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Nuŋlɔɖi Kple Sedede ƒe Nɔnɔme Fifia Vaseɖe June 2025 me la, womegblɔ be aɖi si me lifi le si do ƒome kple Stanley tumblers la dzɔ o, eye womegayɔ ame aɖeke le lifi ta o. Senyawo koe nye nenye be Stanley na asisiwo nya nyuie tso lifi ƒe anyinɔnɔ le woƒe adzɔnuwo me ŋu, ke menye le nusi agblẽ nu le nuƒlelawo ŋu ŋutɔŋutɔ ŋu o. (Source) Stanley ƒe Lead Statement Stanley ɖo kpe edzi be yewozãa lead pellet le yewoƒe wɔwɔme me tsɔ xea vacuum insulation si le yewoƒe nutovɛwo ƒe gɔme. Le dɔwɔƒea ƒe nya nu la, esia nye dɔwɔƒea ƒe nuwɔna si wowɔna ɖaa si kpena ɖe ame ŋu be dzoxɔxɔ dzi kpɔkpɔ nanɔ anyi. Wotsɔ gakpo si mexɔ dzo o si kpɔa ame ta si xea mɔ na lifi la tsyɔa lifi la dzi

claim: Sunil Gavaskar gblɔ be "Virat Kohli xɔ hehe ɖe Anushka [Sharma] ƒe bɔlwo ŋu le mɔxexeɖedɔa me ko".
evidence: Anushka Sharma, India ƒe bɔlƒoha ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Virat Kohli srɔ̃ ɖe ɖeklemi Sunil Gavaskar le eƒe nyagbɔgblɔ si ‘melɔ̃a nu o’ le Yawoɖagbe eye ‘wòtso srɔ̃nyɔnu nu ɖe ​​srɔ̃a ƒe fefea ta’ ta. Le Instagram ŋutinya aɖe si woda ɖe afisia le ŋkeke si kplɔ Kohli ƒe ƒuƒoƒo, Royal Challengers Bangalore, ƒe IPL hoʋiʋli aɖe si me woɖu Kings XI Punjab dzi bliboe ɖo me la, Sharma tsɔ tsitretsiɖeŋu ɖe numeɖeɖea ƒe akpa aɖe si me Gavaskar nɔ nu ƒom tso Kohli ƒe kamedede ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ ŋu kple eƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ nyameɖela Aakash Chopra. Gavaskar gblɔ be 'Mɔnukpɔkpɔ mesu esi be wòawɔ kamedede si nèhiã o... Eye le lockdown me la, ɖeko wòwɔ kamedede ɖe Anushka ƒe bowling ŋu abe alesi wokpɔe le video ma me ene.' Ema masɔ gbɔ o.’ Gavaskar nɔ nu ƒom tso video klipi aɖe si kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le mɔxexeɖedɔa me ŋu afisi aƒelika aɖe da tu Kohli wòdze ŋgɔ ƒuƒu tso Sharma gbɔ le woƒe aƒea ƒe akpata dzi.

claim: Le Michigan Dziɖuɖumegã Gretchen Whitmer ƒe dziɖuɣi la, “ƒome ʋɛ aɖewo koe da ahe” wu esiwo le ƒome si do ŋgɔ nɛ ƒe dziɖuɣi.
evidence: Michigan Dziɖuɖumegã Gretchen Whitmer, si ate ŋu anye Democrattɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala, ŋlɔ nu tso nusiwo wòwɔ ŋu nyitsɔ laa esi wòge ɖe eƒe ƒe mamlɛtɔ me le dukɔa kplɔm. "Míaƒe mɔnu la na nu ɖedzesi aɖewo do tso eme," Whitmer ŋlɔ le Feb. 2 Substack entry me. "Do ŋgɔ na K, nutoa me kɔledzi, kple sukunuɖuɖu femaxee na amesiame. Ƒome ʋɛ aɖewo koe le ahedada me." Eƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ƒo nu tso Amerikatɔwo ƒe dzitsitsi ɖe gazazã ŋu, si ate ŋu anye nya vevi aɖe na atikemawɔlawo le titinatiatiawɔɣia me, si me U.S. Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe hoʋiʋli si me hoʋiʋli le le Michigan hã le. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe ŋugbedodo be yeaɖe nuɖuɖudzraƒewo, ʋuwo kple nu bubuwo ƒe asiwo dzi akpɔtɔ la tsi míaƒe MAGA-Meter, si léa ŋku ɖe eƒe akɔdada ƒe ŋugbedodowo ŋu. Michigan ƒe ahedada dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ le Whitmer ƒe dziɖuɣi. Dzidzedzea ɖe dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔmewo fia, eye ɖiɖia ƒe akpa gãtɔ dze egɔme le amesi do ŋgɔ nɛ ƒe dziɖuɣi. Whitmer ƒe nyanuɖela he susu yi afɔɖeɖe siwo wowɔ tsɔ tsi tre ɖe ahedada ŋu le eƒe dziɖuɣi dzi be eya gbɔe wòtso be ahedadaa dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ. Eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be nu geɖewoe kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi, ke menye nutodziɖula ɖeka ƒe ɖoɖowo koe o. Whitmer nɔ nu ƒom tso ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le dukɔa me ƒe ɖiɖi ŋu ne wotsɔe sɔ kple nusi wònyi tso amesi do ŋgɔ nɛ, Republican Dukplɔla Rick Snyder gbɔ, Whitmer ƒe dunyahehe ƒe aɖaŋuɖola gblɔ na PolitiFact. Le ƒe 2011 me, esime Snyder va xɔ zi dzi la, Michigan nɔlawo ƒe 17% lɔƒo da ahe. Eɖo eƒe kɔkɔƒe va ɖo 17.5% le ƒe 2012 me, emegbe eɖiɖi va ɖo 14% le Snyder ƒe ƒe mamlɛtɔ si wòtsɔ nɔ zi dzi le ƒe 2018 me, le U.S. Census Bureau ƒe nyatakaka siwo ŋu KFF, si nye lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nuŋububuha si mewɔa akpa aɖeke o, ku nu me. Le Whitmer ƒe dziɖuɣi, si dze egɔme le ƒe 2019 me la, agbɔsɔsɔa nɔ 13.1% va ɖo 13.5% dome le ƒe 2024 me, si nye ƒe mamlɛtɔ si li. (Ƒe 2020 ƒe nyatakaka aɖeke meli o le coronavirus dɔvɔ̃a ƒe nyatakakawo nuƒoƒoƒu ƒe tɔtɔ gã aɖe ta.) Kristin S. Seefeldt, si nye Michigan Yunivɛsiti ƒe hadomedɔwo ŋuti nufialagã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ gblɔ be, U.S. Census Bureau ƒe ahedada ƒe dzidzenu si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo la ƒoa aƒe ɖeka ƒe gakpɔkpɔ katã eye wòtsɔnɛ sɔna kple dzidzenu si woɖo na aƒea ƒe lolome kple ƒexɔxɔ. Ne aƒea ƒe fetu mede dzidzenu ma o la, wobua aƒea be ele ahedada me. Eŋutinunyala geɖewo gblɔ be threshold la do xoxo, gake wogazãnɛ le afisiafi. U.S. Amexexlẽ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe ahedada ƒe dzidzenu si woɖo na ƒome si me ame tsitsi eve kple ɖevi ɖeka le le dukɔa me godoo nye dɔlar 25,249 le ƒe 2024. Zi geɖe la, ga homewoe nyea tɔtrɔwo ƒe dzidzenu si ŋu viɖe le wu elabena wobua amewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ ŋu. Ke hã, le xexlẽme dzro aɖe ko me la, ame geɖe da ahe le Michigan (kple dukɔa) le ƒe 2024 me wu ƒe 2019. Le Michigan la, ahedada anɔ abe miliɔn 1.28 ene le ƒe 2019 me eye miliɔn 1.34 le ƒe 2024. Gake ne wotsɔ ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme sɔ kple wo nɔewo le nutodziɖula eve ƒe kpɔkplɔ te la, mefia nɔnɔmetata blibo o. Michigan ƒe ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si le ɖiɖim le Whitmer kple Snyder siaa ƒe dziɖuɣi sɔ kple dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔme. Dukɔa ƒe ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nye 15.9% le ƒe 2011 me eye wòɖiɖi le ƒe akpa gãtɔ me, eye wòwu enu ɖe 12.1% le ƒe 2024. Le ganyawo ƒe toɖeɖe me la, Michigan dina be yeadze afɔku vevie eye wòato ganyawo ƒe toɖeɖe ɖe anyi didi wu dukɔ siwo te ɖe eŋu gɔ̃ hã, vevietɔ le esi wòtrɔ tso ganya si wotu ɖe adzɔnuwo dzi yi ganya si wotu ɖe subɔsubɔdɔ dzi gbɔ ta, Nicholas Hess kple Patrick Schaefer le Michigan League for Public Policy, si nye ɖoɖowɔha si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o. Zi geɖe la, ema nana dukɔa ƒe ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzina ɖe edzi wu dukɔa ƒe mamã dedie. Zi geɖe la, vovototo nɔa ganyawo ƒe sesẽ ƒe nuwuwu kple ahedada ƒe ɖiɖi dome. Seefeldt gblɔ be: "Ame ateŋu aʋli nya be le Ganyawo ƒe Sesẽ Gã (si nye ƒe 2008 kple 2009) ta la, Snyder ƒe dziɖuɖua nɔ gɔmedzedze si to vovo kura." "Alo, ame aɖe ateŋu agblɔ be Snyder mewɔ nusi sɔ gbɔ be wòaɖe ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi akpɔtɔ esime ganyawo le nyonyom o. Gake nɔnɔme ƒe nyatakakawo ɖeɖe meɖe mɔ na mí be míagblɔ wo dometɔ aɖeke kakaɖedzitɔe o." Charles L. Ballard, si nye Michigan Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti ƒe gaŋutinunyafialagã si woɖe le dɔ me gblɔ be ele be woatsɔ dzeku geɖe awɔ ahedada ƒe afɔɖeɖewo. Ballard gblɔ be: "Michigan ƒe ganyawo ƒe ŋutinya gã ŋutɔŋutɔe nye ŋutinya si xɔ ɣeyiɣi didi wu be Michigan ƒe ganyawo bu anyigba ne wotsɔe sɔ kple dukɔa ƒe mamã dedie." "Esia do ƒome vevie kple adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ ƒe ɖiɖi le agbɔsɔsɔ me, kple ʋuwo ƒe dɔwɔƒea koŋ." Whitmer metrɔ asi le ɖiɖi ma ŋu o, Ballard gblɔ, gake amesiwo do ŋgɔ nɛ, Republicantɔwo alo Democrattɔwo hã metrɔe o. Whitmer ƒe nyanuɖela he susu yi nusiwo nutodziɖula la wɔ le eƒe dziɖuɣi be yeakpe ɖe amesiwo mekpɔa ga boo o ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye adzɔ si woxena ɖe ga si wokpɔna ta dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ zi gbɔ zi atɔ̃; keke pre-K ɖe enu na amesiame; ɖeviwo dzi kpɔkpɔ si ŋu asixɔxɔ le kekem ɖe enu; gadede Rx Kids, si nye ɖeviwo ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe me, le dukɔa ƒe gazazã yeyetɔ me; dedienɔnɔ fr

claim: Macy’s nɔ tetre ɖe eƒe Akpedada ƒe atsyã si wowɔ le New York City le ƒe 2025 me la me elabena Dumegã si wotia, Zohran Mamdani di be yeaxɔ dɔlar biliɔn 10 le fiase gã la si be wòazã Fifth Avenue.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Esi Zohran Mamdani ɖu dzi le New York City ƒe dudzikpɔla ƒe tiatia me le November 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe te kaka le Internet dzi be Macy’s le tetre ɖe eƒe ƒe sia ƒe Akpedada ƒe atsyãwo me elabena dudzikpɔla si wotia la di be yeabia dɔlar miliɔn 10 tso fiase gã la si be wòazã Fifth Avenue. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Macy ƒe amegã Joseph A Barron gblɔ be: "Dudzikpɔla Tiatia Mamdani di be míaxe dɔlar miliɔn 10 atsɔ ahaya 5th Avenue gaƒoƒo etɔ̃, ahiã be míaxɔ ga le amewo ƒe gege ɖe eme ta." Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe nyatakakaa me gblɔ kpee be wogblɔ be dɔdzikpɔlagã la gblɔ be "eƒe ŋku gbã keŋkeŋ" le aɖaŋuɖoɖoa ta, si ALLOD ɖɔ be enye "ɖoɖo si wowɔ be woatrɔ ƒe sia ƒe ƒe Akpedada ƒe Atsyã la wòazu gadodo na [Mamdani ƒe] sosialist dɔwo." Nya si wotsɔ pinned le nya la te gblɔ be Barron ƒe nyanuɖela hã dzɔ be enye Joe Barron, si gatɔtɔ nya la ɖe edzi: "Aparade la va ɖiɖi 6th," Joe Barron ƒe Nyanuɖela, amesi hã dzɔ be enye Joe Barron gblɔ, "Eyata ɖe esia le abe...kickback ƒomevi aɖe ko enea? Abe 'Hey...yo...na duffle bag si yɔ fũ kple ga mí na 5th eye míagbã wò afɔwo' ƒomevi o nu?" ALLOD hã da Facebook Reel ma tɔgbe si ƒo amewo ƒe lɔlɔ̃nu siwo wu 15,000 nu ƒu vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm. Edze abe nuxlẽla aɖewo ɖe nya sia gɔme be enye nyateƒenya si wogblɔ tso agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo ŋu ene, gake didi zi geɖe le Internet dzi mekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be Macy’s te fli ɖe eƒe aʋawɔnuwo ɖeɖefia me o. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, gaƒoɖokui aɖe nɔ fiasea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea si woxlẽa nudzɔdzɔa, si ɖee fia be woɖoe be wòayi edzi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Ke boŋ ALLOD, si gblɔ tso eƒe emetsonuwo ŋu be enye fewuɖunyawo gbɔe nyaʋiʋlia dzɔ tso. Eƒe Facebook Intro ɖe adzɔgbeɖeɖe ƒe nyatakaka aɖe fia si xlẽ be: "ALLOD ƒe ʋukuku kple nyatakaka gbegblẽwo ƒe kadodo ƒe aflaga. Naneke mele axa sia dzi nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ o." "Satire" ƒe dzesi hã nɔ eƒe meme la me le ete le ɖusime. ALLOD ƒe ŋutinya le ŋutinyawo wɔwɔ me hena gomekpɔkpɔ kple nyaŋuɖoɖowo. Le Macy ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si ɖee fia be wɔnaa gakpɔtɔ le edzi yim ɖeɖeko megbe la, kpeɖodzi bubu geɖewo hã nɔ anyi siwo ɖee fia be alakpae ŋutinyaa nye. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Mamdani maxɔ dudzikpɔla ƒe ɖoƒe o vaseɖe Jan. 1, 2026 dzi; eyata ŋusẽ manɔ esi be wòaxɔ dɔlar miliɔn 10 le Macy si be wòazã Fifth Avenue na ƒe 2025 ƒe Akpedada ƒe atsyã o. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, mɔ si dzi woato awɔ atsyã la melɔ Fifth Avenue ɖe eme o. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, woɖoe be wòadze egɔme le Central Park West le 77th Street, si Amerikatɔwo ƒe Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinya Blemanudzraɖoƒea wɔ. Ekplɔ Central Park West ɖo va ɖo Columbus Circle, emegbe eyi ɣedzeƒe gome le Central Park South eye wòtrɔ ɖe ɖusime le Sixth Avenue, si wogayɔna be Avenue of the Americas dzi. Woɖoe be wòawu enu le 34th Street, le Macy ƒe fiase gã la godo. Mlɔeba la, Macy ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagãe nye Tony Spring, ke menye Joseph A Barron o, abe alesi meme la gblɔe ene. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea yɔ nyakpakpa me ame sia ƒe ŋkɔ le nya bubu geɖe siwo Snopes tsɔ tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu va yi me. Edze abe ŋutsu aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Barron yɔyɔ nye tagbɔsesẽ na ŋkɔ bubu aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump zã esime wònɔ asitsadɔ wɔm le New York City le ƒe 1980-awo me ene. Ɣemaɣi la, Trump yɔa nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ɣeaɖewoɣi wòwɔna abe Trump Habɔbɔ ƒe nyanuɖela ene si ŋkɔe nye John Barron (woŋlɔa ŋkɔ ɣeaɖewoɣi be "Baron"; ŋkɔ bubu si wogblɔ be ezãe nye John Miller). Le ƒe 2018 me la, CNN ma Barron ƒe kaƒoƒoawo dometɔ ɖeka si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi. Snopes lé ŋku ɖe ALLOD ƒe nya gbogbo aɖewo ŋu va yi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya aɖe si wogblɔ tso alesi wogblɔ be ame gbogbo aɖewo ɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le New York Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒea le Mamdani ƒe aʋadziɖuɖu le tiatiawɔɣia megbe ŋu. Le ŋutinya me la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

claim: Punch boso si kpɔ akɔfafa le lã si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe me le esi wogblẽe ɖi le edziɣi megbe ƒe ŋutinya nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le ƒe 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nɔnɔmetata kple video siwo dze abe bosovi aɖe si lé orangutan ƒe fefenu si wotsɔa lãfu wɔe ɖe asi ene la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe internet dzi — siwo dome X, TikTok kple Reddit hã le —gblɔ be "Punch the monkey" dadaa gbe eye wòtsɔ lã si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe la yi ɖatsa be yeafa akɔ na ye. Esi Punch nɔ dzimenyawo hem le xexeame godoo la, Snopes nuxlẽla ɖikelawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea be yewoakpɔe ɖa be ŋutinyaa le se nu hã. Nuxlẽla geɖe di nyatakakawo koŋ ku ɖe nenye be nunya wɔwɔe ye wɔ nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe boso si wogblẽ ɖi la ŋu. Punch bosovi la kple eƒe seselelãme ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe la nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔwo, le Ichikawa Dugã me Lãwo Ƒe Dzɔƒe si le Japan, si nye Punch ƒe nɔƒe vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm la ƒe X nyatakaka (si wodzra ɖo) si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo nu. Lãwo dzikpɔƒea gblɔ be yewoƒe lãwo dzikpɔlawo tsɔ asi nyi boso si woɖe, si nye Japantɔwo ƒe macaque, esi edzilawo gblẽe ɖi vɔ megbe. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Togbɔ be akɔtagbalẽvi si ŋu woɖo kpee le Ichikawa Dua ƒe Lãwo Ƒe Dzɔƒea mele X si fia be enye dziɖuɖua ƒe akɔntabubu o hã la, eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo —si wotsɔ domenyiŋusẽfianu "lg.jp," si wodzra ɖo ɖi na nutodziɖuɖuwo le Japan — doa ka kple X akɔnta si míeyɔ va yi le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe gɔmedzedze, si ɖo kpe akɔntabubua ƒe sedziwɔwɔ dzi. Fotoɖeɖefia ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo abe Getty Images kple nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔ siwo tso xexeame ƒe akpa vovovowo ta Punch kple eƒe orangutan si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe ƒoe ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo kple videowo tso dzogoe vovovowo dzi, si gaɖo kpe ŋutinyaa dzi wu. Feb. 27 ƒe nyatakaka yeye aɖe tso lãwo dzikpɔƒea gblɔ be Punch "yi edzi le agbe kple eƒe fefenu si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe," le auto-translation tso Japangbe me yi Eŋlisigbe me to X ƒe artificial intelligence bot, Grok dzi, togbɔ be Feb. 28 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be "egakpɔtɔ le eƒe adzɔge tso lã siwo wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe gbɔ" gbemagbe hã. Feb. 23 ƒe nya aɖe si Grok hã ɖe gɔme la gblɔ be "wokpɔe wònɔ fefem kple bosovi bubuawo" eye "eyi edzi le dɔ wɔm nyuie." Video bubu siwo dze abe ɖe woɖe Punch fia be boso bubuwo "le hehem" ene la he dziku vɛ na hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla geɖe, gake lãwo dzikpɔƒea ɖe eme le Feb. 19 X ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me be "yewokpɔ mɔ be kuxi sia ate ŋu ado mo ɖa" eye wode dzesii be "boso ɖeka pɛ hã meɖe adãwɔwɔ vevie fia ɖe eŋu o." "Togbɔ be wole ka ƒom na Punch hã la, eɖea tenɔnɔ ɖe nɔnɔme sesẽwo nu kple susu ƒe ŋusẽ fiana. Ne èlé ŋku ɖe tohehe ƒe nuwɔna siawo siwo asrafoha me tɔ bubuwo wɔna ɖe Punch ŋu ne ele agbagba dzem be yeaɖo dze kpli wo la, míadi be nàdo alɔ Punch ƒe agbagbadzedzea tsɔ wu be nàse veve ɖe enu," lãwo dzikpɔƒea ŋlɔ. Anyo hã be míade dzesii be le alesi amewo lé ŋku ɖe Punch ƒe ŋutinya ŋu le afisiafi megbe la, amedzrowo va le lãwo dzikpɔƒea, eye wo dometɔ geɖe da videowo ɖe Internet dzi. Le alesi Punch ƒe ŋutinyaa xɔ ŋkɔe ta la, internet zãlawo hã wɔ Punch ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple video gbogbo aɖewo to nunya wɔwɔe zazã me. Esi wòle alea ta la, míate ŋu aɖo kpe Punch ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple video ɖesiaɖe ƒe sedziwɔwɔ dzi le mía ɖokui si o. Wodzi Punch le July 26, 2025 dzi le Ichikawa City Lãwo Ƒe Dzɔƒe eye wogblɔ be wotsɔ manga, alo Japantɔwo ƒe nukokoedonamegbalẽ aɖe, si woyɔna be "Lupin III" ŋlɔla gbãtɔ ƒe ŋkɔ nae. Japantɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo, abe Eŋlisigbe me gbesiagbe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si nye The Mainichi (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ene ka nya ta be ɖeɖi te Punch dada ŋu le eƒe dzidzi gbãtɔ me le dzomeŋɔli ƒe dzoxɔxɔ me” eye “meɖe dzesi aɖeke fia be ele be lém nɛ o.” Numekulawo gblɔ be macaque vidadawo ƒe gbegblẽ ɖi mebɔ o, gake ate ŋu adzɔ. Ɣeaɖewoɣi koe macaque ŋutsuwo kpɔa macaque vidzĩwo dzi. Mainichi ka nya ta be lãwo dzikpɔlawo te nu vovovo siwo wotsɔ ɖo Punch dada teƒe kpɔ be woawɔ dɔ abe akɔfafa ene, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye afɔkpa siwo woxatsa kple lã vovovo siwo wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe. Punch "lɔ̃" orangutan plush fefenu, si wogblɔ be etso Ikea. Lãwo dzikpɔƒea gblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Feb. 27 dzi be: “Menye ɖeko fefenu si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe wɔe kple afɔkpa siwo ŋu woalé ɖe asi nana la doa ŋusẽ ame be wòalé ɖe vidada ŋu ko o, ke exea mɔ na amegbetɔwo ƒe ŋuɖoɖo ɖe nu ŋu fũu akpa hã.” "Wozãa mɔnu sia na primate bubu siwo wonyi kple asi le míaƒe lãwo dzikpɔƒe, ke menye Japantɔwo ƒe macaquewo ɖeɖeko o." Emegbe lãwo dzikpɔlawo gatsɔe fia lãwo dzikpɔƒea ƒe bosoha mamlɛawo le Jan. 19. Le lãwo dzikpɔƒea ƒe nya nu la, zi geɖe la, Japantɔ macaque vidzĩwo dzea ɣeyiɣi geɖe zazã le adzɔge tso wo dadawo gbɔ abe ɣleti ade ene, gake wogatrɔna ne wole akɔfafa dim alo di be yewoana no. Le Punch gome la, etrɔna yia eƒe fefenu si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe ƒoe la gbɔ "ne ekpɔ afɔku dze sii," gake amegbetɔ dzikpɔlawo naa notsi kple nuɖuɖu. Ichikawa Dua ƒe Lãwo Ƒe Dzɔƒe gblɔ be yewoƒe dɔwɔlawo gbugbɔ lã siwo wotsɔ asi nyi la de ƒuƒoƒo me dzidzedzetɔe va yi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le ƒe 2009 me la, lãwo dzikpɔƒea gaxɔ Japantɔ macaque aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Otome si zã dzata ɣi si wotsɔ nu ƒomevi aɖe ƒo ɖe eƒe m

claim: India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã si li fifia, B. R. Gavai, gbugbɔ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dzesi gbãtɔa ɖo anyi, si me nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ le, si wotrɔ wòzu ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã Chandrachud ƒe dziɖuɣi.
evidence: Nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã tsãtɔ D. Y. Chandrachud ƒe dziɖuɣi la, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ɖɔli eƒe nyagbɔgblɔ tso ‘Satymeva Jayate’ dzi va zu ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’. Egblɔ kpee be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã si li fifia, B. R. Gavai, gbugbɔ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dzesi gbãtɔ si me nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ (afisia, afisia, kple afisia) le la ɖo anyi. Le nyati sia me la, mina míalé ŋku ɖe nya si wogblɔ le nyatakakaa me ŋu.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nya sia ƒe akpa si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Nya si wogblɔ: India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã si li fifia, B. R. Gavai, gbugbɔ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dzesi gbãtɔa ɖo anyi, si me nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ le, si wotrɔ wòzu ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã Chandrachud ƒe dziɖuɣi. Nyateƒenya: Nya si wogblɔ be India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã si li fifia, B. R. Gavai, gbugbɔ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dzesi gbãtɔ si dzi woŋlɔ nya si nye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ ɖo la ɖo anyi la nye alakpa. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ menye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ kpɔ o. Enye 'Yato Dharmastato Jayah' ɣesiaɣi, si gɔme woɖe be "Afisi Dharma le la, aʋadziɖuɖu hã li." Enyo be míade dzesii be le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã D. Y. Chandrachud ƒe dziɖuɣi, le 01 September 2024 dzi, abe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe ƒe 75 xɔxɔ ƒe azãɖuɖu ƒe akpa aɖe ene la, Dukplɔla Droupadi Murmu ɖe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe dzesidenu yeye kple aflaga ɖe go. Ashoka Chakra, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe xɔa, India ƒe Dukplɔse, kple nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ le Devanagari ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo me nɔ dzesi yeyea dzi. esime, dzesi xoxoa ɖe Chakra (Dharma Chakra—woɖe eƒe nɔnɔme tso tasiaɖamfɔ si woɖe fia le Sarnath Dzata Fiadu si le Ashoka ƒe abacus dzi, si me spokes 32 le), si nye India ƒe Dzesi si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo—Ashoka ƒe Dzata ƒe Fiadu, si me Asia dzata ene tsi tre ɖe megbe le—kple nyagbɔgblɔ ma ke, ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’, le Devanagari nuŋɔŋlɔ me. Gake le May 2025 me la, India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ, si le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã B. R. Gavai ƒe kpɔkplɔ te, ɖe gbeƒãe be yewoagbugbɔ dzesidenu si nɔ anyi do ŋgɔ, i.e., esi wozãna do ŋgɔ na September 2024. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le posu me la nye ALAKPA.  To nya vevi siwo sɔ didi me la, míekpɔe be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ menye ‘Satyameva Jayate’ kpɔ o. Enye ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ ɣesiaɣi.  Le didi sia me la, míekpɔe be le September 01, 2024 dzi, abe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe ƒe 75 xɔxɔ ƒe azãɖuɖu ƒe akpa aɖe ene la, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã D. Y. Dzesi blɔ yeye si woto vɛ la ƒe megbe blɔ ɖe Ashoka Chakra, Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe xɔa, India ƒe Dukplɔse, kple nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ si woŋlɔ ɖe Devanagari ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo me fia. To vovo na ema la, dzesidenu si wozã do ŋgɔ, si wozã do ŋgɔ na September 2024 la, nye Dharma Chakra—si ƒe nɔnɔme woɖe tso tasiaɖamfɔ si le Sarnath Dzata Fiadu si le Ashoka ƒe abacus dzi, si me spokes 32 le—India ƒe Dzesi si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo (Ashoka ƒe Dzata ƒe Fiadu, si me Asia dzata ene tsi tre ɖe megbe le), kple nyagbɔgblɔ ma ke, ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’, le Devanagarigbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ.  Ele be míade dzesii be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la D. Y. Chandrachud xɔ India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã 50 lia le November 09, 2022 dzi eye wòɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le November 10, 2024. Esi míelé ŋku ɖe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe ŋu la, míekpɔe be nyagbɔgblɔ si nye ‘Yato Dharmastato Jayah’ nɔ anyi ɣesiaɣi do ŋgɔ na Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Chandrachud ƒe dziɖuɣi gɔ̃ hã (afisia, afisia, kple afisia). Le May 2025 me (afisia, afisia, kple afisia) la, India ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ, le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã B. R. claim: SAVE America Sea “azi Amerikatɔwo dzi be woaŋlɔ ŋkɔ (be woada akɔ) le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume ko, si nye nusi Amerikatɔ 5% koe wɔna egbea."
evidence: Democrattɔwo le avu wɔm vevie kple Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act, alo SAVE America Act, si Republicantɔwo da megbe na, eye wogblɔ be atɔ mɔxenuwo na Amerikatɔ siwo le didim be yewoaŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ alo ada akɔ. Esi Sewɔtakpekpea dze nyaʋiʋli gɔme ŋkeke geɖe tso sea ŋu le March 17 lia dzi la, Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ame Suesuewo ƒe Kplɔla Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., te gbe ɖe kuxi siwo wògblɔ be sea ahe vɛ dzi. Se sia "azi Amerikatɔwo dzi be woaŋlɔ ŋkɔ (be woada akɔ) le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume ko, si nye nusi Amerikatɔ 5% koe wɔna egbea," egblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo. Schumer ƒe nya sɔ be sea abia be woatsɔ dukɔmevinyenye ŋuti kpeɖodzi si woŋlɔ ɖi la afia ame ŋutɔ hafi aŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yeada akɔ. Gake ewɔ vodada le Amerikatɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume ƒe alafa memamã ŋu, le dukɔa ƒe nyatakakawo nu. Dukɔa ƒe numekukuwo ɖee fia be ekɔ wu ema. Esi Dukplɔla Donald Trump kpe asi ɖe eŋu vevie ta la, Aƒea da asi ɖe SAVE America Sea dzi le February me le ƒe geɖe ƒe alakpanyawo kple nya siwo gbɔ eme le akɔdada si menye dukɔmeviwo o ŋu megbe, si nye nusi ƒã hafi wòdzɔna. Sea gblɔ be ame aɖe si le didim be yeaŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yeada akɔ "maŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yeada akɔ le dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe tiatia me o negbe ɖe amesi le biabiam la tsɔ United States dukɔmevinyenye ƒe nuŋlɔɖi si ɖee fia be ye ŋutɔ yeatsɔ ana tiatiawɔla si sɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe" hafi ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi mamlɛa naɖo. Eliza Sweren-Becker, si nye atamkaka ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple tiatiawɔɖoɖo ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla le Brennan ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si le ablɔɖe me gblɔ be menye ame yeye siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme kple amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe nuto yeye me koe nudidi sia awɔ dɔ le o, ke boŋ ame gbogbo aɖewo siwo ate ŋu anye amesiwo mebua wo ɖokui be yewonye ŋkɔ yeyee o hã. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le alesi dukɔ aɖe ɖe sea ƒe gbe gɔmee nu la, ʋuʋu yi nuto yeye aɖe me le nuto aɖe me alo akɔdadaƒe yeye ate ŋu abu be enye atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ yeye eye wòaʋã dukɔmevinyenye ƒe kpeɖodzi ƒe nudidi. Sweren-Becker gblɔ be dukɔwo ƒe nyametsotsowo le alesi woada aƒewo ƒe ʋuʋu ɖe hatsotsowo me akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe nenye be nuŋlɔɖiawo hiã. Egblɔ be sea me mekɔ o hã le amesi dze anye "atikewɔlawo ƒe amegã" ŋu. Ðe ema afia be tiatiawɔlawo koe woawɔa? Alo ɖe ʋudɔwɔƒe aɖe ƒe dɔwɔla — afisi wowɔa akɔdada ƒe ŋkɔ geɖe le — adze? Nyatakaka siwo tso dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaha gbɔ ɖee fia be atikemawɔla siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ƒe alafa memamã sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ wu Schumer ƒe xexlẽme. Schumer ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe gblɔ na PolitiFact be sewɔtakpekpe me tɔa ƒo nu tso nyatakaka aɖe si tso Amerikatɔwo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe si lɔ̃a ablɔɖe gbɔ si zã nyatakaka siwo tso numekuku aɖe si Tiatiawɔha ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaha wɔ le ƒe 2022 me me ŋu. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be atikemawɔlawo ƒe 5.9% ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ le tiatiawɔƒewo. Gake nyatakaka siawo do xoxo eye womede ame ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒe bubuwo kple akɔdadaƒewo o. Ƒe eve ɖesiaɖe la, Tiatiawɔha si Kpena Ðe Tiatiawɔnyawo Ŋu la ƒoa Tiatiawɔnyawo Kple Akɔdada Ŋuti Numekukua nu ƒu. Tata si wota nyitsɔ laa ɖe ƒe 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔɣi ŋuti nyatakakawo fia, eye mɔnu siwo Amerikatɔwo zã tsɔ ŋlɔ ŋkɔ tsɔ da akɔ le ƒe eve siwo do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia hã le eme. Numekukua lé ŋku ɖe mɔ ade ya teti siwo dzi atikemawɔlawo ato aŋlɔ ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ hafi: le tiatiawɔƒewo (6%); le akɔdadaƒewo kple akɔdadaƒewo (2.2%); le dukɔa ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunaƒewo (1%); le nuwɔametɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo (0.1%); le asrafowo ƒe amewo xɔxɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo (0.1%); kple le dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒe bubuwo, abe agbalẽdzraɖoƒewo ene (1.8%). Ne wotsɔ wo katã ƒo ƒui la, esiawo ƒo ƒu va ɖo 11.2%. Matthew Weil, si nye zimenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si kpɔa dziɖuɖunyawo gbɔ le Akpa eve ƒe Ðoɖowɔha, si nye susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ, gblɔ be: “Edze ƒã be amesiwo wu 5% alo 6% siwo yia tiatiawɔƒewo la le ŋkɔ ŋlɔm le wo ɖokui si.” Ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikea me ƒe akpa si lolo wu gɔ̃ hã — 30.7% — tso ʋudɔwɔƒewo gbɔ. Dukɔa ƒe se ɖe mɔ na atikemawɔlawo be woaŋlɔ ŋkɔ atsɔ ada akɔ ne woxɔ ʋukugbalẽvi alo wɔ dɔ bubu siwo ku ɖe ʋu ŋu. (Le atikemawɔla 8.7% bubu gome la, womeŋlɔ ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe mɔnu la ɖi o.) Esi dukɔ aɖewo ɖe mɔ ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me to internet dzi to ʋudɔwɔƒewo dzi, eye dukɔwo ƒe ɖoɖo siwo ku ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ɖe dɔwɔƒe mawo ŋu to vovo ta la, mekɔ o be akpa kae le 30.7% ma me le dzɔdzɔm le ame ŋutɔ me tsɔ wu le internet dzi o. Nyatakakaawo megblɔe tututu o, Tiatiawɔha ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaha ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na PolitiFact. Gake akɔdadadzikpɔlawo gblɔ be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ mawo dometɔ geɖe abia be woava srã wo kpɔ le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume. Eyata ame ŋutɔ ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2024 ƒe tiatia la ƒe alafa memamã nɔ 11% (ne ʋudɔwɔƒewo ƒe ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ katã nɔ Internet dzi, si mate ŋu adzɔ o) kple 42% (ne ʋudɔwɔƒe ɖesiaɖe ƒe kadodo nye ame ŋutɔ tɔ) dome. Numekukua yɔ hatsotso ene siwo mehiã o

claim: NASA ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ke ɖe ɣletinyigba aɖe si le gota si nye "Anyigba si lolo wu" si doa "dzesi wɔnukuwo" ŋu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala siwo zã NASA ƒe Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite ke ɖe ɣletinyigba aɖe si le gota ŋu, si NASA ɖe fia be enye ɣletinyigba ɖesiaɖe si gbɔ míaƒe ɣletinyigbawo ŋu. Ke hã, "dzesi wɔnukuwo" ƒe tɔtrɔ tso nyatakakawo kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe nusi ŋu woke ɖo ŋu, ke menye NASA alo numekula siwo kpɔ gome le eme o. Le nyateƒe me la, "dzesi wɔnuku" siwo wogblɔ be wonye la nye mɔzɔzɔ ƒe dzesi siwo wokpɔna zi geɖe, siwo "ɖea ɣletinyigba si le gota fiana menye le esi míekpɔnɛ tẽ tso kekeli ƒe ƒe geɖe gbɔ ta o, ke boŋ le esi ɣletinyigba si to eƒe ɣletivi ŋgɔ la nana eƒe kekeli doa viviti vie ta," le NASA ƒe nya nu. Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le January 2026 me gblɔ be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo ke ɖe "Anyigba si lolo wu" ŋu le míaƒe ɣe ƒe ɖoɖoa godo. Nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi gblɔ be nusi woyɔna be Anyigba gã si woyɔna be TOI-1846b la didi tso afima gbɔ kekeli ƒe 154 eye wòɖea dzesi "nya ɣaɣla, siwo gbugbɔna" dona. Nya sia gagblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe siwo wogblɔ tso July 2025 me, abe Instagram nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si gblɔ nyatakaka bubuwo tso nusi wogblɔ be woke ɖe eŋu ŋu, si dometɔ aɖewoe nye be ɣletinyigba la "lolo abe Anyigba ƒe teƒe eve ene" eye be wozã NASA ƒe Transiting Exoplanet Survey Satellite tsɔ wɔe. Nyateƒee, nya siwo wogblɔna be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo ke ɖe ɣletinyigba yeye aɖe si le gota ŋu to TESS zazã me la ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye nyateƒe. Numekulawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si le theOukaimeden Observatory le Morocco ye ke ɖe nusi ŋu woke ɖo ŋu si "da asi ɖe TOI-1846b dzi to TESS kple amadede vovovowo ƒe anyigba dzi fotometriki nyatakakawo, nɔnɔmetata siwo ƒe lolome deŋgɔ, kple spektroskɔpi ŋkuléleɖenuŋu zazã me," le apaper si kekeɖenudɔa ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ta nu. Ke hã, nya siwo ƒo xlãe vevi aɖewo li siwo gɔme wòle be woase. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, woɖo atsyɔ̃ na dzesi siwo zãlawo ɖɔ be wonye "nya ɣaɣla" alo "nu wɔnukuwo" le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple tabloidwo abe theDaily Mail ene ŋuti nyatakakawo be woatsɔ ahe nuxlẽlawo, si tae míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe akpa gãtɔ ɖo. Nya siwo wogblɔ be woate ŋu agblɔ be xexe bubu me tɔ, si womenya o alo nusianu si "wɔ nuku" si dona tso ɣletinyigba si le egodo me gbɔe TOI-1846b si ŋu woke ɖo la tso la mesɔ o. Ke boŋ dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la zã mɔnu aɖe si wozãna zi geɖe tsɔ dea dzesi ɣletinyigba siwo le gota to mɔzɔzɔ ƒe dzesiwo dzidzedze alo "nyrɔ ɖe" ɣletivimefakaka me si dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya dɔwɔnuwo lé le ɣletinyigba aɖe si to ɣletivi si wòƒo xlãe la ŋgɔ ta. NASA ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe ɖe eme na Snopes to e-mail dzi be: Ne ɣletinyigba aɖe to mía kple ɣletivi aɖe dome tẽ la, ɣletinyigba la xea mɔ na ɣletivimefakaka ƒe akpa aɖewo be wòagaɖo mía gbɔ o. Le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me la, ɣletivi la ƒe keklẽ nu dzana le míaƒe ŋkume. Tɔtrɔ sue ma ate ŋu ana ɣletiviŋununyalawo nanya ne ɣletinyigba aɖe ƒo xlã ɣletivi si le didiƒe ʋĩ. Woyɔa tɔtrɔ sia be mɔzɔzɔ ƒe dzesi, eye enye mɔnu vevi siwo dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo zãna tsɔ kea ɖe ɣletinyigba siwo le gota, alo ɣletinyigba siwo mele míaƒe ɣletinyigbawo godo ŋu la dometɔ ɖeka. NASA gblɔ na Snopes be: “Wotrɔ asi le TESS ƒe dɔdasi ŋu be wòake ɖe ɣletinyigba akpe geɖe siwo le gota ŋu to mɔ sia dzi.” "Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo zã nyatakaka siwo tso TESS, abe alesi numekuku sia ŋlɔlawo wɔe ene, ke ɖe ɣletinyigba siwo tso xexe sue siwo dzi kpewo le dzi va ɖo ɣletinyigba gãwo dzi." Le thepaper si ɖo numekuku si le megbe na nusi ŋu woke ɖo nu la, "TOI-1846b nye ɣletinyigba si lolo wu Anyigba, si ƒe didime anɔ abe 1.8R⊕ ene, si na wòdae ɖe radius valley area dodzidzɔname si me exoplanet lolomewo le la me." NASA ɖe "Anyigba si lolo wu" gɔme be "to vovo na nusianu si le míaƒe ɣe ƒe ɖoɖoa me la, esiawo nye Anyigba ƒe lolome ƒe teƒe 2 va ɖo 10, gake wole sue wu Neptune, eye woateŋu awɔ wo kple gas, kpe alo evea siaa ƒe ƒuƒoƒo." Numekulawo gblɔ be yewoƒe nusi ŋu woke ɖo la "anɔ eme be tsi geɖe ƒe ƒuƒoƒo le esi wotu ɖe eƒe didime dzi." Gawu la,NASA ɖe "radius valley" me be "nusi dze abe dometsotso wɔnuku aɖe le ɣletinyigbawo ƒe lolome me ene" si ateŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe anyigba ƒomevi si ɣletinyigba la ɖena fiana dzi, abe "gakpe gã siwo le anyigba dzi, kple Neptunes sue siwo lolo wu, siwo me gas geɖe le," le numekuku gbalẽa nu. NASA de dzesii hã be "abia be woase alesi ɣletinyigbawo ƒe ɖoɖowo dzɔna gɔme nyuie wu sã" be woaɖe radius bali si woyɔ la me bliboe. Nyatakaka aɖe si ku ɖe nusi ŋu woke ɖo ŋu tso dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nyeEarth.com gblɔ be, "lolome kple kpekpeme ƒe ƒuƒoƒo" le TOI-1846b "na eƒe kpekpeme le bɔbɔe wu kpe sesẽ gake wòlolo wu ɣletinyigba siwo ƒe agbalẽkotoku siwo le kpekpem eye gas le." Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, nyatakaka si tso ƒuƒoƒo si ŋu woke ɖo gbɔ gblɔ be, “Ɣletinyigba mawo tɔgbe mebɔ kura o, eye woƒe numekuku ate ŋu ana kpeɖodzi veviwo tso ɣletinyigbawo ƒe wɔwɔme kple woƒe nɔnɔmetɔtrɔ ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu.” Nyatakakaa gblɔ hã be M ɣletivi suewo, abe esi TOI-1846b ƒo xlãe ene, nye "ame siwo ŋugbe wodo na ɣletinyigba sue siwo me fa miamiamia didi to mɔzɔzɔ ƒe mɔnuwo zazã me" elabena "mɔzɔzɔ ƒe dzesi la dzena ŋutɔ wu ɣletinyigba mawo tɔgbe siwo ƒoa xlã ɣletivi siwo le abe Ɣe ene, m

claim: Le June 2025 me la, Britaintɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Piers Morgan kple Scotlandtɔ hadzila Susan Boyle do ŋugbe na wo nɔewo eye wole ɖoɖo wɔm be yewoaɖe yewo nɔewo.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe internet dzi le June 2025 ƒe nuwuwu gblɔ be Piers Morgan kple Susan Boyle, Scotlandtɔ hadzila si xɔ ŋkɔ le dukɔwo dome le ƒe 2009 me esi wòdze le television dzi wɔna ŋutɔŋutɔ si nye "Britain's Got Talent" me vɔ megbe la le srɔ̃ ɖem. Le ŋutinyaa nu la, Britaintɔ xɔŋkɔ eveawo nɔ ahiãmo ɖom na wo nɔewo le adzame ƒe geɖe eye wodo ŋugbe na wo fifia be yewoaɖe yewo nɔewo, elabena wotso nya me be yewoaɖe yewoƒe ƒomedodoa afia le dutoƒo le esi yewomatsɔe ɖe go ƒe ewo kple edzivɔ megbe. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Facebook nyatakaka ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si woma le June 25, 2025 dzi, eye nya si wogblɔ la ɖo ame 5,900 kple edzivɔ ƒe nuwɔna. Eŋlɔ be: Tso Adzame Lãmesẽnyawo Dzi Vaseɖe Srɔ̃ŋutsu Kple Srɔ̃nyɔnu Dzi: Piers Morgan kple Susan Boyle ƒe Lɔlɔ̃ Ŋutinya si Womekpɔ Mɔ Na O. Le tɔtrɔ aɖe si ame aɖeke megblɔ ɖi o me — gake enye esi se le eɖokui me be ewɔ nuku be woɖoe ɖi — Britaintɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Piers Morgan kple xexeame katã ƒe hadzidzi ŋuti nunyala Susan Boyle ɖee fia be menye srɔ̃tɔwo koe yewonye o, ke wodo ŋugbe na yewo be yewoaɖe yewo nɔewo. Le ƒe ewo kple edzivɔ le dutoƒo ŋkume, wo ame evea siaa abe aƒeme ŋkɔwo ene le wo ɖokui si megbe la, wogblɔ be wo ame evea wole zɔzɔm kpoo ƒe geɖe, eye wole adzɔge tso fotoɖemɔ̃wo, modzakaɖebɔ dzĩwo, kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe ŋkubiãnya madzudzɔmadzudzɔe gbɔ. Fifia, wole klalo be yewoaɖe afɔ ɖe ŋkuléleɖenuŋu me — fifia ya, ɖekae... Nyatakakaa ɖe nɔnɔmetata etɔ̃ siwo ɖe Morgan kple Boyle fia ɖekae, siwo dometɔ eve ɖe wo fia le srɔ̃ɖewu me hele wo ɖokui ɖem fia le sɔlemexɔ aɖe me. (Facebook ƒe axa Musical Monument) Facebook zãla bubuwo hã ma nuŋɔŋlɔ ma ke si wotsɔ kɔpi kpe ɖe eŋu. Nyatakaka mawo dometɔ aɖewo ɖe kadodowo fia le nya siwo le etame siwo kplɔa ame yia nyati siwo WordPress blogwo xɔna me, abe ŋutinya ɖeka si me boblododowo yɔ fũu si woda ɖe thepopularnews.info nyatakakadzraɖoƒe (wodzrae ɖo) alo litaglobal.com (wodzrae ɖo ene). Nyatiawo dze egɔme: Piers Morgan kple Susan Boyle ƒe Lɔlɔ̃ Adzame Va Klẽ — Eye Fifia Wole Srɔ̃m Le tɔtrɔ si ame aɖeke megblɔ ɖi o me — ke hã esi se le eɖokui me be ewɔ nuku be woɖoe ɖi — Britaintɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Piers Morgan kple xexeame katã ƒe hadzidzi ŋuti nunyala Susan Boyle ɖee fia be menye srɔ̃tɔwo koe yewonye o, ke wodo ŋugbe be yewoaɖe yewo nɔewo. Le ƒe ewo kple edzivɔ le dutoƒo ŋkume, wo ame evea siaa abe aƒeme ŋkɔwo ene le wo ɖokui si megbe la, wogblɔ be wo ame evea wole zɔzɔm kpoo ƒe geɖe, eye wole adzɔge tso fotoɖemɔ̃wo, modzakaɖebɔ dzĩwo, kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe ŋkubiãnya madzudzɔmadzudzɔe gbɔ. Fifia, wole klalo be yewoaɖe afɔ ɖe ŋkuléleɖenuŋu me — fifia ya, ɖekae. Gake ne wodi Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo la, womekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si ka nya ta tso Morgan ƒe Boyle ɖeɖe ŋu o. Esi wònye be wo ame evea siaa nye dutoƒonuwɔla xɔŋkɔwo le Eŋlisiawo kple dukɔwo dome ta la, anye ne nyadzɔdzɔhabɔbɔ siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le aƒo nu tso ŋgɔyiyi sia tɔgbe ŋu le teƒe geɖe ne ɖe wònye nyateƒe. Nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ ɖee fia vevie be nya si wogblɔ la nye alakpa. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Piers Morgan ɖe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Celia Walden fifia. Atsu kple asi sia ɖe wo nɔewo le June 2010 me, eye wodzi vinyɔnuvi ɖekae. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, nyatakaka aɖeke meli si ŋu kakaɖedzi le tso kaklã alo srɔ̃gbegbe ŋu o. Nya la kaka ɖe nɔnɔmetata etɔ̃ xa — wo dometɔ eve ɖe Morgan kple Boyle fia le sɔlemexɔ aɖe me wodo awu abe ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ kple ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ ene eye wòdze abe wotsɔ dijitaal aɖakawo de wo me ene. AI (Artificial Intelligence) ƒe dzesi siwo dze le fotoa me dometɔ aɖewoe nye nukpɔkpɔ ƒe masɔmasɔwo abe asi siwo tro le mɔ si mele dzɔdzɔme nu o nu, siwo woɖe fia le nɔnɔmetata si le ete me ene. (Facebook ƒe axa Musical Monument/Snopes Illustration) Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Boyle do srɔ̃ɖewu vovovo le nɔnɔmetata eveawo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe me, si gaɖee fia be wowɔ nɔnɔmetataawo. (Facebook ƒe axa Musical Monument/Snopes Illustration) Gake nɔnɔmetata etɔ̃lia ya nye nyateƒe. Eɖe Boyle kple Morgan fia wotsi tre ɖekae le woƒe dzedzeme le ITV1 ƒe wɔna si nye "Piers Morgan ƒe Agbenɔnɔ Ŋutinyawo" me. Nudzɔdzɔa dze le ƒe 2010 me, esime wobia gbe Boyle tso eƒe ŋkɔxɔxɔ kabakaba le eƒe "Britain's Got Talent" ƒe ŋgɔdonya megbe ŋu. Foto sia nɔ dutoƒo ƒe ewo kple edzivɔe nye sia eye wòdze le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ geɖe me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Daily Record kple Daily Mail, kpakple ITV ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo. . "Meyɔe be Piersy Baby," egblɔ le Loose Woman ƒe ɖoɖowɔɖi me le ƒe 2020 me, eye wògblɔ kpee be yeƒe lɔlɔ̃ ɖe Morgan ŋu anya nye "smash" wu. Kaka ƒe 2021 naɖo la, Boyle gblɔ be yemegakpɔa dzidzɔ ɖe Morgan ŋu o, eye Morgan ɖo eŋu nɛ be eŋlɔ ɖe X nyatakaka aɖe me be, "Crushing. 😢" Mlɔeba, abe alesi míegblɔe va yi ene la, Morgan ɖe ame bubu. Nya siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o la ku ɖe Bangladesh ƒe typhoid ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ŋu

To esia dzi
																																																Rasheek MUJIB, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Bangladesh ƒe agbalẽ





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


UNICEF ƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔla aɖe gblɔ be nyatakaka totro siwo ku ɖe typhoid ƒe atike siwo wodona na ɖeviwo le Bangladesh ŋu le agbagba si dzem wole le dukɔa me godoo be woado wo ɖe dɔléle si ate ŋu awu ame la nu la dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ. Nyatakakaawo gblɔ alakpatɔe be typhoid jab si wozãna le Bangladesh la tsɔa "dɔléle ma ƒe dɔlékui" dea ŋutilãa me, gake dɔléle siwo xɔa ame me ŋuti nunyala aɖe gblɔ be atike sia zãa dɔlékui si me afɔku mele o si srɔ̃a dɔlékui siwo hea typhoid vɛ ƒe nɔnɔmewo tsɔ wɔa dɔlékuiwutike. WHO gblɔ hã be typhoid ƒe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe dɔa nye "egbɔkpɔnu si le dedie ŋutɔ, eye wòwɔa dɔ nyuie be woatsɔ axe mɔ ɖe ku kaba nu".



"Mabia tso dzilawo si be, migana atike sia si wozãna femaxee la nage ɖe mia vi lɔlɔ̃a ƒe ŋutilã me kura o. Mite ɖa tso esiawo gbɔ," Bengaligbe me nya didi aɖe si woŋlɔ le Facebook dzi ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ the name of vaccination."Eyi edzi gblɔ be womenya atike la ƒe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu o, eye wòbia nya le nusitae wòhiã be woatsɔ atikekuiawo aƒoe nenye be atike le typhoid dɔlélea ŋu.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso Facebook nyatakaka si wolé le November 5, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Nya mawo tɔgbe do mo ɖa le Facebook ƒe teƒe bubuwo le ŋkeke aɖewo megbe esi Bangladesh dziɖuɖua dze agbagba be woado atike na ɖevi siwo ade miliɔn 50 siwo xɔ tso ɣleti 9 va ɖo ƒe 15 haɖe o la ɖe typhoid fever, si nye dɔléle si xɔa ame me si woate ŋu axe mɔ na to atikewɔmɔnu si Salmonella typhi dɔlékui (archived link) hena vɛ la megbe Vaccine Alliance, typhoid fever gakpɔtɔ nye afɔku gã aɖe na dukɔa ƒe lãmesẽ le afima kpakple dukɔ bubu siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o.Bangladesh kpɔ dzidzedze gã aɖe va yi le atikewɔmɔnu bubu siwo wowɔna tsɔ tsia polio nu me -- woɖo kpe edzi be dɔlékuia mele eme o le ƒe 2014 me (archived link). Le ƒe 2024 me la, eɖo atike 93 le alafa me le nyɔnuvi siwo dze dome ɖe amegbetɔ ƒe papilloma dɔlékui (HPV) hã dome, si ate ŋu ahe vidzidɔ me kansa vɛ (archived link).Gake nya siwo woŋlɔ la he vɔvɔ̃ vɛ ɖe Typhibev typhoid conjugate vaccine si wozã le ʋukukua me ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu (archived link)."Ne esiae nye nyateƒe la, ekema nukatae dziɖuɖua maxe mɔ ɖe enu o officially? Don’t confuse the common people again," one user said.Another commented: "It’s true, no one in my family got vaccinated."Riad Mahmud, si nye lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔla na Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe ɖeviwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe si nye UNICEF si nɔ dɔa me abe atikewɔmɔnu ƒe akpa aɖe ene, gblɔ na AFP be nyatakaka totro siwo ku ɖe aɖuɖɔtoe siwo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu la na atike si woxɔna le dugãwo me ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ne wotsɔe sɔ kple kɔƒenutowo me tɔ geɖe wu zones (nutowo me). Le fiadu Dhaka me la, Mahmud gblɔ be agbɔsɔsɔa nye 70 le alafa me ne wotsɔe sɔ kple 85 le alafa me le kɔƒenutowo me."Agbɔsɔsɔ si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi le dua me la tso dɔ gbegblẽ siwo wowɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gbɔ, nya siwo woŋlɔ la tɔtɔ dzila geɖewo," egblɔ le November 5.
