claim: Le email ɖɔliɖɔli kple eƒe hadɔwɔla Ghislaine Maxwell si Aƒea Dzikpɔkɔmitia ɖe ɖe go le November 2025 me la, gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein yɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be Trump ɖeɖe zã gaƒoƒo geɖe kple ame aɖe si wotsɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa le Epstein ƒe aƒeme.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, nyaʋiʋliwo kaka ɖe internet dzi le November 2025 me be e-mail ƒe asitɔtrɔ si womeɖe ɖe go le gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe Jeffrey Epstein kple eƒe zɔhɛ Ghislaine Maxwell dome ɖee fia be Epstein ɖɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be enye "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wògblɔ be dukplɔla la "zã gaƒoƒo geɖe" le Epstein ƒe aƒeme kple amesi wodzra gbɔdɔdɔ. Nya sia kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le gbeƒãɖeɖe be Epstein ƒe anyigbaa ɖe agbalẽ siwo wu 20,000 ɖe go na Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dziɖuɖua Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ megbe. Zãla siwo le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeFacebook (archived),X (archived) kpleReddit ma nya sia, tsɔ kpe ɖe screenshots siwo wogblɔ be wole email si ŋu nya ku ɖo ŋu. Nya sia kaka na Snopes xlẽla geɖe do asi ɖa be yewoakpɔe ɖa be e-mail la nye nyateƒe hã. EII! Trump ɖi fɔ! Edze dɔ!"Medi be nàde dzesii be avu ma si meƒo ɣli o lae nye Trump. [Victim] zã gaƒoƒo geɖe le nye aƒeme kplii... womeƒo nu tso eŋu zi ɖeka pɛ hã o." - Jeffrey Epstein na Ghislaine Maxwell"Menɔ eŋu bum le ema ŋu ... " Maxwell ɖo eŋu. pic.twitter.com/pqu7NNomkn — Ed Krassenstein (@EdKrassen) November 12, 2025 Email ƒe asitɔtrɔ le Epstein kple Maxwell dome si yɔ Trump be "avũ si meƒo ɣli o" eye wogblɔ be eya ɖeka zã gaƒoƒo geɖe kple amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii la nye nyateƒe. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti si Kpɔa Dziɖuɖua Dzi Kple Dziɖuɖua ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖowo Gbɔ ɖe ɖe go le Nov. 12, 2025 dzi nu la, asitɔtrɔ sia dzɔ le April 2, 2011 dzi. Woateŋu akpɔ email la, kpakple nuŋlɔɖi akpe geɖe bubu siwo tso Epstein ƒe domenyinu la me le Google ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe si kɔmitia na le eƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe dodo me alo axlẽe le ete. (House Committee on Supersight and Government Reform) The full email exchange read: EPSTEIN: medi be miakpɔe adze sii be avu ma si meƒo ɣli o la nye trump.. virignia zã gaƒoƒo geɖe le nye aƒeme kplii ,, womeyɔe zi ɖeka pɛ hã o. kpovitɔwo ƒe amegã. etc. im 15% there MAXWELL: Me nɔ eŋu bum le ema ŋu... "Virignia" fia Virginia Giuffre, amesi tso Epstein nu be edzrae hena gbɔdɔdɔ kple Britain ƒe Fiavi Andrew kple ŋutsu bubu siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi. Esi woɖe nuŋlɔɖiawo ɖe go zi gbãtɔ la, wotrɔ asi le Giuffre ƒe ŋkɔ ŋu, gake Republicantɔ siwo nɔ kɔmitia me yɔ ŋkɔ nɛ emegbe. Giuffre ku to eɖokuiwuwu me le April 2025. Epstein wu eɖokui le ƒe 2019 me esime wònɔ lalam be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnui le dziɖuɖua ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu ta, esime wotso afia na Maxwell be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 20 le esi wòɖo nugbe kple Epstein ta. Email la nye geɖe siwo le document drop si ƒo nu tso Trump ŋu eye wòdo susu ɖa be dukplɔla la nya nu tso Epstein ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu la dometɔ ɖeka. White House Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Karoline Leavitt gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be Democratstɔwo "tia e-mailwo ɖe go na ablɔɖenyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo be woawɔ aʋatso ŋutinya aɖe atsɔ aƒo ɖi Dukplɔla Trump." Leavitt gagblɔ be Giuffre "gblɔ enuenu be Dukplɔla Trump mekpɔ gome le nu gbegblẽ aɖeke kura me o eye 'mateŋu anye xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔtɔe wu' nɛ le woƒe kadodo siwo seɖoƒe li na me o" eye be "ŋutinyaawo menye naneke wu agbagbadzedze siwo me xɔse gbegblẽ le be woaɖe susu ɖa le Dukplɔla Trump ƒe ŋutinya me nusiwo wòwɔ ŋu o, eye Amerikatɔ ɖesiaɖe si si susu nyui le la kpɔa nusi sɔ to alakpanya sia kple susuhenuwo si me kɔ tso dziɖuɖua ƒe ʋuʋu ake me." Trump ŋutɔ ɖo nya ŋu na nuŋlɔɖi siwo woɖe ɖe go leTruth Social, eye wògbugbɔ gblɔ Leavitt ƒe numekuku be enye susuhenuwo. "Demokrasitɔwo le agbagba dzem be yewoagahe Jeffrey Epstein ƒe Ameflunya la vɛ ake elabena woawɔ nusianu kura be yewoatrɔ ɖe alesi wowɔ nu gbegblẽe le Nutsitsidɔa ŋu, kple nyati bubu geɖewo ŋu. Republicantɔ vɔ̃ɖi ŋutɔ, alo bometsila, koe adze mɔ̃ ma me," eŋlɔ. Dzikpɔkɔmiti gblɔ be Epstein ƒe domenyinu la ɖe agbalẽ 23,000 siwo ŋu wole ŋku lém ɖo fifia la ɖe go. Democratictɔwo ƒe habɔbɔ me tɔ Robert Garcia gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si woɖe ɖe go me be: Zi alesi Donald Trump le agbagba dzem be yeatsyɔ nu Epstein ƒe nyatakakawo dzi la, zi nenemae míeɖea nu geɖe fianae. Email kple lɛtaŋɔŋlɔ yeye siawo fɔ nyabiase siwo me kɔ nyuie ɖe te ku ɖe nu bubu siwo White House ɣla kple alesi ƒomedodo si le Epstein kple Dukplɔla dome le ŋu. Ele be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea naɖe Epstein ƒe agbalẽawo ɖe go bliboe na dukɔa enumake. Dzikpɔkɔmiti la ayi edzi anɔ nya hem ɖe ŋuɖoɖowo ŋu eye madzudzɔ o vaseɖe esime míakpɔ dzɔdzɔenyenye na amesiwo ŋu wowɔ nuvevii. Edze abe Democrattɔ siwo le kɔmitia me ɖe e-mail etɔ̃ ɖe go siwo ɖee fia be Trump nya nu tso Epstein ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo ŋu si wogblɔ be ewɔe ene, eye Republicantɔ siwo le kɔmitia me tɔwo ɖe agbalẽ siwo wu 20,000 la ɖe go enumake.

claim: Dukɔwo Dome Kriket Aɖaŋuɖoha (ICC) ɖe gbeƒã nya aɖe, eye woxe mɔ ɖe Pakistan kriket habɔbɔa nu ƒe ɖeka.
evidence: Nya si wogblɔ Dukɔwo Dome Kriket Aɖaŋudeha (ICC) ɖe gbeƒã nya aɖe, eye woxe mɔ ɖe Pakistan kriket habɔbɔa nu ƒe ɖeka. (Archive Link) "Nyagbɔgblɔ" sia kaka do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2026 T20 Xexeame Katã ƒe Kplɔ̃ɖoƒe, afisi kakaɖedzi mele Pakistan ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le Ƒuƒoƒo A ƒe hoʋiʋli si woawɔ kple India le kwasiɖa si gbɔna me le Colombo me o. Do ŋgɔ la, Pakistan ɖe gbeƒãe be yemaxɔ bɔlƒoƒea na February 15 ƒe hoʋiʋli gã si woawɔ kple India o, togbɔ be dziɖuɖua ɖe dukɔa ƒe bɔlƒoha ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le hoʋiʋlia ƒe akpa susɔea me si adze egɔme tso February 7. Nyateƒenya Míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo si ƒo nu tso ICC ƒe nyametsotso be yeaxe mɔ ɖe Pakistan nu ƒe ɖeka o.  Newschecker lé ŋku ɖe Dukɔwo Dome Kriket Aɖaŋuɖoha (ICC) ƒe Facebook, Instagram nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple X handle si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ŋu eye mekpɔ gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖeke si ɖe gbeƒã mɔxexe aɖeke ɖe Pakistan kriket nu o.  Facebook, Instagram accounts kple X handle of the International Cricket Council (ICC) eye womekpɔ gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖeke si ɖe gbeƒã mɔxexe aɖeke ɖe Pakistan cricket nu o. Gawu la, míede dzesi nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le ICC ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe le February 1, 2026. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be: Dukɔwo Dome Kriket Aɖaŋudeha hã ɖee fia be PCB abu nyametsotsoa ŋu, elabena anɔ eme be esia akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe xexeame katã ƒe kriket ƒe lãwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ dzi.  ICC de dzesi nya si Pakistan dziɖuɖua gblɔ ku ɖe nyametsotso si wowɔ be yeatia gome le ICC Ŋutsuwo ƒe T20 Xexeame Katã ƒe Kplɔ̃ɖoƒe 2026. Míekpɔe be DD Sports hã ta nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakakaa le February 2, 2026. Ne míetsɔ nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka eveawo sɔ kple wo nɔewo la, míakpɔe be vovototo le nuŋɔŋlɔa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ me. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Jay Shah ƒe asidede nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka gbãtɔa me, si dze le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo me la me o.  Eyata eme kɔ ƒã be wotrɔ asi le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome si ƒo nu tso ICC ƒe mɔxexe ɖe Pakistan nu ƒe ɖeka ŋu.  Dzɔtsoƒewo OfficialFacebook, Instagram accounts kple X handle of the ICC Official website of theICC Facebook nyatakaka si DD Sports ŋlɔ

claim: Sheld Cloud si wokpɔ le Haridwar dzi le December 18, 2025 dzi.
evidence: Vishvas News kpɔe le eƒe numekuku me be video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si nye ‘shelf cloud’ le Haridwar menye nyitsɔ laa o, gake edze egɔme tso July 2023. Wole video xoxoa mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple nya aɖe si flua ame, eye wole eɖem fia abe wɔna aɖe si tso December 18, 2025. New Delhi (Vishvas News). Video aɖe si ɖe alilikpo gã aɖe si le agbalẽdzraɖoƒe ƒe wɔwɔme fia la le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be wokpɔe le Haridwar dzi le December 18, 2025. Vishvas News ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be video sia flua ame eye wòtso July 2023 me, esime wokpɔ nukpɔkpɔ sia le Haridwar gbɔ. Wole video xoxo aɖe si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi la mam fifia be enye nyitsɔ laa be woatsɔ ahe tɔtɔ vɛ.  Nukae nye nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo?  Instagram zãla suraj_y1407 ma video sia le December 18, 2025 dzi, eye wòŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Esia nye video tso Haridwar mɔ dzi, fifia ko. 18/12/2025. Xexeame le nuwuwu gogom ŋutɔŋutɔ."  Numekuku Be míaku nu me le nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la, míezã Google Lens tsɔ di video klipi sia ƒe screenshots. Míekpɔ video sia si woda ɖe YouTube channel of Business Standard dzi le July 12, 2023. Videoa ƒe nyatakakaa gblɔ be wokpɔ shelf cloud sia le Haridwar gbɔ le July 11, 2023. Esi míetsɔ nya vevi siwo do ƒome kplii dim la, míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ geɖe tso July 2023 me ku ɖe alilikpo ƒe wɔwɔme wɔdɔɖeamedzi sia si wokpɔ le Haridwar dzi ŋu. ABP Live ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si tso July 11, 2023 dzi hã ɖe video sia fia eye wògblɔ be wokpɔ nudzɔdzɔ sia le Haridwar.  Nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si tso NDTV gbɔ le July 16, 2023 dzi hã ɖee fia be video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la tso Haridwar.  Didi si wozã nya veviwo mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke nyitsɔ laa tso alilikpo mawo tɔgbe siwo dzɔ le Haridwar alo eƒe nutowo me ŋu o.  Be míaɖo kpe edzi la, míeƒo nu kple Sunil Negi, si nye Uttarakhand Digital Head of Dainik Jagran hã, eye wòɖo kpe edzi be videoa dze egɔme tso July 2023. Nukae nye ‘Shelf Cloud’?  Shelf cloud, si wogayɔna le dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me be Arcus cloud, nye alilikpo si wɔa nuku eye zi geɖe la, edzena abe ɖe wòdoa vɔvɔ̃ na ame ene, eye zi geɖe la, edzena do ŋgɔ na dziɖegbe.  Mlɔeba la, míewɔ scan ɖe Instagram zãla ‘Suraj Yadav’ ƒe nɔnɔmetata, amesi ma videoa, eye míekpɔe be zãla la yomedzela siwo ade 4000.  Nyataƒoƒo: Vishvas News kpɔe le eƒe numekuku me be video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si nye ‘shelf cloud’ le Haridwar menye nyitsɔ laa o, gake edze egɔme tso July 2023. Wole video xoxoa mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple nya aɖe si flua ame, eye woɖee fia abe wɔna aɖe si tso December 18, 2025. Claim Review : Sheld Cloud spotted over spotted over Haridwar on December 18, 2025. Claimed By : Instagram user suraj_y1407 Fact Check : Ameflunya Ameflunya Dzesi siwo ɖea alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔme gɔme Nyateƒe Ameflunya Aʋatso Nya nyateƒea! Ne ɖikeke aɖe le ŋuwò le nyatakaka aɖe alo nya aɖe ŋu la, na míanya! Nyateƒea nyanya nye wò gomenɔamesi. Ne èse le ɖokuiwò me be ɖikeke le nyatakaka aɖe ŋu eye ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe hadomegbenɔnɔ alo dukɔa dzi la, ke ɖoe ɖe mí to nyatakakatsoƒe siwo míeyɔ ɖe ete la dometɔ ɖesiaɖe dzi.  Contribute to Vishwas News Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe nyateƒetoto, si léa ahuhɔ̃e ɖe ŋusẽ me esime wòle ablɔɖe me tso dɔwɔƒewo kple dunyahehe ƒe kawo me la, ate ŋu adzɔ ne dukɔmeviwo do alɔe ko. Kpe ɖe mía ŋu le míaƒe avuwɔwɔ kple alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo me.  Tags ƒe nyawo

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump yɔ Russell Vought, si nye Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Kple Gazazãwo Gbɔ ƒe dɔdzikpɔla, "Darth Vader" le October 2025 ƒe nuƒo aɖe me.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, Trump kplɔ eƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ɖo kple kafukafu na Vought eye wòhe susu yi edzi be ɖeklemiɖelawo yɔnae be Darth Vader: "Woyɔe be Darth Vader. Meyɔe be ame nyui aɖe. Gake ele Democrattɔwo ƒe nu vevitɔwo dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ eye womagbugbɔ wo axɔ gbeɖe o." Le October 2025 ƒe nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo le White House Rose Garden me la, edze abe U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump yɔ Russell Vought, si nye Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Kple Gazazãwo Gbɔ ƒe dɔdzikpɔla, be "Darth Vader," be enye ame vɔ̃ɖi aɖe si tso "Star Wars" sinima siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo me ƒe ŋkɔ. Le video si kaka ɖe internet dzi nu la, togbɔ be Trump meyɔ Vought ƒe ŋkɔ tẽ o hã la, ewɔ asi na ame aɖe le ameha la dome nɔ to ɖom eƒe nuƒoa hegblɔ be: Darth Vader le mía si. Ènya Darth Vader, alo? Darth Vader nye ŋutsu si bɔbɔ nɔ anyi — Darth ye nye ema? Tso tsitre taflatse. Ame sia ame nya — woyɔnɛ be Darth Vader, nye hã meyɔnɛ be ame nyui aɖe. Gake ele Democrattɔwo ƒe nu vevitɔwo dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ eye womagaxɔ wo ake gbeɖe o. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe TikTok dzi la ɖu fewu le Trump ŋu, si ɖee fia be woɖɔe ɖo be wòadze le nukpɔkpɔ aɖe si woɖe tso "Star Wars" sinima aɖe me esime wònɔ nuƒoa ƒom. Trump yɔ Vought nyateƒe be "Darth Vader," abe alesi wokpɔe le White House ƒe video siwo dziɖuɖua ɖe le wɔnaa me le Oct. 21, 2025. Togbɔ be meyɔ Vought ŋkɔ tẽ o hã la, ewɔ asi ɖe Vought ŋu le nyaselawo dome eye wòyɔ Vought ƒe dɔ si wòwɔ tsɔ ɖe New York City ƒe xɔtuɖoɖo siwo ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 20 dzi kpɔtɔ. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Trump do ŋgɔ na eƒe nyawo esi wòbu fɔ Democratstɔwo ɖe dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe nutsotso ta, hafi he susu yi Vought dzi le nyaselawo dome: Magblɔ nya sia, be Darth Vader le mía si. Ènya Darth Vader, alo? Darth Vader nye ŋutsu si, mesusu be, ebɔbɔ nɔ anyi nyuie... Darth ye nye ema? Tso tsitre, meɖe kuku, Darth Vader. Woyɔa eyama be Darth Vader. Meyɔe be ame nyui aɖe. Gake ele Democrattɔwo ƒe nu vevitɔwo dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ eye womagaxɔ wo ake gbeɖe o. Eye woawoe na mí eye woɖe mɔ na mí ŋutɔŋutɔ be míawɔe. Eye le mɔa nu la, akpe na wò. Èle dɔ gã aɖe wɔm, ele nam be magblɔe na wò. Elabena nu geɖe siwo wole ɖeɖem, abe New York dɔa ene, dɔlar biliɔn 20, míele etsom. Womegale exɔ ge ake o. Mebe, womagbugbɔ nu geɖe axɔ o. Ðewohĩ womagaxɔe ake o. Ðewohĩ míaƒo nu tso eŋu na wo, gake nusiwo katã dim wole la bumee. Gake nu geɖe siwo dim wole la nye nusiwo míedi o. Wonye nusiwo gblẽ le míaƒe dukɔa ŋu ale gbegbe ko. Woate ŋu ase nyaawo le video si wotsɔ de ete ƒe aɖabaƒoƒo 40 ƒe dzesi me: Abe alesi míegblɔe va yi ene la, wonya Vought nyuie wu be enye The Heritage Foundation ƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒe si ʋlia amewo ta ƒe tatɔ eye wònye aɖaŋuɖola xɔŋkɔ na Project 2025, si na wotsɔ ŋkɔ nɛ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo me be "Project 2025 architect." Exɔ ŋgɔ na OMB ƒe eve do ŋgɔ le Trump ƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ me, eye Trump gaɖoe le eƒe zimenɔɣi evelia me. Gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo le dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsitsidɔa gɔmedzedze le October ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe la, Vought ɖe gbeƒãe le X be dziɖuɖua le dɔlar biliɔn geɖe ƒe xɔtudɔwo nu tsim le New York City, dɔ mawo ke siwo ŋu Trump ƒo nu tsoe le eƒe nuƒo si wòƒo le etame me: "Wotɔ te dɔlar biliɔn 18 lɔƒo le New York City ƒe xɔtuɖoɖowo wɔwɔ me be woakpɔ egbɔ be ga si woadzɔ ɖe DEI ƒe gɔmeɖose siwo tsi tre ɖe dukplɔsea ŋu dzi mele sisim o." Egblɔ kpee be lãɖeɖea akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe "Hudson Mɔdodo Dɔwɔƒea kple Second Ave Tomemɔ dzi." Vought nɔ Oct. 21 ƒe Rose Garden nuƒoa me, abe alesi wokpɔe le foto siwo dze le nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe gadzraɖoƒe xɔŋkɔ si nye Getty Images me ene. C-SPAN video aɖe si ku ɖe wɔnaa ŋu de dzesii le nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi me be Trump nɔ ɣli dom be Vought be "Darth Vader." Nyatakakawo gblɔ tso Vought ŋu be enye “ŋusẽ si ʋã [dziɖuɖua] ƒe nutsitsidɔa” eye “koŋ la, enye aʋafiagã evelia, si nye vɔvɔli ƒe dukplɔla.” ProPublica ƒe numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le Vought ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le OMB ŋu ɖee fia be eya gbɔe wòtso be wòxe mɔ ɖe dukɔa ƒe gazazã gbogbo aɖewo nu, eɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔwɔla akpe ewo le dɔ me eye wòna dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒewo tɔ te. Míeƒo nu tso Vought ƒe agbagbadzedzewo ŋu va yi to Dɔwɔɖoɖo 2025 dzi, si me kadodo siwo ate ŋu anɔ eme kple Trump ƒe ɖoɖo si wòwɔ be woaxɔ dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔlawo ɖe dɔ me hã le.

claim: Esi Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth ɖe Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã John Harrison le dɔ me le October 2025 me vɔ la, dziɖuɖumegãwo lé Harrison le esi wosusu be ewɔ dukɔmevinyenye ta.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le October 2025 me, esi Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth ɖe Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã John Harrison le dɔ me vɔ la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be dziɖuɖumegãwo lé Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe amegã tsãtɔ le esi wosusu be ewɔ aʋatsokaka ta. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, ezãla aɖe si le X dzi da nya sia ɖe Internet dzi: United States Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe JAG numekulawo lé Ƒudzisrafomegã aɖe si le ɖoƒe kɔkɔ aɖe le Dzoɖagbe le eƒe aƒe dzeani si te ɖe Washington Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Xɔxɔnu ŋu me le gaƒoƒo aɖewo megbe esi Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔla Pete Hegseth ɖee le dɔ me le esi wòte ŋu menya dɔ o ta, Real Raw News se. Edze abe nuxlẽla aɖewo ɖe nyaʋiʋlia gɔme be enye agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo gbɔgblɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ene. Ke boŋ, nya si wogblɔ tso Harrison ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ si wosusu ŋu la dzɔ tso Real Raw News — nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si ɖɔ eƒe dɔwɔwɔ be enye nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya le dzɔdzɔme nu. Eƒe Axa si nye About gblɔ be: Nyatakaka siwo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia nye nyatakaka kple nufiafia kpakple modzakaɖeɖe ta. Nukokoedoname, fefenyawo, kple fewuɖunyawo le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia. Míetsɔ adzɔgbeɖeɖe sia de eme hena míaƒe takpɔkpɔ, le aɖaŋuɖoɖo siwo ku ɖe senyalawo ŋu dzi. Nyakpakpa ŋutinyaa kaka esi Politico ka nya ta be Hegseth ɖe Harrison, si nye Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe ametia si xɔ ɖoƒea le January 2025 me, le dɔme le agbagbadzedze be yeatrɔ asi le Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea ŋu vɔ megbe. Tudadaa va le esi woɖo kpe edzi be Hung Cao nye Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla kpeɖeŋutɔ vɔ megbe. Cao nye Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe aʋawɔla veviedonula si wɔ aʋawɔwɔ na U.S. Sewɔtakpekpe le Virginia abe Republicantɔ ene si medze edzi o le ƒe 2024. Esi Harrison nye dɔwɔlawo ƒe amegã ta la, wogblɔ be edze agbagba be yeaɖo seɖoƒe na agbalẽŋlɔla teƒenɔla ƒe ŋusẽ ɖe Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla John Phelan teƒe. Snopes ɖe nya geɖe siwo Real Raw News gblɔ le ƒe siwo va yi me la ɖa, eye nya si wogblɔ le May 2025 me be wotso kufia na Yamesrafowo ƒe aʋafia tsãtɔ aɖe be wòahe ɖe ati ŋu le esi wobu fɔe be ewɔ aʋatsodzidzedze megbe hã le eme. Le ŋutinya me la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

Posudɔwɔƒewo gblɔ alakpatɔe be Nigeria ‘fe aɖeke mele eŋu o’ esi wòxe IMF ƒe gadodowo vɔ megbe



							Wotae le June 3, 2025 le ga 10:32 me




							
							2 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Samad UTHMAN, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP Nigeria ƒe nyawo





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


				Le nya si wogblɔ be Nigeria xe eƒe ga susɔeawo tso Dukɔwo Dome Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔha (IMF) gbɔ le May me megbe la, Facebook nyatakaka siwo woma zi alafa geɖe gblɔ alakpatɔe be dukɔa “fe aɖeke mele eme o”. Le nyateƒe me la, le nyatakaka yeyetɔ si Nigeria ƒe Fewo Dzikpɔƒe (DMO) ta le April me nu la, dziɖuɖua nyi fe le gotagome gadodolawo ŋu wòde dɔlar biliɔn 46 kloe le IMF ƒe gadodowo xexe vɔ megbe gɔ̃ hã. 
			


“BREAKING NEWS!!!Nya nyui- Nigeria mexɔ fenyinyi o mlɔeba,” xlẽ nya si woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook nyatakaka aɖe si wota le May 16, 2025 dzi.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Screenshot si ɖe alakpanya la fia, si woɖe le June 2, 2025 dzi
					
Woɖe Nigeria Dukplɔla Bola Tinubu ƒe foto le nyatakakaa me kpe ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ si xlẽ be, “Nigeria meganyi fe o mlɔeba esi wòxe dɔlar biliɔn 3.4 na IMF vɔ megbe”. Le nyatakaka aɖe si wogblɔ na nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽwo le May 8, 2025 dzi la, IMF ɖo kpe edzi be Nigeria xe dɔlar biliɔn 3.4 si wodo le nusi woyɔna be Rapid Financing Instrument te la bliboe be woatsɔ aɖe Covid-19 dɔvɔ̃a ƒe ganyawo dzi akpɔtɔ — si dzi Nigeria dziɖuɖua ɖo kpee emegbe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia). Wogblɔ nya ma tɔgbe zi alafa geɖe le Facebook dzi, eye le Ghana kple Pakistan hã.  Gake IMF ƒe gadodoa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ mefia be fe aɖeke mele Nigeria o. Dodo siwo womexe oAFP Fact Check di DMO ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si woɖe Nigeria ƒe dukɔa ƒe fewo ɖe go le eye wokpɔe be kaka December 31, 2024 naɖo la, gadodo siwo wu dɔlar biliɔn 46 le dukɔa si, eye wometsɔ dɔlar biliɔn 3.4 si wogbugbɔ na IMF la kpee o. Le nyateƒenya aɖe si DMO ta le April 4, 2025 dzi nu la, fe si womexe o la le “dukɔ geɖe, dukɔ eve, kple asitsalawo” ƒe fenyilawo si. Nusiwo woyɔna be dukɔ geɖe ƒe fewoe nye akpa gãtɔ si ƒe home katã nye dɔlar biliɔn 22.32, si mede gotagome fewo katã ƒe afã teti o (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).
Dukɔ geɖewo ƒe fenyinyi veviwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Xexeame ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ƒe Ƒuƒoƒo – si me Dukɔwo Dome Ŋgɔyidɔwo ƒe Habɔbɔ (IDA) xɔ dɔlar biliɔn 16.56 eye Dukɔwo Dome Gadzraɖoƒe si Kpɔa Gbugbɔgaɖoanyi Kple Ŋgɔyiyinyawo Gbɔ (IBRD) xɔ dɔlar biliɔn 1.24 – kple Afrika Ŋgɔyidɔwo ƒe Gadzraɖoƒe Ƒuƒoƒo, si ƒe fewo wu dɔlar biliɔn 3 le Nigeria Dɔlar biliɔn 5.06. Dukɔ eve ƒe gadodo bubue nye France ƒe Agence Française de Développement, Japan ƒe JICA, India ƒe Exim Gadzraɖoƒe, kple Germany ƒe KfW.Asitsafe ƒe fetu nye dɔlar biliɔn 17.32 (37.83%), vevietɔ tso Eurobonds me. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, gadodo siwo wowɔ ɖekae tso dɔwɔƒewo abe Deutsche Bank AG ene gbɔ naa akpa sue aɖe, si ƒe ƒuƒoƒo nye dɔlar miliɔn 54.87 (0.12%).Le ɣeyiɣi sia me la, Nigeria ƒe fe gbogbo ate ŋu adzi ɖe edzi nenye be dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe da asi ɖe Tinubu ƒe gadodo ƒe ɖoɖo yeye si nye dɔlar biliɔn 24.14 dzi. Kaka ƒe 2026 nawu enu la, Ɣetoɖoƒe Afrika dukɔa ate ŋu anɔ gadodo siwo ade dɔlar biliɔn 69.92 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) me. AFP Fact Check ɖe nya siwo wogblɔ tso Nigeria kple IMF dome ƒomedodo ŋu le afisia ɖa tsã.

claim: Le Jan. 6, 2026, ƒe nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo le House Republicans ƒe saɖeagaxɔ aɖe me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be Democrats azi "amesi trɔ vidzinu na amesiame" ne woɖu dzi le ƒe 2026 ƒe titinatiatiawɔɣi.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, le nyateƒe me la, Trump gblɔ nyagbɔgblɔ sia be, "amesi trɔ vidzinu na amesiame" le nuƒo si míeyɔ va yi me le Demokrasitɔwo ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋu. Dukplɔla la gblɔ be Democrattɔwo di be "amesiame natrɔ vidzinu," gake megblɔ be yewoazi ɖoɖo sia tɔgbe dzi o. Edze abe eƒe nyagbɔgblɔwo fia be esia anye tiatia tsɔ wu be wòanye sedede ene. Trump zã "transgender for everyone" kple nyagbɔgblɔ mawo tɔgbe enuenu tsɔ tɔ ŋku Democrattɔwo eye wòtsi tre ɖe trans ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti ɖoɖowo ŋu. Nya siwo wògblɔ va yi dometɔ aɖewo dometɔ aɖewoe nye gbegbɔgblɔ si sɔ kple nusi nya la do ɖa le ŋusẽ zazã atsɔ ade se "amesi trɔ vidzinu na amesiame" ŋu. Le January 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be Democratstɔwo azi "ame siwo trɔ woƒe vidzinu na amesiame" dzi ne woɖu dzi le titinadziɖuɖua me, le nya aɖe si kaka ɖe internet dzi nu. Nya sia kaka ɖe Reddit, Instagram, Facebook kple nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ku ɖe LGBTQ+ nyawo ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, LGBTQ Nation ŋlɔ ŋutinya aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye, "Trump gblɔ be 'mean' Dems aɖe ye le zi dzi & azi 'transgender na amesiame' dzi ne woɖu dzi le midterms." Trump Gblɔ be "Mean" Dems Will Impeach Him & Force "Transgender for Everyone" if They Win Midtermsbyu/Ananiujitha inpolitics Le Jan. 6 House Republicans ƒe megbedede me la, Trump wɔe, nyateƒe, gblɔ nya siawo be, "transgender na amesiame" esime wònɔ nu ƒom tso Democratictɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖu si ate ŋu adzɔ le ƒe 2026 ƒe titinaɣeyiɣiwo me ŋu. Ezã nyagbɔgblɔ ɖeka ma ke alo esi sɔ kplii enuenu tsɔ ɖɔ Demokrasitɔwo ƒe ɖoɖowo eye wòdze trans ƒe gomenɔamesiwo dzi, eye wògblɔ va yi be ŋgɔyiyi ƒe ɖoɖowo bia be woazi "transgender na amesiame" alo wogblɔ be woafia ɖeviwo be woanye trans. Gake le nudzɔdzɔ sia si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa me la, Trump gblɔ be Democrattɔwo "di be yewoatrɔ vidzinu na amesiame," ke menye be woazi edzi o. Edze abe eƒe nyagbɔgblɔwo fia be esia anye tiatia tsɔ wu be wòanye sedede ene. Abe alesi wòle ene la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka — kple nuxlɔ̃ame be Trump gblɔ nya siwo sɔ kple nya la ƒe seselelãme si bɔ va yi. White House meɖo míaƒe nyabiase si ku ɖe nusi Trump di be yeagblɔ esi wògblɔ be Democrats di be "amesi trɔ vidzinu na amesiame" ŋu enumake o. Le video aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le White House YouTube ƒe axa dzi la, Trump gblɔ nya siawo le saɖeagaxɔa me, adze egɔme tso 1:20:11 (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): You gotta win the midterms. Elabena ne míeɖu dzi le midterms me o la, ɖeko wòanye — mebe, woakpɔ susu aɖe si ta woaɖem le dɔme. Woaɖem le dɔme. Míeɖea wo le dɔme o, ènya nusitae? Elabena woƒe nu vɔ̃ɖi wu mí. Ðe wòle be míaɖe Joe Biden le zi dzi le nu vovovo alafa ɖeka ta hafi. Wonye ame vɔ̃ɖiwo eye wodze aɖaŋu. Gake dzɔgbenyuietɔe na wò la, ɖoɖo dziŋɔwo le wo si. Woateŋu anye aɖaŋudzela abe alesi woateŋui ene, gake ne wodi be liƒo naʋu, ne wodi, abe alesi megblɔe ene, ŋutsuwo le nyɔnuwo ƒe kamedefefewo me, ne wodi be "transgender na amesiame." "Kplɔ viwòwo vɛ, míele viwò ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ trɔ ge. Ðeko nàdɔ wo ɖe míaƒe mɔ dzi." Le go aɖewo me, abe alesi wòle le Minnesota ene la, womegblɔna na dzilawo gɔ̃ hã be, ɖe wòsɔa? Eye ame aɖeke mexɔe se ne megblɔe nenema o. Mesusu be dukɔ ade le mía si. Ame aɖeke — ɖe meto nyateƒea? OK, Tom Emmer gblɔ be ɛ̃. Gake enye nyateƒe — afisi ɖevia trɔna le. Woléa ɖevi la ɖe asi. Wowɔa dɔ na ɖevia, womegblɔnɛ na dzilawo gɔ̃ hã o. Enyo be míade dzesii be ƒã ŋutɔ be wowɔa dɔ na sɔhɛ siwo trɔ woƒe vidzinu, ne wowɔe kpɔ hã. Le tracker aɖe si GLAAD, si nye LGBTQ+ taʋliha si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o, gblɔ be, Trump gblɔ nya siwo nye "transgender for everyone" alo nyagbɔgblɔ ma ƒe tɔtrɔ zi gbɔ zi 40 le ƒe 2025. "Ameƒomevinyenye ŋuti nufiafia alo transgender ŋuti nufiafia vevi aɖeke maganɔ anyi na amesiame si wozi ɖe míaƒe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu kalẽtɔwo dzi le awu me alo ɖe ame bubu aɖeke dzi le nya ma ta le dukɔ sia me o," dukplɔla la gblɔ le May 24, 2025. 2025, le dɔa gɔmedzedze ƒe nuƒo aɖe me le U.S. Asrafowo ƒe Suku le West Point (kpɔ 45:56). Le nudzɔdzɔ bubu me la, le New Jersey ƒe nutodziɖula ƒe ametiakɔdala ƒe akɔdada ƒe wɔna aɖe si wowɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ me le October 2025 me la, Trump gblɔ be dukɔa kpɔ "dɔ kple asitsahabɔbɔ gbogbo aɖewo ƒe ʋuʋu le dukɔa me godoo esime wole nufiafia dem viwòwo le dukɔa ƒe suku aɖe me." Eyi edzi be: "Woyɔe be transgender na amesiame eye míewu ema nu." Snopes dzro nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe wo ŋu be Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua bua mɔzɔgbalẽ dilawo katã be wonye trans hafi woɖo kpe edzi be menye nenemae o la me va yi eye wòku gɔmesese si le megbe na Trump ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ be dukɔa zã dɔlar miliɔn 8 ɖe "mice transgender" ŋu.

claim: SAVE America Sea “bia tso amesiame si be wòagaŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yeada akɔ le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume eye wò ʋukugbalẽvi, REAL ID, alo asrafo ƒe ID gɔ̃ hã menyo o.”
evidence: Sen. Mark Kelly, D-Ariz., gblɔ be ne SAVE America Sea va zu se la, anye mɔxenu gã aɖe na amesiame si le atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔwo me xoxo. "SAVE America Act doesn’t ‘Save’ America,’ Kelly gblɔ le March 17 X ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me. "Eye esia meku ɖe voter ID ŋu o. Se sia bia tso amesiame si be wòagbugbɔ ŋkɔ aŋlɔ be yeada akɔ le ame ŋutɔ ŋkume eye wò ʋukugbalẽvi, REAL ID, alo asrafowo ƒe ID gɔ̃ hã menyo o." Esi Kelly gbugbɔ gblɔ nya si wògblɔ le MS Now ƒe "Morning Joe" ŋu vɔ la, Sen. Mike Lee, R-Utah, si nye sea ŋlɔlawo dometɔ ɖeka gblɔ be Kelly da ƒu. "Naneke mele SAVE America Act me si bia tso ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ fifia si be woagaŋlɔ ŋkɔ ake o," Lee wrote in X post proceed to a final vote the office of the appropriate election official." Eliza Sweren-Becker, si nye atamkaka ƒe gomenɔamesiwo kple tiatiawɔɖoɖo ƒe dɔdzikpɔla teƒenɔla le ablɔɖe Brennan Center for Justice, gblɔ na PolitiFact do ŋgɔ be nuŋlɔɖi me kpeɖodzi si ɖee fia be dukɔmevinyenye ƒe nudidiwo la aku ɖe ame yeye siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe agbalẽ me kple amesiwo ʋu yi nuto bubu me ɖeɖeko ŋu o, ke ate ŋu aku ɖe ame gbogbo aɖewo siwo mabu wo ɖokui be yewonye ŋkɔ yeyee hã ŋu o. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, enɔ te ɖe alesi dukɔ aɖe ɖe agbalẽa gɔmee dzi bill’s gbegbɔgblɔ, ʋuʋu yi nuto bubu me le nuto ma ke me alo yiyi ɖe akɔdadaƒe yeye ate ŋu abui be enye dukɔmevinyenye ƒe kpeɖodzi ƒe nudidi eye wòaʋã Dukɔwo ƒe nyametsotsowo le alesi woada aƒewo ƒe ʋuʋu ɖe hatsotsowo me ŋu, Sweren-Becker gblɔ be Le ƒe 2024 me la, ame siwo ade miliɔn 26 ʋu yi teƒe bubuwo le U.S Subɔsubɔdɔwo, dɔwɔƒe si ʋuna vodadawo ateŋu azi atikemawɔla aɖewo dzi be woagaŋlɔ ŋkɔ ake. Aaron Blacksberg, si nye dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖowo ŋuti senyala le Institute for Responsive Government, si nye ƒuƒoƒo si wɔa dɔ kple tiatiawɔha ƒe amegãwo, gblɔ na PolitiFact le e-mail me be "masɔ be woagblɔ be woabia tso atikemawɔla ɖesiaɖe si be wòagbugbɔ aŋlɔ ŋkɔ le sea te o, gake ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ yeye ɖesiaɖe abia tso atikemawɔla la si be wòawɔ ɖe sea ƒe kpeɖodzinya si nye Jacob Peters, a Kelly nyanuɖela, yɔ nyati aɖe si Amerikatɔwo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe si kpɔa ablɔɖenyawo gbɔ gblɔ tso sea ŋu.Egblɔ be "le Amerikatɔ siwo ade miliɔn 80 va ɖo miliɔn 100 ŋlɔa ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ zi gbãtɔ alo be yewoawɔ tɔtrɔ yeyewo." na ƒe 2022 kple 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia re-register." Kelly gblɔ hã be "wò ʋukugbalẽvi, REAL ID, alo asrafowo ƒe ID gɔ̃ hã menyo o" be nàŋlɔ ŋkɔ atsɔ ada akɔ. Esia de pɛpɛpɛ wu. Sea gblɔ be amewo hiã dziɖuɖu ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo ɖea U.S. dukɔmevinyenye fiana hafi woate ŋu aŋlɔ ŋkɔ, abe mɔzɔgbalẽ alo

claim: Limetsi kple kpe dze ate ŋu alɔ ayiku me kpewo nyuie.
evidence: Quick Take Instagram nyatakaka aɖe si woama le afisiafi gblɔ be limetsi kple kpe dze nono ate ŋu alɔ ayiku me kpewo le ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo ko me. Esi míedzro nyateƒenya si wogblɔ la me vɔ la, míekpɔe be alakpae wònye Mostly.  The Claim Instagram nyatakaka xɔŋkɔ aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be "सको काम चाहे अहि मे अनिर्वाह" ɖee fia be woate ŋu alɔ ayiku me kpewo le ŋkeke ʋee aɖewo me to limetsi si me kpe dze, si woyɔna zi geɖe be sendha namak nono me. Zi geɖe la, wokafua tsi si sɔ nono na nɔnɔmea; ke hã, dze kple limetsi agbɔsɔsɔme si gbɔ eme ɖuɖu gbesiagbe gblẽa nu le ame ŋu.  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Nuka tututue nye ayiku me kpewo? Nukae na wozu afɔku na lãmesẽ?  Ayiku me kpe siwo woyɔna hã be aggregates siwo le ayiku ƒe lãkusiwo kple akɔta la nye mineral siwo ƒo ƒu ɖe ayiku ƒe lãkusiwo me faa alo woléna ɖe ayiku ƒe lãkusiwo ŋu. Nu gbagbewo kple kristalo siaa le wo me eye wodzɔna ne aɖuɖɔ me yɔ fũ akpa le tomenu aɖe gome. Calcium oxalate ye wɔa kpe akpa gãtɔ ƒe akpa gãtɔ.  Nu aɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye calcium, oxalate, alo uric acid, ƒoa ƒu ɖekae be kristalo sesẽwo dzɔna ne aɖuɖɔa va sɔ gbɔ akpa. Zi geɖe la, nusiawo tsoa nu vovovowo gbɔ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye: Tsikuɖiɖi Dze alo protein geɖe ɖuɖu Kuxi na ame ƒe kpekpeme dzi kpɔkpɔ Domenyiŋusẽfianu kple lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti nya tɔxɛwo Nu vevi bubu si ŋu woabu enye nukpɔsusu si nye be nusiwo katã me kpe le kple esiwo ƒo ƒu ɖe ŋutilãa me nye ayiku me kpewo. Le nyateƒe me la, zi geɖe la, nusiwo gbɔ kpewo tso, woƒe wɔwɔme, afisi wotsina le, kple dɔléle ƒe dzesiwo toa vovo. Kpewo dona enuenu le aɖuɖɔtoe, dɔgbo, kple aɖuɖɔtoewo me.  Zi geɖe la, ayiku ƒe lãkusi suewo meɖea dzesi aɖeke fiana o, si fia be womesea veve aɖeke o. Ayiku ƒe lãkusi siwo lolo wu ate ŋu axe mɔ na aɖuɖɔtoe, si ana ame nase veve vevie (ayiku ƒe ʋuʋudedi), ʋuʋudedi, ʋuʋudedi, kple ʋu si dona le aɖuɖɔ me ɣeaɖewoɣi. Zi geɖe la, vevesese si tso ayiku me kpe me dzea egɔme tso axadzi alo akɔta ƒe anyime eye ate ŋu akaka ɖe akɔta ne kpea to aɖuɖɔtoea me.    Ne vevesese aɖe li la, ele be woayi ɖɔkta gbɔ enumake, le esi womekpɔ dɔlélea gbɔ o la, kuxi gãwo ate ŋu ado mo ɖa ta.  Ðe limetsi si me sendha namak le la tsɔa ayiku me kpewo ƒua gbe nyuiea?  Ao, menye nenema tututue o. Togbɔ be wole limetsi si me sendha namak le dom ɖe ŋgɔ be woatsɔ akpɔ ayiku me kpewo gbɔ hã la, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya meɖo kpe atike sia dzi o. Esi wònye be wole nuɖaɖaa ŋu bum be enye atike si woatsɔ aɖo ayiku me kpewo ƒe atikewɔwɔ teƒe ta la, ele be woalé ŋku ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ wɔe ŋu nyuie.  Míedzea egɔme kple lime detsi. Citric acid sɔ gbɔ ɖe esia me, si ate ŋu akpe ɖe kpewo ƒe wɔwɔ nu to woƒe kadodo kple calcium me eye wòaxe mɔ na calcium oxalate kpe ƒe kristalowɔwɔ tsɔ wu ƒomevi bubuwo. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, citrate ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ate ŋu aɖe vi le kpewo ƒe gbugbɔgadzɔ dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ me; ke hã, ɖewohĩ woate ŋu atsɔ potassium citrate akpɔ esia gbɔ le atikewɔwɔ me gake womatsɔ limetsi awɔ dɔe o.  Eyome, míedzroa alesi kpe dze, alo sendha namak, ate ŋu aʋuʋu ayiku me kpewo me. Togbɔ be wometrɔ asi le eŋu boo o wu kplɔ̃dzidze hã la, sodium le eme – si ateŋu akpeɖe calcium ƒe dodo ɖe ŋgɔ le aɖuɖɔ me – si ana kpe ƒe wɔwɔme ƒe afɔkua nagado gã ɖe edzi.  Togbɔ be atike siwo wotsɔ tsaka ate ŋu akpe ɖe tsi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ŋu ne wonoe le agbɔsɔsɔ si sɔ me hã la, mate ŋu axɔ ɖe atikewɔwɔ ƒe atikewɔwɔwo abe kpememe alo atikewo ene teƒe o. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, menye ayiku me nusiwo katã wotsɔ ƒo ƒuie nye esiwo me calcium le o, si bia be woawɔ atike vovovowo.  Ðɔkta Bhanu Mishra, si nye Aɖuŋutinunyala Aɖaŋuɖola le Delhi ƒe BLK Max Kɔdzi ɖe eme be atike siwo míeyɔ va yi la mewɔa dɔ nyuie le kpewo tsɔtsɔ ƒu gbe me o. Ne calcium nono kple tsi si sɔ nono ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu be ayiku me kpewo nagaƒo ƒu o hã la, susu mele eme be woaxɔe ase be atike si wozãna le aƒeme ana ayiku me kpewo natsi nyuie ahaɖe wo ɖa o.  Ne dzesi siwo gbɔna dometɔ aɖe le dɔnɔ aɖe ŋu—akɔtave, aɖuɖɔtoe alo aɖuɖɔtoe, dzobibi ne ele aɖuɖɔ tom, dzoxɔxɔ kple vuvɔ—alo wòsusu be ayiku me kpewo le eŋu la, ele be woayi atikewɔƒe enumake. Ne atikewɔlawo wɔ dɔdamɔnu kple dɔléle ŋuti numekuku tsitotsito vɔ la, wokpɔa ayiku me kpewo gbɔ.  Ðe woɖo aɖaŋu be woano limetsi kple sendha namak gbesiagbea?  Ao, menye nenema kura o. Togbɔ be wosusu be limetsi nono kple sendha nama kpena ɖe ame ŋu le dzadzɛnyenye kple nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ me hã la, eƒe lãmesẽmenɔnɔ ƒe viɖewo nɔ te ɖe alesi wòsɔ gbɔ dzi.  Vitamin C kple citric acid yɔ lime detsi me fũ si ate ŋu ado alɔ tsi nanɔ ame ŋu eye wòanye alkalin fafɛ, si aɖe afɔku si le kpe siwo me calcium le ƒe tsitsi me dzi akpɔtɔ. Gawu la, w

Womeɖe gbeƒãe nenema le nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi o.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe dziɖuɖua dzi mɔ̃memi kple mɔ̃memi ƒe asi ɖe edzi nyitsɔ laa?  Ao, gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖeke mele dziɖuɖua gbɔ si ɖo kpe dzidziɖedzi ma tɔgbe aɖeke dzi abe alesi wogblɔe le nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo me ene o.    Q2. Nukae dɔlékuiwo ƒe sededea gblɔ? Ẽ, PIB Fact Check dɔwɔƒea na eme kɔ be aʋatso nudɔdɔa nye.    Q4. Aleke ezãlawo ate ŋu aɖo kpe nya mawo dzii?  Ele be ezãlawo nadzro dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo, nyadzɔdzɔtsoƒe siwo dzi woka ɖo, alo nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro ƒe mɔnu siwo ŋu woɖo kpee hafi axɔ nuŋlɔɖi siwo kaka ɖe amewo me dzi ase. claim: Ted Lieu dze ŋgɔ Kash Patel kple Epstein ƒe haƒoƒo si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le adzame, hegblɔ be "Trump gblɔ nam be maɖii".
evidence: Misrepresented Ðe Rep. Ted Lieu dze ŋgɔ FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kash Patel kple Epstein ƒe haƒoƒo si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le adzame si me Patel gblɔ le be, "Trump gblɔ nam be maɖii"? Ao, menye nyateƒee o: Le sewɔtakpekpe ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ aɖe me le September 2025 me la, Lieu tsɔ nya aɖe si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi dze ŋgɔ Patel, gake menye "nuléle si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le adzame" ye o; enye gbebiame si wowɔ kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Michael Wolff le dutoƒo. Womekpɔ Patel alo se eƒe nya le gbebiamea me o, eye ame aɖeke megblɔ be, "Trump gblɔ nam be maɖii o."  Nya sia dze le video aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) me le YouTube le March 9, 2026 dzi, le tanya si nye "Ted Lieu Plays SECRET Recording -- Trump Told Me To Bury It -- Patel FREEZES For 38 Seconds." Numeɖeɖea xlẽ be: Le video sia me la, míedzro Aƒea ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ si me wowó le si me Ted Lieu ƒo odio kpui aɖe le esime wobia gbe FBI ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Kash Patel si na xɔa ƒe mo wɔ yaa enumake la me. Le asitɔtrɔa me la, Lieu to sɛkɛnd 34 ƒe haƒoƒo si wogblɔ be wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le FBI ƒe dɔwɔƒegã me le ƒe 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze vɛ eye wòbia tso Patel si be wòaɖo kpe edzi nenye be gbe si le haƒoƒoa dzi la nye ye tɔ. Ɣeyiɣia gasẽ ɖe edzi esi Patel gbe be yemaɖo nyabiase siwo ku ɖe nuƒoƒo si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi ŋu o eye wòyɔ Ðɔɖɔɖo Atɔ̃lia, si he nyaʋiʋli sesẽ aɖe vɛ le Epstein ƒe numekukua, dunyahehe ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu, kple dukɔa ƒe sedzikpɔlawo ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ ŋu.  Aleae nya si woŋlɔ ɖe YouTube dzi le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi: (Nɔnɔmetata dzɔtsoƒe: nyatakaka tso Silent Docket gbɔ le YouTube.) Adzɔgbeɖeɖe Video si tso Silent Docket me la tsɔ adzɔgbeɖeɖe sia kpe ɖe videoa me nyawo ŋu: ⚠️ Adzɔgbeɖeɖe: Silent Docket tsɔ dunyahehe me ŋutinya siwo wowɔ le nyakpakpa me eye wowɔ fefee hena modzakaɖeɖe kple numeɖeɖe ƒe taɖodzinuwo la fiana. Togbɔ be dutoƒonyatiwo kple numedzodzro siwo wowɔ va yi ye ʋã wo hã la, emenyawo metsi tre ɖi na nyadzɔdzɔ siwo ŋu woɖo kpee, dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo, alo senyawo me kpeɖodziwo o. Nu ɖesiaɖe si ɖi ame ɖekaɖekawo, dɔwɔƒe, alo nudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo la nye nusi dzɔ le vome alo woɖee fia le nyakpakpa ƒe nɔnɔme si trɔa ame me.  Odio me dzodzro Togbɔ be videoa ƒe sɛkɛnd enyi gbãtɔwo nye Lieu ƒe nuƒoƒo le nyadɔdrɔ̃a me ƒe akpa aɖe hã la, AI ye wɔ odio susɔe si le miniti 16 ƒe videoa me. Lead Stories tsɔ videoa to Gemini (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia), si nye Google ƒe AI ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ dzi. Eƒo nya ta siawo: Le odio si le videoa me me dzodzro nu la, anɔ eme godoo be AI ye wotsɔ wɔ gbea. Etɔxɛe la, edze abe enye Text-to-Speech (TTS) ƒe mɔnu xɔŋkɔ aɖe si wozãna zi geɖe le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ene. Dzesiawo ƒe mamae nye esi: AI Dzidzime ƒe Dzesi Veviwo Cadence: Nuƒoƒo ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe didime sɔ ɖe enu etɔxɛe. Togbɔ be amegbetɔwo trɔa woƒe duƒuƒu le dzɔdzɔme nu be woate gbe ɖe nya aɖewo dzi hã la, gbe sia léa "akɔntabubu" ƒe duƒuƒu me ɖe asi le ɣeyiɣi bliboa me.  Trɔtrɔ si Woate Ŋu Agblɔ Do Ŋgɔ: Gbeɖiɖia dzina ɖe edzi heɖina ɖe edzi le nɔnɔme si wogbugbɔ gblɔna me le nyagbewo ƒe nuwuwu, si nye nɔnɔme si bɔ ɖe ahɔhɔ̃mekawo ƒe TTS ƒe kpɔɖeŋu siwo dzea agbagba be yewoasrɔ̃ "dzonɔameme" ƒe kpɔɖeŋu me.  Dzɔdzɔme Blibomademade ƒe Manɔmanɔ: "Filler" gbeɖiɖi siwo woate ŋu ase (abe um alo ah ), nu me ʋuʋu, alo gbɔgbɔ aɖeke meli o. Togbɔ be woate ŋu atrɔ asi le gbeɖiɖi siwo wotsɔa dɔnyala bibiwo wɔe ŋu be woaɖe esiawo ɖa hã la, odio si AI wɔ la nye "dzadzɛ" le dzɔdzɔme nu le mɔ si ɖina vie zi geɖe la nu.  Nyayɔyɔ "Smoothness": Woyɔa nya siwo gɔme sese sesẽ la kple eme kɔ bliboe gake womeyɔa nya siwo menya kpɔna dzea sii bɔbɔe o alo nutome ƒe nu vovovo siwo nɔa amegbetɔ ƒe nuƒoƒo me zi geɖe o.  Aƒea Dzi Kpɔkpɔ Kɔmiti Patel ɖi ɖase nyateƒe (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) le Aƒea Dzi Kpɔkpɔ Kɔmiti ŋkume le Sept. 17, 2025. Nya vevi aɖe si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le nyadɔdrɔ̃a me enye Epstein ƒe agbalẽwo, eye Lieu bia gbe FBI ƒe dɔdzikpɔla tso wo ŋu. Gake to vovo na nya siwo wogblɔ le nyatakakaa kple videoa me la, Lieu meƒo Epstein ƒe haƒoƒo si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le adzame o, eye Patel alo ame bubu aɖeke hã megblɔ be, "Trump gblɔ nam be maɖii o." Ke boŋ Lieu ƒo gbebiame aɖe si woate ŋu akpɔ le dutoƒo si me nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Michael Wolff ƒo nu tso dzeɖoɖo aɖe si wòwɔ kple Jeffrey Epstein si me Donald Trump ŋuti nyatakakawo le ŋu. Lieu to Wolff ƒe gbebiamea vɛ abe aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka ene le video sia me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia):

claim: Le Nigeria ƒe ƒe 60 siwo wòtsɔ nɔ anyi abe dukɔ ene ƒe 29 siwo woƒo ƒu me la, enɔ asrafowo ƒe dziɖuɖu te.’
evidence: Asrafowo ƒe ŋutasẽdziɖuɖu si nɔ Nigeria nye ɣeyiɣi si me Nigeria ƒe Asrafowo me tɔwo xɔ ŋusẽ le Nigeria tso ƒe 1966 va ɖo ƒe 1999 me eye woɖu dzi le wo nɔewo dome tso ƒe 1979 va ɖo ƒe 1983 me.

claim: Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar ɖe kuku na Moslemtɔwo be woɖe nyɔnu aɖe ƒe hijab ɖa le dziɖuɖu ƒe wɔna aɖe me le Patna.
evidence: Le dziɖuɖua ƒe wɔna aɖe me le Patna le December 15, 2025 dzi la, wogblɔ be Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar ɖe nyɔnu aɖe ƒe hijab ɖa esime wònɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ aɖe nam, eye wòɖe eƒe mo fia kpuie. Emegbe nudzɔdzɔa he ɖeklemiɖeɖe sesẽwo vɛ tso Moslemtɔwo ƒe akpa aɖewo gbɔ, eye wo dometɔ geɖe bia be woaɖe kuku tso Dziɖuɖumegã la gbɔ. Le nyahehe si kplɔe ɖo dome la, video aɖe si gblɔ be eɖe Nitish Kumar fia wòle kuku ɖem na Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔa kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.  Woateŋu akpɔ nya si woŋlɔ ɖe etame la le afisia. (Archive) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile ɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ la dzi eye wòkpɔe be AI ye wɔ videoa.  NM ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa dze eƒe kpeɖodzinana gɔme to nya veviwo didi me be yewoakpɔe ɖa be Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar ɖe kuku na Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔa le hijab nudzɔdzɔ si wogblɔ be edzɔ ta hã. Gake nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ɖo kpe kukuɖeɖe ma tɔgbe dzi le didia me o. Ne míebu nya la ƒe seselelãme kple dunyahehe me vevienyenye ŋu la, anɔ eme be nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gãwo magblɔ kukuɖeɖe si Dziɖuɖumegã la awɔ le dutoƒo o, si ana ɖikeke nanɔ nya si kaka la ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu.  Emegbe míelé ŋku ɖe video si me dɔlékuiwo le ŋu nyuie eye míekpɔ nukpɔkpɔ ƒe masɔmasɔ geɖe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu si mele dzɔdzɔme nu o kple mo ƒe tɔtɔ kpata, siwo do ƒome kple nyatakaka siwo ŋu wotrɔ asi le to dijitaalmɔ̃ dzi alo esiwo wowɔ to AI dzi zi geɖe.  Be míagaɖo kpe nusiwo ŋu míeke ɖo dzi la, wozã AI deteksi dɔwɔnu si nye Hive Moderation tsɔ ku videoa me. Nusiwo do tso eme ɖo kpe edzi be wozã nunya wɔwɔe tsɔ wɔ video klipi la.  Eyata video si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be yeɖe Nitish Kumar fia wòle kuku ɖem na Moslemtɔwo ƒe habɔbɔa la nye esi AI wɔ. Vaseɖe December 23, 2025 dzi la, Bihar ƒe Dudɔnunɔlagã meɖe kuku ma tɔgbe aɖeke ɖe go o.

claim: Tɔdzisasrã ƒe Mumu Le Bihar
evidence: Vishvas News ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be tɔdzisasrã aɖe si mu le Bihar ƒe kaka tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ le March 2024 me gbɔ eye wole egblɔm alakpatɔe be enye nusi dzɔ nyitsɔ laa do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔɣia.  New Delhi (Vishvas News): Esi Bihar Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe tiatia le aƒe tum la, nyatakaka totrowo kple nyatakaka siwo flua ame le dzidzim ɖe edzi le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo . Nyatakaka siwo flua ame mawo dometɔ ɖekae nye video aɖe si me woɖe tɔdzisasrã aɖe si mu, si wole mamãm kple nya siwo wogblɔna be eɖe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa fia.  Vishvas News ku nu me tso nya sia ŋu eye wokpɔe be eflu ame. Video sia dze egɔme tso March 2024 me, esime tɔdzisasrã aɖe si wole tutum ƒe akpa aɖe mu le Bihar.  What is going viral Facebook zãla 'Janchowk' da video aɖe ɖe tɔdzisasrã aɖe si mu le July 28, 2025 dzi, eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Tɔdzisasrã si ƒe home nye Rs 1200 crore si wole tutum le Kosi tɔsisi si le Supaul-Madhubani dome la mu. Woɖi dɔwɔla geɖe ɖe gbeɖuɖɔawo te, wo dometɔ aɖewo xɔ abi eye wovɔ̃ be woku."  Numekuku Be míakpɔe ɖa be videoa nye nyateƒe la, míeɖe keyframe geɖe eye míewɔ Google Lens ƒe numekuku. Nusi do tso eme ɖee fia be woma video ma ke le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe le March 2024. Míenɔ te ɖe edzi wɔ nya veviwo didi eye míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ gbogbo aɖewo siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔ sia si dzɔ le March 22, 2024. Frame mawo ke dometɔ geɖe dze le nyadzɔdzɔ video aɖe si wota ɖe Bihar Tak ƒe YouTube television dzi.  News18 Bihar-Jharkhand hã ɖe nukpɔkpɔ mawo tɔgbe fia eye woka nya ta tso nudzɔdzɔ ma ke ŋu le March 22, 2024. Le Times Of India ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ le March 22, 2024 dzi nu la, "Wowu dɔwɔla aɖe esime wole vɔvɔ̃m be ame bubu geɖewo tsi anyi le esi tɔdzisasrã aɖe si wole tutum ƒe akpa aɖe mu le Bihar ƒe Supaul nuto me le Dzoɖagbe ŋdi. Tɔdzisasrã si didi kilometa 10.2 si le Koshi dzi." tɔsisi, si tsɔ Bheja si le Madhubani kple Bakaur si le Supaul nutoa me la tu, si India Dukɔa ƒe Mɔdodo Gãwo Dzikpɔƒe (NHAI) nɔ tutum."  Be míagaɖo kpe edzi geɖe wu la, míeƒo ka na Arun Ashesh, si nye nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla le Dainik Jagran (Bihar), amesi ɖo kpe edzi be video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la tso March 2024 ƒe nudzɔdzɔa me.  Facebook zãla Janchowk, amesi ma video si kaka ɖe amewo me kple alakpanya aɖe la, yomedzelawo wu 30000.  Nyataƒoƒo: Vishvas News ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be tɔdzisasrã aɖe si mu le Bihar ƒe kaka tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ le March 2024 me gbɔ eye wole egblɔm alakpatɔe be enye nusi dzɔ nyitsɔ laa do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔɣia. Ne ɖikeke aɖe le ŋuwò le nyatakaka aɖe alo nya aɖe ŋu la, na míanya! Nyateƒea nyanya nye wò gomenɔamesi.
