Kpe ɖe mía ŋu le míaƒe avuwɔwɔ kple alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo me.  Tags ƒe nyawo

claim: Bernice King, si nye Rev. Martin Luther King Jr. vinyɔnu, bia tso U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump si be wòaɖe "Epstein files" ɖe go le esi eƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe FBI ƒe files ɖe go le fofoa ŋu le July 2025 me vɔ megbe.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le FBI ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Bubutɔ Martin Luther King Jr. wuwu ŋu ƒe July 2025 ƒe dodo megbe la, nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le Internet dzi gblɔ be King vinyɔnu Bernice King ɖe ɖeklemi U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le esi wòɖe fofoa ƒe nyatakakawo ɖe go le esiwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si ku ŋu ŋkume ta. Le ɣletia ƒe gɔmedzedze la, Trump ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe gblɔ be Epstein — amesi ku le eɖokuiwuwu me le gaxɔ me le eƒe léle le ƒe 2019 me le gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu le ƒe 2019 me megbe — melé eƒe asisiwo ƒe ŋkɔwo ɖi o, si to vovo na nya siwo wogblɔna ɖaa. Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ hã be yewomaɖe nyatakaka bubu siwo ku ɖe numekukua ŋu ɖe go o, togbɔ be wogblɔ va yi be yewoaɖee ɖe go hã, si na hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ŋlɔ nu tso kadodo si le Trump kple Epstein dome ŋu. Le July 21 lia dzi la, X akɔnta Republicantɔwo tsɔ tsi tre ɖe Trump ŋu da screenshot (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si wogblɔ be eɖe nya aɖe si Bernice King ŋlɔ si xlẽ be, "Azɔ, wɔ Epstein ƒe faɛlwo." Emegbe woɖe nyatakaka ma si amewo lɔ̃ wu zi 12,000 la le screenshot dzi eye womae ɖe Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe), afisi wòxɔ upvotes kple edzivɔ siwo wu 7,500 le. Esia nye X post (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si Bernice King ŋlɔ ƒe screenshot ŋutɔŋutɔ vavã, eyata nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe. Egblɔ nya sia le gaƒoƒo ʋee aɖewo megbe esi Trump dziɖuɖua ɖe gbeƒãe be yewole ye fofo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖem ɖe go. Hafi King natsɔ nya sia aƒo nu tso Epstein ŋu la, etsɔ eƒe susu aɖewo da ɖe edzi le fofoa ƒe faɛlwo ƒe dodo ŋu eye wòhe nya ɖe nyametsotso si wowɔ be woaɖe wo ɖe go ŋu. "Le nyateƒe me la, nyemele klalo be magbugbɔ ŋku alé ɖe ŋutinya veve sia ƒe nyatakaka dziŋɔwo ŋu o," King gblɔ na Vanity Fair eye wòmae le X. "Le gonyeme la, asixɔxɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖeke mele eŋu o; ɖeko wòle be woagbugbɔ agbe nuveviwɔamea." The New York Times gblɔ be vaseɖe fifia la, ŋutinyaŋlɔlawo mekpɔ nu boo aɖeke le nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖe go ku ɖe King wuwu ŋu me o.

claim: Nicholas Kɔkɔe, si nye amesi ʋã Santa Claus, ƒe ƒuwo le tsi si le dodom ƒe 1,700 enye sia.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Tadeagulawo dze tsi ɣaɣla aɖe si tso Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe yɔdo me nuƒoƒoƒu gɔme le eƒe ku megbe kpuie le ƒe 300-awo ƒe domedome, alo abe ƒe 1,700 enye sia ene. Esɔ wu be woagblɔ be tsi la tso Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe yɔdo me ke menye eƒe ƒuwo tẽ o, elabena womenya nusi tututu, le dodom le yɔdoa me o. Esi wònye be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo kpɔe be tsie tsi la nye ta la, ate ŋu anye tsi si ƒo ƒu tso yɔdoa me. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe Kristmas ɣeyiɣia me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo kaka nya aɖe si ate ŋu adze abe ɖe wòsɔ na Halloween wu ene: Wogblɔ be Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe ƒuwo — si ʋã Santa Claus — ƒe ƒuwo le "tsi si me kɔ, si le abe tsi ene" ƒom ƒe 1,700 sɔŋ enye sia. Nya sia kaka ɖe Reddit, X kple Facebook dzi. Nya mawo tɔgbe siwo woŋlɔ tso Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe ƒunukpeƒe si le tsia dzi ŋu kaka ɖe Internet dzi ƒe geɖe. Le nyateƒe me la, Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe yɔdoa wɔ tsi aɖe tso esime wòku le ƒe 300-awo ƒe domedome—anɔ abe ƒe 1,700 enye sia ene—le eŋutinunyala kple ŋutinya me nyatakaka geɖe ƒe nya nu. Gake to vovo na nya si wogblɔ la, asɔ wu be míagblɔ be tsi la tso yɔdoa me, ke menye amegãɖeɖi si le dzidzɔ kpɔm la ƒe ƒuwo me o, elabena kpeɖodzi si ŋu kakaɖedzi le mele mía si be nusi tututu le yɔdoa me le nusi le eme la wɔm o. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe kple nyatakaka siwo ŋu womeɖoe ɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Mɔzɔlawo dze tsi la nuƒoƒoƒu gɔme le ame kɔkɔe la ƒe ku megbe kpuie eye woxɔe se be dɔyɔŋusẽ le "manna" la si. Le ƒe 1925 me la, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala siwo le Bari Yunivɛsiti wɔ atikewo me dzodzro eye wokpɔe be Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe "ami" si daa gbe le ame ŋu nye tsi ŋutɔŋutɔ, le Papa ƒe Basilica San Nicola si le Bari, Italy, afisi Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe yɔdo le ƒe nya nu. Adam English, si nye mawusubɔsubɔ ŋutinyaŋlɔla kple "The Saint Who Would be Santa Claus" ŋlɔla gblɔ be anɔ eme godoo be "mana" nye tsikpe si le wɔwɔm le kpe yɔdoa me ko. Subɔsubɔha me tɔwo ɖea "mana" la le se nu le ƒe sia ƒe ƒe wɔna aɖe me le May 9 lia dzi le Nusiwo Wogblẽ ɖi ƒe Gbegɔmeɖeɖe ƒe Ŋkekenyui ɖuɣi le Katolikotɔwo kple Orthodɔkstɔwo teƒenɔlawo ŋkume. Emegbe wotsɔa mana la tsakana kple tsi kɔkɔe eye wotsɔae naa xɔsetɔ siwo biae, le Osɔfo Gerardo Cioffari, si nye numekukuwɔƒe si le Papawo ƒe Gbedoxɔ si le San Nicola ƒe dɔdzikpɔla ƒe nya nu. Here’s a 2010 video of the ceremony (manana ɖeɖe dzea egɔme tso 4:16): English gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be woyɔ tsi si tso Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe yɔdo me hã be myrrh, balm alo ami le ŋutinya katã me. Nu ɖeka si wòle be míade dzesii: Togbɔ be ame geɖe lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be afisi Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe ƒuwo le enye Bari, Italy, afisi wova wu enu le esi wogblɔ be ƒudzidelawo fi ƒuawo — si wogblɔ be woatsɔ akpɔ wo ta — tso Myra, si le egbegbe Turkey, gbɔ hã la, nya siwo ŋu woʋlia nya le be ame kɔkɔea ƒe kukuawo le Turkey, Ireland kple Venice, Italy. (Eŋlisigbe gblɔ be ƒu sueawo dometɔ aɖewo hã le Venice si, gake mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke be ƒu mawo le dodom o.) Michael Archimandrite, amesi ŋlɔ nusi woxɔ se be enye Nicholas Kɔkɔe ƒe agbemeŋutinya gbãtɔ si gakpɔtɔ li la, ka nya ta be "enumake" le ame kɔkɔea ƒe ku megbe la, yɔdoa "do ami ʋeʋĩ vivi aɖe si ʋẽna lilili, si trɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ kple gbegblẽ ɖesiaɖe, gake si naa xɔnametike si tsia vɔ̃ nu hena ame si kafui, Kristo, míaƒe Mawu vavã la, ƒe ŋutikɔkɔe." Carol Myers gblɔ be Michael ŋlɔ eƒe agbemeŋutinya le ƒe alafa enyilia ƒe gɔmedzedze. (Myers mekpɔ sukudede ƒe ɖoƒe aɖeke le St. Nicholas srɔ̃m o, gake eyae kpɔa St. Nicholas Center ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe dzi, si Eŋlisigbe yɔ be "wodea bubu eŋu ŋutɔ eye wowɔe le aɖaŋu me." Cioffari gblɔ be yeƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea nye dɔwɔnu xɔasi aɖe.) Michael ƒe nuŋlɔɖia nɔ te ɖe nuŋlɔɖi siwo do ŋgɔ siwo metsi agbe o dzi, Myers gblɔ. English ƒe agbalẽ si me wògblɔ nya aɖewo tsoe na Snopes la ƒo nu tso alesi xɔsetɔwo zãa mana ŋui: Mɔzɔlawo ƒoa zi ɖe kɔkɔeƒea abe anyiwo tsɔna yia tsi me ene; wodea bubu eŋu eye woƒoa ami ʋeʋĩwo nu ƒu na woƒe lɔlɔ̃tɔ siwo dze dɔ. Womi Myra ƒe mire la, tsɔe ƒo ɖe abixɔlawo ŋu, tsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe ta tame, eye wode asixɔxɔ eŋu be enye ŋkuɖodzinu xɔasi aɖe. Eɖe vi na amesiwo mete ŋu zɔna alo kpɔa nu alo sea nu alo ƒoa nu o, kpakple amesiwo mete ŋu le fu ɖem na gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo o. Togbɔ be Roma Katolikotɔwo lɔ̃a etsɔtsɔ tsaka le tsi dzadzɛ me hã la, Orthodɔks Russiatɔwo tsɔe kpe ɖe ami si wotsɔa amisisi ŋu. Mɔzɔla mawuvɔ̃lawo yɔa tsi la hã be mana—si nye nu ɣi si le ƒuƒuie si naa nuɖuɖu Israel-viwo nukutɔe le gbedadaƒo (Mose II, 16:31, 4 Mose 11:7-8). Blema Helagbe me nuŋlɔɖi gbogbo aɖewo siwo ɖo kpe nukunu si wogblɔ be wowɔ kple eƒe dɔyɔŋusẽ dzi la le Italygbe me le Basilica Pontifica San Nic

claim: Nutsitsidɔ Wua Kansa Lãmenugbagbeviwo le Ŋkeke 15 Me
evidence: Quick Take Nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be nutsitsidɔ ate ŋu awu kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo le ŋkeke 15 me. Míedzro nyateƒenyawo me eye míekpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Nya si Wogblɔ Le Facebook video aɖe me la, amesi gblɔ be yexɔ kansa la gblɔ be ne wokpɔ kansa le ye ŋu gbeɖeka la, yeatsi nu adɔ ŋkeke 15 elabena yexɔe se be nutsitsidɔ wua kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo.  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Ðe nutsitsidɔ ɖea kansa ɖa le ŋkeke 15 me tso esime wokpɔe?  Ao, atikewɔƒe aɖeke meli si ɖee fia be nutsitsidɔ daa kansa le ŋkeke 15 me alo kura gɔ̃ hã o. Menye dɔléle ɖeka koe kansa nye o. Nɔnɔme vovovo siwo wu 200, siwo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe ƒe nugbagbeŋutinunya, tsitsi ƒe ɖoɖo, kple alesi wowɔa nui ɖe atikewɔwɔ ŋu le etɔxɛe le eme. Dɔdzẽ aɖewo tsina kabakaba; bubuwo tsina vivivi. Ame aɖewo wɔa nu nyuie ne wozã atikewo; bubuwo hiã amekoko, atikewɔwɔ si woɖo taɖodzinu na, alo dɔlélenutsiŋutete ƒe dɔdamɔnu. Nu gbagbewo ƒe mɔnu aɖeke meli si ŋu woɖo kpee le amegbetɔwo ŋu si ana nutsitsidɔ ɖeɖe dzaa naɖe dɔdzẽ siwo woɖo anyi ɖa keŋkeŋ le kwasiɖa eve me o.  Dzidzɔ si dona tso nutsitsidɔ kple kansa ŋu ƒe akpa gãtɔ tsoa numekuku siwo wowɔ le nudokpɔƒe le lãmenugbagbeviwo alo lãwo ŋu me. Le dodokpɔxɔ siwo dzi wokpɔna me la, nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ate ŋu ana dɔdzẽ ƒe tsitsi nagbɔdzɔ le kpɔɖeŋu aɖewo me. Gake nusiwo dona tso sisiblisiwo alo lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dekɔnuwo me metrɔna le wo ɖokui si zua dɔyɔyɔ le amegbetɔwo me o. Amegbetɔ ƒe kansa ŋuti nugbagbeŋutinunya sesẽ wu sã, eye wòlɔ dɔlélenutsiŋutete ƒe dɔwɔwɔ, lãmetsiŋusẽ, dɔdzẽ, domenyiŋusẽfianu, kple atikewɔwɔ ƒe kadodo ɖe eme.  Dɔdamɔnu dodokpɔ siwo wowɔ le amegbetɔwo ŋu koŋue ku ɖe nutsitsidɔ ƒe ɣeyiɣi kpuiwo (gaƒoƒo 24–72) alo nuɖuɖu siwo srɔ̃a nutsitsidɔ le atikewɔmɔnu ƒe tsatsam ŋu. Dodokpɔ siawo dzroa dedienɔnɔ, alesi wòate ŋu adzɔe, kple nenye be nutsitsidɔ ate ŋu aɖe atikewɔwɔ ƒe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu dzi akpɔtɔ ke menye nenye be ada kansa o. Fifia la, amegbetɔwo ŋuti numekuku deŋgɔ aɖeke meɖee fia be nutsitsidɔ ɖeɖe dzaa ɖea kansa ɖa o.  Míedo asi ɖe Ðɔkta Pooja Khullar, si nye Kekeli ƒe Dɔdzẽŋutinunyala le Dharamshila Narayana Super Specialty Hospital, New Delhi, gbɔ be míase eƒe nukpɔsusu le nutsitsidɔ kple kansa ŋu gɔme. Le eƒe nya nu la, togbɔ be woƒoa nu tso nutsitsidɔ ŋu ɣeaɖewoɣi be enye mɔnu si doa alɔ ame le kansa dzi kpɔkpɔ me hã la, mele be woabu vodadatɔe be enye atike o. Ete gbe ɖe edzi be ele be dɔnɔwo naɖo ŋu ɖe atikewɔwɔ siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi le ŋu eye woakpɔ woƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔha ɣesiaɣi hafi ate nutsitsidɔ alo mɔnu bubu ɖesiaɖe kpɔ. Ðɔkta Khullar xlɔ̃ nu hã be nutsitsidɔ le kansa dada me ate ŋu ahe afɔkuwo vɛ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nunyuimakpɔɖu kple dɔlélenutsiŋutete dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ, si ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ ɖe hayahaya kple lãmesẽ bliboa dzi.  Míeƒo nu kple Ðɔkta Sarthak Moharir, si nye Kekeli ƒe Dɔdzẽŋutinunyalagã le Apollo Kɔdziwo, Bilaspur, hã be míaƒo eƒe eŋutinunyala ƒe nukpɔsusu le nutsitsidɔ kple kansa ŋu nu ƒu. Eɖe eme be fifi la, kpeɖodzi sẽŋu aɖeke mele atikewɔgbalẽwo me si fia be nutsitsidɔ kpena ɖe ŋutilãa ŋu wòɖea lãkusi alo aɖi siwo ŋu dɔléle le ɖa o. Eɖe eme be aklã kple ayikue wɔa aɖiɖeɖeɖa le dzɔdzɔme nu ke menye to nutsitsidɔ alo nuɖuɖu siwo xea mɔ na ame me o.  Ðɔkta Moharir ɖo aɖaŋu na kansadɔnɔwo vevie be woagatsi nu dɔ o, eye wòxlɔ̃ nu be ate ŋu ahe emetsonu sesẽwo vɛ. Esi wònye be dɔnɔ geɖe le catabolic nɔnɔme me xoxo, afisi ŋutilãa le lãmenugbagbeviwo me gblẽm le le dɔléle ta ta la, nutsitsidɔ ate ŋu ana lãmekawo nabu kabakaba, ana nunyuimakpɔɖu nagblẽ ɖe edzi, eye mlɔeba la, ana dɔ nawu wo.  Ðe nutsitsidɔ tiaa kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo wua gake ekpɔa lãmenugbagbevi siwo le lãmesẽ me taa?  Ao, nutsitsidɔ gblẽa nu le ŋutilã bliboa ŋu, ke menye kansadɔlékuiwo ɖeɖeko o. Ne ame tsi nu dɔ la, ŋutilãa ƒe lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ trɔna zi geɖe: Sukli si le ʋu me dzi ɖena kpɔtɔna. Insulin ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi ɖena kpɔtɔna. Ŋutilãa dzea glycogen ƒe nudzraɖoƒewo zazã gɔme. Le mɔxexe ɖe ami nu ɣeyiɣi didi megbe la, ami ƒe gbagbã dzina ɖe edzi. Ne nutsitsidɔ yi edzi la, lãmekawo me protein hã ate ŋu agbã.  Lãmetsi siwo le lãmesẽ me nɔa te ɖe lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe ɖoɖo siawo ke dzi. Dɔlélenutsiŋutete ƒe lãmenugbagbeviwo, dɔgbo me lãmenugbagbeviwo, lãmekawo, kple dzitodzito me lãmenugbagbeviwo gɔ̃ hã hiã ŋusẽ kple nunyiame hafi woate ŋu awɔ dɔ nyuie. Ametakpɔnu aɖeke meli si akpɔ lãmenugbagbevi siwo le lãmesẽ me ta tso nunyiame ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ me evɔ kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo koe wòɖena fiana o.  Nufiafia aɖewo gblɔ be kansa lãmenugbagbeviwo ate ŋu adze nunyiame ƒe nuteɖeamedzi dzi bɔbɔe wu lãmenugbagbevi siwo le lãmesẽ me elabena zi geɖe la, woɖoa ŋu ɖe sukli kple tsitsi ƒe dzesimɔwo (abe IGF-1 kple mTOR ene) ŋu vevie. Gake amegbetɔ ƒe dɔdzẽ te ŋu trɔna ɖe nɔnɔmewo ŋu. Ame geɖe ate ŋu azã mɔ̃memi bubuwo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye ami kple amino acid. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, nuteɖeamedzi si ŋutilãa wɔa nui le nutsitsidɔ me dzia cortisol kple lãmetsi bubu siwo kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ dzi le ŋutilã bliboa me ke menye le dɔdzẽwo me tiatiatɔe o.  Mɔfiame siwo ku ɖe nunyiame ŋu le atikewɔƒewo te gbe ɖe edzi be lãmekawo ƒe lolome ta kpɔkpɔ kple mɔxexe ɖe nunyuimakpɔɖu nu le vevie ŋutɔ le kansa dada me. Lãmetsiwo ƒe bu (sarcopenia) do ƒome kple atikewɔwɔ ƒe mɔmaɖemaɖeɖenuŋu nyuie, kuxiwo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ si lolo wu, kple agbetsitsi dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ. Eyata, axa 10

claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: Chile Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe yameʋukulawo gblɔ alakpatɔe le Internet dzi be yenye Israel-ʋukula si wolé le Iran
evidence: Wogblɔ alakpatɔe tso Chile Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe yameʋukulawo ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe ŋu le internet dzi be eɖe Israel-ʋukula aɖe si wolé le Iran le yameʋuʋu aɖe si nɔ edzi yim le nutome futɔ eveawo dome la fia.Israel dze Iran dzi le June 13 lia dzi si wu dukɔa ƒe asrafowo ƒe amegãwo ƒe hatsotso kɔkɔtɔwo katã kloe kple nuklia dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyala xɔŋkɔwo eye wòku ɖe aʋawɔyameʋu siwo ade 200 ŋu, Israel asrafowo gblɔ.Tehran’s hlɔ̃biabia nye zi gbãtɔ si tu siwo woda tso Iran la to Israel ƒe ametakpɔnuwo me le agbɔsɔsɔ gã aɖe me eye wowu Israeltɔwo le woƒe aƒewo me.“Wolé Israel nyɔnu yameʋukulawo Sarah Ahronot le Iran,” said two X posts, opens new tab from June 13 that captioned a photo of a woman in military slacks standing with arms crossed in front of a plane.Together, the two X posts have amassed more than one million views.Reuters ImageWoma nya kple nɔnɔmetata ma ke le Facebook hã dzi, opens new tab.CHILEA NAVY PILOTKe hã, woyɔ nyɔnu si le fotoa me be Lieutenant Junior Daniela Figueroa Scholz, ke menye Sarah Ahronot o, eye eyae nye Chile Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe nyɔnu yameʋukulawo gbãtɔ kpɔ.Diálogo Américas, si nye dijitaal asrafowo ƒe magazine si U.S. Southern ta Command, si zã fotoa le nyati aɖe me le December 2021 me le gbebiame vɔ megbe, ʋu tab yeye Scholz.U.S. Southern Command ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na Reuters le e-mail me be Chile Ƒudzisrafowo tsɔ fotoa na Diálogo Américas tẽ. Diálogo Américas hã da video aɖe si me outlet’s interview kple Lieutenant Scholz le Facebook, opens new tab.Chile Ƒudzisrafowo gbe be yewomagblɔ nya aɖeke o.DOWNING FIGHTER JETSIran kple Israel ɖe nya siwo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu ku ɖe nya siwo wogblɔ be Iran da Israel ƒe aʋawɔyameʋuwo ɖe anyi ŋu.Iran ƒe dukɔa ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe IRNA gblɔ be woɖiɖi Israel yameʋu eve le June 13, 2019 dzi. leaving the fate of the pilots unknown.Israel asrafowo ƒe nyanuɖela gbe nyatakakaa gbemagbe ke.Esi wote ɖe eŋu be wòagblɔ nya aɖe tso nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi siwo gblɔ be yewode dzesi Israel yameʋukula aɖe si wolé si woyɔna be Sarah Ahronot ŋu la, Israel Defence Forces (IDF) tsɔ Reuters ɖo eƒe nyanuɖela ƒe X post, opens new tab from June 14, which said: “Iran didn’t shoot down any Israeltɔwo ƒe aʋawɔyameʋuwo. Wole agbagba dzem be yewoawɔ aʋadziɖuɖu ŋutinya alakpatɔ eye mele edzi yim nyuie o.”“Ahronot” gɔmee nye “nu yeyetɔ” le Hebrigbe me.VERDICTMiscaptioned. Nɔnɔmetata la ɖe Chile Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe nyɔnu yameʋukula gbãtɔ, Lieutenant Junior Grade Daniela Figueroa Scholz fia, ke menye Sarah Ahronot o. Israel gbe nya siwo Iran gblɔ be woɖiɖi yewoƒe aʋawɔyameʋuwo, eye wògbe nya aɖe si wogblɔ le Internet dzi be wolé yameʋukula aɖe si woyɔna be Sarah Ahronot.Reuters Fact Check ƒe ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia. Xlẽ nu geɖe tso míaƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzrodɔa ŋu.Míaƒe Dzidzenuwo: Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., ʋu tab yeyeTanya siwo wodo ɖa:Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzroShareXFacebookLinkedinEmailLink

claim: “Amerika dɔwɔla mamã dedie kpɔ fetu dziyiyi si nye dɔlar 500 xoxo le ƒe sia me.”
evidence: Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be U.S. dɔwɔlawo le viɖe kpɔm tso yeƒe ganyawo ŋuti ɖoɖowo me xoxo. "Amerika dɔwɔla le mama dedie nu kpɔ fetu dziyiyi si nye dɔlar 500 xoxo le ƒe sia me," Trump gblɔ le Aug. 26 ƒe Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me. Trump’s White House cherry-picked nyatakaka siwo doa dzidzɔ na gakpɔkpɔ ƒe viɖe si lolo wu. Eŋutinunyalawo lɔ̃a dzidzenu bubu, si wotu ɖe kpɔɖeŋu ƒe lolome si lolo wu dzi, si ɖea dzidziɖedzi sue aɖe fiana. Esi míebia White House nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea be Trump ƒe nyatakakatsoƒe hã la, nyanuɖela aɖe fia asi Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒe ƒe akɔntabubuwo le ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe fetu kple fetudɔwɔlawo ƒe kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa ƒe fetu si wozãna zi geɖe le mama dedie nu, siwo ŋu wotrɔ asi le le ɣeyiɣi aɖewo nu. Nyatakaka sia ɖee fia be kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ le mama dedie nu dzi ɖe edzi tso dɔlar 1,185 le ƒe 2024 ƒe ɣleti enelia me va ɖo dɔlar 1,206 le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti enelia me, si sɔ kple Trump ƒe zimenɔɣi evelia ŋutɔ. Esi wònye be xexlẽme mawo tsi tre ɖi na kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa ƒe fetu ta la, míedzi wo ɖe edzi zi gbɔ zi 26 be míakpɔ ga home si dɔwɔla dzro aɖe kpɔ le ƒe afã ƒe ɣeyiɣia me. Ne wodzie ɖe edzi kwasiɖa 26 la, fetu dzina ɖe edzi dɔlar 546 le wo katã me. Afɔɖeɖe sia melɔ ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe dɔwɔlawo, siwo ade dɔwɔlawo ƒe akpa enelia, alo ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ƒe dzidziɖedzi ɖe eme o. Gaŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be White House ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si wòtia la menye esi ŋu kakaɖedzi le abe ƒuƒoƒo bubu ene o — eye numekuku si ŋu kakaɖedzi le wu la ɖe fetu ƒe dzidziɖedzi sue aɖe fia. Nyatakaka bubu — si nye ga si ame ŋutɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo katã kpɔna le mama dedie nu kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa — la, Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒee wɔa ɣleti sia ɣleti. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ade gbãtɔwo me la, akɔntabubu sia ɖee fia be fetu dzi ɖe edzi le wo katã me abe dɔlar 121 ene. Ema ade nya si Trump gblɔ la ƒe akpa enelia. Gaŋutinunyala geɖewo gblɔ na mí be esiae nye akɔntabubu si wodi wu hena fetu dzidzedze, elabena wotu ɖe Current Employment Statistics program dzi, si wɔa numekuku le dɔwɔƒe 121,000 kple dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo ŋu, eye le wo katã me la, wole teƒe siwo ade 631,000. Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple esia la, Current Population Survey, si me woɖe White House ƒe nyatakakawo tsoe la, tsɔ aƒe 60,000 siwo dze la ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo. Douglas Holtz-Eakin, si nye Amerikatɔwo ƒe titina ɖusimetɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔha ƒe zimenɔla gblɔ be: “Meka ɖe fetu siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo dzi wu ɣesiaɣi.” Dean Baker, si nye Ganyawo Kple Ðoɖowo Ŋuti Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe si me woɖea mɔ ɖe nu ŋu le ƒe gɔmeɖoanyila dometɔ ɖeka, lɔ̃ ɖe edzi, eye wògblɔ be nyatakaka siwo le aƒe suewo ŋuti numekukua me “mesɔ kura o.” Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, le nyatakaka sia nu la, fetu si dzi ɖe edzi le Dukplɔla Joe Biden ƒe ƒe enelia eve mamlɛawo me nye dɔlar 884. Esia ɖe nukpɔsusu si nye be viɖe siwo Trump kpɔ la lolo le mɔ si mebɔ o nu la dzi kpɔtɔ. Esi wònye be afɔɖeɖe siawo evea siaa mebua ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ŋu o ta la, wobua dɔwɔlawo ƒe viɖewo wògbɔa eme. Akɔntabubu bubu, si nye ga si ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe fetu kple fetu dɔwɔla siwo xɔ ƒe 16 kple edzivɔ, siwo hã tso U.S. Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Akɔntabubu Gbɔ, ƒe mama dedie si wozãna zi geɖe le ga ƒe asixɔxɔ nu le mama dedie nu, ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃ ɖesiaɖe to aƒewo ƒe numekuku suetɔ si ƒe lolome sɔ kple kpɔɖeŋu zazã me eye wobua ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ŋu. Le metrik sia nu la, dɔwɔlawo ƒe fetu dzi ɖe edzi dɔlar ɖeka kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa le ƒe 2024 ƒe ɣleti ene mamlɛa kple ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ene evelia dome. Trump gblɔ be, "Amerika dɔwɔla le mama dedie nu kpɔ fetu dziyiyi si nye dɔlar 500 xoxo le ƒe sia me." White House yɔ fetu ŋuti akɔntabubu siwo ɖee fia be fetu si woxɔna le mama dedie nu na ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe dɔwɔlawo dzi ɖe edzi $546 le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ene gbãtɔwo me. worker’s pay le ɣeyiɣi ma me, si ade dɔlar 121 le ɣleti ade me. Ne wobu ga ƒe asixɔxɔ ŋu la, ɣeyiɣiawo katã ƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe fetu si wotsɔna yia aƒemee dzi ɖe edzi si mede nenema kura o — abe dɔlar 26 ene le ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ade gbãtɔwo me. Nya la ƒe akpa aɖe de pɛpɛpɛ gake egblẽ nya veviwo ɖi. Míebua eŋu be Nyateƒe Afã.

claim: Lãwo ƒe atikewɔƒe aɖe le atikekui aɖe wɔm na avu tsitsiwo kple taɖodzinu be yewoadidi woƒe agbenɔƒe ɖe edzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, FDA meda asi ɖe atike sia dzi haɖe o alo wometa kpeɖodzi aɖeke be ewɔa dɔ nyuie o. Gake FDA lɔ̃ ɖe atike la ƒe Mɔkpɔkpɔ si Sɔ be wòawɔ dɔ nyuie kple Lãwo ƒe Dedienɔnɔ si Woɖo Tae ƒe nudidiwo dzi, eye wòwu nɔnɔme etɔ̃ siwo me FDA nada asi ɖe edzi le nɔnɔme etɔ̃ me la dometɔ eve nu. FDA gblɔ be mɔɖeɖe ɖe eŋu le nɔnɔme aɖewo nu ɖea mɔ na atikewɔla la be wòadzra atike la “hafi wòaɖo kpe edzi be eɖo ‘kpeɖodzi veviwo’ ƒe dzidzenu si fia be ewɔa dɔ nyuie be woada asi ɖe edzi bliboe gbɔ.” Nya aɖe si wogblɔ be nukunutike yeye aɖe si wogblɔ be ate ŋu ana avuwo ƒe agbenɔƒe nadidi ɖe edzi la kaka ɖe internet dzi le April 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze.Ezãlawo le social media platformX (archived) dzi gblɔ nya si wogblɔ be wonye, eye wogblɔ be dɔwɔƒe si le megbe na ŋgɔyiyi sia ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeana atike sia nanɔ asi me kaka ƒe 2027. 🔥🚨BREAKING: Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo wɔ atikekui aɖe si woyɔna be LOT-002 si ate ŋu adidi avuwo ƒe agbenɔƒe ɖe edzi ƒe geɖe, eye woƒe nu vevitɔe nye be woatsɔe ade asi me hafi ƒe 2027 naɖo, woyɔ dɔwɔƒe si le Atikekui sia wɔm be "Nuteƒewɔla."Woana atikekui sia si me nyilã vivi le wò avu gbesiagbe,... pic.twitter.com/VzA3XoQhrx — Dom Lucre | Breaker of Narratives (@dom_lucre) April 9, 2026 Nya si wogblɔ be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo le atike sia tɔgbe wɔm vevie la nye nyateƒe, gake ele vevie be míade dzesii be FDA meda asi ɖe atike sia dzi haɖe alo tsɔe va asi me haɖe o, eye wometa kpeɖodzi aɖeke hã tso eƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋu o. Míedo asi ɖe Loyal, si nye dɔwɔƒe si le atike sia wɔm gbɔ be míabia nya tso ŋkeke si woɖo be woaɖee ɖe go ŋu eye míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo. Loyalstated eƒe tameɖoɖo le atike la toto vɛ me enye be yeakpɔ "lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie" gbɔ le avu tsitsiwo me, si woɖe be "dɔwɔwɔ siwo do ƒome kple wo nɔewo ƒe hatsotso aɖe si kpena ɖe lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe lãmesẽ madeamedzi ŋu," si hea nɔnɔmewo abe ashypoglycemia vɛ ene. Kpuie ko la, atike sia —si woyɔna be LOY-002 — ƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeaxe mɔ ɖe dɔlélea nu eye wòahe "dɔléle geɖe siwo ɖea avu tsitsiwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ ƒe nyonyome dzi kpɔtɔna ƒe gɔmedzedze ɖe megbe eye wònana avuwo, kple woƒe amegbetɔƒomea, kpɔa dzidzɔ geɖe wu ɖekae," le adzɔha la ƒe nya nu. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, Loyal le nusi woyɔna be woƒe "dɔwɔwɔ nyuie ŋuti numekuku mamlɛtɔ" wɔm hafi di FDA ƒe mɔɖeɖe. Eyata togbɔ be enye nyateƒe be wole atike la wɔm hã la, egakpɔtɔ akpɔe ɖa be eva asi me eye wòawɔ eƒe taɖodzinu si wogblɔ la dzi. FDA lɔ̃ ɖe atike la ƒe Mɔkpɔkpɔ si Sɔ be wòawɔ dɔ nyuie dzi le February 2025 me kple Lãwo ƒe Dedienɔnɔ si Woɖo Tae le January 2026 me, eye wòwu nɔnɔme etɔ̃ dometɔ eve nu forExpanded Conditional Approval by the FDA. FDA gblɔ be mɔɖeɖe ɖe eŋu le nɔnɔme aɖewo nu ana Loyal nadzra atike la "hafi wòaɖo kpe edzi be eɖo 'kpeɖodzi veviwo' ƒe dzidzenu si fia be ewɔa dɔ nyuie be woada asi ɖe edzi bliboe gbɔ." Loyal ŋlɔ ɖe eƒe blog me be, "Lɔlɔ̃ ɖe nya siawo siwo woɖo ɖa dzi ɖee fia be FDA kpɔe be míaƒe nyatakakawo ɖo kpe edzi be anɔ eme be atike la awɔ dɔ nyuie eye wòanɔ dedie na eƒe zazã si woɖo be wòadidi avu tsitsiwo ƒe agbenɔƒe si le lãmesẽ me ɖe edzi." Loyal yɔ eƒe numekukua be "numekuku si me wozã ŋku eve le, si me wozã atike si wotsɔ ɖɔa amee le, si me avu 1,300 siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le lãwo ƒe dɔdaƒe 70 me le dukɔa me godoo" si ɖee fia be "nu gbegblẽ aɖeke medzɔ le atikewɔwɔ me o" le agbɔsɔsɔ si ade agbɔsɔsɔ si woɖo be wòanye ƒe teƒe atɔ̃ me. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖewo ƒo nu tso Loyal ƒe ŋgɔyiyi si wòate ŋu awɔ le lãwo ƒe atikewɔwɔ me ŋu le keke ƒe 2022 me ke, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nyeThe New York Times,The Wall Street Journal,Wired,Newsweek,The Guardian,Forbes,NBC News kpleCBS News. Ðɔkta Abraham Manimalethu, si nye lãmesẽdɔwɔla le Las Vegas gblɔ na Snopes be atike yeye si ate ŋu adzɔ la nye nane si wòabu, ne wotsɔe va asi me, "be wòakpe ɖe avu ƒe agbenɔƒe didi ŋu esi wole woƒe agbenɔƒe ƒe titina ge" tsɔ kpe ɖe "vevienyenye si le ŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔme si le lãmesẽ me ƒe dzesi me tsɔ kpe ɖe kamedede edziedzi si me nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ agbɔsɔsɔme si lã ɖuna le vevie ŋutɔ, le eƒe ɖevime gɔ̃ hã." Togbɔ be kakaɖedzi le esi ɖe nusiwo ate ŋu adzɔ ŋu hã la, Manimalethu gblɔ be abia nyatakaka geɖe wu hafi lãmesẽdɔwɔla nawɔ nyametsotso si ŋu wonya nu tsoe le atike la zazã kple woƒe dɔnɔwo ŋu, eye wògblɔ kpee be, "ate ŋu adzɔ ɣesiaɣi be atike la ƒe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu si ana atike la nakpe ɖe ame ŋu vie ko alo ate ŋu anye afɔku wu be wòanɔ eme."

claim: acupressure point ɖeka ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu wòaɖe dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe vevesese dzi akpɔtɔ
evidence: Quick Take Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe gblɔ be Acupressure ate ŋu akpe ɖe ame ŋu be dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe vevesese dzi naɖe akpɔtɔ. Míedzro nyateƒenyawo me eye míekpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la nye Nyateƒe Afã.  Nya la Instagram nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be ne èzi acupressure point ɖeka (si woyɔna zi geɖe be SP6 alo "Sanyinjiao") dzi zi ɖeka la, aɖe dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe vevesese dzi akpɔtɔ.  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Ðe SP6 tete naa gbɔdzɔe si nɔa anyi didi na dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔlélea?  Vaseɖe afi aɖe. Numekukuwo ɖee fia be ne wozi SP6, si nye teƒe aɖe si le afɔ ememetɔ dzi le afɔkpodzia tame vie la, ate ŋu ana gbɔdzɔe nyɔnu aɖewo ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe, gake ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzia menɔa anyi ɖaa na nyɔnu ɖesiaɖe o. Dɔdaƒewo ƒe numekukuwo ɖee fia be ne nyɔnuwo tsɔ nya ɖe SP6 ŋu le woƒe dzinukpɔkpɔ me la, woƒe vevesese ƒe dzesi siwo ŋu woka nya ta le ate ŋu aɖiɖi le gaƒoƒo siwo va yi megbe teti me. Gake zi geɖe la, gbɔdzɔea nu yina, eye vevesesea ate ŋu atrɔ ava emegbe le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me.  Numekuku siwo wowɔ ɣeyiɣi didi wu ɖee fia be ehiã be woazã acupressure enuenu le dzinukpɔkpɔ geɖe me be woakpɔ ŋgɔyiyi ɣesiaɣi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Esia fia asi viɖe si woƒo ƒu tsɔ wu be woadae zi ɖeka.  Eyata SP6 acupressure ate ŋu anye dɔwɔnu nyui aɖe si woatsɔ akpɔ ʋuʋudedi gbɔ.  Ðɔkta Bushra Khan, BNYS, si nye Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya kple Yoga Ðɔkta si tso Bhopal, gblɔ eƒe nukpɔsusu ɖekae be: "Seɖoƒe li na dɔyɔyɔmɔnu ɖesiaɖe. Acupressure ate ŋu aɖe vevesese dzi akpɔtɔ godoo eye ne wozãe kple mɔfiame nyuitɔ la, ate ŋu ado alɔ ŋutilãa le nya aɖewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me. Gake nyaƒoɖeamenu ƒe teƒe ɖeka ko dzi kpɔkpɔ mesɔ gbɔ na beléle blibo o. Ne vevesesea nu sẽ la, yi allopathic ɖɔkta gbɔ." le vevie ŋutɔ.  Ðe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi nyuiwo li be acupressure nyo wu naneke mawɔmawɔ alo vevesesenutsitikewo nonoa?  Kpeɖodziawo tsaka. Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple naneke kura mawɔmawɔ la, dɔdamɔnu dodokpɔ geɖe ɖee fia be zi geɖe la, nyɔnu siwo zãa acupressure gblɔna be vevesesea nu mesẽna o eye le go aɖewo me la, womehiãa atikekui ʋɛ aɖewo abe ibuprofen alo paracetamol ene o. Esia fia be asixɔxɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ le acupressure ŋu abe tiatia si kpe ɖe eŋu ene.  Gake ne wotsɔ acupressure sɔ kple vevesesenutsitikewo tẽ la, nɔnɔmetata la me mekɔna tututu o. Numekuku aɖewo ɖee fia be acupressure ate ŋu ana vevesese dzi naɖe akpɔtɔ abe atike ene le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me, evɔ bubuwo ya kpɔe be vevesesenutsitikewo te ŋu wɔa dɔ kabakaba eye woate ŋu agblɔe ɖi wu.  Vovototo si le numekuku ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ me gbɔe vovototoa tso ƒe akpa aɖe. Numekuku aɖewo zãa dɔwɔla bibi siwo wona hehee tsɔ wɔa nyaƒoɖeamenu, gake bubuwo ya nɔa te ɖe nyɔnuwo ŋutɔ ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu dzi. Teƒe si nyaƒoɖeamenu le, ɣeyiɣi didi si wòxɔna, kple ŋusẽ hã to vovo, si wɔe be esesẽna be woatsɔ emetsonuwo asɔ kple wo nɔewo. Dɔlékuiwutikewo dzi ɖuɖu hã nye kuxi le numekuku sia ƒomevi me.  Le nusianu me la, dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodziwo ɖo kpe edzi be acupressure nye tiatia si ate ŋu aɖe vi, gake mesẽna wu alo wɔa dɔ wu vevesesenutsitike siwo wozãna ɖaa ɣesiaɣi o.  Ðe acupressure le dedie eye wòsɔ be woate kpɔ abe ɖokuidzikpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔnu enea?  Ɛ̃. Zi geɖe la, wobua acupressure be ele dedie ŋutɔ. Mewɔa nuvevi ame o, melɔ atikewo zazã ɖe eme o, eye etetekpɔ mexɔ asi o. Numekukuwo gblɔ be nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu ʋɛ aɖewo koe dona, eye esiwo dzɔna la nɔa bɔbɔe, abe vevesese hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe le nyaƒoɖeamenua me ene.  Lãmesẽdɔwɔla Prachi Bharwani, Sumandeep Vidyapeeth, Vadodara gblɔ be Nyɔnu geɖe siwo wɔa acupressure edziedzi gblɔ be yewohiã vevesesenutsitike ʋɛ aɖewo, si doa dzidzɔ na amesiwo dina be yewoaƒo asa na atikewo zazã le afisi wòanya wɔ le. Enaa nyɔnuwo hã sena le wo ɖokui me be yewote ŋu ɖua yewoƒe vevesese dzi, si ate ŋu ana be tenɔnɔ ɖe dzinukpɔkpɔ nu naganye nuteɖeamedzi boo o.  Gagblɔ kpee be. "Acupressure menye atike si woatsɔ axɔ ɖe atikewɔwɔ teƒe le nɔnɔme ɖesiaɖe me o. Ne dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe vevesese nu sẽna le mɔ si mebɔ o nu, si nu sẽna ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe, alo ʋudodo sesẽ, dzoxɔxɔ, alo dzesi bubu siwo ɖea fu na ame kpe ɖe eŋu la, ele vevie be woayi ɖɔkta gbɔ. Dzesi mawo ate ŋu afia nɔnɔmewo abe endometriosis alo fibroids, siwo hiã be woakpɔ egbɔ nyuie. Bottom Line While research supports the idea that acupressure, vevietɔ le teƒewo abe SP6 , ate ŋu akpe ɖe nyɔnu aɖewo ŋu be woaɖe dzinukpɔkpɔ ƒe vevesese dzi akpɔtɔ eye wòwɔa dɔ nyuie wu ne wowɔe edziedzi le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe la, acupressure le dedie be woate kpɔ, vevietɔ ne wotsɔe kpe ɖe wo ɖokui dzi kpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔnu bubuwo abe dzoxɔxɔ ƒe agbawo, kamedede fafɛ, alo ɖiɖiɖememɔnu siwo wozãna ŋu.

claim: Le Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe adzɔxexe ƒe se yeye si wode asi te la, “Amesiwo ƒe ga si mede dɔlar 50,000 o lae woɖea (adzɔxexe) dzi kpɔtɔna wu.”
evidence: Fifia si Dukplɔla Donald Trump de asi eƒe asidede adzɔxexe kple gazazã ŋuti se te te la, eƒe dziɖuɖua le dɔ wɔm be yeadzrae na Amerika dukɔmeviwo. Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Lori Chavez-DeRemer ma nɔnɔmetata aɖe si le July 17 dzi le X dzi si ɖe Amerikatɔ siwo ƒe ganyawo mede ame dzi o kple esiwo ƒe gakpɔkpɔ le titina la kpɔ viɖe geɖe wu tso se yeyea ƒe adzɔxexe ŋuti ɖoɖowo me. Eŋlɔ bena: "The One Big, Beautiful Bill ƒe adzɔ dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ɖea vi na Amerika Dɔwɔlawo ŋutɔ." "Amesiwo ƒe fetu mede dɔlar 50,000 o la xɔa ga si woɖena le wo ŋu wu — si wɔnɛ be ƒome siwo doa vevie dɔ la te ŋu léa woƒe fetu geɖe ɖe asi." The One Big, Beautiful Bill ƒe adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ɖea vi na Amerika Dɔwɔlawo ŋutɔ. Amesiwo ƒe fetu mede dɔlar 50,000 o ye ɖea ga geɖe dzi kpɔtɔna—si wɔnɛ be ƒome dovevienuwo te ŋu léa woƒe fetu geɖe ɖe asi. pic.twitter.com/pGzPC98vWo Gake dzesidede sia nɔ te ɖe nyatakaka siwo wotsɔ cherry-picked dzi eye wòtsi tre ɖe numekuku siwo eŋutinunyala siwo le wo ɖokui si wɔ ŋu. Tɔtrɔ yeye siwo wowɔ le se si wode asi teti koe nye ema me eye wòŋea aɖaba ƒua adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ si ɖea vi na adzɔxela siwo si ga le wu la dzi yiyi dzi. Egbɔa adzɔxexe ƒe viɖe siwo aƒe siwo ƒe fetu mede o ŋu to eƒe susu tsɔtsɔ ɖo tɔtrɔ si va woƒe adzɔxexe ƒe agbanɔamedzi me ŋu, ke menye ga si wokpɔna le adzɔxexe megbe o. Eye etia ƒe si me adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ na gaxɔgbalẽviwo, dɔwɔwɔ gaƒoƒo geɖe kple Amerikatɔ siwo xɔ ƒe 65 kple edzivɔ gakpɔtɔ le dɔ wɔm, ke menye le woƒe nuwuwu megbe o. Esi míebia Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea be eƒe dzɔtsoƒe hã la, dɔwɔƒea ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe fia asi numekuku aɖe si Joint Committee on Taxation, si nye akpa eve ƒe kɔmiti aɖe si le Sewɔtakpekpea me wɔ la dzi na mí. Kɔmitia kpɔe be le ƒe 2027 me la, le se yeyea nu la: Adzɔxexe dzi aɖe akpɔtɔ 16.4% na aƒe siwo ƒe fetu mede dɔlar 15,000 o; Adzɔxexe ƒe agbanɔamedzi aɖiɖi 27.1% na aƒe siwo ƒe fetu le $15,000 va ɖo $30,000; Adzɔxexe ƒe agbanɔamedzia aɖiɖi 9.5% na aƒe siwo ƒe fetu tso dɔlar 30,000 va ɖo dɔlar 40,000; Adzɔxexe ƒe agbanɔamedzi aɖiɖi 7.2% na aƒe siwo le $40,000 va ɖo $50,000 dome. Le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe hatsotso ɖesiaɖe si lolo wu $50,000 gome la, edziɖeɖea anɔ sue wu 6%. Gake Chavez-DeRemer gblɔ nyatakakaawo le mɔ gbegblẽ nu, si na wokpɔ ŋusẽ si sea akpɔ ɖe amewo dzi le mɔ si to vovo nu. Nyatakaka siwo Chavez-DeRemer yɔ la gɔmesese bia nya siwo ƒo xlãe ƒe akpa vevi geɖe. Chavez-DeRemer ƒe chart mebu sea ƒe ƒe 2017 ƒe adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe kekeɖenudɔa ŋu o. Woɖoe be adzɔxexe ƒe se si Trump de asi le ƒe 2017 me la awu enu le ƒe 2025 me, eye le ɣeyiɣi ma me la, adzɔxexe ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme atrɔ ayi woƒe kɔkɔƒe, si nɔ anyi do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2017 me hafi. (Trump xe mɔ ɖe esia nu esi wòde asi sea te le ɣleti sia me.) Taɖodzinu si wòzã la koe na ƒe 2025 ƒe sea ƒe tɔtrɔ yeyeawo, ke menye eƒe ƒe 2017 ƒe adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe yeyewɔwɔ gbadzaa o. Esia le vevie elabena adzɔxexe ƒe tɔtrɔ yeye geɖe siwo wowɔ le ƒe 2025 ƒe sea me — abe adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ na adzɔxexe ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu, dɔwɔwɔ gaƒoƒo geɖe kple Amerikatɔ tsitsiwo ene — ɖea vi na adzɔxela siwo ƒe fetu mede o kple esiwo ƒe fetu le titina, eye eƒe akpa aɖee nye be dɔwɔla siwo xɔa gakpekpeɖeŋu kple esiwo xɔa ga geɖe wu la dina be yewoakpɔ kesinɔnuwo boo o, eye akpa aɖe le esi ɖoɖo siawo lɔ gakpɔkpɔ ƒe seɖoƒe siwo xea mɔ na adzɔxela siwo si ga le wu be woagakpɔ viɖe o ta. Nusi dona tso adzɔxexe ƒe kekeɖenudɔ mawo ɖeɖeɖa me la gbɔa adzɔxexe ƒe viɖe siwo yia Amerikatɔ siwo ƒe ganyawo mede ame dzi o ƒe akpa si wòagbɔ eme. Tabla me nyatakakawo léa ŋku ɖe tɔtrɔ siwo va le adzɔ siwo woxe me ŋu, ke menye ga si susɔ le adzɔxexe vɔ megbe o. Nyatakaka siwo le Chavez-DeRemer ƒe nɔnɔmetata me ƒe akpa bubu gaɖe nɔnɔme sia si nye be woahe susu ayi viɖe siwo Amerikatɔ siwo ƒe fetu mede o wu la dzi la gbɔ eme. Tabla la xɔa ga si wodzra ɖo ɖe gaxɔgbalẽvia ŋu le ga si wokpɔna ƒe seƒe nu eye wòmaa ema ɖe ga si wokpɔna ƒe seƒe ma ƒe adzɔ si woxe va yi nu. Ema wɔwɔ hea tɔtrɔ le alafa me vɛ — le go sia me la, gakpɔkpɔ ƒe hatsotsowo katã ƒe ɖiɖi — le adzɔ siwo woxe me. Gake aƒe siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o kple esiwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o xea adzɔ sue aɖe ko, le dɔlar xoxowo me, wu aƒe siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o. Esia naa xexlẽdzesi sue aɖe ŋutɔ — si nye adzɔ siwo woxe hafi sea trɔ — eye wògbɔa adzɔxexe ƒe viɖe ɖesiaɖe si woakpɔ tso ƒe 2025 ƒe sea me ƒe lolome ŋu. Be woaƒo asa na kuxi sia la, adzɔxexe ŋuti numekula siwo le wo ɖokui si ƒe susu nɔa akɔntabubu bubu aɖe ŋu: tɔtrɔ si va le ga si wokpɔna le adzɔxexe megbe ƒe alafa memamã. Le afisia la, denominator la menye adzɔ siwo woxe o, ke boŋ gakpɔkpɔ bliboa. Nuŋububuha eve — Urban Institute-Brookings Institution Tax Policy Center, si le mɔa titina le susuŋutinunya nu, kple Tax Foundation, si le titina ɖusime — zã mɔnu mamlɛtɔa ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia, eye woƒe numekuku eveawo siaa to vovo kura tso nyatakaka siwo Chavez-DeRemer yɔ gbɔ. Woƒe numekukuwo ɖee fia be aƒe siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o kple esiwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o la kpɔa viɖe tso adzɔxexe ƒe fewo me, gake esiwo le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe dzidzenu ƒe afã si le etame la kpɔa viɖe geɖe wu. Ƒuƒoƒo eveawo ƒe mɔnuwo mewɔa dzidziɖedzi le alafa me ɖeka le ga si wokpɔna le adzɔxexe megbe me o; susu gã aɖee nye be Tax Policy Center ƒe gakpɔkpɔ ƒe gɔmesese na denominator la nye b

claim: Le ƒe 60 siwo míetsɔ nɔ anyi abe dukɔ ene me ƒe 29 siwo woƒo ƒu la, míenɔ asrafowo ƒe dziɖuɖu te.
evidence: Asrafowo ƒe dziɖuɖu le Nigeria va wu enu le ƒe 1999 me esime Aʋafia Abubakar tsɔ ŋusẽ de asi na dumevi dzrowo mlɔeba le May 29th, 1999 dzi esime Aʋafia Obasanjo si le PDP ka atam abe Dukplɔla si woti ene.

claim: Keteke si tsɔa aminuwo tso Visakhapatnam (Andhra Pradesh) yi Basti (Uttar Pradesh) xɔ ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina.
evidence: Nyatakaka aɖe si kaka ɖe amewo dome (afisia, afisia kple afisia) le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be keteke aɖe si tsɔa ami tso Visakhapatnam (Andhra Pradesh) yi Basti (Uttar Pradesh) xɔ ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina. Dɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔ geɖewo hã ta nyati siwo gblɔ nya ma ke le ƒe 2024 me (afisia, afisia, kple afisia). Mina míadi nyateƒe si le megbe na nya sia.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Nya si wogblɔ: Keteke aɖe si tsɔa ami tso Visakhapatnam (Andhra Pradesh) yi Basti (Uttar Pradesh) xɔ ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina. Nyateƒenya: Nyateƒenya aɖeke mele nya sia me o. Nyatakakawo ɖee fia be tasiaɖam ɖeka si tsɔ ami koe tsi megbe eye wòɖo Basti le ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ megbe le July 2018 me, evɔ ketekea ƒe akpa mamlɛa ya mehe ɖe megbe o. PIB na eme kɔ hã be agbatsɔketeke aɖeke si le India Ketekemɔwo dzi mexɔ ɣeyiɣi didi alea gbegbe hafi ɖo afisi woɖo tae kpɔ o, si wɔe be nya si wogblɔ la TRƆBƆ.  Be míaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ dzi la, míewɔ nya veviwo didi le Google dzi to nyatakaka siwo tso nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo me la zazã me. Esia na míeyi nyatakaka tɔxɛ aɖe si The Economic Times ta si wota le July 2018. Nyatakakaa na eme kɔ be menye keteke bliboae o ke boŋ tasiaɖam ɖeka koe tsi megbe le mɔzɔzɔa me. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be asitsala aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Ramachandra Gupta si tso Basti, Uttar Pradesh, ŋlɔ ami ƒe agbalẽ to Indian Potash Limited (IPL) dzi le ƒe 2014. IPL ŋlɔ tasiaɖam aɖe be woatsɔ Di-Ammonium Phosphate (DAP) ami kotoku 1,316 tso Visakhapatnam ayi Basti. Zi geɖe la, mɔzɔzɔ si didi kilometa 1,400 xɔa abe gaƒoƒo 42 kple aɖabaƒoƒo 13 ene, gake tasiaɖam sia koŋ xɔ ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina.  Numekuku bubuwo na míekpɔ nyatakaka geɖe tso nudzɔdzɔ ma ke ŋu (le afisia kple afisia), eye wo katã ɖo kpe edzi be tasiaɖam ɖeka koe tsi megbe, ke menye keteke bliboa o. Nyatakaka siawo ɖee fia be Indian Potash Limited, si le M/S Ramachandra Gupta si tso Basti, Uttar Pradesh teƒe la tsɔ ami de tasiaɖam No. 107462 me tso Visakhapatnam melidzeƒea le ƒe 2014. Esi tasiaɖam la meva ɖo le ɣleti geɖe megbe gɔ̃ hã o la, Gupta tsɔ nya ɖe Ketekedɔwɔƒea ŋu. Mlɔeba la, tasiaɖam si me ami yɔ la va ɖo Basti ketekedzeƒe le July 2018. Dziehe Ɣedzeƒe Ketekemɔwo ƒe Dutoƒo Kadodowo ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã (CPRO) Sanjay Yadav, esi wònɔ nu ƒom tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu la, egblɔ be, "Edze abe tasiaɖam/ bogie sia koŋ nye rake la ƒe akpa aɖe eye wòɖe eɖokui ɖa le ketekea ŋu ene. Woɖoe ɖe akpata aɖe me be woadzrae ɖo esi wòzu nusi mesɔ na o." duƒuƒu le mɔa dzi." Wonɔ te ɖe kpeɖodzi sia dzi dze ƒã be keteke bliboa mehe ɖe megbe o; agbatsɔkekea ƒe tasiaɖam ɖeka koe va ɖo afisi woɖo tae megbe.  Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, India Dziɖuɖua ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe (PIB) to eƒe Nyateƒenyawo Mekpɔƒe ƒe dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua ɖo le X (Twitter) dzi le December 10, 2024 dzi, na eme kɔ be ŋutinya siawo flua ame eye wòɖo kpe edzi be agbatsɔketeke aɖeke si le India Ketekemɔwo dzi xɔ ɣeyiɣi didi sia hafi ɖo afisi wòyina la kpɔ o.  Nyadzɔdzɔ geɖewo kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be adzɔnuwo ƒe keteke aɖe xɔ ƒe etɔ̃ kple edzivɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina.#PIBFactCheck ▶️ Nya sia nye #Misleading ▶️ Adzɔnuwo ƒe keteke aɖeke le India Ketekemɔwo me xɔ ɣeyiɣi ma tɔgbe kpɔ hafi ɖo afisi wòyina o. pic.twitter.com/nnQYlaglva — PIB Fact Check (@PIBFactCheck) December 10, 2024 Ne míagblɔe kpuie la, nya si wogblɔ be India Ketekemɔwo ƒe adzɔnuwo ƒe keteke aɖe tsi megbe wu ƒe etɔ̃ la mesɔ o; tasiaɖam ɖeka koe wònye, ke menye keteke bliboa o.

claim: Elektrik-keke ƒe Ðoɖo Femaxee na Sukuviwo le Green India Mission Te
evidence: Video aɖe si le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be dziɖuɖua le elektrikkekewo mam femaxee na sukuvi siwo le Green India Mission te.  The Hindi capccompanying the video reads: "दोनों ने ग्रीन India Mission निश्लील सत्ताधारी सभी sukuviwo को मुली free in electric cycles चील विदाई का सलाह आल प्रल शन कम हो, पेट्रोल चे और बच्चों बईह बई bio link se elektrik-keke ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔna faa."  (Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe: Xɔlɔ̃wo, le Green India Mission ɖoɖoa te la, dziɖuɖua tso nya me be yeana elektrik-kekewo sukuviwo katã femaxee keŋkeŋ be woaɖe ɖiƒoƒo dzi akpɔtɔ, adzra mɔ̃memi dzi akpɔtɔ, eye woakpɔ egbɔ be ɖeviwo medo go kuxi aɖeke le woƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ me o. Dɔbiagbalẽvi wɔwɔ le bɔbɔe ŋutɔ—mele be dziɖuɖudɔ nanɔ ame aɖeke si le miaƒe ƒomea me o eye ele be sukuvi ƒe ID nanɔ mia si. Ne mieɖo nɔnɔme siawo gbɔ la, midze yonyeme kaba eye mibia elektrik-keke femaxee tso kadodo si le bio la me) The above post woate ŋu akpɔe le afisia (archive) NM VERIFIED NewsMobile ku nu me tso nya sia ŋu eye wokpɔe be enye alakpa eye wòdo ƒome kple ametafatafa aɖe le Internet dzi.  Nya veviwo didi mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le be titinadziɖuɖu alo nutomedziɖuɖu aɖeke dze ɖoɖo aɖe gɔme be yeana elektrikkekewo sukuviwo femaxee o. Womeɖe gbeƒãe nenema nyitsɔ laa o.  Míelé ŋku ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua ɖo si nye ‘Nye Ðoɖo’ hã ŋu eye míekpɔ ŋkɔ aɖeke si ku ɖe elektrik kekefɔkpa ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔna femaxee ŋu o. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe (PIB) meɖe aɖaŋuɖoɖo alo nyatakaka aɖeke ɖe go ku ɖe ɖoɖo ma tɔgbe aɖeke ŋu o.  Numekuku bubu siwo wowɔ le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye yippyblog ŋu ɖee fia be exɔa nyatakaka siwo flua ame eye wowɔa clickbait. Togbɔ be nɔnɔmetata si le agbalẽa ƒe akpa dzi doa nyagbewo abe "Free Mobile Scheme" kple "Free Bike/Cycle Scheme" ene ɖe ŋgɔ hã la, nyatia trɔa mɔ na ezãlawo yia nugblẽfexeɖoɖo kple gadodo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ƒe axa siwo medo ƒome kple wo nɔewo o dzi—si nye aɖaŋu si bɔ si nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo blea ame zãna tsɔ léa mɔ̃ na ezãlawo.  Eyata nya si wogblɔ be dziɖuɖua le elektrikkekewo nam sukuviwo femaxee le ‘Green India Mission’ te la nye alakpa.

claim: "[Agbledela ameyibɔwo] tɔe nye anyigba hekta miliɔn geɖe. Anɔ abe 50% le anyigba ƒe lolome katã me ne ètsɔ dukɔa ƒe anyigba kpee."
evidence: Togbɔ be numekuku siwo wowɔ le se nu ɖee fia be yevu South Africa agbledelawoe wɔa nuku vevi akpa gãtɔ hã la, esia ɖea ameyibɔ agbledelawo ƒe nukuwo ƒe akpa gãtɔ dzi kpɔtɔna, eye zi geɖe la, womeɖenɛ fiana o. Zi geɖe la, agbledela ameyibɔwo ƒe agblemenukuwo nyea aƒeme zazã eye womedzena le agbledede si wodzrana ƒe nyatakakawo me o. Nudzadzra le nutoa me asi suewo hã me hã mele nenema o. Nya si wogblɔ be ameyibɔ agbledelawo tɔe nye "anyigba ƒe lolome katã ƒe 50% ne ètsɔ dukɔa ƒe anyigba kpee" la, womeɖo kpe nyatakaka aɖeke si li dzi o. Egaŋea aɖaba ƒua nu vevi geɖewo dzi, le kpɔɖeŋu me be menye anyigba siwo katã woɖo be "agbledeƒe" ye woate ŋu ade agble le ŋutɔŋutɔ o. Kwasiɖa geɖe le May kple June 2025 me la, nuŋlɔɖi siwo dzi ame geɖe kplɔna le X la kaka akɔntabubu siwo léa ŋku ɖe ame ŋu eye wòdea mama amewo me ku ɖe ameƒomevinyenye kple agbledede ŋu le South Africa. Gake nusi wɔ nukue nye be xexlẽme siawo dzɔ tso nuƒo aɖe si woɖo be woatsɔ aɖe nyatakaka totrowo ɖa me, eye emegbe woyɔ nya siwo mesɔ o eye wogbugbɔ ɖo wo ta na xexeame katã ƒe nyaselawo. Afikae wòdze egɔme tsoe? Akɔntabubu @EndWokeness, si yomedzela miliɔn 3.7 wɔ akpa vevi aɖe. Nyatakaka siwo menye nyateƒe o kaka ƒe nuŋlɔɖi le esi. Tsã la, wotsɔa nutoa me nuŋlɔɖiwo tsia tre ɖe akɔntabubua ƒe nyatakaka aɖewo ŋu , siwo nye nyateƒenya ɖɔɖɔɖo siwo X zãlawo tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu, togbɔ be woɖe esiawo dometɔ aɖewo ɖa emegbe hã. Aʋatsonyawo , abe ŋutinya si kaka ɖe amewo dome si ku ɖe ʋuʋula siwo va U.S. ɖua aƒemelãwo ŋu ene, gakpɔtɔ le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea si womeɖɔ ɖo o . Gake abe alesi Washington Post ka nya tae ene la, nuŋlɔɖia sina le emetsonuwo nu zi geɖe. Eƒo adegbe be yekpɔa dɔlar akpe geɖe ɣleti sia ɣleti tso nya mawo tɔgbe me eye ɣeaɖewoɣi la, nuƒolanɔƒea tɔ Elon Musk doa eƒe nyatakakawo ɖe ŋgɔ. Le May 2025 me la, @EndWokeness dze nyatakakawo ɖoɖo gɔme tso yevu South Africatɔ 49 siwo gblɔ be yewonye sitsoƒedila le U.S.A. ŋu. Togbɔ be le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, United States dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be yevu Afrikaner South Africatɔwo dzea ŋgɔ yometiti , le kpɔɖeŋu me to dɔwɔɖui ƒe sɔsɔ ƒe sewo kple alakpa ŋutinya si nye " yevuwo tsɔtsrɔ̃ ɖa " dzi. Enɔ te ɖe esia dzi ɖe mɔ ɖe sitsoƒedilawo ƒe biabiawo tso South Africatɔ siwo nye "Afrikatɔwo alo ameƒomevi sue aɖe me tɔwo" gbɔ, esime wòle mɔ xem na sitsoƒedila bubu akpa gãtɔ gɔ̃ hã. Le nya sia me la, @EndWokeness xlɔ̃ nu be nusiwo wosusu be South Africa awɔ ɖe Afrikatɔwo ŋu la ahe emetsonu gbegblẽwo vɛ, eye wògblɔ be "agbledela yevuwo wɔa fifia" wu 90% le bli, soya, lu, kotoku, citrus, kple mɔli katã kloe me (99%). Anɔ eme be woɖe akɔntabubu siawo tso ŋuɖoɖo aɖe si wotsɔ ɖo @EndWokeness si mede gaƒoƒo eve do ŋgɔ o to akɔnta bubu, @CrazyVibes_1, si gblɔ kpee be: "Nukatae agbledela ameyibɔwo mele nu wɔm le asitsatsa me o? Woƒe anyigba si ƒe lolome nye hekta miliɔn geɖe. Anyigba ƒe lolome katã ƒe 50% lɔƒo ne ètsɔ dukɔa ƒe anyigba kpee." Gake @CrazyVibes_1 hã nɔ kɔpi wɔm. Eƒe tweet, nya ɖe nya nu si me formatting kple emojis hã le, sɔ kple esi @twatterbaas da ɖe edzi le March me, amesi gblɔ nya siawo ke ƒe tɔtrɔwo enuenu do ŋgɔ . News24, si nye South Africa ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si amewo yia wu, de dzesi @twatterbaas be enye Sebastiaan Jooste, si nye agbledela tsã. Le numekukua megbe la, dziɖuɖua bu fɔ nusi wòyɔ be nyatakaka totro siwo woɖo koŋ na kple ameƒomevinyenye ƒe fuléle kaka. Jooste ƒe nyawo kpe ɖe eŋu wòtsɔ nya siawo ɖo xexeame katã ƒe nyaselawo gbɔ, eye ɖewohĩ woɖo Musk, si nye kesinɔtɔ gãtɔ kekeake le xexeame gɔ̃ hã gbɔ. Ke hã edze abe ame aɖeke mele mɔa dzi kpɔe ɖa be xexlẽdzesiawo sɔ hã o ene. Eyata míewɔe nenema. In his earliest post , Jooste gblɔ be akɔntabubuawo tso 18 February X nyatakaka aɖe si Wandile Sihlobo, gaŋutinunyalagã le Agricultural Business Chamber of South Africa , ƒuƒoƒo si le asitsahabɔbɔwo teƒe. Sihlobo ƒe nyatakakaa ɖee fia be wozã eƒe numekukua le nuƒo aɖe si agbledenyawo gbɔ kpɔla John Steenhuisen ƒo si ƒe tanyae nye Briefing on malicious misinformation . Le nuƒoa me la, Steenhuisen gblɔ be "Anyiehe Afrika gakpɔtɔ nye habɔbɔ si me dzɔdzɔenyenye mele o le ganyawo gome", si me agbledede hã le. Abe kpeɖodzi ene la, eyɔ Sihlobo ƒe akɔntabubu siwo ku ɖe ameyibɔ agbledelawo ƒe akpa si le mamã dedie nu le agbledede ƒe asitsatsa me le ƒe 2015 kple 2019 dome (togbɔ be egblɔ vodadatɔe be ƒe 2015 va ɖo ƒe 2020 hã). Be woabu akɔnta le yevu agbledelawo ƒe kutsetse ŋu la, edze abe ɖeko Jooste ɖe Sihlobo ƒe akɔntabubuwo ɖa le 100% me ene. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Sihlobo bu akɔnta be ameyibɔ agbledelawo wɔa lu siwo wodzrana le asitsatsa me ƒe 1.3%, si na Jooste ƒo nya ta be emegbe ele be yevu agbledelawo nawɔ "luawo katã ƒe 98.7%" mamlɛa. Gake esia ŋea aɖaba ƒua nya vevi siwo ƒo xlãe dzi. Akɔntabubu siwo woama le afisiafi nye ‘akɔntabubu’ siwo mede blibo o Akɔntabubu gbãtɔwo tso agbalẽ aɖe si woyɔna be Agbledenyawo le South Africa , si Sihlobo kple Prof Johann Kirsten, Stellenbosch Yunivɛsiti ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔla ŋlɔ na

claim: Dɔwɔƒe aɖe si dɔmenyotɔ biliɔnla Bill Gates da megbe na la tsɔ carbon wɔ bɔta si wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Breakthrough Energy Ventures, si nye gadodo ƒe gaxɔ si Gates ɖo la nye gomenɔla le Savor, si nye dɔwɔƒe si wɔa bɔta si wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me. Gates ŋutɔ mekpɔa gome le Savor ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ alo kplɔlanyenye me o, le Savor ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe ƒe nya nu. Le August 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be dɔwɔƒe aɖe si Bill Gates da megbe na la dze bɔta si wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me si wotsɔ carbon wɔ, ke menye nyinotsinuwo wɔwɔ gɔme o. Bɔta ŋuti nyaʋiʋlia tsɔ eƒe mɔ to internet dzi to nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe X, Facebook kple Reddit dzi. Le ƒe 2024 ƒe blog me nya aɖe si Gates ŋlɔ nu la, le nyateƒe me la, ede ga dɔwɔƒe aɖe si woyɔna be Savor me, si ɖe gbeƒãe be yeadze yeƒe bɔta si wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me si wowɔ "tẽe tso carbon me evɔ mehiã be woawɔ agbledede bɔbɔe o" le March 2025. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. To email dzi la, Savor ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi be Breakthrough Energy Ventures, si nye gadodo ƒe gaxɔ si wotu ɖe dɔdasi dzi si Gates ɖo le ƒe 2015 me, va zu gomenɔla le dɔwɔƒea me le ƒe 2022. Le nyanuɖela la ƒe nya nu la, Breakthrough Energy Ventures mekpɔ gome le akpa gãtɔ me o eye Gates ŋutɔ mekpɔ gome le "Savor ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ alo kplɔlanyenye" ​​me o. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla geɖe ɖe woƒe dzitsitsi gblɔ be aɖi le dɔwɔƒea ƒe bɔta si wowɔ le dodokpɔxɔ me alo mele dedie na amegbetɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖu o. Ke hã, le Savor ƒe Nyabiasewo ƒe nya nu la — ʋu yi axa sia ƒe nuwuwu — dɔwɔƒea wɔ eƒe bɔta to ami siwo le bɔta si wotsɔ nyinotsi wɔe me ƒe atikewo gbugbɔgawɔ me — to dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya zazã me ko, ɖe nyi teƒe. "Ami siwo míewɔna la sɔ kple ami siwo míeɖuna xoxo le atikewo gome, le agbɔsɔsɔ vovovowo me ko – wonye ami ɖeka na wò ŋutilã kple ami siwo nèɖuna xoxo gbesiagbe," dɔwɔƒea ƒe FAQ gblɔ. Ne míagblɔe bɔbɔe la, wotsɔa carbon, hydrogen kple oxygen wɔa dzɔdzɔme amiwo. Savor gblɔ be dɔwɔƒea ƒe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo xɔa carbon tso ya siwo le abe carbon dioxide kple hydrogen ene me tso tsi me (kpɔ Axa 2). Emegbe, wotsɔ dzoxɔxɔ, nyaƒoɖeamenu kple oxidation kpe ɖe eŋu, si na ami ƒe molecule ƒomevi ma ke si le notsi, nyilã kple amagbemiwo me la dona. Nuɖuɖuŋutinunyala aɖe si le Savor, Jordan Beiden-Charles, gblɔ na Chicago ƒe WBBM-TV be emegbe dɔwɔƒea ƒe dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo tsɔ tsi, lecithin kple "dzɔdzɔme vivi kple amadede" aɖewo kpe ɖe eŋu be woakpɔ bɔta mamlɛtɔ. Lecithin nye ami siwo le dzɔdzɔme nu le nuɖuɖuwo abe azi tutu kple atikutsetse ene me ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe; abe alesi wòbɔ le nuɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo ene la, dɔwɔƒea zãe abe nusi naa nuɖuɖu ƒe ʋeʋẽ lilili ene. Smithsonian Magazine ƒe nyati aɖe si wota le ƒe 2024 me gblɔ be Savor zã rosemary-mi tsɔ do vivi ɖe eŋu eye beta-carotene, si nye amadede aɖe si le atikutsetsewo kple amagbewo me, tsɔ wɔ amadedee. Savor ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe nu siawo zazã dzi yiyi dzi eye wògblɔ be yewozãa thyme ami hã hena vivi, eye wògblɔ kpee be, "Nu siwo wotsɔ wɔa Savor ƒe bɔta ƒe xexlẽdzesi bliboae nye: Savor Fat (MLCT Oil), Tsi, Dze, Sunflower Lecithin, Rosemary & Thyme ami, Beta Carotene." Le Savor ƒe agbalẽ sia ƒe Axa 3 nu la, tso ƒe 2025 me la, dɔwɔƒea wɔ aɖaŋuɖoɖo kpekpewo kple FDA eye wònɔ lɛta si nye "biabia aɖeke manɔmee" dim tso dɔwɔƒea gbɔ, si agblɔ vevietɔ be dɔwɔƒea metsi dzi ɖe nuɖuɖu aɖe ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu o. Savor ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi be dɔwɔƒea le dɔ wɔm be yeakpɔ lɛta ma le August 2025. Numekuku si me hatiwo to — si ƒe akpa aɖe Savor ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã, Kathleen Alexander wɔ — ɖee fia be atike kple nugbagbeviwo ƒe nuɖuɖu ƒe mɔnuwo abe esiwo Savor zã ene ate ŋu ana "ya siwo gblẽa nu le anyigba ŋu ƒe dodo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ gã aɖe kpakple anyigba kple tsi zazã dzi akpɔtɔ ŋutɔ." Feb. 13, 2024, blog me nyatakaka aɖe tso Gates gbɔ gaɖo kpe Microsoft ƒe gatɔ gã la ƒe gadede Savor me dzi. Akpa si sɔ lae nye esi (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Nusi míehiãe nye mɔ yeye siwo dzi míato awɔ ami ƒe molecule mawo ke siwo le lãwo ƒe nuwɔna me, gake ya siwo gblẽa nu le yame ŋu ƒe dodo, lãwo ƒe fukpekpe, alo atike siwo me afɔku le manɔmee. Eye ele be woanye esiwo ŋu amesiame ate ŋu aƒle. Adze abe pɔmpi ƒe drɔ̃e ene, gake dɔwɔƒe aɖe si woyɔna be Savor (si me metsɔ ga de eme) le ewɔm. [...] Meɖɔ Savor ƒe nutovɛwo kpɔ, eye nyemexɔe se be nyemele bɔta ŋutɔŋutɔ ɖum o. (Burger la hã te ɖe eŋu.) Le Savor ƒe nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe agbalẽ nu la, dɔwɔƒea dze dɔ gɔme le ƒe 2022 me to Orca Sciences, si nye numekuku kple ŋgɔyiyi habɔbɔ si léa fɔ ɖe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋu eye wogblɔ be kadodo le wo kple Gates dome. "Tso ɣemaɣi la, míekpɔ ga si nye dɔlar miliɔn 33 tso Breakthrough Energy Ventures kple Synthesis Capital gbɔ," Savor gblɔ (kpɔ Axa 1). Gates ɖo Breakthrough Energy Ventures, si nye gadodo ƒe gaxɔ si wotu ɖe yame ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti mɔ̃ɖaŋununya dzi, le ƒe 2015 me kple le agbalẽ sia ŋlɔɣi

claim: Cambodia saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe da akpe na U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le ƒe 2025 ƒe dzomeŋɔli be ewu aʋa si wowɔ le Cambodia kple Thailand dome nu.
evidence: Le dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ sia ŋu la, Cambodia saɖagaxɔmenɔla siwo nɔ ŋutifafa ƒe azɔli zɔm la da akpe na Trump ɖe akpa si wòwɔ tsɔ ƒoe ɖe Cambodia kple Thailand ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo nu be woalɔ̃ ɖe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi dzi le aʋawɔwɔ si dzɔ le dukɔ eveawo dome megbe ta. Togbɔ be Trump kpe asi ɖe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsidɔa ŋu hã la, "mewu aʋa aɖe nu" le Cambodia kple Thailand dome o. Aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsidɔa dzɔ le ŋkeke 5 ƒe aʋawɔwɔ le dukɔ eveawo ƒe liƒo dzi megbe, ke menye aʋa si nɔa anyi ɖaa o, eye aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi fia aʋawɔwɔ ƒe ɖiɖiɖeme hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe, ke menye nuwuwu tegbee o. Le August 2025 me la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Cambodia saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe da akpe na U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be ewu aʋa si wowɔ le woƒe dukɔa kple Thailand dome nu. Nɔnɔmetata ɖeka alo esi wu nenema siwo dze abe saɖagaxɔmenɔla siwo do awu ʋlaya siwo ƒe amadede nye aŋutiɖiɖi eye wolé dzesi siwo dzi Trump ƒe mo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo le ɖe asi ene la nɔ nyatakakaawo dometɔ geɖe me. Nya sia kaka ɖe X, Facebook kple Instagram dzi. Nya ɖeka si kaka nya sia, si tso Aƒea ƒe Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Newt Gingrich gbɔ, xɔ ame 45,000 kple edzivɔ siwo lɔ̃e le X dzi vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm. Post siawo hiã nya siwo ƒo xlãe. Enye nyateƒe be Cambodia saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe da akpe na Trump ɖe eƒe ŋutifafawɔwɔ ƒe agbagbadzedzewo ta. Ke hã, woɖe akpedada fia U.S. dukplɔla ɖe akpa si wòwɔ le kpekpeɖeŋu nana be wòatɔ te ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le aʋawɔwɔ, si wogayɔna be aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi, le Cambodia kple Thailand dome ta — ke menye le esi wòwu aʋa ɖesiaɖe si le dukɔ eveawo dome nu tegbee ta o. Le aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe nubabla si wowɔ le July 28, 2025 dzi ta la, Cambodia kple Thailand tɔ te aʋawɔwɔ le aʋawɔwɔ si xɔ ŋkeke atɔ̃ le dukɔ siwo te ɖe wo ŋu ƒe liƒo dzi me. Togbɔ be anyigbamama ŋuti nyaʋiʋlia na ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ si wu ame wu le Cambodia kple Thailand dome tso ƒe 2011 me hã la, akpa eveawo dometɔ aɖeke meɖe gbeƒã aʋawɔwɔ le se nu o— eye nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo kple dutadɔnunɔlawo, vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm la, le akpa gãtɔ megblɔ be nenemae o. Eyata míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Le Aug. 10, 2025 dzi la, Cambodia Buddhatɔwo ƒe saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe kpɔ gome le ŋutifafa ƒe azɔlizɔzɔ aɖe me le Phnom Penh, Cambodia, le nyatakaka siwo gblɔ be dukɔ eve siwo te ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu tso wo nɔewo nu be woda le aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi dzi la dome. Saɖagaxɔmenɔla siawo dometɔ aɖewo tsɔ dzesi siwo dzi Trump ƒe foto le si gblɔ be: "Akpe na wò! Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla." Wokpɔ azɔlizɔzɔa ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo kple dzesi siawo to Getty Images, si nye nɔnɔmetatawo ƒe gadzraɖoƒe xɔŋkɔ aɖe dzi. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo, siwo dome Reuters hã le, ta saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple video vovovowo kple woƒe nɔnɔmetatawo, si gaɖee fia be le nyateƒe me la, saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo lé Trump ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo ɖe asi kpe ɖe akpedada ƒe gbedasi aɖe ŋu. Reuters gblɔ be azɔlizɔzɔa "tɔ vie le United States ƒe dudɔnunɔla ƒe dɔwɔƒe tsɔ ɖe akpedada fia Trump be edze aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe nubabla la gɔme." Le July 26, 2025 dzi la, Trump gblɔ le Truth Social nyatakaka aɖe me be yeƒo nu kple dukɔ eveawo ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo be "woabia be woatɔ te aʋawɔwɔ, eye woawu Aʋa la nu, si le edzi yim fifia." Le eƒe nyatakaka me la, egblɔ kpee be yegblɔ na dukɔ eveawo be yemawɔ asitsatsa ŋuti nubabla aɖeke kple akpa eveawo o vaseɖe esime aʋawɔwɔa nu tso. Ŋkeke eve megbe la, Thailand kple Cambodia va wɔ ɖeka be woadzudzɔ aʋawɔwɔ. Le Trump ƒe ŋɔdzidonameɣi la, dukɔ eveawo dze ŋgɔ U.S. ƒe adzɔxexe si ateŋu anye 36% si adze egɔme tso Aug. 1. Ŋkeke etɔ̃ le aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe megbe la, White House ɖe gbeƒãe be woaɖe adzɔxexe ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi akpɔtɔ na dukɔ eveawo va ɖo 19%. Le July 31 ƒe nyatakaka tɔxɛ aɖe me la, Reuters ka nya ta be Trump ƒe yɔyɔa "ʋã Thailand wòva kpe ɖe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe nuƒoƒo ŋu." Snopes mate ŋu aɖo kpe Reuters ƒe nyatakakaa dzi le eɖokui si o. Gake le nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le ƒe nya nu la, esi Thailand ƒe dukplɔlagã si le dɔ wɔm, Phumtham Wechayachai, kple Cambodia ƒe dukplɔlagã, Hun Manet, lɔ̃ ɖe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi dzi vɔ la, wo ame evea siaa da akpe na Trump. (Woda akpe na Malaysia ƒe Dukplɔlagã Anwar Ibrahim, amesi wɔ ŋutifafa nuƒoawo, kple China, si ƒe dutadɔnunɔlawo kpɔ gome le kpekpea me hã.) Le Aug. 7 dzi la, Hun Manet hã da lɛta aɖe ɖe Facebook dzi tsɔ tia Trump be wòaxɔ Nobel Ŋutifafa Nunana "ɖe akpa vevi si wòwɔ le ŋutifafa kple liƒo gbugbɔgaɖoanyi le Cambodia kple Thailand ƒe liƒo dzi ta." Eyata nyatakaka kple nya siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le tso Cambodia kple Thailand ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo gbɔ ɖee fia be Trump wɔ akpa si sɔ eye wòɖe dzesi le aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ƒe nubabla la me. Le nya sia me la, eme kɔ ƒã be saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe akpedadadzesiwo ku ɖe agbagba siwo Trump dze be yeawɔ ɖoɖo ɖe aʋawɔwɔ nutsitsi ŋu. Togbɔ be Trump yɔ Cambodia kple Thailand dome dzrewɔwɔ be enye "aʋa" le eƒe Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakaka me hã la, Cambodia alo Thailand meɖe gbeƒã aʋawɔwɔ ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu le se nu le liƒodziʋa la ta vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm o, eye wotu esia ɖe nyadzɔdzɔwo didi tso aʋawɔwɔ ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖe ŋu dzi. New York Times ka nya ta be Wechayachai xlɔ̃ nu le July 25 lia dzi be bor

claim: Cole Tomas Allen, amesi wobu fɔe le amedzidzedze le ƒe 2026 White House Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe fiẽnuɖuƒea me la nye Democrattɔ si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na eye wòdzɔ nu na Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsãtɔ Kamala Harris ƒe ƒe 2024 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Allen tsɔ dɔlar 25 na Harris ƒe ƒe 2024 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada to ActBlue, si nye gadodo ƒe kɔmiti na Democratic Party dzi. Allen ƒe akɔdada ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi siwo le Los Angeles County ɖee fia be akpa aɖeke melɔ̃na o. Le Cole Tomas Allen, ŋutsu si wotsɔ nya ɖe eŋu be ete kpɔ be yeawu U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le White House Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe fiẽnuɖuƒe le April 2026 ƒe nuwuwu megbe la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo dze Allen babla ɖe Democratic Party ŋu kaba. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe mɔ̃wo abe X, Facebook kple Threads ene dzi gblɔ be Allen nye Democrattɔ si woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na; nyatakaka bubuwo gblɔ be edzɔ ga na Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsãtɔ Kamala Harris ƒe dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada le ƒe 2024 me. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla aɖewo, abe ɖusimetɔwo ƒe nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nunyala Laura Loomer ene, gblɔ nya evea siaa. Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hã be yewoakpɔ nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Allen ƒe akpa aɖe si wogblɔ be yenye kple dunyahehe me nudzɔdzɔ siwo wòdzɔ va yi ŋu. Le nyateƒe me la, Allen dzɔ dɔlar 25 na Harris ƒe akɔdadaa nyateƒe, le Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha ƒe dutoƒo nyatakakawo nu. Gake Los Angeles County ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖee fia be Allen ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ agbalẽ me vevie le afima gake meyɔ akpa aɖeke si wòlɔ̃ o. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Kpeɖodziawoe nye esi: Le ɣeyiɣi si me wolé Allen la, exɔ ƒe 31 eye wònɔ Torrance, California, si nye du aɖe si le Los Angeles County, le nyadzɔdzɔ gbogbo aɖewo siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le, siwo dome The Associated Press hã le, nu. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe hã ma aƒe aɖe si do ƒome kple Allen ƒe nɔnɔmetata kple video siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le. Le nɔnɔmetataawo dometɔ aɖewo me la, wokpɔ aƒe ƒe xexlẽdzesi aɖe, si na wòte ŋu kpɔ Allen ƒe ZIP-kɔda, 90501. (Snopes mele adrɛs si tututu le eŋu la gblɔm o le ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyawo ta. Wogblɔ be edzilawo tɔe aƒea nye, amesiwo wometsɔ nya ɖe wo ŋu le tudadaa ta o.) Wozã nyatakaka siwo le etame tsɔ di dutoƒo Los Angeles County ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo me la, wokpɔe be Allen ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe ŋkɔ dede agbalẽ me ƒe nɔnɔme le dɔ dzi gake akpaɖekedzimademade ƒe didi aɖeke meli o. (Los Angeles County ) Nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakawo kple LinkedIn ƒe axa (si wodzra ɖo) si sɔ kple amesi ŋu wole ɖi kem le ƒe numeɖeɖe ɖee fia be Allen nɔ Los Angeles County nutoa me le eƒe tsitsime katã, si fia be anɔ eme be atikemawɔlawo ƒe nuŋlɔɖi mele esi le teƒe bubuwo o. Le California la, woɖe mɔ na atikemawɔla siwo tia "no party preference" be woada akɔ le Democratic, Libertarian kple American Independent ƒe ŋgɔdonyawo me. Republican, Green kple Freedom of Peace dunyahehawo meɖea mɔ na atikemawɔla siwo si akpa aɖeke melɔ̃na o be woada akɔ le woƒe ŋgɔdonyawo me le nutoa me o. Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha la wɔa ame siwo dzɔ nu na "dunyahehe ƒe kɔmiti siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le dukɔa me" ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo woate ŋu adi. Esi wodi nudzɔla ɖekaɖeka siwo ŋkɔe nye "Allen, Cole," si me tɔwo tso Torrance, California, koe le Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la, wogbugbɔ nudzɔdzɔ ɖeka ko na: dɔlar 25 na ActBlue, si nye gadodo ƒe kɔmiti na Democratic Party. Nudzɔdzɔa sɔ kple Allen ƒe ZIP code eye wògblɔ nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Allen ŋu le dutoƒo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye eƒe nufiala ƒe dɔ kple eƒe dɔtɔ, C2 Education, si hã woŋlɔ ɖe LinkedIn ƒe axa si dze abe Allen tɔ ene. Le nuŋlɔɖia nu la, $25 la nye "EARMAKED FOR HARRIS FOR PRESIDENT." (Dukɔa ƒe Tiatiawɔha) Ne èdi nyatakaka bubuwo tso tudala la ƒe nɔnɔme ŋu la, Snopes dzro nɔnɔmetata aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe Allen fia le awu ʋlaya si dzi Israel-srafowo ƒe dzesi le me.

claim: Le nunya wɔwɔ me la, “Míele ŋgɔ xɔm China geɖe.”
evidence: Dukplɔla Donald Trump kafu United States ƒe nɔƒe le eƒe nunya wɔwɔe ƒe hoʋiʋli kple China si le ho ʋlim kplii me. Egblɔ le Jan. 13 dzi le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple CBS Evening News ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔla Tony Dokoupil me be: “Míele ŋgɔ na China kple ga gbogbo aɖe ŋutɔ.” "AI la nye nusi dzi womate ŋu axɔ ase o, nusi le dzɔdzɔm le afima. Míele ŋgɔ xɔm na China geɖe," egblɔ le Jan. 16 dzi le Mar-a-Lago. Eye le eƒe nuƒo si wòƒo le Jan. 21 dzi le Xexeame ƒe Ganyawo Ŋuti Takpekpe si wowɔ le Davos, Switzerland me la, egagblɔe ake be: "Míele ŋgɔ xɔm le xexeame le AI me to nu geɖe me. Míele ŋgɔ na China geɖe." U.S. xɔ ŋgɔ, gake menye cozy o. United States xɔ ŋgɔ na China le AI chip wɔwɔ kple asi dzi kpɔkpɔ me. AI chips le vevie ŋutɔ — wotrɔ asi le wo ŋu be woawɔ dɔwo abe nɔnɔmetata kple nuƒoƒo ƒe dzesidede ene. China nye hoʋlila dziŋɔ aɖe le go bubuwo me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye eƒe dɔwɔlawo ƒe nyonyome kple elektrikŋusẽ si naa ŋusẽ nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le afɔɖeɖe aɖewo nu la, dukɔ eveawo nye kɔ kple kɔ, eye tɔtrɔ siwo wowɔ nyitsɔ laa le U.S. ƒe nudɔdɔwo tsɔtsɔ yi duta ƒe ɖoɖoa me ate ŋu aɖe vi na China. Gake Trump ɖe dɔwɔƒewo ƒe sededewo hã dzi kpɔtɔ, si na ŋusẽ U.S. AI dɔwɔƒewo be woakeke wo ɖokui ɖe enu kple mɔxeɖenu ʋɛ aɖewo. Eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ na PolitiFact be ɣleti ʋɛ aɖewo koe China tsi megbe na U.S. le AI gome. White House AI kple crypto czar David Sacks gblɔ le June me be Chinatɔwo ƒe AI ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo "tsi megbe ɣleti etɔ̃ va ɖo ade" tso U.S. Le Jan. 21 dzi le Xexeame ƒe Ganyawo Ŋuti Takpekpe me, esi wobiae be aleke wòbua AI duɖimekekea fifia hã la, Sacks gblɔ be, "Megasusui kokoko be U.S. le ŋgɔ. Mesusu be míaƒe mɔ̃wo nyo wu, míaƒe chips nyo wu. Gake viɖe bubuwo le wo ŋu," si me eƒe ŋusẽdodo hã le. Matt Sheehan, si nye dɔwɔhati gãtɔ le Carnegie Endowment for International Peace’s Asia ɖoɖoa me, bu akɔnta be ne U.S. dɔwɔƒe aɖe ɖe “mɔ̃ yeye nyuitɔ kekeake” ɖe go vɔ la, China dɔwɔƒe aɖe asɔ kplii le abe ɣleti ade va ɖo 18 ene me. AI dɔwɔƒea ƒe ŋgɔnɔla veviwo hã gblɔ numekuku mawo tɔgbe. Le September me la, Jensen Huang, si nye U.S. chipmaker Nvidia ƒe amegã gblɔ be China le megbe na U.S. Google DeepMind ƒe amegã Demis Hassabis be "nanoseconds" le megbe na Jan. 20 be Chinatɔwo ƒe mɔ̃wo tsi megbe ɣleti ade. Dukplɔla Donald Trump le to ɖom esime Nvidia ƒe amegã Jensen Huang le nu ƒom le wɔna aɖe si ku ɖe gadede Amerika ŋu le Cross Hall of the White House, April 30, 2025, le Washington. (AP) Nvidia si le California ɖu AI chip wɔwɔ dzi, eye wòva zu dɔwɔƒe gbãtɔ le xexeame si ƒe asi ɖo dɔlar triliɔn 5 le asi me. Le Trump ƒe dziɖuɣi la, U.S. ɖe asi le sededewo ŋu be woaɖe mɔ na China be wòakpɔ Nvidia ƒe chip deŋgɔwo, si ate ŋu aɖe vovototo si le U.S. kple China dome dzi akpɔtɔ. Chris McGuire, si nye Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe dɔdzikpɔlagã le China kple mɔ̃ɖaŋununya yeyewo me gblɔ be: “Vovototo gã aɖe ŋutɔŋutɔ le eme, le chips (U.S.) ate ŋu awɔ ƒe nyonyome kple chips agbɔsɔsɔme si míate ŋu awɔ siaa gome.” U.S. se ɖo ɖoɖo ɖe chip deŋgɔ aɖewo ɖoɖo ɖe duta ŋu, eye wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye mɔxexe ɖe Nvidia nu be wòagadzra Blackwell, si nye eƒe chip sesẽtɔ kekeake, na China o. Le July me la, Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea trɔ eƒe sewo, si na Nvidia te ŋu dzra chip si mede ŋgɔ boo o na China. Ke hã U.S. dziɖuɖumegãwo ke ɖe amewo ŋu wole dɔwɔƒea ƒe chips siwo de ŋgɔ wu la tsɔm le adzame yina China. Le Jan. 13 dzi la, Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua ɖe mɔ na Nvidia be wòadzra eƒe AI chip evelia si ŋu ŋusẽ le wu, H200s, kple mɔxexeɖenu. Nvidia mateŋu aɖo chips siwo katã wòdzrana ƒe 50% kple edzivɔ ɖe Amerika asisiwo o. Trump hã de adzɔ 25% ɖe H200-awo dzi. Eŋutinunyalawo xɔe se be ɖoɖoa ƒe tɔtrɔ akpɔ ŋusẽ gbegblẽ ɖe United States ƒe ŋgɔyiyi dzi. Sheehan gblɔ be H200 chips dzadzra "gblẽa U.S. ƒe viɖe aɖewo le AI chips gome." "Nɔnɔme bliboa si le hehenana mɔ̃ siwo lolo wu eye wozãa kɔmpiuta geɖe wu la dina be yewoakpɔ dzidzɔ ɖe U.S. ŋu le esi wògakpɔtɔ le viɖe si su esi le chips xɔxɔ gome ta." Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe, si nye susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ, bu akɔnta be ne wotsɔ chip deŋgɔwo abe H200-awo ene ɖo duta mɔxeɖenu aɖeke manɔmee la, viɖe si U.S. akpɔ le akɔntabubumɔnu me la aɖiɖi ŋutɔ. McGuire gblɔ be: "Mesusu be nusiwo wotsɔna ɖoa duta dzi kpɔkpɔ koe nye mɔnu ɖeka kolia si le U.S. dziɖuɖua si be wòaɖe China dzi akpɔtɔ." Wokpɔa axa si nye smartphone app DeepSeek le smartphone screen dzi le Beijing, Jan. 28, 2025. (AP) China dɔwɔƒewo tu gbegbɔgblɔ gã ƒe kpɔɖeŋu siwo hoa hoʋiʋli — AI ƒe kpɔɖeŋu siwo wona hehee be woasrɔ̃ gbegbɔgblɔ eye woawɔ dɔwo abe nuƒoƒo kpuie, gbegɔmeɖeɖe kple dzeɖoɖo ene. U.S. ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye OpenAI ƒe ChatGPT, Google ƒe Gemini, xAI ƒe Grok kple Anthropic ƒe Claude. China dɔwɔƒe siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye DeepSeek, Alibaba kple Moonshot ɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe hoʋiʋli ƒe mɔ̃wo ɖe go. Numekukudɔwɔƒe aɖe ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be tso ƒe 2023 me la, Chinatɔwo...

claim: Le Kristmas ŋdɔnuɖuɣi aɖe le ƒe 1943 me la, Canadatɔ nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe si le Belgium tsɔ aɖi de Nazi-srafomegã 45 me hewu wo esi wotsɔ arsenic bla woƒe mɔli.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Míekpɔ dzesi geɖe siwo fia be AI ye wɔ nyaʋiʋlia. Ɣleti geɖee nye sia si nya aɖe kaka le Internet dzi be Canadatɔ nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe si le Belgium tsɔ aɖi de Nazi-srafomegã 45 hewu wo esi wòtsɔ arsenic bla woƒe mɔli le ƒe 1943 ƒe Kristmas ŋdɔnuɖuɣi. Facebook ƒe axa Gossip Central da nya sia (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Feb. 13, 2026 dzi, le kpɔɖeŋu me. Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi la dze egɔme be: “Canada Saɖagaxɔmenɔla Si tsɔ Mɔli De Aɖi Nazi Asrafomegã 45 me le Kristmas Ŋdɔnuɖuɖu Me.” Nya la gbugbɔgagblɔ bubuwo dze le YouTube (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple Facebook (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le December 2025 kple January 2026 me, eye Snopes nuxlẽlawo do ka kpli mí be yewoabia be nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe hã. Kpuie ko la, nyakpakpae nya la nye. Edzɔ tso ŋutinya si sɔ kloe si ku ɖe Poland nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe ŋu me eye hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo zã dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ nunya wɔwɔe tsɔ wɔ ŋutinya ʋãme alo dziŋɔwo tsɔ mae. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye alakpa. Snopes te ɖe Gossip Central ƒe Facebook-dzesi ƒe dɔdzikpɔla aɖe ŋu be wòagblɔ eƒe susu tso ŋutinya si woto vɛ ŋu. Míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne woɖo eŋu. Nyatakaka mawo wɔlawo wɔa hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ƒe lɔlɔ̃ faa be yewoaxɔ ŋutinya siwo wowɔ la dzi ase ahagblɔ wo la ŋudɔ nyuie, eye wokpɔa viɖe tso boblododo ƒe ga si wokpɔna le gotagome nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dzi nyatakakaawo do ƒome kplii la me. (Snopes ka nya ta tso asitsatsa ƒe aɖaŋu sia ŋu va yi.) Le kpɔɖeŋu me, kadodo aɖe nɔ Facebook nyatakakaa me yi blog ƒe axa aɖe si me boblododowo yɔ fũu si Wordpress xɔna, ke menye nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ si ŋu ŋkɔ le o. Google didi ŋutinyaa ɖe YouTube video aɖe si AI wɔ le Dec. 24, 2025 dzi (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ƒe tanyae nye, "Canada Saɖagaxɔmenɔla Si tsɔ Mɔli De Aɖi Nazi Kpovitɔ 45 Le Kristmas Ŋdɔnuɖuɣi," tanya si sɔ kple nya si woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook nyatakakaa me. Nusiwo le nyatakakaa kple blog la me hã sɔ kple YouTube ƒe videoa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ le eɖokui si, si nye nusi ame kpɔna ne eʋu nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotu ɖe edzi. Vodada mawo ke siwo le YouTube ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ si wowɔna le wo ɖokui si me gɔ̃ hã nɔ nyatakakaa kple blog la me. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nuŋɔŋlɔ si le screen dzi le videoa me dze egɔme kple, "December 1943 Dinant Belgium Nɔvinyɔnu Marie Claire Beaumont..." Ke hã, videoa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ si wowɔ le eɖokui si, si wotu ɖe edzi, Facebook nyatakaka kple blog me nyawo dze ŋutinyaa gɔme kple, "December 1943, Dant, Belgium. Nɔvinyɔnu Mariah Clare Bulma." Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Dinant nye du aɖe le Belgium, gake Dant ya mele nenema o. Google dzi didi gbogbo aɖewo mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le tso nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe, Canadatɔ alo ame bubu aɖe, si tsɔ mɔli si me aɖi le wu Nazi-srafomegã gbogbo aɖewo ŋu o. Canadatɔwo ƒe nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ŋutinya didi si metso emetsonu siwo do ŋgɔ na Dec. 24 ƒe YouTube videoa ko mekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be ŋutinyaa nɔ anyi gɔ̃ hã hafi woda YouTube videoa ɖe Internet dzi o. YouTube-dɔwɔƒe si dae, si nye Canadatɔwo Le Aʋawɔwɔ Me, tsɔ eɖokui na be yeada ŋutinya (siwo ŋu ɖikeke le zi geɖe) siwo te gbe ɖe Canadatɔwo ƒe akpa si wòwɔ le Aʋa II me dzi. Didi mawo ke ɖe podcast ƒe akpa aɖe si le YouTube (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si woŋlɔ le Nov. 22, 2025 dzi, si gblɔ ŋutinya si sɔ kloe si AI wɔ ku ɖe Poland nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla aɖe si tsɔ ŋdɔnuɖuɣi ƒe mɔli si me aɖi le wu Nazitɔwo ŋu. Ŋutinya sia didi si me nyawo koe nɔ anyi do ŋgɔ na YouTube podcast ƒe akpa sia ƒe dodo la, womekpɔ nya aɖeke do ŋgɔ tso nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla siwo tsɔa mɔli si me aɖi le wu Nazitɔwo ŋu o. Wonɔ te ɖe didi siawo dzi gblɔ be edze abe Polandtɔwo ƒe nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ŋutinyaa dzɔ tso Nov. 22 ƒe podcast ƒe akpaa me ene. Emegbe Canadatɔwo ƒe Aʋawɔwɔ YouTube-habɔbɔa wɔ eƒe ŋutinyaa ƒe akpa aɖe kple Canadatɔ nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla la le Dec. 24. Kpeɖodzi si ŋu kakaɖedzi le meli be ŋutinya eveawo dometɔ aɖeke nye nyateƒe o, togbɔ be nyatakaka eveawo siaa gblɔ be woɖe gbeƒã nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe ŋutinyawo zi gbãtɔ ƒe bla nanewoe nye sia hã. Snopes do ka kple Canadatɔ Siwo Le Aʋa wɔm to e-mail dzi. Míawɔ nyatakaka sia yeyee ne míese nya tso television dɔwɔƒea gbɔ. Nu geɖe siwo fia be wozã nunya wɔwɔe ƒe dɔwɔnuwo tsɔ wɔe la nɔ Canadatɔwo ƒe nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔlawo ƒe videoa me. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, videoa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ le eɖokui si anya ŋlɔ "Marie Claire Beaumont" vodadatɔe be "Mariah Clare Bulma" elabena videoa me nuŋlɔla yɔ ŋkɔa le mɔ si mewɔ nuku o nu, si nye vodada si AI ŋutinyagblɔlawo wɔna ɣeaɖewoɣi. Abe nyayɔyɔ gbegblẽ ma ƒe akpa aɖe ene la, nuŋlɔla la yɔ "Marie" be "Ma-rye." Videoa ƒo nu tso arsenic agbɔsɔsɔme vovovo kura siwo nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla la xɔ se be yehiã ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla la bu akɔnta gbã be yeahiã arsenic si ade gram 60 na ŋutsu ɖeka. Wogblɔ be emegbe ekpɔ nugoe aɖe si me arsenic gram 230 le si "sɔ gbɔ wu," togbɔ be agbɔsɔsɔ ma awu Nazi-srafomegã 45 la dometɔ etɔ̃ alo ene pɛ ko hã, le eƒe akɔntabubu nu. Emegbe nyɔnu saɖagaxɔmenɔla la tso nya me be yeahiã gram 65 na ŋutsu ɖeka, si ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ade arsenic gram 2,925 le mɔli me. Esi wònye be eyae

claim: Black Lives Matter di be yeatsrɔ̃ nukliaƒomea.
evidence: Míenaa míaƒe teƒewo sɔ na ƒomewo eye míenaa dzilawo kpɔa gome le eme bliboe kple wo viwo. Míeɖea blemafofowo ƒe nuwɔna si bia tso vidadawo si be woawɔ dɔ “trɔ eve” ale be woate ŋu anye vidada le wo ɖokui si esime wole gome kpɔm le dutoƒoʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃dɔwo me gɔ̃ hã la ɖa. Míegblẽa nukliaƒome ƒe ɖoɖo ƒe nudidi si Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo de se la me to kpekpeɖeŋu nana mía nɔewo abe ƒome gãwo kple “kɔƒe” siwo katã léa be na wo nɔewo, vevietɔ mía viwo, vaseɖe afisi vidadawo, dzilawo, kple ɖeviwo ƒe dzi dze eme le. Míedea queer‐affirming network dzi. Ne míeƒo ƒu la, míewɔa esia kple susu be míaɖe mía ɖokui ɖa tso heteronormative thinking ƒe asi sesẽ me, alo ne míagblɔe tututu la, dzixɔse si nye be xexeame katã nye heterosexual (negbe ɖe wòɖee fia be menye nenemae o). Míetua dzidzimewo dome kadodo kple hadomehabɔbɔ si me ƒexɔxɔ ƒe vovototo aɖeke mele o ɖo. Míexɔe se be amewo katã, ƒe ka kee woɖaxɔ o, ɖea wo ɖokui fiana kple ŋutete be woakplɔ wo ahasrɔ̃ nu.

claim: Fefewɔla Shah Rukh Khan kple Sanjay Dutt ɖe ɖeklemi Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar eye wobia be woaɖe kuku le hijab nyaʋiʋlia ta.
evidence: Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le Bollywood fefewɔla Shah Rukh Khan kple Sanjay Dutt ƒe videowo mam, hele gbɔgblɔm be wo ame evea siaa ɖe ɖeklemi Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar eye wobia be woaɖe kuku le nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe nyɔnu ɖɔkta aɖe ƒe hijab le dziɖuɖu ƒe wɔna aɖe me le Patna le December 15, 2025. Screengrab from X and Facebook post by @MMufti786, Mohammad Saif Sabri Kpeɖodzi Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe Nyatakaka alo Nyagbɔgblɔ Siwo Dzi Woka Ðe Menye Be Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo naɖo kpe nya sia dzi o la, ezã nya veviwo abe "Sanjay Dutt ɖe ɖeklemi Nitish Kumar" kple "Shah Rukh Khan hijab controversy Bihar" tsɔ di Google. Míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ɖo kpe nya siawo dzi o.  Míeto fefewɔla eveawo siaa ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo hã me. Shah Rukh Khan alo Sanjay Dutt meƒo nu tso nya sia ŋu le dutoƒo o.  Original Shah Rukh Khan Video Dates Back to 2020 Be míakpɔ afisi Shah Rukh Khan video si kaka ɖe amewo me la dzɔ tso la, míewɔ nɔnɔmetata didi si trɔ megbe to Google Lens zazã me le keyframes siwo tso clip la me. Esia na míeva ɖo nyadzɔdzɔ siwo The Times of India, ABP News, kple National Herald ta le March 2020 me, siwo ka nya ta be Shah Rukh Khan ƒoe ɖe eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea ƒe amedzrowo nu be woanɔ xɔ me eye woawɔ ɖe afɔɖeɖe siwo woatsɔ akpɔ wo ɖokui dzii dzi.  Video gbãtɔa nye esi Shah Rukh Khan ma le March 20, 2020 dzi, le COVID-19 dɔvɔ̃a wɔɣi. Le videoa me la, eɖe kuku na amewo be woanɔ xɔ me, woaƒo asa na dutoƒo teƒewo, eye woaɖɔ ŋu ɖo le nyatakaka totrowo ŋu.  Ele be mí katã míawɔ míaƒe akpa dzi eye míado alɔ dziɖuɖumegã siwo le nu geɖe wɔm na mí. #WarAgainstVirus @mybmc pic.twitter.com/TDLpVhtr1F — Shah Rukh Khan (@iamsrk) March 20, 2020 AI-Detection Tools Analysis ɖo kpe edzi be wotrɔ asi le Shah Rukh Khan Clip ŋu Ne wodzro video si kaka ɖe amewo me la me nyuie wu ɖee fia be odio la mewɔ ɖeka kple Shah Rukh Khan ƒe nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu o, si fia be asitɔtrɔ le ame ŋu. Be Newschecker naɖo kpe esia dzi la, ezã dɔwɔnu geɖe siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI la tsɔ ku videoa me.  Hiya Deepfake Gbeɖiɖimɔ̃a na gbea xɔ nyateƒetoto ƒe dzesi 5 pɛ ko le 100 ɖesiaɖe me, si fia be anɔ eme be AI ƒe asitɔtrɔ le eŋu ŋutɔ.  Screengrab tso Hiya Deepfake Gbeɖiɖimɔ̃ me.  Hive Moderation de dzesii be videoa ƒe akpa 59.4 le alafa me nye esi wowɔ tso AI me, gake Aurigin.ai de dzesi odio la be AI ye wɔe. Nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo siawo ɖee fia kɔte be wotrɔ video gbãtɔa to aʋatso gbeɖiɖi si wotsɔ AI wɔe tsɔtsɔ kpee me.  Hive Moderation kple Aurigin.ai ƒe emetsonu siwo ɖee fia be video si me dɔlékuiwo le ƒe odio nye AI-si wowɔ.  Sanjay Dutt Video Is From 2019 Míewɔ numekuku ma tɔgbe le Sanjay Dutt ƒe video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ŋu. Nɔnɔmetata didi si míetrɔ megbe la kplɔ mí yi nyatakaka siwo Mid-Day ta le August 25, 2019 dzi, kpakple video aɖe si woda ɖe Filmy Beat YouTube television dzi le August 8, 2019. Le nyatakakatsoƒe siawo ƒe nya nu la, video gbãtɔa ɖe Sanjay Dutt fia wòda akpe na nyaselawo ɖe lɔlɔ̃ si wòɖe fia eƒe Marathi sinima "Baba" ta.  Ema video sia ɖe eƒe Instagram nyatakakadzraɖoƒe le August 8, 2019 dzi, eye kadodo aɖeke mele eŋu kple dunyahehe alo nudzɔdzɔ aɖeke si ku ɖe Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar ŋu o.  AI Dɔwɔnuwo Flag Sanjay Dutt Odio be Aʋatso Esi míedzro Sanjay Dutt videoa ƒe akpa si kaka ɖe amewo me me la, míede dzesii be odioa mewɔ ɖeka kple eƒe nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu o. Be woaɖo kpe esia dzi la, wozã dɔwɔnu geɖe siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI la do klip la kpɔ. Hive Moderation bu videoa be enye AI ƒe alafa memama 68.2. Aurigin.ai de dzesii be odio la nye esi wowɔ tso AI ƒe alafa memama 100 me.  Hive Moderation kple Aurigin.ai ƒe emetsonu siwo ɖee fia be video si me dɔlékuiwo le ƒe odio nye AI-si wowɔ.  Nenema ke Hiya Deepfake Gbeɖiɖimɔ̃a na gbea xɔ nyateƒetoto ƒe dzesi si nye 10 ko le 100 me, si fia be alesi wòate ŋu adzɔe ŋutɔ be AI natrɔ asi le eŋu.  Screengrab tso Hiya Deepfake Gbeɖiɖimɔ̃ me.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Video sia si kaka ɖe ŋugbetɔsrɔ̃ si do go eƒe ahiãvi tsãtɔ Hafi Srɔ̃ɖeɖe la nye Nyametsotso Video siwo kaka ɖe amewo dome siwo gblɔ be Shah Rukh Khan kple Sanjay Dutt ɖe ɖeklemi Bihar ƒe Dukplɔlagã Nitish Kumar le hijab ƒe nyaʋiʋlia ta la nye alakpa. Video xoxo siwo medo ƒome kple wo nɔewo o siwo me wotsɔ odio si AI wɔ la kpe ɖe eŋu emegbe le video klipi eveawo siaa me.  Nyabiasewo Ðe Sanjay Dutt bia be Nitish Kumar naɖe kukua?  Ao, nya aɖeke meli si Sanjay Dutt gblɔ le se nu, gbebiame aɖeke, alo nya aɖeke mele hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo si ɖo kpe nya sia dzi o.    Ðe Shah Rukh Khan ƒe videoa nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔa?  Ao, video gbãtɔa dze egɔme tso March 2020 me eye wòdo ƒome kple COVID-19 ŋuti nyanyanana, ke menye Bihar dunyahehe o.    Aleke wotrɔ asi le videoa ŋui?  Wogazã video gbãtɔawo ake, eye wotsɔ odio siwo wowɔ to AI dzi kpe ɖe eŋu be woatsɔ alakpatɔe atsɔ fefewɔlawo asɔ kple nyaʋiʋlia.
