claim: Aʋatso: Woda adzo Ukraine Sitsoƒedilawo le Louvre
evidence: Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo kple hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo da megbe na Kremlin le nya siwo wogblɔ be Ukraine sitsoƒedilawo fi nu xɔasiwo le Louvre Blemanudzraɖoƒe si le Paris la kakam. Nyatakakawo ɖea amewo ƒe foto siwo wolé de gaxɔ me fiana eye wogblɔna be ame siwo ŋu wole ɖi kem le la nye Ukrainetɔ siwo «da adzo Louvre.» Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le nya siwo wogblɔ be Franse dziɖuɖumegãwo lé Ukraine sitsoƒedila eve le fififi aɖe si dzɔ le Louvre ta la kakam. Ŋutsu eve siwo wogblɔ be wolé de gaxɔ me ɖe nudzɔdzɔ si dzɔ le October 19, 2025 dzi, si me wogblɔ be wofi kpe xɔasi enyi siwo le blemanudzraɖoƒea ƒe Napoleon Nudzraɖoƒea me la ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo le nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ la me. Screenshot — t.me Le nyateƒe me la, nyatakaka sia nye alakpa. Foto siwo wozã le nyatakakaawo me la ɖe Ukraine dukɔmevi eve fia nyateƒe, gake nudzɔdzɔ bubu aɖe mee wotso: le October 9–10 ƒe zã me la, ŋutsuawo, siwo mu aha la, dze agbagba be yewoafi trakt le akpata aɖe me le Opole Lubelskie, Poland. Togbɔ be womezã nɔnɔmetatawo didi le megbe o hã la, edze ƒã be womekpɔ gome le Louvre adzodada aɖe me o—sedzikpɔla siwo le fotoawo me la do Polandtɔwo ƒe kpovitɔwo ƒe awuwo (POLICJA), ke menye Franseawo ƒe Kpovitɔwo ƒe Dukɔmeviwo ƒe awuwo o. Screenshot — informacje.wp.pl Franse dziɖuɖumegãwo—siwo dome Paris senyalawo ƒe dɔwɔƒe, Dekɔnuwo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe, kple nutoa me kpovitɔwo hã le—megblɔ be wolé Ukraine sitsoƒedila aɖeke le fififi aɖe si dzɔ le Louvre ta o. Nya sia dzena le nyatakaka totro siwo da megbe na Russia ƒe akpa dzi ɖeɖeko, eye wòte gbe ɖe eƒe gɔmedzedze dzi be enye alakpanya si nyatakaka siwo wogblɔna tsɔ ʋãa amewo. Russiatɔwo ƒe alakpanyawo wɔa alakpanya siwo blaa Ukraine sitsoƒedilawo ɖe nuvlowɔhawo ŋu ɣesiaɣi eye wodoa wo ɖe ŋgɔ, eye woƒe taɖodzinue nye be yeahe vɔvɔ̃ kple dziku vɛ le ameha siwo xɔ wo la dome to Ukrainetɔwo ɖeɖefia be wonye «amedzro» siwo meda akpe o alo afɔku le wo me. StopFake tsɔ nya ɖe nyatakaka totro geɖe mawo tɔgbe ŋu va yi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Aʋatso: Germany Bua fɔ Ukraine Sitsoƒedilawo ɖe «Kuxiwo Katã» – BILD , Aʋatso: Ukraine Sitsoƒedila Da Nyɔnu Le Eƒe Srɔ̃ɖegbe – ABC Channel , kple Aʋatso: Ukraine Sitsoƒedilawo Gblẽ Blemanudzraɖoƒe ƒe Asinudɔwɔwɔ — «Van Gogh’s Сhair» kple bubuawo.

claim: Woɖe Virat Kohli kple Rohit Sharma ɖa le ICC ƒe ODI ƒe bɔlƒoƒo ƒe ɖoɖo yeyetɔ me, si na be wogagblɔ be yewoaxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme.
evidence: Ɣleti ʋɛ aɖewo ko le esime ɣletivi Indiatɔwo ƒe kriket ƒola eve Rohit Sharma kple Virat Kohli ɖe gbeƒã woƒe dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme le Tests me, si wɔe be ODIs koe nye mɔnu si me wole dɔ dzi le la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla geɖewo le ICC ODI batting rankings ƒe xexlẽdzesi si wogblɔ be woma si me wo ame evea mele o la mam.  Sharma kple Kohli ƒe bu le ame 100 gbãtɔwo dome na amewo nɔ nya hem le Internet dzi be yewole asi dem yewoƒe dukɔwo dome fefewo te, elabena zi geɖe la, ne woxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme ko hafi woɖea fefewɔlawo le ŋkɔawo me.  Woate ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa ƒe akpa si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Fact Check Newschecker gbã di ICC ODI batting rankings le se nu le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, afisi míekpɔ Rohit Sharma kple Virat Kohli le nɔƒe evelia kple enelia, si tsi tre ɖe viral xexlẽdzesiwo ŋu.  Emegbe míeƒu du tsɔ nya veviwo di "Rohit Sharma Virat Kohli ODI dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme," si kplɔ mí yi Times Of India ƒe nyatakaka sia gbɔ, si woŋlɔ le August 21, 2025, si ƒe tanyae nye, "Shock in cricket world! ICC breaks silence after Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli go bus from ODI rankings." Míese be woɖe Rohit kple Kohli, amesiwo xɔ dzudzɔ le T20Is me le ƒe si va yi me la ɖa ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe le ICC ODI batting rankings yeyetɔ si woɖe ɖe go le Braɖagbe la me.  "Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe vodada aɖe ɖe Indiatɔwo ƒe kriket ɣletiviwo Rohit Sharma kple Virat Kohli ɖa le ICC ƒe ODI bɔlƒoƒo ƒe ɖoƒewo me ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe, si na wotɔtɔ elabena wo ame evea siaa gakpɔtɔ le dɔ dzi le ɖoɖoa me. Sharma, si nɔ nɔƒe 2 lia nyitsɔ laa, kple Kohli, si le nɔƒe enelia, bu le ame 100 gbãtɔwo dome hafi ICC gbugbɔe ɖo kaba le numekuku megbe," nyatakakaa xlẽ.  ICC ƒe nyanuɖela lɔ̃ ɖe edzi na The Hindustan Times be vodada aɖe dzɔ, eye wògblɔ be, "Vodada aɖe nɔ míaƒe ɖoƒewo ƒe kplɔ̃wo dzi egbea, gake woɖɔe ɖo." Woateŋu akpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ mawo tɔgbe tso ICC ƒe numekɔkɔ ŋu le afisia, le afisia kple afisia, si gaɖo kpe edzi be wole dɔlékuiwo ƒe ŋkɔwo mam le nya siwo ƒo xlãe me.  Rohit Sharma kple Virat Kohli trɔ yi ODI ƒe ɖoƒewo le esi ICC ɖɔ mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe kuxi aɖe ɖo vɔ megbe. 🙌🏼#Rankings #RohitSharma #ViratKohli #Sportskeeda pic.twitter.com/58hTNHnTLu — Sportskeeda (@Sportskeeda) August 20, 2025 Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Video si kaka ɖe amewo me ɖe Subɔsubɔhawo ƒe Ƒuƒoƒo Fia Le Maharashtra, Menye Amehawo Le Rahul Gandhi ƒe 'Voter Adhikar' Me O Yatra ƒe Nyataƒoƒo Wokpɔe be nya si kaka ɖe amewo dome be woɖe Rohit Sharma kple Virat Kohli ɖa le ODI ƒe ɖoƒewo me, si fia be woxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme la, flua ame elabena mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe kuxi aɖe na wo ame evea bu ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe tso ŋkɔ siwo le ICC ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea me.  Dzɔtsoƒewo ICC ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe Hindustan TImes ƒe nyatakaka, August 21, 2025

claim: Le Swami Prasad Maurya megbe la, woƒoa BJP ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Yogesh Verma
evidence: Ŋkeke aɖewo le esi wogblɔ be woƒo UP ƒe Dudɔnunɔla tsãtɔ Swami Prasad Maurya le Rae Bareli gbɔ megbe la, video aɖe si ɖe BJP ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Yogesh Verma, si hã ƒo atam le dutoƒo la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Zãla geɖe gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔ sia dzɔ nyitsɔ laa, le Maurya dzi dzedze megbe.  Facebook zãla aɖe da videoa ɖe edzi kple numeɖeɖe: स्वामी प्रसादमौर्य के भाजपा विविधा योगेश वर् को पड़ा थप्पड़, #vedioviral #NafisaAli #watch(थप्पड़ कांड) (Eŋlisigbe me tɔ: "Le Swami Prasad Maurya megbe la, woƒo BJP sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Yogesh Verma. #VideoViral #NafisaAli #Watch [Slap Nudzɔdzɔ]) Kpɔ nya si le etame ɖa le afisia (Archive) NYATEƑE DZROÐOƑE NewsMobile tsɔ videoa ƒe keyframes to Reverse Image Search dzi la, wokpɔ YouTube ƒe nyatakaka aɖe, si woŋlɔ le October 9, 2024 dzi, si me nukpɔkpɔ mawo ke le abe alesi nyatakakaa gblɔe ene la, nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le Lakhimpur Kheri le October 2024 me Woƒo Yogesh Verma le kpovitɔwo ŋkume Video la ɖee fia be Senyalawo ƒe Habɔbɔ ƒe Dukplɔla Awadhesh Singh ƒo BJP ƒe ŋgɔnɔla gbã, le ema megbe la, míate ŋu agblɔ be videoa meɖe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa si me woƒo BJP sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Yogesh Verma le la fia o Eye nya si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye alakpa 9799 me

claim: Odio si kaka le September 2025 me la tso 911 kaƒoƒo ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe me le North Carolina, si me wose ame si ƒo ka na wònɔ ɣli dom be: “Menye amegbetɔe nye ema o.”
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le September 2025 me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe vovovowo ma video siwo me nusi ɖi odio tso 911 kaƒoƒo si me ŋutsu aɖe do ɣli le be "Menye amegbetɔe nye ema o!" Le kaƒoƒoa ƒe akpa si woate ŋu ase le videoa me nu la, woate ŋu ase ŋutsu ƒe gbe aɖe wòanɔ gbɔgblɔm na 911 dɔwɔla aɖe tso ŋutsu aɖe si ʋu yɔ fũu si wòkpɔ le mɔa to ŋu, hafi ɣlidodo kple yɔla ƒe ɣlidodo natso dzeɖoɖoa me. Le amesi yɔe ƒe nya nu la, ƒoƒoa nye nane si menye amegbetɔ o si dze anyi alo ti kpo ɖe eƒe pickup ƒe aba dzi. Ame si yɔe la ƒo nu tso alesi wòɖi le eƒe agbatsɔʋua me to duƒuƒu sesĩe me eye emegbe wòƒo brek la, tsɔe ƒu gbe ɖe eƒe ʋua ƒe ʋuƒo dzi ŋu. Woma odioa le TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe) video geɖe (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) siwo wokpɔ le wo katã me (wodzra wo ɖo) zi miliɔn geɖe me. Woma kaƒoƒoa ƒe odio la hã ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubuwo, abe Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe) kple YouTube (nudzraɖoƒe), afisi videoawo gakpɔ kple nya geɖe wu le. Odio si woma le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo la tso 911 kaƒoƒo ŋutɔŋutɔ si wowɔ le Pender County, North Carolina. Dashboard fotoɖemɔ̃ alo video bubu aɖeke menɔ ʋukulaa si tso nudzɔdzɔa me o; video siwo woda ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo zã video siwo meku ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu o abe kaƒoƒoa ƒe megbenyawo ene. Edze abe kaƒoƒoa dze kaka gɔme le Internet dzi gbã kple video aɖe si YouTube-habɔbɔ si nye Carolina Case Files da ɖe edzi le Sept. 13, 2025. Video ma ɖee fia be kaƒoƒoa le edzi yim le Pender County le 11 p.m. July 31, 2021, togbɔ be ɣeyiɣi ƒe dzesi aɖe zã a.m. vodadatɔe ɖe p.m. teƒe hã, le video aɖe si kplɔe ɖo si tso nuŋlɔɖi ma ke me nu. Videoa ƒe akpa aɖewoe nye gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ kple Pender County Sheriff Alan Cutler kple ŋutsu aɖe si wogblɔ be eyae ƒo ka. Womeɖe ame si ƒo ka la ƒe mo fia le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi o eye "T" gbãtɔ koe wotsɔ de dzesii be woatsɔ akpɔ eƒe nya ɣaɣlawo ta. Le e-mail aɖe si Pender County Sheriff’s Office ɖo ɖe Snopes me la, woɖo kpe kaƒoƒoa ƒe nyateƒenyenye kple ŋkeke si dzi wòŋlɔe dzi, eye wògaɖo kpe Cutler ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi hena nuŋlɔɖi videoa hã dzi. Sheriff ƒe dɔwɔƒea hã na kaƒoƒoa ƒe kɔpi blibo si wometrɔ asi le o, si didi abe miniti 11 ene, kple sedede ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi si ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔa ŋu. Le kaƒoƒoa ƒe gɔmedzedze lɔƒo, abe sɛkɛnd 45 ene hafi woate ŋu ase gbeɖiɖi si le ɖiɖim la, ame si yɔe la gblɔ be yezɔ mɔ to dukɔa ƒe Mɔdodo Gã 210 dzi yina ɣedzeƒe gome ɖo ta Dukɔa ƒe Mɔdodo Gã 53 dzi eye ɖeko yeto Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe Dzɔlawo ƒe nutoa me teti koe nye ema. Woate ŋu akpɔ teƒe ma le Google Maps Street View eye wòle Pender County. Emegbe le kaƒoƒoa me la, egblɔ na dɔwɔƒea be yeto Porter Mɔ dzi eye mlɔeba yehe yi Malpass Dzogoedzi Fiasea ƒe ʋutɔɖoƒe. Anɔ abe miniti ade ene nɔ kaƒoƒoa me le kaƒoƒoa me le ame si yɔ teƒe gbãtɔ kple teƒe mamlɛtɔ dome, si sɔ kple Google Maps ƒe ʋukuku ƒe ɣeyiɣi si wobu be axɔ abe miniti adre ene. Sedede ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi si kpovitɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒea ma gblɔ be ame aɖeke si va ɖo teƒea mete ŋu ke ɖe ame aɖeke alo naneke si ʋu aɖe ƒo ŋu o eye be yameʋu si me ame aɖeke mele o didi medze edzi o. Ŋutsu si wɔ Carolina Case Files videoae nye Rusty Martin Sr., si nye fefewɔla si le Wilmington, North Carolina, si te ɖe Pender County ŋu. Le email aɖe si Martin ɖo ɖe Snopes me la, egblɔ be yese 911 ƒe kaƒoƒo bliboa zi gbãtɔ le May 2025 me eye wòxɔ ɣeyiɣi hafi woƒo videoa nu ƒu. Martin gblɔ be kuxi gãtɔ kekeake si yekpɔ le videoa wɔwɔ me enye be yeana amesi ƒo ka na yeaƒo nu tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu. Edze abe ɖe woƒo nu tso kaƒoƒoa ŋu ya teti le internet dzi do ŋgɔ na May 2025. Togbɔ be ŋutinyaa ŋutɔ ƒe nyatakakawo mewɔ ɖeka bliboe o hã la, Facebook-dzesi aɖe si woyɔna be Carolina ƒe Unknown ŋlɔ (wodzrae ɖo) le December 2024 me be yeƒo nu kple Pender County ƒe ame gbãtɔ si ɖo nya ŋu ku ɖe 911 kaƒoƒo aɖe si me "amegbetɔ ƒe nɔnɔme si womenya o" ti kpo yi ɖe ʋufɔti aɖe si le ʋuʋum ƒe megbe le Highway 210 si te ɖe Currie ŋu, si nye nuto si me 911 yɔla la tsɔ ʋu to eŋu le kaƒoƒoa me. Emegbe axa ma gblɔ be wole nuŋlɔɖi aɖe wɔm tso kaƒoƒoa ŋu eye emegbe wotsɔe do ƒome kple video aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Carolina Case Files me. Togbɔ be Snopes te ŋu ɖo kpe edzi be kaƒoƒoa nye nyateƒe hã la, míete ŋu ɖo kpe nusi wònye ŋutsua kpɔ le kaƒoƒoa me dzi o. Kaƒoƒoa meɖo kpe edzi alo gbee be ame si le ka ƒom la le nane si gbɔ dzɔdzɔmetɔ ŋu, si video geɖe siwo le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖee fia la me tom o. Le Carolina Case Files videoa me la, "T" ɖɔ nusi wòkpɔ le eƒe pickup ƒe aba dzi be enye ame dzẽ aɖe si ƒe ŋkuwo nyrɔ, ŋɔti alo to aɖeke mele eŋu o eye eƒe abɔwo didi abe amegbetɔ si keke ta eye wòtsɔ eƒe mo te ɖe eƒe megbe yaƒoƒo ƒe ahuhɔ̃e ŋu ene. Egblɔ be ekɔ wu tha

claim: Nukpɔkpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo tso June 2025 ƒe Israel kple Iran ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim la me.
evidence: Le June 13, 2025 dzi la, Israel dze taɖodzinu siwo wu wuieve dzi le Iran katã le ŋkɔ si nye Operation Rising Lion te, kple taɖodzinu si wogblɔ be yeaxe mɔ na Iran be wòagawɔ nukliaʋawɔnuwo o. Wogblɔ be Israel gblẽ nu le nuklia dɔwɔƒe veviwo kple asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ŋu, eye wòwu Iran ƒe asrafomegã kɔkɔ geɖe. Le hlɔ̃biabia me la, Iran da tu kple yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o ɖe Israel le ŋkɔ si nye Operation True Promise 3. Le dzidziɖedzi sia dome la, nukpɔkpɔ geɖe le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, siwo wogblɔ be wotso aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim la me. Mina míaɖo kpe nyateƒe si le megbe na nukpɔkpɔ siawo le nyati sia me.  Nya si wogblɔ: Nukpɔkpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo tso June 2025 ƒe Israel kple Iran ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim la me. Nyateƒenya: Video siawo siwo kaka ɖe amewo me meɖea nu ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo wokpɔ tso Israel kple Iran ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim la me fiana o. Wokpɔe be video siwo katã me wodzro la nye esiwo AI wɔ eye gbã la, wo wɔlawoe da wo ɖe TikTok dzi edziedzi. Dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI la de dzesi video ɖesiaɖe be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be AI ye wɔe. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le posu me la nye AME BUBU.  Video 1 Wole video sia (afisia, afisia) mam kple nya si wogblɔ be eɖe Tel Aviv ƒe Ben Gurion Yameʋudzeƒe si gblẽ le Iran ƒe amedzidzedze me fia.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.    Nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di le keyframes siwo tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me la kplɔ mí yi video ma ke si woda ɖe TikTok ƒe asiléƒe si @3amelyonn, amesi gblɔ be yenye AI video wɔla la gbɔ. Míekpɔe hã be ema video gbogbo aɖewo siwo sɔ kple wo nɔewo siwo ɖe tsɔtsrɔ̃ kple gbeɖuɖɔ ƒe nukpɔkpɔwo fia, siwo woate ŋu akpɔ le afisia, afisia, kple afisia.  Esi míesusu be AI ye wɔ videoa ta la, míezã Hive AI detection tool tsɔ ku eme. Dɔwɔnua tsɔ dzesi ƒokpli si nye 80.4% de dzesi videoa, si fia be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be wozã AI tsɔ wɔe.  Video 2 Wole video sia (afisia, afisia, afisia) mam kple nya si wogblɔ be eɖe Tel Aviv dugã si wotsrɔ̃ le Iran ƒe amedzidzedze me fia.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Le míaƒe numekuku me la, míekpɔe be wotsɔ video sia (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) hã da ɖe TikTok ƒe asiléƒe @3amelyonn, si de dzesi ewɔla la be enye AI video wɔla.  Esi míesusu be video sia hã nye esi AI wɔ ta la, míezã Hive AI detection tool tsɔ ku eme. Dɔwɔnua de dzesii kple dzesi siwo katã nye 91.2%, si fia be anɔ eme vevie be wozã AI tsɔ wɔe.  Video 3 Wole video sia mam kple nya si wogblɔ be eɖe Haifa dugã si le dzo dam hetsrɔ̃e le Iran ƒe amedzidzedze me fia.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di le keyframes siwo tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me la kplɔ mí yi video ma ke gbɔ, si woda ɖe TikTok ƒe asiléƒe @myuz_aa1 dzi. Post description gblɔ be wozã AI tsɔ wɔ videoa.  Emegbe míezã Hive AI detection tool tsɔ ku videoa me, si tsɔ dzesi ƒokpli si nye 97.2% de dzesii, si fia be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be wozã AI tsɔ wɔe.  Video 4 Wole video sia mam kple nya si wogblɔ be eɖe Israel yameʋudzeƒe aɖe si dome gblẽ le Iran ƒe amedzidzedze me ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo fia.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di le keyframes siwo tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me me kplɔ mí yi video ma ke gbɔ, míetrɔe heƒo wo nu ƒu kple aʋawɔwɔ ƒe nukpɔkpɔ ƒe akpa bubu siwo woda ɖe TikTok ƒe asiléƒe @AlyNoor4 dzi. Post description gblɔ be wozã AI tsɔ wɔ videoa.  Emegbe míezã Hive AI detection tool tsɔ ku videoa me, si tsɔ dzesi ƒokpli si nye 98.8% de dzesii, si fia be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be wozã AI tsɔ wɔe.  Kpuie ko la, wole video siwo AI wɔ la mam abe Israel kple Iran ƒe aʋawɔwɔ si le edzi yim ƒe nukpɔkpɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo ene.

claim: Wotsɔ FBI dɔwɔla siwo ade 274 siwo le adzame la ge ɖe ameha la dome le Washington, D.C., le Jan. 6, 2021 dzi, si de dzo ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ si na ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ le U.S. Capitol la me.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, FBI dɔwɔlawo nɔ U.S. Capitol le Jan. 6, 2021. Ke hã ... ... wodɔ wo be woawɔ nu ɖe ​​ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔ si dzɔ le Capitol ŋu le eƒe gɔmedzedze megbe. Wome "de wo ɖokui me" alo "le adzame" o, eye womede ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ si he ʋunyaʋunyawɔwɔa vɛ hã me o. Togbɔ be míekpɔ nya aɖe si U.S. Aƒea ƒe Kɔmiti Sue yeyea ŋlɔ le Jan. 6 dzi be egblɔ nya ma tɔgbe hã la, míete ŋu ɖo kpe edzi le mía ɖokui si be woɖo dɔwɔla 274 pɛpɛpɛ ɖe ameha la dome gbemagbe o. Gake edze abe xexlẽme ma sɔ kple numekuku nyatakaka aɖe si U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea na ku ɖe akpa si FBI wɔ le wɔnaa me ŋu ene. Le October 2025 ƒe domedome la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋlɔ ɖe eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nye Truth Social dzi be "Biden FBI tsɔ dɔwɔla 274 da ɖe ameha si le tsitre tsim ɖe eŋu la dome le Jan. 6, 2021, le Washington, D.C., eye wògblɔ kpee (wodzrae ɖo be): "Ne esia le alea, si nye, ame nyui ŋutɔ geɖewo ƒe kukuɖeɖe gãwo." Eƒe nyatakaka — si mete ŋu gblɔ be yenye dukplɔla le Jan. 6, 2021 dzi, ke menye Democrat Joe Biden, si nye dukplɔla si wotia ɣemaɣi o — la xɔ ame 40,000 kloe siwo lɔ̃e le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. (Truth Social zãla @realDonaldTrump) Eƒe nyawo gbugbɔ gblɔ nya aɖe si kaka ɖe internet dzi va yi ƒe akpa aɖe tso nya siwo wòtutu va yi le Truth Social dzi tso ɣemaɣi si fia be ɖewohĩ dɔwɔlawo wɔ nu abe "ʋunyaʋunyawɔlawo," si ame aɖewo gblɔ be enye nyateƒe ene. Le September ƒe nuwuwu la, X zãla ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be "adzamedɔwɔla 275" nɔ ameha si nɔ Jan. 6 ƒe ʋunyaʋunyawɔlawo dome: Nya la dze le teƒe bubuwo le X kpakple Reddit hã. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, Snopes nuxlẽlawo ɖo e-mail ɖe wo be yewoaɖo kpe edzi nenye be nya sia nye nyateƒe. Nya si wogblɔ la menye nu yeye o. Snopes de dzesi nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ tso ƒe 2024 me siwo gblɔ nya ma ke. Nya sia kaka le afisiafi be yewoadi nɔnɔme siwo aɖe ʋunyaʋunyawɔla siwo wobu fɔe le Jan. 6 lia dzi ɖe nuvlowɔwɔ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye be woage ɖe dukɔa me, kpovitɔwo dzi dzedze kple aglãdzedze ƒe nugbeɖoɖo. Gake fifia ya la, nya sia tso nyatakaka siwo nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe siwo léa blemakɔnuléleɖeasi me ɖe asi si nye The Blaze kple Just the News, siwo wo ame evea siaa ta le Sept. 25, 2025. Esi The Blaze yɔ sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ aɖe si ƒe ŋkɔ womeyɔ o la, egblɔ be FBI lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yedɔ "awu dzrowo ƒe amedɔdɔ 274" ɖe ameha si nɔ Jan. 6 dzi. Eka nya ta hã be FBI ƒe nyatakakaxɔla 26 hã va kpe ɖe ameha la ŋu, eye wo dometɔ ene ge ɖe Capitol la me. Just the News do ƒome kple "afɔɖeɖe megbe nyatakaka" si wògblɔ be yexɔ eye wòka nya ta hã be dɔwɔla 274 nɔ ameha la dome. Edze abe nyatakakaawo ɖee fia be nya si wogblɔna ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia be FBI dɔwɔla siwo le adzame ye de dzo ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔa me la nye nyateƒe ene. Ŋkeke eve megbe, le Sept. 27 dzi la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ nya sia ɖe Truth Social, le nya aɖe si woɖe ɖa tso ɣemaɣi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe): (Truth Social zãla @realDonaldTrump) Le nyatakakaa me la, Trump yɔ Jan. 6 be enye alakpa. Egblɔ hã be nya siawo tsi tre ɖe Wray ƒe ɖaseɖiɖi ŋu tẽ. Le Jan. 6, 2021 megbe la, Aƒea ƒe kɔmiti sue aɖe dze numekuku gɔme le Jan. 6 dzi. Kɔmiti sue sia kaka le January 2023 me le dɔwɔwɔ ɣleti 18 megbe. Gake le September 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, Aƒea da asi ɖe edzi be woaʋu kɔmiti sue yeye aɖe si ƒe zimenɔlae nye Rep. Barry Loudermilk, si nye Republicantɔ si tso Georgia, be woagaku nyaa me ake, eye kɔmiti sue gbãtɔ ƒe nyataƒoƒo hã le eme. Demokrasitɔwo hã nɔ kɔmiti sue yeyea me. Snopes to nyatakaka si Just the News ta le afɔɖeɖe megbe, si meda asi ɖe nya siwo wogblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe ŋutinya me dzi o la me. Míete ŋu de dzesi amesi nye The Blaze ƒe dzɔtsoƒe si womeyɔ o, eyata míete ŋu ɖo kpe eƒe nyatakakaa dzi o. Míeƒo ka na FBI kple Aƒea ƒe kɔmiti sue yeyea siaa eye míawɔ nyatakaka sia yeyee ne woɖo eŋu. Ke hã, míekpɔ Sept. 26, 2025, nyatakaka aɖe si kɔmiti sue yeyea ŋlɔ ɖe X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Jan. 6 dzi, si me wòdze abe screen capture of a spreadsheet ene hã le: Fli si ku ɖe FBI dɔwɔlawo ɖoɖo ɖe dɔ me le Jan. 6 me xlẽ be: Deployment date: 1/6/2021 Position type: Agents Event: 1/6 incident Office/HQ Division: WFO [Washington Field Office] Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Agbɔsɔsɔ Katã: 274 De dzesii: Xexlẽme sia lɔ dɔwɔla siwo wɔ nu ɖe Capitol ƒe akpata me kpakple le Capitol la me, bɔmb siwo wotsɔna toa pɔmpi me, kple agbatsɔʋu dzĩ si woxɔ se be bɔmb le eme kpakple CDC/ADCS hã ɖe eme. Togbɔ be xexlẽmea sɔ kple The Blaze kple Just the News ƒe nyatakakawo hã la, nuŋlɔɖiawo meɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ be FBI dɔwɔlawo nɔ adzame dzi o. Togbɔ be womegblɔ FBI dɔwɔla siwo woɖo ɖe dɔa ƒe xexlẽme tututu le dutoƒo do ŋgɔ o hã la, nutsotso siwo nye be FBI kple eƒe dɔdzikpɔla tsãtɔ, Wray, dze agbagba be yewoaɣlae la hã melé eme ɖe asi o. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, December 2024 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si Dɔwɔƒea na

claim: Woaɖo kpe Amy Coney Barrett ƒe ŋkɔyɔyɔ ɖe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ dzi le October 2020 me, to Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe ame akpa gãtɔ siwo le ame miliɔn 15 teƒe siwo ʋee wu akpa suea tɔ.
evidence: Le Kavanaugh tiatia le ƒe 2018 me megbe la, wobu Barrett be enye amesi ateŋu anye ame si woaɖo na U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe ɖoƒe ƒuƒlu aɖe le etsɔme.[107] Le Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Ruth Bader Ginsburg ƒe ku megbe le September 18, 2020 dzi la, woyɔ Barrett le afisiafi be eyae nye ŋgɔgbevi si axɔ ɖe eteƒe.[108] Le September 26, 2020 dzi la, Trump ɖe gbeƒã eƒe tameɖoɖo be yeaɖo Barrett be wòaxɔ nɔƒe ƒuƒlu si Ginsburg ƒe ku he vɛ.[7][109] Republicantɔwo da asi ɖe Barrett ƒe ŋkɔyɔyɔ dzi zi geɖe, amesiwo di be yewoaɖo kpe edzi hafi United States ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia le ƒe 2020 me.[110] Enye amesi Kristotɔwo ƒe ɖusimetɔwo kple hadomenukpɔlawo lɔ̃na wu.[72][111][112] Demokrasitɔwo tsi tre ɖe ameyɔyɔa ŋu zi geɖe, eye wotsi tre ɖe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nɔƒe ƒuƒlu la yɔyɔ ŋu esime tiatiawɔwɔ ƒe akɔdada nɔ edzi yim xoxo le nuto geɖe me.[110] Eteƒekpɔla geɖewo do dziku ɖe afɔɖeɖe si wowɔ be woaxɔ nɔƒe ƒuƒlu la ɣleti ene pɛ ko do ŋgɔ na Trump ƒe dziɖuɣi ƒe nuwuwu ta, elabena Sewɔtakpekpea me Republicantɔ akpa gãtɔ gbe be yewomabu Dukplɔla Barack Obama ƒe Merrick Garland ɖoɖo le ƒe 2016 me ŋu o, si wu ɣleti ewo do ŋgɔ na eƒe dukplɔlanyenye ƒe nuwuwu.[110][113][114] Le October me la, Amerika Senyalawo ƒe Habɔbɔ bu Barrett be "edze nyuie" na Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ ƒe ʋuʋu, si nye eƒe dzeside kɔkɔtɔ kekeake.[115]

claim: Nunya wɔwɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo “doa elektrikŋusẽ ƒe fewo ɖe edzi 30 alo 40%” eye “wonoa tsi galɔn 500,000 gbesiagbe.”
evidence: Florida ƒe nutodziɖula ƒe ametiakɔdala James Fishback nye ɖeklemiɖela le nunya wɔwɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu. Fishback, amesi le ho ʋlim kple U.S. Dukplɔla Byron Donalds si le ŋgɔ xɔm le Republicantɔwo ƒe ametiakɔdada ta gblɔ be AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo meɖea vi boo aɖeke na Floridatɔwo o."Nusi wòwɔna ŋutɔŋutɔ, enye be enaa wò elektrikfewo dzina ɖe edzi 30 alo 40%. Ame sia ame adi be yeaxe fe geɖe ɖe yeƒe elektrikfewo ta? Alo nusi wòwɔna enye, enoa tsi galɔn 500,000 gbesiagbe eye emegbe wògatsɔa tsi ɣi dea tsidzɔƒea," Fishback gblɔ le Feb. 26 ƒe dɔdzikpɔha ƒe tɔtrɔƒe le Pensacola. Zi geɖe la, wozãa AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo tsɔ naa hehe nunya wɔwɔe ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo, wɔa AI ƒe ŋuɖoɖowo eye wowɔa nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gãwo ŋudɔ. Akɔntabubuwo ɖee fia be dɔwɔƒe aɖewo zãa tsi galɔn 500,000 ya teti gbesiagbe tsɔ fa woƒe dɔwɔnuwoe. AI ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo hã le elektrikŋusẽ ƒe asi dzim ɖe edzi. Ke hã, míekpɔ dutoƒonyatakaka aɖeke si ɖee fia be woawo gbɔe ga si wodzi ɖe edzi 30% alo 40% tso o eye Fishback meɖo PolitiFact ƒe nyabiase siwo ku ɖe eƒe nyawo ŋu la ŋu o. Gov. Ron DeSantis, si nye Republicantɔ, kple dukɔa ƒe sewɔlawo tso dunyaheha eveawo me le ʋiʋlim be woawɔ ɖoɖo ɖe AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu. Florida Sewɔtakpekpea da asi ɖe se aɖe dzi kple susu ɖeka le Feb. 26 dzi si me nudidi siwo ku ɖe elektrikŋusẽ ƒe asi si sɔ kple tsizazã dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu le. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo tsɔa kɔmpiutadziɖoɖo veviwo kple nyatakakawo ɖoa kɔmpiutadziɖoɖowo, nudzraɖoƒewo kple kadodomɔ̃wo ƒe fliwo me. Ɣesiaɣi si nèɖo e-mail ɖa, kpɔ TikTok video alo xlẽ nyati aɖe le Internet dzi la, èle nu wɔm kple nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo li tso ƒe 1940 ƒeawo ƒe domedome, gake woƒe kekeɖenudɔ nyitsɔ laa be woado alɔ AI mɔ̃ɖaŋunuwo na be dɔwɔƒe gã siwo zãa ŋusẽ geɖe wu xɔ siwo nɔ anyi va yi. Zi geɖe la, AI ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yeyetɔ kekeakewo kekena ɖe agble alafa geɖe va ɖo 1,000 kple edzivɔ, si ƒe lolome anɔ abe Amerikatɔwo ƒe bɔlƒoƒe 750 ene. Meta ƒe Hyperion AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si ŋu wowɔ ɖoɖo ɖo le agbledelawo ƒe nuto si le Richland Parish, Louisiana, ate ŋu alolo wu Manhattan ƒe Central Park ƒe teƒe ene. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yeyewo ate ŋu azã elektrikŋusẽ abe du sue aɖe ene. Le ƒe 2024 me la, U.S. nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo zã elektrikŋusẽ si le dukɔa me ƒe 4% lɔƒo. Dukɔwo Dome Ŋusẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔha kpɔe be AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si wozãna ɖaa zãa elektrikŋusẽ si sɔ gbɔ wu aƒe 100,000 ƒe sia ƒe, eye be anɔ eme be esiwo lolo wu siwo wole tutum azãe zi gbɔ zi 20 sɔŋ. Eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be ne se ƒe ametakpɔkpɔwo meli o la, nuƒlelawo ate ŋu akpɔe be yewoƒe elektrikŋusẽfewo nadzi ɖe edzi be woatsɔ axe ŋusẽ si nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo hiã. Zi geɖe la, nuƒlelawo xea fe ɖe dɔwɔnuwo kple elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃ ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo siwo nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo bia ta. Ari Peskoe, si nye Harvard Law School’s Electricity Law Initiative ƒe dɔdzikpɔla gblɔ be: “Le goawo katã me la, nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ate ŋu ado elektrikŋusẽfewo ɖe dzi le Florida.” Dɔwɔƒe siwo kpɔa elektrikŋusẽnyawo gbɔ le "dɔlar biliɔn geɖe zãm ɖe xɔtuɖoɖo yeyewo ŋu be woatsɔ ana ŋusẽ nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo," eye elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃wo ƒe fetu ƒe ɖoɖowo ɖe mɔ be woama gazazã siawo le subɔsubɔdɔa ƒe anyigbamama bliboa me, si na amesiame ƒe fewo dzi ɖe edzi. Eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be esesẽ be woabu akɔnta le alesi gbegbe AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le nuƒlelawo ƒe elektrikŋusẽfewo dzim ɖe edzii ŋu. Peskoe gblɔ be dɔwɔƒe siwo kpɔa nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖowɔhawo kpɔa nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe fetu ta tso dukɔa ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe wo ŋu me, si wɔe be esesẽna be woadzidze ŋusẽ si nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yeyewo wɔwɔ kpɔna ɖe ame dzi. Shaolei Ren, si nye California Yunivɛsiti, Riverside, nufialagã si wɔa numekuku tso AI ƒe nutome ƒe afɔɖoƒe ŋu gblɔ be: "Alesi gbegbe adzɔnuwɔƒewo ƒe agba gãwo ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi ɖe ŋusẽ ƒe ŋutete tutuɖo kple asi gãwo dzi va yina na asisi siwo le aƒewo me mlɔeba la nye nya ɣaɣla akpa gãtɔ eye nu geɖe kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe edzi." PolitiFact mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke, dziɖuɖu ƒe numekuku alo numekuku aɖeke si ɖo kpe Fishback ƒe akɔntabubu siwo nye elektrikŋusẽ ƒe fe dzi yiyi tso 30% va ɖo 40% dzi o. Nyatakaka ʋɛ aɖewo gblɔ ga home dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ si mesɔ o wu le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ta tsitotsito, eye numekulawo gblɔ be woate ŋu adzi ga home dzi ɖe edzi le etsɔme. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, numekuku aɖe si wowɔ le June 2025 me ɖee fia be nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le klalo be yewoadzi elektrikŋusẽfewo ɖe edzi 8% le dukɔa me godoo kaka ƒe 2030 naɖo, eye 25% le teƒewo abe Virginia ene, afisi dɔwɔƒe siawo sɔ gbɔ ɖo wu. Ƒe 2024 ƒe numekuku aɖe bu akɔnta be Virginia elektrikfewo ate ŋu adzi ɖe edzi va ɖo 70% be woakpɔ nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe didi gbɔ. The New York Times ka nya ta le August 2025 me be elektrikfe siwo woxena na Ohio aƒe si bɔ me dzina ɖe edzi dɔlar 15 ya teti ɣleti sia ɣleti, si anye dzidziɖedzi si anɔ abe 11% ene le akɔntabubu si wotu ɖe megbenyawo dzi, le dzomeŋɔli ma me le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ta. CNBC ka nya ta le November 2025 me be elektrikŋusẽfe siwo woxena le nuto siwo me AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gbogbo aɖewo le me dzi ɖe edzi kabakaba wu dukɔa ƒe mamã dedie ƒe sia ƒe. Au

claim: U.S. atikewɔlawo dometɔ 30 le alafa me nye dukɔwo dome atikewɔlawo ƒe sukunuwulawo, eye H-1B ƒe mɔɖegbalẽvi xɔlawoe xɔa nɔƒe 10,000 le 43,000 me.
evidence: Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒãe be H-1B ƒe mɔɖegbalẽvi ƒe fewo adzi ɖe edzi va ɖo dɔlar 100,000, si nye afɔɖeɖe si hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla aɖewo gblɔ be ate ŋu ana U.S. atikewɔlawo ƒe hiahiã nagado gã ɖe edzi. Tso Sept. 21 dzi la, H-1B visa yeyewo biabia abia be woaxe dɔlar 100,000, si atso dɔlar 2,000 va ɖo dɔlar 5,000. Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua gblɔ be fetu sia nye be woatsɔ axe mɔ na Amerika dɔwɔlawo be "woagatsɔ dutadɔwɔla siwo ƒe fetu mede o aɖɔli wo o." H-1B visa ƒe ɖoɖoa na dɔtɔwo xɔa duta dɔwɔlawo hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe le dɔ tɔxɛwo wɔwɔ me. Atikewɔha geɖe ɖo lɛta aɖe ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Ŋuti Dɔdzikpɔla Kristi Noem le Sept. 25 dzi, be woaɖe asi le atikewɔlawo kple atikewɔla bubuwo ŋu le H-1B visa yeyea ƒe fetu me, le esi ɖɔktawo hiã vevie esi U.S. dukɔa me tɔwo le dzidzim ɖe edzi ta. Togbɔ be ɖoɖo ŋuti nunyalawo gblɔ be gbeƒãɖeɖea ɖe mɔ be woaɖe asi le dɔwɔƒe aɖewo ŋu tso fetu la me hã la, Trump dziɖuɖua meɖe gbeƒã naneke si to vovo haɖe o. Ðɔkta aɖe si hã wɔa podcast la da nyatakaka ɖe X dzi si wògblɔ be woɖe atikewɔƒe ƒe nɔƒe agbɔsɔsɔme si H-1B visa xɔlawo yɔ la fia. "Esia anye nusi agblẽ nu le atikewɔwɔ ƒe akpa dzi keŋkeŋ. ~30% nɔlawo nye dukɔwo dome atikewɔwɔ sukunuwulawo & ~ 10k le 43k nɔƒe teƒewo yɔ fũ kple docs kple H-1B visas," Sept. 19 post gblɔ. "Tsã la, h-1B ƒe fetu nye <$5,000. Kɔdzi aɖeke maxe $100k fetu ɖe $55k ƒe fetu si woxɔna le afima ta o." Residency nye atikewɔlawo ƒe hehexɔxɔ ƒe akpa si me amesiwo wu atikewɔsuku nu nyitsɔ laa kpɔ gome le atikewɔƒe ƒe hehexɔxɔ si dzi wokpɔna me le lãmesẽdɔwɔƒe aɖe. X nyatakaka la ƒe akpa aɖe de pɛpɛpɛ gake egblẽ nyatakaka vevi siwo ku ɖe dukɔwo dome sukuviwo kple atikewɔlawo ƒe nɔƒe siwo le U.S. ŋu ɖi X nyatakaka la yɔ ƒe 2025 Dukɔa ƒe Amewo ƒe Ðekawɔwɔ ƒe Ðoɖowɔha ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si gblɔ be U.S. atikewɔlawo ƒe 30% lɔƒo nye dukɔwo dome atikewɔlawo ƒe sukunuwulawo abe kpeɖodzi ene. Gake ele vevie be míade dzesii be duta sukunuwulawo kple U.S. dukɔmevi siwo wu dukɔwo dome sukuwo nu le hatsotso sia me. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be le dukɔwo dome atikewɔsukunuwula siwo xɔ nɔƒe le ƒe gbãtɔ ƒe U.S. dukɔa me nɔnɔ ƒe ɖoɖowo me dome la, 3,108 nye U.S. dukɔmeviwo eye 6,653 menye dukɔmeviwo o. Menye nyateƒe be H-1B visa xɔlawoe xɔa nɔƒe 10,000 le 43,000 siwo me wole la me o. X post la yɔ ƒe 2017 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si ku ƒe 2016 ƒe Dɔwɔlawo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakakawo me. Nyatakaka sia ɖe U.S. atikewɔla neni siwo le dɔ wɔm siwo xɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ be woxɔ H-1B mɔɖegbalẽviwo fia. Ðɔktawo katã le eme, menye amesiwo le afima ɖeɖeko o. (Dɔwɔƒea ƒe nyatakaka yeye siwo woxɔ tso ƒe 2025 ƒe ɣleti ene mamlɛa me, siwo ku ɖe nyametsotso siwo wowɔ tso Oct. 1, 2024, vaseɖe June 30, ŋu ɖee fia be atikewɔla siwo ade 9,000 ye xɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ be woxɔ H-1B ƒe mɔɖegbalẽviwo.) Amerika Atikewɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ be mɔɖegbalẽvi si bɔ wu si atikewɔnyawo ŋuti sukunuwulawo zãna hena atikewɔlawo ƒe nɔƒee nye J-1 mɔɖegbalẽvi, si nye atikewɔwɔ ŋuti hehexɔxɔ alo hehexɔxɔ ƒe sukunuwuwu, kpakple bubuwo taɖodzinuwo tae. Woxɔ H1-B visa dɔwɔlawo ƒe akpa gãtɔ ɖe STEM — dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya, mɔ̃ɖaŋununya, mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwo kple akɔntabubu — dɔwo me, eye wo dometɔ siwo ade eve le etɔ̃ me wɔa dɔ le kɔmpiuta zazã ƒe akpawo me, le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nya nu. Nancy Nielsen, si nye Yunivɛsiti si le Buffalo ƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ gãtɔ hã ɖo kpe edzi na PolitiFact be mɔɖegbalẽvi si wozãna wu hena atikewɔƒe nɔnɔe nye J-1 mɔɖegbalẽvi. Egblɔ be le nya siwo ƒo xlãe nu la, le yeƒe sukua me la, atikewɔla siwo ade 830 ye le wo si eye ame 27 koe le H-1B visa dzi. PolitiFact do asi ɖe Sukudede Dɔwɔha si Kpɔa Duta Atikewɔwɔ Nuwulawo Gbɔ, si nye Intealth ƒe akpa aɖe, si kpena ɖe atikewɔnyawo ŋuti sukunuwula siwo si gakpekpeɖeŋu le ŋu be woaxɔ hehe le U.S., eye dɔdzikpɔhaa gblɔ be le yeƒe sidzedze nu la, nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖeke meli na H-1B atikewɔla siwo le afima o. Amerika Atikewɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ gblɔ be H-1B ƒe mɔɖegbalẽvia li na duta atikewɔsuku nuwula siwo si mɔɖegbalẽ alo mɔɖeɖe bubu si dukɔ si me woawɔ dɔ le bia, kple amesiwo si mɔɖegbalẽ si ŋu seɖoƒe meli na o le be woawɔ atike alo wowu U.S. atikewɔsuku nu. Ele be amesiwo di be yewoaxɔ dɔ na H-1B naɖo kpe edzi be yewoaxe fe na H-1B dɔwɔla la zi alesi yewoaxe fetu ŋutɔŋutɔ si woxe na dɔwɔla mawo tɔgbe alo fetu si woxɔna le dɔ ma ta. Zi geɖe la, visa ƒe nɔnɔmea nɔa anyi ƒe etɔ̃ eye woate ŋu awɔe yeyee ƒe etɔ̃ bubu, gake woate ŋu akekee ɖe enu ne dɔtɔa do alɔ dɔwɔla la be wòanɔ afima tegbee. Sewɔtakpekpea ɖo seɖoƒe na H-1B mɔɖegbalẽvi yeyewo ƒe xexlẽme be 85,000 le gaŋutiɖoɖo ƒe ɖesiaɖe me, eye 20,000 hã le eme na amesiwo menye dukɔmeviwo o siwo xɔ U.S. master’s degree alo esi wu nenema. Woɖo ga ƒe 2025 ƒe seɖoƒea gbɔ le December 2024. Daniel Costa, si nye amedzrowo ƒe se kple ɖoɖowo ŋuti numekuku ƒe dɔdzikpɔla

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump, esi wònɔ nu ƒom le wɔna aɖe me na nuɖuɖu kabakaba ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ McDonald's, to nyatoƒoe le mɔxexe ɖe tsi si "tso dziƒo" ŋu eye wògblɔ be: "Eyata èdi be yeaklɔ asi? Alo, abe nye ene la, medi be maklɔ nye ɖa. Meɖea fu. Eye ... tsi aɖeke meli o. ... Nyemaƒo nu tso nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒea ŋu o elabena woɖea ɖeklemim ɣesiaɣi. ... Ne mènya nusi o Mele nu ƒom tso ɣemaɣi ŋu be mele be McDonald ƒe franchise nanɔ asiwò o."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ nya aɖe le nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo tso asikɔklɔ, ɖa kple "nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒe" ŋu la kaka ɖe internet dzi le November ƒe domedome 2025. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le X (archived),Facebook, Instagram andThreads (archived) gblɔ be Trump ƒo nu tso mɔxexe ɖe tsi si "tso Dziƒo" kple alesi seɖoƒe mawo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe nusi woateŋu awɔ dzi le tsileƒe. Zãla aɖewo gblɔ be dukplɔla la kplɔ tsileƒe ƒe nya la ɖo be: "Ne mènya nusi ŋu mele nu ƒom tsoe o la, ekema mele be McDonald ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ nanɔ asiwò o." Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X zãla aɖe yɔ nya tso Trump ƒe nyawo me be (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe): Mɔxexe ɖe tsi nu nɔ wo si. Eɖina tso dziƒo, alo? Eyata èdi be yeaklɔ asi, alo abe nye ene la, èdi be yeaklɔ wò ɖa. Meɖea fu nam. Eye tsi hã meli o. Nyemaƒo nu tso nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒea ŋu o elabena woɖea ɖeklemim ɣesiaɣi. Ne mènya nusi ŋu mele nu ƒom tsoe o la ekema mele be McDonald ƒe franchise nanɔ asiwò o. A post shared by @letsdiscusssomething Kpuie ko la, wogblɔ be nya si wogblɔ la tso Trump gbɔ wòsɔ. X zãla si le etame la tso eƒe nya aɖewo me, edze abe ɖe wòle kpuie ta ene, gake metrɔ eƒe nyawo ƒe vevienyenye o. Dukplɔla la nye nuƒola vevitɔ na ƒe 2025 McDonald ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi Takpekpe, si nye ƒe sia ƒe ƒe kpekpe si nuɖuɖu kabakaba ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔa ƒe mɔɖegbalẽwo tɔ, nudzralawo kple dɔdzikpɔlawo wɔ, le Nov. 17 dzi, eye wògblɔ nya sia le eƒe nuƒoa me. Nuƒo bliboa nɔ anyi be woakpɔ le theWhite House ƒe YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo, eye nyayɔyɔ si ŋu nya ku ɖo la dze egɔme tso 35:47 ƒe dzesi dzi. Nya si wogblɔ le eƒe nya bliboa me la yi ale: Esi mexɔ dɔa la, mede asi sedede aɖe te si bia tso esi be le se yeye ɖesiaɖe gome la, ele be woaɖe se xoxo 10 siwo ku ɖe dɔwuwu ŋu ɖa. Eyata ne míetsɔ se yeye de eme la, ekema míeɖea 10. Ne menye nenema o la, màxɔ se yeyea o. Eye ènya, míeɖe tsi si nɔ dodom le tsia me la ɖa. Míeyɔnae be tsidzadza-tsi, afisi wòdona le tsinyegoea me. Dukɔ siwo si tsi gã aɖe le, tsi geɖe ale gbegbe be naneke mele wo si o negbe kuxi siwo le wo ɖeɖeɖa me ko — mɔxexe ɖe tsi nu nɔ wo si. Eɖina tso dziƒo, alo? Mɔxexe ɖe tsi nu nɔ wo si. Eyata èdi be yeaklɔ asi? Alo abe nye ke ene la, medi be maklɔ nye ɖa. Meɖea fu nam. Eye metrɔ be ... tsi aɖeke meli o. Tsia ƒe, tsidzadza. Woyɔe be. Wotsɔa mɔxenu aɖe dea edzi. Nyemaƒo nu tso nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒea ŋu o elabena woɖea ɖeklemim ɣesiaɣi. Megblɔa ema tsã gake nyemegagblɔnɛ o, elabena mienya nusi me ... mesusu be mienya. Ne mènya nusi ŋu mele nu ƒom tsoe o la ekema mele be McDonald ƒe franchise nanɔ asiwò o. Màwɔ dɔ nyuie ne èxɔ McDonald ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ gɔ̃ hã o. White House gblɔ to email dzi be Trump le nu ƒom tso dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sedede aɖe si tso April 9, 2025 dzi, si di be yeaɖe "miametɔwo ƒe aʋa si wowɔ ɖe tsi ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu ŋu" ɖa eye "yeaɖe" dukɔa "tso sedede siwo gbɔ eme siwo trɔ aƒemenu vevi aɖe wòzu dɔwɔƒewo ƒe drɔ̃e baɖa aɖe la me" ŋu. Edze abe "nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒea" si ŋu Trump ƒo nu tsoe nye nugododeƒea ene. White House gbe be yemagblɔe tẽ o eye wògblɔ boŋ be: "Off record — ne màte ŋu akpɔ nu etɔ̃lia si le tsileƒe le tsilele kple tsinyegoe megbe o la, ke ènye bometsitsi." (Snopes melɔ̃ be yeaƒo nu si mele nuŋlɔɖi me o, nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe dzidzenuwo, hafi woagblɔ nya sia o.) McDonald’s meɖo nya ŋu na nya si wobia tso esi be wòagblɔ nya sia o. Míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo. Trump ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ le wɔnaa me la ku ɖe ganyawo ŋu koŋ, eye wòhe susu ɖa le tsi ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu ŋu, asrafowo ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Iran ƒe nuklia dɔwɔƒewo ŋu, ŋkɔ tɔtrɔ na Mexico-ƒuta kple eƒe lɔlɔ̃ na McDonald ƒe adzɔnuwo,Reuters ka nya ta.

claim: Balen Shah Nye Nepal ƒe Dukplɔla Yeye
evidence: Le ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu siwo dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Nepal si na woɖo ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe dziɖuɖu aɖe megbe la, nyatakaka geɖe le tsatsam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo gblɔ be woɖo Kathmandu Dumegã Balendra Shah be wòanye Himalaya-dukɔa ƒe Dukplɔlagã yeye.  Nuŋɔŋlɔ si me Balendra Shah ƒe videoa le xlẽ be: 'नेपाली नधाय विधवा बाले शाह' (Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe: 'Balendra Shah zu Nepal ƒe dukplɔlagã yeye') Woate ŋu akpɔ nya si le etame le afisia (archive) FACT CHECK NewsMobile tsɔ nyateƒenya kpɔ nya si wogblɔ la me eye wòkpɔe be alakpae.  Nya veviwo didi na míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ geɖe siwo ku ɖe Nepal ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe dziɖuɖua ŋu. Nyatakaka siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le ɖee fia be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã tsãtɔ Sushila Karki ka atam be yeanye Nepal ƒe Dukplɔlagã hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe. Eka atam le zãtiƒe le September 12, 2025. (Woate ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka siawo le afisia, afisia kple afisia)

claim: Le ƒe 2016 me la, U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz si tso Texas, si nye Republicantɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ametiakɔdala ɣemaɣi la gblɔ be, "Míate ŋu afɔ gbeɖeka ŋdi eye Donald, nenye be enye dukplɔla la, anye ne nukliaʋawɔnuwo aƒo Denmark."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le January 2026 me la, video aɖe si xɔ ƒe ewo (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kaka ɖe Internet dzi si me Ted Cruz si nɔ Republicantɔwo ƒe dukplɔla ƒe mɔkpɔkpɔ me ɣemaɣi nɔ nu ƒom tso Donald Trump ŋu le akɔdada ƒe wɔna aɖe me le New Hampshire. Le videoa nu la, U.S. sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ si tso Texas gblɔ be, "Míanyɔ gbeɖeka ŋdi eye Donald, nenye be enye dukplɔla la, anye ne nukliaʋawɔnuwo aƒo Denmark." Nya si wogblɔ be woyɔ la kaka ɖe Facebook (wodzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe), Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe). Klip sia kaka esime masɔmasɔwo nu sẽ ɖe edzi le Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe didi si wogblɔ be yeaxɔ Greenland, si nye ƒukpo aɖe si le Arctic si nye Denmark ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ ƒe anyigbamama ta. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi la, dziɖuɖua megbe asrafowo ƒe ŋusẽ zazã atsɔ axɔ ƒukpoa o, eye wogblɔ be Denmark kple eƒe Europa-dukɔ siwo wɔ ɖeka kplii la dzi woƒe asrafowo ɖe edzi le nutoa me. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla siwo ma nya si wogblɔ la gblɔ nyuie be Cruz gbɔe wòtso. Cruz gblɔ nya siawo esime wòɖo nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla aɖe ƒe biabia ŋu le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe wɔna aɖe me le Goffstown, New Hampshire, le Feb. 3, 2016 dzi, le C-SPAN (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ƒe nya nu. Cruz gblɔ le eƒe Trump ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ŋu (le 4:21, míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Nyemenya ame aɖeke si avo ne ame aɖe si wɔa nu alea ƒe asibidɛ le abɔta la dzi o. Mebe, ele be míafɔ gbeɖeka ŋdi eye Donald, ne ɖe wònye dukplɔla la, anye ne nukliaʋawɔnuwo aƒo Denmark. Menye kplɔla ƒe nɔnɔmee nye ema be wòana dukɔ sia nanɔ dedie o. Cruz ye nye ame gbãtɔ si ge ɖe Republican Party ƒe ŋgɔdonyawo me hena ƒe 2016 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia, eye wòtsɔ eɖokui ɖo ɖoƒe si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe ame bubu ɖe Trump teƒe. Cruz dzudzɔ duɖimekeke ma le May 2016 ƒe gɔmedzedze, anɔ abe ɣleti etɔ̃ ene le nya si wògblɔ tso Trump ƒe nukliaʋawɔnuwo tsɔtsɔ ƒo Denmark ŋu megbe. Trump ayi edzi aɖu dzi le Republicantɔwo ƒe ametiakɔdada kple dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me le ƒe 2016. Emegbe Cruz trɔ asi le eƒe nukpɔsusu le Trump ŋu, si me wòda asi ɖe edzi le Republicantɔwo ƒe ŋgɔdonyawo me le ƒe 2024 U.S. dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me be wòayi edzi aɖu dzi.

claim: "California naa ga dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu esi míexɔna tso dziɖuɖua gbɔ. Texas? Xɔa dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu esi wonana dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua. U.S. GDP ƒe 71% tso nuto blɔwo me."
evidence: Do ŋgɔ na dukplɔla ƒe akɔdada si ate ŋu adzɔ le ƒe 2028 me la, California Dziɖuɖumegã Gavin Newsom, si nye Democrattɔ, di crossover kpekpeɖeŋu tso ame siwo sea podcast siwo léa blemakɔnuléleɖeasi me ɖe asi gbɔ. Podcast yeyetɔ si Newsom va kpe ɖe eŋu, le July 14 lia dzi, enye Shawn Ryan’s. Le nya aɖe si wotsɔ ɖɔ li wo nɔewo me la, Newsom ƒo nu tso California ƒe vevienyenye ŋu le dukɔa ƒe ganyawo me. "California naa dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu esi míexɔna tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ," Newsom gblɔ le July 14 X nyatakaka aɖe me tsɔ te gbe ɖe gbebiamea dzi. "Texas? Exɔa dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu esi wonana dziɖuɖua. U.S. GDP ƒe 71% tso nuto blɔwo me."’ California Crackup? Te kpɔ ake.California naa dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu esi míexɔna tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ.Texas? Exɔa dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu esi wonana dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu.71% le U.S. GDP me tso blue counties me. pic.twitter.com/8yveQsdUJm Newsom ƒe akɔntabubu siwo ku ɖe ga si woxe na dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua ŋu la ƒe akpa gãtɔ de pɛpɛpɛ. Gake eƒe xexlẽme le dukɔa me ƒe nuwɔna bliboa si wowɔ le nuto blɔwo me — amesiwo da akɔ na Democratictɔwo be woanye dukplɔla — la do xoxo. Newsom ƒe dɔwɔƒea metsɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke si ɖo kpe eƒe nyaa dzi o. Newsom ƒe akɔntabubu si ku ɖe ga si woxena ƒe dadasɔ ŋu sɔ kple nyatakaka siwo tso Rockefeller Dziɖuɖusrɔ̃ƒe, si nye susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ aɖe si le Albany, New York, si mekpɔa gome le eme o la gbɔ. Ƒuƒoƒoa lé ŋku ɖe nusi nuto ɖesiaɖe me tɔwo xe na dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu le adzɔwo me ŋu, ne wotsɔe sɔ kple nusi dukɔa kple emenɔlawo xɔna le dukɔa ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu me — nusianu tso xɔtuɖoɖowo ƒe gazazãwo dzi va ɖo dedienɔnɔ ƒe fexexe abe Medicaid kple nuɖuɖu ƒe gaxɔgbalẽviwo ene dzi. Dɔwɔƒea kpɔe be le ƒe 2022 me — nyatakaka yeyetɔ kekeake si li — California ƒe fe siwo katã wòxe na dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua wu ga si wòma tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ dɔlar biliɔn 83.1, gake Texas ƒe dukɔa ƒe ga si va la wu ga si wòxe na dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua dɔlar biliɔn 71.1. Ema sɔ kple nya si Newsom gblɔ. Xexlẽme ma lɔ gazazã ɖe coronavirus ŋu ɖe eme. Dɔwɔƒea hã tsɔ akɔntabubuawo na coronavirus ƒe gazazã manɔmee; xexlẽmeawo to vovo, gake woɖe nɔnɔme ɖeka ma ke fia le afisiafi. California zã akɔntabubu siwo menye coronavirus o la, eɖo dɔlar biliɔn 126.5 ɖe dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua wu esi wòxɔ, gake Texas ya xɔ dɔlar biliɔn 44.6 tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ wu esi wòɖo ɖa. California kple Texas siaa nye nuto gã siwo me asitsahabɔbɔwo le dzidzedze kpɔm le eye ame gbogbo aɖewo siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o le. Eyata nukatae woƒe fetu si susɔ kple dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua to vovo nenema gbegbe? Joel Tirado, si nye Rockefeller Nusrɔ̃ƒea ƒe kadododzikpɔla gblɔ be vovototo vevitɔa tso adzɔ siwo woxe gbɔ. Tirado gblɔ be: "Zi geɖe la, Californiatɔwo dzɔa akpa geɖe wu le ame ɖekaɖekawo kple dɔwɔƒewo ƒe fetu ƒe adzɔwo me." "Esia ɖe gakpɔkpɔ gã si ame ɖeka kpɔna le California ƒe akpa geɖe, kpakple California ƒe adzɔxexe gã si le dɔwɔƒewo fia. Eye esi wònye be California nɔlawo sɔ gbɔ abe 30 le alafa me ene wu Texas ta la, vovototo mawo dzina ɖe edzi." Le nya si ku ɖe dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa ŋu na dukɔ blɔwo ƒe nya la, Newsom yɔ xexlẽme aɖe si sɔ na ƒe 2020, gake menye na ƒe 2024 o. Akɔntabubu sia tso akɔntabubu siwo Brookings Dɔwɔƒe, si nye susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ si mewɔa akpa aɖeke o, wɔ me. Le ƒe 2020 me la, Joe Biden ɖu dzi le nuto siwo katã wɔ dukɔa ƒe GDP ƒe 71% — si nye ganyawo ƒe dɔwɔna ƒe dzidzenu gbadzaa — esime Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖu nuto siwo me wokpɔa GDP ƒe 29% dzi. Ƒe ene megbe esi Trump ɖu Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi, Kamala Harris dzi la, dometsotsoa nɔ sue wu. Harris ɖu nuto siwo le tsitre ɖi na dukɔa ƒe GDP ƒe 62% dzi, esime Trump ɖu nuto siwo le tsitre ɖi na GDP ƒe 38% dzi. Trump ƒe alafa memamã si dzi ɖe edzi la ƒe akpa aɖe tso dziɖuɖu le nuto gã geɖe siwo me ganyawo le sesẽm le siwo Biden ɖu dzi le ƒe 2020 me gbɔ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Maricopa County, Arizona (Phoenix), Miami-Dade County, Florida (Miami), Tarrant County, Texas (Fort Worth), Duval County, Florida (Jacksonville) kple Pinellas County, Florida (St. Petersburg). Newsom gblɔ be, "California naa dɔlar biliɔn 83.1 wu esi míexɔna tso dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu gbɔ. Texas? Exɔa dɔlar biliɔn 71.1 wu esi wonana dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖu. U.S. GDP ƒe 71% tso nuto blɔwo me." Le ga si woxe na dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖua ƒe dadasɔ gome la, Newsom sɔ na nuto eveawo siaa ne wotsɔ gazazã siwo ku ɖe coronavirus ŋu de eme, eye wòzã ƒe 2022 ƒe nyatakakawo, si nye esiwo li nyitsɔ laa. Vovototo si le nuto eveawo dome la sɔ ne woɖe gazazã ɖe coronavirus ŋu ɖa. Le dukɔa ƒe GDP ƒe akpa si tso nuto blɔwo me gome la, Newsom ƒe nyatakakawo do xoxo. 71% ƒe xexlẽme sɔ na ƒe 2020, gake eɖiɖi va ɖo 62% na...

claim: India-srafowo ƒe amegã Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be asrafo 250 ku xɔsetaku le LOC la to le aʋawɔwɔ si dzɔ kple Pakistan nyitsɔ laa me.
evidence: Video aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe Aʋafiagã Upendra Dwivedi, si nye Asrafowo ƒe Tatɔ (COAS), si lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be India-srafo 250 ku xɔsetaku le LOC la to le aʋa si wowɔ kple Pakistan nyitsɔ laa me la dze le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.    Newschecker ku nu me tso video siwo kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu, eye wòkpɔe be wotrɔ asi le wo ŋu.    Le video si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si xɔ aɖabaƒoƒo eve kple edzivɔ me la, wogblɔ be wose Aʋafia Dwivedi gblɔ be, "India Asrafowo bu nu geɖe le LOC la to, eye asrafo 250 ku xɔsetaku. Pakistan kple China satellitewo hã nɔ ŋku lém ɖe míaƒe nunɔamesiwo ƒe ʋuʋu ŋu nyuie."  Screengrab from X post by @InsiderWB Woateŋu akpɔ nya siawo tɔgbe le afisia, afisia kple afisia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe Maldives Ðe PM Modi ƒe Nɔnɔmetata Fia Le Eƒe Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Xɔa Dzi Kple Nya ‘Ðokuitsɔtsɔna’?  Nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro/Kpɔɖeŋu Nya veviwo didi le "General Upendra Dwivedi," "250 soldiers" kple "Pakistan" le Google dzi meɖe nyatakaka/si woɖe ɖe go si ŋu kakaɖedzi le tso alesi wogblɔ be Asrafomegã la lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yebu be yebu la ŋu o.  Míede dzesi nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye ‘The Indian Express’ ƒe tsidzesi le video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ƒe ɖusime le etame.  Screengrab from viral video Esi míexɔ clue, míedi nya veviwo "The Indian Express," "Army Chief" kple "Operation Sindoor" le YouTube si kplɔ mí yi video nyatakaka aɖe gbɔ, si woŋlɔ le July 26, 2025, si ɖe Aʋafiagã Upendra Dwivedi fia le megbenya ma ke me abe alesi wokpɔe le viral clip la me ene.  "Le Kargil Vijay Diwas 2025 me la, Asrafowo ƒe amegã Aʋafia Upendra Dwivedi tsɔ gbedasi sesẽ aɖe yi na Pakistan, si gblɔ be Operation Sindoor ƒe amekoko ƒe amedzidzedzewo nye nuxlɔ̃ame si me kɔ be womaɖe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ kple eƒe megbedelawo o. Esi Aʋafia Dwivedi nɔ nu ƒom le Kargil aʋawɔwɔ ƒe Ŋkuɖodzikpea me la, Aʋafia Dwivedi yɔ aʋawɔwɔawo be enye ŋuɖoɖo tẽ ɖe Pahalgam ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe amedzidzedzea ŋu, si wòɖɔ be enye nusi de to." dukɔa ƒe abi...," eƒe nuŋlɔɖi gblɔ.    Anɔ abe miniti 1:13 ene le videoa me la, woateŋu ase COAS ƒe nyagbɔgblɔ be, "Le ƒe 1999 me la, India-srafowo ɖu dzi si ɖeke mesɔ kplii o le Kargil ƒe togbɛwo dzi le Operation Vijay te. Le aʋawɔɣia la, India-srafowo nya Pakistan-srafowo kple amedzidzela siwo xɔ to kɔkɔawo, nya wo do goe le liƒoa dzi, eye wodo amadede etɔ̃awo ɖe esiawo dzi." to siwo dzi sno xɔ...India na eme kɔ ƒã be tameɖoɖo gbegblẽ aɖeke makpɔ dzidzedze le eƒe seɖoƒe me o.  Screengrab from YouTube video by The Indian Express "Esi wotsɔ kɔnyinyi ma yi ŋgɔe, le Operation Sindoor me la, India Asrafowo, kple dzideƒo kple tameɖoɖo kplikpaa ma ke, tɔ ŋku ŋɔdzinuwɔlawo ƒe xɔtuɖoɖo siwo Pakistan da megbe na eye woxe mɔ ɖe Pakistan ƒe adãwɔwɔ bubuwo nu, si na woɖu dzi vevie. Míena mɔnukpɔkpɔ ŋutifafa gake le eƒe ŋuɖoɖo me la, woawo (Pakistan) ɖe vɔvɔ̃nɔnɔ fia...Dɔwɔwɔ Sindoor nye míaƒe tameɖoɖo kplikpaa, gbedasi kple ŋuɖoɖo vɔvɔ̃nɔtɔ ƒe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ si dzɔ le Pahalgam nye abi na dukɔ bliboa menye zi sia ko o, ke etso nya me be ŋuɖoɖoa anye nyametsotso..." Eƒe nuƒoa ƒe akpa sia metsɔ nyatakaka aɖeke tso amesiwo ku le aʋawɔwɔa me ŋu o, abe alesi wokpɔe le video klipi la me ene, si ɖee fia be woate ŋu atrɔ asi le videoa ŋu.    Woɖe Aʋafia Dwivedi ƒe nuƒo si wòƒo le ƒe 2025 Kargil Vijay Diwas dzi la ɖe go le The Hindu ƒe YouTube television dzi le July 26, 2025. Woate ŋu akpɔ akpa si míeyɔ ɖe etame la le aɖabaƒoƒo 3:55 ƒe kplɔ̃wo dzi le videoa me.  Nya sia si woɖe ɖe go le agbe me hã meɖee fia be elɔ̃ ɖe asrafo 250 ƒe ku dzi o, si to esia me ɖo kpe edzi be wotsɔ nya si wogblɔ totroe la de Asrafomegã la ƒe nuƒo si wòƒo tsɔ gblɔ alakpanya la me.  Screengrab from YouTube video by The Hindu Nya aɖe si Defense Ministry ɖe ɖe go le Kargil Vijay Diwas ƒe ƒe 26 lia dzi la tsɔ nya vevi siwo tso Aʋafia Dwivedi ƒe nuƒoa me, eye wògblɔ be "ede bubu Kargil-ʋaa me asrafo siwo dze anyi la tso dzi me, eye wòkafu woƒe dzideƒo kple vɔsa si meʋãna o. Ede ŋugble le India-srafowo ƒe ŋutinya me aʋadziɖuɖu le ƒe." 1999 kple eƒe dukɔa ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ taʋiʋli tameɖoɖo kplikpaa le Operation Sindoor si wowɔ nyitsɔ laa me..." Woɖe asi le eŋu hã, meƒo nu tso naneke ŋu tso alesi wogblɔ be Asrafomegã la xɔ ame siwo ku la ŋu o.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ashwin Yɔ BCCI Le India Vs Pak ƒe Nyaʋiʋli Le Asia Cup Mea? Ao, Viral Quote Is Fabricated Analyzing Viral Clip: Discrepancies Detected Esi míedzro video si kaka la me nyuie la, míekpɔ tɔtrɔ ɖedzesi aɖe le odio la me tso akpa 0:55- 1:09 miniti, afisi wose nya si wogblɔ be "asrafo 250" gblɔ le. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, edze abe eƒe nuyi ƒe ʋuʋu le akpa sia me mesɔ le dzɔdzɔme nu vie o ene.    Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, togbɔ be eƒe ŋkumeɖobolo si me rim mele o la dzena vie le

claim: Hardik Pandya Ku Do ŋgɔ na Asia Cup 2025
evidence: Ŋkeke aɖewo le esime BCCI ɖe gbeƒã India ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si awɔ Asia Cup 2025 si gbɔna la, nya dziŋɔ aɖe do mo ɖa le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo si fia be kriket ƒola Hardik Pandya ku.  Nya la xlẽ be"हाया आ पांडे ने का हुआ निधन: कप 2025 से पहले से पहिले पसरातम, माध्य का हुनधन" (Eŋlisigbe me gɔmeɖeɖe: "Hardik Pandya ku, Team India fa konyi do ŋgɔ na Asia 2025, ɣletivimefakala ku") The above post can be see here (archive) FACT CHECK NewsMobile fact-checked the viral and found be wòanye ameflunya.  Nya veviwo didi mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le tso Pandya ƒe ku ŋu o. Ne míebu eƒe kɔkɔme le dukɔwo dome kriket me ŋu la, anye ne India kple dukɔwo dome nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ gãwo agblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe le afisiafi.  Míelé ŋku ɖe Pandya ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo hã ŋu eye míekpɔ gbeƒãɖeɖe ma tɔgbe aɖeke o. BCCI alo eƒe ƒomea meɖe gbeƒã nya aɖeke si ɖo kpe nya sia dzi o.  Le nyataƒoƒo me la, nya si kaka ɖe Hardik Pandya ƒe ku ŋu la nye alakpa. claim: Sewɔtakpekpea ɖe Dukplɔsea ƒe Nyati 1 lia ƒe Akpa 9 lia kple 10 lia ɖa le eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea
evidence: NYA SIWO WOÐO ŊU: kpɔe ɖa be nyatakaka yeyewo le ete hã.  Ðe U.S. Dukplɔsea ƒe akpa aɖewo ku ɖe habeas corpus kple Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe ŋusẽwo ŋu bu le U.S. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea do ŋgɔ na August 6, 2025? Ẽ, nyateƒee: Axaawo ƒe akpa siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe la ŋlɔ tɔtrɔ siwo ɖe akpa 9 kple 10 ɖa le Se 1. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe, si kpɔa Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea dzi la lɔ̃ ɖe nusiwo woɖe ɖa dzi eye wògblɔ be "coding error" aɖe si gbɔ woakpɔ gbɔe wòtso. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe vodada mekpɔ ŋusẽ aɖeke ɖe Dukplɔsea gɔmeɖeɖe alo edziwɔwɔ dzi o.  Nya sia dze le nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) si wota ɖe X dzi le August 6, 2025. Eʋu be: BREAKING : Ðeko United States dziɖuɖua ɖe United States ƒe Dukplɔsea ƒe Se I ƒe akpa 9 kple 10 ɖa le woƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea teti koe nye ema.  Eyi edzi be: De dzesii be akpa 9 kple 10 ku ɖe: - Writ of Habeas Corpus - Sewɔtakpekpewo ƒe ŋutete be woakpɔ adzɔxexe dzi.  Aleae nyatakakaa nɔ le X dzi le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi: (Dzɔtsoƒe: screenshot of a post by krassenstein on X.com) Video siwo tso nyatakakaa me ɖe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe ŋkɔ fia: constitution.congress.gov, si woyɔna hã be Constitution Annotated section of the U.S. Congress website, si nye dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo hena sewɔtakpekpea ŋuti nyatakakawo.  Sewɔtakpekpea mekpɔa nyatakakadzraɖoƒea dzi o. Eƒe Axa si nye About (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) xlẽ be: Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒee wɔ Congress.gov eye wòléa be nɛ to nyatakaka siwo United States Sewɔtakpekpe kple United States Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea dzɔ tso eye wo tɔe wonye la zazã me.  Aleae wònɔ le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi: (Source: screenshot of constitution.congress.gov) Abe alesi wokpɔe le screenshot si le etame me ene la, wotsɔ nuŋlɔɖi eve kpe ɖe axaa ŋu. Ame ɖeka gblɔ be Constitution Annotated nyatakakadzraɖoƒea le "nyatakakawo" me tom. Nuŋlɔɖi bubu yi edzi ɖe eme be woɖe nyatakaka siwo bu la ɖa le mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe vodada aɖe ta eye wole mɔ kpɔm be woagbugbɔ wo aɖo anyi: Le vodada aɖe si wowɔ le kɔpiwɔwɔ ta la, Se 1 lia ƒe akpa aɖewo bu le Constitution Annotated ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Míenya nyaa eye míele dɔ wɔm be míaɖɔe ɖo. Míele mɔ kpɔm be woakpɔ esia gbɔ kpuie.  Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe ɖo kpe esia dzi le eƒe nyatakaka si wòŋlɔ ɖe X (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) si wota le August 6, 2025. Lead Stories xɔ nya aɖe si woɖo ɖe e-mail dzi tso Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒe ƒe nyanuɖela Bill Ryan gbɔ le esi míeta nyati sia zi gbãtɔ vɔ megbe: The online Constitution Annotated is an educational tool which includes discussions of the Supreme Court’s latest opinions linked to the text of the constitution. Esi wole nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ɖɔlim be wòaɖe míaƒe dukplɔseŋutinunyalawo ƒe numekuku le ŋusẽ si nya yeye siwo wotsɔ ɖe eŋu kpɔ ɖe Se I, Akpa 8-10 dzi la afia la, ƒuƒoƒoa ɖe XML dzesi aɖe ɖa le manyamanya me. Esia xe mɔ na nusianu si le Se I me tata le Akpa 8. Woɖɔ kuxia ɖo eye míaƒe dukplɔse me numekuku yeyea li fifia. Míele afɔ aɖewo ɖem be míagadzɔ ake le etsɔme o.  Kadodo sia ɖea axaa dzi nya siwo wodzra ɖo kple U.S. Dukplɔse si ŋu nuŋlɔɖi le, abe alesi wòdze le August 6, 2025. Le Wayback Machine ƒe nya nu la, nyatakaka siwo woɖe ɖa la lɔ Akpa 8 lia ƒe akpa gã aɖe kple Akpa 9 kple 10 katã ɖe eme ƒe axaa ɖee fia be edze abe nusi woɖɔ be enye "coding error" la dzɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖe me le July 17, 2025, kple August 6, 2025 dome ene, eye U.S. Dukplɔse bliboa meganɔ anyi le July 21, 2025. Section 9 (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) xe mɔ na Sewɔtakpekpea be wòagade se ɖe kluviwo tsɔtsɔ va United States nu o vaseɖe ƒe 1808 alo woadzudzɔ habeas corpus ƒe gomenɔamesiwo negbe ɖe aglãdzedze alo amedzidzedze aɖe dzɔ hafi.  Akpa 10 lia (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia) de seɖoƒe na dukɔwo abe nubabla wɔwɔ kple dukɔ bubuwo kple adzɔxexe ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ alo esiwo wotsɔ yi duta dzi ene.  Se ƒe ŋusẽ aɖeke mele tɔtrɔ siwo wowɔ le sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ŋu o. Woda asi ɖe U.S. Dukplɔsea dzi le ƒe 1789 me, si nye ƒe 200 kple edzivɔ hafi wowɔ nyatakakadzraɖoƒea.

claim: Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro: Asitsatsa ƒe nubabla ƒe adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ menye India dɔwɔla siwo katã le UK tɔ o, si to vovo na nya siwo wogblɔna le Internet dzi
evidence: Asitsatsa ƒe nubabla yeye aɖe ana woaɖe asi le Indiatɔ siwo woƒe dɔtɔ siwo le India dɔ ɖe UK la ŋu hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe be woagaxe Britaintɔwo ƒe hadomededienɔnɔ ƒe fewo o, ke menye be woaɖe asi le India dɔwɔla siwo katã le Britain ŋu tso adzɔa me o, si to vovo na nya siwo wogblɔna le Internet dzi.Britain kple India wɔ asitsatsa faa ƒe nubabla si ana woaɖe adzɔxexe dzi akpɔtɔ le nusiwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye ʋu, nuɖuɖu kple whisky ŋu.Nubabla sia si woɖe gbeƒãe le April 6 lia dzi la alɔ adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ na India dɔwɔla siwo woɖo ɖe Britain la ɖe eme hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe kple woƒe dɔtɔwo.Reuters Image“Eyata asitsatsa ƒe nubabla yeye si wowɔ kple India fia be mahiã be Indiatɔ ʋuʋula siwo le dɔ wɔm le UK naxe fe na NI hena ƒe 3 akpa (sic) o?Aleke ema le dzɔdzɔe?” said a May 6 post, opens new tab on Facebook, referring to the social security tax, called national insurance.Another post, opens new tab on May 12 do susua ɖa be ablɔɖea ku ɖe adzɔ siwo menye hadome dedienɔnɔ o ŋu, kpakple mɔnukpɔkpɔ si woate ŋu age ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Lãmesẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔha me femaxee.Ke hã, adzɔxexe ƒe ɖeɖekpɔkpɔa awɔ dɔ ɖe India dɔwɔla siwo woƒe dɔtɔ siwo le India dɔ ɖa be woawɔ dɔ le UK vaseɖe ƒe etɔ̃ ko dzi, nyanuɖela aɖe na Britain’s Department for Business and Trade gblɔ le email aɖe si woɖo ɖe Reuters me.Adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ - si woyɔna be nudzɔdzɔ eve ƒe nubabla - fia be dɔtɔ kple dɔwɔla maxe Britain ƒe dukɔa ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo o.Gake woayi edzi axee le India. Nyanuɖela la gblɔ kpee be asitsatsa ƒe nubabla la fia be womaxɔ agba le edzi le dukɔ eveawo me o. Eku ɖe Britain dɔwɔla siwo UK dɔwɔƒewo xɔ ɖe dɔ me le India hã ŋu.Amesiwo kpɔa viɖe tso hadomededienɔnɔ ƒe fexexe ƒe ablɔɖe me la, ele be woaxe NHS ƒe lãmesẽfetu si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu, aʋu tab yeye eye womate ŋu akpɔ UK ƒe viɖewo o, le Britain dziɖuɖu ƒe ɖoɖo gbalẽ aɖe nu, opens new tab on the deal, published on May 6.India’s foreign affairs ministry did not respond to a request for comment.VERDICTMissing context. Adzɔxexe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ meɖe asi le India dɔwɔla siwo katã le UK ŋu be woagaxe dukɔa ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo alo NHS ƒe fe si wogaxe o, Indiatɔ siwo woƒe dɔtɔ siwo le India dɔ ɖe Britain hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe koe.Reuters Fact Check ƒuƒoƒoae wɔ nyati sia. Trump ƒe alakpanya si wòŋlɔ tso Musk ƒe atike muamewo zazã ŋu kaka le aʋawɔwɔ me



							Wotae le June 6, 2025 le ga 21:34 me




							
							2 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Bill MCCARTHY, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP USA ƒe agbalẽ





				Esi masɔmasɔ siwo nɔ Donald Trump kple eƒe aɖaŋuɖola biliɔnla Elon Musk dome va zu dzo eye ɣeaɖewoɣi la, ame ŋutɔ ƒe nyaʋiʋli le dutoƒo le June 5, 2025 dzi la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ma screenshot aɖe si dze abe ɖe United States dukplɔla ŋlɔ bena Tesla kple SpaceX ƒe asitsala gã la “zãa ketamine fũ ɣesiaɣi.” Gake White House ɖo kpe edzi na AFP be nya si wogblɔ be enye Truth Social la nye alakpa, eye medze le Trump ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe afi aɖeke o.
			


"Elon Musk alo 'Mediocre Musk' ƒe ketamine sɔ gbɔ ɣesiaɣi. Ŋugbedodo siwo dzi mateŋu awɔ ɖe edzi o ɣesiaɣi. MELE BE WOAKA ÐE WÒ O! Edi be yeayi Mars, aleke wòle be nàtrɔ ayi Afrika," xlẽ nya si wogblɔ be eŋlɔ tso Trump gbɔ, si wotsɔ ɣeyiɣi ɖo June 5, 2025 le fiẽ ga 6:07 (2207 GMT).

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Screenshot tso X si woɖe le June 6, 2025 dzi
					
Nɔnɔmetata la ʋuʋu le mɔ̃ siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye X, Facebook, Instagram kple Threads dzi esime United States ƒe ŋgɔnɔla kple xexeame ƒe kesinɔtɔ gãtɔ dzra barbs le nusi dze egɔme abe nyaʋiʋli le gazazã ƒe se "gã, dzeani" ŋu le Sewɔtakpekpea ŋkume.Ame evea tsɔ vlododowo ƒu gbe ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu le internet dzi esi Trump ɖe dziɖeleameƒo fia le eƒe nunala gãtɔ ƒe ɖeklemiɖeɖe sea ŋu vɔ megbe, eye Trump do ŋɔdzi na Musk be yeaxɔ eƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe nubabla gãwo kple Musk le Musk si si gblɔ be kafukafu na Republicantɔwo ƒe aʋadziɖuɖu le ƒe 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔblɔɖe me. Ɣeaɖeɣi la, Musk gblɔ be woƒo nu tso dukplɔla la ŋu le dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo me tso gadzikpɔla Jeffrey Epstein si ŋu ŋukpe le, amesi ku le eɖokui wuwu me le gaxɔ me esime wònɔ lalam be woadrɔ̃ ʋɔnui ɖe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ ta. Nusi do tso eme la va le ŋkeke aɖewo megbe esi New York Times ka nya ta be Musk zã atike sesẽ si naa alɔ̃dɔdɔ ame si nye ketamine ale gbegbe esime wònɔ ƒe 2024 ƒe akɔdada ƒe mɔ dzi ale gbegbe be tsinyegoe me kuxiwo va nɔ eŋu -- nutsotso si Musk gbe purported screenshot circulating online, in a June 6, 2025 email to AFP.Dukplɔla la meɖo nya ɖe amewo le fiẽ ga 6 (2200 GMT) gaƒoƒo me le June 5. Gaƒoƒo eve do ŋgɔ la, eʋli eƒe sea ta eye wòŋlɔ bena: "Meɖe fu nam be Elon natrɔ ɖe ŋunye o, gake ele be wòawɔe ɣleti geɖe enye sia hafi" (archived here).His next post, after 10:30 pm (0230 GMT), ma kadodo aɖe si yi Newsmax nyati aɖe gbɔ ku ɖe eƒe ŋudzedzekpɔkpɔ ƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔwo ŋu (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).Nya veviwo didi metrɔ nyadzɔdzɔ nyati aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo si ƒo nu tso nya si wogblɔ be woŋlɔ ŋu o.AFP ɖe alakpa Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakaka geɖe siwo wogblɔ vodadatɔe be Trump ye ŋlɔ la ɖa. Xlẽ nu geɖe tso AFP ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe nyatakaka totro siwo ku ɖe United States ƒe dunyahehe ŋu ŋu le afisia.

claim: Mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔla siwo le Norway wɔ "tsikpe ƒe aŋgba" siwo wowɔ le tsia dzi na nutrenuwo be woatsɔ axɔ ɖe lãawo ƒe nɔƒe si le bubum si nye Artik-ƒua me tsikpe teƒe.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le Sept. 24, 2025 dzi la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be Norway ƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔlawo to nutovɛ yeye aɖe vɛ be woatsɔ akpe ɖe Artik-ƒumelãwo ŋu: "tsikpe ƒe aŋgba" siwo le tsia dzi siwo naa teƒe aɖe lãawo be "woaɖi ɖe eme, ahe vidzidziwo, eye woatsi agbe" le ɣletinyigba si le dzo dam kple atsiaƒu me tsikpe siwo le ƒoƒom la dome. Nya sia kaka ɖe X, Facebook kple Instagram dzi. Nya geɖe siwo woŋlɔ gblɔ be wotsɔ "nu siwo gblẽna, siwo me aɖi mele o" wɔ pods la, woɖe dowo le wo ŋu be "nutrenuwo nagadze anyi o" eye wotsɔ sensorwo ɖe asi be woalé ŋku ɖe nutrenuwo ƒe xexlẽme ŋu. Zi geɖe la, nɔnɔmetata aɖe si dze abe ɖe wòɖe nutrenu siwo bɔbɔ nɔ tsikpe siawo siwo wosusu be wole tsikpe me la dometɔ ɖeka tame ene, si me aflaga aɖe si wosusu be woɖo be wòatsi tre ɖi na Norway la le. Wonɔ te ɖe Google dzi didi dzi gblɔ be nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le siwo ku ɖe tsikpe siwo wowɔ kple asi siwo Norwaytɔ mɔ̃ɖaŋudɔwɔlawo wɔ ŋu menɔ anyi vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm o, eye ne mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe nukunu sia si wosusu la dzɔ la, ke kakaɖedzitɔe kloe la, woaƒo nu tso eŋu. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, edze abe nunya wɔwɔe ye wɔ nɔnɔmetata la ene. Eyata míebu nya sia be enye alakpa. Aʋatso tsikpe siwo kaka ɖe internet dzi ƒe nɔnɔmetata la ƒe ŋkɔe nye: "fb@cronus.my." Esi wodi ŋkɔ ma la, wokpɔ Facebook-dzesi aɖe si dzi ame siwo wu 200,000 le si woyɔna be Cronus. Woŋlɔ Cronus ɖe Facebook dzi be enye "digital creator," ke menye nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe o. Nya geɖe siwo woŋlɔ ɖe axaa dzi la zɔ ɖe ɖoɖo aɖe koŋ dzi: gbemelãwo ŋutinya alo nyateƒenya si wosusu, si ŋu nɔnɔmetata aɖe si me AI dzidzime ƒe dzesiwo le kpe ɖo. Snopes do asi ɖe Cronus gbɔ be yeabia nyatakaka bubuwo tso woƒe "ice pod" ŋutinya ƒe dzɔtsoƒe alo ewɔwɔ ŋu eye wòle ŋuɖoɖo lalam. Aflaga dzĩ geɖe nɔ anyi siwo fia be ame aɖe zã AI tsɔ wɔ nutrenu ƒe nɔnɔmetata le tsikpe siwo wowɔ kple asi dzi. Ne míelé ŋku ɖe nutrenuawo ŋu nyuie la, edze abe ŋutilã ƒe wɔwɔme si mebɔ o le nutrenuawo dometɔ geɖe ŋu ene, abe ta siwo bu ene. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, Norwaytɔwo ƒe aflaga si wosusu be ele tsikpeawo dzi la meɖi aflaga ŋutɔŋutɔ si tso Norway o. Fli ɣi siwo le axadzi mele Norway dukɔa ƒe aflaga ŋutɔŋutɔ ŋu o, eye titina atitsoga la ƒe gododo le axadzi, ke menye titina o. Nya siwo ku ɖe nɔnɔmetata la ŋu dometɔ aɖewoe nye nutrenu siwo meɖi nutrenu o kple Norway dukɔa ƒe aflaga si wogblɔ le mɔ gbegblẽ nu. . Togbɔ be "ice pod" ƒe nu yeyea menɔ anyi vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm o hã la, atsiaƒu me tsikpe ƒe bu le yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ ta nye nya ŋutɔŋutɔ si dze ŋgɔ amewo kple lãwo siaa le Arctic. Ke hã, ƒe 2024 ƒe Artik "nyatakakagbalẽvi" aɖe si Dukɔa ƒe Atsiaƒu kple Yame ƒe Dɔwɔƒe wɔ ɖee fia be nutrenu ene siwo katã le Pacific Arctic la ƒe xexlẽme sɔ gbɔ eye wole lãmesẽ me eye wotrɔ ɖe atsiaƒu si le dzo dam ŋu to woƒe nuɖuɖu tɔtrɔ kple ʋuʋu yi dziehe ʋĩ me. Nyatakakaa ɖee fia be: "Tɔtrɔ si va le nuɖuɖu me, vaseɖe fifia, mena nutrenuwo ƒe lãmesẽ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ɣeyiɣi didi o." "Ke hã, Arctic ƒumelãwo ƒe tsikpe gakpɔtɔ le vevie ŋutɔ na nutrenuwo ƒe lãmesẽ. Seal dadawo naa no wo viwo le tsikpeawo dzi. Ne ƒumetsikpe mete ŋu nɔa te o la, no nana ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo dzi ɖena kpɔtɔna, eye anɔ eme be vi ʋɛ aɖewo koe anɔ agbe." Wotsɔ aʋatso tsikpewo ƒu gbe do ŋgɔ be woatsɔ akpe ɖe Artik-nutowo me ƒuta dzata siwo ŋu yame ƒe nɔnɔme ƒe tɔtrɔ ƒe nugbegblẽ le bɔbɔe koŋ ŋu. Gake le Polar Bears International, si nye lãwo takpɔha aɖe ƒe nya nu la, “ƒumelãwo ƒe tsikpe menye nuƒolanɔƒe ko kura o: Enye Artik-nutowo me lãwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ ƒe akpa vevi aɖe.” Esia le alea elabena ƒumelãwo ƒe tsikpe kpena ɖe ame ŋu be nɔnɔme aɖe nɔa anyi na nugbagbevi suesue siwo hiã na Artiktɔwo ƒe nuɖuɖu ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔa. Habɔbɔa de dzesii hã be ne míebu alesi tsi siwo le ʋuʋu ɖi ƒe lolome dzro ko le tsikpe siwo le ƒoƒom le Artik-nutowo me ta la, “agbagbadzedze kple ga si woatsɔ awɔ nuƒolanɔƒe bubu ƒomevi ɖesiaɖe ahawɔe” anye nusi me susu mele o ko. Esia menye etsɔme-gake-aʋatso nutovɛ gbãtɔ si do ƒome kple Norway si ŋu míeku nu me le o. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu va yi be nɔnɔmetatawo ɖe dzoxɔxɔnamɔ̃ si le tsia dzi si Norway dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunyalawo to vɛ si woyɔna be "Ocean Bloom" fia vavã hã.

claim: Ɣe kple ya meɖo “xexeame katã ƒe ŋusẽ ƒe 3%” gbɔ o.
evidence: Esi United States nɔ avu wɔm kple Iran ƒe Strait of Hormuz — si nye nusi xea mɔ na xexeame ƒe ami ʋeʋĩ ƒe akpa atɔ̃lia — CNN ƒe Jake Tapper bia Ŋusẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔla Chris Wright be ele be U.S. naɖo ŋu ɖe ami ŋu boo o eye wòaɖo ŋu ɖe ŋusẽ yeyewo, abe ɣe kple ya ƒe ŋusẽ ene ŋu geɖe wu hã. "Míeto ɣleti eve me esime xexeame katã ƒe ŋusẽɖoɖo bliboa le zitɔtɔ me le melimɔ ɖeka ta ko," Tapper gblɔ le April 19 dzi le "State of the Union." "Ðe ema mewɔ nyaʋiʋli ɖe ŋusẽ ƒomevi bubuwo ŋu oa, ale be U.S. nagaɖo ŋu ɖe ami ŋu boo oa?" Wright, amesi ƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo menye dziɖuɖua tɔ o ƒe dɔe nye dzɔdzɔme gas kple ami, gblɔ be U.S. wɔa ami geɖe wu alesi wòzãna, si wɔe be wònye ami si tsɔa ami ɖoa duta ŋutɔŋutɔ; míetsɔ nya ma tɔgbe ƒe dzeside nye Nyateƒe Afã. Wright gblɔ be "míedi ŋusẽ tso afisiafi si míate ŋu akpɔe godoo" — nukliaŋusẽ hã le eme — gake ena wòdze abe ŋgɔyiyi le ŋusẽ yeyewo me nye dziɖeleameƒo. "Le ƒe 20 siwo va yi me la, xexeame zã dɔlar triliɔn 10 ɖe ya, ɣe, kple batriwo ŋu. Meɖo xexeame ƒe ŋusẽ ƒe 3% o, eye ɖeko wòna nuwo ƒe asi yi dzi," Wright gblɔ. Ðe wòsɔ be ɣe kple ya meɖo "3% of global energy" gbɔ oa? Nyatakaka aɖewo li siwo ɖo kpe Wright ƒe nya dzi be ya kple ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ nye xexeame ƒe ŋusẽ ƒe alafa memamã sue aɖe, si ade 3.3%. Ke hã, ya kple ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ va zu ŋusẽtsoƒe vevi aɖe na ŋusẽ ƒe hatsotso vevi aɖe — elektrikŋusẽ wɔwɔ na aƒewo kple dɔwɔƒewo — le U.S. kple xexeame siaa le ƒe 20 siwo va yi me. Le nya aɖe si wogblɔ na PolitiFact me la, Ŋusẽdɔwɔƒea gblɔ be, "Ne ya kple ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ wɔa dɔ le ɣeyiɣi siwo me womehiãa nu boo o me ko" — si nye nyateƒe ne wometsɔ wo kpe ɖe nudzraɖoƒemɔnu bubuwo abe batriwo ene ŋu o — "ekema woƒe asixɔxɔ le dzɔdzɔme nu le sue wu." Dɔwɔƒea he susu yi numekuku siwo ɖee fia hã be dukɔ siwo hiã ŋusẽ yeyewo ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ suetɔ kekeake le elektrikŋusẽ wɔwɔ me la kpɔ asixɔxɔ si kɔ wu na nuƒlelawo. Dukɔwo Dome Ŋusẽ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be xexeame katã ƒe gadede ya kple ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ me tso ƒe 2015 va ɖo ƒe 2025 me ɖo dɔlar triliɔn 5.7. Ema sɔ kple dɔlar triliɔn 10 lɔƒo le ƒe 20 me. Wright ƒe 3% ƒe xexlẽme le taɖodzinu si wotu ɖe ŋusẽzazã bliboa dzi le xexeame katã. Esia nye catchall ƒe hatsotso si me nusianu le tso ʋuɖomi dzi va ɖo dɔwɔƒewo ƒe dzoxɔxɔ na siminti alo gakpo dɔwɔƒewo dzi. Dzotsinuwo abe dzotsinuwo, ami kple dzɔdzɔme gas ene gakpɔtɔ nye ŋusẽtsoƒe vevitɔwo le xexeame katã. Ɣe kple ya ƒe ŋusẽ kplɔa dzɔtsoƒe siawo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe ɖo, eye wokplɔa nu gbagbewo (nu gbagbewo alo gbeɖuɖɔwo ƒe dzobibi) kple nukliaŋusẽ hã ɖo. Ŋusẽŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be akpa sue si ɣe kple ya tsi tre ɖi na la ɖe woƒe seɖoƒe fiana na dɔwɔƒewo. Le nɔnɔme siawo me la, viɖe aɖe le dzotsinuwo ŋu elabena woƒe ŋusẽ nɔa anyi ɣesiaɣi. To vovo na ema la, ya kple ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ trɔna, le yame ƒe nɔnɔme nu. Ahiã be dɔwɔƒe si le didim be yeazã ya alo ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ atsɔ ana ŋusẽ dɔwɔƒe aɖe nade ga nudzraɖoƒe, abe batri alo tsidzraɖoƒewo ene, si ana ga si woatsɔ awɔ dɔe la nadzi ɖe edzi. Ɣe kple ya wɔ ŋgɔyiyi gã aɖe le elektrikŋusẽ wɔwɔ me — ŋusẽ ƒe hatsotso vevi aɖe si naa ŋusẽ aƒewo kple asitsaƒe geɖewo. Wright ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa "flua ame le gbɔgblɔ me be ga geɖe yi ɖe ɣe, ya kple batriwo me si mexɔ asi boo o," Kenneth Gillingham, Yale Yunivɛsiti ƒe gaŋutinunyala bibi aɖe le ŋusẽ me gblɔ. "Ema menye nyateƒe o — ɣe kple ya le mɔ̃ɖaŋununya siwo me ga menɔa anyi o dome fifia" si wotu ɖe akɔntabubu siwo woɖo ɖi dzi "eye wole dzidzim ɖe edzi kabakaba ŋutɔ." Dukɔwo Dome Ŋusẽ Yeye Dɔwɔƒe kpɔe be mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe ŋgɔyiyi, nuzazãwo ƒe kɔsɔkɔsɔ siwo me hoʋiʋli le wu kple ganyawo ƒe lolome na ɣe ƒe ŋusẽ ƒe asi bɔbɔ 41% wu mɔ̃memi bubu siwo ƒe asi bɔbɔ wu, siwo dome dzotsinuwo hã le, eye yaƒoƒo ƒe dɔwo le anyigba dzi ƒe asi bɔbɔ 53%. Ðewohĩ womatsɔ xɔtuɖaŋu ƒe gazazã aɖewo siwo hiã, abe mɔ̃ yeyewo ene, ade tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo siawo me o. Ŋgɔyiyi mawo na be, le xexeame katã la, elektrikŋusẽ si wokpɔna tso ɣe kple ya me dzi ɖe edzi tso zero kloe le ƒe 2000 ƒe gɔmedzedze va ɖo 13% le wo katã me le ƒe 2023 me, si nye ƒe mamlɛtɔ si wokpɔ, le Dukɔwo Dome Ŋusẽ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nya nu. Ɣe kple ya ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme sɔ gbɔ abe zi gbɔ zi 120 ene le ƒe 2023 me wu ƒe 2000. Dzidziɖedzi ma ƒo ŋusẽtsoƒe bubu ɖesiaɖe ta. Le U.S. la, ɣe kple ya xɔ U.S. elektrikŋusẽ wɔwɔ ƒe 14% lɔƒo le ƒe 2023. That’s behind natural gas (43%) but closing in on nuclear (19%) and coal (16%). Le ƒuƒoƒo me le U.S. la, ɣe kple ya naa nu geɖe wu tha

claim: Le May 6, 2026 dzi la, nyanyuigblɔla ƒe subɔla Mark Burns wɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe sika legba aɖe ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe le Trump ƒe Mar-a-Lago modzakaɖeƒe le Florida.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Mark Burns xɔ ŋgɔ le Trump ƒe sikakpememe aɖe ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe me nyateƒe le May 2026. Ke hã ... ... kpememea nɔ Trump National Doral Golf Club le Miami, ke menye Mar-a-Lago o. Le May 2026 me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔ be nyanyuigblɔla subɔla aɖe tsɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe sikakpememe aɖe ɖo anyi le Trump ƒe habɔbɔwo dometɔ ɖeka me le Florida. Zãla siwo le nya sia kakam la ma nɔnɔmetata siwo ɖe Trump ƒe kpememe si wotsɔ sika wɔe si ƒe asibidɛ si wodo ɖe dzi eye eteƒekpɔlawo ƒo xlãe la fia. Snopes xlẽlawo hã ɖo nyabiase gbogbo aɖewo ɖe mí tso kpememea ŋu, wo dometɔ geɖe bia be ɖe wòle dukplɔla la ƒe Mar-a-Lago Club me hã eye wogblɔ be ekɔ afɔ 20. Meme aɖe kaka ɖe Facebook dzi kple nɔnɔmetata siwo tsɔ kpememea sɔ kple sikanyivi la — si fia Biblia me ŋutinya si ku ɖe Israel vi siwo si le Egipte eye wowɔ sikanyivi ƒe legba le Mose ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ me ŋu. Nyitsuvi la tsi tre ɖi na xɔsegbegbe ƒe nuwɔna si gbɔ eme. "MAGA nyanyuigblɔlawo ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo ƒo ƒu ɖe Mar-a-Lago be yewoayra Donald Trump ƒe sikakpememe aɖe ahatsɔe ana. Umm...ka ɖe edzi ŋutɔ be enye Mawu ƒe se xoxotɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ be woagawɔ esia o." Trump ƒe kpememea ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe dzɔ le May 6, 2026 dzi nyateƒe — gake menye le Mar-a-Lago o, abe alesi nyatakaka gbogbo aɖewo kple Snopes xlẽlawo gblɔe ene. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe akpa gãtɔ. Kpememea ƒe adzɔgbeɖeɖe — si nyanyuigblɔla sɔlemehakplɔla Mark Burns nɔ ŋgɔ na — yi edzi le Trump National Doral Golf Club le Miami. Burns, amesi ƒo nu tso wɔnaa ŋu le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo me eye wòda eƒe videowo ɖe eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo la, tsɔ nya ɖe nya siwo wogblɔ be vavalawo le Trump ƒe kpememe aɖe subɔm ŋu, eye wòɖee fia boŋ be enye bubudede dukplɔla la ŋu. Burns ta adzɔgbeɖeɖea ƒe videowo ɖe eƒe YouTube axa dzi le May 6. Videoa ɖe Trump ƒe kpememe aɖe si ƒe asibidɛ kɔ, kple kpe aɖe si le gbea dzi si xlẽ be: "Le bubudede Dukplɔla Donald J. Trump kple eƒe avuwɔwɔ madzudzɔmadzudzɔe be yeana Amerika nazu Gã la ŋu." Trump yɔ wɔnaa gɔ̃ hã, le video aɖe si woma le Burns ƒe Instagram axa dzi, afisi woate ŋu akpɔ sɔlemehakplɔla la wòlé telefon ɖe asi vaseɖe nuƒomɔ̃ dzi le. Trump gblɔ le telefon dzi be: "Wowɔe tso lɔlɔ̃ me, eye medi be mada akpe na Mark Burns, pastɔ, enye pastɔ nyui, enye ame nyui. Menyae ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia, enɔ gbɔnye tso gɔmedzedzea me ke." Le Instagram nyatakaka siwo kplɔ wo nɔewo ɖo me la, Burns ƒo nu na ɖeklemiɖelawo le kpememea ŋu, eye wòŋlɔ ɖe ɖeka me be: Nusi wɔ nuku nam enye alesi ame aɖewo tsɔ kpememe dzeani sia, si dulɔlɔ̃la siwo wu 6,000 wɔ eye wòna wòte ŋu dzɔ la sɔ kple sikanyivi alo trɔ̃subɔsubɔ kabakaba. Mina magblɔe eme nakɔ ŋutɔ. Míesubɔa Aƒetɔ Yesu Kristo kple Eya ɖeka ko. Mawu ƒe Nya la gblɔ be, "Mawu bubu aɖeke maganɔ mia si do ŋgɔ o." Mose II, 20:3 . Egblɔ hã be, "Mide ta agu na Aƒetɔ miaƒe Mawu, eye Eya ɖeka koe miasubɔ." Mateo 4:10 . Emae nye fli la. Bubudede ame ŋu menye tadedeagu o. Bubudede ame ŋu menye trɔ̃subɔsubɔ o. Azãɖuɖu menye tadedeagu na alakpamawu o. [...] Bubudede ame ŋu le afisi wòle be bubu le nye Biblia me nya. Tadede agu hede ta agu na legba nye nuvɔ̃. Vovototo gã aɖe le wo dome. Menye tadedeagu tae wowɔ kpememe sia ɖo o. Wowɔe be wòanye tenɔnɔ ɖe nɔnɔme sesẽwo nu, dulɔlɔ̃, dzideƒo, kple akpedada ƒe dzesi. Wowɔe be woatsɔ ade bubu ŋutsu aɖe si ƒe nya dzi ame geɖe ate ŋu alɔ̃ ɖo o, gake Amerikatɔ miliɔn geɖe xɔe se be ewɔ nu tɔxɛ aɖewo tsɔ na dukɔ sia sẽ ŋu. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le U.K.-dukɔa ƒe radiodɔwɔƒe si nye LBC me la, Burns gblɔ be Trump mewɔ naneke le kpememea ŋu o eye Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla siwo ade 6,000 ye na gae. Etsɔ kpememea sɔ kple esiwo sɔ kple esiwo eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea ƒe amedzrowo da na ame xɔŋkɔwo abe basketball-ƒoƒo ŋuti xotutu me tɔ Michael Jordan ene. Gbebiamelaa bia tso esi be wòaɖo nya siwo wogblɔ be enye “alakpa trɔ̃” ŋu. Burns ɖo eŋu (le 4:12): Enyo, nyateƒee, enye bometsinya. Enye busunyagbɔgblɔ be woabu eŋu nenema gɔ̃ hã. Mebe, ne ènyam eye le nyateƒe me la, nyemenya ame aɖeke si dea ta agu na Donald Trump abe mawu ene o, gake menya be àte ŋu asubɔ nusianu abe mawu ene. Eɖanye wò dɔ o, eɖanye wò ga o, eɖanye wò ƒomedodowo o, eɖanye wò dɔwɔɖui o, eɖanye nuka kee wònye o, àte ŋu atsɔe aɖo Mawu gbagbe la ŋkume. Eye Mawu nye Mawu si ʋãa ŋu. Eyata mele be woatsɔ naneke ade Mawu gbagbe la ŋkume gbeɖe o. Kpememe sia nye Amerikatɔwo ƒe dulɔlɔ̃ ƒe kpɔɖeŋu. Etsi tre ɖi na lɔlɔ̃nu be woawɔ avu le tsitretsiɖeŋu gɔ̃ hã me, kple lɔlɔ̃nu be woagafɔ kple ʋu si le dodom le dukplɔla la ƒe mo. kple alesi wòtrɔ ɖe ameha la ŋu le Butler, Pennsylvania, eye wòfɔ asi ma ɖe dzi eye wògblɔ be, "Miwɔ avu, miwɔ avu, miwɔ avu." Dulɔlɔ̃ ma ɖi le xexeame katã kple Amerika katã be wòagade ŋusẽ Amerikatɔwo be woaƒo mí nu ƒu ɖekae. Getty Images ƒe foto aɖe si woɖe le April 30 lia dzi la ɖe Trump ƒe kpememe ma ke fia

claim: LA Mostly Peaceful Jihad Summer of Love Protesters Eɖoe koŋ tɔ dzo Jeep aɖe.
evidence: Le zitɔtɔ si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa le Los Angeles me la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo kaka video aɖe le teƒe geɖe si gblɔ be eɖe ʋunyaʋunyawɔlawo ɖoe koŋ tɔ dzo Jeep-ʋu aɖe le zitɔtɔa dome.  X zãla aɖe da videoa ɖe edzi kple nya si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "LA Mostly Peaceful Jihad Summer of Love Protesters Intentionally defir a Jeep."

claim: Hadzila kple fefewɔla Cher gblɔ tso U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ŋu ɣeaɖeɣi be: "Enye a**hole. Afɔku le eŋu ale gbegbe, eye nusi wòtsɔna vaa nye dukɔa me, nusi wònyɔ le nye dukɔa me enye nazãbubu kple kakaɖedzimanɔamesi kple dziɖuɖu ƒomevi aɖe le ƒuƒoƒo aɖewo me."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Togbɔ be wogblɔ be Cher ye gblɔe wòsɔ hã la, ewɔe le wɔna aɖe me le Ottawa, Ontario, le ƒe 2016. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla siwo mae le ƒe ewo kloe megbe la megblɔ ŋkeke aɖeke na eƒe nyawo o. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwuwu kple ƒe 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo) kaka ɖe internet dzi be hadzila kple fefewɔla Cher yɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump be "an a**hole" eye wògblɔ be enyɔ "nazãbubu kple kakaɖedzimanɔamesi" le Amerika. Le Facebook nyatakaka aɖe nu la, esime Cher nɔ nu ƒom le gbebiame aɖe me la, wogblɔ le Trump ŋu be: He’s an a**hole. Afɔku le eŋu ale gbegbe, eye nusi wòtsɔna vaa nye dukɔa me, nusi wònyɔ le nye dukɔa me nye nazãbubu kple kakaɖedzimanɔamesi kple dziɖuɖu ƒomevi aɖe le ƒuƒoƒo aɖewo me. Eye edaa alakpa. Egblɔ nya aɖe, eye emegbe nètrɔ yi ɖakpɔ nya si wògblɔ, eye wòdze abe nyateƒee wònye zi evea siaa ene. Eƒe alakpadada dziŋɔ ale gbegbe, nyemekpɔ ame nyui aɖeke alea gbegbe kpɔ o. Mebe, ɖeko wòwɔ nuku ŋutɔ. Mate ŋu ayi edzi anɔ nya sia ŋu bum tegbee elabena esia tea ɖeɖi ŋunye ŋutɔ. Nyayɔyɔa kaka ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe), esime Snopes nuxlẽlawo do ka kpli mí bia be ɖe Cher gblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe vavã hã. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo dometɔ aɖeke megblɔ ŋkeke si dzi wogblɔ nya siwo wogblɔ be wogblɔ la o. Kpuie ko la, wogblɔ be Cher ye gblɔ nya si woyɔ la wòsɔ. NBC video aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si woda ɖe Oct. 4, 2016 dzi, ɖe hadzila kple fefewɔla la fia esime wònɔ kpukpui si le etame la wɔm esime wòɖe eɖokui fia le wɔna aɖe me na sɔhɛwo ƒe kplɔlawo ƒe habɔbɔ si nye One Young World le Ottawa, Ontario, le ƒe 2016 me, do ŋgɔ teti na Trump ƒe tiatia be wòanye dukplɔla ƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ. On Demand News, si nye YouTube nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖe si ŋu nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si le U.K. si nye ITN zãna hã da Cher ƒe nya siawo ƒe videowo ɖe edzi. Le videoa me la, Cher gblɔ be: Enye a**do. Ao, nye — enye ame si me afɔku le ale gbegbe — eya, nyemenya alesi wònye ame si di be yeaxɔ ɖoƒea o, afɔku le eŋu ale gbegbe eye nusi wòtsɔna vaa nye dukɔ me, nusi nyɔ le nye dukɔ me, nye nazãbubu kple kakaɖedzimanɔamesi kple dziɖuɖu ƒomevi aɖe le ƒuƒoƒo aɖewo me, eye wòdaa alakpa. [...] Egblɔa nane eye emegbe nètrɔna yia megbe eye nèkpɔa nusi wògblɔ eye wònye — edze abe nyateƒee wònye zi eveawo siaa ene, ewɔa nuku ŋutɔ le alakpadada me, nyemekpɔ ame nyui aɖeke alea gbegbe kpɔ o. Mebe, ɖeko, ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ, mate ŋu ayi edzi anɔ nya sia ŋu tegbee elabena eƒe nu te ɖe dzinye ŋutɔ. One Young World ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe hã tsɔ Cher ƒe nya si wòyɔ le nyati aɖe si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe si ku ɖe eƒe dzedzeme le ƒe 2016 ƒe wɔnaa me ŋu la ƒe akpa aɖe de eme. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Independent, Huffpost kple Telegraph le U.K. kple Australian Associated Press tsɔ nya si wogblɔ be Cher gblɔ la ƒe akpa aɖewo de woƒe nyatakakawo me ɣemaɣi (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo). One Young World ma Telegraph nyatia le eƒe Twitter (fifia X) akɔnta (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Oct. 4, 2016. Nyati ma me Cher ƒe nyayɔyɔ akpa gãtɔ nɔ gake woɖe akpa si hadzila la yɔ Trump be "a**hole" ɖa. Nyatakaka siwo nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi ɖee fia be Cher ƒo nu sesĩe tso ale si melɔ̃ Trump o ŋu. CNN ka nya ta le August 2016 me be Cher yɔ Trump be "a f***ing idiot" le eƒe Democrattɔwo ƒe hoʋlila, Hillary Clinton ƒe akɔdada ƒe wɔna aɖe me. Associated Press ka nya ta be Cher gblɔ be Trump nye "ameƒomevinyenye ƒe futɔ, enye nyɔnuwo ƒe ŋutasẽla, enye ame dziŋɔ." Snopes tsɔ nya ɖe alakpanya aɖe si Cher yɔ be Trump be “ŋutsu si ƒe nu medzea ame ŋu wu ɖesiaɖe si medo goe kpɔ le nye agbemeŋkekewo katã me o” la ɖa do ŋgɔ.

claim: Amerika Dukplɔla Trump xe mɔ ɖe Tesla wɔwɔ nu le Amerika le eƒe dzrewɔwɔ kple dɔwɔƒea ƒe amegã Elon Musk megbe.
evidence: Video aɖe si wogblɔ be eɖe United States Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖe gbeƒãe be woaxe mɔ ɖe Tesla ʋuwo wɔwɔ nu le dukɔa me la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le eƒe masɔmasɔ si le edzi yim kple Elon Musk dome.    Le viral clip la me la, wogblɔ be wose Trump gblɔ be, "Egbea, meva afisia be maɖe gbeƒãe be maxe mɔ ɖe Teslawo katã wɔwɔ nu le United States of America, si awɔ dɔ enumake. Gake United States Dukplɔla le susum be "yeaɖe Tesla ɖa," USA Today ka nya ta, eye wògblɔ kpee be, "White House ƒe amegã aɖe ɖo kpe edzi le megbe le June 6 dzi be Trump megadi Tesla Model S si wòƒle le March me o tsɔ ɖee fia be yedo alɔ dɔwɔƒea le nudomegbegblẽ ƒe nudzɔdzɔ siwo dzɔ le Tesla ƒe asitsaƒewo le dukɔa me godoo megbe."  Google Lens dzi didi le nyatakaka klipi si kaka ƒe akpa veviwo ŋu na míeyi United States Dukplɔla ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe kple Elon Musk, si woɖe fia le YouTube television dɔwɔƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo si nye The White House le May 30, 2025. Eɖe Trump fia le awu ma ke me abe alesi wokpɔe le nyatakaka klipi si kaka me ene. Gake míawo ya míekpɔe be nukpɔkpɔ siwo dze le dɔlékui ƒe videoa me la trɔ ɖe axadzi.  (L-R) Screengrab from viral video and screengrab from YouTube video by The White House Esi míedzro nyatakaka klipi si kaka ɖe amewo me me nyuie la, míekpɔe be edze abe Trump ƒe aɖu ƒe akpa si le ʋuʋum vie le teƒe aɖewo ene. Edze abe eƒe nuyi ƒe akpa aɖe hã ƒo ɖi/wo mekɔ o ene, si fia be ɖewohĩ wozã AI tsɔ trɔ asi le videoa ŋu.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ao, Video Sia Meɖea Azãɖuɖuwo Fia Le Bengaluru Esi RCB ɖu IPL 2025 Me vɔ megbe Míekpɔ dɔlékui ƒe akpa aɖe le AI deteksi dɔwɔnu Hive Moderation si ƒo nya ta be 99.4% ƒe kakaɖedzi bliboa le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo me AI wɔ alo deepfake me nyawo le ŋu. AI ƒe odio didi ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe bubu, Resemble.ai kpɔe be gbe si wose le video ma ke me la nye "aʋatso."  Screengrab tso Hive Moderation nyatakakadzraɖoƒe Newschecker hã ƒu du odio la le Deepfake-O-Meter si le UB Media Forensics Lab, si lé ŋku ɖe nu ma ke ŋu le detector geɖe dzi, siwo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ ƒo nya ta be kakaɖedzi gã aɖe le eŋu be AI ye wowɔe.  Screengrab tso Deepfake-O-Meter dɔwɔnu Gawu la, míete ŋu kpɔ tsidzesi si nye "@DangerousAIReturns" le screen la titina vie le viral clip la me. Míedi nu ma ke le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eye míekpɔ Instagram asiléƒe aɖe le id ma ke gbɔ.  Woma video si wogblɔ be Trump ɖe gbeƒã mɔxexe ɖe Tesla wɔwɔ nu le States la ɖe profile la dzi le June 8, 2025. Míede dzesii be "AI Info" ƒe dzeside le reel- Instagram tsɔ nya ma ke de "content with industry-standard signals indicating that it was created with AI."
