claim: Afghanistan aʋawɔha aɖe xlɔ̃ nu ISI, ka atam be yeabia hlɔ̃ Pahalgam ƒe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe amedzidzedze.
evidence: Video aɖe si wogblɔ be 'Afganistan ƒe Ablɔɖeha' me tɔwo ɖe adzɔgbe be yewoabia hlɔ̃ ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ si dzɔ le Jammu & Kashmir ƒe Pahalgam, si wu ame 26, elabena "hlɔ̃biabia ƒe liƒo aɖeke meli o" la kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le video si kaka ɖe amewo me me la, wogblɔ be Afghanistan ƒuƒoƒoa do ŋɔdzi na wo be "yewoaɖe ISI ƒe ŋɔdzinuwɔha la ɖa, lãmenugbagbevi ɖesiaɖe, luʋɔ ɖesiaɖe."  Wole video si xɔ miniti ɖeka kple blaatɔ̃ vɔ evelia la kakam le X kple Facebook dzi ŋutɔ eye woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be, "Afghanistan ƒe Ablɔɖeha la xlɔ̃ nu be:— "Womeɖo HƆDƆ na Pahalgam haɖe o. Woadi tsitretsiɖeŋula ɖesiaɖe si ISI da megbe na le Pakistan alo teƒe bubuwo eye woaɖee ɖa." Gake nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla kpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la menye nyateƒe o. Screengrab from Facebook post by @basant.physics Woateŋu akpɔ nya mawo tɔgbe le afisia, afisia kple afisia. Eɖe video ma ke fia, si ɖo kpe edzi be edo ŋgɔ na Pahalgam ŋɔdzinuwɔlawo ƒe amedzidzedze le April 22, 2025. Eɖe dzesi ŋutɔ be odioa to vovo na esi woɖe fia le viral clip la me ɣemaɣi ŋlɔ Persiatɔwo ƒe odio si wose le ƒe 2022 ƒe videoa me kple dɔwɔnu siwo le Internet dzi ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu, eye wòkpɔe be eyɔa Talibantɔwo ƒe dziɖuɖu le Afghanistan eye wòtsɔa nya ɖe eŋu Screengrab from Facebook post by Liberation Front AFG Le nya bubu si woŋlɔ ɖe eƒe Facebook axa dzi tso February 2022 me la, ŋgɔgbea ɖe eɖokui fia be yenye "ƒuƒoƒo si ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye sɔhɛwo... Míaƒe avuwɔwɔa tsi tre ɖe ŋutasẽdziɖuɖu, nufitifitiwɔwɔ, totalitarianism, ŋu. kple ɖoɖo madzɔmadzɔ kple akpa ɖeka ƒe ɖoɖo siwo ɖua Afghanistan dzi." Egblɔ tsitotsito be ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe taɖodzinu "e nye be woana nɔnɔme si me amegbetɔ ƒe nɔnɔme le kple etsɔme si me anyigba sia dzi tɔwo, abe anyigba sia tɔ gbãtɔwo ene, ateŋu akpɔ gome le woawo ŋutɔ ƒe dzɔgbese ƒe nyametsotso me eye woanɔ ŋutifafa kple ɖekawɔwɔ me kple wo ɖokui, woƒe aƒelikawo, kple xexeame ƒe dukɔ bubuwo..." "Míenye ɖasefowo le woƒe bubumademade ame ŋu, funyafunyawɔwɔ, kple amewuwu ŋutasesẽtɔe si savage Taliban, eye míaʋli be míakpɔ zɔhɛ siawo ƒe bubu ta ahagbugbɔe aɖo eteƒe," egblɔ kpee. Axa la megale dɔ wɔm o tso April 2022. Esi Afghanistan International ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si Afghanistan International, si woŋlɔ le February 4, 2022 dzi la, tsɔ screengrab ɖe asi, si woŋlɔ le February 4, 2022 dzi, gblɔ be, "Asrafoha aɖe si tsi tre ɖe Taliban ŋu si woyɔna be Afghan Freedom Front ɖe gbeƒã eƒe anyinɔnɔ. Le video aɖe me la, ŋgɔgbea gblɔ be Taliban ƒe nuwɔna le nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo, nyɔnu ablɔɖeviwo kple tsitretsiɖeŋulawo léle me, kple nyɔnuwo ƒe nɔnɔme nye nusiwo gbɔ woƒe aglãdzedze tso la dometɔ aɖewo (woɖe egɔme tso Persiagbe me to Google dzi). " Screengrab from Afghanistan International website Also Read: BTS Footage Of 2024 Film Falsely Shared As Video Of Iran Executing Israeli Spies Another outlet Shafaqna Afghanistan tsɔ video gbedasi si ƒuƒoƒoa tsɔ, eye wòɖo kpe edzi be, "Asrafoha bubu si tsi tre ɖe Taliban ŋu si woyɔna be "Afghanistan Liberation Front" ɖe gbeƒã eƒe anyinɔnɔ...afã sia gblɔ le video aɖe me be nyɔnu siwo le anyigba sia dzi mekpɔa dzidzɔ ɖe Islam alo amegbetɔ aɖeke ŋu o gomenɔamesiwo. Woƒoa nu tso tsitretsitsi ɖe Taliban ŋu (woɖe egɔme tso Persiagbe me to Google dzi)." Nyatakaka aɖe si Al-Ain News ta, si woŋlɔ le February 5, 2022 dzi, hã gblɔ be le video klipi aɖe me la, Afghanistan ƒe Ablɔɖeha gblɔ be, "Taliban ƒe nuwɔnawo le nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo léle, nyɔnuwo tete ɖe anyi, kple wo ɖeɖe ɖe aga me nye nusiwo ta woƒe aglãdzedze tso la dometɔ aɖewo." Egblɔ kpee be, "nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe nyatakakawo gblɔ be Afghan Ablɔɖe (Ablɔɖe) Front dze asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le Afghanistan ƒe dziehe kple titina (woɖe egɔme tso Arabgbe me to Google dzi)." Screengrab from Al-Ain News website Míelé ŋku ɖe odio si míese le viral clip la me le AI detection tools geɖe dzi si meɖe emetsonu aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, míekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si gblɔ be Liberation Front of Afghanistan ka atam be yeabia hlɔ̃ Pahalgam ƒe amedzidzedzea o. claim: Le November 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua zã ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe me si nye dɔlar miliɔn 750 tsɔ xe ga na Nyɔnuwo, Vidzĩwo, Kple Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖo Tɔxɛ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔa nutsitsi le November 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump zã ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe me si nye dɔlar miliɔn 750 tsɔ na Nyɔnuwo, Vidzĩwo, Kple Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Kpekpeɖeŋunana ƒe Ðoɖo Tɔxɛa nɔ dɔ wɔm. Sewɔtakpekpea mete ŋu na ƒe bliboa ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu na dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖo geɖewo o, siwo dome ɖoɖoa hã le — si woyɔna be WIC — elabena sewɔlawo gakpɔtɔ nɔ ʋuʋu ɖi le dziɖuɖua gbugbɔgaʋu ta. Posts siwo yɔ Politico ƒe nyatakaka aɖe gblɔ be wozã adzɔxexe ƒe ga si nye dɔlar miliɔn 450 le Oct. 31 dzi, le esi wotsɔ ga si woxe do ŋgɔ le October me megbe — eye wozã ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe me ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si nye dɔlar miliɔn 750 tsɔ lé WIC ɖe te. Nya siwo woŋlɔ la ʋã Snopes xlẽla geɖewo be woaɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye woadi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea atsɔ aɖo kpe edzi nenye be Trump dziɖuɖua zã ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe me si nye dɔlar miliɔn 750 ŋutɔŋutɔ be WIC nayi edzi anɔ dɔ wɔm hã. Nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe. Here’s a breakdown: Nya siawo tso Politico ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si wota le Nov. 3 dzi, si gblɔ be Trump dziɖuɖua "dzra dɔlar miliɔn 450 ɖo kpoo" na WIC tso ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe ƒe ga si womezã o me le Oct. 31 dzi — eƒe ga si woyɔna be "Akpa 32 ƒe ga" zazã zi evelia le dɔlar miliɔn 300 ƒe asitɔtrɔ le ɣletia ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe. Dziɖuɖu ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo li to OpenOMB nyatakakadzraɖoƒea dzi la ŋlɔ nu evea siaa ƒe asitɔtrɔ yi WIC. Togbɔ be nuŋlɔɖiawo megblɔ afisi ga la tso o hã la, Agbledenyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyanuɖela ɖo kpe edzi na Snopes to email dzi be dɔlar miliɔn 750 bliboa tso ga si wokpɔ tso adzɔxexe me — vevietɔ, Section 32 ƒe ga, abe alesi Politico ka nya tae ene. Habɔbɔ eve siwo mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o hã ɖo kpe nusiwo wotsɔ yi teƒe bubu dzi le wo ɖokui si. Le Nov. 3 dzi la, Dukɔa ƒe WIC Habɔbɔ gblɔ be "yewose be wotsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 450 kpee le dukɔa ƒe Section 32 ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu me" na WIC. White House ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Gazazãwo Kple Gazazãwo Gbɔe dze ga siawo tsɔtsɔ yi teƒe bubu gɔme eye dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ate ŋu akpɔ mɔ be yewoaxɔe le ŋkeke eve siwo gbɔna me, abe alesi habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o gblɔe ene. Food Research & Action Center ƒe nyanuɖela hã gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be Trump dziɖuɖua tsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 450 yi Akpa 32 lia ƒe ga me be woatsɔ ado alɔ WIC le Oct. 31. Esia nye zi evelia si wozã ga siawo tsɔ lé WIC ƒe viɖewo me ɖe asi le dɔlar miliɔn 300 ƒe ga si woma le ɣletia ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe, FRAC ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ. Section 32, si woɖo le Agbledede ƒe Asitɔtrɔ Se si wowɔ le ƒe 1935 me te la, xɔa dukɔmeviwo ƒe dukɔmeviwo ƒe gaxɔgbalẽviwo ƒe 30% tegbee le nusiwo katã wotsɔ tso ɣletigbalẽ ƒe si va yi me, le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka kpui aɖe nu. Ema fia be wodzraa ga si U.S. dziɖuɖua xɔna tso adzɔ siwo woxena ɖe adzɔnu siwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ ta ƒe akpa aɖe ɖe USDA ƒe gakɔnta tɔxɛ aɖe me. Egbea la, wozãa ga ma ƒe akpa gãtɔ tsɔ doa alɔ ɖeviwo ƒe nunyiame ŋuti ɖoɖowo, abe suku ƒe ŋdi kple ŋdɔnuɖuɖu ene, le CRS ƒe nya nu. Dukɔa ƒe WIC Habɔbɔ yɔ ga si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la be enye "afɔɖeɖe vevi aɖe" be woalé dɔwɔnawo me ɖe asi gake wode dzesii be enye "ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖo ko" si ƒe bliboa ƒe gazazãwo manɔmee. Georgia Machell, si nye ƒuƒoƒo si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o ƒe zimenɔla kple dɔdzikpɔlagã gblɔ be gakpekpeɖeŋua ate ŋu axɔ dɔwɔwɔ abe kwasiɖa etɔ̃ ene, togbɔ be dukɔwo ate ŋu agblẽ ga la kaba wu ne didia dzi ɖe edzi le tɔtɔ le dukɔa ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana ƒomevi bubuwo abe Nuɖuɖu Kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖo Kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖo ene me hã. USDA ɖo kpe edzi be yewomazã Section 32 ƒe ga na SNAP ƒe viɖewo le ƒe 2025 ƒe dziɖuɖua nutsitsidɔa me o, le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ le Nov. 3. Le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nyatakaka si wotsɔ yi ʋɔnui me la, Patrick A. Penn, si nye Nuɖuɖu, Nuɖuɖu, Kple Nuƒlelawo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe ƒe agbalẽŋlɔla teƒenɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le USDA, ɖe eme be ele be ga la nanɔ anyi be woatsɔ alé ɖeviwo ƒe nunyiame ƒe ɖoɖowo ɖe te tsɔ wu SNAP. Eŋlɔ bena: Mlɔeba la, USDA tso nya me be ele be Section 32 Child Nutrition Programme ƒe ga nanɔ anyi be woakpɔ Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti Ðoɖowo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ bliboe ta le ga ƒe bliboa me, le esi teƒe be woazãe na SNAP ƒe viɖewo. Section 32 Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti Ðoɖowɔha ƒe ga menye ga si woatsɔ awɔ nudzɔdzɔ kpatawoe na SNAP o. Dɔlar biliɔn geɖe zazã tso Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti Nusɔsrɔ̃ me na SNAP agblẽ dometsotso aɖe si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o le Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti gazazã me si mehiã be Sewɔtakpekpea natsɔ ƒe sia ƒe ƒe gazazãwo aɖoe kpɔ o, eye USDA mate ŋu agblɔ nusi Sewɔtakpekpea awɔ le nɔnɔme siawo me o. Penn te gbe ɖe vovototo vevi aɖe si le asitɔtrɔ yi WIC kple esiwo yi SNAP dome dzi: ga home siwo le eme. Egblɔ be "ga si sɔ le Ðeviwo ƒe Nuɖuɖu Ŋuti Ðoɖowo me be woatsɔ ado alɔ WIC," gake womate ŋu agblɔ nya ma ke le SNAP hã ŋu o, si abia dɔlar biliɔn 4 ya teti. Ke boŋ Trump dziɖuɖua le ga si ade dɔlar biliɔn 5 zãm le sep

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump do susua ɖa be ele be agbatsɔʋukula siwo zãa mɔ̃memi natrɔ ɖe mɔ̃memi ŋu be woaɖe ami ƒe asi dzi akpɔtɔ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump do susua ɖa be agbatsɔʋukulawo natrɔ tso diesel dzi ayi mɔ̃memi dzi be woaɖe ami ƒe asi dzi akpɔtɔ la kaka le March 2026. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Facebook zãla aɖe gblɔ le March 17 lia dzi (wodzrae ɖo be), "Forrest Trump le nu ƒom na agbatsɔʋukulawo ɖe Trump ta." Nyatakakaa ɖe nɔnɔmetata meme aɖe fia si ɖe Trump kple Ireland ƒe Dukplɔlagã Micheál Martin ƒe foto si wobɔbɔ nɔ Oval Office — si wogblɔ be wole gas-go dzĩ aɖe xa. Nya siwo woɖe fia le nɔnɔmetata la te xlẽ be, "Trump Do Aɖaŋu Na Lɔrikulawo Natrɔ Azu Mɔ̃memi Be Woaɖe Ami ƒe Gazazã Dzi Akpɔtɔ." (Johnnie Johnson/Facebook) Ŋutinya la kaka le kwasiɖa siwo kplɔ Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua kple Israel ƒe aʋawɔwɔ gɔme kple Iran le Feb. 28 megbe, si na U.S. ami ƒe asi wu dɔlar 100 ɖe amiɖaka ɖeka dzi. Amerikatɔwo ƒe Ʋu Habɔbɔ ka nya ta (wodzrae ɖo) be le February ƒe domedome kple March ƒe domedome dome la, gas ƒe asi si le dukɔa me le mama dedie nu le ami si wozãna edziedzi galɔn ɖeka ta dzi ɖe edzi dɔlar ɖeka kloe va ɖo dɔlar 3.84. Diesel hã ti kpo wu dɔlar ɖeka ŋutɔ va ɖo dɔlar 5.07. Edze abe ezãla aɖewo xɔe se be nya si Trump do susua ɖa be agbatsɔʋukulawo natrɔ tso diesel dzi ayi mɔ̃memi dzi la nye nyateƒe ene. Snopes xlẽlawo do ka kpli mí be yewoaku eƒe sedziwɔwɔ me, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nyabiase siwo woɖo ɖe amewo to e-mail dzi be "Ðe Trump gblɔ be ele be agbatsɔʋukulawo natrɔ tso diesel dzi ayi mɔ̃memi dzia?" kple "Ðe Trump gblɔ na agbatsɔʋukulawo be woazã mɔ̃memi ɖe diesel teƒea?" Nyakpakpae nya la nye. Edzɔ tso blog nyati aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le Fazzler.com, nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si tɔ alo etɔ yɔa emenyawo be fewuɖunyawo. Agbalẽŋlɔla ƒe ŋkɔ dze abe Randall ‘fink’ Finkelstein ene. Finkelstein da nɔnɔmetata meme la zi gbãtɔ le Facebook nyatakaka aɖe me (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si dze egɔme ale: Aɖaŋuɖoɖo bɔbɔe aɖewo, siwo dze ƒã ŋutɔ, siwo Dukplɔla Trump ɖo na Amerika ƒe agbatsɔʋukula miliɔn 3.5 le Kuɖagbe: ɖe nèbu ami bubua zazã ko ŋua? Esi Dukplɔla la nɔ nu ƒom le White House nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me la, eɖee fia be ewɔ nuku ŋutɔŋutɔ be diesel kple mɔ̃memi nye nu vovovowo, ede dzesii be yeƒe ʋu dzeani gbogboawo dometɔ aɖeke mehiã diesel kpɔ o, eye wòdo susua ɖa be ɖewohĩ agbatsɔʋudɔwɔƒewo adi be yewoatsɔ ema ade yewoƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ me. Amerika Lɔrifɔti Habɔbɔwo gblɔ be “wode dzesi kafukafua.” Randy Buell, si nɔ nukuwo hem yi dzi le mɔ I-35 dzi tso Laredo la, megblɔ nya aɖeke o eye ɖeko wòyi ʋua kuku dzi. Be míanya afisi nyaʋiʋlia dzɔ tso la, míezã mɔ̃ siwo dia nyatakakawo abe Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ene gbã. Ne ɖe Trump do susu ɖa ŋutɔŋutɔ be woazã mɔ̃memi na agbatsɔʋukulawo siwo tsɔa diesel ʋua la, anye ne nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla siwo si nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔwo le, abe The Associated Press alo Reuters ene, aƒo nu tso eŋu le afisiafi, eye numekuku mawo siwo wowɔ le didi me la ake ɖe kpeɖodzi mawo ŋu. Menɔ alea o. Fazzler ma nya sia zi gbãtɔ le March 17. Nyatia ƒe axaa ɖe nya "satire" fia le fli me le dzesi suewo me le ŋutinyaa te. Blog la ƒe "About" kadodo, si dze le nyatakakadzraɖoƒea ƒe afɔti me la, ɖe "Sewo Kple Nɔnɔmewo" ƒe axa aɖe fia si yɔ nya "satire" nukokoedonametɔe zi geɖe: Modzakaɖeɖe koe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia nye. Taflatse mègana viwòwo nazã nyatakakadzraɖoƒe sia o. Ne nane le ŋutinya siwo nèkpɔ le afisia dometɔ ɖeka me menye nyateƒe o la, ekema afia be nyakpakpae. Àte ŋu awɔ ema kokoko censorship manɔmee – wɔ nyakpakpa. Àte ŋu akpɔ fewuɖunyawo, eye esia hã nyo. Ne esia do dziku na wò la, àdi be yealé ŋku ɖe mɔ nyuitɔ siwo dzi nàto azã wò ɣeyiɣi ŋu wu dzikudodo le duƒuƒu me. Wò Chi anyo ɖe edzi. Nyagbe sia kplɔ esi do ŋgɔ nɛ ɖo le se nu. [...] Taflatse migatsɔ nya ɖe mía ŋu o. Nusitae nye esi. Ðɔɖɔɖo Gbãtɔa kpɔa fewuɖuɖu kple fewuɖunyawo ta be wonye nuƒoƒo kple nyagbɔgblɔ faa. Fazzler zãa ŋkɔ siwo woto vɛ le woƒe ŋutinyawo katã me, negbe le nɔnɔme siwo me wole fewu ɖum le dutoƒonuwɔlawo ŋu ko. Ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo zazã bubu ɖesiaɖe nyea nusi dzɔna le vo me eye wòdzɔna le vome. Etɔ̃lia, menye nuxlẽla siwo mexɔ ƒe 18 haɖe o alo amesiwo ƒe tsitsime mede ƒe 18 ya teti o lae wowɔ Fazzler na o. Be míade dzesi eƒe dzɔtsoƒe la, nɔnɔmetata meme si le Finkelstein ƒe Facebook nyatakaka me la ɖe tsidzesi aɖe fia na Fazzler.com. Zãla aɖe tsɔ mɔ̃memiɖaka dzĩ la kpe ɖe eŋu to nunya wɔwɔe alo nɔnɔmetatawo ɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔnu bubuwo zazã me. Míedo asi ɖe Fazzler tɔ alo etɔ gbɔ hena eƒe ŋuɖoɖo ɖe nyateƒe si wònye be ame aɖewo bu fewuɖunya la vodadatɔe be enye nyadzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ŋu. Míawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Nyakpakpa bubu siwo wotu ɖe nudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo alo amewo dzi nɔ Fazzler ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyati aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ƒe tanyae nye, "Disney Atu Modzakaɖebɔ le Gaza." Dzesiwo hã nɔ anyi be nyaʋiʋlia wɔla zã AI tsɔ wɔ nɔnɔmetata la katã alo eƒe akpa aɖe kple nyati ma, hã. Snopes ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe akpa mawo tɔgbe ɖa do ŋgɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me

claim: Bangladesh kriket bɔlƒola Mustafizur Rahman bia be woagbe IPL 2026 esi Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) ɖe asi le eŋu.
evidence: Kriket dzikpɔha le India (BCCI) de se na Kolkata Knight Riders nyitsɔ laa be woaɖe Bangladeshtɔ duƒula Mustafizur Rahman ɖa le ƒuƒoƒoa me hena ƒe 2026 IPL ƒe ɣeyiɣia. Le esia megbe la, Bangladesh Kriket Dɔwɔha ɖe gbeƒãe be yewomazɔ mɔ ayi India aɖakpɔ gome le T20 Xexeame Katã ƒe Kplɔ̃ɖoƒea me o, eye wogblɔ dedienɔnɔ ŋuti nyawo.  Le nɔnɔme sia dome la, wokaka video aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Mustafizur Rahman boycotted the IPL on live video" le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Le video ma me la, woateŋu ase Bangladeshtɔ pace bowler wòagblɔ be, "Nyemagaƒo IPL akpɔ gbeɖe o. Vlododo nye nye vlododo nye dukɔ. Akpe na Bangladeshtɔwo, amesiwo lɔ̃m vevie. Miɖe asi le IPL ŋu." (Archive Link) Kpeɖodziwo Meɖo kpe edzi le se nu o Ne wolé ŋku ɖe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo kple Mustafizur Rahman ƒe Facebook, Instagram, kple X (Twitter) nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo ŋu nyuie la, womekpɔ video alo nya aɖeke ma tɔgbe si ɖo kpe nya si kaka ɖe amewo dzi la dzi o.  Source of the original video identified A reverse image search of keyframes from the viral clip na to an original video uploaded by Jamuna TV on YouTube on December 17, 2025. Le video ma me la, wokpɔ Mustafizur wònɔ nu ƒom na eƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea le Bengaligbe me, hegblɔ be,"Hi KKR ƒe alɔdzedɔwɔƒea, nyee nye Mustafizur Rahman. Dzi dzɔm eye dzi dzɔm ŋutɔ be manye KKR ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe akpa aɖe. Míakpɔ mia kpuie."  Video ƒe asitɔtrɔ ɖo kpe edzi Ne wotsɔ dɔlékui ƒe klipi la kple Jamuna TV videoa sɔ kple wo nɔewo ɖe axadzi la ɖea nukpɔkpɔ siwo sɔ kple wo nɔewo fiana — megbenyawo, mo ƒe dzedzeme, kple fotoɖemɔ̃ ƒe dzogoe ɖeka — si ɖee fia be wogazã video gbãtɔa eye wotrɔe kple odio si wowɔ.  AI-detection results Hive Moderation (Hive Detect AI): 99% ƒe kakaɖedzi be videoa nye AI-si wowɔ.  Deepfake-O-Meter (LIPINC 2024 ƒe kpɔɖeŋu): 100% ƒe kakaɖedzi le AI wɔwɔ ŋu.  Nyametsotso Eyata eme kɔ ƒã be video si kaka si gblɔ be Mustafizur Rahman yɔ be woagbe IPL 2026 la nye alakpa. Enye video si wotsɔ AI wɔ.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe Mustafizur Rahman ɖe gbeƒãe be yeagbe IPL 2026?  Ao, megblɔ nya ma tɔgbe aɖeke o. Video si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye alakpa.  Q2. Afikae video gbãtɔa tso?  Jamuna TV ye da video gbãtɔa ɖe afima eye wòɖe Mustafizur fia wònɔ gbe dom na KKR-lɔ̃lawo nyuie.  Q3. Aleke wowɔ ɖo kpe videoa dzi be enye aʋatso?  Dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI abe Hive Detect AI kple Deepfake-O-Meter ene ɖo kpe edzi be wotsɔ amegbetɔ ƒe asi wɔ videoa.  Q4. Ðe nyatakaka aɖe li si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo si ɖo kpe nya si kaka ɖe amewo dzi la dzia?  Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe alo dziɖuɖumegã aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo megblɔ nya ma tɔgbe tso Mustafizur Rahman gbɔ o.  Dzɔtsoƒewo Video si Jamuna TV Atɔdzikpɔƒe ƒe Dzɔdzɔmeŋusẽ (Hive Detect AI) Deepfake-O-Meter da ɖe afima

Fact-CheckRS Team - Gaƒoƒo 8 ƒe গতিEVideo si me dzo bi le petrol pɔmpi aɖe me le Syria le ƒe 2025 me la kaka be Iran ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Israel ŋue 







Fact-CheckRS Team - Gaƒoƒo 8 tsaeAyatollah Ali Khamenei mele agbe o, video si woma la tso February 12 dzi 






Le February 28 lia dzi la, United States kple Israel dze ame dzi le teƒe vovovowo le Iran, eye fiadu Tehran hã nɔ eme. Le nudzɔdzɔ sia ta la, Iran da tu siwo tsɔ hlɔ̃biabia la dze United States ƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo le Titina Ɣedzeƒe dzi. Le nya sia me la, video aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi si gblɔ be enye afisi Iran dze United States ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le Riyadh, Saudi Arabia dzi le.

Kpɔ nya aɖewo siwo wokaka le Facebook dzi: afisia (Archive), afisia (Archive), afisia (Archive), afisia (Archive).
Wokpɔ nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Zulkarnain Saer si tso duta hã wònɔ video ma ke mam.
Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro
Rumor Scanner ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be video si wokaka la menye afisi Iran dze United States ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le Riyadh, Saudi Arabia dzi le o. Le nyateƒe me la, Israel dze Hodeidah melidzeƒe si le Yemen dzi le July 2024. Esia nye amedzidzedze ma ƒe video.
Esi wonɔ nya la me kum la, wokpɔ video aɖe si wota le July 20, 2024 dzi le Titina Ɣedzeƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe YouTube-dɔwɔƒe si nye RassdNews. Video si me míedzro la sɔ kple video si woyɔ.
Videowo Tsɔtsɔ Sɔ Kple Wo Nɔewo To Rumor Scanner Dzi
Video si woyɔ ƒe nyawo gblɔ be dzo gã aɖe bi le Hodeidah melidzeƒe le Yemen le Israel-srafowo ƒe tudada ta.
Emegbe esi wotsɔ nya vevi siwo sɔ di nya la, wonya be Israel dze Hodeidah melidzeƒe si le Yemen dzi le July 20, 2024 ƒe fiẽ me.
Edze be míade dzesii be Iran dze Saudi Arabia dzi le February 28 lia dzi.
Eyata wole video aɖe si ku ɖe Israel ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Yemen ŋu le July 2024 me la kakam nyitsɔ laa si me wogblɔ be enye teƒe si Iran dze Saudi Arabia dzi le; si nye alakpa.

RassdNews- Youtube ƒe Video
Human Rights Watch- Israel ƒe Yameʋuɖoɖowo Na Xaxa De to Na Ame Miliɔn Geɖewo le Yemen

Gulf News- Saudi Arabia gblɔ be yekpɔ mɔ awɔ nu ɖe eŋu le esi Iran dze Riyadh, Ɣedzeƒenutome dzi vɔ megbe

claim: Nuvlowɔwɔ le Minneapolis “ɖiɖi 25, 30% elabena míeɖe nuvlowɔla akpe geɖe ɖa le nutoa me.”
evidence: Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be yeƒe amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔwɔ na nuvlowɔwɔ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ le Minneapolis. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ do ŋgɔ na Super Bowl me la, NBC ƒe Tom Llamas bia nya Trump tso amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ŋu kwasiɖa aɖewo le esime dɔwɔlawo da tu Amerikatɔ eve, Renee Good kple Alex Pretti, wòku le Minneapolis megbe. "Nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe xexlẽme le Minnesota, le Minneapolis vevietɔ, ɖiɖi 25, 30% elabena míeɖe nuvlowɔla akpe geɖe ɖa le nutoa me," Trump gblɔ. "Amesiawo nye nuvlowɔla sesẽ siwo ge ɖe eme, wo dometɔ geɖe — wo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ to liƒo si le ʋuʋu ɖi dzi ge ɖe eme." Trump dziɖuɖua dze Operation Metro Surge gɔme le ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwuwu le Minnesota kple taɖodzinu si wogblɔ be yealé amewo le U.S. le se nu. Dukɔa ƒe amedzrowo ƒe dɔwɔlawo lé amedzro siwo wu 4,000 le dɔwɔwɔa me, White House gblɔ le Feb. 4. Gake megblɔ ame mawo dometɔ nenie wolé le Minneapolis alo ame siwo wolé de gaxɔ me dometɔ nenie si nuvlowɔwɔ ŋutinya le o. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be ame aɖewo siwo wolé le dɔwɔwɔa, alo dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔwɔwɔ bubu me, siwo si ɖoƒe le le se nu, nye U.S. dukɔmeviwo alo sitsoƒedilawo ƒe nyawo le wo si. Togbɔ be Minneapolis nuvlowɔwɔ aɖewo dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ nyitsɔ laa le ɣeyiɣi kpui si dzi Trump te gbe ɖo me hã la, xexlẽme siawo nɔ ɖiɖim xoxo do ŋgɔ na dɔwɔwɔa. Nyatakaka aɖeke meli si do ƒome kple dzidziɖedzi mawo kple dziɖuɖua ƒe amedzrowo ƒe ameléle si ŋu kakaɖedzi le o. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, nuvlowɔwɔ bubuwo dzi ɖe edzi le ɣeyiɣi si ŋu Trump ƒo nu tsoe me. White House ƒe liƒo dzi czar Tom Homan gblɔ be dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔwɔ aɖiɖi ɖe afima le kwasiɖa si gbɔna me. Esi wobia nyatakaka siwo le megbe na Trump ƒe nya la, White House ƒe nyanuɖela aɖe fia asi Minneapolis kpovitɔwo ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ ŋuti nyatakakaxɔ si ɖe amewuwu, adzodada kple adzodada ƒe xexlẽme fia le January kple February ƒe gɔmedzedze le ƒe 2026 me ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 2025. Here’s what data from Jan. 1 through Feb. 4, the date of Trump’s interview, show: 134 burglaries in 2026, down from 219 le ƒe 2025 me, si nye 39% ƒe ɖiɖi 71 adzodada le ƒe 2026 me, si ɖiɖi tso 95, si nye 25% ƒe ɖiɖi. Amewuwu eve le ƒe 2026 me, si ɖiɖi tso atɔ̃ dzi, xexlẽme evea siaa le sue akpa be woate ŋu abu wo be wosɔ le akɔntabubu nu. Ke hã, dugã me amewuwu ŋuti nyatakaka siwo dzi White House ɖo ŋu ɖo la meɖe alesi dziɖuɖua ƒe amedzrowo ƒe dɔwɔlawo da tu U.S. dukɔmevi eve wòku la o. Amewuwu fia ame bubu ƒe ku; mefia le eɖokui si be nuvlowɔwɔ aɖe dzɔ o. Atikewɔla si doe kpɔ la tso nya me be amewuwue Good kple Pretti wuwu nye, gake ku siwo ŋu kpovitɔwo ƒe dɔwɔƒea ku nu me le koe le dua ƒe dashboard dzi. Togbɔ be adzodada kple adzodada ƒe ɖiɖi sɔ kple Trump ƒe alafa memamã hã la, agɔdzedze bubu aɖewo dzi ɖe edzi: amedzidzedze dzi ɖe edzi 11% eye ʋufifi dzi ɖe edzi 26%. Míebia White House be kpeɖodzi kawoe le esi be gbegbe siwo wòyɔ la tso eƒe amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔlawo ƒe ameléle gbɔ. Wometsɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke na o. White House ƒe nyanuɖela Abigail Jackson gblɔ be: "Edze ƒã be nuvlowɔla siwo me afɔku le ɖeɖeɖa le ablɔwo dzi fia be womele nuvlowɔwɔ dzi ɖem kpɔtɔ o." Nuvlowɔwɔ ŋuti nunyalawo he susu yi kuxi geɖe siwo le Trump ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ŋu dzi: Ɣeyiɣi kpui si woɖo ɖi. James Densley, si nye nuvlowɔwɔ ŋuti nufialagã le Metropolitan State Yunivɛsiti le St. Paul gblɔ be gɔmesese aɖeke mele akɔntabubu nu be woatsɔ abe ɣleti ɖeka ene le ƒe eve me asɔ kple wo nɔewo o. "Nuvlowɔwɔ nyea ɣeyiɣi aɖe, ƒuƒlu, eye wòtrɔna le ɣeyiɣi suewo me. Kwasiɖa ɖeka ƒe yame ƒe dzoxɔxɔ alo fafa, gbevuhawo ƒe masɔmasɔwo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ, alo tɔtrɔ le vome gɔ̃ hã ate ŋu aʋuʋu xexlẽme siawo ŋutɔ." Nuvlowɔwɔ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ le Minneapolis xoxo. Ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ɖo eƒe kɔkɔƒe le ƒe 2021 kple 2022 me eye wòɖiɖi tso ɣemaɣi. Ema sɔ kple dukɔa ƒe nɔnɔmewo, eɖanye amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ka kee o. Minnesota Star Tribune kpɔe le ƒe 2025 ƒe adame be adzodada kple adzodada le ʋɛ wu ƒe 2019 tɔ, eye be amesiwo woda tu ƒe xexlẽme hã dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be amedzrowoe nye nusi gbɔ ɖiɖia tso o. Be dziɖuɖua ƒe ameléle nate ŋu ana adzodada kple adzodada ƒe ɖiɖi la, abia kpeɖodzi be nuvlowɔwɔ mawo ƒe akpa gã aɖe nye esiwo ʋuʋulawo wɔ. Trump dziɖuɖua yɔ ame siwo wɔ nuvlo kpɔ ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo, gake megblɔ ame 4,000 siwo katã wòlé la ŋuti nyatakaka tsitotsito o. Ema fia be míenya amedzro mawo dometɔ nenie si nuvlowɔwɔ ŋutinya nɔ o, eye nenye be wowɔ nuvlo nyitsɔ laa alo wowɔ nuvlowɔwɔ abe adzodada alo adzodada ene kpɔ o. Susu aɖewo li siwo ta míake ɖi le dziɖuɖua ƒe nɔnɔme si wògblɔna enuenu be ame siwo wole lém abe amedzrowo ƒe ʋuʋu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe akpa aɖe ene la tsi tre ɖi na agɔdzela "vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake le vɔ̃ɖitɔwo dome" ŋu. claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump tsɔ alakpatɔ aɖe si nɔ to hem la ke le esi wòfi ga si sɔ gbɔ sã wu esi woxɔ le ametafatafa gã aɖe si wowɔ le nyonyo ta le Minnesota si me nutoa me Somaliatɔwo ƒe nutoa me tɔwo kpɔ gome le ta.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Trump metsɔe ke ametafakala si ŋu nya ku ɖo, Philip Esformes o. Le ƒe 2020 me la, Trump ɖe eƒe ƒe 20 ƒe tohehea dzi kpɔtɔ va zu ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔ nɔ gaxɔ me. Esformes gakpɔtɔ ƒe agba le dɔlar miliɔn 44.2 si woatsɔ agbugbɔe ana kple nusiwo woxɔ le ame si. Wobu fɔ Esformes be efi dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 tso Medicaid kple Medicare gbɔ. Womekpɔ nya ga home bliboa si wofi le Minnesota haɖe o. U.S. Senyala ƒe Kpeɖeŋutɔ Gbãtɔ Joseph H. Thompson gblɔ be ɖewohĩ ametafatafalawo fi ga si ade dɔlar biliɔn 9 tso ƒe 2018 me tso nyonyo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖo vovovowo me. Minnesota Star Tribune ƒe akɔntabubu aɖe si wowɔ le December 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la kpɔ ga si wofi si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 217.7, eye dziɖuɖua ʋli nya le eŋu. Esi ŋutinyawo kaka le December 2025 me ku ɖe ametafatafa gã aɖe si wowɔ le nyonyo ta le Minnesota si me ame akpa gãtɔ siwo ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo la nye Somaliatɔwo ƒe dzidzimeviwo — si na wotsɔ nya ɖe wo ŋu be dukɔa ƒe Democrattɔwo ƒe ŋgɔnɔlawo ŋe aɖaba ƒu nuxlɔ̃amewo dzi — Republican U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe ɖeklemiɖelawo gblɔ nya aɖe be etsɔe ke ametafatafakala aɖe si le ƒe 20 ƒe tohehe me le esi wòfi ga geɖe wu sã ta. Nutsotso sia ƒe kpɔɖeŋu xɔŋkɔ ɖeka, si ku ɖe ametafatafa si wogblɔ be wowɔ le Minnesota si ku ɖe ŋkeke ɖeka dzikpɔƒewo ŋu la dze le X dzi le Dec. 29 dzi, eye wògblɔ be ametafatafakala si wogblɔ be wotsɔe ke lae nye Philip Esformes (wodzrae ɖo): Nya si wogblɔ le Facebook ƒe akpa bubu si wogblɔ be etsɔ ga home si "Somaliatɔwo ƒe ɖoɖo ɖeka ɖesiaɖe si le Minnesota nutome ƑUƑOƑO" fi la sɔ kple ga home si Esformes fi, si ʋli Esformes la, woble nu geɖe wu. Occupy Democrats hã na nya la gasẽ ɖe edzi. Abe alesi míegblɔe le ete ene la, nya si wogblɔ la nye alakpa le nya ɖeka ta: Trump metsɔe ke Esformes o. Ate ŋu anye be mesɔ o hã le alesi gbegbe ametafatafa si dzɔ le Minnesotae nu, togbɔ be womebu akɔnta le wo katã ŋu haɖe o hã. Wobu fɔ Esformes, si nɔ gaxɔ me tso July 2016 me la, le April 2019 me ɖe "lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe ametafatafa ƒe ɖoɖo gãtɔ kekeake si U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea tsɔ nya ɖe eŋu" ta, le DOJ ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si wogblɔ ɣemaɣi nu, eye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe tso afia nɛ le September ma me be wòanɔ gaxɔ me ƒe 20. Esformes xɔ dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 tso Medicaid kple Medicare ta alakpatɔe ɖe dɔ siwo mehiã o ta to eƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo kpena ɖe ame ŋu kple dɔnɔdzikpɔla bibiwo ƒe habɔbɔa dzi. Wotso afia na Esformes hã be wòagbugbɔ ga agbugbɔ axɔ eye wòaxɔ ga si ƒe home katã nye dɔlar miliɔn 44.2, eye wotso afia nɛ be wòaɖe asi le eŋu ƒe etɔ̃ le eƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ megbe. Le December 2020 me, esi wòsusɔ vie eƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ nawu enu la, Trump ɖe Esformes ƒe tohehea dzi kpɔtɔ. Tsɔtsɔke nye ame aɖe ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo tsɔtsɔke keŋkeŋ, evɔ tohehea dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ koe nye tohehe dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ. Le Esformes gome la, Trump trɔ eƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ wòzu ɣeyiɣi si wòtsɔ nɔ anyi, gake egblẽ eƒe tohehea ƒe akpa bubuawo katã ɖe teƒea, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye asiɖeɖe le eŋu le dzikpɔkpɔ te kple dɔlar miliɔn 5.5 gbugbɔgaxɔ kple dɔlar miliɔn 38.7 si woxɔ le ame si. Le ƒe 2023 me la, U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe Kɔkɔtɔ gbe be yemase Esformes ƒe nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃a o. Ne míagblɔe bubui la, Trump ƒe ɖeklemiɖelawo mesɔ esi wogblɔ be etsɔe ke Esformes o. Alesi gbegbe ametafatafa si dzɔ le Minnesota la me mekɔ haɖe o vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm. Le November 2025 me la, The New York Times ka nya ta be setɔwo le woƒe numekukua kekem ɖe enu yi ɖoɖo bubu siwo woɖo be woatsɔ afi nyonyo ƒe ga si wogblɔ be etsi tre ɖi na “dɔlar biliɔn ɖeka kple edzivɔ.” Ɣemaɣi la, wogblɔ be wotsɔ nya ɖe ame siwo wu 90 ŋu eye wobu fɔ ame siwo ade 60 kloe, eye wo dometɔ akpa gãtɔ nye Somaliatɔwo ƒe nutoa me tɔwo, le nyatakaka geɖe siwo tso nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe xɔŋkɔwo gbɔ nu. Minnesota Star Tribune ka nya ta le December ƒe gɔmedzedze be yebu akɔnta be yewofi ga dɔlar miliɔn 217.7, si wogblɔ be enye xexlẽme si ate ŋu adzi ɖe edzi. Dukɔa ƒe dziɖuɖumegãwo ʋli nya le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽa ƒe akɔntabubuwo ŋu, eye wogblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe me be yekpɔ “dɔlar miliɔn 300 le ametafatafa ƒe nubuname si ŋu kpeɖodzi le” le ɖoɖo ɖeka ɖeɖeko me eye be “ne wowu ametafatafa ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ siwo le edzi yim nu la, U.S. Senyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea atsɔ dɔlar biliɔn ɖeka atso ametafatafa ta.” Le Dec. 18 dzi la, U.S. Senyala ƒe Kpeɖeŋutɔ Gbãtɔ Joseph H. Thompson gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me be "ametafatafa si wɔ nuku ŋutɔ le dɔwɔƒewo" le Minnesota ate ŋu axɔ dɔlar biliɔn 18 si woɖo ɖi na dukɔa ƒe ga na hadomeɖoɖowo le nutoa me tso ƒe 2018 me la ƒe afã kple edzivɔ Accountability Office, si bu akɔnta be adzɔxelawo bu dɔlar biliɔn 100 va ɖo dɔlar biliɔn 135 le dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe nyawo me.) claim: U.S. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Barack Obama ɖe Britain ƒe Dukplɔlagã tsãtɔ Winston Churchill ƒe ŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔmetata le Oval Office eye wògbugbɔe ɖo ɖe England.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, amesi do ŋgɔ na Obama, George W. Bush, na Churchill ƒe bust nɔ Oval Office tso ƒe 2001 vaseɖe eƒe dukplɔlanyenye ƒe nuwuwu. Bust la nye ga si wodo tso U.K. Dziɖuɖua ƒe Nutatawo Nudzraɖoƒe. Esi Obama va xɔ zi dzi la, White House trɔ asi le bust si wodo la ŋu. Obama yi edzi ɖe Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata bubu aɖe fia le Nubablaxɔa godo le eƒe dukplɔlanyenye me. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be Bush ƒe bust si wòdo la zɔ mɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ trɔ yi Atlantik-ƒua dzi le Obama ƒe dukplɔlanyenye ƒe gɔmedzedze o. Nyatakaka siwo yɔ dutadɔnunɔlawo ƒe dɔwɔƒea ɖee fia be anyigbaʋuʋu ma gakpɔtɔ nɔ Britaintɔwo ƒe Dudɔnunɔla ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si le Washington, D.C., vaseɖe ƒe 2012 ya teti me. Amekae ɖoe be yeatrɔ Churchill ƒe bust si U.K. do na Bush la me mekɔ le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi o. Edze abe Obama do susua ɖa le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le ƒe 2016 me be yetso nya me be yeatsɔ Martin Luther King Jr. ƒe agbalẽ si wotsɔ ƒu gbe la dometɔ ɖeka aɖɔli Bush ƒe Churchill ƒe bust. Le March 2026 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gbugbɔ gblɔ nya aɖe si wògblɔ ƒe ewo enye sia be Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Barack Obama ɖe Britain ƒe Dukplɔlagã tsãtɔ Winston Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖe ɖa le Oval Office eye wògbugbɔe ɖo ɖe England. Esi Trump nɔ nu ƒom na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo kpe ɖe Irelandtɔwo ƒe Taoiseach (Dukplɔlagã) Micheál Martin ŋu le Patrick Kɔkɔe ƒe Ŋkeke dzi la, ewɔ asi na ame aɖe si ƒe akɔta le agbalẽdzraɖoƒe aɖe si le megbe nɛ eye wògblɔ be: Winston Churchill si megali o, gã lae nye ema. Eye Barack Hussein Obama medi be woaɖe yeƒe akɔta le ɔfis sia me o. Ènya esia? Eye Barack Hussein Obama gaɖo bust ma ɖe England. Mewɔe o, womedi o. Eye esi mege ɖe eme la, wobiaam be medi hã. Megblɔ be, "Kakaɖedzitɔe la, medie." Eye metsɔe da ɖe afima tututu. Winston Churchill ƒe agbalẽa me. Eteƒe medidi o Trump ƒe nyawo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo), afisi ezãla aɖewo gblɔna kaba be dukplɔla la ƒe nutsotso la menye nyateƒe o (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo). Snopes nuxlẽlawo hã ŋlɔ nu ɖe ​​eme, bia nya tso nya si wogblɔ ŋu. Snopes ƒe numekuku ɖee fia be ƒe 17 kple edzivɔ le Obama ƒe zi gbãtɔ megbe la, kakaɖedzimanɔamesi gakpɔtɔ le nusita White House ɖe Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata si Britain-Amerikatɔ nɔnɔmetatawɔla Jacob Epstein wɔ ɖa le ɖeɖefia me le Oval Office le ƒe 2009. Ne míebu nya siwo le etame ŋu la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe, alakpa kple nusiwo ŋu womeɖoe ɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Enye nyateƒe be Bush tsɔ Churchill ƒe bust si wòdo la ɖo ɖe Oval Office le eƒe dziɖuɣi si menɔ Obama ƒe dziɖuɣi o. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be bust la tso Atlantik-ƒua trɔ yi U.K. esi wòdzo le Oval Office vɔ megbe o. Nyatakaka aɖe si tso ƒe 2009 ƒe gɔmedzedze si yɔ Britaintɔwo ƒe Dudɔnunɔla ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si le Washington, D.C., gblɔ be White House trɔ Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata ma na Dutanyanyuigblɔƒe ma tsɔ wu be wòatrɔ ayi England-dukɔa me. Nyatakaka aɖe si wota emegbe le ƒe 2012 me kple nya bubu si tso Dutanyanyuigblɔƒea gblɔ be bust la gakpɔtɔ le U.S. Womenya nusi tututu tae bust ma dzo le White House le ɣeyiɣi si me Obama xɔ ɖoƒea lɔƒo o (eye wogale nenema kokoko). Nyatakaka siwo nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi gblɔ be ga si wodo na Bush la wu enu esi wònɔ zi dzi. Obama ŋutɔ do susua ɖa le ƒe 2016 ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me be yeɖoe be yeatsɔ dukɔmeviwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo taʋlila Martin Luther King Jr. ƒe ŋutilã ƒe nɔnɔmetata aɖɔ li Churchill ƒe bust. Míeƒo ka na Obama Foundation be míase nusi tututu dzɔ ɖe Churchill ƒe bust si wodo na Bush dzi gɔme eye míalala ŋuɖoɖo na míaƒe biabiawo. White House Ŋutinya Habɔbɔ, si kpena ɖe ame ŋu be woaxɔ nusiwo woatsɔ aƒo ƒu ɖe White House tegbee ahakpɔ wo ta la gbe be yemaƒo nu tso alesi wogbãe alo woɖee ɖa ŋu o. Le ƒe 2016 me la, esime wònɔ nu ƒom na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo kpe ɖe U.K. Prime Minister David Cameron, Obama tsɔ eƒe numeɖeɖe na le nusi dzɔ ɖe Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata si woɖe le Epstein dzi le ƒe 2009 ƒe gɔmedzedze ŋu le mɔ aɖe nu la, ɖe mɔ nam be mɔnukpɔkpɔ nasu asinye be maxɔ ɖoƒe sia. Obama ɖɔ nyametsotsoa be enye "nye tamebubu," edze abe ɖe wòfia be ewɔ nyametsotso vevie be yeaɖɔli Churchill ƒe bust la kple King tɔ ene. Obama gblɔ le takpekpe ma ke me be yetsɔ Churchill ƒe nɔnɔmetata bubu da ɖe White House ƒe Nubablaxɔa godo, si yezãna abe ɔfis ene, eye be yekpɔa nɔnɔmetata la "gbesiagbe." Le February 2009 me, anɔ abe ɣleti ɖeka ene le Obama ƒe zidzinɔɣi megbe la, Britaintɔwo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si nye Telegraph hã ka nya ta nenema ke be Obama “se.”

claim: Florida: #51 le susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me, #1 le aƒeme nugblẽfexeɖoɖowo me, #1 le ame tsitsiwo ƒe ametafatafa me, #1 le aƒexɔfetu dziyiyi me.
evidence: Ðe Florida ye nye dukɔ si gblẽ wu le dukɔa me le susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ, ame tsitsiwo ƒe ametafatafa, aƒetɔwo ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖowo kple aƒexɔfetu dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ mea?Nya siae California Dziɖuɖumegã Gavin Newsom gblɔ.Democrattɔwo ƒe nutodziɖula nɔ nu te gbe ɖe nuto siwo dzi Republicantɔwo ɖuna ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔwo dzi le X nyatakaka kple nya siwo wògblɔ nyitsɔ laa me. Le June me, le Los Angeles ƒe tsitretsiɖeŋu le ICE ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le dua me ŋu dome la, Newsom wɔ avu kple Republicantɔwo ƒe nutodziɖulawo le woƒe nutoawo ƒe amewuwu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ta. Le July me la, etsɔ California ƒe dukɔa ƒe nudzɔdzɔwo sɔ kple esiwo Texas wɔna. Fifia he’s on to Florida, afisi wògblɔ be mɔfiame siwo tso Trump dziɖuɖua kple Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis gbɔ be woaɖe ablɔdzi dzesi siwo ɖoa ŋku LGBTQ+ ƒe gomenɔamesiwo dzi la ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ ɖo nɔƒe gbãtɔ siwo mesɔ o fia. Ðoɖoawo ate ŋu akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe mɔ siwo dzi wota dziŋgɔli le le Florida katã, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye St. Petersburg, West Palm Beach kple Fort Lauderdale. "Florida: #51 le susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ me, #1 le aƒeme nugblẽfexexe ƒe gazazãwo me, #1 le ame tsitsiwo ƒe ametafatafa me, #1 le hayahaya ƒe dziyiyi me. Gake mina míaɖe... dziŋgɔli ƒe afɔtoƒewo dzi. Xaxa la keŋkeŋ," Newsom ŋlɔ le July 18 dzi le X.Newsom ƒe nyateƒetoto tsaka. Le blibo me la, numekukuwo ɖee fia be Florida tsi megbe le nuto siawo katã kloe me, gake womeɖea dukɔa fiana ɣesiaɣi be dukɔa ƒu du ku mamlɛtɔ le wo dometɔ ɖesiaɖe me o. No. 51 na susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔa? Florida le nɔƒe si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi le hatsotso sia me ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia. Míekpɔ nyatakaka etɔ̃ siwo ɖe dukɔa fia mamlɛtɔ alo evelia va ɖo mamlɛtɔ le susu ƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ŋu — ɖeka tso ƒe 2025 me eye eve siwo wotu ɖe nyatakaka siwo xɔ ƒe ewo ya teti dzi. Gake ɖoƒe bubuwo na wònyo vie wu. Nyatakaka aɖe si Rehabs.com ta le April 2025 me si zã nyatakaka siwo tso Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration gbɔ, gblɔ be Florida zã ga home suetɔ kekeake si ame ɖeka zã le nuto ɖesiaɖe me ɖe susu ƒe lãmesẽ ŋu — $36.05. Ne wotsɔe sɔ kple esia la, nuto si me wozãa ga geɖe le wu le susumedɔlélewo ta, si nye Maine, zã dɔlar 362.75 na ame ɖeka. Mental Health America, si nye susumedɔlélewo kple agbe nyui nɔnɔ ƒe habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o, tsɔ ƒe 2024 ƒe nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe tagbɔdɔléle ƒe bɔbɔ bliboa kple beléle xɔxɔ ŋu tsɔ Florida ɖo nɔƒe 21 lia le susu ƒe lãmesẽ gome. Eyata, Florida nyo vie wu dukɔa ƒe afã le dzidzenu ma nu. Le May 2023 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me la, Florida Kɔdzi Habɔbɔ tsɔ Florida ɖo nɔƒe 46 lia le dukɔa me le susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔwo gome, si wɔe be wònye nuto vɔ̃ɖitɔwo dometɔ ɖeka. Afɔɖeɖea lɔ lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo, atikewɔwɔ, nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe nyonyome kple gazazã, hehe tɔxɛ xɔxɔ kple susumedɔlélewo ŋuti dɔwɔlawo ƒe amesinɔnɔ ɖe eme. Le January me la, Forbes tsɔ Florida ɖo dukɔ enelia si me susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔ gblẽ wu, eye wòkpɔe be amesiwo ŋu tagbɔdɔléle le le nuto ma me mekpɔa beléle o le esi wòxɔa ga geɖe le lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ta kple susumedɔlélewo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒewo ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ ta.Newsom ƒe dɔwɔƒea fia asi PolitiFact ɖe ƒe 2020 ƒe dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe gã ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si srɔ̃ nu tso sukuwo ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu le tudada ame gbogbo aɖewo le ƒe 2018 me le Marjory Stoneman Douglas Sekɛndrisuku le Parkland, Florida, si tudala aɖe si woda dɔ na le susu ƒe lãmesẽnyawo ta la megbe. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be Florida ƒe susumedɔlélewo ƒe ɖoɖoa mewɔ ɖeka o eye ga mele eme o, eye wògblɔ be enaa ga sue aɖe ame ɖeka wu nuto bubu ɖesiaɖe, eye wòyɔ nɔnɔmetata aɖe si tso ƒe 2016 Dukɔa ƒe Tagbɔdɔléle Ŋuti Ðoɖowɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyatakaka aɖe me. "Togbɔ be wowɔ nɔnɔmetata sia tso ganyawo ŋuti nyatakaka siwo tso ƒe 2015 ƒe gaŋutiɖoɖoa me me hã la," adaŋudeha gã la ŋlɔ ɖe etenuŋɔŋlɔ aɖe me be, "Florida gakpɔtɔ nye dukɔ si le ɖoƒe si bɔbɔ wu le susu ƒe lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ kple atikewɔwɔ ƒe gazazã gome vaseɖe ƒe 2019-20 me, eye míekpɔ susu aɖeke si tae nɔnɔme ma mayi edzi vaseɖe etsɔme si woate ŋu akpɔ do ŋgɔ ne Sewɔtakpekpea kple Nutomedziɖula ƒe nudede eme manɔmee o." Ƒuƒoƒoa megblɔ nya bubu siwo woyɔ tso Florida ƒe ɖoƒe ŋu o. Newsom hã he susu yi ƒe 2017 ƒe PolitiFact ƒe nyatakaka siwo wòtsɔ da habɔbɔa ƒe nusi ŋu woke ɖo si tsɔ Florida ɖo nɔƒe 51 le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe 52 dome (elɔ Washington, D.C., kple Puerto Rico ɖe eme) le dukɔa ƒe susumedɔléle ŋuti gazazãwo me. Ðoƒe sia hã do xoxo, le ga ƒe 2014 ƒe nyatakakawo nu. Dukɔ 1 lia le aƒe ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe gazazãwo gomea?Nya aɖe le Newsom si be zi geɖe la, Florida nɔa aƒeme nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe gazazãwo ƒe nuwuwu — abe eya ŋutɔ ƒe nuto ene — le alesi wòdoa go dzɔdzɔmefɔku siwo dome ahom sesẽwo hã le ta.Gake ɖe wònye esi xɔ asi wu fifiaa? Ðoƒewo le anyigbatataa katã dzi. Ame aɖewo tsɔ Florida ɖo tippy-top, gake ame bubuwo ɖee fia be ekɔ, gake menye kɔkɔtɔ o. Newsom ƒe dɔwɔƒea ma nyatakaka siwo gblɔ be Florida ye xɔ aƒe ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo si lolo wu le mamã dedie nu, kpakple September 2024 U.S. Census Bureau ƒe nyatakaka si gblɔ be aƒetɔ miliɔn 1.2 ye le Florida siwo xea dɔlar 4,000 ƒe sia ƒe alo esi wu nenema ɖe aƒetɔ ƒe nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ta, si nye s

claim: Bilawal Bhutto Zardari gblɔ be Pakistan dɔwɔlawo bɔbɔ nɔ India Sewɔtakpekpe me.
evidence: Wole video aɖe si wogblɔ be Pakistan Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Dunyaheha ƒe zimenɔla Bilawal Bhutto Zardari ɖe gbeƒãe be ‘Pak dɔwɔlawo le India Sewɔtakpekpea me’ le nuƒo aɖe si wòƒo na eƒe dukɔa ƒe Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me la le mam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le afisiafi.  Wogblɔ be video si woɖe ɖe akpa vovovowo me la ɖe Bhutto Zardari fia wònɔ nu ƒom na Pakistan sewɔtakpekpea gblɔ be, "Amekae dzea ame dzi le zã ƒe viviti me? Míate ŋu akaka míaƒe nyatakaka gbegblẽwo gɔ̃ hã le India ƒe Dukplɔlagã ŋkume le Sewɔtakpekpea me... Míaƒe amewo bɔbɔ nɔ woƒe (India) Sewɔtakpekpea me." Tsɔ kpe ɖe esia ŋu la, video klipi la ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Gaurav Gogoi ƒe nuƒo si wòƒo nyitsɔ laa le Lok Sabha me ku ɖe Operation Sindoor ŋu hã fia.  Gake Newschecker kpɔe be wotrɔ asi le videoa ŋu.  Screengrab from X post by @Starboy2079 Woateŋu akpɔ nya siawo tɔgbe le afisia, afisia kple afisia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: 'EPIC' Do kpo nu Na Tejashwi Yadav? Drama Over Special Intensive Revision Raises Several Questions Ahead Of Bihar Polls Fact Check/Verification Nya veviwo didi ɖe "Bilawal Bhutto," "amewo" kple "India Sewɔtakpekpe" ŋu le Google dzi mekpɔ emetsonu aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ɖo kpe nya si kaka ɖe amewo dzi la dzi o.    Emegbe míewɔ nɔnɔmetata didi le megbe le video si ɖe Bilawal Bhutto fia ƒe keyframes dzi si kplɔ mí yi YouTube nyatakaka aɖe si PTV Sewɔtakpekpea ŋlɔ, si me woɖe nyadɔdrɔ̃ siwo wowɔ le Pakistan Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me le May 7, 2025. Anɔ abe miniti 41:14 ene le videoa me la, woate ŋu ase Bhutto wòaƒo nu na takpekpea le India ƒe Operation Sindoor ŋu eye wòagblɔ be, "...Amekae dze ame dzi le... dark of night?Fiafitɔwo dzea wo dzi le zã ƒe viviti me.Ne ɖe dzi nɔ wo ƒo la, anye ne woɖe gbeƒã aʋawɔwɔ le ŋkeke me video.Ke hã, womese Pakistan kplɔla la le nya siwo wogblɔ be egblɔ tso "ame siwo le India Sewɔtakpekpea me" ŋu o, abe alesi wogblɔnɛ le afisiafi ene la, woate ŋu akpɔ nukpɔkpɔ eveawo siaa le ete (L-R) Screengrab from viral video and screengrab from YouTube video by PTV Parliament Gawu la, Pakistan Dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe YouTube channel si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo hã ma eƒe nuƒoa le May 7, 2025. Esia hã megblɔe o tsɔ nya si wogblɔ be ewɔe, si ɖo kpe edzi be wowɔ asitɔtrɔ le dɔlékui ƒe klipi la ŋu.Le numekuku wɔwɔ me nyuie le dɔlékui ƒe klipi la ŋu la, míede dzesii be emegbe míeƒu du odio klipi la to AI gbeɖiɖi didi ƒe dɔwɔnu geɖewo dzi Togbɔ be mɔ̃ akpa gãtɔ mekpɔ dzesi siwo le AI dzi odio ŋu o hã la, Resemble AI termed the voice as "Fake." claim: Ame siwo si nugblẽfexeɖoɖo le to Affordable Care Act dzi akpɔ “nugblẽfexexe ƒe dzidziɖedzi 75% tso Nov. 1 dzi” ne womekeke gakpekpeɖeŋu siwo wodo ɖe ŋgɔ ɖe enu o, si me “nugblẽfexexe ƒe dzidziɖedzi zi gbɔ zi eve le kɔƒenutowo me” hã le.
evidence: Esi Republicantɔwo kple Democrattɔwo nɔ didim be yewoatɔ te dziɖuɖua le Oct. 1 dzi la, akpa eveawo wɔ dzre le nenye be woada asi ɖe dziɖuɖua ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu didi dzadzɛ dzi, abe alesi Republicantɔwo di ene, alo woakeke Affordable Care Act ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu siwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia wu enu ɖe ​​enu, abe alesi Democrattɔwo di ene. Le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le CBS ƒe "Face the Nation" — si woɖe ɖe go le Sept. 28, ŋkeke etɔ̃ hafi woɖoe be dziɖuɖua ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu nawu enu — Sen. Amy Klobuchar, D-Minn., gblɔ be ne Republicantɔwo mete ŋu didi gakpekpeɖeŋu siwo ƒe ɣeyiɣia wu enu o la, Amerikatɔ geɖe akpɔ afɔku gã aɖe le woƒe lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo siwo wodona le kotoku me la me. Klobuchar gblɔ be woaƒo Amerikatɔ siwo le kɔƒenutowo me, siwo dome agbledelawo hã le, wòagbɔ eme. Klobuchar gblɔ be: "Republicantɔwo he lãmesẽnyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe kuxi aɖe vɛ." "Nye dukɔmeviwo, Amerikatɔwo, le tsitre ɖe agakpe aɖe dzi fifia kple nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe dzidziɖedzi siawo siwo le wo dzi. Eyata, Democrattɔwo wɔ ɖeka le esia tutu me hele gbɔgblɔm be, kpɔ ɖa, mina míawɔ nane tso xaxa sia ŋu hafi wòatsi megbe akpa — nugblẽfexexe ƒe dzidziɖedzi 75% adze egɔme tso Nov. 1 dzi le ame siwo nye asitsaha suewo tɔ, ame siwo nye agbledelawo le afima, zi gbɔ zi eve le kɔƒenutowo me." Míebu 75% ƒe nuƒoƒo ƒe nya la be enye Nyateƒee tsã. (Ƒuƒoƒo si bu akɔnta ma emegbe doe ɖe dzi va ɖo 114%.) Woate ŋu aɖe Klobuchar ƒe "si sɔ gbɔ wu zi gbɔ zi eve" ƒe tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo gɔme le mɔ siwo wu ɖeka nu. To nuxexlẽ mawo dometɔ ɖeka dzi — esi eƒe dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be yeɖoe, be kɔƒenutometɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme la akpɔe be yewoƒe kotoku me gazazãwo adzi ɖe edzi zi gbɔ zi eve — Klobuchar ƒe nya sɔ. Ame siwo zãa Affordable Care Act’s ƒe asiwo ate ŋu aƒle lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo tso nugblẽfexeha siwo le nugblẽfexeɖoɖo ƒe ɖoɖo vovovowo me kple nugblẽfexexe ƒe gazazã vovovowo me. Nuƒlela akpa gãtɔ xɔa gakpekpeɖeŋu, ne wowɔ ɖe gakpɔkpɔ ŋuti mɔfiamewo dzi ko. Le ƒe 2021 me la, Dukplɔla Joe Biden si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi de asi se aɖe te si na be Affordable Care Act ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋunana nye dɔmenyonyo wu. Sea ɖe ga home gãtɔ si wòle be nuƒlelawo naxe ɖe nusiwo woatsɔ axe fe ɖe eta ta dzi kpɔtɔ eye wòna woate ŋu ana kpekpeɖeŋu aƒe siwo ƒe fetu wu 400% le dukɔa ƒe ahedada ƒe seƒe. Do ŋgɔ la, woɖoa gakpekpeɖeŋuawo ƒe seɖoƒe na ahedada ƒe seɖoƒe si woɖo na aƒe aɖe ƒe 400%. Le ƒe 2024 me la, ema nye dɔlar 60,240 na ame ɖeka ƒe aƒe. Xexlẽme ma dzina ɖe edzi le amesiwo le aƒea me ƒe xexlẽme nu. Sewɔtakpekpea gbugbɔ gakpekpeɖeŋu siawo siwo wodo ɖe ŋgɔ la wɔ yeye le ƒe 2022 me vaseɖe ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwuwu, eyata wole klalo fifia be woawu enu. Kpekpeɖeŋunanaawo va zu nusi ŋu amewo lɔ̃a nu le. Ame siwo xɔa wo ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi tso miliɔn 12 le ƒe 2021 me va ɖo miliɔn 21.4 le ƒe 2024 me, le numekuku aɖe si KFF, si nye lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti numekuha aɖe wɔ le dukɔa ƒe nyatakakawo ŋu nu. KFF zã ƒe 2024 ƒe dukɔa ƒe nyatakakawo tsɔ bu ƒe sia ƒe ƒe fetu si woxɔna le mama dedie nu na amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme siwo xɔ gakpekpeɖeŋu si wodo ɖe ŋgɔ. Dziɖuɖua xe dɔlar 5,727 le ga si woxena ɖe eta katã me le Affordable Care Act ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana ƒe se gbãtɔwo nu. Dɔlar 888 bubu do tso viɖekpɔla la ƒe kotoku me. Kpekpeɖeŋunana ƒe ɖoɖo si wodo ɖe ŋgɔ la xɔ akpa mamlɛtɔ, si nye dɔlar 705. Ne gakpekpeɖeŋu si wodo ɖe ŋgɔ la bu eye wòva hiã be amesi ŋlɔ ŋkɔ na la naxe dɔlar 888 kple dɔlar 705 siaa la, ke ema katã anye dɔlar 1,593. Ema ade 79% wu esi ame ɖeka ma ke nɔ fe xem kple gakpekpeɖeŋu siwo wodo ɖe ŋgɔ si nɔ anyi — si gogo Klobuchar ƒe 75% ƒe xexlẽme. Le Sept. 30, ŋkeke eve le Klobuchar ƒe nyawo megbe la, KFF ɖe akɔntabubu yeye aɖe ɖe go si ɖee fia be ga si wodo tso kotoku me ƒe dzidziɖedzi si lolo wu gɔ̃ hã nye 114%, si xɔ ɖe ƒuƒoƒoa ƒe xexlẽme si nɔ anyi tsã si nye 79% teƒe. Mɔ eve ya teti li si dzi woato aɖe Klobuchar ƒe nya la gɔme: be enɔ kɔƒenutometɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme ƒe gazazãwo sɔ kple ame siwo le teƒe bubuwo, alo nɔ woƒe gazazãwo sɔ kple esiwo woxe va yi. Klobuchar ƒe dɔwɔƒea gblɔ na PolitiFact be sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ la ƒo nu tso kɔƒenutometɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe woƒe kotoku me ƒe gazazãwo ƒe dzidziɖedzi zi gbɔ zi eve ne wotsɔe sɔ kple nusi woaxe ne woyi gakpekpeɖeŋu siwo wodo ɖe ŋgɔ dzi. (That aligns with what Klobuchar has said in other settings.) This is accurate, according to an analysis by the Century Foundation, which describes itself as a "progressive, independent think tank" and which Klobuchar’s office told PolitiFact is the source of her talking point about rural impact, The Century Foundation analysis concluded that out-of-pocket insurance costs in rural counties would increase on average tso $713 va ɖo $1,473 — si nye dzidziɖedzi 107%, alo esi wu zi gbɔ zi eve vie. To vovo na ema la, dzidziɖedzia na amewo le dugã me nutowo me nye 89%. Gake kpeɖodzi ʋɛ aɖewo koe li si ɖo kpe gɔmeɖeɖe si ame aɖewo ate ŋu akpɔ tso Klobuchar ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa me dzi: be kɔƒenutometɔ siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe eme la akpɔ afɔku si lolo wu amesiwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe teƒe bubuwo zi gbɔ zi eve. Century Foundation ƒe numekukua ɖee fia be menye nenemae o. Le August me numekukua me la, Century Foundation ma...

claim: Sri Lanka ƒe dziɖuɖumegã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe nya si wògblɔ tso kufiatsotso ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyametsotso ŋu
evidence: "Le ame 12 siwo wotso kufia na dome la, ame ɖeka pɛ hã metso Malimawa o. Wonye JVP kple Peratugami -- Dudɔnunɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Chathuranga Abeysinghe me tɔwo," Sinhalagbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotsyɔ ɖe Facebook nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woma le February 11, 2026 dzi la xlẽ. Chathuranga Abeysinghe, eye wòɖe nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Newswire ƒe dzesi (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia) fia.  "Malimawa" -- nya si gɔmee nye "kɔmpas" -- fia dukɔa ƒe miamedziɖuha si Dukplɔla Anura Kumara Dissanayake ƒe Janatha Vimukthi Peramuna (JVP) habɔbɔ le ŋgɔ na, ​​esime "Peratugami" fia Frontline Socialist Party, si nye JVP ƒe akpa aɖe si ɖe eɖokui ɖa (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia, afisia kple afisia).  Wokaka nɔnɔmetata si wowɔ la ɖe teƒe bubuwo hã le Facebook dzi to ezãla siwo da nyatakaka siwo do alɔ tsitretsiɖeŋulawo kple eƒe nya si wògblɔ be mamawo le dziɖuɖu ƒe habɔbɔa me la gbɔ -- nya si dziɖuɖua gbe (archived link).  Image Screenshot of the false post captured on February 12 with a red X added by AFP Ekaka esi Sri Lanka ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe aɖe tso kufia na ŋutsu 12 le February 11 dzi le sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Amarakeerthi Athukorala wuwu le ʋiʋli siwo wowɔ le ƒe 2022 me si mu dukplɔla tsãtɔ Gotabaya Rajapaksa ƒe dziɖuɖua me ta (archived link).  Numekulawo gblɔ na ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea be wowu Athukorala, si nye kplɔla tsãtɔ ƒe akpaa me tɔ la esi wòda tu ame siwo xe mɔ na eƒe ʋu le du si nye Nittambuwa me, le fiadu Colombo godo (archived link).  Nyawo ɖee fia be ezãla aɖewo xɔe se be nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata la nye nyateƒe, eye ɖeka gblɔ be JVP me tɔwoe "tu sɔhɛwo yi dzomavɔ me eye wogblẽ woƒe agbenɔnɔ dome".  Gake nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di le Google dzi na be Sri Lanka nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye Newswire ŋlɔ ɖe Instagram dzi le February 12 lia dzi be yewometa nɔnɔmetata la o (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe).  "Dukɔa ƒe Nyatakaka - Fake Post ƒe nuxlɔ̃ame," nyatakakaa xlẽ. "Aʋatsonya aɖe le kakam ɖe Facebook dzi fifia to Newswire ƒe nɔnɔmetata zazã me eye wogblɔe alakpatɔe be etso Minista ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Chathuranga Abeysinghe gbɔ."  Image Screenshot of the Newswire Instagram post captured on February 12, 2026 Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea gblɔ na AFP le e-mail me be wozã nɔnɔmetata si ɖi eƒe nɔnɔme mɔɖeɖe manɔmee tsɔ wɔ alakpa nyatakakaa.  Egblɔ kpee be: "Míate ŋu aɖo kpe edzi be Newswire meta nyatakaka aɖeke si me nya si woyɔ si wogblɔ be etso Dziɖuɖumegã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Chathuranga Abeysinghe gbɔ ku ɖe ame 12 siwo wotso kufia na ŋu o."  Didi le subɔsubɔhakplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe Facebook axa si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi ɖee fia be Abeysinghe ta nya aɖe le February 12 dzi tsɔ gbe nya sia (archived link).  Egblɔ na AFP hã to WhatsApp dzi le ŋkeke ma ke dzi be yemegblɔ nya aɖeke le dutoƒo tso nya sia ŋu tso esime wotso afia nɛ o.  Nɔnɔmetata si woɖe ɖe vovo si wodi le megbe la ɖee fia be woɖe nɔnɔmetata si wozã le alakpanyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata me la tso video aɖe si me wònɔ nu ƒom na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo tso dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖoɖo si nye Clean Sri Lanka ŋu le wɔna aɖe megbe le January 12, 2025 dzi (archived link).  Image Screenshot tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple nɔnɔmetata si wowɔ (L) kple video si me subɔsubɔhakplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le si woda ɖe YouTube dzi le January 12, 2025 dzi la, AFP tsɔ nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wowɔ tsɔ tsɔ nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo wowɔ tsɔ tsi tre ɖe alakpanya bubu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe dziɖuɖua kple tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ŋu la ɖa va yi.

claim: Le August 2025 me la, Florida Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Rick Scott ɖe ga si wu dɔlar miliɔn 26 ɖe go le adzɔnuwo ƒe asitsatsa me le ƒe ɖeka kple edzivɔ megbe wu ɣeyiɣi mamlɛtɔ si se bia.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Sea bia tso Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔwo katã si be woaɖe asitsatsa ɖesiaɖe si ƒe home wu dɔlar 1,000 afia le ŋkeke 30 me tso esime wodzra wo. Scott ɖe asitsatsaawo ɖe go ɖe game dzi. Le August 2025 me la, etsɔ ɖɔɖɔɖowo de asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka vovovo ene me, gake wometsɔ asitsatsa yeyewo kpee o. Le August 2025 me la, X-kɔnta si nye Unusual Whales ŋlɔ nya aɖe ɖe Internet dzi be U.S. Sen. Rick Scott, si nye Florida Republicantɔ, ɖe ga si wu dɔlar miliɔn 26 ɖe go le adzɔnuwo ƒe asitsatsa me “le ƒe ɖeka kple edzivɔ megbe.” Nyatakakaɖeɖe ɖe go megbe alea anye dukɔa ƒe se dzi dada, si bia tso Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔwo katã (kple ame aɖewo siwo ƒo xlã wo) si be woaɖe nunɔamesi ɖesiaɖe si ƒe home wu dɔlar 1,000 ƒe asitsatsa ɖesiaɖe afia le ŋkeke 30 me. Nya sia kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eye Snopes nuxlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ nyatakaka bubuwo dim tso nyatakaka siwo wogblɔ be wohe ɖe megbe ŋu. Gake míekpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la nye alakpa, le susu geɖe ta. Míeƒo ka na Unusual Whales kple Scott abe míaƒe nyatakakawo nana ŋutinya sia ƒe akpa aɖe ene. Scott ƒe kadododzikpɔla fia asi nya aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔa ƒe X-dzesi dzi si yɔ be Unusual Whales ƒe nyatakakaa be mesɔ o la mí. Gbã la, Snopes dze agbagba be yeanya asitsatsa siwo tututu ŋu posu la nɔ nu ƒom tsoe. Esi míedi Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si ku ɖe ganyawo ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu be woakpɔ Scott ƒe ŋkɔ la, wokpɔe be le Aug. 13, 2025 dzi la, etsɔ "ɖɔɖɔɖo" ene de asi na asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka siwo wòtsɔna ɣeaɖewoɣi le ƒe 2024 katã me. Nuŋlɔɖi siwo trɔ asi le nyatakaka siwo wotsɔ yi ʋɔnui gbã le ƒe 2024 me ƒe anyinɔnɔ ƒe akpa gãtɔ ɖe nya si wogblɔ be Scott tsɔ nyatakakaawo yi "nusi wu ƒe ɖeka megbe" fia. (Ðɔɖɔɖoawo dometɔ ɖekae nye be woatsɔ nyatakaka aɖe ana le December 2024 me, le ƒe ɖeka me tso August 2025 ƒe dɔa dzi.) Togbɔ be womebia tso Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔwo si be woagblɔ ga home si tututu wokpɔna le asitsatsa me o hã la, wobia tso wo si be woatsɔ ga homea ade vovototo aɖe me. Asitsatsa siwo woŋlɔ ɖe asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka eneawo ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖowo me ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ade dɔlar miliɔn 13.4 va ɖo dɔlar miliɔn 27.4 le asitsatsa me, si wɔ ɖeka kple dɔlar miliɔn 26 ƒe xexlẽme si woyɔ le posu me. Esia wɔe be Snopes ƒo nya ta be ɖɔɖɔɖo eneawoe nye nyatakaka siwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le Unusual Whales ƒe nyatakakaa me. Le eƒe ŋuɖoɖo na Snopes me la, Unusual Whales gbe nyataƒoƒo sia o. Gake nuŋlɔɖi ene siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la nye ɖɔɖɔɖo siwo wowɔ le asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka siwo wotsɔ de agbalẽ me va yi ŋu, si fia be menye asitsatsa siwo ŋu womegblɔ nya le o alo esiwo ŋu woka nya ta le megbee wonye kokoko o. Ne míelé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka gbãtɔ siwo woxɔ tso March 15, May 10, July 6 kple Dec. 20, 2024 dzi ŋu la, woɖee fia be woŋlɔ asitsatsa siwo katã ŋu woka nya ta le le ɖɔɖɔɖo eneawo me hã ɖe nyatakaka gbãtɔawo me, eye woŋlɔ wo be ga home ma ke. Esi wònye be woŋlɔ asitsatsa siwo katã woŋlɔ ɖe ɖɔɖɔɖoawo me ɖe asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka gbãtɔ siwo woxɔna tso ɣeyiɣi yi ɣeyiɣi me ta la, alakpa nya si wogblɔ la nye. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe nyatakakaa ɖɔ Scott ƒe asitsatsa be enye "asitsatsa ... le dɔwɔƒe siwo wòde se ɖo." Snopes kpɔe be esia hã flua ame, le asitsatsa ŋuti nyatakaka siwo woxɔna tso ɣeyiɣi yi ɣeyiɣi nu, elabena wowɔa asitsatsa katã ɖe dudzikpɔƒe ƒe dedienɔnɔgbalẽwo dzi — si nye dudzikpɔƒe ƒe gagbalẽwo, ke menye dɔwɔƒewo o. Le email ŋuɖoɖo na Snopes me la, Unusual Whales ŋlɔ bena "eɖe dzesi be Rick Scott ƒle Tampa Fla, tsɔ kpe ɖe dudzikpɔƒe ƒe gagbalẽ bubuwo ŋu, si nye ƒomedodo tẽ kple eya ŋutɔ kple eƒe akpa si wòwɔ abe dunyahela ene." Snopes bia Scott be esusu be asitsatsa le dudzikpɔƒe ƒe gagbalẽ siwo woɖe ɖe go na nuto siwo teƒe wòle tẽ la anye viɖe siwo tsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu hã, gake míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo na biabia sia o. Scott nye Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔ siwo si ga le wu la dometɔ ɖeka. Nyatakaka aɖe si tso Investopedia gbɔ le February 2025 me gblɔ be Scott ye nye kesinɔtɔ wu, eye eƒe kesinɔnuwo nye dɔlar miliɔn 549.4. Le ɣeyiɣi si me wotae la, Quiver Quantitative, si nye gadododɔwɔƒe aɖe si léa ŋku ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe gaxɔgbalẽwo ƒe asitsatsa ŋu hetaa wo la, yɔ Scott be enye Sewɔtakpekpea me tɔ etɔ̃lia si si ga le wu, eye eƒe kesinɔnuwo nye dɔlar miliɔn 500. Unusual Whales ƒe nya si wògblɔ na Snopes ɖee fia be Scott dzra adzɔnuwo va yi, eye wòyɔ eƒe gaxɔmenu gã aɖe, hafi de dzesii be asitsatsa siwo ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le eƒe X post me la "nye gagbalẽwo ko vavã, togbɔ be va yi la, esia menye nyateƒe o hã."

claim: Le November 2025 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Trump bia tso Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe si be woato ƒe 15 ƒe ʋudodo vɛ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump do susua ɖa be Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔha nato ƒe 15 ƒe ʋudodo vɛ la kaka ɖe Internet dzi le November 2025. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyatakaka aɖe si woda ɖe X dzi la ma nɔnɔmetata aɖe si ɖi White House ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo le Nov. 10 (wodzrae ɖo): Nuŋɔŋlɔ si le nɔnɔmetata la dzi xlẽ be: THE WHITE HOUSE PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP Esi wòyi edzi le dɔ wɔm sesĩe be woana Amerikatɔwo ƒe Drɔ̃e la nasu amesiame si la, Dukplɔla Trump bia tso Ʋuɖonyawo Kple Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔƒewo si egbea be woana ʋu ƒe amesinɔnɔ na amesiame nava eme to ƒe 15 ƒe ʋudodowo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ me! Agbalẽŋlɔla Duffy kple Lutnick le dɔ wɔm tso eŋu xoxo! Nuwo tsɔtsɔ yi na Amerika! Nɔnɔmetata ma ke dze le nya bubu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe X kple Facebook dzi hã me. Edze abe nuxlẽla aɖewo ɖe nyaʋiʋlia gɔme be enye agbemenudzɔdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔwo gbɔgblɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ ene. Gake kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be Trump bia tso Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea si kpɔ be woaɖe mɔ ɖe ʋudodo ƒe ƒe 15 ŋu o. Nya si wogblɔ la nye fewuɖunya. Edze egɔme tso @TheRealThelmaJ1 — X akɔnta si ɖɔ eƒe emetsonu be enye nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya le dzɔdzɔme nu. Eƒe bio gblɔ be: "Vinye gblɔ be menye parody." Phoenix New Times, si nye nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si le eɖokui si, yɔ @TheRealThelmaJ1 be "Best Political Parody Twitter" le ƒe 2023 me (Twitter nye X ƒe ŋkɔ tsã). Edze abe nyatakaka bubu siwo woŋlɔ ɖe akɔntabubua me dometɔ geɖe nye fewuɖunyawo ene. Nyakpakpa ŋutinyaa kaka esi Trump do susua ɖa be woado aƒe ƒe 50 ƒe gadodo (fifia la, aƒedofe diditɔ kekeake siwo li le U.S. la ƒe ɣeyiɣiwo nye ƒe 40, togbɔ be zi geɖe la, gadzraɖoƒewo naa ƒe 30 ƒe aƒedofe hã). Snopes ƒo nu tso fewuɖunya mawo tɔgbe siwo do tso nuŋlɔɖi sia me ŋu, eye nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Lãmesẽnyawo Gbɔkpɔla Robert F. Kennedy Jr. gblɔ be “vidzĩwo xɔa Tylenol ƒe nugbagbevi siwo susɔ tso nuɖuɖutome.” Le ŋutinya me la, nusita míexlɔ̃a nu nuxlẽlawo tso nya siwo dzɔtsoƒe siwo yɔa woƒe nyatakakawo be nukokoedoname alo fewuɖunya la he vɛ ŋue nye esi.

claim: Amegbetɔ menye United States dukɔmevi o da akɔ na Mamdani le NYC dudzikpɔla ƒe tiatia me.
evidence: Enye fefenya Ðe ame aɖe si menye U.S. dukɔmevi alo afima nɔla gɔ̃ hã va ɖo New York City ŋkeke eve do ŋgɔ na tiatia la eye wòda akɔ na Mamdani be wòanye dudzikpɔlaa? Ao, menye nyateƒee o: Aɖaŋuɖogbalẽa lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be fefenya aɖee wònye. Be woaɖe woawo ŋutɔ ƒe fefea ɖa la, woɖe afisi wokpɔ akɔtagbalẽvi aɖe si dzi Zohran Mamdani ƒe ŋkɔ le ƒe nɔnɔmetata le fia. Wotsɔa akɔtagbalẽvi bubu naa atikemawɔla siwo womeŋlɔ ŋkɔ na le New York o siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe akɔdadaƒea, eye wotsɔa ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ƒe agbalẽ siwo me nuŋlɔɖiwo le tsɔ ɖoa ​​kpe edzi be New York yewo le la ɖona.  Nya la dze le November 4, 2025 X.com akɔnta @YazanXBT nyatakaka aɖe me (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia) si ʋu: Va ɖo NYC ŋkeke 2 enye sia Nyemenye U.S. dukɔmevi alo nɔla gɔ̃ hã o Mete ŋu ge ɖe eme heda akɔ kaba Nusi wohiã koe nye adrɛs eyata mena wo ɖeka Voted for Mamdani Mina míayi New York!  Aleae nya si woŋlɔ ɖe X.com dzi le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣie nye esi: Yazan ???????? on Twitter Va ɖo NYC ŋkeke 2 enye sia Nyemenye U.S. dukɔmevi alo nɔla gɔ̃ hã o Mete ŋu ge ɖe eme eye meɖe akɔta kaba Nusi wohiã koe nye adrɛs eyata mena wo ɖeka Voted for Mamdani Mina míayi New York! https://t.co/rx4W2g1dIg Akɔntabubua da gbedasi aɖe si kplɔe ɖo ŋlɔ be nya si woŋlɔ la menye nyateƒe o eye wòma X.com akɔnta @aubreyvision afisi woxɔe le la kpɔ woƒe "ballot": Esia nye fefenya BTW Afi siae meɖe fotoa tso Ame sia ame si ke ɖi le tiatiawɔblɔɖea ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ŋu la nye moron 😹 Alesi nya ma dze le X.com lae nye esi:

claim: Queen ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Freddie Mercury medzi ha "of the world" le haƒoha la ƒe hadzidzi "We Are the Champions," si woɖe ɖe go zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1977 me ƒe nuwuwu o.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Freddie Mercury medzi ha 'tso xexeame' le ƒe 1977 ƒe haƒoƒo gbãtɔ si nye "We Are the Champions" ƒe nuwuwu o. Ke hã ... ... fli la nɔ hadzidzia ƒe nyawo me abe alesi wotae ɖe ƒe 1977 ƒe vinyl si woɖe ɖe go le se nu ƒe abɔta ememetɔ dzi ene. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Queen ƒe kɔnsɛtwo ƒe videowo ɖee fia be Mercury dzia fli la le eƒe nuwuwu zi geɖe. Tso esime Queen ƒe "We Are the Champions" dze egɔme le ƒe 1977 me la, ame geɖe tsɔ "xexeame" si me dzo le de dzesi woƒe hadzidzia ƒe gɔmeɖeɖewo. Gake ɖe wòwu enu nenema nyateƒea? Nyasela aɖewo, esi wogbugbɔ yi hadzidzia dzi le vinyl kple hadzidzi ƒe mɔ̃wo abe Spotify ene dzi vɔ la, wode dzesii be "xexeame ƒe" mamlɛtɔ mele afi aɖeke o. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, nya gbogbo aɖewo siwo woŋlɔna kple nyatiwo kaka ɖe Internet dzi, eye wotsɔa vovototoa ɖoa nusi woyɔna be Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi dzi, si nye nya si Snopes ɖe gɔme be enye “nyateƒenya alo nudzɔdzɔ aɖe dzi ŋkuɖoɖo vodadatɔe le ƒuƒoƒo me.” Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le October 2023 me la, TikTok zãla aɖe ma video (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si me woɖe hadzidzia ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ gbãtɔ ɖe vinyl dzi, kple taɖodzinu be yeaɖo kpe edzi be hadzidzia mewu enu kple "xexeame tɔ" gbeɖe o. @blackcirclerecordssc The Mandela effect of Queen - We Are The Champions Ðe Freddie Mercury dzia "xexeame ƒe nyawo" le hadzidzia ƒe nuwuwua? #mandelaeffect #fianyɔnu #doakpɔmpions #xexeame #vinyltok ♬ gbeɖiɖi gbãtɔ - Rob D | Black Circle Records Medium zãla aɖe hã xɔ nya sia, eye wòɖee fia le ŋutinya aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "'Míenye Ʋiʋlilawo' ƒe Nyaʋiʋli Gã la: Ðe Fianyɔnu Gblẽ 'Xexeame' Me Nyateƒea?" eye woɖo vovototoa ɖe ɖoɖo nu ale: Fianyɔnu ƒe hadzidzi si nye dzesi "Míenye Ʋiʋlilawo" nye nu vevi aɖe le kamedefefewɔƒewo, kɔnsɛtwo, kple ame ŋutɔ ƒe aʋadziɖuɖu ƒe azãɖuɖuwo me tso esime woɖee ɖe go le ƒe 1977. Eƒe aʋadziɖuɖu ƒe hadzidzi kple hadzidzi sẽŋuwo na wònye ɣeyiɣi vevi aɖe na nyasela geɖe, gake nyaʋiʋli tɔxɛ aɖe ƒo xlã hadzidzia ƒe nuwuwu. Ame miliɔn geɖe siwo lɔ̃a fefea le xexeame katã ɖoa ŋku fli mamlɛa dzi be wotsɔ nyagbɔgblɔ "xexeame tɔ" wu enu. Ke hã le nuŋlɔɖi gbãtɔa me la, edze ƒã be fli sia si nye dzesi la mele afima o. Ke boŋ ɖeko hadzidzia kplɔnɛ ɖo le Freddie Mercury ƒe hadzidzi si nye "Míawoe nye ʋiʋlilawo" megbe. Nya sia dze le agbalẽnyalawo ƒe magazine me nyati aɖe gɔ̃ hã me, "Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi kple Ŋkuɖodzi Yeye," si mawusubɔsubɔ ŋuti nunyala Aaron French, amesi wɔ numekuku le nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafiawo ŋu le Internet dzi le eƒe sukunuwuwu nusɔsrɔ̃ me le California Yunivɛsiti, Davis, ŋlɔ. Nyatia de dzesi hadzidzi ƒe vovototoa abe alesi wosusu be titri le didime siwo internet zãla aɖewo gblɔ be eyae hea Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi vɛ dome ƒe kpɔɖeŋu ene (togbɔ be dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya me kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si da asi ɖe nukpɔsusu sia dzi o hã): Hadzidzi ƒe hadzidzi ƒe tɔtrɔ bubue nye fli mamlɛtɔ tso Fianyɔnu ƒe hadzidzi si nye We are the Champions (ƒe 1977), si me Freddy Mercury dzi ha "... of the world" le eƒe nuwuwu. Fifia medzia fli ma o; hadzidzia wu enu ko. Nya la dze abe ɖe wotsoe ene: Ame siwo ɖo ŋku hadzidzi si wu enu kple "xexeame ƒe" dzi la nɔ Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi aɖe me tom. Gake nyateƒea ya menɔ bɔbɔe nenema gbegbe o. Ẽ, ƒe 1977 ƒe haƒoƒo gbãtɔ, haƒoƒo si wogbugbɔ wɔ tso ƒe 2011 me, kple Queen ƒe "We Are the Champions" ƒe dodo gɔ̃ hã katã wu enu "xexeame ƒe" manɔmee. Nyagbɔgblɔ sia menɔ hadzidzia ƒe hadzidzi ƒe video si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ƒe nuwuwu gɔ̃ hã o, si haƒohaa da ɖe YouTube dzi le ƒe 2017 me: Gake le nyateƒe me la, wotsɔ hadzidzia de eme le dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖoƒe me zi geɖe. Le susu sia ta la, míetso nya me be nya si wogblɔ be Queen frontman Freddie Mercury medzia "xexeame ƒe ha" le "We Are the Champions" ƒe nuwuwu o la me nyatakaka vavã kple alakpa tsaka. Ne míagblɔe bubui la, masɔmasɔa menye Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi ƒe kpɔɖeŋu vavãtɔ o, elabena le nyateƒe me la, Mercury dzi hadzidzi si amewo nɔ "ɖo ŋku edzi vodadatɔe" le ɣeyiɣi geɖe me, si me le haƒoƒo xɔŋkɔ aɖe si wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi tso ƒe 1985 ƒe Live Aid kɔnsɛt me hã le. Vinyl si woɖe ɖe go gbãtɔ si nye "News of the World" kple eƒe tata siwo wogbugbɔ ta emegbe la me abɔta ememetɔ aɖe si me ha ɖesiaɖe si le albɔm la me ƒe nyawo le. Fli si nye "xexeame ƒe —" dze le "Míenye Aʋawɔlawo" ƒe nuwuwu le gɔmeɖeɖe eveawo siaa me. Míedo asi ɖe haƒoha si ta albɔmɔ̃a le U.K., si nye EMI Records, gbɔ be míaɖo kpe hadzidzi siwo le abɔta ememetɔ dzi ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi. Míedo asi ɖe haƒoha me tɔ Brian May hã gbɔ be míabia numeɖeɖe tso vovototo si le hadzidzi siwo woŋlɔ kple esiwo wolé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi dome ŋu. Míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo aɖe. Hadzidzia ƒe nyawo ƒe nɔnɔmetata si woɖe tso agbalẽ si wogbugbɔ ta si woŋlɔ ɖe Germanytɔwo ƒe haƒonudzraƒe si nye Devinylhunter Records ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe la le ete. Míetsɔ dzɔtsoƒe ƒe kɔpi gbogbo aɖewo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo sɔ kple wo nɔewo

claim: U.S. Aʋafia George Patton Jr. gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be, "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena nyemakpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo o."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Patton ɖe susu ma tɔgbe ŋutɔ gblɔ vavã, togbɔ be eƒe nuwuwu to vovo hã. Nya gbãtɔ si woyɔ, si woate ŋu akpɔ le eƒe ku megbe ŋkuɖodzigbalẽ si nye "War as I Knew It" me xlẽ be: "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo; woahiãe." Míeke ɖe nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke ŋu haɖe si ɖo kpe edzi be Patton ƒo nu alo ŋlɔ nyagbe sia kpɔ o, "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena nyemawɔe o." Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo ma nya aɖe si wogblɔ be U.S. Aʋafia George Patton Jr. gblɔ, eye wogblɔ be Xexemeʋa II ƒe asrafomegã gblɔ ɣeaɖeɣi be, "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo, elabena nyemakpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo o." Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Zãla bubuwo gbugbɔ gblɔ nya sia kple Patton ƒe ŋkɔ ɖe Instagram, LinkedIn (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit (nudzraɖoƒe). (@realDonaldTrump/Twitter) Kpuie ko la, kpeɖodziwo ɖo kpe edzi be Patton ɖe susu si sɔ kplii ŋutɔ gblɔ, togbɔ be eƒe nuwuwu to vovo hã. Nyayɔyɔ gbãtɔ xlẽ be, "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo; woahiãe." Edze ƒã be nya siwo nye "woahiãe" to vovo na nya siwo ame geɖe lɔ̃na eye woɖi ame ŋutɔ tɔ wu "elabena nyemahiãe o." Snopes mekpɔ ke ɖe nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke ŋu si ɖo kpe edzi be Patton ƒo nu alo ŋlɔ nya sia ƒe akpa mamlɛtɔ kpɔ o. Nuŋlɔɖi aɖewo ɖe nya si wogblɔ be fefewɔla George C. Scott gblɔ gɔmeɖeɖe ma le eƒe Patton ƒe nɔnɔmetata si wòwɔ le ƒe 1970 ƒe sinima si xɔ ŋkɔ ma ke me la fia. Míekpɔ ema hã ƒe kpeɖodzi aɖeke o. Le susu siawo ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyatakaka vavãwo kple esiwo ŋu womeɖoe ɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Nyayɔyɔ si woŋlɔ ɖi la dzɔ tso Patton ŋutɔ ƒe ame ŋutɔ ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo wogbugbɔ ta emegbe ɖe agbalẽŋlɔla kple asrafowo ƒe ŋutinyaŋlɔla Martin Blumenson ƒe agbalẽ si wòŋlɔ le ƒe 1974 me, "The Patton Papers 1940-1945" me. Blumenson subɔ kple Patton le asrafodɔ me. Le ƒe 1995 me la, agbalẽŋlɔla kple nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla Rick Atkinson tsɔ nya si wogblɔ la ɖe ŋgɔ le Patton ƒe ŋkuɖodzigbalẽ si woɖe ɖe go le ƒe 1947 me le eƒe ku megbe, si nye "War as I Knew It" ƒe tata yeye aɖe ƒe ŋgɔdonya me. Blumenson kple Atkinson siaa yɔ nya tso Patton ƒe nyawo me be "Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na nye futɔwo; woahiãe." Patton ku le ʋufɔku aɖe si dzɔ le Germany le December 1945. Alesi Blumenson ƒo Patton ƒe ame ŋutɔ ƒe ŋkekenyuigbalẽ me nuŋlɔɖiwo kple lɛtawo nu ƒu la na nya siwo ƒo xlãe be míase nya si woyɔ la gɔme. (Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Agbalẽdzraɖoƒea mee Patton ƒe agbalẽ gbãtɔ siwo nye ŋutɔŋutɔwo le gake vaseɖe esime míele nya sia ŋlɔm la, womewɔ nya si woŋlɔ kple nyayɔyɔa ɖe Internet dzi haɖe o.) Blumenson ƒe agbalẽa yɔ nyayɔyɔa le akpa gbãtɔ ƒe tanya te. Le axa geɖe megbe, le akpa ma ƒe ta gbãtɔ si nye "Fort Benning: Brigade" me la, Blumenson fia mɔ nuxlẽla la to Patton ƒe susu siwo ku ɖe Germany ƒe Poland dzi dzedze le ƒe 1939 me ŋu me, emegbe eŋlɔ bena: Aʋawɔʋuwo ƒe hatsotsowoe nye nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe tanya gãtɔwo kekeake le Poland, gake afɔzɔlawo ƒe hatsotsowo gbã Polandtɔwo ƒe ametakpɔnuwo. Ne wonya ʋu do aɖe ko la, aʋawɔhawo toa eme alo wɔa aʋawɔwɔ ƒe tɔtɔa ŋudɔ tsɔ ƒoa xlã axadzi. Le go evea siaa me la, wozã aʋawɔʋuawo emegbe "abe alesi tututu Murat zã eƒe sɔdolawo ƒe ha le Napoleon ƒe ŋkekeawo me ene." Emegbe Blumenson yɔ Patton ŋutɔ ƒe nyawo, amesi ŋlɔ (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Le anyigbaŋutinunya ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖe si nɔ anyi tsã me esime menye ŋutsuvi si nɔ latingbe srɔ̃m la, mɔnukpɔkpɔ su asinye meɖe Kaisaro ƒe nyawo dometɔ ɖeka gɔme si kloe abe alesi meɖo ŋku edzii ene la, exlẽ nane si le abe esia ene. "Le dzomeŋɔli la, Kaisaro na hehe eƒe asrafohawo le nusiwo katã va zu asrafowo me ale gbegbe eye wòna wozu numame na wo le woƒe dɔwo wɔwɔ nyuie me ale gbegbe be ne le kele me la, etsɔ wo de asi na wo be woawɔ aʋa kple Gaultɔwo la, mehiã be wòade se na wo o, elabena wonya nusi woawɔ kple alesi woawɔe." Nyayɔyɔ sia ɖe taɖodzinu si dim míele le mama sia me la fia pɛpɛpɛ ŋutɔ. Menya be míaɖo egbɔ eye ne míeɖoe la, Mawu nekpɔ nublanui na míaƒe futɔwo; woahiãe. Emegbe Blumenson ɖo kpe edzi esime Patton ŋlɔ nya sia, eye Blumenson gblɔ kpee be, "Taɖodzinu ma gbɔ ɖoɖo didi ŋutɔ le September 1940 me." Emegbe ŋutɔ le Blumenson ƒe agbalẽa me la, eyɔ nya tso Patton srɔ̃ Beatrice ƒe nyawo me be egblɔ nya ma tɔgbe na srɔ̃a tso nublanuikpɔkpɔ na futɔwo ŋu: Lɛta, Beatrice na GSP, Jr., July 30, 1943 Mesusu be èƒo alesi nàwɔ ana ŋutsuawo nazu tagbɔsesẽ, togbɔ be le manyamanya me hã. Futɔ ɖesiaɖe si awɔ booby trap woawo ŋutɔ ƒe ame kukuwo medze na nublanuikpɔkpɔ aɖeke o, eye ne woƒo asi ʋee aɖewo le agbagba dzem be yewoaʋuʋu wo vɔ la, maxɔ ɖeke tso Amerikatɔwo gbɔ o...
