claim: AIMIM nyɔnuwo ƒe aʋala ƒe zimenɔla le kafukafu dem Deepak Kumar.
evidence: Nɔnɔmetata aɖe le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, si gblɔ be eɖe All India Majlis-e-Ittehadul Muslimeen (AIMIM) nyɔnuwo ƒe aʋala ƒe zimenɔla fia wòle gbe dom na ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye "Mohammad Deepak." (Nudzraɖoƒe ƒe Kadodo) Amekae nye Mohammad Deepak?  Ŋkɔ ‘Mohammad Deepak’ va xɔ ŋkɔ le January 26, 2026 dzi, le nutoa me nyaʋiʋli aɖe me le Kotdwar, Uttarakhand, le awudzraƒe aɖe si Moslemtɔ aɖe tɔ, si ŋkɔe nye Baba School Garments, ta. Le nyaʋiʋlia me la, kamedefefewɔla aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Deepak Kumar de nu nyaa me. Esi wobia nya tso eƒe amenyenye ŋu le masɔmasɔ siwo le dzidzim ɖe edzi dome la, wogblɔ be eɖe eɖokui fia be "Mohammad Deepak."  Kpeɖodzi Nya veviwo didi le nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒewo mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ɖo kpe kpekpe alo gbedoname ma tɔgbe aɖeke si ku ɖe AIMIM nyɔnuwo ƒe aʋala kple ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Mohammad Deepak ŋu o.  Ne èlé ŋku ɖe nɔnɔmetata si me dɔlékuiwo kaka ɖo ŋu nyuie la, àkpɔ Google Gemini ƒe dzesi, si fia be wozã nunya wɔwɔe ƒe dɔwɔnuwo tsɔ wɔe.  Wozã AI didi ƒe dɔwɔnu geɖewo tsɔ do nɔnɔmetata la kpɔ: Hive Moderation de dzesi nɔnɔmetata la be 97.4% AI-dzi.  Is It AI de dzesii be 99% AI-dzi.  Dɔwɔnu bubu si nye Was it AI hã tsɔ kakaɖedzi bu nɔnɔmetata la be enye nuwɔwɔ.  Nyametsotso Nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be yeɖe AIMIM nyɔnuwo ƒe aʋala ƒe zimenɔla fia wòle gbe dom na ‘Mohammad Deepak’ la nye alakpa. AI ye wɔ nɔnɔmetata la, eye kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be nudzɔdzɔ sia tɔgbe dzɔ kpɔ o.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe AIMIM ƒe nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔa?  Ao, dɔwɔnu geɖe siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI ɖo kpe edzi be wozã nunya wɔwɔe tsɔ wɔ nɔnɔmetata lae.  Q2. Ðe nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe li si ɖo kpe nudzɔdzɔ sia dzia?  Ao, Newschecker mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo si ɖo kpe nya sia dzi o.  Q3. Amekae nye ‘Mohammad Deepak’?  Wogblɔ be eyae nye Deepak Kumar, si nye kamedefefewɔƒe ƒe hehenala si zã ŋkɔa le nutoa me nyaʋiʋli aɖe me le Uttarakhand. Womenya be dunyahehe ƒe akpa aɖeke le esi o.  Dzɔtsoƒewo Hive Moderation Is It AI Was it AI

claim: "Míekpɔ [mɔzɔlawo ƒe ketekemɔ] ƒe mɔ siwo ade 35 siwo nɔ alɔ̃ dɔm alo womewɔa dɔ o la xoxo." – Ramaphosa ƒe ŋkɔ
evidence: Ramaphosa ƒe nya si wògblɔ tso Cape Town ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nyuie le dɔwɔwɔ keke ɖe enu me la flua ame eye womate ŋu aɖo kpe eƒe nya si wògblɔ be dua medea ga sue aɖe ko na ame ɖeka le dugãwo kple amewo ƒe nɔƒe siwo womeɖo le se nu o me o. Africa Check hã bu Badenhorst ƒe nya si wògblɔ tso Cape Town ƒe xɔtuɖaŋu ƒe gazazã ƒe alafa memamã si ayi na aƒe siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o ŋu be womeɖo kpe edzi o, gake eto nyateƒe be ƒe etɔ̃ ƒe ga si woatsɔ ana dua wu dukɔa ƒe dugã bubuwo katã tɔ sã. Nya siwo Scheurkogel gblɔ tso ʋuɖoɖo ƒe gazazãwo na South Africatɔ dahewo kple ketekemɔzɔlawo ƒe mɔzɔzɔ ƒe xexlẽme ŋu ƒe akpa gãtɔ sɔ, abe alesi Ramaphosa ƒe nya le ketekemɔ siwo wogbugbɔ xɔ ƒe xexlẽme ŋu hã sɔ ene. Le October 2025 me la, South Africa dukplɔla Cyril Ramaphosa ɖo nyabiase siwo Dukɔa ƒe Nutomewo ƒe Aɖaŋuɖoha (NCOP), si nye sewɔtakpekpe ƒe aƒe eve dometɔ ɖeka, me tɔwo bia ŋu. Esi Ramaphosa nɔ nu ƒom tso agbagba siwo dzem wole be woalé ŋku ɖe subɔsubɔdɔwo wɔwɔ ŋu nyuie wu ŋu la, egblɔ be Cape Town Dugã la wɔ nu gbegblẽ wu metro bubuwo katã le dɔwɔnawo ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔ keke ɖe enu me. Eɖe ɖeklemi dua be ezãa ga geɖe le "nuto siwo me kesinɔnuwo bɔ ɖo" wu "dugãwo kple nɔƒe siwo womeɖo le ɖoɖo nu o" me. NCOP me tɔ Frederick Badenhorst gbe Ramaphosa ƒe nyawo kaba, eye wògblɔ be Cape Town zã eƒe xɔtuɖoɖowo ƒe gazazã ƒe 75% ɖe aƒe siwo me ganyawo mede ame dzi le o ŋu. Badenhorst le Democratic Alliance (DA), si nye habɔbɔ si kpɔa Cape Town Dugã dzi la teƒe. Emegbe le kpekpea me la, Ramaphosa ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ be yewɔ ŋgɔyiyi le mɔzɔlawo ƒe ketekemɔ dzi la, NCOP me tɔ kple DA ƒe amedɔdɔ Igor Scheurkogel , si te gbe ɖe edzi be kuxiwo gakpɔtɔ li. Amekawoe gblɔ woƒe nyateƒenyawo tẽ? Míelé ŋku ɖe eŋu. Dugã enyi, alo dugãwo le South Africa, siwo ƒe dɔe nye be woawɔ dɔ veviwo abe elektrikŋusẽ, gbeɖuɖɔ ɖeɖeɖa, tsi kple dzadzɛnyenye ene. Míebia Statistics South Africa (Stats SA) be nukae ƒe 2022 ƒe amexexlẽ , si nye nyitsɔ laa, ɖe fia tso dɔwɔna siawo ƒe mɔnukpɔkpɔ si nyo wu le dugãwo katã me ŋu. Niel Roux, si nye dɔwɔwɔ ƒe akɔntabubuwo dzikpɔla gblɔ na Africa Check be "togbɔ be [Ramaphosa] ƒo nu tso amexexlẽ ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu hã la, womenya nyatakaka alo akɔntabubu siwo ŋu wòle nu ƒom tsoe koŋ o". Edze abe dukplɔla la nɔ nu ƒom tso alafa memamã ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo ŋu ene, egblɔ, gake emawo megblɔ ŋutinya bliboa o."Tɔtrɔ siwo le amexexlẽ eveawo dome zazã le alafa me, le nyateƒe me, ɖee fia be Cape Town tsi megbe le metrowo katã ƒe mamã dedie nu le alafa memamã ƒe dzidziɖedzi le ƒe 2011 kple 2022 dome." Gake ne wobu metrowo ƒe lolome kple xɔ yeye siwo wona le subɔsubɔdɔ ɖesiaɖe me ƒe xexlẽme ŋu la, Cape Town wɔa dɔ nyuie wu ɣesiaɣi wu metrowo katã ƒe mamã dedie, Roux gblɔ. Esia me kɔ tso nyatakaka siwo Stats SA na na subɔsubɔdɔwo wɔwɔ ƒe hatsotso ɖesiaɖe me. Tsi si nyo wu ƒe amesinɔnɔ "Tsi si nyo wu" fia tsinono-tsidzɔƒe si wokpɔ ta na tso ɖiƒoƒo me. Roux gblɔ na Africa Check be esia lɔ tsi si le aƒe aɖe me alo tso nutoa me tsidzɔƒe si didi meta 200 me ɖe eme. Le ƒe 2011 kple 2022 dome la, aƒe 349,819 bubuwo kpɔ tsi si nyo wu le Cape Town, si nye dzidziɖedzi 1.2 le alafa me. Metro bubuwo ɖe dzidziɖedzi si lolo wu fia le alafa me.  Le ƒe 2022 me la, Cape Town ƒe aƒewo ƒe 97.6% kpɔ tsi si nyo wu, si sɔ gbɔ vie wu dukɔa ƒe xexlẽme si nye 96.6%. Míebia dukplɔla la be ɖe Ramaphosa ƒe nya "mamã dedie" zazã fia unit yeye siwo le subɔsubɔdɔwo wɔwɔ ƒe hatsotso ɖesiaɖe me ƒe xexlẽme si woma ɖe metrowo ƒe xexlẽme nu – ne míagblɔe bubui la, mamã dedie le akɔntabubu ƒe gɔmesese nu – eye mexɔ ŋuɖoɖo aɖeke o. Gake le dzidzenu ma nu gɔ̃ hã la, Ramaphosa ƒe nya la metsi tre o. Le ƒe 2011 kple 2022 dome la, tsi si nyo wu xɔxɔ dzi ɖe edzi le mamã dedie nu le aƒe 195,095 me le dugãwo katã me. Dzadzɛnyenye si nyo wu Stats SA ɖe dzadzɛnyenye si nyo wu gɔme be enye nugododeƒe siwo wotsɔa tsi ƒua gbe siwo wotsɔ do ka kple tsiɖɔɖɔɖɔƒe alo tsiɖɔɖɔɖɔƒe, alo nugododeƒe siwo le do siwo me yaƒoƒomɔ̃wo le, siwo woyɔna hã be VIP nugododeƒewo. Le ƒe 2011 kple 2022 dome la, Cape Town na dzadzɛnyenye si nyo wu aƒe 361,810 bubuwo, si nye dzidziɖedzi 3.5 le alafa me, si bɔbɔ wu le dugãwo abe eThekwini kple Buffalo City ene. Gake le afisia hã la, aƒe siwo le Cape Town ƒe akpa si lolo wu (93.5%) ƒe dzadzɛnyenye nyo ɖe edzi ne wotsɔe sɔ kple dukɔa ƒe xexlẽme si nye 90.1%.  Dzadzɛnyenye si nyo wu ƒe amesinɔnɔ dzi ɖe edzi le mamã dedie nu le aƒe 209,271 me le dugãwo katã me. Gbeɖuɖɔwo ɖeɖeɖa Stats SA ɖe gbeɖuɖɔ ɖeɖeɖa nyuie gɔme be enye gbeɖuɖɔ siwo nutoa me dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒoa ƒu kwasiɖa sia kwasiɖa le mɔdodowo to. Esia lɔ abɔ me gbeɖuɖɔ kple aƒeme gbeɖuɖɔ siwo bɔ ɖe eme. Le ƒe 2011 kple 2022 dome la, Cape Town dzi subɔsubɔdɔ sia zazã ɖe edzi abe 287,000 ene, si nye alafa memamã ƒe ɖiɖi -2.6. Cape Tow ƒe 91% kple edzivɔ vie

claim: Aʋatso: Ðevi Sue Siwo Dze Na Asrafowo ƒe Nubabla Fifia le Ukraine
evidence: Le nyateƒe me la, Ukraine ƒe se meɖe mɔ na ame ɖekaɖeka siwo mexɔ ƒe 18 haɖe o be woade asi asrafodɔ te o. Nya si wogblɔ be Ukraine sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ aɖee gblɔ la nye alakpa kura. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe siwo do ƒome kple Kremlin kaka nya siwo wogblɔ be Ukraine ɖe mɔ na ƒe 17 viwo be woade asi nubabla te kple Asrafowo. Nyatakakaawo yɔ nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Ukraine sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Ruslan Horbenko gblɔ le television dzi, amesi wogblɔ be egblɔ be fifia woɖe mɔ ɖe amewo ƒe ŋkɔ dede asrafodɔ me ŋu tso esime wòxɔ ƒe 17. ‘You’ve heard many times that our partners are pressuring Ukraine to lower the enlistment age. Míeɖo eŋu kple se aɖe si gblɔ be — fifia amesiame si xɔ tso ƒe 17 va ɖo ƒe 25 ate ŋu ade asi nubabla si ƒe home nye miliɔn ɖeka te,” wogblɔ be sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ la gblɔ Service,’ the minimum age for voluntary enlistment remains 18. Screenshot – mod.gov.ua Kremlin-siwo do ƒome kple asitsahabɔbɔwo gblɔ be nya si wogblɔ tso Ukraine ƒe ƒe si woxɔ le asrafodɔ me dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu la tso sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Ruslan Horbenko gbɔ, eye wogblɔ be egblɔ nya sia le television dzi wɔna si nye Superposition ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe nyitsɔ laa me Ke hã, StopFake ƒe ŋkuléle ɖe akpaa ŋu mekpɔ nya ma tɔgbe aɖeke o ɖo kpe nya sia dzi.Russia dziɖuɖua ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo kple Telegram dɔwɔƒe siwo ƒe ŋkɔ womeyɔ o siwo bla ɖe Russiatɔwo ƒe nyatakakaxɔlawo ŋue kaka ŋutinyaa, si ɖee fia kɔte be Russiatɔwo ƒe nyatakakadɔ bubu aɖe si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be woaɖe Ukraine afia be ele gome kpɔm le ‘ɖeviwo ƒe habɔbɔ’ me eye woado ŋusẽ ‘Ukrainetɔwo ƒe hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe asrafodɔ’ ŋuti nuŋlɔɖia me Horbenko ƒo nu tso ‘18–24’ ƒe nubabla ƒe ɖoɖo si ate ŋu adze egɔme ŋu, si ƒe taɖodzinue nye be wòade dzi ƒo na lɔlɔ̃nu faa ŋkɔ ŋɔŋlɔ ɖe Ukrainetɔ siwo xɔ tso ƒe 18 va ɖo ƒe 24. Le ɣeyiɣi aɖeke me la, meƒo nu tso ƒe si dziɖuɖumegãwo xɔna le amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo me dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ŋu o alakpanya ma tɔgbe si gblɔ be Ukraine ɖoe be yeadze ƒewuiviwo ŋkɔ dede asrafodɔ me gɔme tso ƒe 14 xɔxɔ dzi .

claim: Asaduddin Owaisi le aarti wɔm na Aƒetɔ Hanuman le gbedoxɔ aɖe me.
evidence: Video aɖe si le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖe AIMIM ƒe amegã Asaduddin Owaisi fia wòle Hanuman aarti wɔm, eye wokpɔ ame geɖe, siwo dome nunɔla aɖe hã le, le egbɔ. Ezãlawo ma videoa le afisiafi, eye wogblɔ be enye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ.  Screengrab from an X post by @ManojSr60583090 Kpeɖodzi Míedi nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakakawo tso Asaduddin Owaisi ƒe gbedoxɔ aɖe me yiyi alo aarti wɔwɔ ŋu, gake míekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔ aɖeke si ɖo kpe edzi o. Ne ɖe wòle alea la, anye ne menye eƒe aarti wɔwɔ ƒe videowo koe woƒo nu tsoe o, ke boŋ nyadzɔdzɔ siwo ku ɖe eŋu hã ŋue woaƒo nu tsoe le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo kple dunyahehawo me.  Nukpɔkpɔ ƒe Masɔmasɔwo Ne míelé ŋku ɖe videoa ŋu nyuie la, míakpɔ nu geɖe siwo mesɔ o, si fia be anɔ eme be menye nu ŋutɔŋutɔe wònye o.  Aarti la ƒe nukpɔkpɔ trɔna togbɔ be fotoɖemɔ̃a ƒe dzogoe gakpɔtɔ le nenema hã. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, Owaisi dzena le gɔmedzedzea me wònɔa aarti wɔm tso miame, gake ne nukpɔkpɔa le ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ la, eƒe dzogoe trɔna yia ŋgɔgbe.  To vovo na asi ƒe ʋuʋu la, Owaisi ƒe mo ƒe dzedzeme metrɔ o. Nenema kee wòle le nunɔla la kple vavala bubuwo hã gome.  Nuŋɔŋlɔ si le megbe la xlẽ be "Hannuman Meeder" (हनुमान मीदर) ɖe "Hanuman Mandir" (हनुमान बल) teƒe, si nye nusi mesɔ o si do ƒome kple nɔnɔmetata siwo AI wɔ zi geɖe.  Screengrab tso X post si ɖe nukpɔkpɔ ƒe masɔmasɔ siwo dze ƒã kple Gemini ƒe dzesi fia.  Gemini ƒe Dzesi ƒe Anyinɔnɔ Dzesi aɖe adze le videoa ƒe ɖusime le ete, si sɔ kple Google ƒe AI ƒe kpɔɖeŋu, Gemini. Zi geɖe la, ne wozã kpɔɖeŋua tsɔ wɔ nyatakakawo ko hafi wòdzena, si fiaa videoa ƒe AI dzɔtsoƒe.  Videoa ƒe duƒuƒu to Gemini chatbot ŋu ɖo kpe edzi be Google AI ye wɔe.  Gemini chatbot ƒe ŋuɖoɖo si fia be wowɔ videoa to Google ƒe AI kpɔɖeŋu zazã me.  Kpeɖodzi To AI-Detection Dɔwɔnuwo Dzi AI-nɔnɔmetata deteksi dɔwɔnu Was It AI de dzesi videoa be AI-wɔ. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, Hive Moderation dɔwɔnu tsɔ ŋkɔ na videoa be AI-generated/deepfake kple kakaɖedzi ƒe dzesi 99.9%.  ‘Was It AI’ kple Hive Moderation dɔwɔnuwo ƒe screenshot, wo ame evea siaa ɖo kpe edzi be videoa nye AI-si wowɔ, eye Hive ɖe kakaɖedzi ƒe dzesi gã aɖe fia.  Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe India Bia tso Pakistan si be wòatsɔ Imran Khan De asia? Ao, PIB Yɔ Aʋatso MEA Lɛta ƒe Nyametsotso Video si kaka si gblɔ be yeɖe Asaduddin Owaisi fia wòle Hanuman aarti wɔm la nye esi AI wɔ.  Nyabiasewo 1. Ðe Asaduddin Owaisi wɔ Hanuman Aarti?  Ao, nyatakaka alo kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo be Owaisi wɔ Hanuman Aarti o.    2. Aleke míawɔ anya be AI ye wɔ videoa?  Videoa ɖe nukpɔkpɔ ƒe masɔmasɔ, mo ƒe dzedzeme si le teƒe ɖeka, nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo mesɔ o, kple Gemini ƒe dzesi fia. Dɔwɔnu siwo wotsɔ dea dzesi AI hã ɖo kpe edzi.    3. Dɔwɔnu kawoe ɖo kpe videoa ƒe AI ƒe nɔnɔme dzi?  Dɔwɔnu siwo le abe Gemini Chatbot, WasItAI, kple Hive Moderation ene katã de dzesi videoa be AI ye wɔe.  Dzɔtsoƒewo Gemini AI chatbot ƒe kpeɖodzi Was It AI deteksi dɔwɔnu Hive Moderation dɔwɔnu

claim: Lɛta aɖe si woma le Internet dzi le March 2026 me nye gbedasi vavã si me Joe Kent, si nye U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe tatɔ, ɖe gbeƒãe be yeɖe asi le dɔ ŋu le aʋa si U.S. kple Israel wɔ ɖe Iran ŋu ta.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le March 2026 me la, Joe Kent — si nye U.S. Dukɔa ƒe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ dzi ɖuɖu ƒe dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔdzikpɔla eye wònye Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe akpadzinɔla vevie tso ƒe 2020 me — ɖe gbeƒã eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu, eye wòyɔ Trump ƒe aʋa si wòwɔ kple Iran. Emegbe nɔnɔmetata kple nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo wogblɔ be woɖe eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu ƒe lɛta fia la kaka ɖe Internet dzi, eye Snopes nuxlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea heŋlɔ agbalẽ be yewoanya ne lɛtaa nye nyateƒe. Lɛtaa nye nyateƒe; Kent dae ɖe afisia le March 17, 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze. Woŋlɔ ɖe lɛtaa ƒe nɔnɔmetata dzi be: Le ŋugbledede geɖe megbe la, metso nya me be maɖe asi le nye ɖoƒe si nye Dukɔa ƒe Ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ŋu, si adze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme egbea. Nyemate ŋu atsɔ dzitsinya nyui akpe asi ɖe aʋa si le edzi yim le Iran ŋu o. Iran menye afɔku aɖeke si gbɔna míaƒe dukɔa dzi kpuie o, eye eme kɔ ƒã be Israel kple eƒe Amerikatɔwo ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu sẽŋua ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu tae míedze aʋa sia gɔme. Enye bubu be mesubɔ le [Trump] kple [Dukɔa ƒe Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Tulsi Gabbard] te eye mexɔ ŋgɔ na dɔnyala bibiwo le NCTC. Mawu nayra Amerika. Woŋlɔ lɛtaa na Trump eye wògagblɔ be Kent do alɔ Trump ƒe dzidzenuwo kple dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe, gake egblɔ be wogblẽ dukplɔla la ƒe "Amerika gbãtɔ" ƒe nuƒolanɔƒea tso June 2025 me to "Israel dziɖuɖumegã kɔkɔwo kple Amerika nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo me tɔ siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi" si blee to "aɖaŋu ma ke si Israeltɔwo zã tsɔ he mí yi Iraq-ʋa si gblẽ nu le míaƒe dukɔa ŋu la me míaƒe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu nyuitɔ akpe geɖe ƒe agbe." Le ƒe 2019 me la, wowu Kemp srɔ̃ Shannon Smith le Syria le aʋa aɖe si Kent ɖɔ le eƒe lɛtaa me be "Israel ye wɔe." Esi wòku la, eyi edzi wɔ aʋa ɖe United States ƒe "aʋa si wòwɔna ɖe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ŋu" ŋu, eye wògblɔ le ƒe 2022 me be, "Ne nye mɔ le asinye la, anye ne míatrɔ ayi Aʋa si wowɔna ɖe ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ŋu ƒe gɔmedzedze tututu eye míabia akɔnta amewo." Lɛtaa xlẽ, bliboe be: Dukplɔla Trump, Le ŋugbledede geɖe megbe la, metso nya me be maɖe asi le nye ɖoƒe si nye Dukɔa ƒe Ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla ŋu, si adze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme egbea. Nyemate ŋu atsɔ dzitsinya nyui akpe asi ɖe aʋa si le edzi yim le Iran ŋu o. Iran menye afɔku aɖeke si gbɔna míaƒe dukɔa dzi kpuie o, eye eme kɔ ƒã be Israel kple eƒe Amerikatɔwo ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu sẽŋua ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu tae míedze aʋa sia gɔme. Meda asi ɖe dzidzenuwo kple dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ƒe ɖoɖo siwo dzi nèwɔ akɔdada le le ƒe 2016, 2020, 2024 me, siwo nède se le wò zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ me. Vaseɖe June ƒe 2025 me la, miese egɔme be aʋawɔwɔ siwo yi edzi le Titina Ɣedzeƒe nye mɔ̃ si xɔ míaƒe dulɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe agbe xɔasi le Amerika eye wògblẽ míaƒe dukɔa ƒe kesinɔnuwo kple nudzedziname me. Le miaƒe dziɖuɖu gbãtɔ me la, miese alesi woawɔ asrafowo ƒe ŋusẽ ŋudɔ vevie evɔ womahe mí ayi aʋa siwo nuwuwu meli na o me gɔme nyuie wu egbegbe Dukplɔla ɖesiaɖe. Mieɖe esia fia to Qasam Solamani wuwu kple ISIS dzi ɖuɖu me. Le dziɖuɖu sia ƒe gɔmedzedze la, Israel-dziɖuɖumegã kɔkɔwo kple Amerika nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo me tɔ siwo kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe amewo dzi la de nyatakaka totro aɖe si gblẽ miaƒe Amerika Gbãtɔ ƒe nuƒolanɔƒea me keŋkeŋ eye wòƒã aʋawɔwɔ ƒe akpadzinɔlawo ƒe seselelãmewo tsɔ de aʋawɔwɔ kple Iran ƒe dzi ƒo. Wozã echo chamber sia tsɔ ble wò be Iran nye ŋɔdzi na United States kpuie, eye be ne èƒoe fifia la, mɔ si me kɔ si dzi nàto aɖu dzi kabakaba la li. Esia nye alakpa eye enye aɖaŋu ma ke si Israel-viwo zã tsɔ he mí yi Iraq-ʋa si me afɔku le si na míaƒe dukɔa bu míaƒe ŋutsu kple nyɔnu nyuitɔ akpe geɖe ƒe agbe la me. Míagate ŋu awɔ vodada sia ake o. Abe aʋawɔla veviedonula si ɖo aʋawɔwɔ zi gbɔ zi 11 eye menye Sikaɣletivi srɔ̃ŋutsu si bu srɔ̃nye lɔlɔ̃a Shannon le aʋa aɖe si Israel wɔ me ene la, nyemate ŋu ado alɔ dzidzime si gbɔna dɔdɔ ɖa be woawɔ aʋa ahaku le aʋa si maɖe vi aɖeke na Amerika dukɔa o eye meɖo kpe Amerikatɔwo ƒe agbe ƒe asixɔxɔ dzi o. Medo gbe ɖa be miade ŋugble le nusi wɔm míele le Iran, kple amesiwo míele ewɔm na ŋu. Ɣeyiɣi si me woawɔ nu dzinɔameƒotɔe lae nye fifia. Àte ŋu atrɔ mɔa eye nàwɔ mɔ yeye aɖe na míaƒe dukɔa, alo àte ŋu aɖe mɔ na mí be míagaɖiɖi ɖe edzi ayi anyidzedze kple zitɔtɔ gbɔ. Wòe léa agbalẽviawo ɖe asi. Bubu wònye nam be masubɔ le miaƒe dziɖuɖua me eye mesubɔ míaƒe dukɔ gã la. Joseph Kent si nye Dukɔa ƒe Ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ Ŋuti Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla

claim: Le ƒe 1994 ƒe sinima si nye "Forrest Gump" me la, ame vevitɔ gblɔ be, "Agbe nɔ abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene," ke menye "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene o."
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu Fli si tututu fefewɔla Tom Hanks gblɔ abe Forrest Gump ene le sinima la me enye: "Dada gblɔna ɣesiaɣi be agbe le abe tsokolet aɖaka ene. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Le nukpɔkpɔ bubu aɖe me la, amea dada gblɔ be: "Agbe nye tsokoletɖaka, Forrest. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Gɔmeɖeɖe eveawo dometɔ aɖeke mesɔ pɛpɛpɛ kple nya si wogblɔna le afisiafi be, "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene o." Fli siwo woyɔ wu le sinima ŋutinya me dometɔ ɖeka tso ƒe 1994 ƒe sinima si nye "Forrest Gump," si me Tom Hanks wɔ eƒe tanya ƒe akpa le. Esi Gump le eƒe agbemeŋutinya gblɔm na amedzrowo le bɔsɖoƒe aɖe le sinima la ƒe ŋgɔdonya me la, egblɔ nunya aɖe si tso dadaa gbɔ. Woyɔa fli la zi geɖe be: "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Gake nukpɔla aɖewo siwo gbugbɔ yi sinima la me de dzesii be fli sia menye nusi tututu wogblɔ le sinima la me o. Le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple nyati vovovowo me la, internet zãlawo yɔ vovototo sia be enye nusi woyɔna be "Mandela ƒe Ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi" ƒe kpɔɖeŋu, si nye nudzɔdzɔ si me ame gbogbo aɖewo ɖoa ŋku nane dzi le mɔ si to vovo na alesi wòdzɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ nu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me. Ne èɖo to nyuie la, egblɔna be, "Agbe nɔ abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene." Míele veve sem na Instagram ƒe nya mawo katã fifia ... Kpuie ko la, enye nyateƒe be ame geɖe ɖo ŋku nya xɔŋkɔ si wogblɔ tso "Forrest Gump" me dzi vodadatɔe. To vovo na esi wogbugbɔ gblɔna zi geɖe be "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene" la, nya si tututu wogblɔ le sinima la mee nye: "Dada gblɔna ɣesiaɣi be agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Fli ma tɔgbe dze le sinima la ƒe akpa bubuwo nyateƒe, esime Gump dada gblɔ be: "Agbe nye tsokolet ƒe aɖaka, Forrest. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Ke hã, gɔmeɖeɖe ma ɖe nya "abe" ɖa eye le go eveawo siaa me la, nyagbɔgblɔ si tututu wogblɔ la to vovo tso gɔmeɖeɖe si woyɔ vodadatɔe si ge ɖe dekɔnu xɔŋkɔwo me gbɔ. Le sinima la me la, nya si wogblɔ la dzɔ le sinima la ƒe ŋgɔdonya si nye dzesi me, esime Gump bɔbɔ nɔ zikpui dzi nɔ bɔs lalam. Le YouTube video sia ƒe sɛkɛnd 33 ƒe dzesi lɔƒo la, Gump gblɔ be: "Dada gblɔna ɣesiaɣi be agbe le abe tsokolet aɖaka ene. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Eyata nya siwo tututu wozã le fli la me lɔ "nye," ke menye "nye" ɖe eme o. Viɖe aɖeke mele sinima la me si Gump gblɔ be "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene," togbɔ be emae nye tɔtrɔ si wogbugbɔ gblɔ wu le dekɔnu xɔŋkɔwo me hã. Tɔtɔa ƒe akpa aɖe ate ŋu atso nyateƒe si wònye be Gump dada (si ƒe akpa wɔm Sally Field wɔ) gblɔ nya ma tɔgbe le sinima la ƒe akpa bubuwo nyateƒe. Le nukpɔkpɔ ma me la, egblɔ be: "Agbe nye tsokoletɖaka, Forrest. Mènya nusi nàkpɔ gbeɖe o." Nukpɔkpɔa dzena le ga 1:23 lɔƒo le video klipi sia me: Tsɔ kpe ɖe nukpɔkpɔ eve siwo me nyayɔyɔ siwo ɖi wo nɔewo gake womesɔ o ŋu la, tɔtɔa ate ŋu atso nuƒoƒo si ŋu woka nya ta le gɔmesese totro hã gbɔ. Le Eŋlisigbe me la, ne ame aɖe ɖo ŋku nya si ame bubu gblɔ va yi dzi la, esɔ le gbeŋutise nu be woatrɔ ɣeyiɣia ɖe megbe. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, woate ŋu agblɔ emegbe be ame aɖe si gblɔ be "Ekpɔ dzidzɔ" be "Egblɔ be yekpɔ dzidzɔ." Nu ma tututue dzɔ le "Forrest Gump" me, esime ame vevitɔa nɔ ŋku ɖom nya si dadaa gblɔna tsã dzi, eye tɔtrɔ tso "nye" yi "nye" dzi sɔ kple gbeŋutise ƒe sewo. Gawu la, anɔ eme be wodo ŋusẽ "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene" si mesɔ o ƒe anyinɔnɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖe megbe to eƒe gbugbɔgagblɔ enuenu le Internet dzi me.Le kpɔɖeŋu me, YouTube video geɖe siwo me nukpɔkpɔa le la zã fli si mesɔ o le woƒe video ƒe tanyawo me, ne odio si sɔ le videoa ŋutɔ me gɔ̃ hã, eye zi geɖe la, video siawo ɖoa ame miliɔn geɖe ƒe kpɔkpɔ gbɔ. (YouTube search) Nenema ke Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences, to eƒe X account si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo dzi, da nya si nye "Agbe le abe tsokolet ƒe aɖaka ene," togbɔ be nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe video si kpe ɖe eŋu me ɖe fli si sɔ fia kɔte hã. Google ƒe AI Overview ƒe nɔnɔme gɔ̃ hã, ɣeaɖewoɣi, gbugbɔa tɔtrɔ si mesɔ o la wɔ ne wole nyayɔyɔa ƒom ƒu kpuie — togbɔ be emetsonu siawo ate ŋu ato vovo le nyabiasea kple ezãla nu hã (kpɔ screenshot si le ete). (Google search) Mlɔeba la, woɖe sinima si nye "Forrest Gump" tso ƒe 1986 ƒe agbalẽ si xɔ ŋkɔ ma ke si Winston Groom ŋlɔ la me le mɔ si mebɔbɔ o nu. Gake nyayɔyɔ si ŋu nya ku ɖo la medze le agbalẽ gbãtɔa me kura o. Agbalẽa ƒe tata aɖewo siwo wota emegbe

claim: Kpekpeɖeŋunana doa ŋusẽ GLP-1 eye wòkpena ɖe insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete ŋu
evidence: Nuƒola la gblɔ le March 27, 2026 ƒe Facebook ƒe agbalẽ aɖe me be: "Esia wɔa nu si tututu Ozempic wɔna, le dzɔdzɔme nu la, eƒe nugbegblẽ le ame ŋu kple kadodo aɖeke mele eme o."  Amea de dzi ƒo na nukpɔlawo be woabu kpeɖeŋutɔ si me yerba mate le ŋu -- si nye gbetike ƒe tii si wowɔna zi geɖe le Latin kple South America -- hegblɔ be tsakatsaka la ateŋu akpeɖe insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete, lolo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ kple ŋusẽ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ ŋu (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  TikTok, Facebook kple Instagram zãla bubu siwo dzraa atike ma ke to kadodo siwo le woƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo dzi hã do atike si wotsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la ɖe ŋgɔ nenema ke be enye "tsi si te ŋu nɔa te ɖe insulin nu," eye wogblɔ be ɖɔktawo kafui eye wotsɔe sɔ kple atike siwo wodona ɖe lãme na ame siwo le abe glucagon-like-peptide-1, alo GLP-1, ene.  Nya aɖewo siwo woŋlɔ tso ƒe 2025 me ke do boblo yerba mate ƒe atike bubu aɖe si woatsɔ aɖe lolo dzi akpɔtɔ le ŋkɔ si nye "Dzɔdzɔme Zempic" te.  Image Screenshot of a Facebook reel taken April 20, 2026 Image Screenshot of a Facebook reel taken April 21, 2026 Nyatakaka geɖe ƒo nu tso ƒe 2024 ƒe "The Joe Rogan Experience" Spotify podcast ƒe akpa aɖe si me Stanford Yunivɛsiti nufialagã Andrew Huberman ƒo nu tso alesi amegbetɔwo wɔa GLP-1 lãmetsi si nunyiame siwo wokpɔna le yerba mate me ʋãna le dzɔdzɔme nu ŋu tii (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).  GLP-1 agonist atikewo abe Ozempic ene, siwo wowɔ be woasrɔ̃ lãmetsiŋusẽa eye woaɖɔ sukli kple nuɖuɖu ƒe dzodzro le ʋu me ɖo la trɔ suklidɔ kple lolo akpa dada le ƒe ʋɛ siwo va yi me.  Gake esi atikeawo va le xɔm ɖe edzi la, atike siwo ŋu ɖikeke le siwo yɔa atikeawo ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi hã te dodo le amewo ƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo.  Eŋutinunyala siwo ƒo nu kple AFP xlɔ̃ nu be yerba mate ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ siwo wodona ɖe ŋgɔ le Internet dzi mawɔ dɔ abe GLP-1 ƒe atikewo dodo ene o.  C. Michael White, si nye atikewɔnyawo gbɔ kpɔƒe ƒe zimenɔla le Connecticut Yunivɛsiti ƒe Atikeŋutinunya Suku gblɔ be atikewo abe Ozempic ene wɔa dɔ to GLP-1 lãmetsiŋusẽ (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia) ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedziwo gbugbɔgawɔ me. Esia nana wòsena le eɖokui me be yeɖi ƒo eye wòdzea insulin ƒe dodo gɔme, si ate ŋu ana ame ƒe lolo dzi naɖe akpɔtɔ eye wòakpe ɖe ame ŋu le suklidɔ dada me.  Gake White gblɔ be togbɔ be numekuku aɖewo ɖee fia be yerba mate kple nuɖuɖu bubuwo ate ŋu aʋã GLP-1 ƒe dodo le dzɔdzɔme nu hã la, ŋusẽ si tsakatsaka la kpɔna ɖe lolo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ dzi la maɖi naneke o ne wotsɔe sɔ kple Ozempic alo Wegovy (si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).  "Bu eŋu ale: ne èdo go yi duɖimekeke eye nèƒu du ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe la, àte ŋu ana duƒula ƒe kɔkɔme ɖokuiwò," egblɔ na AFP le March 25. "Gake duƒula ƒe kɔkɔme manɔ abe alesi nèna heroin ɖokuiwò ene gbeɖe o."  Insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete Christoph Buettner, si nye lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ŋuti dɔwɔƒe si le Rutgers Health Robert Wood Johnson Atikewɔsuku ƒe amegã hã ke ɖi nya siwo nyatakakaawo gblɔ tso insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete, si dzɔna ne ŋutilãa dzudzɔ dɔwɔwɔ ɖe insulin ŋu abe alesi wòle ene ŋu. (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia).  Egblɔ na AFP le e-mail aɖe si wòɖo ɖe AFP le March 25 lia dzi me be: “Le blibodede me la, togbɔ be agbenɔnɔ ƒe nɔnɔmewo gakpɔtɔ nye nu vevitɔ siwo nana insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete tsia tre ɖe insulin ŋu hã la, kpeɖeŋutɔtikewo nye nusi me wowɔa dɔ le.” "Zi geɖe la, viɖe aɖeke mele wo ŋu o, eye le go aɖewo me la, edze ƒã be wogblẽa nu le wo ŋu."  Esi wòlé ŋku ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ kpe ɖe nuɖuɖua ŋu ƒe xexlẽdzesiwo ŋu vɔ la, egblɔ be fibre kple caffeine dede eme ate ŋu ana woase le wo ɖokui me wu be yeɖi ƒo eye yeƒe lolo dzi naɖe akpɔtɔ le mɔ si sɔ nu.  Egblɔ be: "Ema sɔ le nunyiame gome, gake ele adzɔge ʋĩ tso GLP-1 receptor agonist gbɔ."  Patricia Brubaker, si nye nufialagã emerita le ŋutilãŋutinunya kple atikewɔwɔ me le Toronto Yunivɛsiti, ƒoe ɖe megbe le "hack" ƒe susua ŋu na insulin ƒe dɔlélenutsiŋutete (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia).  Egblɔ le March 27 dzi be kpeɖeŋutɔawo ate ŋu aɖe insulin dzi akpɔtɔ elabena "fiber ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ gã si wotsɔ kpe ɖe nutsitsidɔ si nɔa anyi ɣeaɖewoɣi" ate ŋu ana ame ƒe lolome naɖiɖi le mɔ si sɔ nu.  Xlẽ nu geɖe tso AFP ƒe nyateƒenyawo me dzodzro le lãmesẽnyawo ŋu le afisia.

claim: Egblɔ be yexɔ ŋgɔ na Aƒea ƒe agbagbadzedze be woatu Micron semiconductor dɔwɔƒe gã aɖe le Syracuse gbɔ.
evidence: Republicantɔwo ƒe Dukplɔla Claudia Tenney, amesi ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe nuto keke ɖe enu le Central New York ƒe akpa gãtɔ, xɔ kafukafu nyitsɔ laa be ekpe asi ɖe semiconductor dɔwɔƒe gã aɖe dodo ɖe ŋgɔ ŋu le Clay, N.Y., le Syracuse ƒe dziehe gome. "Enye dzidzɔ be magbã anyigba kple @MicronTech le eƒe ŋutinya me gadede New York State," Tenney posted on X Jan. 16. "Dɔ sia ana dɔ 50,000 nado eye wòado ŋusẽ dukɔa me semiconductor wɔwɔ le NY. Bubu wònye nam be mexɔ ŋgɔ na agbagbadzedze sia le Aƒea me esime Congress gaɖo kpe America ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna ɖe ɣeyiɣi didi ƒe nu yeyewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ & hoʋiʋli dzi." Enye dzidzɔ be woagbã anyigba kple @MicronTech le eƒe ŋutinya me gadede New York State me. Dɔ sia ahe dɔ 50,000 vɛ eye wòado ŋusẽ dukɔa me semiconductor wɔwɔ le NY katã. Bubu wònye nam be mexɔ ŋgɔ na agbagbadzedze sia le Aƒea me esi Sewɔtakpekpea gaɖo kpe Amerika ƒe... pic.twitter.com/AbqF1VXCno Tenney ƒo nu tso akpa si wòwɔ le Micron dɔwɔƒea dodo ɖe ŋgɔ me ŋu, gake eƒe kadodo kple dɔa sesẽ wu alesi eƒe nyatakakaa lɔ̃ ɖe edzi. Tenney’s office meɖo nya siwo wobia tso wo si ku ɖe nyati sia ŋu o. Micron, si nye United States ƒe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖo kple nyatakakawo dzraɖoƒe ƒe dɔwɔƒe gãtɔwo dometɔ ɖeka, le "megafab" dɔwɔƒe si ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 100 tum si awɔ semiconductors, si nye nuƒlelawo kple dɔwɔƒewo ƒe elektrɔnikmɔ̃wo ƒe akpa vevi aɖe. Ne wowu enu la, ele klalo be yeazu dɔwɔƒe ma tɔgbe gãtɔ kekeake le dukɔa me. Micron gblɔ be xɔ dzadzɛ si ƒe lolome anye afɔ miliɔn 2.4 sq, alo esi lolo abe Amerikatɔwo ƒe bɔlƒoƒe siwo ade 40 ene, anɔ Clay dɔwɔƒea. Woama gazazã siwo ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 100 la ɖe ƒe 20 ya teti me. Micron kple dukɔa ƒe amegãwo bu akɔnta be dɔwɔƒea ana dɔwɔɖui siwo wu 50,000 nasu ame si, si ate ŋu ana ŋusẽ gã aɖe nanɔ New York titina ƒe ganyawo si le to yim la me. Nyitsɔ laa la, Tenney nye dɔwɔƒea ƒe akpadzinɔla. Enye amegã geɖe siwo nɔ anyi le anyigbatutudɔa me la dometɔ ɖeka. Ame bubu siwo va la dometɔ aɖewoe nye Asitsatsa ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Howard Lutnick, Dukplɔla Nick Langworthy, R-N.Y., kple New York Democratic Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Chuck Schumer kple Dziɖuɖumegã Kathy Hochul. Le ƒe 2022 me la, Tenney tsi tre ɖe se vevi aɖe si na Micron dɔwɔƒea te ŋu dzɔ ŋu: CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Se, si Dukplɔla Joe Biden si nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi de asi. Wotrɔ asi le sea ŋu be wòado U.S. mɔ̃ɖaŋununya deŋgɔ ƒe adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ ɖe ŋgɔ to dziɖuɖua ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu kple dzideƒonamenuwo dzi. Le sea ƒe asidede agbalẽ te ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi la, Micron ŋlɔ ɖe nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe me be yewole gbeƒã ɖem ga si ade dɔlar biliɔn 40 le adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ me elabena CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea na wòte ŋu "tsɔ kakaɖedzi yi gadodo ƒe ɖoɖo ɖedzesi sia si axɔ ɣeyiɣi didi la gbɔ." Esi wonɔ nya hem le CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea ŋu le Aƒea me — eye hafi Micron natia Clay be wòanye teƒea — Tenney ɖe eƒe tsitretsiɖeŋua me esi wògblɔ be sea "mekpɔ mɔxenu veviwo o eye mɔxenu siwo ate ŋu aɖe vi na China le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbe hã le eme." Egblɔ be "woawɔ numekuku siwo wodo alɔe le se sia te ƒe akpa gãtɔ le hadome kple yunivɛsitiwo, siwo míenya be woxɔ ŋkɔ be Chinatɔwo ƒe ŋkutsaladɔ ate ŋu adzɔ bɔbɔe." Le December 2024 me la, U.S. Asitsanyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea wu dɔlar biliɔn 6 si dziɖuɖua na be Micron nakpe asi ɖe eƒe dɔwɔƒe siwo le New York kple Idaho ŋu. Tso esime wode asi sea te wòzu se eye Micron ɖe gbeƒãe be dɔwɔƒea anɔ New York la, Tenney va le asi kpem ɖe eŋu wu. Le May 2025 me la, Tenney kple eƒe dɔwɔhati 20 siwo tso akpa eve me to Building Advanced Semiconductor Investment Credit, alo BASIC, Act vɛ, si wotu ɖe CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea ƒe ɖoɖowo dzi. Sea adzi adzɔnuwo wɔwɔ ƒe gadede asi deŋgɔ ƒe gaxɔgbalẽvi ɖe edzi tso 25% va ɖo 35% eye wòakeke eƒe anyinɔnɔ ɖe enu vaseɖe Dec. 31, 2030. Wowɔ se sia abe Trump ƒe asidede adzɔxexe kple gazazã ŋuti se ƒe akpa aɖe ene le ƒe 2025 me, si nye One Big Beautiful Bill Act. Tenney ƒe nukpɔsusu siwo le tɔtrɔm le asixɔxɔ si le CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea ŋu na wòŋlɔ nutoa me nuŋlɔɖi aɖe ɖe eƒe X-nyatakaka dzi, si yɔ eƒe akɔdada si tsi tre ɖe sea ŋu. Tenney gblɔ be yexɔ ŋgɔ na Aƒea ƒe agbagbadzedze be woatu Micron ƒe semiconductor dɔwɔƒe gã aɖe le Syracuse gbɔ. Eƒe akpaa sesẽ wu ema. Le ƒe 2022 me la, Tenney da asi ɖe CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea dzi, si na dziɖuɖua do alɔ Micron dɔwɔƒea mlɔeba dɔlar biliɔn geɖe. Ke hã, le ƒe 2025 me la, etsɔ se aɖe si Trump de asi eye wòde asi ete si keke CHIPS kple Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Sea ƒe ɖoɖo vevi aɖe ɖe enu hekekee ɖe enu la na. Nya la ƒe akpa aɖe de pɛpɛpɛ gake egblẽ nya veviwo ɖi, eyata míebu eŋu be Nyateƒe Afã.

claim: dzre si dzɔ le BJP ƒe subɔsubɔhakplɔla kple nutome nudzɔla aɖe dome le Uttar Pradesh
evidence: Video aɖe si me ŋutsu eve nɔ dzre wɔm le ŋutilã me la le kakam ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Wole video klipi sia mam kple nya si wogblɔ be eɖe dzre aɖe si dzɔ le BJP subɔsubɔhakplɔla kple nutome nudzɔla aɖe dome le Uttar Pradesh la fia.  Facebook zãla aɖe da nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ɖe edzi kple nya si gbɔna: ജില്ലാ കളക്ടറും ബിജെപി മന്ത്രിയും തമ്മിൽ പൊരിഞ്ഞ അടി....യൂ പി യിൽ...😁 Aʋawɔwɔ le Nutomedzikpɔla kple BJP ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla dome.... Le UP... 😁 Àteŋu akpɔ nyatakaka la le afisia.  NYATEƑE KPƆKPƆ NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Be woaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ dzi la, woɖe foto vevi siwo le video si kaka ɖe amewo me la me eye wozã nɔnɔmetata siwo wogbugbɔ di tsɔ di wo. Esia na woɖe nyadzɔdzɔ aɖe si ABP Live ta le January 17, 2018 dzi, si me nukpɔkpɔ mawo ke le. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa medzɔ le Uttar Pradesh o. Ke boŋ edzɔ le Latehar nuto me le Jharkhand.  Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nyaʋiʋlia nɔ BJP ƒe ŋgɔnɔla aɖe kple Latehar Nutome Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔla (DTO) dome. Wogblɔ be nyaʋiʋlia do mo ɖa esi ʋuɖola la ɖe ŋkɔdzesi aɖe si ŋu womeɖe mɔ ɖo o ɖa le BJP ŋgɔnɔla ƒe ʋu si nye ame ŋutɔ tɔ ŋu.  X nyatakaka aɖe si nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe ANI ŋlɔ, si hã woŋlɔ le January 17, 2018 dzi la, tsɔ video ma ke. ANI ƒe nyatakakaa ɖee fia be BJP ƒe ŋgɔnɔlae nye Rajdhani Yadav eye wògblɔ be edze nutome ʋuɖola la dzi esi woɖe eƒe ʋu ƒe ŋkɔdzesi ɖa vɔ megbe. ANI gagblɔ be emegbe kpovitɔwo lé Yadav.  Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye The New Indian Express, Zee News, Firstpost, hã ka nya ta tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu ɣemaɣi. Woƒe nyatakakawo ɖo kpe edzi be dzrewɔwɔa ku ɖe Latehar Nutome Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔla kple BJP ƒe ŋgɔnɔla aɖe ŋu, ke menye nutome nudzɔla aɖe o.  Video nyatakaka aɖe si The Quint ta ɖe ɣeyiɣi gbãtɔ si me ʋuɖola la ɖe ŋkɔdzesi le ʋua ŋu, si wogblɔ be eyae he dzrewɔwɔa vɛ la fia kpee.    Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kple kakaɖedzi be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖe dzrewɔwɔ aɖe fia le BJP ƒe subɔsubɔhakplɔla kple nutome nudzɔla aɖe dome le Uttar Pradesh la nye alakpa.

claim: U.S. Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth gblɔ be: "Etea ɖeɖi ame ŋu be woalé ŋku ɖe aʋawɔhawo ŋu, alo le nyateƒe me la, aʋawɔha ɖesiaɖe, eye woakpɔ asrafo damiwo. Nenema ke melɔ̃ ɖe edzi kura be woakpɔ aʋafia damiwo kple ƒudzisrafomegãwo le Pentagon ƒe akpatawo me kple aʋafiagã siwo xɔ ŋgɔ le dukɔa me kple xexeame godoo o."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le Sept. 30, 2025 dzi la, U.S. Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe Dɔdzikpɔla Pete Hegseth yɔ aʋafiagãwo ƒe kpekpe aɖe le Quantico Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe dɔwɔƒe si le Virginia, le nusi nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ geɖe yɔ be aɖabaƒoƒo mamlɛtɔ ƒe kpekpe me. Le kpekpea me la, Hegseth ƒo nuƒo aɖe na amegã siwo ƒo ƒu la si me wogblɔ be eɖe ɖeklemi asrafowo kple aʋafia "damiwo" le. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla geɖe te gbe ɖe Hegseth ƒe nuƒoa ƒe akpa aɖewo dzi. Nya ɖeka si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi gblɔ be: Hegseth yɔ asrafowo kple aʋafia "damiwo". Egblɔ be ne míeyi ŋgɔ la, ahiã be subɔsubɔha me tɔ ɖesiaɖe nato ŋutilãme dodokpɔa me zi eve le ƒea me ne wodi be yewoakpɔtɔ anye aʋawɔha me tɔ. Egblɔ be asrafo dami nyenye nye "nusi dzi womate ŋu alɔ̃ ɖo o". Eƒe nya sɔ. Hegseth ɖe ɖeklemi asrafowo kple aʋafia "damiwo" vavã eye wòbia be woawɔ tɔtrɔ le woƒe kamedede ŋu. Míexɔ video siwo me wògblɔ nya sia le kpakple eƒe nuƒoa ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo tso Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe. Esi wòle alea ta la, nya sia nye nya si wogblɔ be esɔ. Hegseth ƒe nyawo dze egɔme tso 16:20 ƒe dzesi dzi: Le dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖi (si wodzra ɖo) tso Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe (si Dukplɔla Donald Trump gbugbɔ ŋkɔ na wòzu Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe) nu la, Hegseth gblɔ be, "Le nyateƒe me la, etena ɖeɖi ame ŋu be nàlé ŋku ɖe aʋawɔhawo ŋu, alo le nyateƒe me la, habɔbɔ ɖesiaɖe, eye nàkpɔ asrafo damiwo. Nenema ke, womate ŋu axɔe kura be woakpɔ aʋafia damiwo o." kple ƒudzisrafomegãwo le Pentagon ƒe akpatawo me kple aʋafiagã siwo le dukɔa me godoo kple xexeame godoo." Míegbugbɔ eƒe nya bliboa ta le ete (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ƒe sikase yeyeae nye esi: wɔ wò aʋawɔha abe alesi nàwɔe na wò ŋutɔ viwò ƒe aʋawɔha ene. Ðe nàdi be wòasubɔ kple asrafo siwo da ami alo esiwo medze o alo le asrafoha siwo wona hehee te alo anɔ ame siwo mate ŋu aɖo dzidzenu veviwo gbɔ o la xa, alo le aʋawɔha si me woɖe dzidzenuwo dzi kpɔtɔ ale be asrafoha ƒomevi aɖewo nate ŋu age ɖe eme, le aʋawɔha si me wodo kplɔlawo ɖe ŋgɔ le susu bubu siwo menye dzedze, dɔwɔwɔ kple aʋawɔwɔ ta oa? Menye ao koe ŋuɖoɖoa nye o, ke boŋ dzomavɔe nye ao. [...] Mele mɔ fiam hã be aʋawɔla siwo le aʋawɔwɔdɔwo me nawɔ woƒe subɔsubɔ ƒe kamedede dodokpɔ le ŋutsu ƒe dzidzenu si woɖo ɖi si me ŋutsu alo nyɔnu nyenye mele o si xɔ dzesi siwo wu 70 le alafa me la nu. Nusianu dzea egɔme tso ŋutilã ƒe kamedede kple dzedzeme dzi. Ne Aʋawɔnyawo Gbɔkpɔla ate ŋu awɔ PT sesẽ edziedzi la, nenema ke míaƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔ ɖesiaɖe hã ate ŋui. Ne míagblɔe tututu la, etea ɖeɖi ame ŋu be nàlé ŋku ɖe aʋawɔhawo ŋu, alo le nyateƒe me la, aʋawɔha ɖesiaɖe, eye nàkpɔ asrafoha damiwo. Nenema ke mesɔ kura be woakpɔ aʋafia damiwo kple ƒudzisrafomegãwo le Pentagon kple aʋafiagãwo ƒe akpatawo me le dukɔa me kple xexeame godoo o. Enye dzedzeme gbegblẽ. Egblẽ, eye menye amesiwo míenye ye o. Eyata, eɖanye Ranger si le yame alo Ranger si le zikpui dzi, ame ŋutɔ ƒe ame yeye ŋutɔ alo aʋafia si nye ɣletivi ene o, ele be nàɖo kɔkɔme kple kpekpeme ƒe dzidzenuwo gbɔ eye nàto wò PT dodokpɔa me. Eye abe alesi zimenɔla gblɔe ene la, ẽ, PT dodokpɔ aɖeke meli o. Gake egbea, le nye mɔfiafia nu la, wobia tso ƒuƒoƒoa me tɔ ɖesiaɖe si le ɖoƒe ɖesiaɖe si be wòado PT dodokpɔ zi eve le ƒea me, eye wòaɖo kɔkɔme kple kpekpeme ƒe nudidiwo hã gbɔ zi eve le ƒea me le ƒe sia ƒe si wòwɔ dɔ me. Azɔ hã egbea, le nye mɔfiafia nu la, wobia tso aʋawɔla ɖesiaɖe si le míaƒe ƒuƒoƒoa me si be wòawɔ PT le dɔmegbe ɖesiaɖe. Ele be wòanye nusi me susu le, eye unit akpa gãtɔ wɔa ema xoxo, gake míele ewɔm ɖe ɖoɖo nu. Eye míele nu ƒom, abe, yoga dzodzoe kple keke, PT sesẽ ŋutɔŋutɔ kple abe -- abe unit alo abe ame ɖekaɖeka ene o. Hegseth ƒo nu tso "dzadzraɖo ƒe dzidzenuwo" hã ŋu si bia tso asrafowo si be woalũ ta. Egblɔ be, "Asrafoha aɖeke mele mía si si yɔ fũ kple Nordik trɔ̃subɔlawo o," eye wòɖe gbeƒãe be "beardos maganɔ anyi o." Eɖe ɖeklemi ameƒomevi vovovowo ƒe ɖoɖowo le asrafowo me, hegblɔ be, "Dzesidenu ɣletiwo, DEI dɔwɔƒewo, dudes in dresses megali o." Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, U.S. asrafowo ƒe alɔdze vovovowo ƒe ŋutilã ƒe kamedede dodokpɔ vovovowoe le wo si. Asrafowo xɔ nudzɔdzɔ atɔ̃ ƒe dodokpɔ — si me "e etɔ̃ gbugbɔgawɔ ƒe deadlift si sɔ gbɔ wu, asi-ɖe asi le eŋu push-up, sprint-drag-carry, plank kple two-mile run" — le June 2025. Míeƒo nu tso nya geɖe siwo wogblɔ tso Hegseth ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye numekuku le eƒe nya siwo wògblɔ va yi siwo tsi tre ɖe nyɔnuwo dede aʋawɔwɔ ƒe akpawo me ŋu.

claim: U.S. dziɖuɖu ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo do go ɖo kpe edzi be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua le "mɔxexe ɖe mɔzɔzɔ ememetɔ" dom kpɔ le dukɔa ƒe liƒowo me le ƒe 2025 ƒe domedome.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le July 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze gblɔ be U.S. dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo do go la ɖo kpe edzi be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɖua le "mɔxeɖenu siwo le ememe mɔzɔzɔ" dom kpɔ le U.S. liƒowo me —si nye afɔɖeɖe si to vovo na eƒe mɔxexe ɖe mɔzɔzɔ nu si me dukɔ bubuwo kpɔ gome le. Snopes xlẽlawo di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe nya sia ŋu. Nuxlẽla ɖeka tsɔ Facebook-nuŋlɔɖi aɖe ɖo ɖa —Meta ƒe ŋkɔ na video kpui siwo woɖena le Facebook kple Instagram —si ɖe Trump kple eƒe ʋufɔtiwo ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo fia le Netherlands le June 2025 me, kpakple yameʋudzeƒea ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo katã, nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe akpa aɖewo kple stock videowo. Woŋlɔ tanya si nye, "Nyadzɔdzɔ yeyewo: Akpa si kplɔe ɖo? Mɔzɔzɔ ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔléle nu le U.S. me si ŋu wole nu ƒom tsoe fifia." Ame 121,000 kple edzivɔ kpɔ reel la. Ezãla bubuwo, siwo dome TikTok hã le, hã ma video ma ke alo yeye si me ŋutinya ɖeka ma ke le. Gbe aɖe si wogblɔ le Facebook ƒe agbalẽa me gblɔ be: Nyadzɔdzɔ yeyewo gbɔna le gaƒoƒo si va yi me. Nusi dze egɔme tso liƒowo dzi ate ŋu anɔ dzɔdzɔm le dukɔa me fifia. Le nuŋlɔɖi yeye siwo do go tso DHS kple TSA gbɔ nu la, wole mɔzɔzɔ ƒe mɔxeɖenu siwo le dukɔa me dom kpɔ xoxo, eye wodze egɔme tso teƒe siwo afɔku le ŋutɔ le New York, California kple Texas. Dɔwɔƒe siwo menye dziɖuɖua tɔ o, ID-mɔ̃wo me dzodzro le vome kple le go aɖewo me la, gbegbe be womage ɖe dukɔa me yameʋuwo me o. Nuŋlɔɖiawo yɔ dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋuti ɖoɖowo, gake amedzrowo ƒe senyalawo kple amegbetɔ ƒe gomenɔamesi taʋlilawo gblɔ be nusi le dzɔdzɔm la nye nusi tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o. Wole gbe biam U.S. dukɔmevi aɖewo le esi dukɔ eve le wo si ta ko. Le go ɖeka me la, wotɔ ƒome aɖe si tso Miami yina Chicago, wobia gbe wo eye wogblɔ na wo be wole woƒe mɔzɔzɔa me tom. Eye menye yameʋudzeƒewo koe o. Wole ŋku lém ɖe bɔsɖoƒewo, ketekedzeƒewo, mɔdodo gã siwo le dukɔwo dome gɔ̃ hã ŋu fifia hena nusi dziɖuɖumegãwo yɔna be nusiwo ŋu wotsi dzi ɖo ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le wowóm kple video siwo me wotɔ te amewo evɔ womeɖe nu me kɔ nyuie o, gake White House yi edzi le gbegbem be mɔxeɖenu aɖeke mele ememe o. Ðe esia ku ɖe dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋua, alo ɖe dziɖuɖua le dziɖuɖu ƒe akpa yeye aɖe wɔm kpoo? Dukɔmeviwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti senyala aɖe gblɔe tẽ. "Ne ènye dukɔmevi si wotsɔ dzɔdzɔme tɔ alo Amerikatɔ dzidzime evelia gɔ̃ hã la, wò ʋuʋu ƒe ablɔɖe le nɔnɔme aɖe nu fifia. Eye ɖo ŋku edzi be, liƒoa gakpɔtɔ le tutum. Fifia biabia lae nye be, ɖe mí katã míele atɔa me xoxoa? Esia meganye nuxlɔ̃ame o. Ele dzɔdzɔm xoxo." Ke hã, alakpae ŋutinyaa nye. Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ƒe didiwo mekpɔ nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe aɖeke si ka nya ta tso ŋgɔyiyi siwo ku ɖe "mɔzɔzɔ ƒe mɔxeɖenu ememetɔ" siwo woɖo ɖe U.S. liƒowo dzi ŋu o. Bing, DuckDuckGo, Google kple Yahoo ƒe didi mawo tɔgbe hã dze ƒuƒlu na nyadzɔdzɔ siwo woxɔ nyitsɔ laa ku ɖe videoa ƒe yɔyɔ tso "nuŋlɔɖi yeye siwo do go" siwo wogblɔ be wotso Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe (DHS) kple Ʋuɖonyawo Gbɔkpɔha (TSA) gbɔ ŋu. Ne ɖe ame aɖe ɖe nuŋlɔɖi mawo tɔgbe aɖe ɖe go la, anye ne asitsaƒe siwo le xexeame katã aƒo nu tso nyaa ŋu le afisiafi. Azɔ hã, nuŋlɔla la meɖe gbeƒã nya aɖeke si de dzesi ame le nya geɖe siwo wogblɔ la ŋu o, si me "dukɔmeviwo ƒe gomenɔamesiwo ŋuti senyala" si woyɔ le videoa me ƒe ŋkɔ hã le. White House ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Abigail Jackson gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be, "Edze ƒã be alakpanyadzɔdzɔe nye esia." Facebook ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒea ɖe ŋutinyagbɔgblɔ kple ɖewohĩ nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo wotsɔ dɔwɔnu siwo nye artificial-intelligence (AI) wɔ hã fia. Gbea mesɔ kple tiatia aɖeke si woate ŋu akpɔ le dutoƒo le ElevenLabs generative-AI nyatakakadzraɖoƒe xɔŋkɔa o gake eɖi abe gbe siwo AI-dzi siwo va yi siwo Snopes dzro ene. Azɔ hã, scan si wowɔ kple AI-detection website Sightengine kpɔe be anɔ eme ŋutɔ be akɔnta si da reel la ƒe profile photo (si wodzra ɖo) hã nye AI software ƒe nuwɔna. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyɔnu si ŋu wole nu ƒom tsoe ƒe ɣe ƒe ŋkumewu ƒe gbagbã gbogboawo ate ŋu aɖe vodada aɖe si AI dɔwɔnu si wɔ nɔnɔmetata la wɔ la afia. Be woagaxlẽ nu geɖe la, numekuku aɖe si wowɔ va yi dzro nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Trump ƒe fɔbubu le nuvlowɔwɔ ta xe mɔ nɛ le eɖokui si be megage ɖe dukɔ 37 me o la me.

claim: Kpovitɔwo: Dunyahelawo Mehe Dzobibi le Oregon ƒe Gbemelãwo O
evidence: Ya sesẽ aɖe si tɔgbe medzɔ kpɔ o eye mebɔ le ŋutinya me o la tu to Cascade togbɛwo ƒe afɔ nu le Memleɖa Sep. 7 ƒe ŋdɔ me vaseɖe Kuɖagbe Sep. 8 ƒe ŋdi me, si na dzobibi siwo le dzo dam kabakaba la gasẽ ɖe edzi. Yaƒoƒo ƒe nudzɔdzɔ sia ƒomevi mebɔ le ƒea ƒe ɣeyiɣi sia me o; ya sesẽ siwo ƒe sesẽme alea la dzena le dzomeŋɔli ɣletiwo me wu. Tsɔ kpe ɖe dzoxɔxɔa ŋu la, enye yame ƒe nɔnɔme si le tɔtrɔm si wole kpɔkpɔm la ƒe kpɔɖeŋu bubu.

claim: Nukpɔkpɔawo ɖe Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó si dzɔ le November 10, 2025 dzi fia.
evidence: Le November 10, 2025 dzi la, ʋu aɖe wó le Gate No. 1 gbɔ le Red Fort metro ʋudzeƒe le New Delhi, si wu ame wuietɔ̃ ya teti eye wòde abi ame bubu geɖe ŋu. Wotsɔ numekukua de asi na Dukɔa ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe (NIA), eye dziɖuɖumegãwo yɔ Dɔwɔna Siwo Meɖe Mɔ Na O (Mɔxexe Ðe Mɔ Nu) Se eye woku kadodo siwo le ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe mɔ̃ aɖe (afisia, afisia) dome. Le nudzɔdzɔa megbe la, nukpɔkpɔ geɖe te kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eye wogblɔ be woɖe nukpɔkpɔ siwo tso Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó la fia. Mina míaɖo kpe nya siwo wogblɔ le nya siawo me le nyati sia me dzi.  Nya si wogblɔ: Nukpɔkpɔawo ɖe Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó si dzɔ le 10 November 2025. Nyateƒenya: Nukpɔkpɔ siwo kaka ɖe amewo me dometɔ aɖeke medo ƒome kple Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó o. Foto gbãtɔ tso ʋu si woda bɔmb ɖe Beirut ƒe Haret Hreik nutoa me le ƒe 2014 me, eye evelia tso Israel ƒe yameʋu si woda ɖe Hezbollah ƒe nɔƒewo dzi le Beirut ƒe dzigbe le ƒe 2024 me. Eyata nya si wogblɔ le posu me la nye AME BUBU.  Foto 1 Foto sia ɖe ʋu geɖe siwo le dzo dam fia eye wogblɔ be etso Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó megbe.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Google Lens dzi didi le foto si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu me na wokpɔ nyatakaka geɖe (afisia, afisia, kple afisia) tso January 2014 me siwo ɖe foto ɖeka ma ke fia. Nyatakaka siawo ɖee fia be fotoa ɖe nusiwo do tso bɔmbdada le ʋu me le Beirut ƒe dzigbe nuto si nye Haret Hreik, si nye Hezbollah ƒe mɔ̃ sesẽ aɖe me la fia.  Foto 2 Wogblɔ be foto sia si ɖe bɔmb aɖe fia la tso Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó me.  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒea le afisia.  Google Lens dzi didi le foto si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu me na nyatakaka geɖe (le afisia, le afisia) tso September 2024 me, si gblɔ be eɖe dzudzɔ si le Beirut ƒe dzigbe nutowo dzi le Israel ƒe yameʋuwo ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Hezbollah ƒe nɔƒewo ŋu megbe. Foto si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye ƒe 2024 ƒe foto sia ƒe ahuhɔ̃e me tɔ eye medo ƒome kple Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó o.  Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, X nyatakaka aɖe si PIB Fact Check ŋlɔ le November 10, 2025 dzi ɖe foto si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ɖa, si na eme kɔ be etso bɔmb aɖe si dzɔ le ƒe 2024 me le Lebanon ke menye Delhi o.  Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖewo le nɔnɔmetata xoxo aɖe kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, alakpatɔe gblɔ be edo ƒome kple bɔmbdada le Delhi#PIBFactCheck: ✅ Nɔnɔmetata la tso ƒe 2024 ƒe bɔmb aɖe me le Lebanon, ke menye tso #Delhi o 🔗 https://t.co/RuGArnfHYM 🔍 Kpɔ nya mawo tɔgbe ɖa ɣesiaɣi to kakaɖedzinya... pic.twitter.com/g0IeypSy34 — PIB Fact Check (@PIBFactCheck) November 10, 2025 Ne míagblɔe kpuie la, wole nukpɔkpɔ xoxowo & esiwo meku ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu o la mam, tsɔ wo do ƒome kple Delhi Red Fort ƒe wowó le 10 November 2025 dzi.

claim: Numekuku aɖe ɖee fia be Amerikatɔ 23% koe ate ŋu afia asi Iran le anyigbatata dzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu le ƒe 2020 me numekuku aɖe ɖee fia be U.S. ame siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikemawɔlawo dome ƒe 23% — menye Amerikatɔwo katã o — ate ŋu ade dzesi Iran nyuie le xexeame ƒe anyigbatata si womede dzesii o dzi. Le March 2026 me, esi U.S. kple Israel ƒe aʋawɔwɔ kple Iran nɔ sesẽm ɖe edzi la, nya siwo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be Amerikatɔ 23% koe ate ŋu afia asi Iran le anyigbatata dzi. Zi geɖe la, nɔnɔmetata siwo ɖe Titina Ɣedzeƒe ƒe anyigbatata fia la nɔa nyatakakaawo me eye zi geɖe la, woama wo tsɔ ɖea ɖeklemi Amerikatɔwo ƒe anyigbaŋutinunya alo dunyahehe ŋuti sidzedze. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, X zãla ɖeka ma nɔnɔmetata aɖe si ƒe tanyae nye "Wobia tso Amerikatɔwo si be woafia asi Iran le anyigbatata dzi," eye wòŋlɔ ɖe nya sia te be: "Mele mɔ kpɔm be esia menye nyateƒe o..." Nɔnɔmetata la gblɔ be "23% de dzesi Iran nyuie." Zãla bubu ŋlɔ ɖe anyigbatataa ƒe nyawo te be: “Amerikatɔ akpa gãtɔ mate ŋu akpɔ Iran le anyigbatata dzi gɔ̃ hã o.” Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, nya sia ƒe vovototowo kaka ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Facebook, Reddit, X kple Instagram. Kpuie ko la, akɔntabubu si wogblɔ le afisiafi be Amerikatɔ 23% koe ate ŋu afia asi Iran le anyigbatata dzi la dzɔ tso ƒe 2020 ƒe numekuku ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe si Morning Consult (numekuladɔwɔƒe aɖe) kple Politico wɔ me. Gake numekukua dzidze U.S. atikemawɔla siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na, ​​ke menye Amerikatɔwo katã o. Le numekuku ma me la, ame 23% siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe atikea me la de dzesi Iran nyuie le xexeame katã ƒe anyigbatata dzi, evɔ 28% ya de dzesii le Titina Ɣedzeƒe ƒe anyigbatata si wodzi ɖe edzi me. Esi wòle alea ta la, nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye nyateƒe, gake nya siwo ƒo xlãe ya bu. Akɔntabubu sia tso January 2020 ƒe numekuku aɖe si Morning Consult wɔ le hadome kple Politico si bia tso amesiwo wobia gbee si be woade dzesi Iran le anyigbatata siwo dzi womede dzesii o dzi. Wowɔ numekukua le U.S. ame 1,995 siwo ŋlɔ ŋkɔ ɖe akɔdada me dome eye vodada ƒe vovototoa nye alafa memamã 2 kpe ɖe eŋu alo ɖee ɖa. Wowɔe le U.S. yameʋu si me ame aɖeke mele o ƒe amedzidzedze si wu Iran Aʋafia Qassem Soleimani megbe kpuie, si nye nudzɔdzɔ si na masɔmasɔ siwo nɔ United States kple Iran dome gasẽ ɖe edzi ŋutɔ. Numekulawo zã anyigbatata ƒomevi eve tsɔ do amesiwo wobia gbee ƒe anyigbaŋutinunya kpɔ. Esi wotsɔ Titina Ɣedzeƒe ƒe anyigbatata si wodzi ɖe edzi fia la, amesiwo wobia gbee ƒe 28% de dzesi Iran nyuie. Esi woɖe xexeame katã ƒe anyigbatata si lolo wu fia la, 23% tia teƒe si sɔ. Xexlẽme mamlɛtɔae nye xexlẽme si kaka ɖe Internet dzi zi geɖe. Numekukua ɖee fia hã be amesiwo wobia gbee tɔtɔa Iran kple teƒe bubuwo enuenu. Gomenɔla aɖewo tia dukɔ siwo te ɖe wo ŋu abe Iraq ene, eye bubuwo tsɔ Iran da ɖe nuto siwo mele Titina Ɣedzeƒe o didi me. Vevietɔ la, numekukua medzidze Amerikatɔwo katã ƒe sidzedze o. Ewɔ numekuku le U.S. atikemawɔla siwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na, ​​siwo nye ameha sue aɖe si me ɖevi suewo kple ame tsitsi siwo womeŋlɔ ŋkɔ be yewoada akɔ o la ɖa. Le wo katã me la, togbɔ be akɔntabubua tso numekuku ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe me hã la, wogblɔnɛ enuenu nya siwo ƒo xlãe manɔmee be amesiwo wobia gbee nye amesiwo woŋlɔ ŋkɔ na be woada akɔ tsɔ wu be woanye U.S. dukɔmeviwo katã. Menye Morning Consult ƒe numekukuae nye numekuku gbãtɔ si do Amerikatɔwo ƒe anyigba ƒe nɔnɔme ŋuti sidzedze kpɔ le Iran ŋu o. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, numekuku aɖe si National Geographic Society-Roper wɔ le ƒe 2006 me le Amerikatɔ siwo xɔ tso ƒe 18 va ɖo ƒe 24 ŋu ɖee fia be 26% ate ŋu akpɔ Iran le Titina Ɣedzeƒe ƒe anyigbatata dzi. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe domedome la, míeku nya si wogblɔ be numekuku aɖe ɖee fia be Republicantɔwo ƒe atikemawɔlawo ƒe 47% ado alɔ U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump kokoko nenye be ekpɔ gome le gadzikpɔla si megali o Jeffrey Epstein ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe nuvlowɔwɔwo me le se nu gɔ̃ hã.

claim: Arkansas ŋutsu aɖe lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yede ɖevi afɔku me esi wòfɔ fu na nyɔnuvi ƒe 15 vi aɖe, eye wòƒo asa na gaxɔmenɔnɔ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le July 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, nya aɖewo kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Arkansas ŋutsu aɖe si wolé le esi wosusu be edɔ ɖevi sue aɖe gbɔ sesẽe ta la do le gaxɔ me esi wòlɔ̃ ɖe nubabla aɖe si wowɔ be wòaɖe kuku nɛ dzi. Nyaʋiʋlia gagblɔ be gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe amedzidzedzea na ɖevi sue si ŋu nya ku ɖo la fɔ fu. Zãlawo le hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abeFacebook (archived)andInstagram (archived,archived) kaka ŋutsua ƒe mug shot ɖe nyatakaka siwo me nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo xlẽ be, le kpɔɖeŋu me, "amegbetɔ fɔ fu na ɖevi, eye ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la na wòzɔ." Zãla aɖewo tsɔ woawo ŋutɔ ƒe numeɖeɖe kpee abe "Edo dziku gake mewɔ nuku nam o." Esia nye Mason Lee Gibson si xɔ ƒe 23 eye wòfɔ fu na ɖevi eye wòva wu enu be dodokpɔ koe wòxɔ! 🤬🤬🤬 pic.twitter.com/Vic35MYm3C — Suzie rizzio (@Suzierizzo1) July 22, 2025 Nya si wogblɔ be Arkansas ŋutsu aɖe lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yede ɖevi afɔku me le esi wòfɔ fu na ɖevi sue aɖe eye wòƒo asa na gaxɔmenɔnɔ vɔ megbe la nye nyateƒe. Mason Lee Gipson ye nye ŋutsu si ŋu nya ku ɖo si tsɔ eƒe fɔbubua yi nutomeʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si le Craighead County, Arkansas, le July 17, 2025 dzi, le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo nye toofficial nu. Le theprobable cause affidavit nu la, Gipson lɔ̃ faa yi ɖabia gbee le Aug. 6, 2024, le nyatoƒoetoto si wotsɔ yi Arkansas Department of Human Services (DHS) le July 30, 2024. Atamkakagbalẽa gblɔ be nyatoƒoetotoa na DHS ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe ŋu "le nyɔnu aɖe si xɔ ƒe 15 kple ŋutsu si xɔ ƒe 22 si womenya o dome. Le nudzɔdzɔa me ame eveawo dɔ kple wo nɔewo si na ƒe 15 vi la fɔ fu. Ƒe 22 vi la gblɔ be ye xɔlɔ̃ [sic] ye kple ye fofo. Gawu la, atamkakagbalẽa ka nya ta be "Mason gblɔ be yeno aha sesẽ hã. Mason lɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yedɔ kple nyɔnu si xɔ ƒe 15 la. Mason gblɔ be yenya be mesɔ o eye be yeƒe susu mele nɔnɔme nyuitɔ me o." The search of theArkansas Judiciary Case Searchfor Gipson's name also revealed a substantial number of trafficcandchild support violations beginning in 2021. Nuŋlɔɖi ma ke gblɔ be vi etɔ̃ le Gipson si xɔ ƒe 5, 2 kple "vidzidzi yeye," togbɔ be womenya nenye be "vidzidzi" si ŋu nya ku ɖo la ku ɖe ɖevi si ŋu wowɔ nuvevii ŋu o hã. Axa si yɔGipson ƒe ɖeviwo ƒe afɔku ƒe nutsotso ɖee fia be elɔ̃ ɖe edzi be yeɖi fɔ le nuvlowɔwɔ si nye "dede ɖevi sue aɖe ƒe nyonyo afɔku me — 2nd degree" le July 17, 2025. Nukpɔsusu si wotsɔ ɖe Gipson ŋu, si woŋlɔ le Sept. 9, 2024, tsɔ nya ɖe eŋu be ewɔ nuvlo si lolo wu "gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe amedzidzedze le dzidzenu enelia me" si va kple a fetu "vaseɖe $10,000.00 kple/alo vaseɖe ƒe 6" le gaxɔ me. Gake woɖe nya si wotsɔ ɖe eŋu kple tohehe si do tso eme dzi kpɔtɔ esi Gipson lɔ̃ be yeawɔ nubabla aɖe atsɔ aʋli ye ɖokui ta. Le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ƒe sedede nu la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃la la de se be womana Gipson naŋlɔ ŋkɔ be enye gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla o togbɔ be nuvlowɔwɔ si dzi wolɔ̃ ɖo la ƒe nɔnɔme le hã. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖi bubu ɖee fia be wodo fe na Gipson be wòaxe dɔlar 690 ɖe amesi ŋu wowɔ nuvevii ta eye wonae ɣleti 12 ƒe dodokpɔ si dzi wokpɔna ɖe gaxɔmenɔnɔ teƒe. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea gblɔ be ele be wòawu susu ƒe lãmesẽ ŋuti numekuku kpakple "dzilanyenye ƒe klasswo" hã nu. Zi geɖe la, wozãa aʋatsokaka ƒe nubablawo abe mɔnu si dzi woato awɔ dɔ nyuie le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea me ene. Le agbalẽ aɖe si Bolch Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si le Duke Sesuku ta nu la, "agbalẽnyalagãwo bu akɔnta be ne mede ɖeke o la, wokpɔa dukɔa kple dziɖuɖua ƒe nya 90 le alafa me gbɔ to adzɔxexe ƒe nubabla me. Nya gbogbo siwo wozãna tsɔ tsoa nya me le nya gbogbo aɖewo ŋu na nuwɔna sia zu mɔ̃ si wɔa dɔ nyuie le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo."

Nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔ ɖe agbalẽwo me la gblɔa United States Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe numekuku nyatakaka si mesɔ o tsɔ doa vlo South Korea dukplɔla

AFP Anyiehe Korea





Nutata ƒe Gomenɔamesi © AFP 2017-2025. Nyatakaka siawo zazã ɖesiaɖe le asitsatsa me bia be woawɔ nudɔdɔ. Zi afisia dzi be nànya nu geɖe.


				United States mebu South Korea Dukplɔla Lee Jae Myung be enye "nuvlowɔla" o, si to vovo na Koreagbe me nyatakaka siwo yɔ nyatakaka aɖe si sewɔtakpekpea ƒe numekuku alɔdzedɔwɔƒea yɔ. December 2024 ƒe nyatakaka si Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe (CRS) ta la dzro South Korea ƒe dunyahehe me kuxi si do mo ɖa le dukplɔla Yoon Suk Yeol si nɔ zi dzi ɣemaɣi la ɖeɖe le zi dzi megbe, eye wòde dzesii be wotsɔ nya ɖe Lee -- amesi wosusu be eyae nye ame si le ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔwɔ kaba -- ŋu be ewɔ nuvlo siwo ate ŋu ana wòadze na dudɔnunɔla ne wobu fɔe.
			


"U.S. Sewɔtakpekpea ɖo Lee Jae Myung be enye nuvlowɔla le se nu," Koreagbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ xlẽ le nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woma le Facebook dzi le September 16, 2025 dzi.Nɔnɔmetata la hã lɔ nusiwo dze abe South Korea dukplɔla ƒe nɔnɔmetatawo ene kple nyatakaka aɖe si tso CRS gbɔ le Koreagbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ geɖe wu xa si gblɔ be, "Nubabla aɖeke meli na nuvlowɔla o" kple "U.S. gblẽ Lee Jae Myung ɖi xoxo".

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso Facebook nyatakaka si wolé le September 22, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Woma nɔnɔmetata ma ke geɖe le ɖusimetɔwo kple ƒuƒoƒo siwo le Facebook dzi dome.Wozã nɔnɔmetata la hã abe nɔnɔmetata sue aɖe na YouTube video aɖe le July me. Videoa te gbe ɖe edzi be: "CRS, le nyatakaka aɖe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo tso ƒe 2022 me la, tsɔ Lee da ɖe hatsotso si nye nuvlowɔla me vodadamanɔmee... Esia menye dunyahehe me amedzidzedze dzro aɖe ko o ke boŋ enye dziɖuɖu ƒe numekuku si dzi akpa evea siaa da asi ɖo le United States."Gake nya la nye alakpa. Nyatakaka si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe le alakpanyawo me la, wota le December 2024 me, ke menye ƒe 2022 me o, eye togbɔ be ede dzesi nya siwo wotsɔ ɖe Lee ŋu hã la, mewɔe nenema o yɔe be nuvlowɔla (archived link).Nyatakakaa ƒe tanyae nye "South Korea Dunyahehe ƒe Xaxa: Asrafowo ƒe Se Kple Ameɖeɖe le Dɔ Me," nyatakakaa da dunyahehe me kakaɖedzimanɔamesi le esi woɖe dukplɔla ɣemaɣi Yoon Suk Yeol le zi dzi le asrafowo ƒe se ƒe agbagbadzedze si medze edzi o ta le ɣleti ma ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe."The timing of the court’s verdict [on Yoon’s impeachment] could be important because the presumed front-runner for tiatia kaba, DP (Democratic Party) ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Lee Jae-myung, dze ŋgɔ ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ geɖe siwo me fɔɖiɖi ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ ate ŋu ana wòadze na dunyahehe ƒe ɖoƒe o," exlẽ. "Wotso [Lee] nu be ewɔ nufitifitiwɔwɔ, eda le tiatiawɔsewo dzi, eye wòkpɔ gome le ga si wotsɔ yi Dziehe Korea si mele se nu o me. Ele nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃m le November 2024 ƒe tiatiawɔse ƒe fɔbubu si xe mɔ nɛ be wòagaʋli ɖoƒea ta o."Wotɔ te Lee ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ siwo le edzi yim le eƒe tiatia be wòanye dukplɔla ƒe ɖoƒea megbe, si wotu ɖe dukplɔse me nya aɖe si na mɔnukpɔkpɔ amesi le dɔa dzi be woagatsɔ nya ɖe eŋu o dzi (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Le adzɔgbeɖeɖe aɖe si woɖe ɖe go le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe nu la, CRS ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo metsɔa agba aɖeke le se nu o eye "mele be woaɖo ŋu ɖe wo ŋu le taɖodzinu bubu aɖeke ta tsɔ wu nyatakakawo gɔmesese le dukɔa me o" si wona sewɔlawo (archived link). CRS ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo didi ɖe vovo meɖe kpɔɖeŋu aɖeke fia be woɖɔ Lee be enye "nuvlowɔla" (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖi).Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nuŋlɔɖi bubu aɖeke hã meli si ƒo nu tso Lee ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ siwo le edzi yim ŋu tsitotsito o.AFP has debunked multiple false claims about purported U

claim: Fefewɔla Helen Hunt tsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 3 na eƒe ɖevime nufiala, "Miss Eleanor," si nye dɔlar miliɔn 3 tso eƒe Oscar-nunana me le esi nufiala la ƒe dɔ ge le esi le hehenana bubuwo nana be wòakpe ɖe Hunt ŋu le eƒe nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxia ta.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le March 2026 me la, nya aɖe si wogblɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔ be fefewɔla Helen Hunt tsɔ eƒe Academy Award xɔxɔ ƒe dɔlar miliɔn 3 na ɖevime nufiala aɖe si na hehe bubuwo be wòakpe ɖe Hunt ŋu le eƒe nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxi, si nye gbegbɔgblɔ ƒe nusɔsrɔ̃ ƒe kuxi aɖe la me. Nya la kaka ɖe Facebook kpleYouTube dzi, eye Snopes xlẽla gbogbo aɖewo do asi ɖa be yewoabia be nyateƒee hã. Facebook video aɖe gblɔ be Hunt tsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 3 "Oscar bonus" ye na nufiala tsãtɔ aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Eleanor, amesi wogblɔ be woɖe le dɔ me le ƒe 1975 me le esi wòna Hunt "nufiame bubuwo" ɖe eƒe nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxia ta. Le nyatakakaa ƒe nya nu la, Eleanor wɔ dɔ le asitsaƒewo ƒe 23 siwo kplɔe ɖo hafi zã Hunt ƒe nunana la tsɔ ʋu "nuxexlẽ ƒe nusrɔ̃ƒe si kpe ɖe ɖevi 2,000 ŋu" hafi wòku le ƒe 2019 me. Nyaʋiʋlia ƒe akpa aɖewo hã gblɔ be Hunt tsɔ eƒe Academy Award xɔxɔ ƒe nuƒoa na eƒe ɖevime nufiala tsãtɔ. Gake kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si ɖo kpe ŋutinyaa dzi o. Hunt metsɔ eƒe ƒe 1998 Oscars nuƒoa na ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye "Miss Eleanor" o eye dziɖulawo mexɔa ga ƒe fetu o, togbɔ be nyatakakaawo gblɔe hã. Míeɖo Hunt teƒenɔlawo gbɔ eye míawɔ ŋutinya sia yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. Vaseɖe ɣemaɣi la, míebu nya sia be enye alakpa. Nya sia ƒe tɔtrɔ aɖe si dze abe ɖe wòkaka to kpekpeɖeŋu tso Google ƒe AI dɔwɔnuwo gbɔ ene la gblɔ be Hunt tsɔ dɔlar miliɔn 3 na UCLA ƒe fefewɔƒe, sinima kple television dzi wɔnawo. Ke hã, míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be nudzɔdzɔ sia tɔgbe dzɔ o. Míebia Hunt teƒenɔlawo be woaɖo kpe edzi eye míelala ŋuɖoɖo. (Screenshot via Google) Huntxɔ Academy Award na Fefewɔla Nyuitɔ le Akpa Gbãtɔ me le ƒe 1997 ƒe sinima si nye "As Good As It Gets" ta. Le eƒe lɔlɔ̃ ɖe edzi nuƒoa me la, eda akpe na fefewɔwɔfiala vovovowo gake meƒo nu tso ɖevimenɔɣi nufiala aɖe si ŋkɔe nye "Miss Eleanor" ŋu o. Shesaid: Zi gbãtɔ si mekpɔ "Aƒenɔ Brown" — mekpɔe zi etɔ̃. Zi gbãtɔ si mekpɔe la, mebɔbɔ ɖe nye lɔlɔ̃tɔa gbɔ hegblɔ be, "Eya [Judi Dench] le Academy Award xɔ ge." Eye le nye susu me le zã sia me la, ewɔe nenema. Eye nenema kee nye Julie Christie, eye nenema ke Helena Bonham Carter hã le, eye nenema kee nye Kate Winslet hã. Eye le nya ma ta. nenema kee nye Billy Connolly, eye nenema kee nye Ben Affleck hã, eye nenema kee nye Joan Allen hã. Eye enye bubu nam be mawɔ dɔ le ƒe ɖeka me esime wowɔ fefe wɔnuku geɖe alea gbegbe. Susu ɖeka tae mele afisia ɖo eye eyae nye Jim Brooks. Susu ɖeka koe, eye ema koe nye susua ŋutɔŋutɔ. Ema koe nye susu si tae. Meda akpe — ɖeɖi te ŋunye be mada akpe na wò — meda akpe na Mawu be ena wò akpa sue aɖem. Jack, mesubɔa wò, ènyae. Greg, mele mɔ kpɔm be àlé alesi gbegbe wò nuwɔna le sinima sia me nya kpɔe la ɖe dzi me. Medi be mada akpe na míaƒe nuwɔlawo Bridget Johnson, Kristi Zea, Larry Mark. Amesiame si le Sony. Eŋutinunyalawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo si wòhiã be woana manɔ anyi na sinima sia. Nye fefewɔwɔ nufialawo Lurene Tuttle, afisiafi si nèle, Gordon Hunt, Larry Moss, Gary Austin, le esi wona mɔnum be masrɔ̃ nu tso ɖokuinye kple xexeame ŋu, kple mɔnu aɖe si dzi mato aɖe nye susu agblɔ ta. Melé fui be mabu amesi manye ne menye ema o. Dzinyelawo, amesiwo le avi fam le ɣeyiɣi sia me. Xɔ̃nye siwo le aƒeme le titim yi dzi kple anyime. Eye wò [Hank Azaria], ŋutsu nyuitɔ kekeake si menya la ŋutɔ. Akpe na wò kakaaka. Esia nye bubu gã aɖe ŋutɔ. Akpe na wò kakaaka. Hunt da akpe na fofoa Gordon Hunt, si nye nufiala xɔŋkɔ kple fefewɔwɔ ƒe nufiala, ɖe eƒe dzidzedzekpɔkpɔ ta nyateƒe. Le ƒe 2011 ƒe gbebiame aɖe nu la, Hunt fofo hã nye nufialagã kpeɖeŋutɔ le UCLA. Eƒe Oscar-nunana bliboa ƒe nuƒoa le YouTube: Academy Award xɔlawo mexɔa dɔlar miliɔn 3 ƒe fetu tso Academy of Motion Picture Arts and Sciences, si nye habɔbɔ si naa kafukafuawo ƒe sia ƒe gbɔ o. Ga home aɖeke meli si woaxe na Oscar-nunana o. Ke boŋ amesiwo woɖo be woawɔ fefe la xɔa nunanakotokuwo tso dɔwɔƒe siwo mewɔ ɖeka kple Sukudede o gbɔ. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, le ƒe 2025 me la, ame siwo woɖo la xɔ nunana kotoku si nye "Amesiame ɖu dzi" tso asitsaha aɖe gbɔ si me woate ŋu anɔ tsaɖiƒe dzeani aɖe femaxee, gbekui ƒe nuwɔna, ŋutigbalẽtakpɔnu xɔasiwo kple bubuwo. Nya siwo woŋlɔ tso Hunt ƒe dɔmenyonyo na eƒe nufiala ŋu hã ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo AI wɔ ƒe dzesi geɖe fia. Wo dometɔ aɖewoe nye gbeŋutise kple nyagbewo ƒe ɖoɖo si mesɔ o, kple nya aɖe si ʋãa ame si me mekɔ o tso fefewɔla la gbɔ.GPTZero, si nye dɔwɔnu si wotsɔ dea dzesi AI, hã kpɔe be anɔ eme be AI ye wɔ nuŋɔŋlɔa. (AI-deteksi dɔwɔnu siawo ƒomevi nye vodada. Snopes xlɔ̃a nu amewo be woagazã wo atsɔ akpɔ ŋuɖoɖo siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu kpeɖodzi aɖeke manɔmee o.) Esi wogbugbɔ ŋku lé ɖe Hunt ƒe gbebiame siwo wòwɔ le dutoƒo kple nyatakaka siwo wògblɔ tso eŋu le Internet dzi ŋu la, womekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be Hunt le nu ƒom tso dɔléle si wogblɔ be enye nuxexlẽ ƒe kuxi aɖe ŋu o. Míebia hã

claim: Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo kaka le ƒe 2024 me ɖɔ Paul McCartney ƒe lɛta siwo wòƒle tso John Lennon ƒe srɔ̃ɖeɖe gbãtɔ me eye wòtrɔ wo na Lennon srɔ̃ tsãtɔ kple nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si gblɔ nɛ be megadzra eƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo o la nyuie.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Cynthia Lennon dzra lɛta geɖe siwo tso John Lennon gbɔ esi srɔ̃tɔawo gbe wo nɔewo le ƒe 1968 me vɔ megbe, eye Paul McCartney ƒle ɖeka nyateƒe, wɔ eƒe nɔnɔmetata eye wòtrɔe nɛ. Ke hã ... ... McCartney trɔ John Lennon ƒe lɛta ɖeka, menye lɛta geɖe o, eye wòwɔe ƒe geɖe, menye ŋkeke geɖe o, le lɛtaawo dzadzra megbe. Kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be McCartney tsɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖe kpe ɖe eŋu si gblɔ na Cynthia Lennon be megadzra eƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo o. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, internet zãlawo gblɔa ŋutinya aɖe tso asiwɔwɔ ɖe nya dzi dodzidzɔname aɖe si wogblɔ be Paul McCartney wɔ na eƒe Beatles haƒoha me tɔ John Lennon srɔ̃ xoxoa ŋu. Le ŋutinyaa nu la, Cynthia Lennon, si ɖe John tso ƒe 1962 va ɖo ƒe 1968 me eye wòku le ƒe 2015 me la dzra lɔlɔ̃gbalẽ siwo tso srɔ̃a xoxo xɔŋkɔa gbɔ be yeatsɔ akpɔ yeƒe agbemenuhiahiãwo gbɔ le woƒe srɔ̃gbegbe megbe. Esi McCartney se nudzadzra sia la, wogblɔ be eƒle ŋkuɖodzinuawo eye wòtrɔ wo nɛ. Ŋutinya la ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo dze le nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye TikTok (nudzraɖoƒe), Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Threads (nudzraɖoƒe). Nya sia kaka ɖe internet dzi le mɔ vovovowo nu tso December 2014 ya teti me, esime Redditor aɖe ŋlɔ nya aɖe le r/TodayILearned subreddit me si xlẽ be, "TIL be Paul McCartney ƒle lɛtawo tso John gbɔ siwo Cynthia Lennon nɔ dzram le asitsaƒe aɖe eye emegbe wòtrɔ wo nɛ." Nya si wogblɔ le ƒe 2024 kple 2025 me ƒe akpa si tututu wogblɔ, si me McCartney trɔ lɛtaawo le ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo ko le Cynthia Lennon dzra wo vɔ megbe ŋuti nyatakakawo le eye nuŋlɔɖi aɖe si de dzi ƒo nɛ be wòagadzra eƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo o hã le la, dze abe ɖe wòkaka zi gbãtɔ le May 2024. Kaka ɣleti ma nawu enu la, nyatakaka siwo gbugbɔ gblɔ ŋutinyaa — zi geɖe to nuŋɔŋlɔ ma ke ƒe kɔpiwɔwɔ kple etsɔtsɔ de eme me — dze le across hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe. Facebook ɖeka si woŋlɔ ɖe May 15, 2024 dzi la, xɔ ame siwo ade 140,000 ƒe nuwɔna kple ame 31,000 ƒe gomekpɔkpɔ le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔɣi. Enye nyateƒe be McCartney ƒle lɛta siwo Cynthia Lennon dzra le eƒe srɔ̃gbegbe kple John Lennon le ƒe 1968 me megbe la dometɔ ɖeka, wɔ eƒe nɔnɔmetata eye wòtrɔe vɛ. Gake nyatakaka aɖewo siwo ku ɖe nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la mesɔ o alo womeɖo kpe wo dzi o. Gbã la, le nuŋlɔɖi siwo li nu la, lɛtaawo dometɔ ɖeka koe McCartney ƒle hetrɔe vɛ, ke menye wo katãe o. Evelia, kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli si aɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ be McCartney tsɔ nuŋlɔɖi aɖe kpee si xlẽ be, "Mègadzra wò ŋkuɖodzinyawo gbeɖe o. Lɔlɔ̃, Paul McCartney." Mlɔeba la, nyatakaka siwo woɖo ɖe amewo meɖe nudzɔdzɔawo ƒe ɣeyiɣi ƒe ɖoɖo si dzɔ le ƒe geɖe me, ke menye ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo o, fia pɛpɛpɛ o. Le nyatakaka siawo siwo mesɔ o alo esiwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o ta la, míebu nya la be enye nyatakaka siwo nye nyateƒe kple alakpa ƒe tsakatsaka. Cynthia Lennon, si ɖe John Lennon le ƒe 1962 me eye wòdzi wo viŋutsu, Julian, le ƒe 1963 me, gblɔ lɛta si wodzra eye wogbugbɔe la ƒe ŋutinya le eƒe ƒe 2005 ƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo me,"John": Esi mía kple John míegbe mía nɔewo la, medzra lɛta sia, kpakple bubu geɖe siwo John ŋlɔ. Ewɔ dɔ ɖe dzinye ŋutɔ eye dzi dzɔm ŋutɔ esi, le ƒe aɖewo megbe la, aƒetɔa gatsɔe dzra ake eye Paul McCartney ƒlee. Ena wowɔe ɖe ɖoɖo nu eye wòtsɔe na mía kple Julian abe nunana ene. Cynthia Lennon yi edzi gblɔ tso McCartney ƒe nunana ŋu be enye "nuwɔna si ŋu wobu nyuie ŋutɔ si ŋu míekpɔ ŋudzedze ɖo vevie." Nyati aɖe si Washington Post ŋlɔ le Oct. 2, 2005 dzi ku ɖe Cynthia Lennon ƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo ŋu gbugbɔ gblɔ nya sia: Eƒe srɔ̃gbegbe gbɔ kpɔkpɔ kple Lennon na wòzu kesinɔtɔ kura, eye wòwɔ dɔ abe nuɖuɖudzraƒedzikpɔla, mlɔƒe kple ŋdinuɖuƒe tɔ kple TV dzi ame ŋkuta ene. Edzra eƒe nutata xoxowo kple Lennon ƒe lɔlɔ̃gbalẽwo (Paul McCartney ƒle ɖeka ɣeaɖeɣi, tsɔe ɖo xɔme heɖoe ɖee abe nunana ene), eye wòŋlɔ nuŋlɔɖi si le tsɛ wu, si ƒe dzi afã kple afã le ƒe 1970 ƒeawo ƒe nuwuwu si kpɔ dzidzedze akpa gãtɔ le dzikudodo John kple Yoko me. Togbɔ be Cynthia Lennon ƒe ŋkuɖodzinyawo kple Washington Post ƒe nyatia ɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nya siwo keke ta dzi hã la, wo ame evea siaa na eme kɔ be McCartney ƒle lɛta ɖeka ko eye wòtrɔe vɛ, ke menye atsu kple asiawo ƒe lɛta bliboa o. Nyatakaka bubu siwo wotsɔ de hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo kaka ɖe amewo me, siwo nye McCartney ƒe nuŋlɔɖi aɖe dede eme kple nya si wògblɔ be nudzɔdzɔ siawo dzɔ le ŋkeke ʋɛ aɖewo me la, dze abe ɖe wonye atsyɔ̃ɖoɖo na ŋutinyaa emegbe ene eye kpeɖodziawo meɖo kpe wo dzi o. John Lennon ye ŋlɔ lɛta si ŋu nya ku ɖo le Aug. 23, 1965 dzi, esime Beatles-ha la nɔ tsa ɖim le United States. Le eme la, alesi wòsusu eya kple Cynthia Lennon viŋutsu, Julian, si xɔ ƒe 2 ɣemaɣi la koŋ. Le eƒe ŋkuɖodzinya "John," si nye agbalẽ ma ke si me wògblɔ ŋutinya si ku ɖe McCartney ƒe asiwɔwɔ ɖe nya dzi si me wòbu tame le zi gbãtɔ me la, Cynthia Lennon tsɔ lɛtaa me nya didi aɖe kpe ɖe eŋu, si ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be: Mezãa gaƒoƒo geɖe le awudodo me

claim: Woɖoe koŋ daa yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o kple tu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o ɖe Kyiv ƒe amewo ƒe nɔƒewo dzi be woatsɔ ana dukɔmeviwo nanɔ vɔvɔ̃m
evidence:
Kpeɖodzi le Meta’s Third-Party Fact-Checking Program me

Wole videoa kakam le Internet dzi afisi ŋutsu aɖe ƒo nu tso Russiatɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze ɖe Kyiv ŋu le June 17, 2025 ƒe zã me ŋu. Le eƒe nya nu la, Ukraine dziɖuɖumegãwo ɖoe koŋ ɖe mɔ ɖe amedzidzedze ŋu be wòana dukɔmeviwo nanɔ vɔvɔ̃m.

Esia nye nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafia. Shahedtɔwo kple tuwo ƒe mɔxexe ɖe enu va le sesẽm ɖe edzi le woƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe ŋgɔyiyi, aɖaŋu siwo wowɔ ƒe tɔtrɔ, kple yameʋuʋu ƒe ametakpɔnu ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ ta.

Screenshot si le nyatakakaa me

TikTok zãla aɖee ta videoa le Russiatɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze gã si dzɔ le June 17, 2025. Ɣemaɣi la, ame 28 ku le Kyiv, eye ame 134 bubuwo xɔ abi. Russia zã Shahed 440 siwo wotsɔ dzea ame dzi kple yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o siwo wotsɔ blea ame, kpakple tu ƒomevi vovovowo 32.

Videoa ŋlɔla kaka alakpanyawo kple nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafiawo enuenu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, egblɔ be wogblɔ be Ukraine dukɔa meli le sea nu o alo be nusi gbɔ ŋutifafa mele afima o enye “Ukraine dziɖuɖu si mele se nu o”. Míeɖe nya siawo ɖa xoxo do ŋgɔ.

Le nyateƒe me la, Shahedtɔwo ƒe mɔxexe ɖe enu le sesẽm ɖe edzi le woƒe mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe ŋgɔyiyi kple tɔtrɔ siwo wowɔ le aɖaŋuwo me ta:

Wozãa helikɔptawo, yameʋu siwo me wowɔa aʋawɔwɔ le, kple yameʋu siwo mesẽ o hã tsɔ daa UAV-ʋuwo. Gake wo ɖoɖo ɖe liƒowo gbɔ tẽ alo le ŋgɔgbekpa dzi nye afɔku le futɔwo ƒe yameʋuɖoɖo ta. Nenema kee wòle le Ukrainetɔwo ƒe SAM-mɔ̃wo hã gome. Ne wogogo liƒoa la, wova nɔa bɔbɔe na Russiatɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze.

Wotsɔ FPV yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o da tu Shahedtɔwo hã. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, nuto sia gale dzidzim ɖe edzi eye nyitsɔ laa koe wodze dziɖuɖua ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu xɔxɔ gɔme. Le June 27, 2025 dzi la, Volodymyr Zelenskyi wɔ Mɔ̃ɖaŋununya ƒe Stake eye wòɖe gbeƒã “Ukraine ƒe ŋutetewo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ, vevietɔ le interceptors me”.

Gawu la, yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o kple yameʋu bubu siwo woɖona ɖe yame ƒe mɔxenu va le sesẽm ɖe edzi. Abe alesi Yurii Ihnat, si nye Ukraine Yamesrafowo ƒe Aʋafiagã ƒe kadododzikpɔƒe ƒe amegã ɖe eme ene la, Russiatɔwo le woƒe tu siwo wotsɔna zɔa mɔe kple esiwo wotsɔna ƒua du la trɔm ɖe egbegbe mɔnuwo ŋu ɣesiaɣi.

Ele vevie be míase egɔme be yameʋuʋu ƒe ametakpɔnu aɖewo koe ate ŋu axe mɔ na tu siwo wotsɔna ƒoa tu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, woate ŋu atsɔ Amerikatɔwo ƒe Dukɔlɔ̃lawo ƒe ɖoɖowo ada “Kinzhal” alo “Iskander” la, eye wo dometɔ ʋɛ aɖewo koe le Ukraine. Ukraine hã xɔ Franseawo kple Italytɔwo ƒe SAMP/T SAM ɖoɖo, si le nukpɔsusu nu la, ate ŋu ada tu siwo wotsɔa tu ƒoa ƒui. Gake nyatakaka aɖeke meli ku ɖe alesi eŋudɔwɔwɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ kpɔ dzidzedzee ŋu haɖe o.

Russia le taɖodzinu geɖe wu dam. Tso January vaseɖe May 2025 me la, Russiatɔwo zã Shahed kple ameblenu siwo ade 13,000 tsɔ dze Ukraine dzi. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, Ukraine ƒe anyigbamama lolo, eye yameʋuɖoɖo ƒe ɖoɖo siwo wowɔna le hadɔwɔlawo me la mekeke nenema gbegbe o. Eyata menye tu siwo wotsɔ xea mɔ na yameʋuwo koe kpɔa ŋusẽ ɖe yameʋuʋu ƒe ametakpɔnu ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ dzi o, ke egblẽa nu le yameʋu siwo me ame aɖeke mele o ƒe mɔxexe hã ŋu.

Nya siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o siwo S. Korea dukplɔla wɔ nuvlo nyɔŋuwo gadze ake



							Wotae le July 9, 2025 le 09:04 me




							
							2 min xexlẽ
						
To esia dzi
																																																Hailey J. O., .
											
AFP Anyiehe Korea





				Le Lee Jae-myung tiatia be wòanye South Korea ƒe dukplɔla yeye megbe la, nya siwo ŋu womeɖo kpee tsã le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe be wobu fɔe be edɔ egbɔ sesẽe kple amewuwu le eƒe sɔhɛmenɔɣi o la gadze le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Nyatakakaawo yɔ nya siwo United States dutadɔnunɔla tsãtɔ aɖe gblɔ le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me afisi wòdo nugbeɖoɖo ŋuti nufiafia siwo ŋu kpeɖodzi mele o ɖe ŋgɔ ku ɖe numekuku si wowɔ nyitsɔ laa ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ŋu.
			


"Wow, menya nu tso gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe amedzidzedzea ŋu, gake menye amewuwu ƒe akpaa o. Eƒe tagbɔ gblẽ wu gɔ̃ hã. Miwui enumake," Koreagbe me nya si woŋlɔ ɖe video klipi aɖe si woma ɖe X dzi le June 27, 2025 dzi ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ Ʋɔnudrɔ̃la Morse Tan, le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me le Dukɔa ƒe Nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ le Washington (wodzrae ɖo ɖe afisia kple afisia)."Lee Jae-myung, esime wònye sɔhɛ la, kpɔ gome le ɖetugbui aɖe gbɔ dɔdɔ sesẽe kple ewuwu me, eye le esia ta wotsɔe de ɖeviwo ƒe gaxɔ me eye le esia ta mete ŋu de sekɛndrisuku kple sekɛndrisuku o," Tan gblɔ.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso X nyatakaka si wolé le July 7, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Tan kple ɖusimetɔwo ƒe nyameɖelawo gblɔ be gɔmeɖokpe aɖeke manɔmee le wɔnaa me be wowɔ alakpa le dukɔa ƒe June 3 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia me eye anɔ eme be China de nu numekukua me (kadodo si wodzra ɖo ɖi).Egagblɔ nya aɖe si AFP tsɔ tsi tre ɖe eŋu ku ɖe akɔtagbalẽvi siwo womeɖe o ŋu be wonye ametafatafa ƒe kpeɖodzi ŋu.The claim and clip about Lee were also shared in similar Facebook, YouTube and X posts but South Korean courts have already dismissed the nutsotso.Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyametsotsowoNya veviwo didi le South Korea ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo ƒe Nyatakakawo Xɔxɔ ƒe Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe na ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nyametsotso gbogbo aɖewo va le nya siwo me wotsɔ nya ɖe ame ɖekaɖekawo ŋu eye wodo fe na wo le esi wokaka alakpanya ma ke le tiatiawɔsewo dzi dada do ŋgɔ na ƒe 2022 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe numekukua ta (archived link). Lee bu akɔdadaa na eƒe hoʋlila si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasila Yoon Suk Yeol."Nuvlowɔlawo kple numekuku ŋutinya ŋuti nyatakaka kpakple ame si di be yeaxɔ ɖoƒea ŋuti nyatakakawo ɖeɖe ɖe go ƒe nuŋlɔɖi si wotu ɖe edzi meɖe ɖeviwo ƒe gaxɔmenɔnɔ ƒe tohehe ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke fia o", xlẽ nya ɖeka si wodrɔ̃ le Seoul Southern District Court ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃.Ʋɔnudrɔ̃nya si wodrɔ̃ le January 2023 me hã xlɔ̃ nu be alakpanya la kaka evɔ womeɖo kpe eƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi o ate ŋu tɔtɔ dukɔa ƒe nukpɔsusu le ame si di be yeaxɔ ɖoƒea ŋu eye "wògblẽa nu le ametiatia ƒe dzɔdzɔenyenye ŋu".Gawu la, nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke meli si ku ɖe fɔbubu mawo tɔgbe ŋu le Lee ƒe nya siwo wòɖe ɖe go le se nu abe ame si di be yeatia ame ene o. Se bia tso ame siwo di be yewoaxɔ hehe la si be woaɖe nuvlowɔwɔ ɖesiaɖe si wobu fɔe si ana wodo fe na wo si ƒe home nye won miliɔn ɖeka (US$730) ya teti la afia.Lee, amesi dzudzɔ sukudede be yeawɔ dɔ le dɔwɔƒe aɖe be yeakpɔ yeƒe ƒomea dzi eye wòxɔ abi le abɔta si na wòzu nuwɔametɔ le dɔwɔƒe ƒe afɔku aɖe me la, ƒu du yi dudɔnunɔƒe zi gbɔ zi geɖe (archived link).AFP has previously debunked several false claims targeting the president, who is a nyatakaka totrowo ƒe taɖodzinu enuenu le South Korea.
