claim: Indiana sewɔlawo dze agbagba be yewoade se si ana dukɔa nawu amewo to gasxɔwo kple tudada ƒe dɔwɔƒewo dzi.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Indiana sewɔlawo dze agbagba be yewoade se si ana dukɔa nate ŋu awu amewo to nitrogen gas alo tudada ƒe ha aɖe zazã me. Sea mete ŋu da asi ɖe edzi o. Ne ɖe wòzu se la, anye ne womenya nenye be dukɔa atu gas-xɔwo o. Dukɔ siwo zãa nitrogen gas xoxo tsɔ wua ame la toa ametakpɔnu dzi naae, togbɔ be wogblɔ be Arizona gbugbɔ trɔ asi le eƒe gasxɔ si wotu ɖe ku me ŋu be woate ŋu azãe le etsɔme hã. Le ƒe 2026 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Indiana sewɔlawo dze agbagba be yewoade se si aɖe mɔ be woawu ame to gasxɔwo kple tudada ƒe dɔwɔƒewo dzi. Nya sia kaka le nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abe Facebook, X, TikTok kple Instagram ene. Snopes xlẽlawo hã ŋlɔ agbalẽ be yewoabia be ɖe Indiana le gas-xɔwo tum vevie hã. Nya sia hiã nya siwo ƒo xlãe. Le nyateƒe me la, Indiana sewɔlawo to se aɖe vɛ hedoe ɖe ŋgɔ si ana dukɔa nate ŋu awu ame siwo wotso kufia na to tudada ƒe aʋawɔnuwo alo nitrogen hypoxia, si nye mɔnu si wua gamenɔla to gbɔgbɔtsixetsixe to nitrogen gas dzi. Gake sea meda asi ɖe January 2026 ƒe akɔdada aɖe dzi le dukɔa ƒe Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea me o, si fia be menye see wònye esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm o. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, dukɔa ƒe amewuwu to nitrogen gas dzi mehiã be woatu gasxɔwo o. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, le nuto siwo me wozãa nitrogen hypoxia le me la, gamenɔla siwo wotso kufia na la gbɔa gas la to ametakpɔnu dzi. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe kple nyatakaka siwo ŋu womeɖoe ɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Sea, si nye Aƒea ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe 1119, mete ŋu da asi ɖe Aƒea dzi le Jan. 28 ƒe ŋkɔwo yɔyɔ ƒe akɔdada me o. Amesi do alɔ sea metsɔe gbɔe be woagawɔ akɔdada bubu hafi ƒe 2026 ƒe sewɔtakpekpea ƒe ɣeyiɣi mamlɛa naɖo o. (Togbɔ be dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe ɣletigbalẽ ɖo ŋkeke mamlɛtɔ si nye Jan. 29 gbã be woawɔ se to Aƒea dzi hã la, sewɔlawo he ɣeyiɣi mamlɛa ɖe megbe va ɖo Feb. 2 le yame ƒe nɔnɔme madeamedzi ta.) Republican dukɔa ƒe Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Jim Lucas, si do alɔ se si ŋu nya ku ɖo la, metrɔ nyabiase siwo wòbia enumake be yeɖoe be yeagbugbɔ sea ava sewɔtakpekpe me le etsɔme kple nenye be sea ate ŋu akplɔe ɖo o le mɔ̃ɖaŋununya nu la, ɖe mɔ na Indiana be wòatu gasxɔ aɖe na amewuwu, abe alesi hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo gblɔe ene. Be se si dukɔa ƒe Aƒenɔ ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ aɖe to vɛ nazu se la, ele be wòato kɔmiti siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo le Aƒea me hafi atsɔe aɖo akɔta le Aƒea ƒe anyigba ŋgɔ, afisi ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea me tɔ bliboa ate ŋu ada akɔ le. Emegbe, ele be wòato ɖoɖo ma ke me le Sewɔtakpekpea me hafi wòate ŋu ava zu se. Lucas to HB 1119 vɛ le Jan. 5, 2026. Le Indiana ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe nya nu la, sea yi ŋgɔ to Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒewo Kple Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Sewo Ŋuti Kɔmiti dzi gake mete ŋu to Aƒea me o. Ame 48 ye da asi ɖe sea dzi, eye ame etɔ̃ mede ame 51 siwo hiã be woada asi ɖe edzi la nu. (Indiana House ƒe sewo gblɔ be ele be sewo naxɔ dukplɔse me ame akpa gãtɔ — si fia be hamevi siwo katã woti la ƒe afã kple edzivɔ, ke menye amesiwo le akɔ dam ɖeɖeko o — hafi woayi ŋgɔ.) Nusi sea gblɔe nye esi (míawoe te gbe ɖe edzi): Sec. 1.5. (a) Ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒea ate ŋu awɔ amewuwu to: (1) atike si wua ame dodo; (2) tudada ƒe ƒuƒoƒo; alo (3) nitrogen ƒe ya si mebɔ o; abe alesi ɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒea ƒe amegã ɖoe ene. (b) Ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒea aɖo dɔwɔƒe kple ɖoɖo aɖe si dzi woato awɔ amewuwu to tudada ƒe hatsotso me. (c) Ameɖɔɖɔɖodɔwɔƒea aɖo dɔwɔƒe kple ɖoɖo aɖe si dzi woato awɔ amewuwu to nitrogen hypoxia me. Le Indiana la, esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm la, dukɔa tsɔa atike si wua ame wua gamenɔla siwo wotso kufia na. Lucas gblɔ le Jan. 21 ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃ me be "kuxi siwo nɔa anyi ɖaa" do mo ɖa le atike siwo wodona ɖe lãme na ame siwo wua ame xɔxɔ me eye sea ana tiatia bubu siwo "hiã vevie" hafi (ne èdi be yealé nu ɖe ​​mɔ̃ dzi la, di Jan. 21 ƒe kpekpea le Indiana Sewɔtakpekpe Gã ƒe videowo ƒe nudzraɖoƒe eye nàyi 1:27:31). Tsitretsiɖeŋulawo, siwo dome Indiana Dutoƒo Taʋlilawo ƒe Aɖaŋudeha teƒenɔla hã nɔ, ɖi ɖase tsi tre ɖe Lucas ƒe nyawo ŋu le nyadɔdrɔ̃ ma ke me. Sea megblɔ "dɔwɔƒe" kple "ɖoɖowɔɖi" ƒomevi si dziɖuɖua azã atsɔ awɔ amewuwu to nitrogen hypoxia dzi la tẽ o, gake dukɔ bubuwo ƒe amewuwu mɔnuwo me dzodzro ate ŋu ana kpeɖodziwo le alesi Indiana ate ŋu awɔ amewuwu siawo ƒomevi ŋu. Kufiatsotso Ŋuti Nyatakaka Dɔwɔƒe si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o gblɔ be nuto atɔ̃ ɖe mɔ ɖe amewuwu ŋu to nitrogen hypoxia zazã me —gake nuto eve koe zãe ŋutɔŋutɔ: Alabama kple Louisiana. Le Louisiana la, "wowɔa amewuwu to nitrogen hypoxia dzi to plac dzi."

claim: Italy meɖe mɔ na SSU ƒe amegãwo be woakplɔ Ukrainetɔwo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ɖo le Olympic Kamedefefewo me o — Reuters
evidence:
Kpeɖodzi le Meta’s Third-Party Fact-Checking Program me

Wole video aɖe si wogblɔ be etso Reuters gbɔ la kakam le Internet dzi. Egblɔ be wogblɔ be Italy meɖe mɔ na Ukraine be wòadɔ Ukraine ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dɔwɔla 120 ɖa be woava kpe ɖe dukɔa ƒe bɔlƒoha ŋu le ƒe 2026 Olympic Kamedefefeawo me o. Egblɔ hã be Italytɔwo ƒe Kamedefefe Dɔwɔƒea na ŋuɖoɖo aɖe, eye wogblɔ be biabia la nye nusi dzi womate ŋu alɔ̃ ɖo o eye wòte gbe ɖe gome si le Ukraine dukɔmeviwo si be woaʋu faa dzi.

Ke hã, esia nye alakpa. Reuters meta video ma tɔgbe o. Italytɔwo ƒe Kamedefefe Dɔwɔƒe megblɔ nya mawo tɔgbe o.

Screenshot si le nyatakakaa me

Reuters meta video ma tɔgbe ɖe eƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo o, eye meɖe ɖe Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, alo X hã dzi o.

Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo dze agbagba be yewoagbugbɔ Reuters ƒe videowo ƒe atsyã gbãtɔ. Gake video vavãwo mezãa outlet’s logo o, evɔ aʋatso video ya ya zãnɛ.



Le miame — screenshot tso aʋatso videoa me. Le ɖusime — screenshot tso Reuters video ŋutɔŋutɔ aɖe me

Nya aɖe si wogblɔ be Italy Kamedefefewo Gbɔkpɔha gblɔ hã le videoa me: “Olympic Kamedefefe siwo wowɔna le Italy nye kamedefefe ƒe azãɖuɖu. Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe teƒenɔlawo ƒe anyinɔnɔ le Olympic Kamedefefe siwo wowɔna le Italy me nye nusi dzi womate ŋu alɔ̃ ɖo o eye mehiã o. Sedzikpɔla akpe geɖe le dedienɔnɔ ƒe ɖoɖo kɔkɔtɔ kekeake nam. Míete gbe ɖe edzi be gome le Ukraine dukɔmeviwo si, abe amewo katã ene, be woate ŋu aʋu faa. Eye ne wodi be yewoayi le teƒe bubu ɖesiaɖe si menye Ukraine o le Olympic-fefewo megbe la, emae nye woƒe gomenɔamesi.” Gake nya ma tɔgbe aɖeke mele subɔsubɔha la ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua da asi ɖo o. Italy nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo hã megblɔ nya sia o.

Do ŋgɔ la, míeɖe alakpa video siwo dzi Reuters ƒe dzesi le la ɖa xoxo. Vevietɔ, nya siwo wogblɔ be Zelenskyi di be yeaɖe Ukraine ŋutsu siwo xɔ ƒe si woxɔ be woawɔ asrafodɔ le duta ƒe mɔzɔgbalẽwo kple ʋukugbalẽviwo ɖa.

claim: Le Imran Khan ƒe ɖeklemiɖeɖe Macron ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ tso Islam ŋu ta la, France dziɖuɖumegãwo te fli ɖe Pakistan dukɔmevi 183 ƒe mɔɖegbalẽwo me eye wonya ame 118 le dukɔa me.
Le ƒe 2022 me la, Virginia Senyala Gãtɔ si wotia, Jay Jones ɖo nyatakakawo ɖe asitelefon dzi ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔwo tso Virginia Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea ƒe Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Todd Gilbert kple viawo ŋu.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Snopes meto nyatakaka gbãtɔ siwo woɖo ɖe amewo to asitelefon dzi la me o; ke hã, esi Jones nɔ nu ƒom le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi le October 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze la, elɔ̃ ɖe edzi le dutoƒo be yeɖo gbedasi siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la ɖa eye wòɖe kuku nɛ. Le ƒe 2025 ƒe adame la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe Internet dzi be Jay Jones, si nye Virginia ƒe Democrattɔwo ƒe senyalagã si wotia le eƒe aʋadziɖuɖu le Nov. 4 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia megbe la, ɖo nyatakaka siwo me ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ le tso dunyahela aɖe si tsi tre ɖe eŋu kple viawo ŋu to asitelefon dzi ɣeaɖeɣi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo le X (archived),Facebook (archived) kpleInstagram (archived) ma nya sia le ŋkeke kple kwasiɖa siwo do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔgbe. X zãla la ŋlɔ bena: "#BREAKING: Wobu akɔnta fifia be ɖeviwula si di vevie be yeawu kple Democrat Jay Jones aɖu dzi le Virginia AG ƒe hoʋiʋlia me. Esia va le esime nyatakaka siwo do go siwo ɖe Jones le nu ƒom tso eƒe dunyahela siwo tsi tre ɖe wo ŋu kple wo viwo wuwu ŋu vɔ megbe." Le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãla bubu (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ƒe nya nu la, woɖo nuŋɔŋlɔ siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo la ɖe ƒe 2022 me eye wotsɔ wo yi na Virginia Teƒenɔlawo ƒe Aƒea ƒe Dukplɔla ɣemaɣi Todd Gilbert kple eƒe ƒomea. X post la tsɔ screenshots siwo wogblɔ be woŋlɔ la ɖe eme, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye gbedasi siwo xlẽ be, "Ne ŋutsu mawo ku do ŋgɔ nam la, mayi woƒe kuteƒe aɖawɔ p*** ɖe woƒe yɔdowo dzi," eye wòtsɔ Gilbert sɔ kple Nazi Party ƒe ŋgɔnɔla Adolf Hitler kple Cambodia dzizizidziɖula Pol Pot, hegblɔ be, "tsɔ Gilbert de ʋua me dɔwɔlawo dome kple ame vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake eve siwo nènya eye wòxɔ tu eveawo ɣesiaɣi." Wogblɔ be ame bubu xlẽ be: “Ne amewo ŋutɔ se veve ko hafi woʋuna ɖe ɖoɖowo dzi.” Manya wɔ be míato asitelefon dzi nyatakaka gbãtɔ siwo tso teƒea gbɔ le wo ɖokui si o eye míenɔ ŋuɖoɖo lalam tso Jones ƒe dɔwɔƒea le ɣeyiɣi si me wotae. Gake le October 2025 me la, Jones lɔ̃ ɖe gbedasiawo dzi le dutoƒo eye wòɖe kuku ɖe wo ta le gbebiame aɖe si wowɔ le fotoɖemɔ̃ dzi kpleWRIC, si nye ABC News ƒe dɔwɔƒe si subɔa titina Virginia. Dɔwɔƒea da gbebiamea ƒe akpa aɖe ɖe YouTube. Le video dzi kpeɖodzi si ŋu kakaɖedzi le si ɖee fia be Jones xɔ gbedasi siwo woɖo ɖa ƒe agbanɔamedzi ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe. Jones ɖo nuŋɔŋlɔawo ɖe Republicantɔ Del. Carrie Coyner le Aug. 8, 2022. Womeɖe nuŋɔŋlɔawo, siwo wogblɔ be woɖoe na ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye "Mark" la ɖe go le dutoƒo o vaseɖe esime nukpɔsusu ŋuti magazine si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe magazineNational Review ta nyatakaka aɖe le Oct. 3, 2025 dzi, si wogblɔ be Coyner ɖo kpe edzi na nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea. National Review nyatia ka nya ta be Jones "seselelãme sẽŋuwo nɔ esi le alesi dunyaheha la nɔ kafum na dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ tsãtɔ Joe Johnson Jr. si ku nyitsɔ laa, si nye Demokrasitɔ si da sɔ eye wònɔ Virginia dunyahehe me ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe," amesi ku le Aug. 4, 2022, ŋkeke aɖewo do ŋgɔ na nuŋlɔɖiawo ɖoɖo ɖa. Wogblɔ be Jones ye ɖo nuŋɔŋlɔawo ɖa esime "nya mawo dometɔ aɖewo nɔ tsatsam le dukɔa ƒe sewɔtakpekpe ƒe ƒuƒoƒo ƒe dzeɖoɖowo me." Le Oct. 7, 2025 dzi, esi National Review nyatia dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme vɔ la, Coyner da nya aɖe tso nuŋɔŋlɔawo ŋu ɖe eƒe officialFacebook profile dzi, si dze abe ɖe wotrɔe nye ame ŋutɔ tɔ alo woɖee ɖa le herloss na eƒe Democrat tsitretsiɖeŋula Lindsey Dougherty le Nov. 4, 2025. Coyner ƒe nyagbɔgblɔa ŋu nya tso WRIC gbɔ ɣemaɣi, gake eya koe nye eƒe Facebook nyatakaka gbãtɔ si susɔ le ɣeyiɣi si me edze abe agbalẽa nye Google ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si ne wozi edzi la, axa aɖe si gblɔ be woɖe nyatakakaa ɖa alo trɔe wòzu ame ŋutɔ tɔ ene . . Esi meɖe vɔvɔ̃ kple ŋunyɔnu gblɔ le ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ dziŋɔ siwo ŋu wònɔ susum le ŋu la, eyi edzi nɔ agbagba dzem be yeatsɔ telefon kple asitelefon aɖo kpe yeƒe nya gbãtɔwo dzi. Coyner ƒe nya la ƒe akpa aɖee nye kadodo aɖe si yi awebsite si me woɖe text message siwo ŋu nya ku ɖo ƒe screenshots le. Jones nɔ senyalagã ƒe ɖoƒe dim vevie le Virginia esime nyadzɔdzɔa kaka, si na ɖeklemiɖela geɖe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Republican Senyala Gãwo ƒe Habɔbɔ kple Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔJ. D. Vance, bia be woadzudzɔ eƒe akɔdadaa. Le eƒe dzedzeme le WRIC le Oct. 3, 2025 dzi la, Jones ɖe kuku ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔawo ɖoɖo ɖa ta eye megblɔ nya tẽ nenye be ele be wo me nyawo nana wòagadze le duɖimekekea me o: Akpe na mi be mienɔ asinye eye miena mɔnukpɔkpɔm be maɖe kuku. Medi tso dzi blibo me, eye tso nye dzi me ke be maɖe nye vevesese kple nye vevesese ɖe nusi dzɔ kple nya si megblɔ ta afia. Gbe ma mekpɔ teƒe aɖeke le míaƒe nuƒoƒo me o eye meveam ŋutɔ le nusi dzɔ ta. Le nyateƒe me la, medo asi ɖe Nuƒolaa Gilbert gbɔ ŋdɔ sia be maɖe kuku nɛ kple Je

claim: Ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu wòwɔ nuku la, dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsãtɔ Jagdeep Dhankhar ɖo nya ŋu vevie ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe zimenɔla Mallikarjun Kharge ƒe nya si wògblɔ le Rajya Sabha me be yevɔ̃na na dziɖuɖua ŋu. Wogblɔ be Dhankhar gblɔ be: “Woatutu nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa sia ɖa. Nukatae? Elabena India ƒe agbledelawo kple wo viŋutsuwo mevɔ̃na na ame aɖeke le nɔnɔme aɖeke me o.”
evidence: Nya si wogblɔ Ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na eƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu wòwɔ nuku la, dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsãtɔ Jagdeep Dhankhar ɖo nya ŋu vevie ɖe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe zimenɔla Mallikarjun Kharge ƒe nya si wògblɔ le Rajya Sabha me be yevɔ̃na na dziɖuɖua ŋu. "Woatutu nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa sia ɖa. Nukatae? Elabena India ƒe agbledelawo kple wo viŋutsuwo mevɔ̃na na ame aɖeke le nɔnɔme aɖeke me o," wogblɔ be Dhankhar gblɔ.  Woate ŋu akpɔ nyatakakaa ƒe akpa si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe le afisia.  Nyateƒenya Newschecker de dzesi nya "Gazazã ƒe Takpekpe" kple ŋkeke "04/04/2025" le video si kaka ɖe amewo me, si tsi tre ɖe nya si wogblɔ be nya si kaka ɖe amewo dome la dzɔ ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na Dhankhar ƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe tsidzadza ƒe kpekpe ƒe ŋkeke gbãtɔ dzi le July 21. Woɖoe be tsidzadza ƒe kpekpe si le edzi yim la awu enu le August 21, 2025 dzi, esime gazazã ŋuti kpekpea ya si wowɔ le January 31, 2025 kple April 4, 2025 dome. Esi míexɔ dzesi aɖe la, míewɔ nya vevi siwo sɔ didi si kplɔ mí yi NDTV India ƒe nyatakaka sia si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi, si woŋlɔ le April 4, 2025 dzi, si ma video si kaka la. Míeva ke ɖe NDTV ƒe nyatakaka sia hã ŋu, si woŋlɔ le April 4, 2025 dzi, si gblɔ be Rajya Sabha LoP kple Congress ƒe amegã Mallikarjun Kharge bia tso Rajya Sabha ƒe zimenɔla ɣemaɣi, Dhankhar, si be woawɔ numedzodzro tso Manipur ŋu le Aƒea me, si nye ɣeyiɣi si me dɔlékuiwo ƒe asitɔtrɔa dzɔ.  Didi bubu kplɔ mí yi 11:54:59 ƒe video aɖe si ku ɖe Rajya Sabha ƒe nyadɔdrɔ̃wo ŋu si News18 ɖe ɖe go le agbe le April 3, 2025 dzi, si me woda akɔ ɖe Waqf ƒe Ðɔɖɔɖo Sewɔtakpekpe 2024. Woate ŋu akpɔ nya si kaka si kaka la tso 05:18:00, si gaɖo kpe edzi be nya si wogblɔ be dɔlékuiwo ɖɔliɖɔli la dzɔ ŋkeke ɖeka do ŋgɔ na Dhankhar ƒe asiɖeɖe le dɔ ŋu la nye alakpae.  Ðe Dhankhar Bia Nya PM Modi Govt Le Nuƒo Mamlɛa Mea?  Newschecker tsɔ nya ɖe video aɖe si kaka ɖe amewo dome si gblɔ be eɖe Dhankhar tsãtɔ ƒe dutoƒonuƒo mamlɛtɔ fia, afisi wogblɔ be eke ɖi le Titinaa ƒe tenɔnɔ le agbledelawo ƒe nyatoƒoetotowo ŋu me, eye wòkpɔe be enye nuƒo xoxo aɖe si woma le nya siwo ƒo xlãe me o. claim: "Dukɔa ƒe fenyinyi le abe 67% ene vaseɖe fifia le GDP me."
evidence: Subɔsubɔhakplɔla la tɔ dzɔ le Kenya ƒe fe ƒe lolome ŋu gake egbã eƒe xexlẽme aɖewo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye esime ga si woxe la to gakpɔkpɔ ƒe 50% ŋu. Le sukudede gome la, eɖe nɔnɔmetata ƒe akpa aɖe fia, hegblɔ be dɔwɔƒea xɔa gazazã bliboa ƒe 27%. Le nyateƒe me la, gazazã ƒe akpa sue aɖe ko ŋue xexlẽme ma ku ɖo; nɔnɔmetata bliboa meɖea dɔmenyonyo boo aɖeke fiana kura o. Togbɔ be eto nyateƒe le elektrikŋusẽ wɔwɔ fifia ŋu hã la, eƒe ɖoɖo si wògblɔ be Kenya "hiã" elektrikŋusẽ MW 10,000 la na vovototo si le didi vevie siwo nɔ anyi ɣeyiɣi didi kple didi ŋutɔŋutɔ dome la me mekɔ o. Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe ɖoɖowo ɖoa taɖodzinu siwo bɔbɔ ɖe anyi wu. Le dukplɔla ƒe asidede agbalẽ te le March 9, 2026 dzi la, Kenya ƒe ganyawo gbɔ kpɔla John Mbadi ʋli se yeye si ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo nɔ be woatsɔ akpɔ ga na xɔtuɖaŋuwo fe yeye alo adzɔ yeyewo manɔmee ta. Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Gadzɔdzɔ ƒe Sea to gazazã ƒe ɖoɖo yeye aɖe vɛ. Dukplɔla William Ruto gblɔ be yewoƒe dɔ gã gbãtɔ anye dukɔa ƒe yameʋudzeƒe gã la dodo ɖe ŋgɔ. Gake wotsɔ nya ɖe sea ŋu le ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe , eye numekulawo fɔ nufitifitiwɔwɔ ŋuti dzitsitsiwo ɖe te. Mbadi gblɔ be ganyawo ƒe teƒe si le ɖeɖem kpɔtɔ, fenyinyi ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenuwo kple vɔvɔ̃ na dunyahehe ƒe megbedede ɖe adzɔ yeyewo ŋu na "mɔxenu ŋutɔŋutɔwo va ɖo ɖoɖowo ƒe tiatia dzi". Eʋli nya be sea akpe ɖe gadodo na dɔ gãwo ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye melidzeƒewo dodo ɖe ŋgɔ , elektrikŋusẽnana ƒe kekeɖenudɔwɔwɔ , mɔ gã yeyewo kple tsidede agble. Le e taʋiʋli me la, Mbadi gblɔ nya geɖe tso Kenya ƒe ganyawo, fenyinyi, gazazã ɖe sukudede ŋu kple ŋusẽ ƒe hiahiãwo ŋu. Míelé ŋku ɖe wo dometɔ aɖewo ŋu nyuie. Mbadi gblɔ be Kenya ƒe dukɔa ƒe fenyinyi "anɔ abe 67% ene vaseɖe fifia le GDP me". Dukɔa ƒe gakpɔkpɔ bliboa nye nusi wozãna zi geɖe tsɔ dzidzea dukɔ aɖe ƒe ganyawo ƒe lolome. Efia adzɔnuwo kple dɔwɔna siwo katã wowɔ le ɣeyiɣi aɖe me, zi geɖe la, ƒe ɖeka, ƒe asixɔxɔ le asi me. Fenyinyi kple GDP ƒe sɔsɔme ɖea alesi dukɔ aɖe ƒe fe loloe ne wotsɔe sɔ kple eƒe ganyawo. Ne ebɔbɔ la, efia be fenyinyi le sue ŋutɔ ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ganyawo, eye dukɔa ate ŋu axe fe si wònyi la sesẽ akpa manɔmee. Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖo kpe subɔsubɔhakplɔla la ƒe nya dzi. Kenya ƒe fenyinyi kple GDP ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ vie tso 68.1% le ƒe 2021 me va ɖo 67.8% le ƒe 2025 me, le dukɔa ƒe gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si se ƒe agbanɔamedzie wònye be wòagblɔ fenyinyi ŋuti nyatakakawo edziedzi ƒe nya nu. Nyatakaka yeyetɔ siwo li ɖee fia be ele GDP ƒe 67.5% le December 2025. Kenya ƒe "fenyinyi ƒe agbanɔamedziwo zãa ga si wokpɔna dzro ko ƒe afã kple edzivɔ", subɔsubɔhakplɔla la gblɔ . Ga si wokpɔna dzro ko lɔ adzɔ siwo dukɔa ƒe adzɔxedɔwɔƒe xɔna ɖe eme , tsɔ kpe ɖe gazazã-ɖe-kpekpeɖeŋu si nye ga si wokpɔna tso dziɖuɖu ƒe dɔwɔƒewo kple dɔwɔƒewo gbɔ, abe fe siwo woxena na ezãlawo ene. Nyatakakaawo hã ɖo kpe subɔsubɔhakplɔla la dzi le afisia: Le ƒe 2024/25 ƒe ga ƒea me la, gakpɔkpɔ ƒe 71.2% yi fenyinyi me, le gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe nya nu. Esia nye KSh1.72 triliɔn le KSh2.42 triliɔn ƒe gakpɔkpɔ me. ( De dzesii: United States dɔlar ɖeka ƒe asitɔtrɔ le abe Kenya shilling 130 ene. ) Gaŋutiɖoɖodzikpɔla gblɔ be le ƒe 2025/26 ƒe afã gbãtɔ me la, ga si wokpɔna ƒe 74.3% yi fenyinyi me. Esia nye KSh923.14 biliɔn le KSh1.243 triliɔn ƒe gakpɔkpɔ siwo woƒo ƒu le July kple December 2025. Gadzɔdzɔ ŋuti nyatakakawo vaseɖe February 2026 tsɔ xexlẽmea ɖo 74.1% – le KSh1.6 triliɔn le gakpɔkpɔ me, fenyinyi ƒe dɔwɔwɔ xɔ KSh1.19 triliɔn . Minista la gblɔ be anɔ eme be fenyinyi axɔ gakpɔkpɔ dzro ƒe 48.7% le ƒe 2026/27 ƒe ga ƒea me. Gake dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe akɔntabubuwo meda asi ɖe esia dzi o. The latest debt report , tso September 2025, gblɔ be xexlẽmea anye 73.7%, si ɖiɖi va ɖo 68.2% le ƒe 2027/28 me. Akɔntabubu siwo va nyitsɔ laa tso gazazã ŋuti ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe nyatakaka si dzi subɔsubɔhakplɔla de asi ete le February 2026 me la gblɔ be gakpɔkpɔ anye KSh2.9 triliɔn le ƒe 2026/27 me eye fenyinyi ƒe dɔwɔwɔ anye Ksh1.54 triliɔn – abe 53% ene. Dziɖuɖua ƒe akɔntabubu yeyetɔ ɖee fia be 53%. Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe akɔntabubu aɖe si wowɔ do ŋgɔ gblɔ be xexlẽmea nye 73.7%. Ne míagblɔe bubui la, dziɖuɖua ŋutɔ ƒe agbalẽ siwo woɖe ɖe go le ɣleti ade dome la to vovo ŋutɔ eye wo dometɔ aɖeke mesɔ kple subɔsubɔhakplɔla la ƒe nya si nye 48.7% o. Minista la gblɔ be Kenya ƒe fenyinyi ƒe dɔwɔƒea to 50% ƒe dzesia dzi. Esia de pɛpɛpɛ gake mede blibo o. Woƒe xexlẽme wu 50% le ƒe 2022/23 ƒe gaŋutiɖoɖoa me, eye wòɖo 58.9%, eye wòkpɔtɔ le dziƒo ma tso ɣemaɣi. Eƒe nya la ɖee fia be esia nye zi ɖeka alo ɣeyiɣi si va yi. Nyatakakaawo ɖee fia be esia nye fli si dukɔa to le Ruto ƒe zi gbãtɔ me, eye wògakpɔtɔ le dziƒo ma tso ɣemaɣi. Akɔntabubuwo hã ɖee fia be xexlẽmea anɔ dzi wu 50% le ga ƒe etɔ̃ siwo gbɔna me – 73.7% le ƒe 2026/27 me, 68.2% le ƒe 2027/28 me, kple 53.3% le ƒe 2028/29 me. Nya si wogblɔ la flua ame. Subɔsubɔhakplɔla la gblɔ be : "Adzɔ dzi na Kenyatɔwo be woanya be míele míaƒe gazazãwo ƒe 27% kloe zãm, gazazãwo katã, tsɔ doa alɔ sukudede le dukɔ sia me. Ke hã miawo."

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Barack Obama "na" Iran ga dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 le ƒe 2016 me, eye wòɖo ga gbogbo aɖewo ɖe dukɔa.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Obama dziɖuɖua da asi ɖe dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 ƒe fexexe na Iran dzi le ƒe 2016 me eye U.S. dziɖuɖumegãwo lɔ̃ ɖe edzi emegbe be wotsɔ ga si menye U.S. tɔ o tsɔ ga si wotsɔ yi na amewo la keŋkeŋ elabena toheɖoɖowo na Iran tso ganyawo ƒe ɖoɖo si sɔ si wotu ɖe dɔlar dzi la gbɔ. Nyatakaka siwo woxɔ ɣemaɣi ƒo nu tso dɔlar miliɔn 400 ƒe akpa gbãtɔ si va ɖo duta ga ƒe agbawo dzi gbesigbe Iran ɖe asi le Amerika gamenɔlawo ŋu la ŋu. Ga la menye nunana, nudzɔdzɔ alo nunana si Obama tsɔ na Iran le eɖokui si o. Etsi tre ɖi na senya aɖe si xɔ ƒe bla nanewo si ku ɖe dɔlar miliɔn 400 si Iran xe na U.S., do ŋgɔ na ƒe 1979 ƒe Irantɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la, ɖe asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔnu siwo mexɔ kpɔ o ta, kpakple deme si ade dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 ŋu la gbɔ kpɔkpɔ. Hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ƒe nyatakaka siwo ɖoa asitɔtrɔ le ame bubu ŋu abe Obama ƒe ga "nana" Iran ene ko la ɖea nya ma ɖa. Ƒe geɖe enye sia la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gblɔna be ɖeko U.S. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Barack Obama "tsɔ ga dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 na" Iran, eye zi geɖe la, eƒoa nu tso ga gbogbo siwo wotsɔ de agbatsɔʋuwo me le zã titina ŋu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, March 2026 ƒe Reddit nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) gblɔ be, "Obama tsɔ ga ƒe palletwo ($1.7B) Iran le ƒe 2016 me to agbatsɔyameʋu siwo womede dzesii o dzi." (Reddit u/Academic_Court_47) Nyaʋiʋlia ƒe kpɔɖeŋu bubuwo dze le X kple Instagram, esime míaƒe nuxlẽlawo hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakaka bubuwo. Dukplɔla Donald Trump hã gbugbɔ nutsotso sia gblɔ le eƒe April 1, 2026 dzi, "Nuƒo si wòƒo na Dukɔa le Asrafowo ƒe Dɔwɔnawo Ŋu le Iran," si me wògblɔ le be: Obama na [Iran] ga dɔlar biliɔn 1.7. Green, green cash — ɖee le gadzraɖoƒewo tso Virginia, D.C. kple Maryland. Ga siwo katã nɔ wo si. Wotsɔ yameʋuwo kue tsɔ dze agbagba be yeaƒle woƒe bubu kple nuteƒewɔwɔ, gake mewɔ dɔ o. Woko nu na míaƒe dukplɔla eye woyi woƒe dɔdasi dzi be nukliabɔmb nanɔ yewo si. Kpuie ko la, nya si wogblɔ la ƒe akpa aɖewo nye nyateƒe gake nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kple Trump ƒe nuƒoa ɖe nya vevi siwo ƒo xlãe ɖa. Obama dziɖuɖua da asi ɖe dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 ƒe fexexe na Iran dzi nyateƒe le ƒe 2016 me eye emegbe nyatakakawo gblɔ be wotsɔ ga la yi le duta ga me. Menye ɖeko wotsɔ ga si woxe la na alo nunana na Islamic Republic o. Etsi tre ɖi na senyaʋiʋli aɖe si xɔ ƒe bla nanewo ku ɖe dɔlar miliɔn 400 si Iran xe na U.S., do ŋgɔ na ƒe 1979 Irantɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ Kpata la, ɖe asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔnu siwo mexɔ kpɔ o ta, kpakple deme si ade dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 ŋu la gbɔ kpɔkpɔ. Esia wɔe be míebu nya sia be enye nyatakaka vavãwo kple alakpanyawo ƒe tsakatsaka. Nyaʋiʋlia dze egɔme tso Iran ƒe shah ƒe anyidzedze le ƒe 1979. Do ŋgɔ na tɔtrɔ kpata la, Iran xe dɔlar miliɔn 400 na United States ɖe asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔnuwo ta. Esi dukɔ eveawo dome ƒomedodowo mu vɔ la, wometsɔ dɔwɔnuawo vɛ gbeɖe o eye ga la va zu nusi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo le se nu le Iran-U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe si Kpɔa Nyawo Gbɔ le The Hague. Esi woɖe gbeƒã nyaa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ le Jan. 17, 2016 dzi la, Obama gblɔ be, "Woatrɔ Iran ŋutɔ ƒe ga, si me deme si sɔ hã le, gake wòaɖiɖi kura wu ga home si Iran di." Egblɔ kpee be nubabla sia ate ŋu adzra U.S. dɔlar biliɔn geɖe ɖo ne wotsɔe sɔ kple nusi ate ŋu ado tso eme ne ɖe nyaa yi edzi. Emegbe dziɖuɖumegãwo gblɔ be nyaa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ bia be woagbugbɔ ga home si nye dɔlar miliɔn 400 akpe ɖe deme si ade dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 ŋu, eye woʋli nya be nyaa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ na adzɔxelawo ƒe ga dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ elabena wogblɔ be Iran nɔ ga si lolo wu dim. Eyata togbɔ be esɔ be míagblɔ be Obama dziɖuɖua ɖo dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 ɖe Iran hã la, zi geɖe la, nyatakaka siwo woŋlɔna ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖea nyateƒe si wònye be Iran ŋutɔ tɔe ga la ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye, si bla ɖe nya aɖe si ŋu womekpɔ ta na o si xɔ ƒe bla nanewo la ŋu. Le Aug. 4, 2016, nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me la, Obama gblɔ be woxe fea le ga me elabena gadzraɖoƒe ƒe ƒomedodo aɖeke menɔ United States kple Iran dome o: Susu si ta wòle be míana ga wo la nye esi tututu míewɔa nu sesẽ le toheɖoɖowo me léle ɖe asi me eye gadzraɖoƒe ƒe ƒomedodo aɖeke mele mía kple Iran dome o ale gbegbe be míete ŋu ɖo gaxɔgbalẽvi ɖe wo o eye míete ŋu tsɔ ka ɖo ga la ɖe wo o. Ɣleti ɖeka megbe, le Sept. 7, 2026 dzi la, The Associated Press ka nya ta be woxe dɔlar biliɔn 1.7 ƒe nyaa gbɔ kpɔkpɔ le ga me elabena toheɖoɖowo na Islamic Republic ɖe eɖokui ɖe aga tso dukɔwo dome ganyawo gbɔ. Esia wɔe be wotsɔ euro, Switzerland franc kple duta ga bubuwo xe fea tsɔ wu be woato gadzraɖoƒe ƒe gaɖoɖo ɖe wo dzi. AP kple The New York Times gblɔ be wotsɔ ga si wozã le gɔmedzedzea me si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 400 la yi ɖe palletwo dzi. Wo ame evea siaa ka nya ta hã be Obama dziɖuɖua gbe be yemagblɔ nenye be woxe dɔlar biliɔn 1.3 susɔea le ga me o. Josh Earnest, si nye White House nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla le Obama ƒe dziɖuɣi le ƒe 2014 kple 2017 dome la, gbe th

claim: Sedede aɖe si U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump de le July 2025 me ƒe taɖodzinue nye be “yeatsɔ amesiame si nye nuwɔametɔ ade dɔwɔƒe.”
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu July 2025 ƒe sedede aɖe “de dzi ƒo” na ame ɖekaɖeka siwo ŋu tagbɔdɔ le siwo "hea afɔku na wo ɖokui alo dukɔa alo wole ablɔwo dzi eye womate ŋu akpɔ wo ɖokui dzi le teƒe siwo sɔ hena ɣeyiɣi si sɔ o la ƒe dukɔmeviwo ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna." Ke hã ... ... Le nyateƒe me la, sededea meɖoe be yeatsɔ “nuwɔametɔ ɖesiaɖe” ade dɔwɔƒewo abe alesi nyatakaka geɖe gblɔe ene o, ke boŋ, amesiwo ŋu tagbɔdɔ le eye wole ablɔwo dzi siwo “mate ŋu akpɔ wo ɖokui dzi o” boŋ. Le U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe asidede July 2025 ƒe dɔdzikpɔha ƒe sedede aɖe te (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), si ƒe tanyae nye, "Ending Crime and Disorder on America's Streets" megbe la, amewo gblɔ be sededea ƒe taɖodzinue nye be "yeatsɔ amesiame si nye nuwɔametɔ ade habɔbɔ me," abe alesi X post ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo) si me wokpɔe wu miliɔn 1.1 gblɔe ene, le nya sia ŋɔŋlɔ me: (X zãla @John_Beckham14) Related claims also kaka ɖe mɔ̃ bubuwo dzi, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Facebook (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Wotu nya sia ɖe dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe sedede ŋutɔŋutɔ si woɖe ɖe go le July 24, 2025 dzi, si ɖo gɔmeɖoanyi be woatsɔ ame ɖekaɖeka siwo si aƒe mele o ade habɔbɔwo me sesẽe, gake nya si wogblɔ be woɖoe be "yeatsɔ ame sia ame si nye nuwɔametɔ ade habɔbɔ me" la nye nya si gbɔ eme. "Aƒemanɔsitɔwo tɔtrɔ yi dɔwɔƒe siwo anɔ anyi ɣeyiɣi didi hena nuwɔwɔ ɖe wo ŋu ameŋububutɔe to dukɔmeviwo ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna zazã nyuie me ana dukɔa ƒe ɖoɖo nagaɖo anyi," ithe order read. Dukɔmeviwo ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna nye se ƒe ɖoɖo si dziɖuɖua doa alɔe si nye be woaxɔ ame sesẽe ɖe atikewɔƒe, si wozãna zi geɖe na ame ɖekaɖeka siwo nye afɔku na wo ɖokui alo ame bubuwo. Sededea lɔ amesiwo "le ablɔwo dzi eye womateŋu akpɔ wo ɖokui dzi le teƒe siwo sɔ hena ɣeyiɣi si sɔ o" ɖe eme koŋ. Efia mɔ Dudɔnunɔlawo ƒe Habɔbɔ me tɔ tiatia aɖewo be: Woadi, le nya siwo sɔ me, be woatrɔ Dukɔa alo Dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe ŋgɔdonyawo eye woadzudzɔ lɔlɔ̃ ɖe nu dzi ƒe sedede siwo xea mɔ na UnitedStates ƒe ɖoɖo si nye be woade dukɔmeviwo ƒe ɖokuitsɔtsɔna ƒe dzi ƒo na ame ɖekaɖeka siwo ŋu tagbɔdɔ le siwo nye afɔku na wo ɖokui alo dukɔa alo wole ablɔwo dzi eye womate ŋu akpɔ wo ɖokui dzi le teƒe siwo sɔ hena ɣeyiɣi si sɔ o ... Ne míagblɔe bubui la, sededea ƒe taɖodzinu le go geɖe me be wòana wòanɔ bɔbɔe na dziɖuɖua be wòatsɔ aƒemanɔsitɔwo ade atikewɔƒewo le woƒe lɔlɔ̃nu mawɔmawɔ me. Ƒuƒoƒo siwo ʋlia nya la fɔ nusiwo ŋu wotsi dzi ɖo "vevie" ɖe te kaba ku ɖe sededea ŋu. "Nublanuitɔe la, etsɔ ƒe sedede si ŋu wotsi dzi ɖo la ku ɖe dɔwɔƒewo ƒe ɖoɖowɔwɔ ŋu le mɔ geɖe nu ke menye egbɔkpɔnu ŋutɔŋutɔ siwo míenya be wowɔa dɔ le kpekpeɖeŋu nana amewo be woanɔ agbe nyuitɔ me o," Dukɔa ƒe Tagbɔdɔléle Ŋuti Nubabla (NAMI) gblɔ le nyatakaka aɖe me.

claim: U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump tsɔ ga 4,725 na gadzikpɔla si megali o, si ŋu ŋukpe le, kple gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe, Jeffrey Epstein, si ƒe home katã nye dɔlar biliɔn 1.1.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu Nya la dzɔ tso nugɔmemasemase aɖe gbɔ. U.S. Sen. Ron Wyden, Democrattɔ tso Oregon gblɔ le X dzi be yeƒe numekulawo ke ɖe asitsatsa 4,725 ŋu yi a tso Epstein ƒe gakɔnta ɖeka me si ƒe home katã nye dɔlar biliɔn 1.1, eye womeƒo nu tso Trump ŋu o. Le July 2025 me, esi yɔyɔwo nu sẽ be woaɖe gaxɔla si tsi megbe kple gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla si wobu fɔe Jeffrey Epstein ƒe nya la ɖe go la, nya aɖe kaka be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump tsɔ ga 4,725 de Epstein. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, nyatakaka aɖe si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi gblɔ nya sia, si na ame 70,000 kloe kpɔe eye ame 1,800 lɔ̃e (wodzrae ɖo): Nyatakaka bubu gblɔ be asitsatsaawo katã ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 1.1. Video aɖe si me ŋutsu aɖe nɔ nu ƒom le sewɔtakpekpe aɖe me, eye wòtsɔ xexlẽdzesi mawo tɔgbe (wodzrae ɖo) la hã nɔ eme. Ame miliɔn 1.5 ye kpɔe eye ame 22,000 ye lɔ̃e le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. Nya la kple videoa kaka ɖe X dzi wu gake edze le Instagram hã. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, Snopes xlẽlawo di nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ didim be yewoaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ la ƒe nyateƒenyenye dzi. Nya sia tso nusiwo ŋu U.S. Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Ron Wyden, si nye Demokrasitɔ si tso Oregon kple ŋutsu si le videoa me ƒe dɔwɔƒe ke ɖo gbɔ. Gake togbɔ be nyatakakaawo gblɔ asitsatsa ƒe xexlẽme kple ga home si woƒo ƒu pɛpɛpɛ hã la, wogblɔ vodadatɔe be Trump gbɔe wo katã tso. Le susu sia ta la, míebu nya si wogblɔ be enye alakpa. Le July 17, 2025 dzi la, Wyden ƒo nu le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe kpekpe aɖe me tso nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Epstein ŋu siwo eƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ke ɖo le U.S. Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔƒe ŋu. Eƒe nuƒoa dze le C-SPAN (le gaƒoƒo 2 kple aɖabaƒoƒo 47 ƒe dzesi dzi): Wyden gblɔ be yeƒe numekulawo ƒe ƒuƒoƒoa ke ɖe nyatakaka siwo gbɔna ŋu tsitotsito le Gadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒea ƒe agbalẽwo me le ƒe 2024 me esime U.S. Dukplɔla Joe Biden ɖe mɔ na wo be woawɔe nenema: Le Ganyawo Gbɔkpɔƒea ƒe teƒe aɖe, Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla [Trump], si wotu ɖe kabinet ƒe agbalẽdzraɖoƒe aɖe la, Epstein ƒe faɛl gã aɖe si me nyatakaka siwo ŋu woate ŋu awɔ nu le, ga si woatsɔ akplɔe ɖo ŋuti nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe eƒe gazazã kple dɔwɔnawo ŋu siwo le lalam be woaku nu me la yɔ fũ. Le ƒe si va yi me la, Biden dziɖuɖua ɖe mɔ na míaƒe numekulawo be woalé ŋku ɖe agbalẽa ƒe akpa aɖewo ŋu. Míewɔe nenema le Gaxɔa me. Nya si wògblɔe nye esi. Gadzɔdzɔ ƒe Epstein ƒe faɛl ŋuti nyatakakawo, Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla, 4,725 ƒe gaɖoɖo ɖe amewo to ka dzi. Mina magagblɔ nya ma ake: gaɖoɖoɖa 4,725 siwo wotsɔ to ka dzi ƒo ƒu ade dɔlar biliɔn 1.1 kloe, siwo gena ɖe Aƒetɔ Epstein ƒe gadzraɖoƒe ɖeka pɛ ko me hedoa go. Ne èbia nye la, ema wu 4000 siwo ate ŋu anye numekuku ƒe fliwo le afima tututu. Ame miliɔn alafa geɖe bubuwo hã to gakɔnta bubuwo me. Ema nye nu geɖe wu gɔ̃ hã si ŋu wòle be woaku nu me le. Faɛl la ɖee fia be Aƒetɔ Epstein zã Russia gadzraɖoƒe geɖe, siwo ŋu tohehe le fifia, tsɔ wɔ ga si woxena ɖe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ŋu la ŋudɔ. Nyɔnu kple nyɔnuvi siwo wòɖo taɖodzinu na la dometɔ geɖe tso Russia, Belarus, Turkey kple teƒe bubuwo. Ame ʋuʋuna ne ebu ame ƒomevi siwo anya kpɔ gome le nyɔnu kple nyɔnuvi sue siawo tsɔtsɔ do goe le dɔwɔƒe mawo me yi ɖe Epstein ƒe ŋlɔmiwɔwɔ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ŋu. Le afisia hã la, esiawo katã nye amesiwo ate ŋu akplɔ ame, Aƒetɔ Dukplɔla, ele be Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea nanɔ tome kum. Esia ku ɖe ƒe geɖe kple ƒe geɖe ƒe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa le dukɔwo dome ŋu. Gake le eƒe nuƒoa ƒe ɣeyiɣi aɖeke me la, Wyden megblɔ alo do susu ɖa be Trump nye ame siwo le asitsatsaawo ƒe nuwuwu kemɛ la dometɔ ɖeka o, wo katã ya megagblɔ o. Ke boŋ eƒoe ɖe dziɖuɖua nu be woaku nu me le asitsatsaawo ŋu, si wòyɔ be "ame siwo ate ŋu akplɔ ame ayi ŋgɔe." Hafi Wyden naƒo nu le Sewɔtakpekpea me la, eƒo nu kple The New York Times eye wògblɔ na agbalẽa be yeƒe ƒuƒoƒoa le numekuku wɔm le "Epstein ƒe ganyawo ŋuti kadodoa ŋu ƒe etɔ̃ enye sia," si ɖee fia be Wyden ƒe agbagbadzedzewo menye nu yeye o, eye be yeƒe ƒuƒoƒoa kpɔ gadzraɖoƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo, siwo nye nya ɣaɣlawo, le dukɔa ƒe se nu. Wyden ŋutɔ mate ŋu aɖe nuŋlɔɖiawo ɖe go o, si tae wònɔ dzi dem ƒo na Trump dziɖuɖua be woawɔe nenema le eƒe Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe nuƒoa me ɖo. Wyden ƒe numekukuha si le Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ganyawo Ŋuti Kɔmiti si me sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ nye sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ le ɖoƒe kɔkɔtɔ me tɔ aɖe gblɔ na Snopes be numekukua dze egɔme kple taɖodzinu be woawɔ se aɖe atsɔ axe mɔ ɖe adzɔxexe ƒe asiɖeɖe le nu ŋu nu. Womeɖe mɔ na numekula siwo le Sewɔtakpekpea me be woadze numekuku gɔme sedede ƒe taɖodzinu aɖeke manɔmee o. Kpeɖeŋutɔa ɖo kpe New York Times ƒe nyatakaka dzi be ƒuƒoƒoa le ŋku lém ɖe, vevietɔ, gaɖɔliɖɔli ŋu le Epstein kple Leon Black, si nye Apollo Global Management, Inc., si nye ame ŋutɔ ƒe gadede dɔwɔƒe gã aɖe si ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ te dɔlar biliɔn 785 le March 2025. claim: Ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe dziɖuɖu si Muhammad Yunus kplɔ le Bangladesh te fli ɖe Hindutɔwo ƒe azã gãwo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Durga Puja, Janmashtami, kple Saraswati Puja, ƒe ŋkekenyuiwo ɖuɖu me.

evidence: Egbe nye Nigeria ƒe ɖokuisinɔnɔ tso Britaintɔwo ƒe dutanyigbadziɖuɖu me ƒe ƒe 50 lia.

claim: Nigeria ye nye dukɔ si wɔa cassava wu le Afrika kple xexeame.
evidence: Nigeria ye nye dukɔ si wɔa cassava wu le xexeame katã, eye wòxɔa cassava si wowɔna katã ƒe akpa atɔ̃lia (21%) le xexeame katã. Cassava kple nusiwo le eme ƒe didi sɔ gbɔ ŋutɔ le dukɔa me ganyawo me. Gake nusiwo wotsɔ vɛ la mete ŋu kpɔ nudidi gã la gbɔ o. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, vovototo si le Cassava Flour si ƒe nyonyome deŋgɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ kple didi dome la anɔ abe metrik tɔn (MT) 485,000 ƒe sia ƒe esime vovototo si le cassava starch me anɔ abe 290,000MT ene. PwC bu akɔnta be Nigeria ahiã cassava ke yeye siwo ade metrik tɔn miliɔn 28.3 ƒe sia ƒe si wodo ɖe anyigba si ade hekta miliɔn 1.2 dzi be woatsɔ akpɔ dukɔa ƒe cassava ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ [nu siwo wowɔ kple esiwo woɖe tso eme ƒe didi gbɔ.

claim: Le ƒe 2025 me la, U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha tsɔ dɔlar 100,000 ƒe fetu na dɔwɔla yeyewo tsɔ kpe ɖe dɔlar 45,000 si woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te ŋu, si sɔ gbɔ sã wu esi nufiala siwo le United States xɔna.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le July 2025 me la, ICE na dɔwɔƒea ƒe dɔwɔla tsãtɔwo be woana fetu si ƒe xexlẽme nye xexlẽdzesi atɔ̃ le asidede agbalẽ te kple fetu si woate ŋu axɔ si ade dɔlar 100,000 be woatrɔ ayi amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ gbɔ. Dɔwɔƒea ƒe fetu sia wu nufiala si le United States ƒe fetu le mama dedie nu. Ne míagblɔe tututu la, dɔwɔƒea tsɔ ga si ade dɔlar 50,000 na, ke menye dɔlar 45,000 o, be wòanye fetu si woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te, eye fetu si ICE dɔwɔla si le ɖoƒe sia xɔna la tso dɔlar 88,621 va ɖo dɔlar 144,031 le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me. Vaseɖe Aug. 1, 2025 dzi koe woate ŋu axɔ fetu bliboa si woatsɔ ana la, eye dɔwɔla siwo nɔ dɔ wɔm tsã koe axɔ. Fetu si woxɔna na nufiala bibiwo — abe alesi wotsɔe sɔ kple ICE dɔwɔla bibi siwo trɔna yia dɔme tẽ wu ene — sɔ kple fetu si wona ICE ƒe dɔwɔla tsãtɔwo. ICE metrɔ nyabiase aɖe si wowɔ enumake be nenye be dɔwɔƒe yeyewo axɔ fetu siwo woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te kple nenye be fetu mawo asɔ kple dɔlar 45,000 ƒe xexlẽdzesi si le tsatsam le Internet dzi o. Àdi be yeakpɔ dɔlar 100,000 ƒe sia ƒe —tsɔ kpe ɖe dɔlar 45,000 ƒe fetu si woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te ŋua? Ðeko nàbia be yeanye kpovitɔ le U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, le nya aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi le July 2025. Nya siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Instagram, Facebook, Reddit kple Threads dzi gblɔ be dɔwɔƒea, le Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe dziɖuɣi, le fetu gã kple/alo fetu gã la nam dɔwɔla yeyewo — ga home aɖe, nyatakaka geɖe siwo wogblɔ be, si sɔ gbɔ sã wu esi nufiala aɖewo le United States xɔna. Threads ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si kaka le afisiafi gblɔ be: "ICE le $45,000 SIGNING BONUS nam kpe ɖe $100,000 ƒe fetu si woadze egɔme tsoe ŋu." "Mekpɔa $55,000 abe nufiala ene le nye ƒe 8 lia me kple Masters. Menye nyateƒe gbeɖe be míehiã be míaxe fe na nufialawo geɖe wu o." Nya siawo siwo woŋlɔ la de pɛpɛpɛ vie. ICE na fetu gã aɖe si woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te kple fetu na amesiwo ate ŋu axɔ ɖe dɔ me le July 2025 me vavã, gake na kpovitɔ tsãtɔwo koe, ke menye dɔwɔla yeyewo o. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, togbɔ be dɔwɔla tsãtɔ siawo dometɔ aɖewo siwo ICE xɔ ɖe dɔ me ate ŋu axɔ dɔlar 100,000 hã la, fetu ŋutɔŋutɔa keke ta wu eye wotsɔa fetu si woxɔna ɖe asidede agbalẽ te si ade dɔlar 50,000 kpena ɖe eŋu. Gake vaseɖe Aug. 1, 2025 dzi koe woate ŋu axɔ fetu bliboa, eye dɔwɔƒea yɔ dɔawo be wonye ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe dɔ, eye mɔnukpɔkpɔ ate ŋu akeke wo ɖe enu. Togbɔ be edze abe fetu siwo woŋlɔ ɖi na ICE dɔwɔla siwo trɔ gbɔ la sɔ gbɔ sã wu Amerika nufialawo ƒe fetu le mama dedie nu hã la, woate ŋu atsɔ wo asɔ kple nufiala siwo si nuteƒekpɔkpɔ geɖe wu le, le mamã dedie nu. ICE ƒe ame yeye siwo metrɔna o, ƒe fetu dze egɔme tso dɔlar 49,739 eye wòyi dzi va ɖo dɔlar 89,528 ƒe sia ƒe va ɖo July 2025, si sɔ kple esi nufiala ate ŋu axɔ. ICE metrɔ nyabiase aɖe si woɖo ɖe wo to e-mail dzi ku ɖe nenye be dɔwɔƒea naa fetu siwo woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te dɔwɔla yeyewo ŋu la enumake o. Eyata míebua nya sia be enye nyateƒe, alakpa kple nyatakaka siwo womenya o ƒe tsakatsaka. Le July 18 lia dzi la, nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe, siwo dome The New York Times hã le, ka nya ta be ICE le gakpekpeɖeŋu nam be woatsɔ akplɔ dɔwɔla tsãtɔwo kple amesiwo xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme vɛ. Le asitsaƒe siawo ƒe nya nu la, ame gbogbo aɖewo siwo nye dɔwɔƒea ƒe amedɔdɔ tsã la xɔ e-mail si me wobia tso wo si be woatrɔ ayi dɔwɔƒea. Nyatakaka siawo sɔ kple nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe si womeŋlɔ ŋkeke na o (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si ICE ta si le kuku ɖem na amesiwo nɔ dɔ wɔm tsã eye wòbia tso wo si be "TRƆ YI DƆDASI ME." "Miesubɔ United States of America kple bubu kple bubu. Fifia, miaƒe dukɔa le yɔyɔm na mi be miagasubɔ zi ɖeka ake," nyatakakadzraɖoƒea xlẽ. Le nyagbugbɔgadrɔ̃a te la, wobia be "TIA WÒ DƆDASI," kpe ɖe dɔ siwo woʋu ɖi na "Deportation Officer" kple "Criminal Investigator" ŋu. Dɔa ʋuʋu ƒe axa, esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm la, yɔ fetu si li na dɔwɔla siwo trɔna yia dukɔa me be enye dɔlar 88,621 va ɖo dɔlar 144,031 ƒe sia ƒe, eye mɔnukpɔkpɔwo le teƒe vovovo 26 (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe numekulawo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖoɖo ɖe amewo ƒe sia ƒe na dɔlar 105,383 va ɖo dɔlar 171,268, eye woate ŋu atiae le teƒe 30 (wodzra wo ɖo). Axa eveawo xlɔ̃ nu be dɔbiala siwo xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le gbeƒãɖeɖea ƒe ŋkeke si dzi woʋui alo do ŋgɔ nɛ koe ate ŋu abia, nenye be woxɔ dzudzɔ le dɔ me wu ƒe atɔ̃ do ŋgɔ na gbeƒãɖeɖe be woaxɔ dɔa. Axaawo yɔ ŋkeke si dzi woaʋu ɖoƒe siwo woʋu ɖi la be July 17, 2025, eye ŋkeke si dzi woawu enue nye Aug. 18, 2025. "Ɣeyiɣi ƒe ɖoɖo nye ɣeyiɣi si wu ƒe 1 gake mewu ƒe 4 o. ICE ate ŋu akeke ɖoɖo siwo wowɔ la ɖe enu wu ƒe 1 gake mede ƒe 4 o vaseɖe ƒe 4 ƒe seɖoƒe si woɖo le dzidziɖedzi siwo woɖo le mawunyadɔgbededɔa ƒe hiahiã nu," boblododoa nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gblɔ (woƒe gbeteteɖedzi). Togbɔ be axaawo meyɔ fetu aɖeke si woatsɔ ade asi agbalẽ te o hã la, LinkedIn nyatakaka aɖe si Robert Hammer, si nye dɔdzikpɔlagã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ le U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe, do boblo (wodzrae ɖo) "va ɖo $50k ƒe asidede agbalẽ te ƒe fetu ON TOP OF rehired annuitant pay (pension + pay."

claim: "Kasongo va tsɔ ɖoɖo ma ƒu gbe eye wòtsɔ nane si woyɔna be SHA kple SHIF vɛ si ƒe home nye KSh104 biliɔn."
evidence: Gachagua gblɔ be dziɖuɖua nyi fe KSh900 biliɔn (US$6.93 biliɔn) na kontraktɔ kple nudzrala siwo gbɔ dzi ɖi ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe, gake dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka yeyetɔ ɖee fia be esia nye KSh684 biliɔn – si gakpɔtɔ nye agba gã aɖe, ne ele sue wu hã. Eto nyateƒe be dukplɔla tsãtɔ Mwai Kibaki dze gɔmedzesukudede gɔme femaxee. Gake nuŋlɔɖia ɖee fia hã be Kibaki ye to ŋkeke ɖeka ƒe sekɛndrisukudede femaxee vɛ, ke menye Uhuru Kenyatta si va xɔ ɖe eteƒe abe alesi Gachagua gblɔe ene o. Eƒe nya si wògblɔ be ele be lãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖowo ƒe ɖɔɖɔɖowo naxɔ KSh800 miliɔn ko hafi la mesɔ o elabena nyatakaka siwo li ɖee fia be gazazãwo lolo wu sã, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye KSh700 miliɔn na ɖoɖoawo ɖɔɖɔɖo ɖeɖeko. Gake Gachagua ƒe nya sɔ be wobu akɔnta be Ruto ƒe hadomelãmesẽnyawo ŋuti nugblẽfexeɖoɖo yeyea axɔ KSh104 biliɔn ya teti adzɔxelawo. Le eƒe kwasiɖa ade ƒe tsaɖiɖi le United States si wu enu le August 21, 2025 dzi la, Kenya dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsãtɔ Rigathi Gachagua ɖe ɖeklemi eƒe dɔtɔ tsãtɔ si trɔ zu hoʋlila, dukplɔla William Ruto ƒe nuŋlɔɖi vevie. The two fall out publicly , culminating in Gachagua’s impeachment in October 2024. Le mɔzɔzɔa me la, Gachagua wɔ wɔna siwo wowɔ abe akɔdada ene le du siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Seattle , Boston , Los Angeles , Kansas City , Dallas kple Baltimore me, eye wòƒoe ɖe Kenyatɔ siwo le duta nu be woagbe Ruto ƒe dziɖuɖua. Le Kansas City la, eyɔ se siwo wole lalam, sukudede ƒe gazazã ƒe kuxia kple nufitifitiwɔwɔ be wonye Ruto ƒe dziɖuɖu ƒe dzesiwo, eye wòtso dziɖuɖua hã nu be ekplɔa amewo dzonae , funyafunyawɔame , amewuwu kple ɖeklemiɖelawo tete ɖe anyi. Míedzro Gachagua ƒe nya aɖewo me be míakpɔ alesi woƒo ƒu ɖe nyateƒenyawo ŋui. Fe siwo wole lalam nye fe siwo dziɖuɖua nyi ɖe dɔ alo adzɔnu siwo wowu enu ta. Togbɔ be le se nu la, enye gaxɔgbalẽvi gbãtɔ hã la, woƒe fexexe na asitsaha suewo te ɖeɖi wo ŋu ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia eye wògakpɔtɔ nye taɖui gã aɖe na dukɔa kple nutoa me gaxɔwo siaa. Fexexe ƒe heheɖemegbea va le ganyawo me tom, eye wòva zu nya vevi aɖe si ŋu woƒoa nu tsoe le dukɔa me. Esi Ruto dziɖuɖua dze ŋgɔ gakuxi aɖe ta la , ele nudzralawo ƒe fe siwo tsi megbe la zãm kple fenyinyi . Gachagua gblɔ be Ruto "gbe" fexexe na nudzrala siwo wɔ dɔ kple dziɖuɖua ƒe geɖe, eye wògblɔ be yewonyi fe "wu KSh900 biliɔn". Gake dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka siwo tso dukɔa ƒe gaxɔdzikpɔƒe kple gazazã dzi kpɔla gbɔ gblɔ be menye nenemae o. Le September 2022 me, esime Ruto xɔ ɖoƒea , gaxɔmenudzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be gaxɔgbalẽvi siwo le lalam la nye KSh439.2 biliɔn (U.S. dɔlar biliɔn 3.72 le ga si woɖɔli le ƒe ma me le mama dedie nu). Gazazã ŋuti nyatakakawo dzikpɔla yeyetɔ (vaseɖe March 31, 2025 dzi) tsɔ dukɔa ƒe gaxɔgbalẽvi siwo le lalam la ɖo KSh511.75 biliɔn , esime dukɔa ƒe gaxɔdzikpɔƒe ka nya ta be KSh421.63 biliɔn. Ne wotsɔ nutoame ƒe fe siwo nye KSh172.5 biliɔn kpe ɖe eŋu gɔ̃ hã la, ana wòanye KSh684.25 biliɔn si sɔ gbɔ wu. Egakpɔtɔ nye ga gbogbo aɖe, gake eɖiɖi ŋutɔ le "si wu KSh900 biliɔn" si Gachagua gblɔ la te. Míebua eƒe nyaa be egbɔ eme . Eyome Gachagua trɔ ɖe Kenya ƒe sukudede ƒe gazazã ƒe kuxia ŋu , eye wòbu fɔe ɖe Ruto dziɖuɖua ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie ta. Le November 2002 me la, tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe ametiakɔdala Mwai Kibaki do ŋugbe be ne woti ye le December 27 ƒe tiatiawɔƒea la, yeana gɔmedzesukudede nanye "femaxee eye wòanye dzizizi" na ɖeviwo katã. Le eƒe zi gbãtɔ nuƒo me le ŋkeke etɔ̃ le eƒe dziɖuɖu le tiatiawɔɣia megbe la, Kibaki ɖo gɔmedzesukudede femaxee be enye "taɖodzinu si wòle be wòakpɔ enumake". Ewɔ ɖe ŋugbedodoa dzi le January 2003 me, si nye afɔɖeɖe si na xexeame katã ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe tanyawo . Le ɖoɖo yeyea nu la, dziɖuɖua ɖe sukufewo ɖa eye wòdze ga ɖoɖo ɖe sukuwo tẽ gɔme, eye wobu akɔnta le sukuvi ɖesiaɖe nu. Kplamatsedonuwo do go ɖoɖoa gake wogblɔ be ena amewo ƒe ŋkɔ dede sukua me dzi ɖe edzi. Sukudede ŋuti nunyalawo , numekulawo kple nunala ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo katã gblɔ be ƒe 2003 mee wodze ɖoɖoa gɔme , le Kibaki ƒe kpɔkplɔ te. Le esia ŋu la, Gachagua ƒe nya sɔ. Gachagua gblɔ be Uhuru Kenyatta , si va xɔ ɖe Kibaki teƒe la keke ɖoɖoa ɖe enu va ɖo sekɛndrisukudede gbɔ. Gake Kibaki ye do ŋugbe be yeade sekɛndrisuku femaxee le eƒe ƒe 2007 ƒe tiatiawɔɣi, eye wòdze ɖoɖoa gɔme le ƒe 2008. Le kpɔɖeŋu sia nu la, dukɔa xea sukufe, esime dzilawo xea gazazã bubuwo siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye awudodo, xɔdɔme kple ame ŋutɔ ƒe nuzazãwo. Kaka Kenyatta nazu dukplɔla le ƒe 2013 me la, ŋkeke ɖeka ƒe sekɛndrisukudede femaxee va nɔ anyi xoxo. Kenyatta meɖe ɖoɖoa ɖa o; ke boŋ eƒe dziɖuɖu dzi gakpekpeɖeŋu ɖe edzi 25%, do gakpekpeɖeŋu si sukuvi ɖesiaɖe nana ɖe edzi va ɖo KSh12,870 le ƒe 2015 me eye emegbe wòkeke ga si woatsɔ awɔ dɔa ɖe enu le ƒe 2017. Le eƒe gbugbɔgatiatia me le ƒe ma me la, Kenyatta do ŋugbe be yeana ŋkeke sekɛndrisukuwo " navo " tso ƒe 2018 me, gake le nuwɔna me la, ɖoɖoa yi edzi geɖe abe tsã ene. Esi Ruto xɔ ɖoƒea la, egalé ɖoɖoa me ɖe asi eye le January 2023 me la, efɔ ga si nye KSh22,244 na sekɛndrisukuvi ɖesiaɖe. B

claim: Le December 2025 me la, U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖe FBI ƒe nyatakaka aɖe ɖe go si me nyatoƒoetola aɖe gblɔ be Dukplɔla Donald Trump kpɔ foa wòwu via si wodzi yeyee eye wòtsɔ ame kukua ƒu gbe ɖe Michigan-ta me esime wòxɔ ƒe 13 eye Jeffrey Epstein nɔ edzram hena gbɔdɔdɔ.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Togbɔ be nuŋlɔɖia nye nu ŋutɔŋutɔ hã la, womeɖo kpe eƒe nyawo dzi o. Esi U.S. Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒea ɖe nyatakaka gbogbo aɖewo siwo ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔnuwɔla Jeffrey Epstein si megali o ŋu ɖe go le December 2025 me vɔ la, nya aɖe do mo ɖa le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe geɖe (wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo, wodzra wo ɖo) be ame aɖe si gblɔ be Epstein dzra ye ɖe gbɔdɔdɔ ta la tsɔ nyatakaka aɖe yi na FBI be U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump kpɔ fofoa ƒe amewuwu teƒe eƒe vi si wodzi yeyee eye wòtsɔ ame kukua ƒu gbe ɖe Michigan Ta me le ƒe 1984 me, esime wòxɔ ƒe 13. Snopes nuxlẽlawo hã ɖo e-mail ɖe mí eye wodi míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe nyaʋiʋlia ŋu. Nuŋlɔɖia nye nyateƒe; nyatoƒoetola, si ƒe ŋkɔ wogbugbɔ trɔ la, tsɔ nyatakakaa yi na FBI Dukɔa ƒe Afɔku Dɔwɔƒe le Aug. 3, 2020 dzi, esime Trump nɔ du ƒum kple Joe Biden, si nye dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ tsã ɣemaɣi, hena zi evelia le zi dzi. Togbɔ be ame geɖe siwo zãa nya sia le Internet dzi tsɔ nya sia be enye nyateƒe hã la, womeɖo kpe nya siwo ame ma gblɔ dzi le wo ɖokui si o, eye nyatakakaawo mewɔ ɖeka kple ɣeyiɣi si woɖo ɖi na Trump kple Epstein xɔlɔ̃wɔwɔ o. Le e-mail aɖe si FBI ɖo ɖe Snopes me la, gbe be yemaƒo nu tso eŋu nenye be yewoku nyatakaka sia me o. Nyatoƒoetola la tsɔ nyatakakaa — si woate ŋu akpɔ le DOJ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe — ɖo ɖe FBI ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe abe kaƒoƒo si wogblɔ be ewɔ kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe si do asi ɖa nɛ esi wòtsɔ nyatakaka gbãtɔ si me womeyɔ eƒe ŋkɔ o ɖo ɖa kwasiɖa etɔ̃ alo ene do ŋgɔ vɔ megbe la kplɔkplɔ ɖo. Nuŋɔŋlɔa ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be: Meƒo nu kple [nyagɔmekulaa] abe miniti 20 alo 30 ene tso alesi fonye kple Jeffrey Epstein tsɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa dzram le ƒe 1984 me esime mexɔ ƒe 13 eye mefɔ fu ŋu. Megblɔ nyatakaka vevi bubu aɖewo nɛ tso ame ŋkuta bubu siwo kpɔ gome le nye gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa kple vinyenyɔnuvi si wodzi yeyee wuwu kple etsɔtsɔ ƒu gbe ŋu le esi medzii esime menɔ gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe fukpekpe sia titina ta. Aɖaŋuɖoɖoa yi edzi gblɔ be Epstein kple nyatoƒoetola tɔɖiayɔvi wɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ɖoɖo aɖe ŋu "si me ŋutsu vovovowo, kple nyɔnu kple nyɔnuvi ʋɛ aɖewo, ava tɔdziʋu kple tɔdziʋu vovovowo gbɔ eye woaxe ga atsɔ azi dzinye be [matrɔ asi le eŋu] kpli wo." Nyatoƒoetola ŋlɔ bena Trump "kpɔ gome le ga xexe me edziedzi be yeazi dzinye be [mawɔ asitɔtrɔ] kpli ye eye wònɔ afima esime fonye wu vinye si wodzi yeyee eye wòtsɔ ame kukua ƒu gbe ɖe Michigan Ta la me." Womeƒo nu tso Trump ŋu bubu aɖeke le nyatakakaa me o. Togbɔ be nyatakakaa gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le ƒe 1984 me hã la, wogblɔ be Trump medo go Epstein o vaseɖe ƒe 1980 ƒeawo ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo. Trump ƒle Mar-a-Lago le December 1985 me, eye Epstein ƒle eƒe Palm Beach nɔƒe le ƒe 1990 me, togbɔ be kpeɖodziwo ɖee fia be ɖewohĩ eyi Palm Beach enuenu le ƒe 1980-awo me hã. Le ƒe 2002 me la, Trump gblɔ na New York magazine be yenya Epstein ƒe 15 sɔŋ — si fia be wodo go le ƒe 1987 me alo le ƒe 1987 lɔƒo Epstein ƒle anyigba le Palm Beach. Me me kɔ nusita Trump kple Epstein anɔ du sue aɖe me le Michigan esime wo dometɔ aɖeke mekpɔ kadodo aɖeke si ŋu nuŋlɔɖi le kple nuto si te ɖe wo ŋu ɣemaɣi o. Tɔdziʋu ƒe tsatsadaƒe aɖe nɔ Trump si le Michigan Ta la dzi ƒe geɖe — gake tɔdziʋu ma, si le Gary, Indiana, meʋu o vaseɖe ƒe 1996 me, le nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakaka siwo tso ɣemaɣi nu. Míedo asi ɖe Muskegon County Sheriff’s Office gbɔ be míadi nyatakaka aɖeke ku ɖe gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa ƒe asigɛ aɖe si le nutoa me — afisi wogblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa dzɔ le — le ƒe 1980-awo me, eye míese nya aɖeke enumake o. Nyatoƒoetola la meyɔ ame xɔŋkɔ bubu aɖeke si kpɔ gome le nudzɔdzɔ si wogblɔ be edzɔ me o tsɔ kpe ɖe Trump kple Epstein ŋu — amesiwo katã woɖe fia vevie le nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe tsatsam le Epstein ƒe ku to eɖokuiwuwu me le ƒe 2019 me megbe kpuie eye wòdo ŋgɔ na ƒe 2020 ƒe dukplɔla ƒe tiatia. Ðeko wòŋlɔ be: “Megblɔ nyatakaka vevi bubu aɖewo na [nyagɔmekulaa] tso ame ŋkuta bubu siwo kpɔ gome le nye gbɔdɔdɔ ƒe asitsatsa me ŋu.” Míedo asi ɖe White House gbɔ be míadi míaƒe susu tso nutsotsoawo ŋu, eye nyanuɖela aɖe ɖo eŋu kple kadodo aɖe si yi X nyatakaka aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si DOJ ŋlɔ si xlẽ be: "Nuŋlɔɖi siawo dometɔ aɖewo me nya siwo menye nyateƒe o eye wowɔ nuku na ame siwo wogblɔ ɖe Dukplɔla Trump ŋu siwo wotsɔ yi FBI gbɔ do ŋgɔ teti na ƒe 2020 ƒe tiatia la." Nuŋlɔɖi si me FBI ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si gblɔ be Trump kpɔ vidzĩwuwu si me Epstein ƒe ame aɖe si wowu la teƒe le la nye nyateƒe eye wònɔ DOJ ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea. Snopes mewɔe nenema o

claim: Wotsrɔ̃ Gandhi ƒe kpememe aɖe le Thiruvananthapuram esi BJP va xɔ dziɖuɖu le dua ƒe dɔwɔƒegã me vɔ megbe
evidence: Wole video aɖe si ɖe ŋutsu aɖe si dze Mahatma Gandhi ƒe kpememe si woda ɖe ʋuwo ƒe ƒukpo aɖe dzi dzi fia le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo le afisiafi. Wole videoa gblɔm be enye kpeɖodzi be wotsrɔ̃ Gandhi ƒe kpememe aɖe le Thiruvananthapuram esi BJP va xɔ dziɖuɖu le dua ƒe dɔwɔha me vɔ megbe.  Facebook zãla aɖe da nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ɖe edzi kple nya si gbɔna: തിരുവനന്തപുരം കോർപ്പറേഷൻ ഭരണം കോൺഗ്രസ് ബിജെപിയെ ഏൽപ്പിച്ചു ബിജെപിയുടെ തനി സ്വഭാവം സംഘികൾ പ്രകടിപ്പിക്കാൻ തുടങ്ങി ഇനി എന്തെല്ലാം കാണാനിരിക്കുന്നു തിരുവനന്തപുരത്ത്ക്കാർ ENGLISH: Sewɔtakpekpea tsɔ Thiruvananthapuram Corporation ƒe dɔdzikpɔkpɔ de asi na BJP. Sangh me tɔwo dze BJP ƒe nɔnɔme ŋutɔŋutɔ ɖeɖefia gɔme. Nukae Thiruvananthapuramtɔwo le lalam be yewoakpɔ?  Àte ŋu akpɔ nyatakaka si woŋlɔ ɖe afisia.  NM VERIFIED NewsMobile lé ŋku ɖe nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo ŋu la ŋu eye wòkpɔe be nya siwo wogblɔ la nye alakpa.  Nya veviwo didi si ku ɖe nudzɔdzɔa ŋu na wokpɔ nyatakaka aɖe si News18 Malayalam ta le December 30, 2025 dzi, si me woɖe screenshot tso video si kaka ɖe amewo me la me. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nudzɔdzɔa medzɔ le Thiruvananthapuram o.  Nyatakakaa gblɔ be nudomegbegblẽa dzɔ le December 29 lia dzi le Punalur du si le Kollam nuto me, le Kerala. Wogblɔ be amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo lae nye Harilal (ƒe 41), si nye Chemmanthur le Punalur nɔla. Wokpɔe wònɔ Gandhi ƒe kpememe aɖe si Bharat Mata ITI ɖo ɖe ʋuwo ƒe ƒukpo aɖe si te ɖe Punalur tɔdzisasrãa ƒe ɣetoɖoƒekpa dzi la dzi.  Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe siwo le Kerala, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Mathrubhumi, Asianet News, kple News Malayalam hã ka nya ta tso nudzɔdzɔa ŋu. Video nyatakaka aɖe si Mathrubhumi News ta gblɔ be esi amesi ŋu wotsɔ nya ɖo la gblẽ kpememea me vɔ la, ege ɖe fiase siwo te ɖe afima ŋu me eye wòhe tɔtɔ vɛ. Wogblɔ be nutoa me tɔwo gblɔ na nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo be amea nye ame si tsɔa kuxiwo ɖea fu na ame si zu numame na.  Eyata míate ŋu agblɔe kple kakaɖedzi be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome, si gblɔ be eɖee fia be wotsrɔ̃ Gandhi ƒe kpememe aɖe le Thiruvananthapuram le esime BJP va xɔ dziɖuɖu le dua ƒe dɔwɔha me megbe la nye alakpa.

claim: Aʋatso: Zelensky ƒe Aɖaŋuɖola Chrystia Freeland Nye Nazitɔwo ƒe Dɔwɔhati ƒe Dzidzimevi
evidence: Chrystia Freeland tɔgbui, Mykhailo Khomiak, nye Ukrainegbe me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ si nye Krakivski Visti ƒe nuŋlɔla nyateƒe le Germanytɔwo ƒe anyigbadziɖuɖua me. Gake enye dumevi dzro nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla si nɔ dɔ wɔm le Nazitɔwo ƒe mɔxeɖenu sesẽ te, eye kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be enye aʋawɔnuvlowɔla alo kpɔ gome le tohehe ƒe nuwɔnawo me o. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔ̃ siwo do ƒome kple Kremlin ka nya ta be Ukraine Dukplɔla Volodymyr Zelensky tia Chrystia Freeland be wòanye ganyawo ƒe ŋgɔyiyi ŋuti aɖaŋuɖola, eye wòɖɔe be enye “Nazitɔ aɖe si wɔ ɖeka kplii ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi.” Russia Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe nyanuɖela Maria Zakharova hã gagblɔ nya sia, eye wògblɔ be Freeland nye Mykhailo Khomiak ƒe tɔgbuiyɔvi, eye wògblɔ be ewɔ dɔ aduadu kple Nazitɔwo esime wònɔ nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ Krakivski Visti ɖɔlim le Kraków eye emegbe le Vienna esime Germanytɔwo xɔ Poland. Screenshot – lenta.ru Nya siwo wogblɔ tso “Nazitɔwo ƒe ɣeyiɣi si va yi” si wogblɔ be edo ƒome kple Chrystia Freeland tɔgbui ŋu menye nu yeye o, wokakae zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 2017 me le eƒe ɖoɖo Canada ƒe dutanyawo gbɔ kpɔla megbe. Freeland gblɔ ɣemaɣi be nya siawo nye agbagba si Russia dze be yeade nu Ɣetoɖoƒetɔwo ƒe demokrasi ɖoɖowo me, si me Canada hã le, ƒe akpa aɖe. Eƒo nu tso tɔgbuia ƒe ŋutinya ŋu faa, eye wòkpɔ gome le numekuku siwo wowɔ tso eƒe agbe ŋu me eye wòlɔ̃ ɖe edzi be Mykhailo Khomiak ɖɔ Ukrainegbe me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe ɖo le Kraków le Nazitɔwo ƒe dziɖuɣi hafi ʋu yi Canada emegbe. Ete gbe ɖe edzi be kpeɖodzi aɖeke meli be enye aʋawɔnuvlowɔla, Nazitɔwo ƒe nukpɔsusuŋutinunyala, alo kpɔ gome le tohehe ƒe nuwɔnawo me o. Agbenɔnɔ ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖee fia be do ŋgɔ na aʋaa la, Mykhailo Khomiak nye ɖekakpui nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔla le Lviv si si do ŋgɔ na Soviettɔwo ƒe anyigbadzidzedze yi Kraków si Nazitɔwo ɖu. Afimae Ukraine habɔbɔwo di be yewoata Ukrainegbe me magazine aɖe le afima, si nye agbagbadzedze si mate ŋu ayi edzi ne menye anyigbadziɖulawo ƒe nyanyanana kple ŋkuléle ɖe eŋu o. Ernest Gyidel, si nye agbalẽnyala si dzro Krakivski Visti me hena eƒe nusɔsrɔ̃gbalẽa, kpɔe be agbalẽa me nyawo ƒe 25% meku ɖe nyatakaka gbegblẽwo ŋu o, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye nya siwo tsi tre ɖe Polandtɔwo kple Soviettɔwo ŋu. Susu mamlɛawo ku ɖe Ukrainetɔwo ƒe agbenɔnɔ ƒe dekɔnuwo, xexemenunya, kple gbegbɔgblɔ ŋuti nunya ŋu. Gyidel gblɔ be Germanytɔwo ƒe ɖoɖo siwo di be yewoatsɔ Ukrainetɔwo awɔ avu kple Polandtɔwo be woatsɔ axe mɔ ɖe tsitretsiɖeŋu ɖekawɔwɔ nu lae trɔ asi le nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo nɔ anyi ɣemaɣi ŋu. Nuŋlɔla ƒe dɔa ƒe akpa gãtɔ nye mɔ̃ɖaŋununya, eye eƒe susu nɔa egbɔkpɔkpɔ be wotae ŋu. Le nyati siwo te Khomiak de asi dome la, Hejdel mekpɔ ɖeke si tsi tre ɖe Yudatɔwo ŋu alo si da megbe na Nazitɔwo gaglãa o. Eʋlia nya be ne wotsɔ ŋkɔ na Mykhailo Khomiak be enye “nuwɔwɔ aduadu” la, eŋea aɖaba ƒua nɔnɔme sesẽ siwo me wozi ame dzi le ɣemaɣi me dzi. Russiatɔwo ƒe alakpanyawo ɖoe koŋ trɔ gbo Mykhailo Khomiak ƒe agbemeŋutinya be yewoatsɔ aɖo tɔgbuiyɔvi Chrystia Freeland, amesi ƒe dunyahehedɔ to vovo kura tso eƒe ƒome ŋutinya gbɔ. StopFake ɖe alakpanya siwo wogblɔ be Canada ƒe Dukplɔlagã ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ Chrystia Freeland do le nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo ƒe kpekpe aɖe me esime wòmu aha la ɖa va yi.

claim: Le ƒe 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be yewomagatsɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ siawo ade hatsotso me be wonye dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo o: sukudede (si me nufiafia ƒe master’s degrees hã le), dɔnɔdzikpɔkpɔ (MSN, DNP), hadomedɔwɔwɔ (MSW, DSW), dukɔa ƒe lãmesẽ (MPH, DrPH), atikewɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ, dɔwɔwɔ ƒe atikewɔwɔ, kamedede, tomeŋutinunya, nuƒoƒo kple gbegbɔgblɔ ƒe dɔléle kple aɖaŋuɖoɖo kple atikewɔwɔ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea do susua ɖa be woaɖe kɔledzi ƒe ɖoɖo vovovowo ɖa le "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo" ƒe gɔmesese me koŋ le sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ƒe dzedze ŋu. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, aɖaŋuɖoɖoa meto haɖe o. Woabu aɖaŋuɖoɖo ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ aɖewo hã be wonye "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo" le Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea ƒe ɖoɖoa nu. Me me kɔ nenye be nyametsotso sia si akpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ƒe seɖoƒewo koŋ dzi la ɖe tɔtrɔ si keke ta wu le Sukudede Dɔwɔƒe ƒe ɖoɖowo kple nuwɔnawo me fia o. Le November 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, nya aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi be Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea gbugbɔ ɖo dɔnɔdzikpɔkpɔ ƒe ɖoɖowo kple kɔledzi ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ bubuwo ɖe hatsotsowo me be woaɖe wo ɖa le gɔmesese si nye "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ" me. Nutsotso sia kaka ɖe X, Instagram, Facebook kple Threads dzi. Nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo tsɔ ŋutinyawo ƒu du kple tanya siwo nye "Dɔnɔdzikpɔkpɔ Megabua 'Dɔwɔƒe ƒe Dzeside' si Trump Admin ŋlɔ o." Woŋlɔ kɔledzi ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ siwo wosusu be Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea ɖoe be yeagbugbɔ aɖo wo ɖe hatsotsowo me la nɔ nyatakaka geɖe siwo woŋlɔ ɖe wo me. Snopes nuxlẽlawo ɖo xexlẽdzesi xɔŋkɔ aɖe si kaka ɖe Internet dzi ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo ɖe mí eye wobia tso mía si be míakpɔe ɖa be dukɔa ƒe sukudede dɔwɔƒea "magade dzesi esiawo be wonye dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo o hã." Ame aɖewo bia be ɖe esia fia be ɖaseɖigbalẽawo madze na sukuviwo ƒe gadodo o hã. Le nyateƒe me la, Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea do susua ɖa be woaɖe kɔledzi ƒe ɖoɖo vovovowo ɖa le "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo" ƒe gɔmesese me koŋ le sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ƒe dzedze ŋu. Ne woda asi ɖe Nov. 6 ƒe aɖaŋuɖoɖoa dzi la, ana woaɖo seɖoƒe na dziɖuɖua ƒe gadodo na sukuvi siwo dea sukunuwuwu ƒe ɖoɖowo le dɔ vovovowo me. Nya si woŋlɔ ɖe etame la na ɖaseɖigbalẽ siwo woɖe ɖa dometɔ aɖewo ƒe xexlẽdzesi si sɔ pɛpɛpɛ le akpa gãtɔ me. Le nyati sia ŋɔŋlɔ me la, womewu aɖaŋuɖoɖoa nu haɖe o. Me me kɔ nenye be ɖoɖo sia si kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe sukuviwo ƒe gadodo dzi koŋ ɖee fia be tɔtrɔ gã aɖe va le Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea ƒe nɔnɔme ɖe sukunuwuwu ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ vovovowo ŋu o. Esi wòle alea ta la, míebu nya sia be enye nyateƒe, alakpa kple nyatakaka siwo ŋu womeɖoe ɖo o ƒe tsakatsaka. Le nya aɖe si Ellen Keast, si nye Sukudede Dɔwɔƒe ƒe nyanuɖela, ŋlɔ ɖe e-mail dzi me la, egblɔ be dɔwɔƒea le gɔmesese ma ke si nye dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ si yezã ƒe bla nanewoe nye sia zãm eye gbe si wodo ɖa le se siwo wodo ɖa me "sɔ kple ŋutinya me nudzɔdzɔ sia si do ŋgɔ." Keast gblɔ be: "Mewɔ nuku na mí be dɔwɔƒe aɖewo le avi fam amegãxi le se siwo menɔ anyi kpɔ o ta elabena woƒe sukufe ƒe sɔdola si seɖoƒe meli na o le adzɔxelawo ƒe gaku dzi wu enu." Sukudede Dɔwɔƒe gblɔ be yewole mɔ kpɔm be yewoaɖe se mamlɛawo ɖe go le ƒe 2026 ƒe kele me ne mede ɖeke o la (kpɔ Axa 56). U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe July 2025 One Big Beautiful Bill Act ɖe ɖoɖo aɖe si ɖe mɔ na sukunuwulawo be woado ga vaseɖe woƒe vava ƒe ga bliboa ɖa eye wòde seɖoƒewo na ga home si sukuviwo ate ŋu ado (kpɔ Akpa 81001). Le se yeyea nu la, sukuvi siwo le "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ" ƒe ɖoɖowo me, siwo gɔme woɖe be "dɔnyala ƒe sukuviwo" ate ŋu ado ga home gãtɔ kekeake le ƒe sia ƒe ƒe seɖoƒe si nye dɔlar 50,000 nu eye woƒe agbenɔƒe ƒe seɖoƒe nanye dɔlar 200,000. Sukuvi siwo le sukunuwuwu ƒe ɖoɖo bubuwo me ate ŋu ado ga dɔlar 20,500 ƒe sia ƒe, eye woate ŋu ado ga dɔlar 100,000 le woƒe agbenɔɣi katã. Ðoɖo yeye siwo ku ɖe sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ŋu dze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme tso July 1, 2026. Le se sia ta la, Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea dze nusi woyɔna be "sedede" ƒe ɖoɖo gɔme be woatsɔ awɔ sea dzi. Sedede ma ƒe akpa aɖe, le go sia me, ku ɖe nusi wobu be enye "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ" le sea nu la nyanya ŋu. Abe alesi wòle ene la, be woakpɔ amesi dze na sukuviwo ƒe gadodo ƒe seɖoƒe kɔkɔtɔ la, Sukudede Dɔwɔƒea do susua ɖa be woaɖe gɔmesese kpui aɖe ɖa na "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ" ƒe gɔmesese si ŋu woƒo nu tsoe zi gbãtɔ le ƒe 1965 ƒe sedede aɖe me. Gɔmesese gbãtɔae nye esi: Dɔwɔwɔ ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ: Diplome si fia be wowu sukudede ƒe nudidi siwo hiã hafi woate ŋu adze dɔwɔwɔ gɔme le dɔ aɖe me kple dɔwɔwɔ ƒe aɖaŋu si wu esi hiã zi geɖe hafi woaxɔ ɖaseɖigbalẽ siaa. Zi geɖe la, wobiaa dɔnyala ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ hã. Dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽ ƒe kpɔɖeŋuwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Atikeŋutinunya (Pharm.D.), Aɖudɔdada (D.D.S. alo D.M.D.), Lãwo ƒe Atikewɔwɔ (D.V.M.), Abɔtadɔ (D.C. alo D.C.M.), Senyawo (L.L.B. alo J.D.), Atikewɔwɔ (M.D.), Ŋkuŋutinunya (O.D.), Ƒumeŋuɖui (D.O.), Afɔdzidɔ (D.P.M., D.P., alo Pod.D.), kple Mawunyaŋutinunya (M.Div., alo M.H.L.). Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe gɔmeɖeɖe aɖe "dɔnyala ƒe ɖaseɖigbalẽwo" gɔme be wonye esiwo ƒe CIP code si nye xexlẽdzesi ene sɔ kple t

claim: "Ganya sia menye ganya si ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 188 o godoo – enye ganya si ƒe home nye dɔlar biliɔn 350 ya teti."
evidence: Fasua ƒe nya sɔ akpa gãtɔ be Nigeria ƒe ganyawo ƒe lolome lolo wu dɔlar biliɔn 180, eye akɔntabubu yeyewo va kpe ɖe eŋu emegbe. Eƒe nya siwo wògblɔ tso ahedada ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ, Nigeria ƒe gazazã ɖe ame ɖeka ŋu ne wotsɔe sɔ kple dukɔ bubuwo, ga si wòdzra ɖo tso ami siwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ me kple kesinɔnuwo ƒe dzesi bubuwo ŋu la nye esiwo ŋu womeɖo kpee le be womesɔ o. Arise News TV ƒe wɔnawo dzikpɔla Rufai Oseni tɔ dzɔ be gazazã ƒe dɔwɔwɔ le sue, gake mesɔ o esi wògblɔ be ami ʋeʋĩ ƒe dodo ɖe duta dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ 50% le ƒe si va yi me. Le July 2025 ƒe numedzodzro aɖe me le Arise News TV dzi la, Tope Fasua, si nye Nigeria ƒe dukplɔla ƒe ganyawo ŋuti aɖaŋuɖola, bia be woawɔ dukɔa ƒe gazazã ƒe ɖoɖo gã aɖe atsɔ akpɔ ahedada si nɔa anyi ɖaa gbɔ eye woade ga xɔtuɖaŋuwo me, eye wòƒoe ɖe dukɔa nu be "wòagbugbɔ akpɔ eɖokui le susu me." Be Fasua nate ŋu agblɔ eƒe nya la, ehe susu yi tɔtrɔ siwo va le Nigeria ƒe ami ƒe asitsatsa veviwo me, tɔtrɔ siwo va le ganyawo ƒe ɖoɖo me kple alesi wogbugbɔ ɖo dukɔa ƒe ami ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme (GDP) dzi nyitsɔ laa dzi . Míedzro dutoƒo nyatakakawo me be míakpɔ alesi ganyawo ŋuti nya siwo wògblɔ le yameʋu me ƒe tanya aɖewo ƒoa ƒui. Fasua gblɔ be Nigeria le mɔ dzi yina ɖe ami ʋeʋĩ si womeɖona ɖe duta ziro o kple nusiwo woɖe tso duta siwo mebɔ o, eye wògblɔ be ami si wotsɔ tso duta vɛ ɖiɖi va ɖo "dɔlar biliɔn 10" le ƒe 2024 me, si na wodzra "dɔlar biliɔn 15" ɖo. Togbɔ be megblɔ ga si woatsɔ awɔe le gbebiamea me o hã la, woka nya ta le teƒe bubuwo be egblɔ nya ma tɔgbe le United States dɔlar me . Gake Nigeria ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã (CBN) ƒe nyatakakawo gblɔ ŋutinya bubu. Eƒe ƒe 2024 ƒe fexexe ŋuti nyatakaka ɖee fia be ami si wotsɔ tso duta vɛ dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ tso Amerika dɔlar biliɔn 18.3 le ƒe 2023 me va ɖo dɔlar biliɔn 14.1 le ƒe 2024 me . Esia nye ga si dzi woɖe kpɔtɔ abe dɔlar biliɔn 4.25 ene, ke menye dɔlar biliɔn 15 o. Nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta hã meɖiɖi va ɖo dɔlar biliɔn 10 o. Míebua nya si wogblɔ be mesɔ o. – Catherine Adeniyi Fasua gblɔ be Nigeriatɔ miliɔn 130 nɔ ahedada si me nu vovovowo le me, si nye afɔɖeɖe si yi ŋgɔ wu gakpɔkpɔ be wòalɔ lãmesẽ, sukudede kple agbenɔnɔ ƒe dzidzenuwo ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ hã ɖe eme. Xexeame ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ɖee fia be enye "nukpɔsusu si dze ƒã le agbenyuinɔnɔ me". Eƒe nyatakaka yeyetɔ ɖee fia be Nigeriatɔ miliɔn 74 da ahe le go geɖe me le ƒe 2024. Nigeria ƒe nyatakakawo gblɔ ŋutinya bubu Anɔ eme be xexlẽme miliɔn 130 la tso Nigeria ƒe dukɔa ƒe ahedada ƒe dzesi gbãtɔ si Dukɔa ƒe Akɔntabubu Dɔwɔƒe ta le ƒe 2022. Wonɔ te ɖe numekuku siwo wowɔ tso ƒe 2021 ƒe nuwuwu va ɖo ƒe 2022 ƒe gɔmedzedze dzi dzidze dzesi 15 le ene me nutowo me: lãmesẽ, sukudede, agbenɔnɔ ƒe dzidzenuwo kple dɔwɔɖui. Nufiame si do tso eme la ɖee fia be Nigeriatɔ miliɔn 133 da ahe le go geɖe me, ne wotsɔe sɔ kple miliɔn 82.9 siwo le ahedada si wotu ɖe gakpɔkpɔ dzi me (si mede N137,430 na ame ɖeka ƒe sia ƒe o) le ƒe 2019. NBS gblɔ be afɔɖeɖe eveawo lé ahedada ƒe akpa vovovowo eye wokpe ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu, gake xexlẽmeawo mesɔ tẽ o elabena wotso ƒe vovovowo me, tsɔ kpe ɖe Covid-19 ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi ŋu dɔvɔ̃a. Prof Uche Isiugo-Abanihe, si nye amewo ƒe xexlẽme ŋuti nunyala le Ibadan Yunivɛsiti le Nigeria ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gome gblɔ na Africa Check be ƒe 2022 ƒe xexlẽmea do xoxo. Eyɔ ɖoɖo siwo wowɔ nyitsɔ laa abe ami ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunana ɖeɖeɖa si ŋu nyaʋiʋliwo nɔ , ga ƒe asixɔxɔ si le dzidzim ɖe edzi kple agbenɔnɔ ƒe gazazãwo ƒe dzidziɖedzi ene be wonye nusiwo he tɔtrɔ vɛ. "[Eyata] xexlẽme ɖesiaɖe si wona fifia nye nususugblɔ, elabena dziɖuɖu ƒe hadomeɖoɖowo kple nudede nyawo me tso ɣemaɣi ate ŋu atrɔ xexlẽmeawo hafi, ɖewohĩ xexlẽme siwo le ʋɛ alo lolo wu anɔ mía si, míenya gbeɖe o negbe ɖe wowɔ numekuku bubu hafi," Isiugo-Abanihe gblɔ. He added that while there were social cash transfer programs , "le nye nukpɔsusu nu la, ga siawo le abe tsidzadza le atsiaƒu me ene". – Catherine Adeniyi Esi Fasua nɔ nya hem ɖe ƒe 2026 ƒe gazazã si lolo wu ŋu la, egblɔ be Nigeria ƒe gazazã ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔ na ame ɖeka la le xexeame ƒe gazazã siwo bɔbɔ wu dome, gake metsɔ nyatakaka aɖeke na si ɖo kpe esia dzi o. "Gazazã na ame ɖeka nye gazazã bliboa le ƒe ɖeka me ne woma ɖe amewo katã ƒe xexlẽme nu, eye zi geɖe la, ema ana nàkpɔ nusi dziɖuɖua le zazãm ɖe ame ɖeka ŋu," Prof Olasupo Alege si le Covenant Yunivɛsiti le Nigeria ƒe ɣetoɖoƒe gblɔ. Ke hã, xexeame katã ƒe ɖoƒe si dziɖuɖua ɖo ɖi na esia meli o. Ke boŋ dɔwɔƒewo abe Xexeame ƒe Gadzraɖoƒegã ene daa dukɔwo ɖe hatsotsowo me le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe seƒe nu : ga si le bɔbɔe, titina si le bɔbɔe, titina si le dziƒo kple ga geɖe, vevietɔ hena numekuku kple tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo. Nigeria dze le amesiwo ƒe gakpɔkpɔ le titina si bɔbɔ ɖe anyi wu ƒe hatsotso me. Be míado Fasua ƒe nya la kpɔ la, míetsɔ eƒe gazazã ɖe ame ɖeka ŋu sɔ kple dukɔ bubu siwo le gakpɔkpɔ ƒe hatsotso ma ke me kple esiwo me ame gbogbo aɖewo le.  Le ƒe 2024 me la, Nigeria ƒe gazazã ɖe ame ɖeka ŋu nye dɔlar 83.6, si bɔbɔ kura wu Pakistan (dɔlar 270), Bangladesh (dɔlar 397.2), India (dɔlar 397.4), Egipte (dɔlar 733.1), Indonesia (dɔlar 745.4) kple Philippines (dɔlar 869). Alege gblɔ be ganya siwo sɔ dome koe tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo alea sɔ, eye wòxlɔ̃ nu be woagatsɔ dukɔwo abe Nige ene asɔ kple wo nɔewo o

claim: Betel aŋgba me tsi si me cloves le ate ŋu akpɔ nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili gbɔ.
evidence: Quick Take Instagram nyatakaka aɖe le betel aŋgba me tsi si me cloves le dodom ɖe ŋgɔ hena nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili. Míelé ŋku ɖe nya si wogblɔ la ŋu nyateƒe eye míekpɔe be alakpae.  Nya la Instagram nyatakaka aɖe si woama nyuie le atike si wotsɔ betel aŋgbawo kple cloves dzra ɖo ɖe lãmesẽnya geɖe ŋu, vevietɔ nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili, dom ɖe ŋgɔ. Tsɔ kpe ɖe gbɔgbɔtsixe ƒoƒo gbɔ kpɔkpɔ ŋu la, nyatakaka si woŋlɔ ɖe edzi be "एक पत्ता, अनगिनत! पन पत्ता है हाली थलथ" abe alesi wòɖo kpe edzi be ŋutete le nuɖaɖaa ŋu be wòakpɔ kɔdzi, dzamezã, acidity kple nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ ƒe nyawo gbɔ ene.  Nyateƒenyawo Me Dzodzro Nukatae ame ƒe nu me ʋẽna lilili? Nukatae wònye nusi ŋu woatsi dzi ɖo?  Nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili, si woyɔna kpee be ‘halitosis’ alo ‘gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃’, nye ʋeʋẽ lilili si mevivina o si dona tso nu me. Dɔlékui siwo me ya mele o, abe Porphyromonas gingivalis, Fusobacterium nucleatum, kple Prevotella intermedia ene, siwo te ŋu gblẽa amino acid siwo me sulphur le, si wɔa sulfur compounds (VSCs) siwo me dzoxɔxɔ mele o, ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi koŋ te.  Nusiwo ate ŋu ahe esia vɛ dometɔ aɖewoe nye beléle na nu me nyuie o, aɖe ƒe nutsyɔtsyɔ, aɖudɔ si de ŋgɔ, vevietɔ aɖuɖɔtoedɔléle sesẽwo, atike aɖewo, kple nɔnɔme bubuwo abe dɔlékuiwo, ŋutilã ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie, nu ƒe ƒuƒu, alo xerostomia ene.  Ðɔkta Ketan Rajput, si nye Aɖuɖɔtoedɔdala kple Aɖuɖɔtoeŋutinunyala le Ðɔkta Rajput ƒe Aɖudzikpɔƒe Deŋgɔ si le Dhule, Maharashtra, Maharashtra, ɖe eme be aɖuɖɔtoetetedɔ, alo gbɔgbɔtsixe ƒoƒo, nye ʋeʋẽ lilili si mevivina o, si nɔa anyi ɖaa, si nye ʋeʋẽ lilili si ate ŋu atso ɖoɖo kple nutoa me nu vovovowo gbɔ. Le esia ta la, Ðɔkta Rajput do susua ɖa be woada nusi gbɔ wòtso la tsɔ kpe ɖe nu me beléle na ame bibiwo ŋu.  Togbɔ be nyɔnyrɔ̃ kple ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe ŋutilã ƒe gbɔdzɔgbɔdzɔ si medzea ame ŋu o bɔ hã la, eƒe anyinɔnɔ ɣeyiɣi didi ate ŋu anye nusi ŋu woatsi dzi ɖo. Esia tso nyateƒe si wònye be zi geɖe la, efia be dɔléle aɖe le ame ŋu le ɖoɖo nu, aɖuɖɔtoe me dɔlékui aɖe, alo aɖuɖɔtoe me dɔdzẽ si le ete. Duɖimekeke si nɔa anyi didi hã gblẽa nu le amewo dome ƒomedodo, bubudede ame ɖokui ŋu, kple susu kple hadome nyonyo dzi. Eyata dɔlélea dzi kpɔkpɔ enumake kple nyuie le vevie ŋutɔ.  Ðe Ayurveda kafu xexeame katã ƒe atike na gbɔgbɔtsixe ƒoƒoa? Aleke Ayurveda-dɔdalawo kpɔa nyaa gbɔe?  Ao, menye nenema kura o. Ayurveda te ɖe Mukhadaurgandhya, alo gbɔgbɔtsixe ƒoƒo, ŋu abe ɖoɖowɔɖi alo nu me ƒe dadasɔ si le ete ƒe dzesi ene. Zi geɖe la, atike si wozãna le blema la do ƒome kple nya la kple nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie (ama ƒe ƒuƒoƒo), aɖudɔ (pyorrhoea), alo nu me dzadzɛnyenye manyomanyo. Eyata wonɔa te ɖe nusi gbɔ wòtso dzi kpɔa nɔnɔmea gbɔ to atikewɔmɔnu siwo wozãna le nutoa me kple esiwo wozãna le ɖoɖo nu siaa dzi.  Nutoa me atikewɔwɔ siwo tso Ayurvedatɔwo ƒe atikewɔwɔ me dometɔ aɖewoe nye gandusha, alo ami hehe; gbetikewo tsɔtsɔ klɔ nu me; kple gbe ʋeʋĩwo abe clove, cardamom, alo fennel ene ɖuɖu be wòaɖe dɔlékuiwo ƒe agba dzi akpɔtɔ eye wòana gbɔgbɔ nagaɖo ame me.  Guduchi, Trikatu, kple triphala nye gbetike siwo wozãna le ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe atikewɔwɔ me be woatsɔ ana nuɖuɖumeŋusẽ nanyo ɖe edzi la dome. Esia ana lãmenugbagbeviwo ƒe dɔwɔwɔ nanyo ɖe edzi eye wòakpe ɖe aɖinuwo ɖeɖeɖa ŋu.  Ele vevie ŋutɔ be míalɔ̃ ɖe edzi be togbɔ be Ayurveda-dɔdalawo kpɔa nyaa gbɔ bliboe hã la, wokafua atikewɔmɔnu siwo wowɔ na ame ŋutɔ. Zi geɖe la, wotsɔa nu me dzadzɛnyenye ƒe mɔnu siwo le lãmesẽ me, dɔgbo ƒe lãmesẽ, kple nuɖuɖu ƒe nuwɔna ƒe tɔtrɔwo katã dea mɔnua me. Esia wɔe be Ayurveda dea asixɔxɔ gã aɖe atikewɔwɔ si wowɔna na ame ɖekaɖekawo, si wotu ɖe nusi gbɔ wòtso dzi; menaa xexeame katã ƒe atike na dɔléle aɖeke, si me nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili hã le o.  Ðe wòle be woatsɔ betel aŋgba me tsi kple cloves akpɔ nu me ʋeʋẽ lilili gbɔa?  Ao, menye nenema kura o. Togbɔ be wobu betel aŋgbawo kple cloves be woxɔ asi ɣeyiɣi didi aɖee nye sia le woƒe dɔlékuiwutike, antioxidant, kple ʋeʋẽ lilili ƒe ŋutete ta hã la, viɖe siawo nɔa anyi ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ko eye womekpɔa wo gbɔ ɣeyiɣi didi o.  Betel aŋgbawo, si wogayɔna be paan, me nugbagbevi siwo wɔa dɔ abe chavicol, eugenol, kple hydroxychavicol ene le siwo ɖea dɔlékuiwutike, dɔlékuiwutike, dɔlékuiwutikewo fiana ɖe dɔlékui aɖewo siwo wonona abe Streptococcus mutans kple Porphyromonas gingivalis ene ŋu. Le mɔ ma tɔgbe nu la, zi geɖe la, wolɔ̃a cloves elabena eugenol le wo me. Wonya zi geɖe be phenolic ƒe akpaa ɖea atike siwo hea ʋeʋẽ vɛ la ɖa eye wòxea mɔ na dɔlékuiwo ƒe tsitsi.  Ele vevie be míase egɔme be ƒã hafi nu me ƒe ʋeʋẽ lilili nyea kuxi si le gota alo gotagome, togbɔ be nu eveawo ɖea viɖe sue aɖewo fiana hã. Ke boŋ zi geɖe la, etsoa nɔnɔme siwo gbɔ wòtso gbɔ, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye aɖudɔ si de ŋgɔ, aɖe ƒe ƒoƒo, nu ƒe ƒuƒu, alo ɖoɖowɔɖi ƒe dɔlélewo abe suklidɔ alo aklã ƒe dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie ene. Ŋuɖoɖo ɖe betel aŋgba ƒe tsi si me cloves le ŋu hena gbegblẽ

claim: Le March 2026 me la, Franseawo ƒe Aʋafia Michel Yakovleff, si nɔ kplɔlawo ƒe ɖoƒewo le NATO gblɔ be ne France nakpe ɖe U.S. ŋu be wòakpɔ Hormuz-ƒuta ta la, asɔ kple “Titanic-ʋua ƒe tikiti siwo ƒe asi bɔbɔ ƒle.”
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Kwasiɖa eve le U.S. ƒe aʋawɔwɔ kple Iran ƒe gɔmedzedze megbe la, nya aɖe te kaka be Franseawo ƒe Aʋafia Michel Yakovleff, si subɔ le kplɔlanyenye ƒe ɖoƒe kɔkɔwo le NATO gblɔ be ne France kpe ɖe U.S. ŋu be wòakpɔ Hormuz-ƒuta ta tso Iran ƒe amedzidzedzewo me la, anɔ abe “tiketi siwo mexɔ asi o ƒle yi Titanic,” si nye tɔdziʋu dzeani si tsɔa amewo yia tsikpe gã aɖe dzi eye wònyrɔ ene le eƒe mɔzɔzɔ gbãtɔ tso England yi New York City le ƒe 1912. Nya geɖe siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi gblɔ nya sia, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Facebook. Nya ɖeka si woŋlɔ ɖe X dzi la nye video si xɔ miniti etɔ̃ si me Yakovleff gblɔ nya si wogblɔ le gbebiame aɖe me le Franseawo ƒe television dɔwɔƒe aɖe (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe): Nyatakakaa ƒe akpa aɖe xlẽ be: Franseawo ƒe Aʋafia Michel Yakovleff si xɔ dzudzɔ le dɔme le nusita mele be France nawɔ ɖeka kple Trump ƒe Hormuz habɔbɔa o ŋu: Menye ɣeyiɣia de be woaƒle Titanic ƒe dodoɖeŋgɔ tikiti o. Le Titanic me la, edze abe ʋua me tɔ la di be yeadzra tikiti siwo ƒe asi bɔbɔ na fiẽnuɖuɖua ƒe ɣeɖuɖua le tsikpe gã la ƒoƒo vɔ megbe ene. Le videoa me la, woate ŋu ase Yakovleff wògblɔ be, "Susu atɔ̃ tae míagblɔ be ao, le nyateƒe me." Mlɔetɔ si wòyɔe nye be dɔwɔwɔ sia do kpo nu: YAKOVLEFF: Edze abe le Titanic me la, ʋumefia la dze agbagba be yeadzra tikiti siwo dzi woɖe asi le na fiẽnuɖuɖua ƒe ɣeɖuɖua esi wòƒo tsikpe gã la vɔ megbe. AMEDZROXƆLA: Afi siae míelea? Ðe dɔwɔwɔ sia nye Titanic? YAKOVLEFF: Ɛ̃, anya wɔ. Eyata kakaɖedzitɔe la, menye fifiae nye ɣeyiɣi si nàƒle tikiti si wodzrana na Titanic o. Abe alesi míegblɔe le ete ene la, videoa nye nyateƒe eye wogblɔe wòsɔ be Yakovleff, si nye amedzro si vaa Franseawo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe wɔnawo me enuenu si wonya ɖe nya siwo wogblɔna tẽe kple gbegbɔgblɔ siwo le amadede vovovowo me ta. Klip la tso wɔna si nye "Face à Darius Rochebin" le Franseawo ƒe kable nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe si nye LCI me. Yakovleff nye amedzro le wɔnaa me le March 16, 2026. Wokpee be wòava dzro U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ƒe biabia be France, kple dukɔ bubuwo, naɖo meliwo ɖa be woakpe asi ɖe Hormuz-ƒuta, si nye melimɔ vevi aɖe si dzi amitsɔʋu siwo tso Persia-ƒuta tona la ƒe dedienɔnɔ ŋu, le nyati bubuwo dome. Iran kpɔ ŋusẽ ɖe ƒudzimɔzɔzɔa dzi tso esime U.S. kple Israel dze Titina Ɣedzeƒe dukɔa dzi dzedze gɔme, si na ami ʋeʋĩ ƒe asi yi dzi ŋutɔ. Nudzɔdzɔ sia ƒe tɔtrɔ de dzi ƒo na ɖeklemiɖelawo le aʋawɔwɔa ŋu eye wòna dunyahehe ƒe nyaƒoɖeamenu ɖe ​​Trump dzi be wòadzudzɔ asrafowo ƒe dɔwɔwɔa nu. Esi wobia Yakovleff nusita wòsusu be ele be France nagbe meliwo ɖoɖo ɖa be woaʋli Hormuz-ƒuta ta la, ete gbe ɖe nusi dze abe ɖe wòtsi tre ɖe wo nɔewo ŋu ene dzi gbã le Trump ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖewo me be: “Gbã la, eya [Trump] gblɔ be, ‘Míawoe nye ŋusẽtɔ kekeake le xexeame, míehiã ame aɖeke o, gake le nyateƒe me la, míeyɔa ame bubuwo [be woakpe ɖe yewo ŋu].’ Nukae nye ema?" (Eƒe ŋuɖoɖoa dze egɔme tso dzesi si nye 28:32 le video sia me.) Emegbe, Yakovleff yɔ susu atɔ̃ siwo tae France gbe ƒudzisrafowo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu. Yakovleff gblɔ be gbãtɔe nye be edze abe Trump mese egɔme be ne NATO ƒo eɖokui ɖe asrafodɔ aɖe me la, ele be NATO naxɔ dziɖuɖua o ene. Mele be woawɔ dɔ geɖe, abe ɖeka si me U.S. da bɔmb ɖe Iran le kple bubu si me NATO akpɔ tɔʋua ta le ene o. Susu evelia si Yakovleff yɔ enye be hafi NATO ƒe hadɔwɔlawo nawɔ ɖeka kple asrafodɔa la, ele be U.S. nagblɔ taɖodzinu si me kɔ, le agbalẽ me, si dukɔa mewɔ o. Yakovleff gblɔ be: "Mele be wòanye tweet o," esi wònɔ nu ƒom tso Trump ƒe Nyateƒe Hadomegbenɔnɔ ŋuti nyatakakawo ŋu. "Mate ŋu anye nusiwo trɔna le miniti eve ɖesiaɖe me o." Yakovleff gblɔ kpee be ne U.S. di be NATO ƒe hadɔwɔlawo nado alɔ ye la, ke ele be U.S. asrafowo ƒe tatɔ nabia kpekpeɖeŋu ɣleti eve enye sia hafi, hafi woadze Iran dzi zi gbãtɔ. Susu etɔ̃lia si Franseawo ƒe aʋafia la yɔe nye eƒe dzixɔse be le nyateƒe me la, U.S. mehiã ƒudzisrafowo ƒe kpekpeɖeŋu be wòakpɔ Hormuz-ƒuta ta o. Yakovleff gblɔ be, ke boŋ Trump le didim be yeakaka agbanɔamedzi si le dunyahehe me nusiwo do tso yeƒe nyametsotso be yeadze Iran dzi me. Yakovleff gblɔ be susu eneliae nye kakaɖeamedzi ƒe kuxia. "Esia nye ŋutsu aɖe si gblẽ Afghanistantɔwo ɖe ʋuʋudedi me, eyata agblẽ mí ɖe ʋuʋudedi me le ɣeyiɣi si me wòasɔ." (Trump dze U.S. asrafowo ɖeɖe le Afghanistan gɔme le eƒe zimenɔɣi gbãtɔ me, le February 2020 me.) Yakovleff tsɔ Titanic ƒe nɔnɔmetata la wɔ eƒe susu atɔ̃lia ƒe kpɔɖeŋu, eye wòyɔ asrafowo ƒe gɔmeɖose aɖe si wògblɔ be yesrɔ̃ le U.S. asrafowo gbɔ: Mègado ŋusẽ kpododonu gbeɖe o. Zi geɖe la, wokpea Yakovleff be wòaƒo nu le Franseawo ƒe nyadzɔdzɔwo kple nuƒoƒo ƒe wɔnawo me. Le eƒe dzedzeme le nuƒoƒo ƒe wɔna si nye "Quotidien" me le March 12, 2026 dzi la, egblɔ be amedzidzedze ɖe Iran ŋu — si Trump dziɖuɖua yɔ be "Operation Epic Bulls***," ezã Fransegbe me nyagbɔgblɔ si wozãna na bometsitsi si sɔ kple "dziku."
