claim: "Uganda ƒe ŋkɔwo le eme, tsaɖila siwo ade miliɔn 1.2 ye gena ɖe eme."
evidence: Bobi Wine ƒe nya sɔ le Uganda ƒe ƒe sia ƒe vidzidzi xexlẽme ŋu, togbɔ be edzi dukɔa ƒe gazazã ɖe fenyinyi ŋu ƒe akpa si wozãna ɖe fenyinyi ŋu ɖe edzi ŋutɔ hã. Nathan Nandala Mafabi ƒe nya siwo wògblɔ tso gɔmedzesuku wuwu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ kple sɔhɛwo ƒe dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe akɔntabubuwo ŋu la meɖo kpe kpeɖodziawo dzi o.. To vovo na esia la, Gregory Mugisha Muntu ƒe nyawo de pɛpɛpɛ wu esi wògblɔ be Ugandatɔ 70% ɖoa ŋu ɖe agbledede ŋu, gake ebu tsaɖilawo ƒe vava nu tsɛe be yeatsɔ agbɔ vovototo si le aƒelika Kenya kple Tanzania dome ŋu. Frank Bulira Kabinga gblɔ nya geɖe siwo mesɔ o tso United Arab Emirates ŋu, eye Filipino dɔwɔla siwo ʋu yi dukɔ bubuwo me ƒe fetu hã le eme. Joseph Elton Mabirizi mebu Uganda ƒe kpovitɔwo kple asrafoha siwo woƒo ƒu ƒe lolome nu tsɛe. Le November 30, 2025 dzi la, ame enyi siwo di be yewoaxɔ dukplɔla le Uganda ƒe ƒe 2026 ƒe dutoƒotiatia me la dometɔ atɔ̃ kpɔ gome le nyaʋiʋli aɖe si woɖe fia le television dzi me , eye wogblɔ woƒe ŋutega na Ɣedzeƒe Afrika dukɔa. Ame etɔ̃ siwo di be yewoaxɔ ɖoƒea , siwo dome dukplɔla si le dɔ wɔm fifia Yoweri Museveni , si le ƒe 81 xɔxɔ me le zi bubu dim si ana yeƒe dziɖuɖua nakeke ɖe enu wòaɖo ƒe ewo enelia me la, mede o. Amesiwo nɔ fefewɔƒeae nye Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu , si ame geɖe yɔna be Bobi Wine , si le Dukɔa ƒe Ðekawɔwɔ ƒe Habɔbɔ me , Nathan Nandala Mafabi si le Demokrasitɔwo ƒe Tɔtrɔ ƒe Habɔbɔ me , asrafo tsãtɔ si trɔ zu dunyahela Gregory Mugisha Muntu si tso Alliance for National Transformation , nyanyuigblɔla Joseph Elton Mabirizi si tso Conservative Party me kple Frank Bulira Kabinga si tso Tɔtrɔ Kpata ƒe Habɔbɔ me Amewo ƒe Akpa . Woƒo nu tso ganyawo, dɔwɔɖui, agbledede, sukudede kple ɖoɖowo ŋuti nya bubuwo ŋu. Míelé ŋku ɖe woƒe nya aɖewo ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu. Robert Kyagulanyi Ssentamu (Bobi Wine) Kyagulanyi, si xɔ evelia le ƒe 2021 ƒe tiatiawɔɣia kple ame 35% ƒe akɔdada, ka atam be yeawɔ "Uganda yeye" eye be "yeadze egɔme yeyee" nenye be yeɖu dzi le 15 January 2026 ƒe tiatiawɔƒea. Míebia tso Kyagulanyi si be wòana eme nakɔ nenye be Uganda ƒe ƒe sia ƒe vidzidzi ƒe xexlẽme ŋue wòle nu ƒom tsoe alo vidzidzi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ bliboa, si nye vi siwo nyɔnu dzina le eƒe agbenɔɣi le mama dedie nu. (De dzesii: Míawɔ nyatakaka sia yeyee ne eɖo eŋu.) Uganda ƒe vidzidzi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme katã nye vi 4.5 nyɔnu ɖeka si mesɔ kple eƒe xexlẽme si nye 1.5 o. Gake nyagbɔgblɔ "ƒe sia ƒe" zazã ɖee fia be ƒe sia ƒe ƒe vidzidziwo ŋue wònɔ nu ƒom tsoe. Emegbe míeto nyatakakaawo me. Uganda Bureau of Statistics ’ ƒe ƒe 2024 ƒe amexexlẽ, si nye nyitsɔ laa, ka nya ta be woŋlɔ vi miliɔn 1.5 ɖi le ɣleti 12 siwo va ɖo amexexlẽ ƒe zã me. Nyatakaka siwo tso Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe ɖeviwo ƒe dɔwɔƒe si nye Unicef ​​, gbɔ tso ƒe 2017 me hã bu akɔnta nenema ke be wodzia vi miliɔn 1.4 ƒe sia ƒe. Togbɔ be Kyagulanyi ɖe nya "miliɔn" ɖa hã la, eƒe nya la sɔ kple dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakaka siwo ɖee fia be wodzia ɖevi siwo ade miliɔn 1.5 le Uganda ƒe sia ƒe. Kyagulanyi gblɔ be wozã Uganda ƒe gazazã ƒe "afã kloe" tsɔ xe fewo. Fenyinyi fia fe siwo woxena ɖe dukɔ aɖe ƒe fenyinyi ƒe agbanɔamedziwo ta, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye fetu vevitɔ, deme kple tohehe ɖesiaɖe. Le Uganda ƒe ƒe sia ƒe fenyinyi ŋuti nyatakaka yeyetɔ nu la, dziɖuɖua xe Amerika dɔlar biliɔn 1.179 le gota fenyinyi ta le ƒe 2024/25 me. Esia sɔ kple USh4.25 triliɔn le mama dedie nu si nye USh3,605.80 le Amerika dɔlar ɖeka me. Le ɣeyiɣi ma ke me la, dukɔa me fenyinyi xɔ USh17.36 triliɔn . Le wo katã me la, Uganda zã USh21.6 triliɔn ɖe fenyinyi ŋu le gazazã si nye USh72.136 biliɔn me. Esia anɔ abe 30% ene, menye "afã kloe" o. Le ƒe 2025/26 ƒe ga ƒea me la, gazazã si dzi woda asi ɖoe nye USh72.3 triliɔn , eye woɖo USh27.2 triliɔn ɖi na fenyinyi. Esia nye gazazã ƒe 36.7%. Kyagulanyi ƒe akɔntabubua to afã ƒe dzesi ŋu wu alafa memama 13 eye wòwu USh9 triliɔn le nyateƒe me. Míebua nya si wogblɔ be mesɔ o. Nathan Nandala Mafabi Mafabi, si nye tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe dunyahela, tsɔ eƒe nyaʋiʋlinyawo ƒe akpa aɖe ku ɖe sukudede kple dɔwɔwɔ ŋu. Mafabi gblɔ be ɖevi 10 ɖesiaɖe si dzea gɔmedzesuku gɔme le P1 me dometɔ eve koe ɖoa P7, si nye klass mamlɛtɔ le Uganda ƒe ƒe adre ƒe gɔmedzesuku . Eʋli nya be esia fia be 80% adzudzɔ sukudede. Be míada esia kpɔ la, míetrɔ ɖe nyatakaka siwo tso Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Sukudede, Dzɔdzɔmeŋutinunya Kple Dekɔnuwo Ŋuti Habɔbɔ (Unesco) gbɔ, si léa ŋku ɖe xexeame katã ƒe sukudede ŋu to dɔdzikpɔlawo ƒe nyatakakawo abe amexexlẽ kple aƒewo me numekukuwo ene zazã me. Nuwuwu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nye ƒuƒoƒo si xɔ ƒe 3 va ɖo ƒe 5 ƒe akpa si wu ƒe si dziɖuɖua kpɔ mɔ be woaxɔ hafi awu suku nu. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, ne wokpɔ mɔ be ɖevi aɖe naɖo gɔmedzesuku ƒe klass mamlɛtɔ hafi wòaxɔ ƒe 11 la, gɔmedzesukudede ƒe xexlẽme nye ƒe 14 va ɖo ƒe 16 vi siwo ɖo klass mamlɛtɔ ma ƒe alafa memamã. Unesco ƒe nyatakaka yeyetɔ kekeake si ku ɖe Uganda ŋu ɖee fia be gbãtɔ ƒe nuwuwu ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme nye 35.4% . Mafabi ƒe e

claim: George Stephanopoulos, si nye ABC ƒe "Kwasiɖa sia" ƒe wɔnawo dzikpɔla, tso gbebiame aɖe si wòwɔ kple U.S. Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance esi Vance trɔ nyabiase aɖe si ku ɖe liƒodzi czar Tom Homan ŋu la ɖa vɔ megbe.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu Mekɔ le ɣeyiɣi si me míele nya sia ŋlɔm la me kɔ nusita Stephanopoulos tiae be yeawu Vance ƒe gbebiame nu esime wòwu enu o. Amedzroxɔla la wu eƒe gbebiame si kplɔe ɖo, kple Democratic Illinois Dziɖuɖumegã J. B. Pritzker, nu le mɔ ma ke nu. Le Oct. 12, 2025 dzi la, U.S. Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance ƒe dzedze le ABC ƒe "Kwasiɖa sia" me wu enu kpata le numedzodzro aɖe si wowɔ tso White House ƒe liƒodzi czar Tom Homan ŋu, amesi wogblɔ be exɔ zãnu si nye dɔlar 50,000 be yeakpe ɖe adzamedɔwɔlawo ŋu "woaɖu dziɖuɖu ƒe nubablawo dzi le Trump ƒe dziɖuɖu evelia me," le nyatakaka aɖe si MSNBC ta le September me nu. Le numedzodzro ma me la, Vance trɔ mɔ na amedzroxɔla George Stephanopoulos ƒe nyabiase siwo ku ɖe nusi wònya tso Homan kple zãnunana si ŋu woka nya ta le ŋu be wòaƒo nu tso U.S. dziɖuɖua ƒe nutsotso si yi edzi, si Vance bu fɔ Democrattɔwo ŋu. Le nudzɔdzɔa ƒe nuŋlɔɖi nu la, Stephanopoulos wu gbebiamea nu esi Vance tso amedzroxɔla la nu be "eɖiɖi le miameʋuʋu ƒe avugbɔ̃e ƒe do wɔnuku aɖe me." Stephanopoulos da akpe na dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ eye wòtso ɖe asitsatsa ƒe ɖiɖiɖeme ŋu esi Vance yi nuƒoƒo dzi. Le wɔnaa megbe la, hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo gbugbɔ gbebiamea ƒe nuwuwu ƒe videowo da ɖe afima. Togbɔ be ame aɖewo kafu (nudzraɖoƒe) Stephanopoulos ƒe nyametsotso si wòdze abe ɖe wòtso ɖe boblododowo ŋu ene hã la, ame bubuwo ɖe ɖeklemie. X account Right Angle News Network, si ɖe sɔ dzĩ aɖe, si nye Republican Party ƒe dunyahehe ƒe dzesi, fia le eƒe profile banner me, ŋlɔ (nudzraɖoƒe), "BREAKING - Nukpɔlawo le kuku ɖem tso George Stephanopoulos kple ABC gbɔ le esi wotso Dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ J. D. Vance eye woyi asitsatsa me le esi Vance klo nu le eŋu le esi wòda alakpa tso Tom Homan ŋu, hegblɔ be, 'Here's, George, nusita ame ʋɛ aɖewo le ʋɛm ɖe edzi ta." kpɔ wò ɖoɖowɔɖia.'" Nya siwo wogblɔ be Stephanopoulos "tso" Vance kple nukpɔsusuwo le nyametsotso be woawu akpaa nu hã kaka ɖe Facebook, Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Reddit. "Kwasiɖa sia" ƒe akpa bliboa le Oct. 12 dzi yi YouTube ɖe Stephanopoulos fia esime wòwu gbebiame si wòwɔ kple Vance nu esime dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ nɔ nu ƒom be yeayi asitsatsa ƒe ɖiɖiɖemeɣi, nyateƒenya si dze le ABC ƒe nuŋlɔɖiwo hã me. Ne míebu nya siwo le etame ŋu la, míebu nya si wogblɔ be Stephanopoulos lã Vance le esi dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ trɔ nyabiase aɖe si ku ɖe liƒodzi czar Tom Homan ŋu la be enye nyateƒe. Le wɔnaa ƒe nuŋɔŋlɔ si sɔ kple wɔnaa ƒe video nu la, Vance kple Stephanopoulos dome kadodoa yi ale: VANCE: Mina míaƒo nu tso nya ŋutɔŋutɔwo ŋu, George. Mesusu be Amerikatɔwo akpɔ viɖe geɖe tso ema me wu ne èɖiɖi miameʋuʋu ƒe avugbɔ̃e ƒe do wɔnuku aɖe si me nyateƒenyawo ɖee fia kɔte be Tom Homan mekpɔ gome le nuvlowɔha ƒe nu gbegblẽ aɖeke me o. STEPHANOPOULOS: Menye miameʋuʋu ƒe avugbɔ̃e ƒe do wɔnuku aɖee wònye o. Nyemegblɔ nya aɖeke le susu me o. Mebia wò be ɖe Tom Homan xɔ dɔlar 50,000 abe alesi wose le odio kasɛt aɖe si FBI lé ɖe mɔ̃ dzi le September 2024 me ene hã, eye mèɖo nyabiasea ŋu o. Akpe na mi ɖe miaƒe ɣeyiɣi ta ŋdi sia. VANCE: Ao, George, megblɔ be nyeme -- (CROSSTALK) STEPHANOPOULOS: -- ye le dzi kplɔe ɖo o. Míatrɔ ava enumake. Snopes do asi ɖa na ABC be yeabia nusita Stephanopoulos ɖoe be yeawu Vance ƒe gbebiame nu esime wòwɔe hã. Míebia dukplɔla ƒe kpeɖeŋutɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒea hã be woxɔ numeɖeɖe aɖe le gbebiamea ƒe nuwuwu kpata ŋu hã. Míele míaƒe biabiawo ƒe ŋuɖoɖowo lalam. Menye Vance koe nye amedzro le Oct. 12 "Kwasiɖa sia" ƒe akpa si ƒe gbebiame do ŋgɔ na asitsatsa ƒe ɖiɖiɖeme tẽ o. Stephanopoulos bia gbe Illinois Dziɖuɖumegã J. B. Pritzker, si nye Democrattɔ hã tso nyati siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe agbagbadzedze be yeaɖo Dukɔa ƒe Dzɔlawo ƒe asrafowo ɖe Chicago ŋu. Dukɔa ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃la aɖe ɖe mɔ hena ɣeyiɣi aɖe ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔa nu le Oct. 10 dzi si na Trump dziɖuɖua ƒe ɖoɖo si wowɔ be woaɖo ɖe Illinois dugã la me la tɔ te. Pritzker ƒe gbebiamea wu enu hã esi Stephanopoulos da akpe na nutodziɖula la ɖe eƒe ɣeyiɣi kple boblododowo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ta.

claim: UK Dɔwɔla siwo mate ŋu awɔ dɔ le tier 3 nutowo me o la axɔ Job Support Scheme kple Universal Credit ƒe ƒuƒoƒo, si afia be woaxɔ woƒe fetu ƒe 80%.
evidence: Be woate ŋu abia nya la, ele be dɔwɔla la nawɔ dɔ le woƒe gaƒoƒo siwo wozãna ɖaa ƒe 33% ya teti hafi woabu dɔa be ‘eate ŋu awɔ dɔ’ eye le esia ta wòadze le ɖoɖo sia te. Emegbe Dziɖuɖua axe gaƒoƒo siwo womewɔ dɔ le o ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia (vaseɖe ga si woɖo ɖi), eye dɔtɔa hã adzɔ akpa etɔ̃lia. Etɔ̃lia si susɔ si womexea fe na o la nye dɔwɔla la ƒe nudzɔdzɔ le ɖoɖoa me ŋutɔŋutɔ. Esia fia be dɔwɔla aɖe xɔa woƒe fetu si sɔ ƒe 77% le afisiwo womeɖo seɖoƒe na Dziɖuɖua ƒe nudzɔdzɔ o. Taflatse mide dzesii be nyatakaka aɖewo gali si HMRC aɖe ɖe go tso nusiwo nye ‘fetu si wozãna ɖaa’ ŋu, vevietɔ na amesiwo ƒe fetu trɔ tso March me va zu fetu ƒe ɖoɖo yeye kple woƒe dɔtɔwo, kple alesi Dɔwɔwɔ ƒe Kpekpeɖeŋunaɖoɖoa awɔ dɔe ŋuti nyatakaka nyui aɖewo.

claim: Dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã si le dɔ wɔm le U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe va ɖo March 2026 me la ŋkɔe nye Iwona B. Horyn.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le February 2026 ƒe nuwuwu lɔƒo la, Snopes nuxlẽlawo do asi ɖa hedi nyatakakadzraɖoƒea hena nyatakaka tso ame aɖe si wogblɔ be ŋkɔe nye Iwona B. Horyn, amesi ame aɖewo gblɔ be eyae nye U.S. Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã si le dɔ wɔm la ŋu. Nya sia, si kaka ɖe internet dzi tso November 2025 ƒe nuwuwu la, gafɔ ɖe te le esi woɖe Horyn si wogblɔ be enye nukokoedonamelawo ƒe wɔna si nye "Jimmy Kimmel Live" ƒe akpa aɖe me le zãtiƒe ƒe nukokoedonamelawo ƒe wɔna si nye "Jimmy Kimmel Live" me vɔ megbe. Kimmel zã nyagbɔgblɔ si dze abe ɖe wòle Horyn ƒe ŋkɔ me ene ("I wanna be whorin'") abe ŋgɔdonya ene na akpa aɖe si me ame "nublanuitɔ" bubu siwo ƒe ŋkɔwo to vovo le. Woate ŋu akpɔ akpaa le YouTube eye akpa si sɔ la adze egɔme tso ga 14:00 ƒe dzesia lɔƒo. Esia wɔe be ezãlawo yi hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo abe Instagram (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) be yewoakaka amesi wogblɔ be enye DHS dɔwɔla la ƒe ŋkɔ kple foto si wogblɔ be eɖe. Nya si wogblɔ be ame aɖe si ŋkɔe nye Iwona B. Horyn ye nye DHS ƒe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã si le dɔ wɔm la nye nyateƒe. Nya sia kaka gbã le October 2025 ƒe anarticle si nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si nyeAntiPolygraph.org ta megbe, si gblɔ be yenye "nyatakakadzraɖoƒe si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o, si me amewo tsɔa ɖe le, si woɖo be yeaɖe gbeɖuɖɔ, ametafatafa, kple ŋlɔmiwɔwɔ si do ƒome kple polygraphs kple alakpanyakpɔmɔ̃ bubu siwo wogblɔ be wozã la ɖe go ahawu enu." Nyatia yɔ February 2025Bloomberg ƒe nyatakaka aɖe be Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔla Kristi Noem "ɖe ememe mɔfiame aɖe ɖe go be ele be nyabiase aɖe si ku ɖe kadodo siwo ŋu womeɖe mɔ ɖo o kple nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo kple habɔbɔ siwo mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o ŋu nanɔ polygraph siwo katã dzi Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒea kpɔna ŋu," le agbagbadzedze si wogblɔ be woaxe mɔ ɖe DHS "si do go le liƒo kple ememe amedzrowo ƒe sedziwɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔnawo siaa me" nu. AntiPolygraph ka nya ta be "woana dɔ si ŋu womate ŋu aʋã ŋu le o si nye DHS ƒe Dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã si le dɔ wɔm na Iwona B. Horyn be wòaɖo polygraph ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe anyi le dɔwɔƒea katã." Woŋlɔ Horyn ŋkɔ ɖe theofficial DHS website dzi le "Kplɔlanyenye" ​​te. Enɔ anyi hã le nuŋlɔɖi si womewɔ le se nu o me na Dukɔa, Nutoa me, Towo, Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒewo ƒe Ðoɖowo Ŋuti Aɖaŋuɖoha ƒe kpekpe si dzɔ le Sept. 20, 2023 dzi, si do ŋgɔ na eƒe ɖoɖo abe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒenɔla ene gake eɖo kpe edzi be woxɔe ɖe dɔ me le dɔwɔƒea. Le nuŋlɔɖia nu la, Horyn gblɔ le kpekpea me be: "Nye ŋkɔe nye Iwona Horyn. Mele Department of Homeland Security, Office of Chief Security Officer. Mele tsitre ɖe Aƒetɔ McComb teƒe egbea le eƒe anyimanɔmanɔ ta, eye ɖeko medi be mayi nu eve aɖewo dzi esi míele FY23 wum eye míedze ʋuʋu gɔme ɖo ta FY24." Edze abe "Aƒetɔ McComb" ƒo nu tso Richard D. McComb, amesi woɖo dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã le April 3, 2016 dzi ene, le DHS ƒe nya nu. AMarch 2025 ƒe nyatakaka si le McComb'sLinkedIn axa dzi ɖo kpe eƒe "dzudzɔxɔxɔledɔme le dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔwɔ me" eye le eƒe dɔbiagbalẽvi dzi la, woŋlɔ eƒe ɣeyiɣi abe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã ene be April 2016 vaseɖe March 2025. Horyn'sLinkedIn axa gblɔ be eƒe dɔwɔwɔ abe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒenɔla ene dze egɔme le August 2025. Horyn wɔ nya aɖe si ƒo nu tso eƒe akpa si wòwɔ abe dedienɔnɔdzikpɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒenɔla ene ŋu le Sept. 16, 2025, si wotsɔ ɖo ŋku tudada si woda le Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si le 2013 me ƒe ƒezã dzi. Horyn ŋlɔ bena: Ƒe aɖewoe nye esi va yi la, meyɔ Ƒudzisrafowo ƒe Dɔwɔƒea be aƒe. Le ŋkeke wɔnublanui ma dzi la, edzɔ dzi nam be menɔ dɔ wɔm le mɔa dzi tututu eye dzɔgbenyuie ganɔ ŋunye wu be mete ŋu gblɔ na nye ƒomea be mele dedie. Fifia, abe DHS ƒe Dedienɔnɔ ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã ƒe ɖoƒenɔla ene la, mewɔa dɔ kple amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe si me dzo le be míawɔ nusianu si míate ŋui be wòagadzɔ ake to: ŋusẽdodo dedienɔnɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ, mɔɖeɖe ɖe mɔɖeɖe ɖe nu ŋu, ɖaseɖigbalẽwo nana, dɔwɔlawo ƒe dodokpɔ, kple ŋɔdzidonamewo me dzodzro le DHS dɔwɔƒewo katã me. Snopes do asi ɖe DHS kple Horyn gbɔ be woagblɔ nya bubuwo eye míawɔ nyati sia yeyee ne míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo.

claim: Dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe xexlẽme nye 19% le Edo State le Nigeria.
evidence: Dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ le Edo State ɖiɖi tso 25.1 le alafa me le ƒe 2018 ƒe ɣleti etɔ̃lia me va ɖo 19 le alafa me le ƒe 2020 ƒe ɣleti enelia me, nyatakaka yeye siwo woɖe ɖe go tso Nigeria Bureau of Statistics (NBS) gbɔ ɖee fia. Wogblɔ be 6.1 le alafa me ƒe ɖiɖi tso dɔwɔɖui wɔwɔ ƒe didi si dziɖuɖu si Dukplɔla Godwin Obaseki kplɔ, si ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔƒe, Edo Dukɔa ƒe Aɖaŋudɔwo ƒe Ŋgɔyiyi Dɔwɔƒe, (EdoJobs) gblɔ be ewɔ dɔ siwo wu 170,000 to ɖoɖo yeyewo me le ƒe etɔ̃ kple afã siwo va yi me gbɔ. NBS ƒe nyatakakaa gblɔ be Edo Dukɔa mee dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe xexlẽme bɔbɔ wu le South South nutoa me, si nyo wu dukɔ atɔ̃ bubu siwo me ami bɔ ɖo le nutoa me. Nyatakakaa gblɔ be: “Dɔmakpɔwɔe ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ le nuto siwo le Anyiehe-anyiehe domee nye esi: Akwa-Ibom 45.2%, Bayelsa 27.8%, Cross River 31.6%, Delta 40.3%, Rivers State 43.7 kple Edo 19%.”

claim: Aƒenɔ gbãtɔ Melania Trump dzilawo va United States to ƒome ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋunana, si wogayɔna vlodoametɔe be “kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe ʋuʋu” dzi.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Tso esime U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump ɖu dzi zi gbãtɔ la, ame geɖe ƒo nu tso aƒenɔ gbãtɔ Melania Trump dzilawo ƒe ʋuʋu yi dukɔ bubuwo me ƒe nɔnɔmewo kple alesi wova United States ŋu. Nya geɖe siwo woŋlɔ ɖe Internet dzi gblɔ be yewova to mɔnu aɖe si Trump ŋutɔ ɖu fewu le eye wòdze agbagba be yeaxe mɔ ɖe enu la dzi. YouTubevideo aɖe si woɖe le July 2025 me gblɔ nya siawo: Donald Trump tu habɔbɔ aɖe ɖe amedzrowo ƒe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ ŋu — atɔ, ameɖeɖe le dukɔa me, kple amedzidzedze. Gake le nukpɔkpɔa megbe la, ezã "kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe ʋuʋu" ma ke si wòwɔ gbɔgbɔ vɔ̃wo tsɔ tsɔ eƒe lɔ̃xoyɔvi bliboa va dukɔa me esime woɖe ɖevi ɣiwo le wo dzilawo si eye wotsɔ wo de atɔ me. Le eƒe dziɖuɖu gbãtɔ me la, Trump dze agbagba vavã be yeaxe mɔ ɖe nusi woyɔna be "kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe ʋuʋu" ƒe nuwɔna nu, eye wòyɔe be enye ŋɔdzi na dukɔa ƒe dedienɔnɔ. Eye le Melania Trump dzilawo ƒe amedzrowo ƒe agbalẽwo kple kpeɖodzi si tso woƒe senyala gbɔ nu la, enye nyateƒe be edzilawo ge ɖe U.S. to ɖoɖo ma ke si Trump dze agbagba be yeawu enu la me. Abe alesi míegblɔe va yi ene la,togbɔ be mɔfiame sesẽ siwo te ƒometɔwo dze na ɖoɖoa, kpakple ƒe sia ƒe ƒe seɖoƒewo na amedzro siwo woɖe mɔ na be woage ɖe dukɔa me le mɔ sia nu hã la, Trump ɖe ɖeklemi ƒomewo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ ƒe mɔɖegbalẽvi mawo enuenu, heyɔ wo be "kɔsɔkɔsɔ ʋuʋu." Visa siawo ɖea mɔ na U.S. dukɔmeviwo be woado alɔ wo dzilawo le ganyawo gome, akplɔ wo ava United States, eye mlɔeba woabia be yewoƒe ƒomea me tɔwo nanɔ anyi tegbee. Míeka nya ta va yi le February 2018 me be aƒenɔ gbãtɔ dzilawo ƒe ʋuʋu yi dukɔ bubu me ƒe nɔnɔme menye nya si ŋu dutoƒo nuŋlɔɖi le o, eye to esia me la, womenya alesi wova dukɔa me o. Gake dukɔa ƒe amedzrowo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖee fia le ƒe 2024 me be dadaa Amalija Knavs va dukɔa me nyateƒe to vianyɔnu ƒe gakpekpeɖeŋu dzi. Newsweek gblɔ be le ƒe 2024 me la, blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe susuŋutinunyalawo ƒe habɔbɔ si nye The Heritage Foundation xɔ Knavs ƒe amedzrowo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo to Nyatakakawo Xɔxɔ ƒe Ablɔɖe Se (FOIA) ƒe biabiawo dzi esime wònɔ nya hem ɖe U.S. Dukplɔla tsãtɔ Joe Biden ƒe dziɖuɖua ŋu be woakpɔ Britain Fiavi Harry ƒe visa ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo. Washington Post hã bia nuŋlɔɖiawo tso Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe (DHS) gbɔ le Knavs ƒe ku megbe le January 2024. Míeɖo asi The Heritage Foundation gbɔ be míakpɔ nuŋlɔɖiawo eye míawɔ ŋutinyaa yeyee ne míexɔ nyatakaka bubuwo. TheWashington Post ɖo kpe edzi be ɖevi tsitsi aɖee do alɔ Knavs hena green card, eye woŋlɔ eƒe gakpekpeɖeŋula be "Melania Trump." Michael Wildes, si nye aƒenɔ gbãtɔ dzilawo evea siaa, Viktor kple Amalija Knavs, ƒe amedzrowo ƒe senyala hã ɖo kpe woƒe ʋuʋu ƒe mɔnu dzi na The New York Times le ƒe 2018. Egblɔ be Melania Trump do alɔ ye dzilawo hena woƒe green cards. Esi wobia Wildes be ɖe Knavse ƒomea kpɔ dukɔmevinyenye to "kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe ʋuʋu" me hã la, egblɔ be, "Mesusu be." Togbɔ be Trump yɔ ɖoɖo sia tɔgbe le vlododo me be "kɔsɔkɔsɔ ƒe ʋuʋu" hã la, Wildes gblɔ be nya sia nye mɔnu "si ƒo ɖi wu" si dzi woato ade dzesi gakpekpeɖeŋu ma tɔgbe si nye "míaƒe ʋuʋu yi teƒe bubu ƒe ɖoɖoa ƒe gɔmeɖoanyi ne míeƒo nu tso ƒomewo ƒe ɖekawɔwɔ ŋu." Wildes ɖo kpe edzi hã be srɔ̃tɔawo ɖo ƒe atɔ̃ ƒe nudidi si nye be woanɔ afima gbɔ hafi abia be woaxɔ dukɔmevinyenye. Le eƒe dziɖuɣi gbãtɔ (2017-2021) me la, Trumpda asi ɖe RAISE Se si ana srɔ̃tɔwo kple ɖevi suewo koe woatsɔ aɖo nɔƒe gbãtɔ dzi eye wòbia tso U.S. dukɔmeviwo si be woaxɔ mɔɖegbalẽ yeye kple ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe ƒe mɔɖegbalẽ na wo dzilawo tsɔ wu be woaxɔ nɔƒe siwo woawɔ kabakaba. Snopes ku nu me do ŋgɔ le nya siwo wogblɔ be Melania Trump va U.S. "le mɔ si mesɔ o nu" le EB-1 "Einstein" visa dzi eye wòdo alɔ eɖokui hena green card le esia ta. Eva zu afima nɔla ɖaa le ƒe 2001. Melania xɔ mɔɖegbalẽ ma tɔgbe vavã eye wobia tso esi be wòaɖe "ŋutete tɔxɛwo" afia abe kpɔɖeŋu ene. Zi geɖe la, ʋukula siwo kpɔ dzidzedze la dze na mɔɖegbalẽ ma tɔgbe. Snopesarchives ye kpe asi ɖe nyatakaka sia ŋu.

claim: China ɖoe be yeaxe mɔ ɖe Samsung telefonwo nu le ‘Israel ƒe ŋkutsalamɔ̃ si womate ŋu aɖe ɖa o’ si wotsɔ de eme ta
evidence: Nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo me gblɔ be China ɖoe be yeaxe mɔ ɖe Samsung telefonwo nu elabena "wotsɔ Israel ƒe ŋkutsalamɔ̃ siwo womate ŋu aɖe o de wo me," eye be China hã le mɔxexe ɖe Samsung, Motorola, Apple, kple Google Pixel nu le dedienɔnɔ ta. Gake míekpɔe be nya si wogblɔ la flua ame.  Social Media Posts Posts te gbe ɖe edzi be "China ɖoe be yeaxe mɔ ɖe Samsung telefonwo nu le 'Israel ƒe ŋkutsalamɔ̃ si womate ŋu aɖe ɖa o' si wotsɔ de eme ta," eye ame aɖewo kekea nutsotsoa ɖe enu wòɖoa mɔxexe ɖe duta telefonwo nu wòkeke ta.  Dzɔtsoƒe | Nudzraɖoƒe ƒe Dzɔtsoƒe | Archive Fact Check Ðe China ɖe gbeƒãe be yeaxe mɔ ɖe Samsung alo duta telefon bubuwo nu le dukɔa me godooa?  China meɖe gbeƒã mɔxexe ɖe Samsung, Apple, Motorola, Google Pixel, alo telefon bubu siwo ƒe ŋkɔ le duta nu le dukɔa me godoo na amehawo o. Le September 13, 2023 dzi la, China Dutanyawo Gbɔkpɔha gblɔ be China "meɖe se, ɖoɖo alo ɖoɖowo ŋuti nuŋlɔɖiwo ɖe go o" si xe mɔ ɖe dutatɔwo ƒe telefonwo ƒeƒle alo wo zazã nu. Dɔwɔƒea gagblɔ be woawɔ nu ɖe ​​dukɔa me kple duta dɔwɔƒewo ŋu sɔsɔe le China ƒe Internet dzi dedienɔnɔ kple nyatakakawo ŋuti sewo nu. (Source) Nukatae wole nyatakakawo gblɔm enuenu tso "mɔxeɖenu" ŋu le China ƒe eme?  Dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒe aɖewo kple dɔwɔƒe siwo dziɖuɖua da megbe na gblɔ na dɔwɔlawo be woagatsɔ iPhone kple duta mɔ̃ bubuwo ava dɔme o. Esiawo nye mɔxexe ɖe dɔwɔƒewo nu le ememe, ke menye dutoƒo, dukɔ bliboa ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔa nu o. Zi geɖe la, wogblɔa mɔfiameawo kple nu alo to gbedasi siwo woɖo ɖe wo me dzi eye womenye mɔxexe ɖe nuƒlelawo ƒe duta telefonwo ƒle alo wo zazã nu le China katã o. (Dzɔtsoƒe: Reuters, Bloomberg) Ðe China dziɖuɖumegãwo gblɔ be "Israel spyware" le Samsung telefonwo mea?  Vaseɖe fifia la, míekpɔ China dziɖuɖua ƒe nuŋlɔɖi aɖeke, sedede ŋuti gbeƒãɖeɖewo, alo dziɖuɖua ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo ƒe nyatakaka aɖeke si gblɔ be "Israel spyware" le Samsung dɔwɔnuwo me o, eye womeɖe gbeƒãe le se nu be woaxe mɔ ɖe dukɔa katã nu le susu ma ta o. Nutsotso sia dzena le nyatakaka siwo kaka ɖe amewo me, ke menye le dziɖuɖua ƒe nyatakakatsoƒe siwo ŋu woate ŋu aɖo kpee o.  Ke Apple, Motorola, kple Google Pixel le China ya ɖe?  Mɔxexeɖedɔa ŋuti nyatakakawo ku ɖe iPhone siwo wozãna na dziɖuɖudɔwo wɔwɔ le dɔwɔƒe aɖewo koŋ ŋu, ke menye mɔxexe ɖe nuƒlelawo nu o. Womexe mɔ ɖe Samsung alo Motorola ƒe mɔ̃wo nu le dukɔa me godoo o. Womedzraa Google Pixel telefonwo le se nu le China-nyigba gã dzi o le asitsatsa ƒe susu siwo meku ɖe mɔxexeɖedɔ aɖeke si woɖe gbeƒãe yeyee ŋu o ta, eye wogblɔ be yewoƒo "Pixel" nu ƒu ɖe China katã ƒe mɔxexeɖedɔa nu me gblɔ vodadatɔe be fifia ƒe anyinɔnɔ tsɔ wu ɖoɖo. (Source) Gizmochina hã ka nya ta eye wòɖoe be enye "mɔxeɖenu" si le kekem ɖe enu ɖe ​​smartphone siwo menye Chinatɔwo tɔ o ŋu le dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒewo, eye ɣeaɖewoɣi la, egblɔa eƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzi ɖe asi dzi. Zã esiawo abe nya siwo ƒo xlãe ene le alesi nya la kakae ŋu, ke menye abe kpeɖodzi na dukɔ bliboa ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe ene o.  Ameŋunyatakakawo Ŋuti Dzitsitsi Kple Dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe Ðoɖo: NGO Perspective Digital-gomenɔamesiwo habɔbɔwo kple NGO-wo ŋlɔ ameŋunyatakakawo ŋuti dzitsitsi ɖe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖo siwo woda ɖe mɔ̃ dzi do ŋgɔ (si woyɔna be "AppCloud" alo "Aura," si ironSource wɔ, si nye Unity tɔ fifia) siwo wokpɔ le Samsung ƒe gazazã ƒe mɔ̃ aɖewo siwo wodzrana le nuto aɖewo me ŋu la ɖi. Ƒuƒoƒo siawo ta lɛtawo kple nyatakakawo siwo bia be woawɔ nu le gaglãgbe geɖe wu, woakpɔ ezãlawo dzi, eye woawɔ tiatia siwo le bɔbɔe wu be woaɖe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖoa ɖa, eye wode dzesii be esesẽ be woaɖe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖoa ɖa. Ele vevie be míase egɔme be esiawo nye nusiwo ŋu woke ɖo le wo ɖokui si le taʋiʋli me, ke menye China dziɖuɖua ƒe nyametsotso siwo dziɖuɖua ɖo o, eye womenye kpeɖodzi be woxe mɔ ɖe Samsung-mɔ̃wo nu le China katã o. (Source) Nyataƒoƒo Nya si wogblɔ be China xe mɔ ɖe Samsung telefonwo nu le "Israel spyware" ta la nye ameflunya. China meɖe gbeƒã mɔxexe ɖe Samsung alo telefon bubu siwo ƒe ŋkɔ le duta nu na nuƒlelawo le dukɔa me godoo o. Togbɔ be dziɖuɖudɔwɔƒe aɖewo xe mɔ ɖe duta mɔ̃wo nu le dɔwɔƒewo le dedienɔnɔ ta, eye ameŋunyatakakawo taʋlilawo tsɔ dzitsitsi ɖe kɔmpiutadziɖoɖo siwo woda ɖe Samsung ƒe mɔ̃ aɖewo dzi do ŋgɔ ŋu hã la, esiawo menye mɔxexe ɖe nuƒlelawo nu le se nu si wotu ɖe “Israeltɔwo ƒe ŋkutsalamɔ̃” dzi o.

To esia dzi
																																																Devesh MISHRA, ƒe 1999 me.
											
AFP India ƒe agbalẽ





				Nepal ƒe "Gen Z" sɔhɛwo ƒe ʋiʋliwo ɖe Himalaya dukɔa ƒe dukplɔlagã le zi dzi le September 2025 me, gake nukpɔkpɔ siwo me amewo le azɔli zɔm kple India ƒe Dukplɔlagã Narendra Modi ƒe aflaga meɖe Nepal dukɔmeviwo fia be wole kplɔla ma tɔgbe dim o. Woɖe videoa ŋutɔŋutɔ le India ƒe dzieheɣedzeƒe ƒe Sikkim nuto me eye wokakae le Internet dzi ɣleti aɖewo do ŋgɔ le nya siwo woŋlɔ tsɔ do alɔ Modi do ŋgɔ na eƒe sasrãkpɔ si woɖo ɖi la me. 
			


"Wole Modi ƒe ŋkɔ kafum le Nepal hã. Wowɔ kpekpe gã aɖe kple eƒe nɔnɔmetatawo. Kpɔ video bliboa si me Modi-Modi ƒe hadzidziwo le," xlẽ le Hindigbe me nya si woŋlɔ ɖe Facebook nyatakaka aɖe si woma le September 12, 2025 dzi.Hindigbe me nuŋɔŋlɔ si wotsɔ tsyɔ edzi le klipi la dzi gblɔ be: "Modi ƒe akunyawɔwɔ le dzedzem le Nepal hã, Nepaltɔwo le biabiam tso kplɔla abe Modi ene si posters in their hands."Videoa ɖe amewo ƒe ƒuƒoƒo aɖe fia wole zɔzɔm kple aflaga si dzi Modi ƒe foto le. Hindigbe me gbeɖiɖi aɖe gagblɔ nya si wogblɔ be Nepal ye woɖee le.

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Aʋatso Facebook nyatakaka si woɖe le September 12, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP tsɔ X dzĩ aɖe kpee
					
Wodze wɔwɔfiawo gɔme le September 8 dzi le Nepal ƒe fiadu Kathmandu tsɔ tsi tre ɖe nufitifitiwɔwɔ kple dziɖuɖua ƒe mɔxexe ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo nu, si sɔhɛ siwo do dziku siwo yɔ wo ɖokui be "Gen Z" habɔbɔ (archived link) ye ʋã. Dzreawo gasẽ ɖe edzi le kpovitɔwo ƒe amedzidzedze siwo wu ame megbe, si zi dukplɔlagã xoxo K. P. Sharma Oli dzi be wòadzudzɔ dɔa esime wotɔ dzo sewɔtakpekpea kple dziɖuɖuxɔwo. Ne mede ɖeke o la, ame 73 ya teti ku eye ame geɖe wu xɔ abi le zitɔtɔ vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake si dzɔ tso esime dukɔmeviʋa si xɔ ƒe ewo eye woɖe fiaɖuƒedziɖuɖua ɖa le ƒe 2008 me wu enu (archived link).Wode dɔ asi na Sushila Karki, si nye Nepal ƒe ʋɔnudrɔ̃lagã tsãtɔ si xɔ ƒe 73 be wòagbugbɔ ɖoɖo aɖo anyi eye wòakpɔ tsitretsiɖeŋulawo ƒe didi be yeanɔ anyi le etsɔme si me nufitifitiwɔwɔ manɔ o do ŋgɔ na tiatiawɔɣiwo gbɔ le ɣleti ade megbe (archive link).Video si woma le internet dzi meɖe Nepal dukɔmeviwo fia be woayɔ kplɔla si le abe Modi ene o -- woɖee le kpekpe aɖe si wowɔ tsɔ do alɔ India ƒe dukplɔlagã la do ŋgɔ na eƒe sasrãkpɔ si woɖo be wòava Sikkim nutome le May me.Footage from IndiaA reverse image search on Google found a similar video shared in a Facebook post on May 30 (archived link). Nuŋɔŋlɔ si le aflaga si le videoa me dzi xlẽ be: "Sikkimese Limboo Towo Míexɔe Nyuie na India ƒe Dukplɔlagã Bubutɔ Shri Narendra Modi Ji va Sikkim nutome".

Nɔnɔmetata
 


Facebook video si woɖe le September 17, 2025 dzi ƒe screenshot, eye AFP te gbe ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ dzi
					
Nya vevi aɖe didi na "Sukhim Yakthung Sapsok Songchumbho", si wokpɔ kple ink blɔ le aflaga la dzi, kpɔ Facebook ƒe axa aɖe si xɔ ŋkɔ ma ke si ma video didi aɖe si me nukpɔkpɔ mawo tɔgbe le le May 30 lia dzi (archived link).Axadzikpɔlawo ɖo kpe edzi na AFP be woɖe videoa le Sikkim."We have similar videos shared on our page. claim: Boblododo aɖe si tso Ontario, Canada, dziɖuɖua gbɔ “gblɔ nya siwo mesɔ o” Dukplɔla Ronald Reagan ƒe nuƒo si wòƒo le April 25, 1987 dzi ku ɖe adzɔxexe ŋu.
evidence: Esi Canada ƒe Ontario nuto ƒe dziɖuɖu ɖe boblododo aɖe si tsi tre ɖe adzɔxexe ŋu ɖe go si ƒe taɖodzinue nye U.S. ƒe asitsatsa ŋuti ɖoɖowo vɔ la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ be United States le asitsatsa ŋuti nudzraɖoɖo siwo wowɔna kple eƒe aƒelika si le dziehe la me tsom. Le Oct. 23 Truth Social nyatakaka aɖe me la, Trump ƒo nu tso nya aɖe si tso The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute gbɔ ŋu. Trump ŋlɔ bena, "Ðeko Ronald Reagan Foundation ɖe gbeƒãe teti koe nye ema be Canada zã boblododo aɖe le ametafatafa me, si nye FAKE, si me Ronald Reagan ƒo nu gbegblẽ tso Tariffs ŋu le." Ronald Reagan Dukplɔla ƒe Habɔbɔ kple Dɔwɔƒe nye habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si le Simi Valley, Calif., si Reagan ɖo be yeado yeƒe domenyinu kple gɔmeɖosewo ɖe ŋgɔ. Reagan Foundation gblɔ be Canadatɔwo ƒe boblododoa — si me Reagan ƒe April 25, 1987, radio dzi nuƒoa nɔ — zã "odio kple video tiatia" eye "eɖe Dukplɔla ƒe Radio Nuƒoa fia le mɔ gbegblẽ nu." Reagan ƒe nya aɖewo nɔ boblododo si xɔ aɖabaƒoƒo ɖeka me le ɖoɖo si nu wodzɔ ɖo nu. Eɖee ɖa hã be Reagan ŋlɔ adrɛs la ɖi esi wòxe adzɔ ɖe Japantɔwo ƒe adzɔnu aɖewo dzi vɔ megbe. Adzɔxexe nye adzɔ si woxena ɖe adzɔnuwo ta; adzɔxexe nye adzɔ ƒomevi aɖe si woxena ɖe adzɔnu siwo wotsɔ tso duta alo esiwo wotsɔ yi duta dzi. Ke hã, boblododoa ƒe gbedasi bliboa megblɔ Reagan ƒe nukpɔsusu le adzɔxexe ŋu vodadatɔe o. Reagan gblɔ be yexɔe se be le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbe la, adzɔxexe ahe asitsatsa ƒe aʋawɔwɔwo vɛ eye wòagblẽ nu le Amerikatɔwo ŋu. Míebia Reagan Foundation be aleke boblododoa gblɔ Reagan ƒe adrɛs le mɔ gbegblẽ nu hã, gake míexɔ ŋuɖoɖo to agbalẽtata me o. Esi míebia White House be nukae nye alakpa le boblododoa ŋu hã la, nyanuɖela Kush Desai gblɔ be, "The Ronald Reagan Presidential Foundation and Institute gɔ̃ hã le yɔyɔm be Ontario ƒe Dukplɔla Reagan ƒe nyawo ɖɔɖɔɖo si flua ame eye wòtiaa wo." Ontario ƒe Dukplɔlagã Doug Ford gblɔ le Oct. 14 dzi be wowɔ ɖoɖo be yewoaƒle boblododo si ƒe home nye dɔlar miliɔn 75 eye woaɖee ɖe go le nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gãwo. Le Oct. 24 — esi Trump te fli ɖe asitsatsa ŋuti nuƒoƒo kple Canada me vɔ megbe — Ford gblɔ be boblododoa ayi edzi anɔ dodom le Xexeame ƒe Hoʋiʋli ƒe fefe eve gbãtɔwo me gake atɔ vie le ema megbe, "ale be asitsatsa ŋuti nuƒoƒo nate ŋu adze egɔme ake." Boblododoa ɖee fia be Reagan le adrɛs la gblɔm. Le boblododoa me la, egblɔ be: "Ne ame aɖe gblɔ be, ‘Mina míade adzɔxexe ɖe nusiwo wotsɔ tso duta vɛ dzi la,’ edzena abe ɖe wole dulɔlɔ̃dɔa wɔm to Amerikatɔwo ƒe adzɔnuwo kple dɔwo takpɔkpɔ me ene. Eye, ɣeaɖewoɣi hena ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe la, ewɔa dɔ, gake ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe koe. Gake le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbe la, asitsatsa ƒe mɔxenu mawo gblẽa nu le Amerika dɔwɔla kple nuƒlela ɖesiaɖe ŋu. "Adzɔ gã siwo woxena la hea hlɔ̃biabia vɛ godoo to dutadukɔwo kple asitsatsa ƒe aʋawɔwɔ sesẽwo hehe vɛ. Emegbe nu vɔ̃ɖitɔ kekeake dzɔna: asiwo dzi ɖena kpɔtɔna eye wogbãna, asitsaƒewo kple dɔwɔƒewo tu, eye dɔ ge le ame miliɔn geɖe si. "Le xexeame katã la, amewo le ekpɔm dze sii be mɔ si dzi dukɔwo katã ato akpɔ nudzedziname gbɔe nye be woagbe ametakpɔkpɔ ƒe sewo eye woado hoʋiʋli dzɔdzɔe kple ablɔɖe ɖe ŋgɔ. America’s jobs and growth are at stake." Nyagbe aɖewo siwo le boblododoa me mele ɖoɖo si nu Reagan gblɔ la nu o, gake ɖoɖo si wogbugbɔ ɖo ɖe ɖoɖo nu metrɔ gɔmesese si le eŋu o. (Nyagbe si nye, "Gake le ɣeyiɣi didi me la, asitsatsa ƒe mɔxenu mawo gblẽa nu le Amerika dɔwɔla kple nuƒlela ɖesiaɖe ŋu," le nyateƒe me la, wogblɔe do ŋgɔ le Reagan ƒe nyawo me. Wotrɔ asi le boblododoa hã ŋu le nya "gake." Reagan gblɔ be, "Eye le ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe me la, maƒo nu tso ganyawo ƒe susu nyui siwo tae wòwɔ esia ŋu: be le ɣeyiɣi didi aɖe megbe la, asitsatsa ƒe mɔxenu mawo gblẽa nu le Amerika dɔwɔla kple nuƒlela ɖesiaɖe ŋu.") Reagan ɖo afɔɖeɖe si tsi tre ɖe Japan ŋu be enye nya si mebɔ o asitsatsa ŋuti ɖoɖowo zazã atsɔ atsi asitsahabɔbɔ ɖeka ƒe nuwɔna tɔxɛ aɖewo nu le adzɔnuwo ƒe hatsotso ɖeka ŋu. Le nuƒoa ƒe akpa bubu si womeyɔ le boblododoa me o la, Reagan gblɔ be nuwɔna siwo ku ɖe "Japantɔwo ƒe semiconductors nye nya tɔxɛ aɖe" be "woakpɔ kuxi aɖe koŋ gbɔ, ke menye be woadze asitsatsa ƒe aʋawɔwɔ gɔme o." Reagan gblɔ hã be, "Fifia, adzɔxexe alo asitsatsa ƒe mɔxenu mawo tɔgbe dede kple mɔxeɖenu ƒomevi ɖesiaɖe nye afɔɖeɖe siwo melɔ̃na be maɖe." Egblɔ be asitsatsa ƒe aʋawɔwɔ me tsonu anye "adzɔxexe geɖe wu, asitsatsa ƒe mɔxenu siwo le dzidzim ɖe edzi, kple hoʋiʋli si dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ. Eyata, eteƒe madidi o, le asi siwo adzɔxexe siwo doa alɔ dɔmawɔmawɔ nyuie kple dɔdzikpɔkpɔ nyuie o ta la, amewo dzudzɔa nuƒle." Abe nuƒoa ene la, Reagan ƒe asitsatsa ŋuti nuŋlɔɖi bliboa doa alɔ asitsatsa faa zi geɖe, gake ɣeaɖewoɣi la, metoa vovo kura o. Reagan ƒoe ɖe enu be woawɔ dukɔwo dome asitsatsa faa ƒe nubabla geɖe, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye ƒe 1988 U.S. kple Canada ƒe Asitsatsa Faa ƒe Nubabla, si va tsɔ Mexico de eme emegbe eye wòva zu Dziehe Amerika ƒe Asitsatsa Faa ƒe Nubabla. Reagan ƒe dziɖuɖua "dze xexeame katã ƒe asitsatsa-mɔxenuwo dzi ɖeɖe kpɔtɔ ƒe nudzraɖoɖo siwo de blibo wu gɔme haɖe co."

claim: Le Dziɖuɖumegã Hochul ƒe dziɖuɣi la, “nuvlowɔwɔ geɖe wu le míaƒe ablɔwo dzi.”
evidence: Republicantɔ xɔŋkɔ aɖe yɔ Gov. Kathy Hochul ƒe dɔwɔwɔ ƒe nuŋlɔɖi be "abysmal" le eƒe dudzikpɔla ƒe sasrãkpɔ nyitsɔ laa le Ɣetoɖoƒe New York megbe. Sewɔtakpekpea ƒe Ame Suesuewo ƒe Kplɔla Robert Ortt, R-North Tonawanda gblɔ be: “Nu ɖeka si wòle be New Yorktɔwo naɖe afia tso eƒe dziɖuɣi mee nye nuwo ƒe asi ƒe dziyiyi, gazazã gbegblẽ ƒe dzidziɖedzi, Medicaid ƒe gazazã siwo le dzi yim le ametafatafa kple ŋlɔmiwɔwɔ ta, kple nuvlowɔwɔ geɖe wu le míaƒe ablɔwo dzi.” Woŋlɔ nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe dzidziɖedzi le dɔvɔ̃a me ɖi nyuie, gake míebia mía ɖokui be ɖe Ortt ƒe nya si wògblɔ be "nuvlowɔwɔ geɖe wu le míaƒe ablɔwo dzi" tso esime Hochul va zu nutodziɖula le Aug. 24, 2021 dzi la sɔ hã. New York nutome léa ŋku ɖe "nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe dzesi" adre ŋu na nyatakaka nana ƒe ɖoɖo si Dukɔa ƒe Numekuku Dɔwɔƒe to vɛ. Wo dometɔ ene nye ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ: amewuwu, ame gbɔ dɔdɔ sesẽe, adzodada kple amedzidzedze sesẽe. Etɔ̃ mamlɛawo nye nunɔamesiwo ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ: adzodada, fififi kple ʋufifi. Dukɔa katã ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe xexlẽme kple nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi ɖe edzi tso ƒe 2021. Tso ƒe blibo gbãtɔ si me Hochul xɔ zi dzi, ƒe 2022 me la, xexlẽmea sɔ gbɔ wu gake agbɔsɔsɔa mesɔ gbɔ o. Hochul va xɔ ɖoƒea le August 2021 me, eye le ƒe blibo ma me la, nuvlowɔwɔ 345,980 ye wɔ index le New York nutome, le dukɔa ƒe Division of Criminal Justice Services ƒe nya nu. Le ƒe 2022 me, si nye ƒe blibo gbãtɔ si me Hochul nɔ zi dzi la, xexlẽmea dzi ɖe edzi va ɖo 423,815. Nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe xexlẽme dzi ɖe edzi va ɖo 440,771 le ƒe 2023 me gake eɖiɖi va ɖo 424,312 le ƒe 2024. Eyata ƒe 2024 ƒe xexlẽme gakpɔtɔ sɔ gbɔ vie wu ƒe 2022 tɔ eye wòwu ƒe 2021 tɔ sã. Ƒe 2024 ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ – nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe xexlẽme si wodzidze ɖe amewo ŋu – dzi ɖe edzi ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 2021 ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ gake eɖiɖi ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 2022 ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme. Woka nya ta tso nuvlowɔwɔ 2,136 ŋu le afima nɔla 100,000 ɖesiaɖe me le ƒe 2024 me, ne wotsɔe sɔ kple 1,744 le ƒe 2021. Gake ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe 2022 la, ƒe 2024 ƒe nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme ɖiɖi mede 1% o. Míebia Ortt ƒe dɔwɔƒea be wòana kpeɖodzi le eƒe nyaa ŋu, eye míana anyigba ƒe nɔnɔme si dzi wòtu eƒe nyaa ɖo la me nakɔ. Dukɔa katã me nuvlowɔwɔ nɔ susu me nɛ, eye wòhe susu yi ƒe 2022 ƒe nyatakaka aɖe si tso Dukɔa ƒe Dɔwɔƒe si Kpɔa Dɔwɔnyawo Gbɔ gbɔ, si ɖee fia be nuvlowɔwɔ siwo wowɔna le index me dzi ɖe edzi le ƒe ma me. "Senator Ortt ƒe nya la ɖe nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe dzidziɖedzi si woŋlɔ ɖi, si nɔa anyi ɖaa le Dziɖuɖumegã Hochul ƒe dziɖuɣi fia," Kadododzikpɔla Matthew Mosher gblɔ. Nuvlowɔwɔ ŋuti akɔntabubu siwo nɔ anyi le Hochul ƒe dziɖuɣi la dzi ɖe edzi kple dziɖeleameƒo, ke menye dzidziɖedzi si nɔa anyi ɖaa o. Ortt ƒe dɔwɔƒea gblɔ hã be nutoa me nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe dzidziɖedzi ŋue yele nu ƒom tsoe. Eƒe dɔwɔƒea na nyadzɔdzɔ eve siwo ku ɖe ʋufifi siwo le dzidzim ɖe edzi le Ɣetoɖoƒe New York ŋu. Le Amherst la, ʋufifi dzi ɖe edzi zi gbɔ zi eve kloe le ƒe atɔ̃ siwo va yi me. Dukɔa katã ƒe akɔntabubuwo ɖee fia be ʋufifi ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ dzi ɖe edzi 45% tso ƒe 2021 me, togbɔ be eɖiɖi 19% tso ƒe 2023 va ɖo ƒe 2024. Nuvlowɔwɔ siwo ŋu woka nya ta le le index me le Ɣetoɖoƒe New York nye 2,017 le afima nɔla 100,000 ɖesiaɖe me le ƒe 2021 me; 2,211 le ƒe 2022 me; kple 2,257 le ƒe 2024. Nyatakaka siwo ku ɖe Ɣetoɖoƒe New York ŋu la lɔ Niagara, Erie, Chautauqua, Cattaraugus kple Allegany nutoawo ɖe eme. Míebia Hochul ƒe dɔwɔƒea tso Ortt ƒe nya la ŋu, eye eƒe nyanuɖela ƒo nu tso index crime data ŋu, kpakple nyatakaka siwo ɖee fia be tudada dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ 19% le ƒe sia me vaseɖe July 13 dzi, ne wotsɔe sɔ kple ƒe si va yi tɔ. Eƒe dɔwɔƒea gblɔ hã be tudada siwo woŋlɔ ɖi la le agbɔsɔsɔ si bɔbɔ wu le ŋutinya me le New York City, eye be le dua godo la, New York le 10% le tudada ƒe xexlẽme si bɔbɔ wu tsã la te. Dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be le ƒe 2024 me la, tudada ƒe nudzɔdzɔ siwo me woxɔ abi le la ɖiɖi va ɖo afisi bɔbɔ wu tso esime dukɔa dze xexlẽme dzi kpɔkpɔ gɔme le ƒe 2006 me. Le dukɔa me godoo la, ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔwo dzi ɖe edzi tso ƒe 2021, gake wole ɖiɖim tso ƒe 2022. Jillian Snider, si nye New York City kpovitɔ tsã eye wònye ɖoɖodzikpɔla le nuvlowɔlawo ƒe ʋɔnudɔdrɔ̃ kple dukɔmeviwo ƒe ablɔɖe le R Street Institute, si doa alɔ dziɖuɖu si seɖoƒe li na kple asi siwo me ablɔɖe le la gblɔ be nuvlowɔwɔ ŋuti akɔntabubuwo kple amewo ƒe seselelãme be wole dedie vie ate ŋu ato vovo ŋutɔ le dukɔa me godoo. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, womegblɔa nuvlowɔwɔ siwo ade afã o. Snider gblɔ be: "Nuvlowɔwɔ siwo me kpovitɔwo le nyatakaka si le dɔ dzi xɔm le koe New York Dukɔa ƒe index nuvlowɔwɔ sia ɖea nuvlowɔwɔ fiana." Dukɔa ƒe nyatakakawo ɖee fia be nuvlowɔwɔ sɔ gbɔ le ƒe 2024 me wu ƒe 2021, togbɔ be menye nyateƒee le nuto ɖesiaɖe me o hã, Snider gblɔ. Ames Grawert, senyala si ŋlɔ nu tso nuvlowɔwɔ ƒe nɔnɔmewo kple gaxɔgbalẽviwo ɖɔɖɔɖo ŋu le Brennan Center gblɔ be abe nuto geɖe ene la, New York kpɔ nuvlowɔwɔ ƒomevi aɖewo dzi ɖe edzi le Covid-19 dɔvɔ̃a ƒe ƒe gbãtɔwo me. "Nɔnɔme mawo dometɔ aɖewo te ɖiɖi. Le kpɔɖeŋu me, amewuwu dzi ɖe kpɔtɔ ŋutɔ le dukɔa me godoo tso esime wòɖo eƒe kɔkɔƒe le ƒe 2021 me," Grawert gblɔ. Amewuwu ƒe xexlẽme le nuto bliboa me ɖiɖi ŋutɔ tso ƒe 2021 me, eye agbɔsɔsɔa ɖiɖi 29%. Le Niagara County, si nye Ortt ƒe dukɔ me la, ame siwo ƒe lãme gbãna

claim: Amit Shah gblɔ be hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe ŋusẽkpɔɖeamedzilawo tso akpawo katã me le agbe ɖe woƒe kilogram 5 ƒe nuɖuɖua nu.
evidence: Nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽvi aɖe si wogblɔ be enye NDTV, si wogblɔ be eyɔ nya tso Aƒeme Dɔdzikpɔla Amit Shah ƒe nyawo me la le kakam ŋutɔ le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo. Egblɔ be Shah gblɔ be, "Dɔwɔla siwo katã le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo, eɖanye akpa ka mee wole o, le agbe le míaƒe nuɖuɖu si nye kilogram 5 la nu!"  Wole nɔnɔmetata sia mam geɖe do ŋgɔ na Bihar Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe Tiatiawɔblɔɖe ƒe 2025, eye ezãlawo le ɖeklemi ɖem nya sia.  Screengrab from X post by @masijeevi Xlẽ Azɔ hã: Ðe Video Sia Fia Ʋukulaa Le Nuɖam Le Lɔriʋu Me Ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖewo Do Ŋgɔ Na California ƒe Afɔkua?  Kpeɖodzi Nya veviwo didi to nyawo abe "Amit Shah," "hadomegbenɔnɔ ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo," kple "5kg ration" zazã me mekpɔ nyatakaka aɖeke si ŋu kakaɖedzi le alo dziɖuɖumegãwo ƒe nya aɖeke o. Eƒe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo ŋu woɖo kpee hã meɖe nya mawo tɔgbe aɖeke fia o.  Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, NDTV India ƒe wɔna si nye "Powerplay" ƒe tsidzesi nɔ nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ŋu. Ke hã, esi míeto Powerplay ƒe gbebiame bliboa si wowɔ kple Amit Shah si wota ɖe NDTV ƒe YouTube television dzi (Nov 1, 2025) dzi la, nya ma tɔgbe aɖeke menɔ anyi o.  Esi wolé ŋku ɖe dɔlékui ƒe nɔnɔmetata ŋu nyuie la, masɔmasɔ geɖe ɖe dzesi: Ŋɔŋlɔdzesi siwo menye dɔnyala o: Wozãa ɣlidodo kple nyayɔyɔdzesiwo madzemadzee.  Ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo ƒe masɔmasɔ: Ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo to vovo na NDTV ƒe nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ siwo wozãna ɖaa.  Aɖaŋu ƒe masɔmasɔ: Megbe ɣi si le nuŋɔŋlɔa megbe la dze abe ɖe wotsɔe ɖo wo nɔewo dzi ene eye mewɔ ɖeka kple NDTV ƒe nɔnɔmetata ŋutɔŋutɔ (si wokpɔ le afisia, afisia kple afisia) le Amit Shah ƒe gbebiamea me o.  (L-R) Viral image and actual NDTV graphics Woateŋu akpɔ nɔnɔmetata siwo NDTV ma le Amit Shah ƒe gbebiame me le ete.  NDTV hã ɖe numekɔkɔ aɖe ɖe go si gblɔ be: "Nya sia si le kakam le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo nye agbagbadzedze be woakaka alakpanyawo to fotoɖeɖe ɖe míaƒe nyatakaka aɖe si woɖe tso nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ nyitsɔ laa me ƒe screenshot me. Míede dzesi esia, eye woawɔ senya siwo sɔ."  Screengrab from X post by @NDTV Xlẽ Azɔ: Video Xoxo Si Me Jemimah Rodrigues Le Viral Abe Azãɖuɖu Esi India ɖu Australia Dzi Be Woaɖo Nyɔnuwo ƒe Xexeame Katã ƒe Kplɔ̃ɖoƒe ƒe Nyametsotso Mamlɛa Gbɔ NDTV-style nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe Amit Shah ƒe nyawo me la nye alakpa. Megblɔ nya aɖeke nenema tso "internet dzi dɔwɔla siwo tsi agbe le míaƒe kilogram 5 ƒe nuɖuɖu me" ŋu o. NDTV ɖo kpe edzi be nyatakaka si kaka ɖe amewo dome la nye fotoɖeɖefia.  Nyabiasewo Q1. Ðe Amit Shah gblɔ nyateƒe be internet dzi ʋiʋlilawo tso akpa vovovoawo katã me "tsia agbe le 5kg ration" mea?  Ao, nyagbɔgblɔa nye alakpa eye medze le Amit Shah ƒe gbebiame alo nuƒo siwo ŋu woɖo kpee la dometɔ aɖeke me o.    Q2. Ðe NDTV ye ɖe nɔnɔmetata si kaka ɖe amewo dome la ɖe goa?  Ao, NDTV na eme kɔ be fotoɖeɖe le nɔnɔmetata la ŋu.    Q3. Nukatae nyatakaka totro mawo le kakam?  Zi geɖe la, nya siwo flua ame abe esia ene dona le tiatiawɔɣiwo me be woatsɔ aʋuʋu amewo ƒe nukpɔsusu alo agblẽ ŋkɔ nyui le dunyahelawo ŋu.  Dzɔtsoƒewo YouTube Video si NDTV India ŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ le November 1, 2025 dzi X Nyatakaka si NDTV ŋlɔ, si woŋlɔ le November 3, 2025 dzi

claim: U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe dɔwɔla si da tu Renee Nicole Good hewui le Minneapolis le Jan, 7, 2026 dzi la ŋkɔe nye Steve Grove.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le Jan. 7, 2026 dzi la, U.S. Amedzrowo Kple Dukɔmeviwo ƒe Nyawo Gbɔkpɔha ƒe dɔwɔla aɖe da tu Renee Nicole Good si xɔ ƒe 37 wòku le Minneapolis ƒe nuto aɖe me. Woma eteƒekpɔlawo ƒe foto siwo woɖe tso tudadaa kple nudzɔdzɔ siwo kplɔe ɖo ŋu le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo kaba, si na wodo dziku eye wolé ŋku ɖe nudzɔdzɔa ŋu nyuie. Ame geɖe hã di be yewoade dzesi (de nudzraɖoƒe) ICE ƒe dɔwɔla si tsɔ agbanɔamedzia. Hadomegbenɔnɔ (nudzraɖoƒe) nyadzɔdzɔgblɔmɔnuwo (nudzraɖoƒe) nyatakaka geɖe (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe), siwo dometɔ aɖewo tutu kabakaba (wodzra wo ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) kple bubu siwo me ICE dɔwɔla ƒe mo ƒe foto si dze abe ɖe wòdze ene le la gblɔ be ŋkɔ na Good wula la be Steve Grove (wodzra wo ɖo). Nyatakaka siawo dometɔ aɖewo hã gblɔ be Grove tso Minneapolis. Snopes xlẽlawo di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea henɔ didim be yewoaɖo kpe nya si wogblɔ la dzi. (Richard Longwood to Facebook dzi) Nya si wogblɔ la nye alakpa. Nyadzɔdzɔ siwo ŋu ŋkɔ le gblɔ be ICE ƒe dɔwɔla la ŋkɔe nye Jonathan Ross. Nyadzɔdzɔdɔwɔƒe geɖe siwo dzi woate ŋu aka ɖo, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye The Minnesota Star Tribune, The Associated Press, The Guardian kple NPR, kpakple bubuawo, gblɔ be Ross ye nye dɔwɔla si wu Good. Wotu woƒe dzesidedee ɖe Dukɔa ƒe Dedienɔnɔ Dɔwɔƒe ƒe kpeɖodzi be dɔwɔƒea ƒe amedɔdɔa kpɔ gome le ʋu ƒe nudzɔdzɔ aɖe me le June 2025 me kple ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe ƒe nuŋlɔɖi siwo yɔ Ross be eyae nye amedɔdɔ le nudzɔdzɔ ma me dzi. DHS gbe be yemaɖe amedɔdɔa ƒe ŋkɔ le e-mail aɖe si wòɖo ɖe Snopes me o, gake woɖo kpe edzi be ewɔ dɔ na ICE wu ƒe 10 sɔŋ, abe alesi Guardian ka nya tae ene. Togbɔ be Amerikatɔ geɖe li siwo ŋkɔe nye Steve Grove hã la, amesi ɖe dzesi wu le Minneapolis nutoa mee nye The Minnesota Star Tribune tala. Le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo (siwo wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) me la, Star Tribune ŋlɔ bena "nyatakaka totrowo ƒe ɖoɖo aɖe si wowɔ ɖekae le Internet dzi vodadatɔe" de dzesi ICE ƒe dɔwɔla, amesi "womenya be kadodo aɖeke mele Star Tribune kple Star Tribune dome o." Grove gblɔ na eya ŋutɔ ƒe akɔntabubuwo le ema megbe be Star Tribune de dzesi ICE dɔwɔla si wu Good ƒe ŋkɔ ŋutɔŋutɔ. Springfield Daily Citizen, si nye nutoa me nyadzɔdzɔgbalẽ aɖe gblɔ be tudzraƒe aɖe tɔ aɖe si le Missouri ƒe dzigbeɣetoɖoƒe si ŋkɔe nye Steven Grove hã gblɔ alakpatɔe be eyae nye ICE ƒe dɔwɔla. Nya aɖewo siwo woŋlɔ tsɔ yɔ Steve Grove ƒe ŋkɔ vodadatɔe la tsɔ foto aɖe si dze abe ICE dɔwɔla la ƒe ametakpɔnu si wometsɔ nutsyɔnu o ene la ma. Abe alesi Snopes ka nya ta va yi ene la, le nyateƒe me la, wotsɔ nunya wɔwɔ ƒe dɔwɔnuwo wɔ nɔnɔmetata siawo siwo "ɖea ametakpɔnu" la, eye le esia ta womenye dɔwɔla la ƒe mo ƒe nɔnɔmetata siwo sɔ pɛpɛpɛ o. Le nyadzɔdzɔ yeyewo ƒe nɔnɔmewo me la, zi geɖe la, nyatakaka siwo mede blibo o alo alakpanyawo yɔa hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo fũ. Ate ŋu axɔ ɣeyiɣi hafi nyatakaka siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le, siwo ŋu woɖo kpee, nasu ame si, vevietɔ ku ɖe amesiwo kpɔ gome le nɔnɔmeawo me ƒe amenyenye ŋu. Anyo wu be nàtsɔ ɖikeke ate ɖe hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo gblɔna be yede dzesi ame aɖe ŋu hafi nyadzɔdzɔ siwo ŋu kakaɖedzi le naɖo kpe nyatakakaa dzi. Be míagaxlẽ nu geɖe wu la, míeku nu me hã be nɔnɔmetata aɖe si woma le hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ɖe Renee Nicole Good fia vavã hã.

claim: Habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si nye Turning Point USA si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ɖe gbeƒã ƒe 2026 Super Bowl ƒe afã ƒe fefe bubu aɖe.
evidence: Le dzeside sia ŋu la, Snopes tsɔ nya sia ɖo dzeside gbã be enye Aʋatso, gake tso ɣemaɣi la, wotrɔ asi le nyatia ŋu be wòaɖe gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖe si Turning Point USA ɖe emegbe be yewoɖoe be yewoawɔ yewo ŋutɔ yewoƒe ƒe 2026 Super Bowl ƒe afã me fefea afia. Nuŋlɔla ƒe nyatakaka: Turning Point USA ɖe gbeƒãe be woawɔ ɖoɖo ɖe ƒe 2026 Super Bowl ƒe afã ƒe fefea ŋu le nyatakaka sia tata zi gbãtɔ megbe, si wodzra ɖo ɖe afisia. Le Dukɔa ƒe Bɔlƒohabɔbɔ ƒe gbeƒãɖeɖe be enye nutala Bad Bunny si xɔ Grammy-nunana be wòanye ƒe 2026 Super Bowl ƒe afã me fefewɔla megbe la, nya aɖewo kaka ɖe Internet dzi le October 2025 ƒe gɔmedzedze be Turning Point USA, si nye habɔbɔ si mekpɔa viɖe aɖeke tso eme o si blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe habɔbɔ si Charlie Kirk si nye blemakɔnuléɖeasilawo ƒe ʋiʋlila si megali o ɖo la awɔ fefe bubu aɖe. Zãlawo ma nya la leInstagram (nudzraɖoƒe),Facebook (nudzraɖoƒe) kple X (nudzraɖoƒe), eye ame aɖewo da Bad Bunny ƒe nɔnɔmetata kpe ɖe nuŋɔŋlɔ si nye, "Mind you, Bad Bunny is both a Christian (Catholic) and an American (from Puerto Rico)." Alesi nya sia kakae na Snopes xlẽla geɖe ɖo e-mail ɖa be yewoabia nyateƒe si le megbe na nyaʋiʋlia. A post shared by Stephanie Drury (@stuffchristianculturelikes) Nya si wogblɔ be Turning Point USA ɖe gbeƒãe be yewoawɔ counterprogramming na ƒe 2026 Super Bowl ƒe afã ɣeyiɣia nye nyateƒe. Habɔbɔa ɖe gbeƒã "The All American Halftime Show" le eƒe hadome nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo eye wòdze nyatakakadzraɖoƒe aɖe gɔme na wɔnaa le Oct. 9, 2025. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒea do wɔnaa ɖe ŋgɔ be enye "xɔse, ƒome, kple ablɔɖe ƒe azãɖuɖu." Gbeƒãɖeɖea meɖe nyatakaka bubu aɖeke, abe amesi awɔ haƒoƒo ene, ɖe go o. Nyaʋiʋli gbãtɔwo gblɔ be "Kristotɔ Amerikatɔ fefewɔlawo" anɔ wɔnaa me eye kpeɖodzi sesẽ aɖeke manɔmee si aɖo kpe nya sia dzi o. Andrew Kolvet, si nye Turning Point ƒe nyanuɖela gblɔ na Snopes to email dzi be: Dzi dzɔ Turning Point USA ŋutɔ be yewoawɔ "The All American Halftime Show" afisi míaɖu xɔse, ƒome, kple ablɔɖe ƒe azã le. Xoxo, le gaƒoƒo ʋɛ aɖewo ko me tso esime woɖe gbeƒãe la, esia nye nudzɔdzɔ aɖe si dzɔ enumake eye wògbɔ eme wu le míaƒe habɔbɔa ƒe ŋutinya me la dometɔ ɖeka. Edze ƒã be esia nye nusi dukɔa di be yeakpɔ wòadzɔ, eye dzi le mía dzɔm be míatsɔe ana. Míele mɔ kpɔm be míawɔ ɖeka kple dukɔa aƒo xlã Amerikatɔwo ƒe dzidzenu siwo me ɣeyiɣi mede o siwo na be dukɔ sia nye dukɔ gãtɔ kekeake le xexeame. Hafi Turning Point naɖe gbeƒã wɔnaa la, nya siwo wogblɔ tso eŋu la nɔ tsatsam. Wotso "The Charlie Kirk Show" kple Turning Point ƒe nudzɔla Jack Posobiec ƒe nyawo ɖoɖo ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe) le Sept. 29, 2025, "Kakaɖedzitɔe la, anye ŋukpe ne @TPUSA wɔ counter-Superbowl afã ƒe fefe kple Creed." Edze abe Posobiec ƒe hadede kple Kirk ƒe nyatakakawoe de dzo nyaʋiʋlia me ene, eye emegbe wòdoe ɖe ŋgɔ le podcast vovovowo me le nyateƒea megbe. Le Oct. 1 ƒe akpa si nye "The Charlie Kirk Show," co-host Andrew Kolvet ƒo nu tso nyaʋiʋlia ŋu eye wògblɔ be, "Mele nyabiase geɖewo xɔm tso nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo gbɔ fifia be, 'Madi be woagblɔ nya aɖe tso nenye be Turning Point le ɖoɖo wɔm ɖe hoʋiʋli ƒe afã ɣeyiɣi ƒe wɔna aɖe ŋu kple Creed, eye menɔ abe, 'Enyo, nyemenɔ ...'" Posobiec gblɔ kpee be, "By the way, I didn't have permission from Turning Point USA be tweet be." (Woateŋu akpɔ asitɔtrɔ bliboa leYouTube le 7:25 ƒe dzesi la lɔƒo.) Posobiec gagblɔ ake be womeɖe mɔ ɖe yeƒe nyatakakaa ŋu le Oct. 6, 2025, ƒe akpa si nye numeɖela si léa nuteƒewɔwɔ me ɖe asi Tim Pool ƒe podcast "Timcast IRL." Egblɔ be, "Tweet sia nɔ asinye si kaka ŋutɔ be Turning Point ƒe mɔɖeɖe aɖeke menɔ asinye godoo o, ku ɖe ɖe wòle be Turning Point nawɔ afã ƒe fefe bubu aɖe na Bad Bunny? Eye ne míena Creed nawɔ dɔ ɖe?" Eɖe eme be habɔbɔa nɔ nyabiase geɖe xɔm tso nyadzɔdzɔgblɔlawo kpakple nutala bubuwo gbɔ, eye be "gbeƒãɖeɖe aɖeke mele ye si" yeawɔ o, gake egblɔ be metso nya me o eye wògblɔ be, "Míele dzeɖoƒea." (Woateŋu akpɔ nya sia leYouTube le ga 1:58:00 ƒe dzesi lɔƒo.) Woɖoe be woawɔ Super Bowl le Feb. 8, 2026, le San Francisco 49ers ƒe bɔlƒoƒe le Santa Clara, California. Le nuxexlẽ bubuwo ta la, míeku nu me le nya bubu siwo wogblɔ ku ɖe Bad Bunny ƒe Super Bowl ƒe afã me fefea ŋu, siwo dometɔ aɖewoe nye Trump ƒe aɖaŋuɖola Corey Lewandowskisaying ICE anɔ fefea me kple nya siwo wogblɔ beCoca-Cola he eƒe Super Bowl sponsorship le NFL ƒe tiatia be Bad Bunny nawɔ dɔ ta.

claim: Megan Byron, si nye Ɣletiviŋutinunyala ƒe Dɔdzikpɔlagã tsãtɔ Andy Byron srɔ̃, amesi ƒe ahiã si wogblɔ be eɖe fia to nugbugbɔgamɔ̃ aɖe si woɖe fia le Coldplay ƒe kɔnsɛt aɖe me le July 2025 me la ɖe gbeƒãe tsɔ ka atam be dɔwɔƒea ƒe amegã “ase” eƒe nuwɔnawo gɔme.
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Le July 2025 ƒe nuwuwu, esi hadomenyatakakadzraɖoƒe zãlawo yi edzi nɔ nu ƒom tso ɣeyiɣi si me ɣletiviŋutinunyala ƒe amegã tsãtɔ Andy Byron do kple eƒe abɔwo ƒo xlã dɔwɔƒea ƒe HR ƒe amegã Kristin Cabot le "kiss cam" dzi le Coldplay ƒe kɔnsɛt aɖe me la, nya aɖe (si wodzra ɖo) kaka si wogblɔ be Byron srɔ̃, Megan Kerrigan Byron ye ŋlɔe. Le nyatakaka si ƒe tanyae nye "Nya si wogblɔ le se nu tso Megan Byron gbɔ" nu la, Byron ŋlɔ bena: Eva susu me nam — eye edze abe internet ƒe afã hã va susu me nam ene — be srɔ̃nye, Andrew Byron, wɔ tiatia aɖewo.... Dutoƒo tɔwo. Le bɔlƒoƒea ƒe akaɖiwo te. Le Coldplay ƒe kɔnsɛt aɖe me. Teƒe si wometsɔa nuteƒemawɔmawɔ do ƒome zi geɖe o, gake afisiae míele. Mina magblɔe eme nakɔ bliboe: Menye ɖe mele nya sia ɖem ɖe go le ametakpɔkpɔ ta o, eye menye le dzigbãnyawo me hã o. Mele eɖem ɖe go le ŋusẽ me. Le nyateƒe me. Le seda asigɛwo kple aɖaŋu si woɖa me. Nyemaƒo ɖokuinye ɖe tsɔtsɔke si wowɔna me o, eye nyemetsɔ ɖeke le "amenuveve" ƒe nukpɔkpɔ me hã o. Nusi Andy wɔ menye ŋukpe ko o-enye nu tsɛwo. Nu bɔbɔ. Ŋutsu si di vevie be yeaxɔ ŋkɔ si eya ŋutɔ ƒe susuŋudɔwɔwɔ ƒe anyimanɔmanɔ wɔnuku la ɖiɖi. Melé aɖaŋuɖoɖowo me ɖe asi. Meto holdings me. Megbugbɔ ma nusi nye "mía tɔ" tsã ɖe nusi nye tɔnye fifia, dzadzɛ ŋutɔ. Menye ɖe mele tsatsam o. Mele dzi yim. Eye togbɔ be ɖewohĩ Andy yɔ Coldplay ƒe nyawo le eƒe nyagbɔgblɔ me hã la, ɖeko magblɔ be, esi akaɖiawo tsi la, mekpɔ nusianu nyuie. Na amesiwo le mɔ kpɔm na aɖatsi — nyemefaa avi ɖe elowns ta o, mewɔa ɖoɖo. Meŋlɔa nu ɖi. Megbugbɔ tua xɔwo. Esia menye hlɔ̃biabia o. Enye asitɔtrɔ le eŋu. Eye ase le eɖokui me le ɖoɖoezizi si akplɔe ɖo me. Nya sia kaka ɖe X (nudzraɖoƒe), Instagram (nudzraɖoƒe), Threads (nudzraɖoƒe) kple Bluesky (nudzraɖoƒe). Snopes xlẽlawo hã di míaƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒea, eye wobia be nya si wogblɔ la nye nyateƒe eye Byron gbɔe wòtso ŋutɔŋutɔ hã. Míekpɔ kpeɖodzi aɖeke be Byron gbɔe nya sia tso o, amesi wogblɔ be eɖe srɔ̃a ƒe ƒomeŋkɔ ɖa le eƒe Facebook-dzesi dzi hafi tutue le ŋkeke siwo kplɔ July 16 Coldplay-haƒoƒo si wowɔ le Foxborough, Massachusetts ɖo me o. Míekpɔ nyatakakatsoƒe xɔŋkɔ aɖeke si ka nya ta tso nya si wogblɔ be wogblɔ le July 18 lia dzi, si nye ŋkeke si dzi wogblɔ be Byron ɖee ɖe go (wodzrae ɖo, wodzrae ɖo, wodzrae ɖo, wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe). Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, nyateƒenyawo kple ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo ƒe vodada siwo gblẽ nu le kakaɖedzi si le eŋu ŋu la nɔ nyagbɔgblɔa me. Eyata míebu nya sia — be Byron ye ŋlɔ nya la — be enye alakpa. Nyateƒenya geɖe siwo wogblɔ le nya si Byron gblɔ me na ɖikeke va le nuŋlɔɖia ƒe nyateƒenyenye ŋu. Wogblɔ be Byron ɖe gbeƒã nya sia le July 18 lia dzi, si nye ŋkeke eve le Coldplay ƒe kɔnsɛt la megbe. Gake Byron ƒe nya la ku ɖe nya aɖe si wogblɔ be srɔ̃a Andy Byron gblɔ ŋu. Ɣletiviŋutinunyala, dɔwɔƒe si Andy Byron nɔ ŋgɔ na vaseɖe esime wòɖe asi le dɔ ŋu (wodzrae ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) le July 19 lia dzi, gblɔ (wodzrae ɖo) le July 18 lia dzi be "yemeɖe nya aɖeke ɖe go o." Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, woŋlɔ ŋkeke si nye "Manhattan, NY" ɖe nyagbɔgblɔa dzi. Le Mail Online, si nye tabloid nyadzɔdzɔwo ƒe nyatakakadzraɖoƒe tso U.K. si dɔ nyadzɔdzɔŋlɔlawo ɖa be woadi Byron ƒe nya nu la, ezã "kwasiɖanuwuwu" (July 18 nye Dzoɖagbe) le ƒomea ƒe aƒeme le Kennebunk, Maine. Mail Online kple nyatakakatsoƒe bubu siwo ka nya ta tso ŋutinyaa ŋu gblɔ be zi geɖe la, Byron ƒomea nɔa Massachusetts. Eyata susu aɖeke meli si dze ƒã si tae Byron nɔ New York le July 18. Le nya siwo míegblɔ va yi ɖeɖeɖa megbe la, ŋɔŋlɔdzesiwo kple nuŋɔŋlɔmedzesiwo ƒe vodadawo ("wit-infidelity," "elowns") siwo dze abe ɖe womate ŋu adzɔ o ene nɔ nyagbɔgblɔa me ne ɖe Byron di senyalawo ƒe aɖaŋuɖola vavã, abe alesi wogblɔe ene, eye wòto senyala siwo ɖikeke mele eme o be woakpɔ egbɔ be wogblɔe wòakɔ wu dzi. Le ɣeyiɣi si me nya la kaka me lɔƒo la, alakpa Facebook-dzesi geɖe siwo zã Byron ƒe foto siwo wokpɔ le nyadzɔdzɔwo me la do, si kaka nya bubu siwo wogblɔ be wogblɔ vodadatɔe. Wowɔ nuŋlɔɖi siawo dometɔ eve — ɖeka (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si kaka nya aɖe si woɖe ɖa tso ɣemaɣi si wogblɔ be Byron gbɔe wòtso eye ɖeka kaka nya (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) si woɖe fia le nyati sia me — le July 19 lia dzi, si nye ŋkeke aɖewo le Coldplay ƒe kɔnsɛt nudzɔdzɔa kaka xoxo megbe.

claim: "Dukɔmevi dzrowo ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔƒewo ƒe bɔmbdada nye aʋawɔnuvlowɔwɔ.”
evidence: Le Iran-ʋaa wɔɣi la, Dukplɔla Donald Trump do ŋɔdzi na U.S. be yeadze dumevi dzrowo ƒe xɔtuɖaŋuwo dzi ne Iran dziɖuɖua do kpo nudidi aɖewo dzi wɔwɔ. Le March 21 lia dzi la, Trump ŋlɔ ɖe Truth Social dzi be "ne Iran meʋu Hormuz Ƒukɔme BLIBOE, DODO MAÐE, le GAƑOƑO 48 me tso ɣeyiɣi sia tututu me o la, United States of America aƒo woƒe ƲUƲUƑOƑO vovovoawo eye woatutu wo ɖa, Adze egɔme tso GÃTƆ KPLE GBÃTƆ GBÃTƆ!" Togbɔ be emegbe Trump keke ɣeyiɣi mamlɛ ma ɖe enu zi eve hã la, egblɔ le March 30 dzi le Truth Social be "ne Hormuz Strait meʋu ‘ʋu na Asitsatsa’ enumake o la, míawu míaƒe ‘nɔnɔ’ lɔlɔ̃a nu le Iran to woƒe Elektrikŋusẽdɔwɔƒewo, Amidowo kple (amimamãƒe) Kharg Ƒukpowo katã dada kple wo tsɔtsrɔ̃ ɖa keŋkeŋ me," eye "ɖewohĩ dzetsiɖeɖedɔwɔƒewo katã." Trump gblɔ be womeɖo taɖodzinu mawo tɔgbe dzi haɖe le U.S. ƒe amedzidzedzewo me haɖe o, gake be woate ŋu awɔ amedzidzedze mawo tɔgbe "le hlɔ̃biabia me ɖe míaƒe asrafo gbogboawo, kple ame bubuwo, siwo Iran wui hewu wo le Dziɖuɖu xoxoa ƒe ƒe 47 ƒe ‘Ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ƒe Dziɖuɖu’ ta me numiemiewo dzidzi sesẽ ŋutɔ eye ɖewohĩ le ɣeyiɣi ɖeka me." Tso esime Trump do ŋɔdzi nɛ zi gbãtɔ la, ƒuƒoƒo siwo menye dziɖuɖu tɔ o kple Democrattɔwo ƒe sewɔlawo ƒoe ɖe enu be megadze dumevi dzrowo ƒe xɔtuɖoɖowo dzi o, eye wogblɔ be atsi tre ɖe dukɔwo dome sewo ŋu. Rep. Seth Moulton, D-Mass. — amesi le Sewɔtakpekpe ƒe ɖoƒe dim le ƒe sia me — gblɔ le MS NOW March 24 dzi be "bɔmbdada ɖe dumevi dzrowo ƒe ŋusẽdɔwɔƒewo nye aʋawɔnuvlowɔwɔ." Dukɔwo dome senyawo ŋuti nunyalawo gblɔ be woda asi ɖe Moulton ƒe nya sia dzi nyuie, togbɔ be nu ɣi aɖe le enyanya me nenye be amedzidzedze mawo anɔ se nu le dukɔwo dome sewo nu hã. Tsɔ kpe ɖe eŋu la, eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be anɔ eme be womabia akɔnta le Trump alo U.S. amegã bubu aɖeke ŋu ne wowɔ afɔɖeɖe sia tɔgbe o, elabena U.S. alo Iran siaa menye Dukɔwo Dome Nuvlowɔlawo ƒe Ʋɔnudrɔ̃ƒe me tɔ o. Moulton ƒe akɔdadaa mena kpeɖodzi aɖeke le eƒe nyaa ŋu o. Dukɔwo dome se ƒe ɖoɖo si sɔ tẽ wu la tso Geneva ƒe Nubablawo ƒe Ðoɖo Bubu I me, vevietɔ nubabla la ƒe akpa etɔ̃. Wogblɔ be: Amesiwo katã le aʋawɔwɔ me "nade vovototo dumevi dzrowo kple aʋawɔlawo dome ɣesiaɣi" eye "woahe woƒe dɔwɔwɔwo ɖe asrafowo ƒe taɖodzinuwo ŋu ko." "Wode se ɖe ŋutasẽnuwɔwɔ alo ŋɔdzidoname, si ƒe taɖodzinu vevitɔe nye be woakaka ŋɔdzinuwɔwɔ ɖe dumevi dzrowo dome la nu." Asrafowo ƒe taɖodzinuwo dzi dzedze nye esiwo "wɔa akpa vevi aɖe le asrafowo ƒe afɔɖeɖe me eye woƒe tsɔtsrɔ̃ blibo alo eƒe akpa aɖe, wo léle alo woƒe akpaɖekedzimademade ... naa asrafowo ƒe viɖe si ŋu kakaɖedzi le." Milena Sterio, si nye Cleveland Dukɔa ƒe Yunivɛsiti ƒe senyawo ŋuti nufialagã si bi ɖe dukɔwo dome senyawo me gblɔ be ne wotsɔ ɖoɖo siawo ƒo ƒui la, ana bɔmbdada ɖe dumevi dzrowo ƒe taɖodzinuwo dzi, siwo dome esiwo le Iran hã le, “nanye dukɔwo dome amegbetɔ ƒe kpekpeɖeŋunase dzi dada gaglãa.” Egblɔ be bɔmbdada ɖe dumevi dzrowo ƒe taɖodzinu aɖe dzi "ahe aʋawɔnuvlowɔwɔ vɛ." Sterio gblɔ be togbɔ be U.S. meda asi ɖe Ðoɖowɔɖi I dzi o hã la, "dekɔnuse ƒe ɖoƒe le nubabla la si, si bla dukɔwo katã." "Mehiã be U.S. menye ɖoɖowɔɖia me tɔ o." Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo ƒe Agbalẽŋlɔlagã António Guterres gblɔ na Politico be "ne amedzidzedze aɖe dzɔ ɖe Iran dzi alo tso Iran ɖe ŋusẽ ƒe xɔtuɖaŋuwo ŋu la, mesusu be susu nyuiwo li siwo ta woabui be woate ŋu anye aʋawɔnuvlowɔwɔ." Gake nu suesuesue aɖewo le se siwo gblɔ alesi Dukɔ Ƒoƒuawo atsɔ amedzidzedzeawo ade hatsotso me la me. Woyɔa taɖodzinu siwo wozãna le asrafowo kple dumevi dzrowo siaa me be "zazã eve." Sterio gblɔ be dukɔ si dzea ame dzi ate ŋu aʋli nya be dumevi dzrowo ƒe taɖodzinu si ne menye nenema o la le asrafodɔ aɖe wɔm, si ana wòanye asrafowo ƒe taɖodzinu si sɔ. Le nyaʋiʋli ma te la, Ðoɖowɔɖi I ƒe ɖoɖo bubu — "gɔmeɖose si nye be woawɔ nu wòasɔ ɖe wo nɔewo nu" — va le dɔ wɔm. Sterio gblɔ be: "Ahiã kokoko be nàda asrafowo ƒe viɖe si wokpɔ mɔ na la akpɔ kple dumevi dzrowo ƒe nuvevi si wò amedzidzedzea ahe vɛ." "Ne míeƒo nu tso ŋusẽ ɖeɖeɖa na ame akpe alo akpe ewo ŋu la, woate ŋu aʋli nya be dumevi dzrowo ƒe nuveviwɔame ƒo asrafowo ƒe viɖe ta." Stuart Ford, si nye Illinois-Chicago Yunivɛsiti ƒe sefialagã gblɔ be, gɔmeɖose si nye be woawɔ nu wòasɔ ɖe wo nɔewo nu "ne wole taɖodzinuawo dzi dzem abe asrafowo ƒe taɖodzinuwo ene ko — be woana asrafowo ƒe viɖe si woate ŋu adzidze na amedzidzela la." To vovo na ema la, ne wole wo dzi dzem abe mɔ aɖe ene

claim: Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo wodo ɖa le New York nutome la azã “ŋusẽ si aƒe siwo katã le nutoa me zãna ƒe teƒe eve lɔƒo ne wotsɔ wo katã ƒo ƒui.”
evidence: Esi Amerikatɔ geɖe le ga kple viɖe siwo woakpɔ tso nyatakakadzraɖoƒe gãwo tutu me hena nunya wɔwɔe kple dijitaal nyatakaka bubuwo dzrom la, New York Demokrasitɔ eve ƒoe ɖe dukɔa nu be wòatɔ te dɔ mawo tɔgbe wɔwɔ, eye wogblɔ be woate ŋu agblẽ nu le nuƒlelawo kple nutome ŋu. Le March 5 ƒe op-ed me le Albany Times-Union me la, New York nutome ƒe Sen. Liz Krueger kple Sewɔtakpekpe me tɔ Anna Kelles ʋli be woadzudzɔ dɔa wɔwɔ, eye wogblɔ be nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo wodo ɖa le nutoa me abia "elektrikŋusẽ gigawatt 9.5, si ade ŋusẽzazã ƒe teƒe eve wu aƒe siwo katã le nutoa me ne wotsɔ wo katã ƒo ƒui." New York sewɔlawo le eŋu bum be yewoatɔ te nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yeyewo wɔwɔ vaseɖe esime ŋusẽ si sɔ nasu amewo si be woatsɔ awɔ dɔwɔƒe siwo wodo ɖa la dzi. Dukɔ bubu geɖe hã bu ɖiɖiɖeme ma tɔgbe ŋu, togbɔ be wo dometɔ aɖeke mede se aɖeke haɖe o hã; Demokrasitɔwo ƒe Dziɖuɖumegã Janet Mills xe mɔ ɖe se ma tɔgbe nu le Maine. Esi míeɖo Krueger ƒe dɔwɔƒea la, nyanuɖela aɖe ɖo mí ɖe agbalẽvi aɖe si New York Independent System Operator, si nye dukɔa ƒe dɔwɔƒe aɖe si léa ŋku ɖe dukɔa ƒe elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃ ƒe kakaɖedzi ŋu eye wòwɔa ɖoɖo ɖe elektrikŋusẽ mama ŋu, ta la dzi. Woŋlɔ dɔ 35 siwo wodo ɖa la ɖe agbalẽa me, eye wòna elektrikŋusẽ si ate ŋu ahiã le etsɔme la ƒe nɔnɔmetata kpui aɖe. Eɖo kpe edzi be dɔ siwo wodo ɖa ƒe elektrikŋusẽ ƒe hiahiã anɔ abe gigawatt 9.5 ene ne ŋusẽ ƒe hiahiã sɔ gbɔ wu. Spreadsheet ƒe tata si kplɔe ɖo ɖe gigawatt 11 fia, gake woɖe esia ɖe go kwasiɖa geɖe le sewɔlawo ƒe woƒe op-ed ŋɔŋlɔ vɔ megbe. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒe ƒe dɔ siwo le xexlẽdzesiawo me ƒe nɔnɔme to vovo ŋutɔ; ame aɖewo ɖe mɔxenu siwo ku ɖe ɖoɖowɔwɔ kple xɔtutu ŋu ɖa xoxo evɔ bubuwo ya meɖee ɖa o. Gake eɖanye nɔnɔme ka kee woɖale o, elektrikŋusẽ si hiã gigawatt 9.5 si woƒo ƒu la mazu ŋusẽ si aƒewo katã zãna le New York nutome ƒe teƒe eve o. Krueger ƒe dɔwɔƒea gblɔ be akɔntabubua tso elektrikŋusẽ si dukɔa ƒe asisi siwo le aƒewo me zãna le mama dedie nu ɣleti sia ɣleti (kilowatt gaƒoƒo 576) xɔm eye emegbe woma ema ɖe 744, si nye gaƒoƒo agbɔsɔsɔme si wozãna le ɣleti si xɔ ŋkeke 31 me. Esia na wozãa gaƒoƒo ɖesiaɖe si ade kilowatt gaƒoƒo 0.8 le mama dedie nu. Emegbe wodzi ema ɖe edzi miliɔn 7.8, si nye aƒe siwo le New York nutome ƒe xexlẽme. Esia ƒe ƒuƒoƒo nye elektrikŋusẽ gigawatt 6.24 si New York dukɔa ƒe aƒewo zã. Nyatakakadzraɖoƒeawo ƒe akɔntabubu si wobu be wozãa gigawatt 9.5 la menye gigawatt 6.24 ƒe teƒe eve tso akɔntabubu si Krueger kple Kelles na me o. Gakpe ɖe eŋu la, fli bubu aɖe hã le tsɔtsɔ sɔ kple wo nɔewo ŋu, Kenneth Gilligham, gaŋutinunyala le Yale Nutome Suku gblɔ na PolitiFact New York. Gigawatt 6.24 ƒe xexlẽme fia nusi aƒewo zãna le mama dedie nu, gake gigawatt 9.5 ƒe xexlẽme fia "nuzazã ƒe agbɔsɔsɔ gãtɔ," si nye agbɔsɔsɔ gãtɔ kekeake si nyatakakadzraɖoƒewo ahiã le woƒe zazã ƒe ɣeyiɣi sesẽtɔ kekeake me. Gillingham gblɔ be: "Zi geɖe la, míetsɔa ɖe le nuzazã ƒe agbɔsɔsɔme si sɔ gbɔ wu kple alesi wòate ŋu adzɔe be wòate gbe ɖe elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃a ƒe ŋutete dzi wu alesi míetsia dzi ɖe nuzazã bliboa ŋu." Be Gillingham natsɔ akɔɖu kple akɔɖu asɔ kple wo nɔewo wu la, eyɔ nyatakaka siwo ɖee fia be zi geɖe la, elektrikŋusẽ si hiã le aƒewo me nyea elektrikŋusẽ si hiã katã ƒe akpa etɔ̃lia ko. Ne wozã akpa sue ma ɖe dzomeŋɔli ƒe didi si sɔ gbɔ wu na New York nutome, si ade gigawatt 30, afia be agba si sɔ gbɔ wu le aƒewo me si ade gigawatt 10 alo 11. Ema sɔ gbɔ wu gigawatt 9.5 si wodo ɖa tso nyatakakadzraɖoƒe siwo wodo ɖa, eye wòsɔ kple gigawatt 11 si le agbalẽvi yeyea me. Ke hã, Gillingham gblɔ be elektrikŋusẽ ƒe agba bubu gigawatt 9.5 anye “nu gã aɖe ŋutɔ” eye be elektrikŋusẽnamɔ̃ si li fifia “medzra ɖo ɖe agba ƒe dzidziɖedzi wɔnuku sia ŋu o nublanuitɔe.” Krueger gblɔ be nyatakakadzraɖoƒe yeye siwo wodo ɖa le New York nutome la abia be “woazã ŋusẽ si ade aƒe siwo katã le nutoa me ƒe teƒe eve ne wotsɔ wo katã ƒo ƒui.” Ɣekaɣie dɔ siwo katã wodo ɖa la le dɔ wɔm eye ne wole dɔ wɔm la, abia be woaxɔ elektrikŋusẽ si wobu be anye gigawatt 9.5 le ɣeyiɣi siwo me amewo sɔa gbɔ ɖo wu. Gake ema menye aƒewo ƒe zazã ƒe teƒe eve o. Le mama dedie nu la, aƒewo ƒe zazã anɔ abe gigawatt 6.24 ene eye anɔ abe gigawatt 11 ene le ɣeyiɣi siwo me amewo sɔa gbɔ wu me. Ke hã, eŋutinunyalawo gblɔ be ŋusẽ si dɔwɔƒea hiã la alolo ŋutɔ. Nyateƒe ƒe akpa aɖe le nyagbɔgblɔa me gake eŋea aɖaba ƒua nyateƒenya vevi siwo ana amewo nasusui le mɔ bubu nu dzi. Míebua eŋu be Aʋatsoe.

claim: Le March 2026 me la, U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump gblɔ le Saudi Arabia ƒe Fiaviŋutsu Mohammed bin Salman ŋu be, "Mesusu be yeagbugbɔ nu na nye a** o."
evidence: Ku ɖe dzeside sia ŋu Video aɖe kaka ɖe internet dzi le March 2026 me si dze abe ɖe wòɖe U.S. Dukplɔla Donald Trump fia ene be Saudi Arabia ƒe Fiaviŋutsu Mohammed bin Salman "mesusu be yeagbugbɔ nu na nye a** o." Videoa kaka ɖe mɔ̃ vovovowo dzi, eye ezãla geɖe siwo nɔ nyaŋuɖoɖoawo me ɖe ɖikeke gblɔ be videoa nye nyateƒe, eye wogblɔ be ɖewohĩ wozã nunya wɔwɔe tsɔ wɔe. Nuxlẽlawo bia tso Snopes hã si be wòaɖo kpe nya la dzi A post shared by INDIANS (@indians) Wogblɔ be nya si wogblɔ la tso Trump gbɔ nyuie — egblɔ nya sia (le abe ga 43:02 ene) esime wòdo le takpekpe aɖe me le Miami na Saudi nonprofit Future Investment Initiative. White House ta eƒe nuƒoa ƒe video (si wodzra ɖo ɖe nudzraɖoƒe) ɖe YouTube le March 27, 2026. Míetsɔ eƒe nya siwo keke ta la kpe ɖe eŋu be míatsɔ aɖe nya siwo ƒo xlã nya si wòyɔ la afia. Egblɔ (míawo tɔ te gbe ɖe edzi): Ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe va yi la, ŋutsu aɖe si ŋu míeƒo nu tsoe teti koe nye ema, fia, Saudi Arabia ƒe fia si ava va, eye nye hã melɔ̃ Saudi Arabia fia [...] gake ɣeyiɣi kpui aɖe va yi la, míenɔ anyi ɖekae eye wòkpɔm eye wògblɔ be, "Ènyaa, ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ, ƒe ɖeka enye sia la, ènye dukɔ kuku. Fifia, wòe nye dukɔ si me dzoxɔxɔ le wu le xexeame ƒe akpa ɖesiaɖe." Mesusu be esia ava eme o. Mesusu be yeagbugbɔ nu na nye a** o. Le nyateƒe me la, mewɔe nenema o. Esusu be Amerika dukplɔla bubu aɖe koe anye amesi bu le afisi dukɔa le to yim le, gake fifia ele be wòawɔ nu nyui nam. Ègblɔ nɛ be anyo be wòawɔ nu nyui nam. Ele be wòanɔ nenema. Gake nane ŋutɔŋutɔe wònye. Ao, egblɔ be, ke hã, egblɔ be, "Ènyaa, ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ, Dukplɔla" — elabena enye aɖaŋudzela ŋutɔ eye — gake enye ŋutsu ƒomevi si nɔa anyi edziedzi. Egblɔ be, "Ènyaa, ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ, Dukplɔla, ƒe ɖeka enye sia" — le nɔnɔme ma me la, ƒe ɖeka kple afãe wònye, ɣleti ade enye sia, gake — "ƒe ɖeka enye sia la, dukɔ kukue nènye. Fifia, le nyateƒe me la, ènye dukɔ si me dzoxɔxɔ le wu le xexeame ƒe teƒe ɖesiaɖe." Eye ema nye hafi míeƒo dzomavɔ la do goe le Iran. Ènya? Fifia, mesusu be exɔ — enyo wu gɔ̃ hã. Mesusu be ele be míadoe ɖe dzi, gake ewɔ nuku ŋutɔ. Eye nusianu si míewɔna la, míele dɔ wɔm be míana Amerika nanye teƒe 1 le anyigba dzi be míawɔ asitsatsa. Kpuie ko la, Trump ƒe nyawo kple eƒe dzedze le Miami takpekpea me ɖee fia be ganyawo ƒe kadodo aɖe le U.S. kple Saudi Arabia dome si Trump dziɖuɖua va le titina ɖom ɖe edzi le ɣleti siwo va yi nyitsɔ laa me — vevietɔ esi wòxɔ Saudi fiakukufiavi le White House le November 2025. Fiavi Mohammad meɖo nya ŋu na Trump ƒe nyawo o, vaseɖe esime míele nyati sia ŋlɔm.
